name: 30 Days of Powerful Words
description: Master essential IELTS vocabulary organized by topic

words.definition: Gap between people who have access to technology and those who do not.
words.example1: The digital divide is growing in rural areas where internet access is limited.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishda yangi loyiha haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashyapsiz va u qishloq hududlardagi mijozlar texnologiyadan foydalana olmasligini aytadi, shunda siz bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Governments must invest in infrastructure to bridge the digital divide and ensure equal access to education.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ijtimoiy mas'uliyat dasturi haqida yig'ilishda gaplashyapsiz va hukumat bilan hamkorlik qilish kerakligini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The pandemic exposed the severity of the digital divide, as millions of students lacked access to devices and reliable internet connectivity needed for remote learning.
words.example3Translation: Pandemiya raqamli tafovutning qanchalik chuqur ekanligini ko'rsatdi, chunki millionlab o'quvchilar masofaviy ta'lim uchun zarur bo'lgan qurilmalar va ishonchli internet aloqasiga ega emasdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro konferensiyada ta'lim texnologiyalari haqida nutq so'zlayapsiz va pandemiya davrida yuzaga kelgan muammolarni misol sifatida keltirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Use of machines or technology instead of human labor.
words.example1: Automation has made many factory jobs obsolete over the past decade.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishlab chiqarish korxonasida hamkasbingiz bilan texnologiya haqida suhbatlashyapsiz va u ishchilar sonining kamayishini hayron bo'lib so'raganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is investing heavily in automation to reduce costs and improve efficiency across all departments.
words.example2Situation: Siz boshqaruvchilar yig'ilishida kelgusi yil byudjetini taqdim etayotganda va texnologiyaga sarmoya kiritish zarurligini asoslayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While automation significantly boosts productivity and reduces human error, it simultaneously displaces workers and demands a comprehensive retraining strategy to mitigate socioeconomic consequences.
words.example3Translation: Avtomatlashtirish samaradorlikni sezilarli darajada oshiradi va inson xatolarini kamaytiradi, lekin bir vaqtning o'zida ishchilarni ishdan bo'shatadi va ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy oqibatlarni yumshatish uchun keng qamrovli qayta tayyorlash strategiyasini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz HR bo'limi boshlig'i sifatida kengash oldida kompaniyaning avtomatlashtirish strategiyasi va uning xodimlarga ta'siri haqida hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Protection against online attacks and unauthorized access to digital systems.
words.example1: Strong cybersecurity measures protect your personal data from hackers.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi xodimga kompaniyaning IT qoidalarini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: After the data breach, the company invested millions in upgrading its cybersecurity infrastructure.
words.example2Situation: Siz IT xavfsizlik bo'yicha yig'ilishda ma'lumotlar sizib chiqishi hodisasini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: As cyber threats become increasingly sophisticated, organizations must adopt a proactive cybersecurity framework that integrates threat intelligence, employee training, and real-time monitoring systems.
words.example3Translation: Kiber tahdidlar tobora murakkablashib borayotganligi sababli, tashkilotlar tahdid razvedkasi, xodimlarni o'qitish va real vaqtli monitoring tizimlarini birlashtirgan proaktiv kiberxavfsizlik tizimini qabul qilishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yillik xavfsizlik auditi hisobotini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Over-reliance on technology for daily tasks and functions.
words.example1: Our technological dependence has made it hard to function without a smartphone.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingiz bilan kafe ichida o'tirib, u telefoni o'chib qolganda qanday bezovtalanganini aytganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The power outage revealed just how deep our technological dependence runs in modern workplaces.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofisda elektr uzilishi bo'lgandan keyin hamkasblaringiz bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Excessive technological dependence not only diminishes critical thinking and problem-solving skills but also creates systemic vulnerabilities when infrastructure fails during emergencies.
words.example3Translation: Texnologiyaga haddan tashqari qaramlik nafaqat tanqidiy fikrlash va muammolarni hal qilish qobiliyatlarini pasaytiradi, balki favqulodda vaziyatlarda infratuzilma ishdan chiqqanda tizimli zaifliklarni ham keltirib chiqaradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya xavf-xatarlarini boshqarish bo'yicha seminar o'tkazayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: New methods, ideas, or products that bring meaningful change.
words.example1: Innovation in renewable energy is helping reduce our carbon footprint.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan kompaniyangizning yangi ekologik loyihasi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The company encourages innovation by giving employees time each week to work on their own creative projects.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi xodimga kompaniya madaniyatini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sustained innovation requires not only financial investment and technological infrastructure but also a corporate culture that tolerates failure and rewards unconventional thinking.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror innovatsiya nafaqat moliyaviy investitsiya va texnologik infratuzilmani, balki muvaffaqiyatsizlikka toqat qiladigan va an'anaviy bo'lmagan fikrlashni mukofotlaydigan korporativ madaniyatni ham talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning strategik rejalash sessiyasida innovatsion madaniyatni rivojlantirish haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Machine simulation of human intelligence and decision-making processes.
words.example1: Artificial Intelligence is now used in smartphones to improve photo quality automatically.
words.example1Situation: Siz oila a'zolaringizga yangi telefon xususiyatlarini ko'rsatayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is implementing Artificial Intelligence to analyze customer data and personalize marketing campaigns.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing bo'limi bilan yig'ilishda yangi texnologiyalarni joriy etish haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Artificial Intelligence is fundamentally transforming industries by enabling predictive analytics, automating complex decision-making, and generating insights from vast datasets that would be impossible for humans to process manually.
words.example3Translation: Sun'iy intellekt prognozli tahlil qilishni ta'minlash, murakkab qaror qabul qilishni avtomatlashtirish va odamlar qo'lda qayta ishlashi mumkin bo'lmagan katta ma'lumotlar to'plamidan xulosalar olish orqali sanoat tarmoqlarini tubdan o'zgartirmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz texnologiya konferensiyasida AI ning kelajagi haqida nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Ability to use social media critically, responsibly, and effectively.
words.example1: Social media literacy helps people identify fake news and misleading content online.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan soxta yangiliklarni qanday ajratish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Companies now require employees to complete social media literacy training before managing official accounts.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi xodimga onboarding jarayonida kompaniyaning ijtimoiy tarmoq siyosatini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In an era of algorithmic content curation and widespread misinformation, social media literacy has become an indispensable competency for both personal decision-making and professional reputation management.
words.example3Translation: Algoritmik kontent tanlash va keng tarqalgan dezinformatsiya davrida ijtimoiy tarmoq savodxonligi shaxsiy qaror qabul qilish va professional obro'ni boshqarish uchun ham zarur kompetensiyaga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning PR strategiyasi haqida yuqori rahbariyat bilan suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Working from a location outside the traditional office environment.
words.example1: Remote work allows employees to save time and money on daily commuting.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingizga yangi ish joyingiz haqida aytayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Since switching to remote work, our team's productivity has increased by 30 percent according to recent surveys.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbaringizga masofaviy ish rejimini davom ettirish kerakligini asoslayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While remote work offers unprecedented flexibility and autonomy, it simultaneously challenges organizational cohesion, necessitates robust digital communication infrastructure, and blurs the boundaries between professional and personal life.
words.example3Translation: Masofaviy ish misli ko'rilmagan moslashuvchanlik va mustaqillikni taklif qilsa-da, u bir vaqtning o'zida tashkiliy uyushqoqlikka qiyinchilik tug'diradi va professional va shaxsiy hayot o'rtasidagi chegaralarni xiralashtiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz HR konferensiyasida masofaviy ishning kelajagi haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Discarded electronic products and devices that are no longer in use.
words.example1: Old phones and laptops contribute significantly to the growing problem of e-waste.
words.example1Situation: Siz ofisda eskirgan kompyuterlarni qanday yo'q qilish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company has partnered with a certified recycling center to properly dispose of e-waste from our offices.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ekologik mas'uliyat dasturi haqida mijozlarga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The exponential growth of e-waste poses severe environmental and public health risks, as toxic components such as lead, mercury, and cadmium leach into soil and groundwater when improperly disposed of.
words.example3Translation: Elektron chiqindilarning tez sur'atda ko'payishi qo'rg'oshin, simob va kadmiy kabi zaharli komponentlar noto'g'ri yo'q qilinganda tuproq va er osti suvlariga singishi bilan jiddiy atrof-muhit va jamoat salomatligi xavflarini tug'diradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz atrof-muhit muhandisi sifatida kompaniyaning barqaror rivojlanish hisobotini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The trail of data left behind from a person's online activities.
words.example1: Every time you search online, you leave a digital footprint that companies can track.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga internet xavfsizligi haqida maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Job seekers should be aware that employers often review candidates' digital footprints before making hiring decisions.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR bo'limingizdagi hamkasbingizga nomzodlarni tekshirish usullarini aytayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Managing your digital footprint has become a critical professional skill, as a careless online presence can permanently damage your reputation and undermine career advancement opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli izingizni boshqarish muhim kasbiy ko'nikmaga aylandi, chunki ehtiyotsiz onlayn mavjudlik obro'ingizga doimiy zarar yetkazishi va martaba o'sishi imkoniyatlarini yo'qqa chiqarishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz yangi xodimlarga kompaniyaning ijtimoiy media siyosatini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Technology designed to minimize environmental impact.
words.example1: Sustainable tech like solar panels is becoming more affordable for everyday consumers.
words.example1Situation: Siz qo'shningiz bilan uy xarajatlarini kamaytirish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our R&D department is focused on developing sustainable tech solutions that reduce our manufacturing carbon footprint.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yillik hisobotini tayyorlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The transition to sustainable tech is no longer optional for corporations, as regulatory pressures, investor expectations, and consumer demand increasingly converge to make environmental responsibility a fundamental business imperative.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror texnologiyaga o'tish korporatsiyalar uchun endi ixtiyoriy emas, chunki tartibga solish bosimi, investor kutishlari va iste'molchi talabi tobora bir-biriga qo'shilib, atrof-muhit mas'uliyatini asosiy biznes zaruriyatiga aylantirmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ barqarorlik strategiyasi bo'yicha kengash yig'ilishida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The state of having too much information to process effectively.
words.example1: Information overload from too many emails can reduce workplace productivity.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan ish samaradorligi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The company introduced a no-meeting policy on Fridays to help employees recover from information overload during the week.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi ish joyingizni do'stingizga tavsiflaytganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Chronic information overload not only impairs cognitive performance and decision-making quality but also contributes to workplace burnout, necessitating organizational strategies that prioritize information curation over unrestricted data sharing.
words.example3Translation: Surunkali ma'lumot ortiqchaligi nafaqat kognitiv ishlash va qaror qabul qilish sifatini buzadi, balki ish joyida charchoqqa ham hissa qo'shadi va cheksiz ma'lumot almashish o'rniga ma'lumotlarni tanlashga ustuvorlik beradigan tashkiliy strategiyalarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ichki kommunikatsiya siyosatini qayta ko'rib chiqish bo'yicha yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The protection of personal data shared while using digital services.
words.example1: User privacy is protected by law in many countries, limiting how companies use your data.
words.example1Situation: Siz mijozingizga kompaniyaning ma'lumotlardan foydalanish siyosatini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our app collects minimal data and never shares it with third parties, making user privacy our top priority.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi mahsulotingizni potensial mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: As data monetization becomes increasingly central to business models, striking a meaningful balance between personalization and user privacy represents one of the most complex ethical and regulatory challenges facing the technology industry.
words.example3Translation: Ma'lumotlarni monetizatsiya qilish biznes modellarining tobora markaziy elementiga aylanib borayotganligi sababli, personalizatsiya va foydalanuvchi maxfiyligi o'rtasida mazmunli muvozanatni saqlash texnologiya sanoati oldidagi eng murakkab axloqiy muammolardan biriga aylanmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ma'lumotlardan foydalanish siyosatini yuristlar va rahbariyat bilan birgalikda qayta ko'rib chiqayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Innovation that fundamentally changes or displaces established industries.
words.example1: Smartphones caused technological disruption in the camera and music industries.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnologiya tarixi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The rise of streaming platforms represents a major technological disruption that permanently altered how people consume entertainment.
words.example2Situation: Siz media sanoatidagi o'zgarishlar haqida tahlil qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Navigating technological disruption requires organizations to cultivate adaptive leadership, invest continuously in workforce reskilling, and develop strategic foresight capabilities that anticipate market shifts before they become existential threats.
words.example3Translation: Texnologik buzilishni boshqarish tashkilotlardan moslashuvchan rahbarlikni rivojlantirishni va bozor o'zgarishlarini ular mavjudlik tahdidiga aylanishidan oldin oldindan ko'ra oladigan strategik bashorat qobiliyatlarini rivojlantirishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning 5 yillik strategik rejasini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To reduce or eliminate differences between two groups or situations.
words.example1: Online courses help bridge the gap between traditional education and modern skills.
words.example1Situation: Siz xodimlaringizni o'qitish dasturi haqida rahbaringiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The mentorship program was designed to bridge the gap between senior executives and entry-level employees.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR bo'limi rahbari sifatida yangi mentorlik dasturini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: To effectively bridge the gap between policy intention and real-world implementation, governments must engage directly with affected communities and establish transparent accountability mechanisms.
words.example3Translation: Siyosat niyati va real hayotda amalga oshirish o'rtasidagi bo'shliqni samarali to'ldirish uchun hukumatlar ta'sir qilingan jamoalar bilan bevosita muloqot qilishi va shaffof hisobdorlik mexanizmlarini o'rnatishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz davlat tashkiloti vakili sifatida yangi ijtimoiy dasturning samaradorligini oshirish bo'yicha konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The total amount of CO2 released due to one's activities.
words.example1: Taking the bus instead of driving can reduce your carbon footprint.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan ish joyiga qanday borish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company has committed to reducing its carbon footprint by 50 percent before 2030.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning barqarorlik strategiyasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Calculating and actively reducing your carbon footprint has become a corporate responsibility, as stakeholders increasingly hold organizations accountable for their environmental impact.
words.example3Translation: Karbon izingizni hisoblash va faol ravishda kamaytirish korporativ mas'uliyatga aylandi, chunki manfaatdor tomonlar tobora ko'proq tashkilotlarni atrof-muhitga ta'siri uchun javobgar qilmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz ESG hisoboti bo'yicha kengash yig'ilishida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Energy from natural sources that replenish themselves, such as solar and wind.
words.example1: Many homes are now powered by renewable energy through solar panels on their roofs.
words.example1Situation: Siz qo'shningiz bilan uy xarajatlarini kamaytirish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Investing in renewable energy now will save our company millions in electricity costs over the next decade.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliya bo'limi bilan yig'ilishda uzoq muddatli sarmoya rejalarini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The global transition to renewable energy requires unprecedented international cooperation, massive infrastructure investment, and a fundamental restructuring of existing energy markets.
words.example3Translation: Qayta tiklanadigan energiyaga global o'tish misli ko'rilmagan xalqaro hamkorlikni, katta infratuzilma investitsiyalarini va mavjud energiya bozorlarini tubdan qayta qurish talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz energetika sohasidagi xalqaro konferensiyada mamlakatingizning yashil energetika strategiyasini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The large-scale removal of forests for agriculture or development.
words.example1: Deforestation in the Amazon is destroying habitats for thousands of animal species.
words.example1Situation: Siz ekologiya haqidagi hujjatli filmni ko'rgandan so'ng hamkasbingiz bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company has a strict policy against sourcing materials from suppliers linked to deforestation.
words.example2Situation: Siz ta'minot zanjiri auditi natijalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Unchecked deforestation not only decimates biodiversity and displaces indigenous communities but also accelerates climate change by eliminating forests that serve as critical carbon sinks.
words.example3Translation: Nazorat qilinmagan o'rmonlarni kesish nafaqat biologik xilma-xillikni yo'q qiladi va mahalliy aholini ko'chiradi, balki muhim karbon yutqizlari bo'lgan o'rmonlarni yo'q qilish orqali iqlim o'zgarishini ham tezlashtiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz atrof-muhit siyosati bo'yicha parlament tinglovida ekspert sifatida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Growth that meets present needs without harming future generations.
words.example1: Sustainable development means building cities that are green and livable for everyone.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar rejalashtirish loyihasi haqida mijozingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization has aligned its business strategy with the UN's Sustainable Development Goals.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yillik hisobotini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Achieving sustainable development demands a delicate equilibrium between economic productivity, social equity, and environmental stewardship, requiring governments and corporations to fundamentally rethink conventional growth models.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror rivojlanishga erishish iqtisodiy unumdorlik, ijtimoiy adolat va atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish o'rtasida nozik muvozanatni talab qiladi va hukumatlar hamda korporatsiyalardan an'anaviy o'sish modellarini tubdan qayta ko'rib chiqishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro rivojlanish agentligida loyiha rahbari sifatida donor mamlakatlar bilan strategik hamkorlik muzokara qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Gases like CO2 and methane that trap heat in the atmosphere.
words.example1: Cars and factories are major sources of greenhouse gases in our cities.
words.example1Situation: Siz ekologiya seminarida iqlim o'zgarishi sabablari haqida tushuntirish berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Reducing greenhouse gases emissions is now a legal requirement for large corporations in many countries.
words.example2Situation: Siz yuridik bo'lim bilan yangi ekologik qonunchilik talablarini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The scientific consensus is unequivocal: without dramatic reductions in greenhouse gases within this decade, the cascading effects of climate change will become increasingly irreversible.
words.example3Translation: Ilmiy konsensus aniq: ushbu o'n yillik ichida issiqxona gazlarini dramatik darajada kamaytirmasdan, iqlim o'zgarishining kaskadli ta'sirlari tobora qaytarib bo'lmas bo'lib boradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz iqlim siyosati bo'yicha hukumat amaldorlari bilan uchrashuvda ilmiy tavsiyalar berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Not harmful to the environment.
words.example1: We switched to eco-friendly packaging to reduce plastic waste in our office.
words.example1Situation: Siz ofis boshqaruvchisi sifatida yangi xarid qilish siyosatini xodimlarga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Customers are increasingly choosing eco-friendly products even when they cost slightly more.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing strategiyasi bo'yicha yig'ilishda iste'molchilar xulq-atvoridagi o'zgarishlarni tahlil qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Developing genuinely eco-friendly products requires a lifecycle assessment that considers environmental impact at every stage from raw material extraction through manufacturing and final disposal.
words.example3Translation: Haqiqatan ham ekologik toza mahsulotlarni ishlab chiqish xom ashyoni qazib olishdan tortib ishlab chiqarish va yakuniy utilizatsiyagacha bo'lgan har bir bosqichda atrof-muhitga ta'sirni hisobga oladigan hayot tsikli bahosini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mahsulot ishlab chiqish bo'limi bilan yangi mahsulot liniyasining barqarorlik standartlarini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Presence of harmful substances in the environment.
words.example1: Air pollution in big cities is making it harder for people to breathe properly.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahardagi havo sifati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The factory was fined heavily for causing water pollution in the nearby river.
words.example2Situation: Siz ekologik qonunchilik bo'yicha treningda real holatni misol sifatida keltirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Industrial pollution represents one of the most persistent challenges in environmental governance, as corporations frequently prioritize short-term profitability over long-term ecological responsibility.
words.example3Translation: Sanoat ifloslanishi atrof-muhit boshqaruvida eng doimiy muammolardan birini ifodalaydi, chunki korporatsiyalar tez-tez uzoq muddatli ekologik mas'uliyat o'rniga qisqa muddatli foydalikka ustuvorlik beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz atrof-muhit bo'yicha davlat regulyatori sifatida yangi sanoat korxonasiga litsenziya berish masalasini ko'rib chiqayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Protection of natural resources and the environment.
words.example1: Water conservation is important, especially in regions facing drought.
words.example1Situation: Siz ofisda suv tejash choralarini joriy etish haqida xodimlarga ma'lumot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The national park was established for the conservation of endangered species and their habitats.
words.example2Situation: Siz ekologiya loyihasini moliyalashtiruvchi donor tashkilotga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective conservation requires not merely designating protected areas but integrating biodiversity considerations into mainstream economic planning and urban development strategies.
words.example3Translation: Samarali muhofaza qilish nafaqat himoyalangan hududlarni belgilashni, balki biologik xilma-xillik mulohazalarini asosiy iqtisodiy rejalashtirishga va shahar rivojlanish strategiyalariga integratsiya qilishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tabiatni muhofaza qilish tashkilotida strategik rejalashtirish yig'ilishida davlat va xususiy sektor vakillari bilan muloqot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Long-term change in global weather patterns due to human activities.
words.example1: Climate change is causing more frequent and severe storms around the world.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangiliklar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company has developed a climate change adaptation plan to protect our supply chain from extreme weather events.
words.example2Situation: Siz xavf-xatarlarni boshqarish bo'yicha yig'ilishda biznes barqarorligini ta'minlash choralarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Climate change represents an existential threat that transcends national boundaries, demanding coordinated global action and a fundamental transformation of energy, food, and transportation systems.
words.example3Translation: Iqlim o'zgarishi milliy chegaralardan o'tuvchi mavjudlik tahdidini ifodalaydi va muvofiqlashtirilgan global harakatni va energiya, oziq-ovqat hamda transport tizimlarini tubdan o'zgartirishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz davlat rahbarlarining iqlim sammitida mamlakatlar o'rtasida kelishuv tuzishda vositachi sifatida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Variety of plant and animal life in a habitat.
words.example1: Coral reefs support incredible biodiversity and must be protected from bleaching.
words.example1Situation: Siz ekologiya bo'yicha treningda ishtirokchilarga dengiz ekotizimlarining ahamiyatini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our agricultural suppliers are required to follow practices that protect local biodiversity.
words.example2Situation: Siz barqaror ta'minot zanjiri auditi jarayonida yetkazib beruvchilarga qo'yiladigan talablarni tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The accelerating loss of biodiversity undermines ecosystem resilience, compromises food security, and eliminates potential sources of medical breakthroughs, making its preservation an economic and public health necessity.
words.example3Translation: Biologik xilma-xillikning tezlashib borayotgan yo'qolishi ekotizim barqarorligini zaiflashtirar ekan, oziq-ovqat xavfsizligini buzadi va tibbiy kashfiyotlarning potensial manbalarini yo'q qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biotexnologiya kompaniyasining ilmiy-tadqiqot bo'limida investorlar bilan biologik resurslardan barqaror foydalanish strategiyasini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Deterioration of the environment through resource depletion.
words.example1: Environmental degradation in industrial zones has made the air unsafe to breathe.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar muhitidagi sog'liq muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The report highlighted how rapid urbanization is contributing to environmental degradation in coastal regions.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar rivojlanish loyihasining ekologik ta'sirini baholovchi hisobot taqdimotida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Environmental degradation disproportionately affects vulnerable communities, who bear the greatest health burdens while contributing least to the industrial activities responsible for ecological destruction.
words.example3Translation: Atrof-muhitning yomonlashuvi mutanosib ravishda zaif jamoalarga ta'sir qiladi, ular ekologik vayronagarchilikka mas'ul bo'lgan sanoat faoliyatiga eng kam hissa qo'shgan holda eng katta sog'liq yukini ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy adolat va ekologiya masalalari bo'yicha xalqaro forum ishtirokchisi sifatida chiqish qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Lifestyle that aims to send no waste to landfills.
words.example1: Our office adopted a zero-waste policy by eliminating single-use plastics completely.
words.example1Situation: Siz ofis barqarorlik initsiativalari haqida yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The zero-waste movement is gaining momentum as consumers demand more sustainable packaging from brands.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahsulot qadoqlash strategiyasini qayta ko'rib chiqish bo'yicha marketing jamoasi bilan yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Transitioning to a zero-waste operational model demands systemic redesign of production processes and supplier relationships, requiring significant upfront investment but yielding long-term cost savings.
words.example3Translation: Chiqindisiz operatsion modelga o'tish ishlab chiqarish jarayonlari va yetkazib beruvchilar bilan munosabatlarni tizimli qayta loyihalashni talab qiladi, dastlabki katta investitsiyalarni talab qiladi, lekin uzoq muddatli xarajatlarni tejash beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ishlab chiqarish kompaniyasida operatsiyalar direktori sifatida kengashga chiqindisiz ishlab chiqarishga o'tish yo'l xaritasini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Natural fuels formed from ancient organisms such as coal, oil, and gas.
words.example1: Burning fossil fuels is the leading cause of air pollution in most cities.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar transporti muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our investment portfolio is gradually shifting away from fossil fuels toward clean energy alternatives.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy tahlilchi sifatida investorlar bilan portfelli diversifikatsiya strategiyasini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The continued subsidization of fossil fuels by governments represents a fundamental contradiction in climate policy, undermining carbon pricing mechanisms and deterring private investment in clean energy.
words.example3Translation: Hukumatlar tomonidan qazilma yoqilg'ini davom ettirilgan subsidiyalash iqlim siyosatidagi asosiy qarama-qarshilikni ifodalaydi va toza energiyaga xususiy investitsiyalarni to'sib qo'yadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz energetika siyosati bo'yicha yuqori darajali hukumat maslahatchisi sifatida moliya vazirligi bilan subsidiya islohoti bo'yicha muzokaralar olib borayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Release of carbon dioxide into the atmosphere from burning fossil fuels.
words.example1: Planting trees is one simple way to offset carbon emissions in our daily lives.
words.example1Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yashil initsiativalari haqida xodimlarga ma'lumot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We have set a target to reduce our carbon emissions by 40 percent over the next five years.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyaning ekologik majburiyatlarini press-relizda e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Without rigorous carbon emissions trading schemes and border adjustment mechanisms, national climate commitments risk creating competitive disadvantages that incentivize carbon leakage to less regulated jurisdictions.
words.example3Translation: Qat'iy karbon chiqindilari savdo sxemalari va chegara sozlash mexanizmlarisiz, milliy iqlim majburiyatlari kamroq tartibga solinadigan yurisdiksiyalarga karbon oqib chiqishini rag'batlantiradigan raqobatbardosh kamchiliklarni keltirib chiqarish xavfini tug'diradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz Yevropa Ittifoqining iqlim siyosati bo'yicha muzokaralarida mamlakatingiz delegatsiyasini boshqarayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Community of interacting organisms and their environment.
words.example1: A healthy forest ecosystem supports thousands of species of plants and animals.
words.example1Situation: Siz tabiatni muhofaza qilish loyihasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Pollution from agricultural runoff is destroying the delicate ecosystem of the local river.
words.example2Situation: Siz atrof-muhit ta'sirini baholash hisobotini mahalliy hokimiyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The collapse of a single keystone species can trigger cascading disruption throughout an entire ecosystem, underscoring the profound interconnectedness of biological communities.
words.example3Translation: Bitta kalit turning qulashi butun ekotizim bo'ylab kaskadli buzilishni keltirib chiqarishi mumkin, bu biologik jamoalarning chuqur o'zaro bog'liqligini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biologiya professori sifatida davlat hududini rivojlantirish loyihasining ekologik ekspertizasida ekotizim xizmatlarining iqtisodiy qiymatini izohlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Educating the whole person including mind, body, and emotions.
words.example1: Holistic education encourages students to develop creativity alongside academic skills.
words.example1Situation: Siz maktab direktoriyati bilan yangi o'quv dasturini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our school adopted a holistic education model that balances academics, sports, arts, and emotional wellbeing.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizda xodimlarni o'qitish dasturini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Holistic education challenges the reductive focus on standardized metrics by recognizing that genuine human development encompasses intellectual curiosity, emotional resilience, and creative expression.
words.example3Translation: Yaxlit ta'lim haqiqiy inson rivojlanishi intellektual qiziqish, hissiy barqarorlik va ijodiy ifodalashni o'z ichiga olishini tan olish orqali standartlashtirilgan ko'rsatkichlarga bo'lgan kamaytiruvchan diqqatni shubha ostiga qo'yadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ta'lim siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada zamonaviy ta'lim tizimlarini isloh qilish zaruriyatini asoslayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Memorization by repetition without understanding.
words.example1: Rote learning helps students memorize multiplication tables quickly.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan bolalarni o'qitish usullari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Many educators argue that rote learning should be replaced with more creative and analytical approaches.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'qituvchilar uchun pedagogik seminar o'tkazayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While rote learning efficiently encodes foundational knowledge, its exclusive application produces graduates who struggle to transfer information across novel contexts or engage in innovative problem-solving.
words.example3Translation: Yodlab olish asosiy bilimlarni samarali tarzda kodlasa-da, uni faqat qo'llash yangi kontekstlarda ma'lumotni o'tkazishda yoki innovatsion muammolarni hal qilishda qiynaluvchi bitiruvchilar yetishtirib chiqaradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ta'lim islohoti bo'yicha hukumat komissiyasida ekspert sifatida milliy o'quv dasturini qayta ko'rib chiqish zaruriyatini asoslayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Process of designing or improving courses of study.
words.example1: Curriculum development should involve input from both teachers and students.
words.example1Situation: Siz ta'lim muassasasida yangi kurs yaratish jarayonida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team was responsible for curriculum development across three departments to ensure alignment with industry standards.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ o'quv dasturlari bo'yicha loyiha hisobotini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective curriculum development demands continuous needs assessment, evidence-based pedagogical design, and systematic evaluation to ensure educational outcomes remain relevant in rapidly evolving professional landscapes.
words.example3Translation: Samarali o'quv dasturini ishlab chiqish tez o'zgarayotgan professional sohalarda ta'lim natijalari dolzarb bo'lib qolishini ta'minlash uchun doimiy ehtiyojlarni baholash, dalillarga asoslangan pedagogik loyihalash va tizimli baholashni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro ta'lim tashkilotida o'quv dasturlarini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha maslahatchi sifatida yangi loyihani ishga tushirishdan oldin metodologiyangizni taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Objective analysis and evaluation to form a judgment.
words.example1: Critical thinking helps employees make better decisions under pressure.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi xodimlarni yo'naltirish sessiyasida ish joyi uchun zarur ko'nikmalarni tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our training program specifically focuses on developing critical thinking skills alongside technical competencies.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR bo'limi rahbari sifatida yangi xodimlarni o'qitish dasturini yuqori rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In an information-saturated environment where misinformation proliferates rapidly, critical thinking has emerged as perhaps the most indispensable cognitive competency for both professional effectiveness and responsible civic participation.
words.example3Translation: Dezinformatsiya tez tarqaladigan ma'lumotga to'la muhitda tanqidiy fikrlash professional samaradorlik va mas'uliyatli fuqarolik ishtiroki uchun eng zarur kognitiv kompetensiyaga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning liderlik rivojlanish dasturini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha boshqaruv kengashiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Ability to use technology effectively and responsibly.
words.example1: Digital literacy is now considered as important as reading and writing in schools.
words.example1Situation: Siz maktab o'qituvchilari bilan ta'lim tendensiyalari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We offer digital literacy workshops to help employees keep pace with technological changes in our industry.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni rivojlantirish dasturlari haqida kompaniya ichki yangiliklari uchun maqola yozayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: As workplaces become increasingly digitized, digital literacy can no longer be treated as an optional competency but must be systematically embedded throughout organizational learning frameworks.
words.example3Translation: Ish joylari tobora raqamlashtirilib borar ekan, raqamli savodxonlikni ixtiyoriy kompetensiya sifatida ko'rib bo'lmaydi, balki uni tashkiliy ta'lim tizimlariga tizimli ravishda kiritish kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning raqamli transformatsiya strategiyasini kengash a'zolariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Teaching all students together regardless of ability or background.
words.example1: Inclusive education ensures that children with disabilities learn alongside their peers.
words.example1Situation: Siz maktab ma'muriyati bilan yangi o'quvchilarni qabul qilish siyosatini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization advocates for inclusive education policies that remove barriers for students with special needs.
words.example2Situation: Siz notijorat tashkilotda grant arizasini yozayotganda va tashkilotingizning missiyasini tavsiflaytganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Implementing inclusive education requires differentiated instructional strategies, adaptive assessment tools, and a reconceived understanding of educational achievement that celebrates diverse forms of intelligence.
words.example3Translation: Inklyuziv ta'limni amalga oshirish farqlangan o'qitish strategiyalarini, moslashuvchan baholash vositalarini va turli intellekt shakllarini nishonlaydigan ta'lim yutuqlarining yangilangan tushunchasini ham talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz maxsus ta'lim bo'yicha davlat dasturini baholash komissiyasida ekspert sifatida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Uniform tests administered and scored consistently.
words.example1: Standardized testing helps schools compare student performance across different regions.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'quv yili oxirida ota-onalar bilan uchrashuvda maktabning baholash tizimini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Many companies use standardized testing during recruitment to objectively assess candidates' abilities.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR bo'limida yollash jarayonini takomillashtirish bo'yicha loyihada ishlaayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Critics argue that overemphasis on standardized testing narrows curriculum, disadvantages students from low-income backgrounds, and neglects creativity and emotional intelligence.
words.example3Translation: Tanqidchilar standartlashtirilgan testlashni haddan tashqari ta'kidlash o'quv dasturini toraytiradi, kam daromadli oilalardan kelgan o'quvchilarni zaiflashtiradi va ijodkorlik hamda hissiy intellektni e'tiborsiz qoldiradi deb hisoblaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ta'lim siyosatini isloh qilish bo'yicha hukumat ishchi guruhida ekspert sifatida milliy baholash tizimiga alternativalarni taklif qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Continuous learning throughout one's life.
words.example1: Lifelong learning is essential in today's rapidly changing job market.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga yangi ko'nikmalar o'rganish nima uchun muhimligini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company supports lifelong learning by offering employees access to online courses and professional development programs.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlarni rivojlantirish imkoniyatlari haqida yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In an era of unprecedented technological acceleration, lifelong learning has transitioned from a personal virtue to an organizational imperative, as companies that neglect continuous learning cultures risk rapid obsolescence.
words.example3Translation: Misli ko'rilmagan texnologik tezlanish davrida umrbod o'rganish shaxsiy fazilatdan tashkiliy zaruriyatga aylandi, chunki doimiy o'rganish madaniyatini e'tiborsiz qoldirgan kompaniyalar tez eskirib qolish xavfiga duch keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning 5 yillik strategik rivojlanish rejasini kengashga taqdim etayotganda va insoniy kapitalga investitsiyalarni asoslayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Performance in school, exams, and educational goals.
words.example1: Academic achievement is often used as a measure of a school's overall effectiveness.
words.example1Situation: Siz maktab direktori sifatida o'quv yili yakunlari bo'yicha ta'lim vazirligiga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Research shows that socioeconomic factors significantly influence students' academic achievement.
words.example2Situation: Siz ta'lim sohasida ijtimoiy tengsizlik haqidagi tadqiqot natijalarini konferensiyada taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While academic achievement metrics provide valuable data, exclusive focus on measurable outcomes risks neglecting the development of character, agency, and the intrinsic love of learning.
words.example3Translation: Akademik yutuq ko'rsatkichlari qimmatli ma'lumotlar bersa-da, o'lchanadigan natijalarga faqat e'tibor qaratish xarakter, mustaqillik va o'rganishga ichki muhabbatning rivojlanishini e'tiborsiz qoldirish xavfini tug'diradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro ta'lim tashkilotida siyosat maslahatchi sifatida milliy ta'lim tizimini baholash metodologiyasini ishlab chiqayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Education focused on practical skills for specific jobs.
words.example1: Vocational training programs help young people enter the workforce with practical skills.
words.example1Situation: Siz yoshlar bandligi dasturini moliyalashtirishga muhtoj bo'lgan investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The company partnered with local colleges to offer vocational training tailored to our industry's specific needs.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ijtimoiy mas'uliyat dasturlari haqida yillik hisobotda yozayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Strategically integrated vocational training systems, such as those in Germany and Switzerland, demonstrate that practical education can command social prestige equivalent to academic pathways while better preparing graduates for labor market demands.
words.example3Translation: Germaniya va Shveytsariyada bo'lgani kabi strategik jihatdan integratsiyalashgan kasb-hunar ta'limi tizimlari amaliy ta'lim akademik yo'llarga teng ijtimoiy obro'ga ega bo'lishi va bitiruvchilarni mehnat bozori talablariga samaraliroq tayyorlashi mumkinligini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hukumat ta'lim vazirligi uchun kasb-hunar ta'limini kengaytirish bo'yicha siyosat tavsiyalarini tayyorlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Degree of attention, interest, and involvement in learning.
words.example1: Student engagement increases when lessons are interactive and relevant to real life.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'qituvchilar treningida dars samaradorligini oshirish usullarini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our e-learning platform was redesigned to improve student engagement through gamification and interactive content.
words.example2Situation: Siz raqamli ta'lim platformasi ishlab chiquvchisi sifatida mahsulotingizni yangi mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Authentic student engagement transcends mere behavioral compliance, requiring educational experiences that connect curriculum content to students' lived experiences and genuine questions about the world.
words.example3Translation: Haqiqiy o'quvchi faolligi oddiy xulqiy muvofiqlikdan ustun turadi va o'quv dasturi mazmunini o'quvchilarning hayotiy tajribalari va dunyo haqidagi haqiqiy savollari bilan bog'laydigan ta'lim tajribalarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz maktab direktori sifatida o'quv yili boshida o'qituvchilar bilan pedagogik yig'ilishda darslarni qiziqarliroq qilish strategiyalarini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Official certificates or degrees from recognized institutions.
words.example1: Many employers still require formal qualifications even for entry-level positions.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi xodimlarni yollash jarayonida nomzodlarni baholash mezonlarini hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: While formal qualifications are important, our company equally values demonstrated skills and work experience.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yollash siyosatini yangilash bo'yicha HR jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The growing recognition that formal qualifications represent only one dimension of human capability has prompted innovative employers to adopt competency-based hiring frameworks that assess demonstrated performance.
words.example3Translation: Rasmiy malakalar inson qobiliyatining faqat bir o'lchamini ifodalashini tobora ko'proq tan olish innovatsion ish beruvchilarni ko'rsatilgan samaradorlikni baholaydigan kompetensiyaga asoslangan yollash tizimlarini qabul qilishga undadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz katta texnologiya kompaniyasida talent boshqaruvi direktori sifatida ish beruvchilar ittifoqi konferensiyasida gaplar sifatiga asoslangan yollash tendensiyalari haqida nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Education where students learn remotely.
words.example1: Distance learning became essential during the pandemic when schools had to close.
words.example1Situation: Siz pandemiya davrida ta'limning qanday o'zgarganini hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company offers distance learning programs so employees can upskill without taking time off work.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar uchun yangi o'qitish imkoniyatlarini e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While distance learning dramatically expands educational access by removing geographical constraints, its effective implementation demands thoughtful design and proactive strategies to combat learner isolation.
words.example3Translation: Masofaviy ta'lim geografik cheklovlarni bartaraf etib ta'limga kirishni keskin kengaytirsa-da, uning samarali amalga oshirilishi o'ylangan o'quv loyihasini va o'rganuvchi izolyatsiyasiga qarshi kurashish uchun faol strategiyalarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz onlayn ta'lim platformasi ishlab chiquvchisi sifatida universitetlar bilan hamkorlik shartnomasini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Detailed examination of elements or structure.
words.example1: Critical analysis of reports helps managers make more informed business decisions.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi xodimga hisobotlarni qanday ko'rib chiqishni o'rgatayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The job requires strong critical analysis skills to evaluate complex data and identify strategic opportunities.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish e'loniga yoki lavozim tavsifiga ma'lumot yozayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Rigorous critical analysis demands that practitioners suspend confirmation bias, systematically consider alternative interpretations, and evaluate evidence quality before drawing conclusions that influence high-stakes decisions.
words.example3Translation: Qat'iy tanqidiy tahlil amaliyotchilardan tasdiqlash xatosini to'xtatib turishni, muqobil talqinlarni tizimli ravishda ko'rib chiqishni va muhim qarorlarga ta'sir qilishi mumkin bo'lgan xulosalar chiqarishdan oldin dalillar sifatini baholashni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz konsalting kompaniyasida senior tahlilchi sifatida yirik mijoz loyihasida ishtirok etayotgan yangi xodimlarni yo'naltirish sessiyasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Method and practice of teaching.
words.example1: A student-centered pedagogical approach encourages learners to take responsibility for their own progress.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'qituvchilar uchun seminar o'tkazayotganda va zamonaviy dars berish usullari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our training team reviewed its pedagogical approach to incorporate more practical simulations and real-world case studies.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ o'quv dasturlarini qayta ishlab chiqish loyihasini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Selecting an appropriate pedagogical approach requires careful consideration of learning objectives, learner characteristics, and contextual constraints, as no single method universally optimizes outcomes across all disciplines.
words.example3Translation: Tegishli pedagogik yondashuvni tanlash ta'lim maqsadlari, o'rganuvchi xususiyatlari va kontekstual cheklovlarni diqqat bilan ko'rib chiqishni talab qiladi, chunki hech bir usul barcha fanlar va aholi guruhlarida ta'lim natijalarini universallashgan tarzda optimallashtira olmaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro ta'lim tashkilotida o'quv dasturlarini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha maslahatchi sifatida turli madaniy kontekstlarda ishlash uchun yo'naltirilgan o'qituvchilar guruhini tayyorlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Working from outside a traditional office environment.
words.example1: Remote work saves employees hours of commuting every day.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi ish joyingiz haqida do'stingizga aytayotganda va u nima uchun buncha baxtli ekanligingizni so'raganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company shifted to remote work permanently after seeing productivity improve significantly.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbaringizga masofaviy ish rejimini davom ettirish kerakligini dalillar bilan asoslayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While remote work offers unprecedented flexibility, it demands disciplined self-management, robust digital infrastructure, and intentional communication strategies to maintain team cohesion across distributed environments.
words.example3Translation: Masofaviy ish misli ko'rilmagan moslashuvchanlikni taklif qilsa-da, u tarqalgan muhitlarda jamoa uyushqoqligini saqlash uchun intizomli o'z-o'zini boshqarishni, mustahkam raqamli infratuzilmani va ataylab kommunikatsiya strategiyalarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz HR konferensiyasida masofaviy ishning kelajagi haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The feeling of fulfillment or enjoyment a person derives from their job.
words.example1: Job satisfaction increases when employees feel their work is meaningful.
words.example1Situation: Siz xodimlarni saqlash strategiyasini muhokama qilayotganda va rahbaringizga motivatsiya omillarini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our annual survey shows that job satisfaction is highest among employees who have flexible schedules.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar so'rovi natijalarini boshqaruv jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Research consistently demonstrates that job satisfaction is more strongly predicted by autonomy, purpose, and interpersonal relationships than by compensation alone, challenging purely transactional models of employee motivation.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqotlar ish qoniqishi mustaqillik, maqsad va shaxslararo munosabatlar bilan faqat kompensatsiyaga qaraganda kuchliroq bashorat qilinishini doimiy ravishda ko'rsatadi va bu xodimlarni rag'batlantirishning sof tranzaksion modellarini shubha ostiga qo'yadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning inson resurslari strategiyasini qayta ko'rib chiqish bo'yicha kengash sessiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An economic system based on short-term contracts and freelance work rather than permanent jobs.
words.example1: The gig economy gives workers the freedom to choose when and where they work.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingizga nima uchun an'anaviy ish o'rniga mustaqil ishlashni tanlayotganingizni tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our platform connects businesses with gig economy workers who can complete projects on demand.
words.example2Situation: Siz startap kompaniyangizning biznes modelini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The gig economy offers workers flexibility and autonomy but simultaneously erodes traditional employment protections, leaving many without benefits, pension contributions, or recourse against unfair treatment.
words.example3Translation: Gig iqtisodiyoti ishchilarga moslashuvchanlik va mustaqillikni taklif qiladi, lekin bir vaqtning o'zida an'anaviy mehnat himoyasini yo'q qiladi va ko'pchilikni imtiyozlar, pensiya badallari yoki adolatsiz muomalaga qarshi chora-tadbirlarsiz qoldiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mehnat siyosati bo'yicha davlat komissiyasida gig iqtisodiyoti ishchilarini himoya qilish zaruriyatini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Advancement and growth opportunities within a profession or organization.
words.example1: Career progression is one of the main reasons employees stay with a company long-term.
words.example1Situation: Siz xodimni ushlab qolish strategiyalari haqida HR jamoangiz bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: She was offered a senior role as part of her career progression after three years of excellent performance.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimni terfi qilish haqidagi qarorni uning menejeri bilan rasmiylashtirish uchun muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Transparent and merit-based career progression frameworks are essential for retaining high-performing talent, as employees who perceive advancement pathways as opaque or politically influenced rapidly disengage and seek opportunities elsewhere.
words.example3Translation: Shaffof va xizmatlarga asoslangan martaba o'sishi tizimlari yuqori samarali iste'dodlarni ushlab turish uchun zarurdir, chunki ilgarilab borish yo'llarini noaniq yoki siyosiy jihatdan ta'sirlangan deb hisoblaydigan xodimlar tezda ishtiyoqini yo'qotadi va boshqa joyda imkoniyat qidiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning iste'dod boshqaruvi tizimini qayta loyihalash bo'yicha yuqori rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The equilibrium between professional responsibilities and personal life.
words.example1: Good work-life balance helps employees stay healthy and avoid burnout.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi xodimga kompaniyaning rifoh dasturlari haqida tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our flexible policy was introduced specifically to improve work-life balance across all departments.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yangi mehnat siyosatini xodimlarga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Achieving genuine work-life balance requires organizational cultures that actively discourage overwork, normalize boundary-setting, and measure employee performance by outcomes rather than hours logged.
words.example3Translation: Haqiqiy ish va hayot muvozanatiga erishish ortiqcha ishlashni faol ravishda oldini oladigan, chegaralarni belgilashni normallashtiruvchi va xodimlar samaradorligini o'tkazilgan soatlar emas, balki natijalar bilan o'lchaydigan tashkiliy madaniyatlarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning rifoh strategiyasini kengash a'zolariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Reducing the number of employees in a company to cut costs.
words.example1: The company announced downsizing after losing several major contracts.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan kompaniya yangiliklari haqida gaplashayotganda va u nima bo'layotganini so'raganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Downsizing was unavoidable given the economic pressures the firm faced last year.
words.example2Situation: Siz investorlar bilan yillik moliyaviy natijalarni muhokama qilayotganda va xarajatlarni kamaytirish choralarini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While downsizing may deliver short-term cost savings, research indicates it frequently undermines organizational knowledge, damages employee morale among survivors, and ultimately impairs long-term competitive performance.
words.example3Translation: Qisqartirish qisqa muddatli xarajatlarni tejashga olib kelishi mumkin bo'lsa-da, tadqiqotlar shuni ko'rsatadiki, u ko'pincha tashkiliy bilimlarni buzadi, omon qolgan xodimlar orasida ruhiyatni zaiflashtiradi va oxir-oqibat uzoq muddatli raqobatbardosh samaradorlikni buzadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz konsalting firmasi mutaxassisi sifatida mijoz kompaniyasining restrukturizatsiya rejasini yuqori rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Learning new skills to improve job performance and career prospects.
words.example1: Upskilling in data analysis has become essential for many office workers.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga nima uchun onlayn kurslar olayotganingizni tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company invested heavily in upskilling programs after identifying critical skill gaps in our workforce.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni rivojlantirish byudjetini moliya bo'limiga asoslayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In an era of accelerating technological change, continuous upskilling is no longer a personal option but an organizational necessity to maintain relevance and competitiveness across all industries.
words.example3Translation: Texnologik o'zgarishlar tezlashib borayotgan davrda doimiy ko'nikmalarni oshirish endi shaxsiy tanlov emas, balki barcha sohalarda dolzarbligi va raqobatbardoshligini saqlash uchun tashkiliy zaruriyatdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning 3 yillik o'quv va rivojlanish strategiyasini kengashga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A work schedule that can be adjusted to suit the employee's needs.
words.example1: Flexible hours allow parents to manage childcare alongside their work responsibilities.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi xodimga kompaniyaning mehnat siyosatini tushuntirayotganda va u bolalari haqida qayg'urayotganini bilganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Since introducing flexible hours, absenteeism in our office has dropped by over 20 percent.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yangi siyosatining natijalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Flexible hours represent a relatively low-cost organizational intervention that consistently improves employee satisfaction, reduces turnover, and enhances productivity by allowing individuals to work during their peak performance periods.
words.example3Translation: Moslashuvchan ish vaqti nisbatan arzon tashkiliy chora bo'lib, u xodimlar qoniqishini doimiy ravishda yaxshilaydi, kadrlar almashinuvini kamaytiradi va odamlarga o'zlarining eng yuqori samaradorlik davrlarida ishlashga imkon berish orqali unumdorlikni oshiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlarni ushlab qolish strategiyasini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha HR bo'limi rahbari sifatida kengashga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The assurance that one's employment is stable and unlikely to end involuntarily.
words.example1: Job security is one of the top concerns for workers during economic downturns.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqtisodiy inqiroz davrida hamkasbingiz bilan xodimlar kayfiyati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Employees who have high job security tend to take more creative risks and contribute more innovative ideas.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsion madaniyatni rivojlantirish bo'yicha rahbariyatga tavsiyalar berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The erosion of job security in the modern economy, driven by automation and organizational restructuring, has profound psychological consequences, including elevated anxiety, reduced organizational commitment, and diminished willingness to invest in employer-specific skill development.
words.example3Translation: Avtomatlashtirish va tashkiliy qayta tuzilish bilan bog'liq zamonaviy iqtisodiyotda ish barqarorligining yo'qolishi chuqur psixologik oqibatlarga olib keladi, jumladan kuchaygan tashvish, tashkiliy sadoqatning kamayishi va ish beruvchiga xos ko'nikmalarni rivojlantirishga sarmoya kiritish istagining pasayishi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mehnat bozori tendensiyalari bo'yicha sanoat konferensiyasida nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A company's ability to keep its employees and reduce staff turnover.
words.example1: Employee retention improves when staff feel valued and supported.
words.example1Situation: Siz xodimlar bilan yillik baholash uchrashuvi o'tkazayotganda va ular nima uchun kompaniyada qolishini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our employee retention rate increased by 15 percent after we introduced a new mentorship program.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR natijalarini moliya kengashiga taqdim etayotganda va xodimlarni rivojlantirishga investitsiyani asoslayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: High employee retention is not merely a cost-saving metric but a strategic organizational asset, as long-tenured employees carry institutional knowledge, client relationships, and cultural continuity that cannot be rapidly replaced through external recruitment.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori xodimlarni ushlab turish nafaqat xarajatlarni tejash ko'rsatkichi, balki strategik tashkiliy aktiv bo'lib, uzoq muddatli xodimlar tashqi yollash orqali tezda o'rnini bosib bo'lmaydigan instituttsional bilim, mijozlar munosabatlari va madaniy uzluksizlikni o'z ichida saqlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning iste'dod boshqaruvi strategiyasini kengash a'zolariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The values, behaviors, and practices that define how a company operates.
words.example1: A positive corporate culture attracts talented employees and keeps them motivated.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi xodimga nima uchun bu kompaniyani tanlashini so'raganda va u javob berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our corporate culture encourages open feedback and transparent communication at all levels.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizni potensial mijozlarga yoki sherik tashkilotlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Corporate culture is not merely a peripheral concern but a fundamental driver of organizational performance, as it shapes everyday decision-making, risk tolerance, collaborative behaviors, and ultimately determines whether strategic initiatives succeed or fail at the implementation stage.
words.example3Translation: Korporativ madaniyat nafaqat ikkinchi darajali masala, balki tashkiliy samaradorlikning asosiy harakatlantiruvchi kuchi bo'lib, u kundalik qaror qabul qilishni, xavfga toqatni, hamkorlik xulq-atvorini shakllantiradi va oxir-oqibat strategik tashabbuslarnig amalga oshirish bosqichida muvaffaqiyat qozonish yoki muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'lishini belgilaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya birlashtirish yoki sotib olish jarayonida madaniy integratsiya xatarlarini rahbariyatga baholayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The lowest legal salary that employers must pay workers per hour.
words.example1: The government raised the minimum wage to help low-income workers cope with inflation.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan iqtisodiy yangiliklar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company pays above the minimum wage to attract and retain skilled workers in a competitive market.
words.example2Situation: Siz potensial xodimga ish taklifini muhokama qilayotganda va kompaniyangizning raqobatbardosh ish haqi siyosatini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The debate over minimum wage increases reflects fundamental tensions between worker welfare and business viability, with evidence suggesting that moderate increases can raise living standards without significant employment losses in most economic contexts.
words.example3Translation: Minimal ish haqini oshirish bo'yicha munozara ishchi farovonligi va biznes qobiliyati o'rtasidagi asosiy keskinliklarni aks ettiradi, dalillar esa ko'pgina iqtisodiy sharoitlarda o'rtacha oshirish sezilarli ish joylari yo'qotmasdan hayot darajasini ko'tarishi mumkinligini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mehnat iqtisodiyoti bo'yicha parlament tinglovida ekspert sifatida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Working independently on short-term projects for multiple clients.
words.example1: Freelancing gives professionals the freedom to choose their own clients and projects.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga nima uchun an'anaviy ish o'rnida mustaqil ishlashni tanlayotganingizni tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: She left her corporate job to pursue freelancing full-time after building a strong client base.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlaringizdan biri kompaniyani tark etish sabablarini HR hisobotida ifodalayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While freelancing offers autonomy and variety, it demands sophisticated self-marketing skills, financial discipline to manage irregular income, and proactive strategies to combat professional isolation and maintain continuous skill development.
words.example3Translation: Frilanserlik mustaqillik va xilma-xillikni taklif qilsa-da, u murakkab o'z-o'zini marketing qilish ko'nikmalarini, tartibsiz daromadni boshqarish uchun moliyaviy intizomni va professional izolyatsiyaga qarshi kurashish hamda doimiy ko'nikmalar rivojlanishini saqlash uchun faol strategiyalarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz frilanserlar uchun moliyaviy rejalash bo'yicha vebinarda spiker sifatida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A state of chronic physical and emotional exhaustion caused by prolonged workplace stress.
words.example1: Burnout is becoming increasingly common among workers who cannot disconnect from their jobs.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan ish joydagi ruhiy salomatlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The company introduced mental health days specifically to address rising levels of burnout among staff.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarning farovonligi dasturining yangi tashabbuslarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Burnout represents a systemic organizational failure rather than an individual weakness, requiring structural interventions including workload redistribution, managerial training in psychological safety, and cultural normalization of recovery and rest.
words.example3Translation: Professional charchoq individual zaiflik emas, balki tizimli tashkiliy muvaffaqiyatsizlikni ifodalaydi va ish yukini qayta taqsimlash, psixologik xavfsizlik bo'yicha menejerlarni o'qitish va tiklash hamda dam olishni madaniy normallashtirish kabi tarkibiy aralashuvlarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning mehnat sog'lomlashtirish siyosatini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha HR va rahbariyat bilan birgalikda ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Use of technology to perform tasks without human input.
words.example1: Automation in warehouses has replaced many manual sorting and packing jobs.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishlab chiqarish korxonasida hamkasbingiz bilan yangi texnologiyalar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our factory invested in automation to increase output while reducing operational costs significantly.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ishlab chiqarish samaradorligi natijalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While automation drives productivity gains and cost efficiencies, it simultaneously displaces workers and demands proactive workforce reskilling strategies to prevent structural unemployment in vulnerable communities.
words.example3Translation: Avtomatlashtirish samaradorlik va xarajat tejashni harakatlantirsa-da, u bir vaqtning o'zida ishchilarni siqib chiqaradi va zaif jamoalarda tarkibiy ishsizlikning oldini olish uchun ishchi kuchini qayta tayyorlash strategiyalarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning raqamli transformatsiya strategiyasini kengash a'zolariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A way of life involving little or no physical activity.
words.example1: A sedentary lifestyle increases the risk of obesity and heart disease.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan sog'liqni saqlash haqida gaplashayotganda va u ko'p o'tirishdan shikoyat qilganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company introduced standing desks to combat the sedentary lifestyle common in office environments.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi dasturining yangi tashabbuslarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The proliferation of sedentary lifestyle patterns across modern societies represents a significant public health crisis, driving exponential increases in preventable chronic diseases and placing unsustainable burdens on healthcare systems globally.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy jamiyatlarda harakatsiz turmush tarzi namunalarining tarqalishi sezilarli jamoat salomatligi inqirozini ifodalaydi, oldini olish mumkin bo'lgan surunkali kasalliklarning eksponensial o'sishiga olib keladi va butun dunyoda sog'liqni saqlash tizimlariga barqaror bo'lmagan yuk yuklaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoat salomatligi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada milliy sog'liqni saqlash siyosatiga tavsiyalar berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Measures taken to prevent illness before it occurs.
words.example1: Regular check-ups are a key part of preventive healthcare.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi xodimga kompaniyaning sog'liqni saqlash imtiyozlari haqida tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Investing in preventive healthcare saves governments billions compared to treating chronic illness later.
words.example2Situation: Siz sog'liqni saqlash byudjeti bo'yicha hukumat amaldorlari bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Prioritizing preventive healthcare over reactive treatment requires a fundamental reorientation of healthcare financing, professional incentive structures, and public education systems to value wellness maintenance over disease management.
words.example3Translation: Reaktiv davolash o'rniga profilaktik sog'liqni saqlashga ustuvorlik berish sog'liqni saqlashni moliyalashtirishni, professional rag'batlantirish tuzilmalarini va jamoat ta'limi tizimlarini kasalliklarni boshqarish o'rniga sog'liqni saqlashni qadrlaydigan tarzda tubdan qayta yo'naltirishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy sog'liqni saqlash islohoti bo'yicha siyosat maslahatchi sifatida parlament komissiyasida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A state of emotional and psychological health and balance.
words.example1: Mental well-being is just as important as physical health in the workplace.
words.example1Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi dasturini taqdim etayotganda va ruhiy sog'liqni jismoniy sog'liq bilan teng qo'yayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company offers free counseling sessions to support employees' mental well-being during stressful periods.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yangi xodimlar uchun onboarding paketini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sustained mental well-being requires proactive cultivation of positive relationships, meaningful engagement, and psychological resilience, supported by organizational environments that normalize help-seeking and destigmatize emotional vulnerability.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror ruhiy farovonlik ijobiy munosabatlarni, mazmunli ishtiroqni va psixologik barqarorlikni faol ravishda rivojlantirishni talab qiladi va yordam so'rashni normallashtiruvchi va hissiy zaiflikni destigmatizatsiya qiluvchi tashkiliy muhit bilan qo'llab-quvvatlanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizda ruhiy sog'liq madaniyatini rivojlantirish bo'yicha yuqori rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A long-lasting health condition such as diabetes or heart disease.
words.example1: Chronic disease management requires regular medication and lifestyle changes.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan sog'liq sug'urtasi va uzoq muddatli kasalliklarni qoplash haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our health insurance plan includes comprehensive coverage for employees managing chronic disease.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni yollash jarayonida ish taklifini muhokama qilayotganda va imtiyozlar paketini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The rising global burden of chronic disease reflects the intersection of aging populations, unhealthy lifestyle patterns, and insufficient investment in preventive health infrastructure, demanding coordinated responses across healthcare, food, and urban planning systems.
