words.example3Translation: Surunkali kasalliklarning global yukining o'sishi qariyayotgan aholi, sog'liqsiz turmush tarzi va profilaktik sog'liqni saqlash infratuzilmasiga etarli sarmoya kiritilmasligining kesishishini aks ettiradi va sog'liqni saqlash, oziq-ovqat va shahar rejalashtirish tizimlari bo'yicha muvofiqlashtirilgan javoblarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro sog'liqni saqlash tashkilotida siyosat ishlab chiquvchi sifatida milliy surunkali kasalliklarni oldini olish strategiyasini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A healthcare system that provides coverage for all citizens regardless of income.
words.example1: Universal healthcare ensures that everyone can see a doctor without financial hardship.
words.example1Situation: Siz mamlakatlar o'rtasidagi sog'liqni saqlash tizimlari farqlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The government proposed universal healthcare to reduce inequality in access to medical treatment.
words.example2Situation: Siz sog'liqni saqlash siyosati bo'yicha sanoat konferensiyasida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Implementing universal healthcare requires navigating complex trade-offs between coverage breadth, service quality, fiscal sustainability, and provider autonomy, demanding careful system design informed by international evidence and local context.
words.example3Translation: Universal sog'liqni saqlashni amalga oshirish qamrov kengligi, xizmat sifati, moliyaviy barqarorlik va provayder mustaqilligi o'rtasidagi murakkab murosalarni hal qilishni talab qiladi va xalqaro dalillar va mahalliy kontekst bilan asoslangan ehtiyotkor tizim dizaynini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sog'liqni saqlash tizimini isloh qilish bo'yicha hukumat ishchi guruhida ekspert sifatida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Heightened awareness and concern about one's health and well-being.
words.example1: Health consciousness has grown significantly among young professionals in recent years.
words.example1Situation: Siz bozor tendensiyalarini muhokama qilayotganda va sog'lom mahsulotlarga talabning o'sishini izohlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Rising health consciousness among consumers is driving demand for organic and low-sugar food products.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing bo'limi bilan yangi mahsulot strategiyasini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The emergence of widespread health consciousness represents a significant cultural shift, creating commercial opportunities across fitness, nutrition, and wellness sectors while simultaneously demanding greater transparency from food manufacturers and healthcare providers.
words.example3Translation: Keng tarqalgan sog'liqqa e'tiborning paydo bo'lishi muhim madaniy o'zgarishni ifodalaydi, fitness, ovqatlanish va farovonlik sektorlarida tijorat imkoniyatlarini yaratadi va bir vaqtning o'zida oziq-ovqat ishlab chiqaruvchilar va sog'liqni saqlash provayderlari tomonidan ko'proq shaffoflikni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sog'liq va farovonlik sohasidagi startapingizni investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The health of the population as a whole, managed and protected by governments.
words.example1: Public health campaigns encourage people to quit smoking and exercise regularly.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamoat xabardorlik dasturlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Investing in public health infrastructure is essential for preventing the spread of infectious diseases.
words.example2Situation: Siz sog'liqni saqlash byudjeti bo'yicha hukumat amaldorlari bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective public health requires coordinated action across government agencies, healthcare providers, and communities, addressing not only biomedical factors but also the social determinants of health including housing, education, and economic security.
words.example3Translation: Samarali jamoat salomatligi hukumat idoralari, sog'liqni saqlash provayderlari va jamoatlar bo'yicha muvofiqlashtirilgan harakatni talab qiladi va nafaqat biomedikal omillarni, balki uy-joy, ta'lim va iqtisodiy xavfsizlik kabi sog'liqning ijtimoiy determinantlarini ham ko'rib chiqadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoat salomatligi departamentida siyosat rahbari sifatida milliy sog'liqni yaxshilash strategiyasini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A diet containing a variety of nutrients in proper proportions.
words.example1: A balanced diet with fruits, vegetables, and proteins keeps your energy levels stable.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga nima uchun tushlik uchun yanada sog'lom ovqat tanlayotganingizni tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The company canteen was redesigned to promote a balanced diet by offering more nutritious meal options.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi bo'yicha rahbariyatga yangi tashabbus haqida hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Maintaining a balanced diet in modern environments requires navigating aggressive marketing of processed foods, time constraints, and economic barriers, highlighting the need for structural food policy interventions beyond individual nutritional education.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy muhitda muvozanatli ovqatlanishni saqlash qayta ishlangan ovqatlarning agressiv marketingini, vaqt cheklovlarini va iqtisodiy to'siqlarni bartaraf etishni talab qiladi va individual ovqatlanish ta'limidan tashqari tarkibiy oziq-ovqat siyosati aralashuvlari zarurligini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ farovonlik dasturi uchun ovqatlanish siyosatini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha kompaniyangizning sog'liq va xavfsizlik qo'mitasida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The average number of years a person is expected to live.
words.example1: Life expectancy has increased significantly due to advances in modern medicine.
words.example1Situation: Siz demografik tendensiyalar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Countries with universal healthcare systems generally report higher life expectancy than those without.
words.example2Situation: Siz sog'liqni saqlash tizimi islohotlari haqida davlat amaldorlari bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While average life expectancy has risen globally, stark disparities persist between high and low-income nations and within countries along socioeconomic lines, revealing that longevity gains have not been equitably distributed.
words.example3Translation: O'rtacha umr ko'rish davomiyligi butun dunyo bo'yicha oshgan bo'lsa-da, yuqori va past daromadli mamlakatlar o'rtasida va mamlakatlar ichida ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy chiziqlarda keskin farqlar saqlanib qolmoqda va bu uzoq umr ko'rish foydalari teng taqsimlanmaganligini ko'rsatmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro sog'liq tengsizligi bo'yicha tadqiqot natijalarini global sog'liqni saqlash sammitida taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ease with which people can obtain necessary medical services.
words.example1: Healthcare accessibility remains a serious problem in many rural communities.
words.example1Situation: Siz qishloq hududlaridagi sog'liqni saqlash muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company provides health insurance to improve healthcare accessibility for all employees and their families.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni yollash jarayonida kompaniyangizning imtiyozlar paketini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Healthcare accessibility is shaped by a complex interplay of geographic, financial, linguistic, and cultural factors that disproportionately disadvantage marginalized communities, demanding systemic policy responses beyond simple facility expansion.
words.example3Translation: Sog'liqni saqlash xizmatlariga kirish imkoniyati geografik, moliyaviy, lingvistik va madaniy omillarning murakkab o'zaro ta'siri bilan shakllanadi va bu marginal jamoalarga mutanosib ravishda zarar yetkazadi, oddiy tibbiyot muassasalarini kengaytirishdan tashqari tizimli siyosat javoblarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sog'liqni saqlash tengsizligi bo'yicha parlament tinglovida ekspert sifatida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A state of health and well-being achieved through regular exercise and proper nutrition.
words.example1: Physical fitness improves concentration and reduces stress at work.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga nima uchun tushlik paytida yurish qilayotganingizni tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company subsidizes gym memberships to promote physical fitness among employees.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi dasturini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sustained physical fitness requires behavioral habit formation supported by environmental design, social accountability systems, and intrinsic motivation, as extrinsic incentives alone rarely produce durable long-term exercise adherence.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror jismoniy chiniqish atrof-muhit dizayni, ijtimoiy javobgarlik tizimlari va ichki motivatsiya bilan qo'llab-quvvatlangan xulqiy odatlarni shakllantirshni talab qiladi, chunki tashqi rag'batlantirish yolg'iz kamdan-kam hollarda uzoq muddatli mashq qilishga rioya qilishni ta'minlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ farovonlik dasturini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha HR va sog'liqni saqlash mutaxassislari bilan birgalikda ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Techniques used to control and reduce stress levels.
words.example1: Stress management techniques like deep breathing can help during difficult meetings.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga muhim taqdimotdan oldin qanday tinchlaning tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our HR department offers stress management workshops twice a year for all staff.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi dasturining tashabbuslarini yuqori rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective stress management demands both individual skill development and organizational culture change, as personal coping techniques alone cannot compensate for structurally excessive workloads, toxic management practices, or systemic workplace injustice.
words.example3Translation: Samarali stressni boshqarish ham individual ko'nikmalarni rivojlantirish, ham tashkiliy madaniyatni o'zgartirishni talab qiladi, chunki shaxsiy kurashish texnikalari yolg'iz tarkibiy jihatdan haddan tashqari ish yukini, toksik boshqaruv amaliyotlarini yoki tizimli ish joyi adolatsizligini qoplay olmaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizda professional charchoqni kamaytirish dasturini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha psixologlar va HR bilan birgalikda ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unequal access to health services or differences in health outcomes across population groups.
words.example1: Health inequality means poorer communities often have shorter life expectancy.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamoat salomatligi tendensiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Addressing health inequality requires targeted investment in underserved communities and culturally sensitive care.
words.example2Situation: Siz sog'liqni saqlash tengsizligini kamaytirish bo'yicha notijorat tashkilotning grant arizasini yozayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Health inequality is fundamentally a social justice issue, rooted in systemic inequities in income, education, housing, and environmental quality that accumulate across lifetimes to produce dramatically different health trajectories for individuals born into different social circumstances.
words.example3Translation: Sog'liq tengsizligi asosan ijtimoiy adolat masalasi bo'lib, turli ijtimoiy sharoitlarda tug'ilgan shaxslar uchun dramatik tarzda farq qiladigan sog'liq yo'llarini keltirib chiqarish uchun butun hayot davomida to'planadigan daromad, ta'lim, uy-joy va atrof-muhit sifatidagi tizimli tengsizliklarga asoslanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sog'liq tengsizligi bo'yicha xalqaro forumda taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Food produced without synthetic chemicals, pesticides, or artificial additives.
words.example1: More people are choosing organic food to avoid pesticide residues in their diet.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan do'kondagi oziq-ovqat tanlovlari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company canteen now sources organic food to support employee health and local farmers.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yangi xarid qilish siyosatini xodimlarga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While organic food production offers genuine environmental and health benefits, its premium pricing creates accessibility barriers that risk making sustainable nutrition an exclusive privilege of affluent consumers rather than a broadly available public good.
words.example3Translation: Organik oziq-ovqat ishlab chiqarish haqiqiy atrof-muhit va sog'liq foydalari taklif qilsa-da, uning yuqori narxi barqaror ovqatlanishni keng tarqalgan jamoat iste'mol mahsuli o'rniga badavlat iste'molchilarning eksklyuziv imtiyoziga aylantirish xavfini tug'diradigan kirish to'siqlarini yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz oziq-ovqat siyosati va barqarorlik bo'yicha sanoat panelida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Widespread occurrence of infectious disease within a region or globally.
words.example1: Epidemics can spread quickly in densely populated urban areas.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamoat salomatligi tahdidlarini hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company developed emergency protocols to protect staff during future epidemics and pandemics.
words.example2Situation: Siz biznes uzluksizligi rejalashtirish yig'ilishida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The COVID-19 pandemic demonstrated that epidemics and pandemics expose and amplify existing social inequalities, with marginalized communities bearing disproportionate mortality burdens due to occupational exposure, inadequate healthcare access, and underlying health vulnerabilities.
words.example3Translation: COVID-19 pandemiyasi epidemiyalar va pandemiyalarning mavjud ijtimoiy tengsizliklarni ochib va kuchaytirishi mumkinligini ko'rsatdi, marginal jamoalar esa kasbiy ta'sir, etarli sog'liqni saqlash xizmatlariga kirish imkoniyatining yo'qligi va asosiy sog'liq zaifliklari tufayli mutanosib ravishda yuqori o'lim yukini ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kelajakdagi pandemiyalarga tayyorgarlik bo'yicha xalqaro sog'liqni saqlash tashkilotida siyosat ishlab chiquvchi sifatida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The sharing of customs, traditions, and ideas between different cultures.
words.example1: Cultural exchange programs help students understand different ways of life.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro hamkorlik dasturi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company encourages cultural exchange by organizing international team projects and cross-border mentorship.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xilma-xillik va inklyuzivlik tashabbuslarini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Meaningful cultural exchange requires moving beyond superficial exposure to authentic engagement that builds empathy, challenges assumptions, and fosters mutual respect across diverse communities and worldviews.
words.example3Translation: Mazmunli madaniy almashinuv yuzaki ta'sirdan tashqariga chiqishni va turli xil jamoalar va dunyoqarashlar bo'ylab empatiyani rivojlantiruvchi, taxminlarni shubha ostiga qo'yuvchi va o'zaro hurmatni rivojlantiruvchi haqiqiy ishtirokni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro ta'lim hamkorlik dasturini moliyalashtirish uchun grant arizasini yozayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The process connecting economies, cultures, and political systems worldwide.
words.example1: Global integration has made it easier to buy products from any country.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan xalqaro savdo va xarid qilishning qulayliklari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our expansion strategy depends on global integration, allowing us to serve customers across 40 countries seamlessly.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xalqaro kengayish rejasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While global integration has generated unprecedented economic growth and technological diffusion, its benefits have been unevenly distributed, fueling political backlash and demands for more equitable governance of international trade and investment flows.
words.example3Translation: Global integratsiya misli ko'rilmagan iqtisodiy o'sish va texnologik tarqalishni keltirib chiqargan bo'lsa-da, uning foydasi notekis taqsimlangan, bu esa xalqaro savdo va investitsiya oqimlarining adolatliroq boshqaruvini siyosiy qarshilik va talab qilishga olib kelgan.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro savdo siyosati bo'yicha davlatlararo muzokaralarda ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Companies that operate and have assets or offices in multiple countries.
words.example1: Multinational corporations create jobs but can also undermine local businesses.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro biznes tendensiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: As a multinational corporation, we must navigate different legal and regulatory frameworks across all markets.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yangi bozorga kirish strategiyasini yuqori rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Multinational corporations wield substantial economic and political influence that often rivals that of national governments, raising critical questions about democratic accountability, tax justice, and the appropriate limits of corporate power in global governance.
words.example3Translation: Transmilliy korporatsiyalar ko'pincha milliy hukumatlarnikiga tenglashadigan katta iqtisodiy va siyosiy ta'sirga ega bo'lib, bu global boshqaruvda demokratik javobgarlik, soliq adolati va korporativ hokimiyatning tegishli chegaralari haqida muhim savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro biznes etikasi bo'yicha konferensiyada korporativ javobgarlik mavzusida nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The process by which cultures become increasingly similar due to globalization.
words.example1: Cultural homogenization means you can find the same fast food brands in almost every country.
words.example1Situation: Siz sayohat tajribalaringiz haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda va har yerda bir xil brendlarni ko'rganingizni aytayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our marketing team is careful not to contribute to cultural homogenization by respecting local traditions in every market.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xalqaro marketing strategiyasini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Cultural homogenization driven by global media and corporate expansion threatens linguistic diversity, traditional knowledge systems, and locally distinctive ways of life that constitute irreplaceable elements of human cultural heritage.
words.example3Translation: Global media va korporativ kengayish tomonidan boshqariladigan madaniy bir xillashtirish inson madaniy merosining o'rnini bosib bo'lmaydigan elementlarini tashkil etuvchi lingvistik xilma-xillikka, an'anaviy bilim tizimlariga va mahalliy o'ziga xos hayot tarziga tahdid soladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz madaniy meros va globalizatsiya bo'yicha xalqaro forumda taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The spread of customs, practices, and ideas from one culture to another.
words.example1: Cultural diffusion has brought sushi restaurants to cities around the world.
words.example1Situation: Siz dunyodagi ovqatlanish madaniyatining o'zgarishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Social media has accelerated cultural diffusion, allowing trends to spread globally within hours.
words.example2Situation: Siz raqamli marketing va global tendensiyalar haqida jamoangiz bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Cultural diffusion is a complex and often contested process, as the power dynamics between source and receiving cultures significantly influence whether exchange is experienced as enriching diversity or as cultural imperialism.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy tarqalish murakkab va ko'pincha bahsli jarayon bo'lib, manba va qabul qiluvchi madaniyatlar o'rtasidagi kuch dinamikasi almashinuv xilma-xillikni boyituvchi yoki madaniy imperializm sifatida boshdan kechirilishiga sezilarli ta'sir qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz madaniy siyosat va globalizatsiya bo'yicha akademik konferensiyada ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The dependence of countries on each other's economies for goods and services.
words.example1: Economic interdependence means a crisis in one country can quickly affect others.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro iqtisodiy tendensiyalar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our supply chain reflects deep economic interdependence, sourcing components from over 20 countries.
words.example2Situation: Siz ta'minot zanjiri xavf-xatarlarini boshqarish bo'yicha rahbariyatga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While economic interdependence promotes efficiency and peace through mutual vulnerability, it also creates systemic fragility, as the 2008 financial crisis and COVID-19 supply chain disruptions demonstrated the catastrophic cascading effects of global economic connectivity.
words.example3Translation: Iqtisodiy o'zaro bog'liqlik o'zaro zaiflik orqali samaradorlik va tinchlikni rivojlantirsada, u 2008 yilgi moliyaviy inqiroz va COVID-19 ta'minot zanjiri uzilishlari global iqtisodiy ulanishning halokatli kaskadli ta'sirlarini ko'rsatganidek, tizimli mo'rtlikni ham yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz global iqtisodiy xavf-xatarlarni baholash bo'yicha xalqaro moliya institutida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The concept that the world has become highly interconnected, functioning like a small village.
words.example1: The internet has turned the world into a global village where news spreads instantly.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqamli kommunikatsiya tendensiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Operating in a global village means our brand reputation can be affected by events anywhere in the world.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning reputatsiyani boshqarish strategiyasini PR jamoasi bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The global village concept captures both the opportunity of unprecedented human connectivity and the challenge of managing shared vulnerabilities, as instantaneous communication enables both rapid collective action and the viral spread of misinformation.
words.example3Translation: Global qishloq kontseptsiyasi misli ko'rilmagan inson ulanishining imkoniyatini ham, umumiy zaifliklarni boshqarish muammosini ham aks ettiradi, chunki tezkor kommunikatsiya ham tez jamoaviy harakatni, ham dezinformatsiyaning tez tarqalishini ta'minlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli kommunikatsiya va global madaniy o'zgarishlar bo'yicha akademik konferensiyada nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The removal or reduction of trade barriers between nations.
words.example1: Trade liberalization has made imported goods more affordable for consumers.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro savdo va iqtisodiy siyosat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our export growth has been driven by trade liberalization agreements signed between our country and key partners.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xalqaro kengayish strategiyasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Trade liberalization generates aggregate economic gains but distributes them unevenly, often benefiting export-competitive industries and consumers while displacing workers in import-competing sectors, necessitating complementary domestic policies to manage transition costs.
words.example3Translation: Savdoni erkinlashtirish umumiy iqtisodiy foyda keltiradi, lekin ularni notekis taqsimlaydi, ko'pincha import bilan raqobatlashuvchi sektordagi ishchilarni ko'chirish bilan birga eksportga raqobatbardosh sanoat va iste'molchilarni manfaatdor qiladi va o'tish xarajatlarini boshqarish uchun to'ldiruvchi ichki siyosatlarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro savdo muzokarasida mamlakatingiz delegatsiyasini boshqarayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Communication between people from different cultural backgrounds.
words.example1: Cross-cultural communication skills are essential when working in international teams.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi xodimga xalqaro loyihalar bilan ishlash uchun zarur ko'nikmalar haqida tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We invest in cross-cultural communication training before sending staff to work in overseas offices.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni xalqaro tayinlovlar uchun tayyorlash dasturini HR jamoasi bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective cross-cultural communication requires not merely language proficiency but deep cultural intelligence, including awareness of implicit communication norms, power distance expectations, and culturally specific concepts of time, hierarchy, and interpersonal trust.
words.example3Translation: Samarali madaniyatlararo muloqot nafaqat til bilimini, balki chuqur madaniy intellektni talab qiladi, jumladan yashirin kommunikatsiya normalari, hokimiyat masofasi kutilishlari va vaqt, ierarxiya va shaxslararo ishonchning madaniy jihatdan o'ziga xos tushunchalari haqida xabardorlikni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro korporativ integratsiya jarayonida madaniyatlararo kompetentlikni rivojlantirish bo'yicha trening o'tkazayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A nation's supreme power and authority to govern itself independently.
words.example1: Countries protect their sovereignty by controlling their own borders and laws.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro siyosat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The trade agreement was criticized for potentially undermining national sovereignty over economic policy.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro savdo kelishuvlarini muhokama qilayotganda va ulardagi muammoli jihatlarni tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The tension between national sovereignty and the demands of global governance represents one of the defining political challenges of the 21st century, as transnational problems require coordinated solutions that inevitably constrain unilateral state action.
words.example3Translation: Milliy suverenitet va global boshqaruv talablari o'rtasidagi keskinlik 21-asrning belgilovchi siyosiy muammolaridan birini ifodalaydi, chunki transmilliy muammolar muqarrar ravishda bir tomonlama davlat harakatini cheklaydigan muvofiqlashtirilgan yechimlarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro huquq va global boshqaruv bo'yicha diplomatik konferensiyada ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A social system where the purchase and use of goods is central to daily life and identity.
words.example1: Consumer culture encourages people to buy things they often do not really need.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan reklamaning psixologik ta'siri haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our marketing campaign was designed to appeal to consumer culture while promoting mindful purchasing habits.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi reklama kampaniyasini marketing jamoasi bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Consumer culture's equation of identity with purchasing power creates profound psychological and environmental consequences, driving both personal indebtedness and unsustainable resource consumption that exceeds planetary boundaries.
words.example3Translation: Iste'molchi madaniyatining shaxsiyatni xarid qilish quvvati bilan tenglashtirishi chuqur psixologik va atrof-muhit oqibatlarini keltirib chiqaradi, ham shaxsiy qarzdorlikni, ham sayyoramiz chegaralaridan oshib ketadigan barqaror bo'lmagan resurslardan foydalanishni keltirib chiqaradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror iste'mol va korporativ javobgarlik bo'yicha sanoat forumida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The international network of economic activities, trade, and financial systems.
words.example1: Changes in the global economy affect businesses and workers in every country.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqtisodiy yangiliklar va ular kompaniyangizga ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our pricing strategy must account for fluctuations in the global economy and currency exchange rates.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliya bo'limi bilan kelgusi chorak uchun narxlash strategiyasini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The global economy's increasing complexity and interconnectedness demands sophisticated international economic governance that can coordinate responses to systemic risks while respecting national economic autonomy and promoting equitable development outcomes.
words.example3Translation: Global iqtisodiyotning tobora murakkablashib va bog'lanib borishi milliy iqtisodiy mustaqillikka hurmat ko'rsatib va adolatli rivojlanish natijalarini ta'minlab, tizimli xavf-xatarlarga javoblarni muvofiqlashtiradigan murakkab xalqaro iqtisodiy boshqaruvni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro moliya institutida iqtisodiy barqarorlik bo'yicha kengash sessiyasida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The distinctive traditions, values, and culture of a local community.
words.example1: Protecting local identity helps communities maintain their unique cultural heritage.
words.example1Situation: Siz mahalliy madaniyat va an'analar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our regional marketing strategy celebrates local identity rather than imposing a uniform global brand image.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning mahalliy bozorga moslashtirilgan marketing yondashuvini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Local identity serves not merely as cultural heritage but as a source of psychological belonging and community resilience, making its preservation an important counterweight to the homogenizing pressures of globalization.
words.example3Translation: Mahalliy o'ziga xoslik nafaqat madaniy meros sifatida, balki psixologik tegishlilik va jamoat barqarorligining manbai sifatida ham xizmat qiladi va uning saqlanishini globalizatsiyaning bir xillashuvchi bosimiga qarshi muhim vazn sifatida qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar rivojlanish rejalashtirish komissiyasida mahalliy madaniy meros va modernizatsiya o'rtasidagi muvozanat haqida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Globalization that addresses environmental and social impacts alongside economic growth.
words.example1: Sustainable globalization means trading fairly while protecting the environment.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro savdo va atrof-muhit mas'uliyati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our international expansion strategy is guided by sustainable globalization principles that prioritize local communities and environmental stewardship.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xalqaro kengayish rejasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Achieving sustainable globalization requires redesigning international trade, investment, and governance frameworks to internalize environmental costs, protect labor standards, and ensure that economic integration generates broadly shared prosperity rather than concentrated gains.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror globalizatsiyaga erishish atrof-muhit xarajatlarini ichkilashtirish, mehnat standartlarini himoya qilish va iqtisodiy integratsiya to'plangan foyda o'rniga keng tarqalgan farovonlikni keltirib chiqarishini ta'minlash uchun xalqaro savdo, investitsiya va boshqaruv tizimlarini qayta loyihalashni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror rivojlanish va globalizatsiya bo'yicha BMT forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A scattered population with a common origin living outside their original homeland.
words.example1: The Indian diaspora plays an important role in connecting India with the global economy.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro biznes tendensiyalari va etnik jamoat tarmoqlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company actively recruits from diaspora communities to build diverse teams with international networks.
words.example2Situation: Siz xilma-xil iste'dod sotib olish strategiyasini HR jamoasi bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Diaspora communities function as powerful bridges between their countries of origin and settlement, facilitating remittances, knowledge transfer, and cultural diplomacy that can significantly accelerate development in sending nations.
words.example3Translation: Diaspora jamoalari o'z kelib chiqish va joylashuv mamlakatlari o'rtasidagi kuchli ko'priklar sifatida ishlaydi, yuboruvchi mamlakatlarda rivojlanishni sezilarli darajada tezlashtira oladigan o'tkazma pul, bilim almashinuvi va madaniy diplomatiyani osonlashtiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro migratsiya va rivojlanish bo'yicha konferensiyada davlatlarning diasporadan foydalanish strategiyalari haqida nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Tourism that minimizes environmental impact while benefiting local communities.
words.example1: Sustainable tourism encourages travelers to respect local cultures and ecosystems.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga sayohat rejalari haqida maslahat berayotganda va u qayerga borishni so'raganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our travel company has committed to sustainable tourism by partnering only with eco-certified hotels and operators.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning barqaror biznes strategiyasini mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Transitioning the global tourism industry toward sustainable tourism requires redesigning incentive structures, visitor management systems, and community benefit-sharing mechanisms to align commercial interests with ecological and cultural preservation.
words.example3Translation: Global turizm sanoatini barqaror turizmga o'tkazish tijorat manfaatlarini ekologik va madaniy saqlanish bilan uyg'unlashtirish uchun rag'batlantirish tuzilmalarini, mehmonlarni boshqarish tizimlarini va jamoat foydani taqsimlash mexanizmlarini qayta loyihalashni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro turizm tashkilotida barqaror turizm siyosatini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha konferensiyada ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Adopting elements of another culture without proper understanding or respect.
words.example1: Wearing traditional clothing from another culture as a costume can be seen as cultural appropriation.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan madaniy tadbirlar va kiyinish kodeksi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our brand was criticized for cultural appropriation after using sacred indigenous symbols in a fashion campaign.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning brending qarorlarini PR inqirozini boshqarish jarayonida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Distinguishing cultural appropriation from cultural appreciation requires examining power relationships, context, and whether communities whose traditions are being adopted are benefiting, consulted, or harmed by such adoption.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy o'zlashtirib olishni madaniy baholar bilan ajratish uchun hokimiyat munosabatlarini, kontekstni va an'analari qabul qilinayotgan jamoalar bunday qabul qilishdan foyda olayotganini, maslahat olinayotganini yoki zarar ko'rayotganini tekshirish talab qilinadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning madaniy sezgirlik trening dasturini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha xilma-xillik va inklyuzivlik komissiyasida ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Excessive tourism that harms local communities, infrastructure, and the environment.
words.example1: Overtourism in Venice has pushed many local residents out of the city center.
words.example1Situation: Siz mashhur sayohat manzillarining muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our tour operator limits group sizes to prevent contributing to overtourism at sensitive heritage sites.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning mas'uliyatli turizm siyosatini mijozlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Overtourism reveals the fundamental tension between tourism's economic benefits and its social and environmental costs, demanding visitor management strategies, pricing mechanisms, and spatial redistribution policies that protect residential quality of life.
words.example3Translation: Haddan tashqari turizm turizmning iqtisodiy foydasi va uning ijtimoiy va atrof-muhit xarajatlari o'rtasidagi asosiy keskinlikni ko'rsatadi va turar joy hayot sifatini himoya qiladigan mehmonlarni boshqarish strategiyalarini, narxlash mexanizmlarini va fazoviy qayta taqsimlash siyosatlarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar turizm boshqarmasida siyosat ishlab chiquvchi sifatida mashhur turistik hududlarda tartibga solish choralarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Responsible travel to natural areas that conserves the environment and supports local communities.
words.example1: Ecotourism in Costa Rica has helped protect rainforests while creating local jobs.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga barqaror sayohat imkoniyatlari haqida maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company specializes in ecotourism packages that fund conservation projects in the destinations we visit.
words.example2Situation: Siz sayohat agentligi mahsulot katalogini yangi mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Genuine ecotourism requires rigorous certification standards, transparent revenue-sharing with local communities, and measurable conservation outcomes to distinguish authentic sustainable travel from greenwashing by conventional tourism operators.
words.example3Translation: Haqiqiy ekoturizm an'anaviy turizm operatorlari tomonidan yashil bo'yash bilan haqiqiy barqaror sayohatni ajratish uchun qat'iy sertifikatlash standartlarini, mahalliy jamoatlar bilan shaffof daromadlarni taqsimlashni va o'lchanadigan tabiatni muhofaza qilish natijalarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz atrof-muhitga sertifikatlangan sayohat kompaniyasida barqarorlik koordinatori sifatida xalqaro ekoturizm sammitida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A place of cultural, historical, or natural significance worthy of preservation.
words.example1: The ancient city was declared a UNESCO heritage site to protect it from development.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan sayohat rejalari yoki tarix haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our tour packages include guided visits to heritage sites with expert historians and local guides.
words.example2Situation: Siz sayohat agentligi mahsulot tavsifini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Heritage site management increasingly requires balancing physical preservation, visitor access, community engagement, and commercial sustainability, as mass tourism can paradoxically destroy the very authenticity that initially attracts visitors.
words.example3Translation: Meros joylarini boshqarish tobora ko'proq jismoniy saqlanish, mehmonlarga kirish, jamoat ishtiroki va tijorat barqarorligini muvozanatlashtirishni talab qiladi, chunki ommaviy turizm paradoksal ravishda dastlab mehmonlarni jalb qilgan haqiqiylikni yo'q qilishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz UNESCO meros joylarini boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Services and facilities built to support tourism, including transport and accommodation.
words.example1: Poor tourist infrastructure made it difficult for visitors to reach the remote national park.
words.example1Situation: Siz sayohat tajribalaringiz haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda va muayyan manzilning kamchiliklari haqida aytayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The government is investing heavily in tourist infrastructure to boost international visitor numbers by 2030.
words.example2Situation: Siz milliy turizm rivojlanish strategiyasini hukumat amaldorlari bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective tourist infrastructure development must prioritize local community needs alongside visitor experience, avoiding the common pitfall of creating facilities that serve tourists while displacing residents and eroding the authentic character that made destinations attractive.
words.example3Translation: Samarali turistik infratuzilmani rivojlantirish mehmon tajribasining yonida mahalliy jamoat ehtiyojlarini ustuvor qo'yishi kerak va manzillarni jozibali qilgan haqiqiy xarakter aholini ko'chirish va yo'q qilish bilan turistlarga xizmat qiladigan inshootlar yaratishning keng tarqalgan tuzoqidan qochishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz mintaqaviy turizm rivojlanish agentligida loyiha menejeri sifatida infratuzilma investitsiya rejasini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Deep engagement and participation in a local culture during travel.
words.example1: Cultural immersion means living with local families rather than staying in tourist hotels.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga sayohat uslubingiz haqida tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our language school offers cultural immersion programs that combine lessons with local homestays and community activities.
words.example2Situation: Siz til maktabi dasturlarini potensial o'quvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Authentic cultural immersion requires vulnerability, humility, and genuine curiosity, moving beyond tourist consumption to build reciprocal relationships that enrich both visitor understanding and host community experiences.
words.example3Translation: Haqiqiy madaniyatga sho'ng'ish zaiflikni, kamtarlikni va haqiqiy qiziqishni talab qiladi va sayyoh iste'molidan tashqariga chiqib, tashrif buyuruvchi tushunchasi va mezbonlik jamoasi tajribalarini boyitadigan o'zaro munosabatlarni qurishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro ta'lim almashinuvi dasturini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha universitetlar hamkorligida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Businesses providing accommodation, food, and services to travelers.
words.example1: The hospitality industry was one of the hardest hit sectors during the pandemic.
words.example1Situation: Siz COVID-19 ning turli sohalarga ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company provides software solutions specifically designed for the unique operational challenges of the hospitality industry.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning B2B mahsulot taklifi haqida potensial mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The hospitality industry's recovery from pandemic disruption has accelerated digital transformation, with contactless services, AI-driven personalization, and data analytics becoming competitive necessities rather than optional enhancements.
words.example3Translation: Mehmonxona-restoran sanoatining pandemiya uzilishidan tiklanishi raqamli transformatsiyani tezlashtirdi, temasiz xizmatlar, AI boshqaradigan personalizatsiya va ma'lumotlar tahlili ixtiyoriy yaxshilanishlar o'rniga raqobatdosh zaruriyatlarga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mehmonxona-restoran sanoatining raqamli transformatsiyasi bo'yicha sanoat konferensiyasida nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Places that are not popular with most tourists and away from tourist crowds.
words.example1: We prefer to travel off the beaten track to discover hidden gems most tourists never see.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan sayohat uslublari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our travel agency specializes in off the beaten track destinations that offer authentic experiences without the crowds.
words.example2Situation: Siz sayohat agentligi mahsulotlaringizni raqobatchilardan ajratib ko'rsatayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The growing desire to travel off the beaten track reflects a broader shift toward experiential and meaningful travel, as increasing numbers of travelers seek genuine cultural engagement over standardized tourist consumption.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p odamlar bormagan joylarga sayohat qilish istagining o'sishi mazmunli sayohatlarga keng o'tishni aks ettiradi, tobora ko'proq sayohatchilar standartlashtirilgan turist iste'moli o'rniga haqiqiy madaniy ishtirokni izlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz turizm tendensiyalari bo'yicha sanoat hisobotini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Rules and policies limiting movement between places or countries.
words.example1: Travel restrictions during the pandemic prevented millions from visiting family abroad.
words.example1Situation: Siz pandemiya davrida sayohat muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our risk management team monitors travel restrictions in all markets to ensure employee safety during international assignments.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro xodimlarni boshqarish bo'yicha HR jamoasi bilan xavfsizlik protokollarini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Travel restrictions represent a blunt policy instrument that generates significant economic and humanitarian costs, requiring careful calibration against specific risk evidence and transparent criteria to maintain public legitimacy and international cooperation.
words.example3Translation: Sayohat cheklovlari sezilarli iqtisodiy va insonparvarlik xarajatlarini keltirib chiqaradigan qo'pol siyosat vositasini ifodalaydi va jamoat qonuniyligi va xalqaro hamkorlikni saqlash uchun muayyan xavf dalillari va shaffof mezonlarga nisbatan ehtiyotkorlik bilan sozlashni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro sog'liq favqulodda holatlarda davlat chegaralarini boshqarish siyosatini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Local people starting and running their own businesses in their communities.
words.example1: Supporting local entrepreneurship ensures that tourism money stays in the community.
words.example1Situation: Siz mas'uliyatli turizm va mahalliy iqtisodiyotni qo'llab-quvvatlash haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our travel program deliberately channels spending toward local entrepreneurship by recommending family-owned restaurants and locally run tours.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning barqaror turizm siyosatini mijozlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Fostering local entrepreneurship in tourism destinations creates more equitable economic development by distributing benefits within communities rather than concentrating revenue flows in multinational hotel chains and international tour operators.
words.example3Translation: Turizm manzillarida mahalliy tadbirkorlikni rivojlantirish daromad oqimlarini transmilliy mehmonxona zanjirlari va xalqaro tur operatorlarida to'plash o'rniga jamoatlar ichida foydalarni taqsimlash orqali yanada adolatli iqtisodiy rivojlanishni yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro rivojlanish agentligida turizm orqali barqaror ta'minlash vositalari loyihasini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The time of year when a destination receives the most visitors.
words.example1: Hotels raise their prices significantly during the tourist season.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga sayohat rejalari va narxlar haqida maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our destination management strategy focuses on extending visitor appeal beyond the peak tourist season to reduce overcrowding.
words.example2Situation: Siz mintaqaviy turizm rivojlanish strategiyasini mahalliy hokimiyat vakillari bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The concentration of visitors within a narrow tourist season creates unsustainable peaks that stress infrastructure and communities, while leaving businesses unviable during off-peak periods, highlighting the need for demand diversification strategies.
words.example3Translation: Tor turistik mavsim ichida mehmonlarning to'planishi infratuzilma va jamoatlarga bosim o'tkazadigan barqaror bo'lmagan cho'qqilarni yaratadi, past mavsumlarda esa bizneslarni qobiliyatsiz qoldiradi va bu talabni diversifikatsiya qilish strategiyalarining zarurligini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz turizm talabini mavsimdan tashqari davrda kengaytirish uchun destinatsiya marketingi agentligi bilan hamkorlikda ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A pre-arranged tour that includes transport, accommodation, and activities at a fixed price.
words.example1: A package tour is ideal for first-time travelers who want everything organized in advance.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga sayohat rejalash bo'yicha maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company offers customizable package tours that can be adapted to individual preferences and budgets.
words.example2Situation: Siz sayohat agentligi mahsulotlaringizni raqobatchilardan ajratib ko'rsatayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While package tours democratize international travel by reducing complexity and cost barriers, their standardized itineraries and enclosed resort models can limit genuine cultural engagement and channel spending away from local communities.
words.example3Translation: Paket turlar murakkablik va narx to'siqlarini kamaytirish orqali xalqaro sayohatni demokratlashtirsada, ularning standartlashtirilgan marshrut rejalari va yopiq kurort modellari haqiqiy madaniy ishtiroqni cheklashi va xarajatlarni mahalliy jamoatlardan uzoqlashtirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz turizm iqtisodiyoti va mahalliy ta'sir bo'yicha sanoat tadqiqotini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A genuine, non-commercial experience of local life and culture.
words.example1: Staying with a local family gives travelers a more authentic experience than a hotel.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga sayohat maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our travel brand is built around delivering authentic experiences that connect visitors with real communities.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning brend pozitsiyasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The pursuit of authentic experience in travel reflects a fundamental tension between the tourist's desire for genuine cultural contact and the inevitable transformation that occurs when cultural practices are commodified, staged, and repeated for commercial consumption.
words.example3Translation: Sayohatda haqiqiy tajribani izlash sayyohning haqiqiy madaniy aloqa istagi va madaniy amaliyotlar tijorat iste'moli uchun tovar sifatida taqdim etilganda, sahnalashtirilganda va takrorlanganda muqarrar ravishda yuz beradigan o'zgarish o'rtasidagi asosiy keskinlikni aks ettiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz turizm madaniyati va autentiklik bo'yicha akademik konferensiyada nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Travel practices that are environmentally and socially responsible.
words.example1: Travel sustainability includes choosing direct flights and reducing plastic use during trips.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga sayohat rejalari haqida maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our corporate travel policy requires employees to consider travel sustainability when booking business trips.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yangi xarajatlar va sayohat siyosatini xodimlarga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Advancing travel sustainability requires systemic industry transformation beyond individual behavioral choices, including aviation decarbonization, infrastructure investment in low-carbon transport alternatives, and pricing mechanisms that reflect the true environmental cost of travel.
words.example3Translation: Sayohat barqarorligini rivojlantirish individual xulqiy tanlovlardan tashqari tizimli sanoat transformatsiyasini talab qiladi, jumladan aviatsiyani dekarbonizatsiya qilish, kam uglerodli transport alternativlariga infratuzilma investitsiyasi va sayohatning haqiqiy atrof-muhit xarajatlarini aks ettiruvchi narxlash mexanizmlarini o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro aviatsiya sanoati barqarorlik konferensiyasida siyosat tavsiyalarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Media distributed through the internet and digital platforms.
words.example1: Digital media has transformed how people consume news and entertainment.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan media iste'moli tendensiyalari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company shifted its entire advertising budget to digital media after seeing significantly higher engagement rates.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing byudjetini qayta taqsimlash haqida moliya jamoasi bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Digital media's algorithmic curation creates personalized information environments that can simultaneously enhance relevance and reinforce cognitive biases, raising profound questions about the formation of shared public understanding in democratic societies.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli medianing algoritmik tanlovi bir vaqtda dolzarblikni oshirishi va kognitiv xurofotlarni mustahkamlashi mumkin bo'lgan shaxsiylashtirilgan axborot muhitlarini yaratadi va demokratik jamiyatlarda umumiy jamoat tushunchasini shakllantirish haqida chuqur savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli media va demokratiya bo'yicha siyosat konferensiyasida nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Advertising directed at specific users based on their online behavior and data.
words.example1: Targeted advertising allows businesses to reach customers who are most likely to buy their products.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqamli marketing strategiyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our targeted advertising campaigns have reduced cost-per-acquisition by 40 percent compared to traditional methods.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing samaradorligi natijalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While targeted advertising generates efficiency gains for marketers, its reliance on extensive personal data collection raises significant privacy concerns and creates potential for discriminatory practices in areas like housing, employment, and financial services.
words.example3Translation: Maqsadli reklama marketologlar uchun samaradorlik foydalarini keltirsa-da, uning keng shaxsiy ma'lumotlar to'plashga tayanishi sezilarli maxfiylik tashvishlarini ko'taradi va uy-joy, ish va moliyaviy xizmatlar kabi sohalarda kamsituvchi amaliyotlar uchun imkoniyat yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz reklama texnologiyasi va iste'molchi maxfiyligi bo'yicha tartibga solish organi tinglovida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ability to critically analyze and evaluate media messages and their effects.
words.example1: Media literacy helps people recognize when news stories are biased or misleading.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga axborot manbalari haqida tanqidiy fikrlash bo'yicha maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company provides media literacy training to help employees identify misinformation relevant to our industry.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni o'qitish dasturlari haqida HR jamoasi bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Comprehensive media literacy education must extend beyond fact-checking skills to develop critical awareness of ownership structures, algorithmic bias, and the commercial incentives that shape what information is produced, distributed, and amplified.
words.example3Translation: Keng qamrovli media savodxonligi ta'limi faktlarni tekshirish ko'nikmalaridan tashqariga chiqib, qanday ma'lumot ishlab chiqarilishini, tarqatilishini va kuchaytirilishini shakllantiruvchi mulkchilik tuzilmalari, algoritmik noxolislik va tijorat rag'batlantirishlarini tanqidiy anglashni rivojlantirishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy media savodxonligi ta'lim dasturini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha ta'lim vazirligi bilan hamkorlikda ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: False or misleading information presented as legitimate news.
words.example1: Fake news spreads quickly on social media and can cause real-world harm.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan axborot xavfsizligi va onlayn xabardorlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our communications team monitors fake news related to our brand and responds rapidly with accurate information.
words.example2Situation: Siz PR va reputatsiyani boshqarish strategiyasi haqida rahbariyatga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effectively countering fake news requires not only platform-level content moderation but also investment in public media literacy, support for independent journalism, and transparent political advertising regulations that address the demand-side drivers of misinformation.
words.example3Translation: Soxta yangiliklarga samarali qarshi turish nafaqat platforma darajasidagi kontent moderatsiyasini, balki jamoat media savodxonligiga sarmoya kiritishni, mustaqil jurnalistikani qo'llab-quvvatlashni va dezinformatsiyaning talab tomoni harakatlantiruvchilarini hal qiluvchi shaffof siyosiy reklama qoidalarini ham talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz demokratiya va raqamli axborot ekotizimi bo'yicha parlament komissiyasida ekspert sifatida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Using a famous person to promote a product or service.
words.example1: Celebrity endorsement can instantly raise brand awareness among millions of fans.
words.example1Situation: Siz reklama strategiyasi haqida marketing jamoasi bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our campaign relied on celebrity endorsement from a respected athlete to target health-conscious consumers.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing kampaniyasini taqdim etayotganda va maqsadli auditoriya strategiyasini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Celebrity endorsement effectiveness depends critically on perceived authenticity and value alignment between endorser and brand, as consumers increasingly scrutinize whether famous advocates genuinely use and believe in the products they promote.
words.example3Translation: Mashhur shaxs tavsiyasining samaradorligi tavsiyachi va brend o'rtasidagi hissiy haqiqiylik va qiymat muvofiqligiga bog'liq bo'lib, iste'molchilar mashhur advokatlar ular targ'ib qilayotgan mahsulotlarni haqiqatan ham ishlatishini va ishonishini tobora ko'proq tekshiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning influencer va mashhur shaxs hamkorlik strategiyasini boshqaruv jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The suppression of speech, content, or information considered objectionable.
words.example1: Internet censorship prevents citizens in some countries from accessing certain websites.
words.example1Situation: Siz axborot erkinligi va raqamli huquqlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our global operations require navigating censorship laws that vary significantly across different markets.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xalqaro muvofiqlik muammolari haqida huquqiy bo'lim bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Censorship debates increasingly center on the difficult boundary between legitimate content moderation to protect public safety and political suppression of legitimate dissent, requiring transparent governance frameworks that are accountable to democratic oversight.
words.example3Translation: Tsenzura munozaralari tobora ko'proq jamoat xavfsizligini himoya qilish uchun qonuniy kontent moderatsiyasi va qonuniy norozilikni siyosiy bostirib qo'yish o'rtasidagi qiyin chegara atrofida to'planmoqda va demokratik nazoratga javobgar shaffof boshqaruv tizimlarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli huquqlar va internet boshqaruvi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: How people make decisions to spend their resources on goods and services.
words.example1: Understanding consumer behavior helps companies design better products and marketing.
words.example1Situation: Siz marketing strategiyasi haqida jamoangiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our consumer behavior research revealed that price sensitivity varies significantly across different customer segments.
words.example2Situation: Siz bozorni segmentatsiya qilish strategiyasi haqida rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Consumer behavior is shaped by a complex interaction of rational, emotional, social, and environmental factors that often override stated preferences, highlighting the limitations of purely information-based interventions to promote sustainable consumption.
words.example3Translation: Iste'molchi xulq-atvori ko'pincha e'lon qilingan afzalliklarni bekor qiladigan ratsional, hissiy, ijtimoiy va atrof-muhit omillarining murakkab o'zaro ta'siri bilan shakllanadi va bu barqaror iste'molni rivojlantirish uchun faqat axborotga asoslangan aralashuvlarning cheklovlarini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz iste'molchi psixologiyasi va barqaror bozor dizayni bo'yicha sanoat tadqiqotini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The effect that others have on an individual's attitudes, beliefs, or actions.
words.example1: Social influence from friends often shapes what brands and products young people choose.
words.example1Situation: Siz yoshlar marketingi strategiyasi haqida jamoangiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our campaign leverages social influence by encouraging satisfied customers to share their experiences online.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning referral marketing strategiyasini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Social influence mechanisms including conformity, social proof, and authority are systematically exploited in digital marketing contexts, raising ethical questions about the boundary between persuasion and manipulation in algorithmically mediated environments.
words.example3Translation: Muvofiqlik, ijtimoiy isbotlash va avtoritet kabi ijtimoiy ta'sir mexanizmlari raqamli marketing kontekstlarida tizimli ravishda ishlatiladi va algoritmik vositachi muhitlarda ishontirish va manipulyatsiya o'rtasidagi chegara haqida etik savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli marketing etikasi va iste'molchi himoyasi bo'yicha sanoat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Advertising that follows moral standards of truth, fairness, and social responsibility.
words.example1: Ethical advertising means not making false claims about product benefits.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi reklama kampaniyasini marketing va huquqiy jamoalar bilan tekshirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is committed to ethical advertising by using real customers in our campaigns rather than manipulated imagery.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning brend qadriyatlari va marketing yondashuvi haqida potensial hamkorlar bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Ethical advertising requires ongoing vigilance as cultural norms evolve, compelling brands to continually reassess whether their communications respect consumer autonomy, avoid harmful stereotypes, and accurately represent product capabilities without exploiting psychological vulnerabilities.
words.example3Translation: Axloqiy reklama madaniy normalar rivojlanib borar ekan, doimiy hushyorlikni talab qiladi va brendlarni kommunikatsiyalari iste'molchi mustaqilligini hurmat qilishini, zararli stereotiplardan qochishini va psixologik zaifliklardan foydalanmasdan mahsulot qobiliyatlarini to'g'ri ifodalashini doimiy ravishda qayta baholashga majbur qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning reklama standartlari va muvofiqlik siyosatini marketing jamoasiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Communication channels used to reach a large, diverse audience simultaneously.
words.example1: Mass media including television and newspapers shape public opinion on major issues.
words.example1Situation: Siz media ta'siri va jamoat fikri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our product launch used mass media to build widespread awareness before our digital campaign began.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahsulot ishga tushirish strategiyasini marketing jamoasi bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Mass media's consolidation into a small number of large corporate entities raises concerns about editorial independence, agenda-setting power, and the capacity of commercial media systems to serve the democratic functions of informing citizens and holding power to account.
words.example3Translation: Ommaviy axborot vositalarining kichik miqdordagi yirik korporativ sub'ektlarda to'planishi tahririyat mustaqilligi, kun tartibini belgilash kuchi va tijorat media tizimlarining fuqarolarni xabardor qilish va hokimiyatni javobgar tutish demokratik funktsiyalarini bajarish qobiliyati haqida tashvishlarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz media sanoati boshqaruvi va demokratiya bo'yicha davlat siyosati konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A marketing technique where branded products are embedded within entertainment media.
words.example1: Product placement in popular movies can dramatically increase brand recognition.
words.example1Situation: Siz reklama strategiyasi va brend ko'rinuvchanligini marketing jamoasi bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our brand secured product placement in three top-rated television series to reach affluent viewers.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning media hamkorlik strategiyasini boshqaruv jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Product placement raises ethical concerns when it targets vulnerable audiences or blurs the boundary between editorial content and commercial promotion without adequate disclosure, potentially undermining informed consumer decision-making.
words.example3Translation: Mahsulotni joylashtirish zaif auditoriyani maqsad qilganda yoki etarli ma'lumot bermasdan tahririyat kontent va tijorat targ'iboti o'rtasidagi chegarani xiralashtirganda etik tashvishlarni ko'taradi va potensial ravishda xabardor iste'molchi qarorlarini buzadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz reklama muvofiqlik va iste'molchi himoyasi qoidalarini marketing jamoasiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Content that spreads rapidly and widely through online sharing.
words.example1: A funny viral video helped our small brand reach millions of potential customers overnight.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqamli marketing muvaffaqiyat tarixi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our social media team studies viral content patterns to understand what resonates with our target audience.
words.example2Situation: Siz kontent strategiyasi yig'ilishida raqamli marketing jamoangiz bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Creating genuinely viral content requires understanding the social currencies of emotion, identity, and social capital that motivate sharing behavior, as manufactured virality rarely achieves the authentic peer-to-peer amplification that drives organic reach.
words.example3Translation: Haqiqatan ham viral kontent yaratish ulashish xulq-atvorini rag'batlantiradigan hissiyot, shaxsiyat va ijtimoiy kapitalning ijtimoiy valyutalarini tushunishni talab qiladi, chunki ishlab chiqarilgan virallik kamdan-kam hollarda organik qamrovni haydaydigan haqiqiy tengdoshdan-tengdoshga kuchaytirishni ta'minlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli marketing strategiyasi va kontent yaratish bo'yicha sanoat seminarida nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A message broadcast for public benefit rather than commercial gain.
words.example1: Public service announcements about road safety have helped reduce traffic accidents.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamoat xabardorlik kampaniyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company partnered with a health charity to produce public service announcements about mental health awareness.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ijtimoiy mas'uliyat tashabbuslarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective public service announcements require sophisticated behavioral insights to move beyond information provision toward motivating actual behavior change, particularly when addressing complex social issues where knowledge alone is insufficient to overcome entrenched habits.
words.example3Translation: Samarali jamoatchilik xizmati e'lonlari murakkab ijtimoiy masalalarni ko'rib chiqishda, bilim yolg'iz o'zi o'rnatilgan odatlarni bartaraf etish uchun etarli bo'lmaganda, axborot ta'minotidan haqiqiy xulq-atvor o'zgarishini rag'batlantirishga o'tish uchun murakkab xulqiy tushunchalarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoat sog'lig'i kommunikatsiyasi strategiyasi bo'yicha hukumat agentligi bilan hamkorlikda ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: How familiar consumers are with a brand's name, identity, and qualities.
words.example1: Brand awareness increases when companies consistently appear in places their customers spend time.
words.example1Situation: Siz marketing strategiyasi haqida jamoangiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our brand awareness campaign increased unprompted brand recognition from 12 to 34 percent within six months.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing kampaniyasi natijalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Building sustainable brand awareness requires consistent delivery of distinctive value propositions across all customer touchpoints, as isolated awareness campaigns without complementary customer experience quality rarely translate into durable brand preference or loyalty.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror brend haqida xabardorlikni qurish barcha mijozlar bilan aloqa nuqtalarida o'ziga xos qiymat takliflarini izchil yetkazishni talab qiladi, chunki mijozlar tajribasi sifatisiz ajratilgan xabardorlik kampaniyalari kamdan-kam hollarda barqaror brend afzalligi yoki sodiqligiga aylanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning uzoq muddatli brend kapitalini rivojlantirish strategiyasini boshqaruv kengashiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Content that combines information and entertainment to engage audiences.
words.example1: Documentary series are a popular form of infotainment that educate while entertaining.
words.example1Situation: Siz kontent strategiyasi va auditoriyani jalb qilish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our brand creates infotainment content that educates customers about our industry while keeping them engaged.
words.example2Situation: Siz kontent marketing strategiyasini taqdim etayotganda va nega faqat reklama o'rniga ta'lim kontent yaratishni tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The rise of infotainment reflects a fundamental shift in audience expectations toward content that is simultaneously informative and engaging, but raises concerns about the potential trivialization of complex issues when entertainment imperatives override journalistic rigor.
words.example3Translation: Infoteymentning ko'tarilishi bir vaqtning o'zida axborotli va qiziqarli bo'lgan kontentga auditoriya kutilishlarida asosiy o'zgarishni aks ettiradi, lekin ko'ngilochar majburiyatlar jurnalistik qat'iyatdan ustun kelganda murakkab masalalarning mumkin bo'lgan ahamiyatsizlashishi haqida tashvishlarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz media ta'limi va jamoatchilikni xabardor qilish bo'yicha konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The effect of discouraging criminal behavior through fear of punishment.
words.example1: Visible security cameras act as a deterrence against shoplifting.
words.example1Situation: Siz ofis xavfsizligi choralarini hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Harsher sentencing was introduced as a deterrence against repeat offenders in violent crime cases.
words.example2Situation: Siz jinoyatchilikni kamaytirish strategiyalari haqida huquqiy bo'lim bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The effectiveness of deterrence as a crime prevention strategy is contested, as evidence suggests that certainty of detection matters more than severity of punishment in shaping criminal decision-making.
words.example3Translation: Profilaktika sifatida to'xtatuvchi ta'sirning samaradorligi bahsli bo'lib, dalillar aniqlash ishonchliligi jinoyatchilik qarorlarini shakllantirish uchun jazo og'irligidan ko'ra muhimroq ekanligini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jinoyatchilikni kamaytirish bo'yicha hukumat siyosati sessiyasida ekspert sifatida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The process of helping offenders re-enter society as law-abiding citizens.
words.example1: Rehabilitation programs in prisons include education and vocational training.
words.example1Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati islohotlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization funds rehabilitation initiatives that reduce reoffending rates among released prisoners.
words.example2Situation: Siz notijorat tashkilotingizning ijtimoiy ta'sir hisobotini donor tashkilotlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Evidence consistently shows that investment in rehabilitation programs yields better public safety outcomes than extended incarceration, by addressing the underlying factors that drive criminal behavior rather than merely punishing its symptoms.
words.example3Translation: Dalillar reabilitatsiya dasturlariga investitsiya uzoq muddatli qamoqqa qaraganda yaxshiroq jamoat xavfsizligi natijalarini keltirib chiqarishini doimiy ravishda ko'rsatadi, chunki u jinoyat xulq-atvorini haydaydigan asosiy omillarni hal qiladi va uning simptomlarini jazolamasdan.
words.example3Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati islohoti bo'yicha parlament komissiyasida siyosat tavsiyalarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The tendency of a convicted criminal to reoffend after release.
words.example1: High recidivism rates suggest that prisons alone do not prevent future crime.
words.example1Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati tizimining samaradorligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our rehabilitation program has reduced recidivism by 30 percent among participants over five years.
words.example2Situation: Siz notijorat tashkilotingizning dastur samaradorligi hisobotini moliyalashtiruvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Reducing recidivism requires addressing the structural barriers that returning citizens face, including housing instability, unemployment, stigma, and lack of social support, which often make law-abiding reintegration more difficult than reoffending.
words.example3Translation: Qayta jinoyat qilishni kamaytirish qaytuvchi fuqarolar duch keladigan tarkibiy to'siqlarni hal qilishni talab qiladi, jumladan uy-joy beqarorligi, ishsizlik, kamsitish va ijtimoiy qo'llab-quvvatlash yo'qligi, bu ko'pincha qonuniy qayta integratsiyani qayta jinoyat qilishdan ko'ra qiyinroq qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qamoqdan chiqqan shaxslarni qayta integratsiya qilish dasturlarini moliyalashtirish bo'yicha ijtimoiy siyosat sessiyasida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Non-violent crime committed for financial gain, typically by professionals.
words.example1: Fraud and embezzlement are common forms of white-collar crime in the corporate world.
words.example1Situation: Siz korporativ muvofiqlik va ichki audit haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our compliance team conducts regular audits to detect and prevent white-collar crime within the organization.
