words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ boshqaruv va risk boshqaruvi haqida rahbariyatga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: White-collar crime causes enormous economic and social harm, yet historically attracts significantly lighter sentences than street crime, raising questions about whether justice systems treat financial exploitation of the many by the privileged few with appropriate severity.
words.example3Translation: Oq yoqali jinoyat katta iqtisodiy va ijtimoiy zarar keltiradi, lekin tarixan ko'cha jinoyatiga qaraganda sezilarli darajada engilroq jazolar jalb qilgan, bu esa adolat tizimlari imtiyozli ozchilik tomonidan ko'pchilikni moliyaviy ekspluatatsiyasini tegishli jiddiylik bilan ko'rib chiqishini shubha ostiga qo'yadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy jinoyatlar va korporativ javobgarlik bo'yicha huquqiy konferensiyada ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An approach focused on mediation between offenders and victims to repair harm.
words.example1: Restorative justice allows victims to speak directly with offenders about the impact of the crime.
words.example1Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati alternativ yondashuvlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization trains mediators to facilitate restorative justice processes in schools and communities.
words.example2Situation: Siz notijorat tashkilotingizning dastur faoliyati haqida jamiyat manfaatdor tomonlariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Restorative justice offers a fundamentally different vision of criminal justice that prioritizes healing relationships, community accountability, and addressing underlying harms over retributive punishment, with evidence showing higher victim satisfaction and lower recidivism in many contexts.
words.example3Translation: Tiklash adolati jinoyat adolatining asosan boshqacha tasavvurini taklif qiladi va ko'p kontekstlarda jabrlanuvchining yuqori qoniqishi va qayta jinoyat qilishning kamayishini ko'rsatadigan dalillar bilan qasos jazosi o'rniga munosabatlarni tiklashni, jamoat javobgarligini va asosiy zararlarni bartaraf etishni ustuvor qo'yadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati islohoti bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada restorative adolat modellari haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Criminal or antisocial behavior by young people, typically under 18.
words.example1: Juvenile delinquency often increases in areas with high poverty and unemployment.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy muammolar va ularning yoshlarga ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our youth outreach program aims to prevent juvenile delinquency by providing mentorship and after-school activities.
words.example2Situation: Siz yoshlar rivojlanish dasturini mahalliy hukumat vakillariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Juvenile delinquency is most effectively addressed through early intervention programs that strengthen family functioning, improve school engagement, and provide positive developmental pathways, rather than through punitive measures that increase criminal justice system exposure.
words.example3Translation: O'smirlar jinoyatchiligi jinoyat adolati tizimiga ta'sirni oshiradigan jazo choralariga qaraganda oilaning ishlashini mustahkamlaydigan, maktabdagi ishtiroqni yaxshilaydigan va ijobiy rivojlanish yo'llarini ta'minlaydigan erta aralashuv dasturlari orqali samaraliroq hal qilinadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yoshlar jinoyatchiligi profilaktikasi bo'yicha mahalliy hukumat siyosati muhokamalarida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The legally authorized execution of a person as punishment for a crime.
words.example1: Many countries have abolished capital punishment as a violation of human rights.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro inson huquqlari standartlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The debate over capital punishment divides public opinion on justice, morality, and state power.
words.example2Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati va etika haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Opposition to capital punishment rests on multiple grounds including the irreversibility of wrongful executions, absence of deterrence evidence, racially and economically discriminatory application, and the fundamental ethical question of whether states should have the power to take human life.
words.example3Translation: O'lim jazosiga qarshilik noto'g'ri qatl qilishning qaytarib bo'lmasligi, to'xtatuvchi ta'sir dalillarining yo'qligi, irqiy va iqtisodiy kamsituvchi qo'llash va davlatlar inson hayotini olish huquqiga ega bo'lishi kerakligining asosiy axloqiy savoli kabi bir nechta asoslarga tayanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro inson huquqlari tashkilotida o'lim jazosini bekor qilish kampaniyasini himoya qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Organizations and agencies responsible for ensuring laws are obeyed.
words.example1: Law enforcement agencies are working to reduce drug trafficking in the region.
words.example1Situation: Siz mintaqaviy xavfsizlik tendensiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company cooperates fully with law enforcement when investigating financial irregularities.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning muvofiqlik va huquqiy hamkorlik siyosatini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective law enforcement requires not only operational capacity but also community trust, which depends on consistent application of laws without racial or socioeconomic bias and transparent accountability mechanisms for misconduct.
words.example3Translation: Samarali huquqni muhofaza qilish nafaqat operatsion imkoniyatni, balki irqiy yoki ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy noxolisliksiz qonunlarni izchil qo'llash va noto'g'ri xulq-atvor uchun shaffof javobgarlik mexanizmlariga bog'liq bo'lgan jamoat ishonchini ham talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz politsiya islohotlari va jamoat xavfsizligi bo'yicha shahar kengashida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Minor criminal offenses such as shoplifting or vandalism.
words.example1: Petty crime increased in the city center after the economic downturn.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar xavfsizligi tendensiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our security measures have successfully reduced petty crime incidents at all our retail locations.
words.example2Situation: Siz chakana savdo xavfsizligi natijalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Research suggests that petty crime often reflects unmet basic needs rather than moral failure, indicating that addressing poverty, housing insecurity, and addiction more effectively reduces minor offending than purely punitive responses.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqotlar shuni ko'rsatadiki, mayda jinoyat ko'pincha axloqiy muvaffaqiyatsizlik emas, balki qondirilmagan asosiy ehtiyojlarni aks ettiradi, bu esa qashshoqlik, uy-joy beqarorligi va giyohvandlikni hal qilish faqat jazo javoblariga qaraganda kichik jinoyatchilikni samaraliroq kamaytiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar jinoyatchiligini kamaytirish strategiyasi bo'yicha ijtimoiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A justice approach focused on punishing offenders proportionally to their crimes.
words.example1: Retributive justice holds that criminals deserve to be punished for the harm they cause.
words.example1Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati falsafasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Many legal systems balance retributive justice with rehabilitation to address both punishment and reintegration.
words.example2Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati tizimining maqsadlari haqida huquqiy jamoangiz bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Critics of retributive justice argue that while proportional punishment may satisfy moral intuitions about desert, it fails to address the structural conditions that produce crime or reduce harm to future victims, making it an incomplete foundation for criminal justice policy.
words.example3Translation: Qasos adolatini tanqid qiluvchilar mutanosib jazo jinoyat haqidagi axloqiy intuitsiyalarni qondirishi mumkin bo'lsa-da, u jinoyatni keltirib chiqaradigan tarkibiy sharoitlarni hal qilmaydi yoki kelajakdagi qurbonlarga zararni kamaytirishni ta'minlamaydi, bu esa uni jinoyat adolati siyosati uchun to'liq bo'lmagan asos qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati falsafasi va islohot yo'nalishlari haqida akademik konferensiyada nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Dishonest conduct by those in power, often involving bribery or abuse of position.
words.example1: Corruption in public institutions destroys citizens' trust in their government.
words.example1Situation: Siz boshqaruv va siyosiy tizimlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company has a zero-tolerance policy on corruption and requires all staff to complete anti-bribery training.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi xodimga kompaniyaning axloq kodeksi va muvofiqlik talablarini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Corruption imposes enormous costs on societies by distorting resource allocation, undermining public service delivery, deterring foreign investment, and eroding the rule of law that underpins economic development and democratic governance.
words.example3Translation: Korrupsiya resurslarni taqsimlashni buzish, davlat xizmatlarini ko'rsatishni zaiflashtirish, xorijiy investitsiyalarni to'sish va iqtisodiy rivojlanish va demokratik boshqaruvni asoslaydigan qonun ustuvorligini yo'q qilish orqali jamiyatlarga katta xarajatlar yuklaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ boshqaruv va antikorrupsiya choralari bo'yicha xalqaro biznes konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The monitoring of behavior, often by authorities, for security purposes.
words.example1: CCTV surveillance in public spaces helps police investigate crimes after they occur.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar xavfsizligi infratuzilmasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our building uses surveillance systems to protect employees and company assets around the clock.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi xodimga ofis xavfsizligi tizimlari haqida tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Mass surveillance technologies create fundamental tensions between security and civil liberties, as their deployment without adequate legal constraints and democratic oversight risks normalizing a panopticon society that chills free expression and political dissent.
words.example3Translation: Ommaviy nazorat texnologiyalari xavfsizlik va fuqarolik erkinliklari o'rtasida asosiy keskinliklarni yaratadi, chunki ularni etarli huquqiy cheklovlar va demokratik nazorat olmadan joriy etish erkin ifodalash va siyosiy norozilikni bo'g'adigan panoptikon jamiyatni normallashtirish xavfini tug'diradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli nazorat va fuqarolik erkinliklari bo'yicha parlament komissiyasida ekspert sifatida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The state of being confined in prison as punishment for a crime.
words.example1: Imprisonment separates offenders from society but does not always address the causes of crime.
words.example1Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati tizimlari va ularning samaradorligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Long periods of imprisonment can increase rather than reduce reoffending by severing community ties.
words.example2Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati islohoti bo'yicha siyosat muhokamalarida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The extraordinary expansion of imprisonment in many countries over recent decades has failed to produce proportional public safety gains while imposing immense human, social, and fiscal costs that fall disproportionately on marginalized communities.
words.example3Translation: So'nggi o'n yilliklarda ko'plab mamlakatlarda qamoqning g'ayritabiiy kengayishi mutanosib jamoat xavfsizligi foydasini keltira olmadi va marginal jamoalarga mutanosib ravishda tushadigan katta insoniy, ijtimoiy va moliyaviy xarajatlarni yuklatdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati tizimi islohotlari bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada qamoq siyosatini qayta ko'rib chiqish zaruriyatini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Social and economic conditions that influence behavior and outcomes.
words.example1: Socioeconomic factors like poverty and lack of education are strongly linked to crime rates.
words.example1Situation: Siz jinoyatchilikni kamaytirish strategiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our community investment program addresses the socioeconomic factors that contribute to youth unemployment in the area.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ijtimoiy mas'uliyat dasturlarini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Addressing socioeconomic factors underlying criminal behavior requires sustained investment in education, housing, mental health services, and economic opportunity, demonstrating that crime prevention is fundamentally a social policy challenge rather than simply a law enforcement problem.
words.example3Translation: Jinoyat xulq-atvorining asosidagi ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omillarni hal qilish ta'lim, uy-joy, ruhiy sog'liq xizmatlari va iqtisodiy imkoniyatlarga doimiy sarmoya kiritishni talab qiladi, bu esa jinoyatchilikni oldini olish asosan faqat huquqni muhofaza qilish muammosi emas, balki ijtimoiy siyosat muammosi ekanligini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar atrofidagi jinoyatchilik tendensiyalarini kamaytirishga qaratilgan ko'p tarmoqli dasturni hukumat amaldorlariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A period of supervised release as an alternative to imprisonment.
words.example1: He was sentenced to two years of probation instead of prison for the minor offense.
words.example1Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati natijalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our legal team successfully argued for probation rather than imprisonment given our client's clean prior record.
words.example2Situation: Siz huquqiy jamoangiz bilan suddan oldingi strategiya yig'ilishida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Well-resourced probation systems with low caseloads, evidence-based supervision practices, and strong community reintegration support can achieve better recidivism outcomes than incarceration while maintaining public safety at significantly lower cost.
words.example3Translation: Kam ish yuki, dalillarga asoslangan nazorat amaliyotlari va kuchli jamoatga qayta integratsiya qo'llab-quvvatlashi bilan yaxshi resursli probatsiya tizimlari sezilarli darajada past xarajatlar bilan jamoat xavfsizligini saqlagan holda qamoqqa qaraganda yaxshiroq qayta jinoyat qilish natijalariga erishishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz jinoyat adolati islohoti va alternativ jazolash choralari bo'yicha siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unplanned, uncontrolled expansion of urban areas into surrounding rural land.
words.example1: Urban sprawl is making it harder for people to commute to work without a car.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar atrofidagi yangi uy-joy hududlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our city council introduced new zoning policies to limit urban sprawl and protect agricultural land.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar rejalashtirish qo'mitasida yangi siyosat tashabbuslarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Urban sprawl generates enormous economic and environmental costs, including increased car dependency, infrastructure overextension, loss of agricultural land, and fragmentation of natural habitats that undermine regional ecological systems.
words.example3Translation: Shahar tarqalishi katta iqtisodiy va ekologik xarajatlarni keltirib chiqaradi, jumladan avtomobilga bog'liqlikning oshishi, infratuzilmaning haddan tashqari kengayishi, qishloq xo'jaligi erlarining yo'qolishi va mintaqaviy ekologik tizimlarni zaiflashtiruvchi tabiiy yashash muhitlarining parchalanishi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror shahar rivojlanishi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada shaharsozlik siyosati muammolarini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The basic physical systems of a city including transport, water, and power networks.
words.example1: Poor infrastructure makes it difficult for businesses to operate efficiently in the region.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi bozorga kirish imkoniyatlarini baholayotganda hamkasbingizga mintaqaning qiyinchiliklarini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our government announced a major infrastructure investment plan to modernize roads, bridges, and broadband networks.
words.example2Situation: Siz hukumat iqtisodiy rivojlanish rejasini jamoatchilikka e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: High-quality infrastructure is a fundamental prerequisite for economic competitiveness, as reliable transport, energy, and digital connectivity networks determine whether regions can attract investment and support productive business activity.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori sifatli infratuzilma iqtisodiy raqobatbardoshlikning asosiy sharti bo'lib, ishonchli transport, energiya va raqamli ulanish tarmoqlari mintaqalarning investitsiyalarni jalb qila olishini va samarali biznes faoliyatini qo'llab-quvvatlashini belgilaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro rivojlanish banki bilan mintaqaviy infratuzilma investitsiya dasturini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The process by which a poor urban area becomes more affluent, often displacing long-term residents.
words.example1: Gentrification has transformed the neighborhood but many original residents can no longer afford to live there.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar o'zgarishlari va ijtimoiy ta'sir haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our housing policy team is studying the effects of gentrification to develop strategies that protect vulnerable residents.
words.example2Situation: Siz uy-joy siyosati bo'yicha shahar hokimiyati yig'ilishida tadqiqot natijalarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Gentrification presents a complex policy dilemma, as neighborhood revitalization brings improved services and reduced crime but simultaneously erodes affordable housing stock and displaces established communities with deep social ties.
words.example3Translation: Gentifikatsiya murakkab siyosat dilemmmasini taqdim etadi, chunki mahalla tiklanishi yaxshilangan xizmatlar va kamaygan jinoyatchilikni olib keladi, lekin bir vaqtning o'zida arzon uy-joy fondini yo'q qiladi va chuqur ijtimoiy aloqalarga ega o'rnatilgan jamoalarni ko'chiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar rivojlanishi va ijtimoiy adolat bo'yicha siyosat konferensiyasida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A situation where too many people occupy an area, straining available resources.
words.example1: Overpopulation in some cities has led to severe housing shortages and traffic congestion.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar rejalashtirish muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research shows that overpopulation in coastal cities increases vulnerability to climate-related disasters.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar barqarorligi bo'yicha tadqiqot natijalarini hukumat amaldorlariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Overpopulation in urban centers strains sanitation, healthcare, education, and housing systems simultaneously, creating compounding pressures that undermine quality of life and require integrated planning responses.
words.example3Translation: Shahar markazlarida aholining haddan tashqari ko'pligi sanitariya, sog'liqni saqlash, ta'lim va uy-joy tizimlarini bir vaqtda qiynaydi va hayot sifatini pasaytiradigan qo'shiluvchi bosimlarni yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro shaharsozlik forumida rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlardagi shaharlar muammolarini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Shared transport services available to the general public, including buses, trains, and subways.
words.example1: Investing in public transportation reduces traffic congestion and air pollution in cities.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar mobilligi strategiyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our city expanded its public transportation network to connect suburban areas with the city center.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar rivojlanish rejasini jamoat tinglovida taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: High-quality public transportation is essential for equitable urban mobility, as car-dependent cities systematically disadvantage low-income residents, elderly people, and those with disabilities who cannot access private vehicles.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori sifatli jamoat transporti adolatli shahar harakatchanligida muhim ahamiyatga ega, chunki avtomobilga bog'liq shaharlar shaxsiy transport vositalariga kirish imkoni bo'lmagan kam daromadli aholi, keksalar va nogironlarni tizimli ravishda zaiflashtiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar transporti siyosatini shakllantirishda jamoat manfaatlarini himoya qilish bo'yicha shahar kengashida nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Designing cities to be environmentally friendly, livable, and economically viable.
words.example1: Sustainable urban planning includes building bike lanes and increasing green spaces.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi shahar rivojlanish loyihasini muhokama qilayotganda hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our firm specializes in sustainable urban planning solutions that reduce carbon emissions while improving quality of life.
words.example2Situation: Siz arxitektura va rejalashtirish kompaniyangizni potensial municipal mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sustainable urban planning requires integrating environmental, social, and economic considerations into every stage of city design, from land use decisions and transport networks to building standards and public space allocation.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror shahar rejalashtirish er foydalanish qarorlari va transport tarmoqlaridan tortib bino standartlari va jamoat maydoni taqsimotiga qadar shahar dizaynining har bir bosqichiga atrof-muhit, ijtimoiy va iqtisodiy mulohazalarni integratsiya qilishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror shahar rivojlanishi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada yashil shahar tamoyillarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The degree to which housing costs are within people's financial means.
words.example1: Housing affordability has become a serious problem in many major cities worldwide.
words.example1Situation: Siz uy-joy bozori tendensiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization advocates for housing affordability policies that protect renters and expand social housing supply.
words.example2Situation: Siz notijorat uy-joy tashkilotida donor va hukumat vakillariga siyosat tavsiyalarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Declining housing affordability concentrates poverty, increases commute times, reduces labor market mobility, and exacerbates social inequality, making it one of the most consequential urban policy challenges of the contemporary era.
words.example3Translation: Uy-joy qulayligining pasayishi qashshoqlikni to'playdi, ish joyiga borish vaqtini oshiradi, mehnat bozori harakatchanligini kamaytiradi va ijtimoiy tengsizlikni kuchaytiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar iqtisodiyoti va uy-joy siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro forumda taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A city with a population of over 10 million people.
words.example1: Tokyo is the world's largest megacity with over 37 million residents.
words.example1Situation: Siz global shaharlar va urbanizatsiya tendensiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Operating in a megacity presents unique logistical challenges around distribution and last-mile delivery.
words.example2Situation: Siz yirik shahar bozorlaridagi biznes operatsiyalarini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Megacities concentrate extraordinary economic productivity and cultural dynamism but simultaneously amplify urban challenges including inequality, pollution, housing pressure, and governance complexity that require innovative administrative responses.
words.example3Translation: Megapolislar g'ayrioddiy iqtisodiy unumdorlik va madaniy dinamizmni to'playdi, lekin bir vaqtning o'zida innovatsion ma'muriy javoblarni talab qiluvchi tengsizlik, ifloslanish, uy-joy bosimi va boshqaruv murakkabligi kabi shahar muammolarini kuchaytiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz megapolislarni boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro shaharsozlik konferensiyasida nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The movement of people from rural areas to cities in search of better opportunities.
words.example1: Rural-urban migration has dramatically increased the population of many developing cities.
words.example1Situation: Siz demografik o'zgarishlar va ularning iqtisodiyotga ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company's expansion into rural areas aims to create local employment and reduce rural-urban migration.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ijtimoiy mas'uliyat strategiyasini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Rural-urban migration is driven by a complex combination of push and pull factors, requiring coordinated rural development policies to create opportunities that reduce the necessity of migration for economic survival.
words.example3Translation: Qishloqdan shaharga ko'chish itaruvchi va tortuvchi omillarning murakkab kombinatsiyasi bilan boshqariladi va iqtisodiy omon qolish uchun ko'chishning zaruriyatini kamaytiradigan imkoniyatlar yaratish uchun muvofiqlashtirilgan qishloq rivojlanish siyosatlarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy urbanizatsiya strategiyasini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha hukumat vazirligida maslahatchi sifatida ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Densely populated urban areas with poor housing, inadequate services, and high poverty.
words.example1: Millions of people in developing cities live in slums without access to clean water.
words.example1Situation: Siz global qashshoqlik va shahar rivojlanishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our NGO works in urban slums to provide basic healthcare and education to underserved communities.
words.example2Situation: Siz notijorat tashkilotingizning dastur faoliyatini donor tashkilotga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Slum upgrading programs that combine infrastructure improvement with tenure security, community participation, and economic opportunity have demonstrated far greater success than forced eviction in improving living conditions sustainably.
words.example3Translation: Infratuzilmani yaxshilashni yer egasizlik xavfsizligi, jamoat ishtiroki va iqtisodiy imkoniyatlar bilan birlashtiruvchi qashshoq mahallalarni modernizatsiya qilish dasturlari hayot sharoitlarini barqaror yaxshilashda majburiy ko'chirishdan ancha katta muvaffaqiyat ko'rsatdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro rivojlanish agentligida shahar qashshoqligini kamaytirish dasturini baholayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The speed at which the proportion of a population living in urban areas grows.
words.example1: The urbanization rate in Africa is one of the fastest in the world.
words.example1Situation: Siz global demografik tendensiyalar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our market research shows that the high urbanization rate in this region creates significant demand for urban housing solutions.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi bozordagi investitsiya imkoniyatlarini potensial investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Rapid urbanization rates in low-income countries often outpace governments' capacity to provide adequate infrastructure and services, creating conditions where informal settlements proliferate and urban poverty deepens despite overall economic growth.
words.example3Translation: Past daromadli mamlakatlardagi tez urbanizatsiya sur'atlari ko'pincha hukumatlarning etarli infratuzilma va xizmatlar ko'rsatish imkoniyatidan oshib ketadi va norasmiy aholi punktlari ko'payib, shahar qashshoqligi chuqurlashadigan sharoitlarni yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlardagi urbanizatsiya tendensiyalari bo'yicha xalqaro shaharsozlik tadqiqotini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Parks, gardens, and natural areas within urban environments.
words.example1: Green spaces in cities improve mental health and provide relief from urban heat.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar muhitining sog'liqqa ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our development proposal includes 30 percent green spaces to meet city sustainability requirements.
words.example2Situation: Siz qurilish loyihasini shahar rejalashtirish qo'mitasida tasdiqlash uchun taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Green spaces provide multiple ecosystem services including air purification, urban heat island mitigation, stormwater management, and biodiversity support, making them essential urban infrastructure rather than optional amenities.
words.example3Translation: Yashil hududlar havo tozalash, shahar issiqlik oroli ta'sirini kamaytirish, yomg'ir suvlarini boshqarish va biologik xilma-xillikni qo'llab-quvvatlash kabi bir nechta ekotizim xizmatlarini taqdim etadi, ularni ixtiyoriy qulayliklar emas, balki zarur shahar infratuzilmasiga aylantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar muhiti va jamoat salomatligi bo'yicha shahar rejalashtirish sessiyasida yashil infratuzilma siyosatini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The regular journey between home and workplace.
words.example1: A long daily commute can significantly reduce quality of life and increase stress.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi ish joyini tanlashda joylashuv muhimligini hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company introduced remote work options to reduce employees' daily commute and improve wellbeing.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi tashabbuslarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The cumulative time and financial cost of long commutes represents a significant hidden tax on workers, with research linking extended commuting to reduced sleep, lower life satisfaction, and higher rates of stress-related illness.
words.example3Translation: Uzoq ish joyiga borish-kelishning to'plangan vaqt va moliyaviy xarajati ishchilarga katta yashirin soliqni ifodalaydi va tadqiqotlar uzoq yo'l yurishni kamaygan uyqu, past hayotdan qoniqish va stressga bog'liq kasalliklarning yuqori darajasi bilan bog'laydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyi harakatchanligi va xodimlar unumdorligi bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Regulations that determine how land in different areas of a city can be used.
words.example1: Zoning laws prevent factories from being built in residential neighborhoods.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi biznes uchun joy tanlash haqida hamkasbingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our legal team reviewed local zoning laws before submitting the planning application for our new office building.
words.example2Situation: Siz qurilish loyihasini boshlashdan oldin huquqiy muvofiqlik tekshiruvini rahbariyatga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Exclusionary zoning laws that restrict high-density housing development in desirable areas are increasingly recognized as a key driver of housing unaffordability, as they artificially constrain supply in locations with high demand.
words.example3Translation: Istiqbolli hududlarda yuqori zichlikdagi uy-joy qurilishini cheklaydigan istisno zonalashtirish qonunlari tobora uy-joy qulayligining pasayishining asosiy harakatlantiruvchisi sifatida tan olinmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz uy-joy siyosati islohoti bo'yicha shahar kengashida ekspert sifatida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A city that uses digital technology to improve efficiency, services, and quality of life.
words.example1: Smart city sensors help manage traffic flow and reduce congestion in real time.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar texnologiyalari va innovatsiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company provides smart city solutions including IoT-enabled waste management and energy monitoring systems.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnologiya kompaniyangizni municipal hukumat vakillariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Smart city technologies offer compelling efficiency gains but raise significant questions about data privacy, algorithmic governance, digital exclusion, and whether technology-driven solutions adequately address the social and political roots of urban challenges.
words.example3Translation: Aqlli shahar texnologiyalari jozibali samaradorlik foydasini taklif qiladi, lekin ma'lumotlar maxfiyligi, algoritmik boshqaruv, raqamli istisno va texnologiya asosidagi yechimlar shahar muammolarining ijtimoiy va siyosiy ildizlarini etarli darajada hal qilish-qilmasligi haqida muhim savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz aqlli shahar texnologiyalari va fuqarolik huquqlari bo'yicha xalqaro texnologiya va boshqaruv forumida nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Efforts to protect and maintain cultural traditions, sites, and practices for future generations.
words.example1: Cultural preservation helps communities maintain their identity and connection to the past.
words.example1Situation: Siz mahalliy madaniyat va an'analar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization works with local governments on cultural preservation projects across Central Asia.
words.example2Situation: Siz notijorat tashkilotingizning loyiha portfelini xalqaro donor tashkilotga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective cultural preservation requires balancing authenticity with living community needs, recognizing that cultures are not static artifacts but dynamic systems that must evolve to remain meaningful to the communities that carry them.
words.example3Translation: Samarali madaniy meros saqlanishi haqiqiylikni tirik jamoat ehtiyojlari bilan muvozanatlashtirshni talab qiladi va madaniyatlar statik artefaktlar emas, balki ularni tashuvchi jamoatlar uchun mazmunli bo'lib qolish uchun rivojlanishi kerak bo'lgan dinamik tizimlar ekanligini tan oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz UNESCO madaniy merosni muhofaza qilish dasturini baholash komissiyasida ekspert sifatida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Non-physical cultural traditions including language, music, dance, and rituals.
words.example1: Traditional folk music is an important form of intangible heritage that must be passed to younger generations.
words.example1Situation: Siz madaniy meros va an'analar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our cultural foundation documents intangible heritage by recording oral traditions and traditional crafts before they disappear.
words.example2Situation: Siz madaniy meros fondi dasturlarini moliyalashtiruvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Intangible heritage is particularly vulnerable to globalization pressures, as languages, oral traditions, and ritual practices disappear when communities assimilate into dominant cultures or when intergenerational transmission breaks down due to urbanization and economic change.
words.example3Translation: Nomoddiy meros ayniqsa globalizatsiya bosimlariga zaif bo'lib, jamoatlar hukmron madaniyatlarga assimilyatsiya qilganda yoki urbanizatsiya va iqtisodiy o'zgarishlar tufayli avlodlararo uzatish buzilganda tillar, og'zaki an'analar va ritual amaliyotlar yo'qoladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz UNESCO nomoddiy madaniy meros ro'yxatiga kiritish bo'yicha milliy nominatsiya jarayonida ekspert sifatida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Tourism focused on experiencing cultural and historical sites and traditions.
words.example1: Heritage tourism brings significant economic benefits to communities with historical sites.
words.example1Situation: Siz turizm iqtisodiyoti va mahalliy rivojlanish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our travel company specializes in heritage tourism packages that combine historical visits with authentic cultural experiences.
words.example2Situation: Siz sayohat agentligi mahsulotlarini potensial mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Heritage tourism creates valuable economic incentives for cultural preservation but requires careful management to ensure that commercial pressures do not compromise the authenticity and integrity of the sites and traditions that attract visitors.
words.example3Translation: Meros turizmi madaniy merosni saqlanishi uchun qimmatli iqtisodiy rag'batlantirishlarni yaratadi, lekin tijorat bosimlarining mehmonlarni jalb qiluvchi joylar va an'analarning haqiqiyligi va yaxlitligini buzmasligini ta'minlash uchun ehtiyotkor boshqaruvni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz madaniy meros menejmentini muhokama qilayotganda xalqaro turizm tashkilotida siyosat maslahatchi sifatida ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A person's sense of belonging to a particular culture or group.
words.example1: Language plays a central role in maintaining cultural identity across generations.
words.example1Situation: Siz til va madaniyat o'rtasidagi munosabat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company celebrates cultural identity by organizing annual heritage days where employees share their traditions.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xilma-xillik va inklyuzivlik dasturlarini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Cultural identity is neither fixed nor singular but a dynamic, multidimensional construction that evolves through lived experience, intergenerational transmission, and ongoing negotiation with dominant cultural forces and changing social environments.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy o'ziga xoslik na qat'iy, na yagona, balki tirik tajriba, avlodlararo uzatish va hukmron madaniy kuchlar va o'zgaruvchan ijtimoiy muhitlar bilan doimiy muzokaralar orqali rivojlanuvchi dinamik, ko'p o'lchamli konstruksiya hisoblanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz madaniy xilma-xillik va ijtimoiy integratsiya bo'yicha akademik konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The process of repairing and returning a historical site or object to its original state.
words.example1: The restoration of the ancient mosque took five years and involved expert craftsmen.
words.example1Situation: Siz madaniy meros loyihalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our firm won the contract for the restoration of the 19th-century government building in the city center.
words.example2Situation: Siz arxitektura firmangizning yangi loyiha g'alabasini jamoangizga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Heritage restoration demands rigorous documentation, materials authenticity, and reversibility principles that distinguish genuine conservation practice from reconstruction, as inappropriate interventions can permanently compromise a site's historical integrity.
words.example3Translation: Meros restavratsiyasi qayta qurish bilan haqiqiy muhofaza amaliyotini ajratib turadigan qat'iy hujjatlashtirish, materiallarning haqiqiyligi va qaytariluvchanlik tamoyillarini talab qiladi, chunki noto'g'ri aralashuvlar joyning tarixiy yaxlitligini abadiy buzishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz UNESCO meros joyini restavratsiya qilish loyihasini baholash jarayonida meʼmoriy meros mutaxassisi sifatida ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Repurposing historical buildings for new functions while preserving their heritage value.
words.example1: The old factory was transformed into apartments through adaptive reuse, preserving its industrial character.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar rivojlanishi va meros saqlanishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our architectural firm specializes in adaptive reuse projects that give historic buildings a second life.
words.example2Situation: Siz arxitektura kompaniyangizni potensial investorlar va municipal mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Adaptive reuse represents a sustainable development strategy that simultaneously preserves cultural heritage, reduces construction waste, revitalizes neighborhoods, and creates distinctive spaces that new construction rarely achieves.
words.example3Translation: Moslashtirilgan qayta foydalanish madaniy merosni saqlaydigan, qurilish chiqindisini kamaytiradigan, mahallalarni jonlantiradigan va yangi qurilish kamdan-kam erishadigan o'ziga xos makonlarni yaratadigan barqaror rivojlanish strategiyasini ifodalaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror arxitektura va meros muhofazasi bo'yicha xalqaro qurilish konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The tendency to judge other cultures by the standards and values of one's own culture.
words.example1: Ethnocentrism can lead to misunderstandings and conflicts between people from different backgrounds.
words.example1Situation: Siz madaniyatlararo muloqot va xalqaro hamkorlik haqida hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our cross-cultural training program helps employees recognize and overcome ethnocentrism when working with international partners.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni xalqaro loyihalar uchun tayyorlash dasturini HR jamoasi bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Ethnocentrism in development policy has historically led to the imposition of inappropriate Western models on diverse societies, undermining local knowledge systems and generating resistance that could have been avoided through genuine cultural humility and participatory approaches.
words.example3Translation: Rivojlanish siyosatidagi etnosentrizm tarixan turli jamiyatlarga noto'g'ri G'arb modellarini yuklashga olib kelgan, mahalliy bilim tizimlarini zaiflashtirib, haqiqiy madaniy kamtarlik va ishtirokchi yondashuvlar orqali oldini olish mumkin bo'lgan qarshilikni keltirib chiqargan.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro rivojlanish tashkilotida madaniy sezuvchanlik va inklyuziv dastur dizayni bo'yicha trening o'tkazayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Adopting elements of a culture without proper understanding, permission, or respect.
words.example1: Using sacred symbols from another culture as fashion accessories is widely considered cultural appropriation.
words.example1Situation: Siz brending va marketing etikasi haqida jamoangiz bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our marketing team received training on cultural appropriation to avoid insensitive campaigns in international markets.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning global marketing siyosatini xodimlariga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Cultural appropriation debates reveal important tensions between cultural openness and the power asymmetries that determine whether borrowing enriches or exploits, with context, consent, and compensation being key factors in ethical cross-cultural engagement.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy o'zlashtirib olish munozaralari madaniy ochiqlik va qarz olish boyitadimi yoki ekspluatatsiya qiladimi deb belgilaydigan kuch assimetriyalari o'rtasidagi muhim keskinliklarni ochib beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ madaniy sezuvchanlik va global brending etikasi bo'yicha sanoat seminarida nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Something handed down from the past, including traditions, buildings, and values.
words.example1: The ancient silk road left a lasting legacy of cultural exchange across Asia and Europe.
words.example1Situation: Siz tarix va uning zamonaviy ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our founder's legacy of ethical business practice continues to guide the company's values today.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning tarixi va qadriyatlarini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Understanding historical legacy is essential for addressing contemporary inequalities, as many present disparities in wealth, land ownership, and institutional access are direct products of colonial and exclusionary policies whose effects persist across generations.
words.example3Translation: Tarixiy merosni tushunish zamonaviy tengsizliklarni hal qilish uchun zarur, chunki boylik, yer egaligi va instituttsional kirish imkoniyatidagi ko'plab hozirgi farqlar avlodlar bo'ylab ta'siri davom etadigan mustamlaka va istisno siyosatlarning bevosita mahsulidir.
words.example3Situation: Siz tarixiy adolat va jamiyatni yarashtiruv bo'yicha siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Efforts to renew and strengthen a declining or endangered culture.
words.example1: Cultural revitalization programs have helped minority languages survive in several regions.
words.example1Situation: Siz til va madaniyat saqlanishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our foundation supports cultural revitalization by funding traditional arts education in indigenous communities.
words.example2Situation: Siz madaniy meros fondining grantlar dasturini moliyalashtiruvchi tashkilotlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Successful cultural revitalization requires community ownership and agency, as externally imposed preservation efforts frequently fail to generate genuine intergenerational engagement with the living traditions that communities themselves must choose to sustain.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli madaniy jonlanish jamoat egaligi va agentligini talab qiladi, chunki tashqaridan yuklangan muhofaza qilish harakatlari jamoatlarning o'zlari qo'llab-quvvatlashni tanlashi kerak bo'lgan tirik an'analar bilan haqiqiy avlodlararo ishtirokni ko'pincha ta'minlay olmaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mahalliy madaniy jonlanish dasturlari bo'yicha xalqaro madaniy meros konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An object made by humans, typically of historical or cultural interest.
words.example1: The museum displays artifacts from ancient civilizations that lived in this region.
words.example1Situation: Siz tarix va madaniy meros haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our archaeological team discovered several significant artifacts during the excavation of the medieval site.
words.example2Situation: Siz arxeologiya loyihasining natijalarini tadqiqot instituti rahbariyatiga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The legal and ethical debates surrounding the repatriation of cultural artifacts reflect broader tensions between Western museum traditions of universal heritage stewardship and source communities' claims to ownership of their own cultural patrimony.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy artefaktlarni qaytarish atrofidagi huquqiy va axloqiy munozaralar G'arb muzeylarining universal meros boshqaruv an'analari va manba jamoatlarining o'z madaniy boyliklariga egalik da'volari o'rtasidagi keng keskinliklarni aks ettiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro muzey etikasi va madaniy mulkni qaytarish bo'yicha konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The process by which a minority group gradually adopts the culture of the dominant group.
words.example1: Cultural assimilation can be both voluntary and forced depending on the social context.
words.example1Situation: Siz immigratsiya va madaniy integratsiya haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company supports cultural assimilation of new international employees while also celebrating their home cultures.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xilma-xillik va integratsiya siyosatini yangi xalqaro xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Forced cultural assimilation policies historically imposed on indigenous peoples represent a form of cultural violence that severed intergenerational connections, erased linguistic diversity, and caused lasting psychological harm that continues to affect communities today.
words.example3Translation: Mahalliy xalqlarga tarixan yuklangan majburiy madaniy assimilyatsiya siyosatlari avlodlararo aloqalarni uzib, lingvistik xilma-xillikni yo'q qilgan va bugun ham jamoatlarga ta'sir qiladigan uzoq muddatli psixologik zarar yetkazgan madaniy zo'ravonlik shaklini ifodalaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mahalliy huquqlar va madaniy o'z taqdirini o'zi belgilash bo'yicha xalqaro insonparvarlik huquqi forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Customs and practices passed down through generations within a family or community.
words.example1: Celebrating ancestral traditions helps families stay connected to their cultural roots.
words.example1Situation: Siz oilaviy an'analar va madaniy o'ziga xoslik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our cultural center offers workshops where community members can learn and practice ancestral traditions.
words.example2Situation: Siz madaniy markaz dasturlarini jamoat manfaatdor tomonlariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Ancestral traditions serve not merely as historical curiosities but as living repositories of ecological knowledge, social wisdom, and community identity that carry profound relevance for addressing contemporary challenges in sustainable living and social cohesion.
words.example3Translation: Ajdodiy an'analar nafaqat tarixiy qiziquvchanlik sifatida, balki barqaror yashash va ijtimoiy uyushqoqlikdagi zamonaviy muammolarni hal qilish uchun chuqur ahamiyatga ega ekologik bilim, ijtimoiy donolik va jamoat o'ziga xosligining tirik omborxonalari sifatida ham xizmat qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz nomoddiy madaniy meros va barqaror rivojlanish bo'yicha UNESCO dasturini baholash jarayonida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A landmark designated by UNESCO as having outstanding cultural, historical, or natural significance.
words.example1: Samarkand was designated a World Heritage Site for its exceptional Islamic architecture.
words.example1Situation: Siz O'zbekiston tarixi va madaniy boyliklari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our tour operator designs exclusive itineraries that include visits to UNESCO World Heritage Sites across the region.
words.example2Situation: Siz premium sayohat agentligi mahsulotlarini yuqori darajali mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: World Heritage Site designation brings international recognition and conservation resources but also generates tourism pressure that requires sophisticated management to prevent visitor impacts from undermining the outstanding universal value that justified designation.
words.example3Translation: Jahon merosi ob'ekti maqomi xalqaro tan olish va muhofaza qilish resurslarini keltiradi, lekin shu bilan birga maqomni asoslab bergan misli ko'rilmagan universal qiymatni yo'q qilishning oldini olish uchun murakkab boshqaruvni talab qiladigan turizm bosimini keltirib chiqaradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz UNESCO meros ob'ektini boshqarish rejasini tuzish bo'yicha milliy meros organi bilan ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The use of cultural exchange to foster mutual understanding and goodwill between nations.
words.example1: Cultural diplomacy through art exhibitions and music festivals helps build bridges between nations.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro munosabatlar va yumshoq kuch strategiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our government's cultural diplomacy program funds international residencies for artists and scholars.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashqi ishlar vazirligi madaniy dasturlarini xalqaro hamkorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Cultural diplomacy operates through the soft power of shared aesthetic experience and intellectual exchange, building foundations of mutual respect and understanding that can sustain diplomatic relationships during periods of political tension.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy diplomatiya umumiy estetik tajriba va intellektual almashinuvning yumshoq kuchi orqali ishlaydi va siyosiy keskinlik davrlarida diplomatik munosabatlarni qo'llab-quvvatlashi mumkin bo'lgan o'zaro hurmat va tushunishning poydevorlarini quradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz davlat madaniy diplomatiya strategiyasini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha tashqi ishlar vazirligi maslahatchisi sifatida ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Government spending on public services, infrastructure, and social programs.
words.example1: Public expenditure on education has increased significantly over the past decade.
words.example1Situation: Siz hukumat byudjeti va ijtimoiy siyosat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our analysis shows that public expenditure on preventive healthcare reduces long-term costs for the government.
words.example2Situation: Siz byudjet siyosati bo'yicha hukumat komissiyasida tadqiqot natijalarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The composition of public expenditure reflects political priorities and value choices that determine whether government investment generates broad social returns or concentrates benefits among already advantaged groups.
words.example3Translation: Davlat xarajatlarining tarkibi hukumat investitsiyasining keng ijtimoiy foyda keltirishi yoki allaqachon imtiyozli guruhlar o'rtasida foydalarni to'plashini belgilaydigan siyosiy ustuvorliklar va qiymat tanlovlarini aks ettiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro moliya institutida byudjet siyosati va ijtimoiy natijalar bo'yicha siyosat tahlilchi sifatida ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The use of government taxation and spending to influence economic activity.
words.example1: The government used fiscal policy to stimulate the economy during the recession.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqtisodiy inqiroz va hukumat javoblari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our economic team monitors fiscal policy changes closely as they directly affect business investment decisions.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning strategik rejalash sessiyasida iqtisodiy muhit tahlilini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective fiscal policy requires coordinating tax and spending instruments to stabilize economic cycles while maintaining debt sustainability, a challenge complicated by political pressures for short-term stimulus and resistance to necessary consolidation during economic recoveries.
words.example3Translation: Samarali fiskal siyosat iqtisodiy tsikllarni barqarorlashtirish va qarz barqarorligini saqlash uchun soliq va xarajatlar vositalarini muvofiqlashtirishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz Moliya vazirligi iqtisodiy siyosat departamentida byudjet taqchilligi strategiyasini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The situation when a government spends more than it collects in revenue.
words.example1: The budget deficit widened after the government increased spending during the pandemic.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqtisodiy yangiliklar va hukumat moliyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our financial advisors warned that the persistent budget deficit could undermine investor confidence in the long term.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy maslahatchi sifatida kompaniyangiz yoki hukumat mijoziga risklarni tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Budget deficits are not inherently harmful when they finance productive investment that generates future returns, but persistent structural deficits that fund consumption rather than investment create long-term debt burdens that constrain future policy choices.
words.example3Translation: Byudjet taqchilligi kelajakdagi daromadlarni yaratuvchi unumli investitsiyalarni moliyalashtirsa o'z-o'zidan zararli emas, lekin investitsiya o'rniga iste'molni moliyalashtiruvchi doimiy tarkibiy taqchilliklar kelajakdagi siyosat tanlovlarini cheklaydigan uzoq muddatli qarz yukini yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy byudjet barqarorligi bo'yicha xalqaro valyuta jamg'armasi bilan maslahatlashuvlarda ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The system by which governments levy compulsory charges on individuals and businesses.
words.example1: Taxation provides the revenue governments need to fund public services.
words.example1Situation: Siz hukumat moliyasi va jamoat xizmatlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company works with tax advisors to ensure full compliance with changing taxation requirements across all markets.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning moliyaviy muvofiqlik strategiyasini yuqori rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The design of taxation systems involves fundamental trade-offs between efficiency, equity, simplicity, and revenue adequacy, with different tax structures distributing burdens and incentives across economic actors in ways that shape investment, work, and consumption behavior.
words.example3Translation: Soliq tizimlarini loyihalash samaradorlik, adolat, soddalik va daromad yetarliligi o'rtasida asosiy murosalarni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz soliq tizimi islohotlari bo'yicha parlament iqtisodiy qo'mitasiga ekspert sifatida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Financial support given by the government to help an industry, group, or activity.
words.example1: Government subsidies for renewable energy have helped solar power become more affordable.
words.example1Situation: Siz energetika siyosati va yashil energiyaga o'tish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our agricultural business benefits from government subsidies that help maintain food production during difficult seasons.
words.example2Situation: Siz qishloq xo'jaligi biznesining moliyaviy barqarorligini investorlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Subsidies can correct market failures and support strategic industries but create dependency risks and fiscal burdens when poorly targeted, making rigorous cost-benefit analysis and sunset provisions essential to responsible subsidy policy design.
words.example3Translation: Subsidiyalar bozor muvaffaqiyatsizliklarini to'g'rilashi va strategik tarmoqlarni qo'llab-quvvatlashi mumkin, lekin noto'g'ri maqsadlanganda qaramlik xavflari va fiskal yuklar yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy sanoat siyosati va hukumat subsidiyalari dasturlarini isloh qilish bo'yicha iqtisodiy maslahatchi sifatida ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The total amount of money a government owes to creditors.
words.example1: High national debt can limit a government's ability to respond to future crises.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqtisodiy barqarorlik va hukumat moliyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our economic analysis suggests that the national debt level poses risks to the country's long-term credit rating.
words.example2Situation: Siz davlat moliyasi bo'yicha iqtisodiy maslahatchi sifatida hukumat mijoziga risk baholash taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: National debt sustainability depends not merely on its absolute level but on the relationship between interest rates and economic growth, the currency of denomination, and whether debt financed investment generates returns that exceed borrowing costs.
words.example3Translation: Milliy qarz barqarorligi nafaqat uning mutlaq darajasiga, balki foiz stavkalari va iqtisodiy o'sish o'rtasidagi munosabatga va qarz moliyalashtirilgan investitsiya qarz olish xarajatlaridan oshib ketadigan daromadlar yaratish-yaratmasligiga bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro valyuta jamg'armasida qarz barqarorligi tahlili bo'yicha iqtisodchi sifatida ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Government spending on foundational physical systems such as roads, bridges, and digital networks.
words.example1: Infrastructure investment in transport networks boosts regional economic productivity.
words.example1Situation: Siz hukumat iqtisodiy rivojlanish siyosati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company welcomes the government's new infrastructure investment plan as it will reduce our logistics costs significantly.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi hukumat siyosatining biznesingizga ta'sirini rahbariyatga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: High-quality infrastructure investment generates multiplier effects that exceed initial spending through enhanced productivity, reduced transaction costs, and improved connectivity that enables businesses and individuals to capture new economic opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori sifatli infratuzilmaga investitsiya yaxshilangan unumdorlik, kamaygan tranzaksiya xarajatlari va yaxshilangan ulanish orqali dastlabki xarajatlardan oshib ketadigan multiplikator ta'sirlarini keltirib chiqaradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro rivojlanish banki bilan mamlakat infratuzilma investitsiya strategiyasini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Government programs that support citizens' basic well-being including healthcare and unemployment benefits.
words.example1: Social welfare programs provide a safety net for people who lose their jobs unexpectedly.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy siyosat va hukumatning fuqarolarga mas'uliyati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our analysis shows that investing in social welfare programs reduces inequality and stimulates consumer spending.
words.example2Situation: Siz iqtisodiy siyosat bo'yicha hukumat maslahatchisi sifatida ijtimoiy xarajatlar ta'sirini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Robust social welfare systems reduce economic insecurity, enable greater risk-taking in labor markets, and contribute to social cohesion, but require sustainable financing mechanisms and careful design to minimize work disincentive effects.
words.example3Translation: Mustahkam ijtimoiy ta'minot tizimlari iqtisodiy xavfsizliksizlikni kamaytiradi, mehnat bozorlarida ko'proq riskga borishga imkon beradi va ijtimoiy uyushqoqlikka hissa qo'shadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy himoya tizimi islohotlari bo'yicha parlament tinglovida ekspert sifatida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Government action, usually involving spending or tax cuts, to boost economic activity.
words.example1: The government introduced an economic stimulus package to support businesses affected by the pandemic.
words.example1Situation: Siz inqiroz davrida hukumat iqtisodiy siyosati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company benefited from the economic stimulus measures, particularly the tax relief for small businesses.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yillik moliyaviy natijalarini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective economic stimulus requires targeting spending toward high-multiplier activities, ensuring adequate scale relative to the output gap, and coordinating timing to avoid either premature withdrawal or excessive inflationary pressure from prolonged stimulus.
words.example3Translation: Samarali iqtisodiy rag'batlantirish yuqori multiplikatorli faoliyatlarga qaratilgan xarajatlarni ta'minlashni va muddatidan oldin olib chiqishning oldini olish uchun vaqtni muvofiqlashtirishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz iqtisodiy inqirozga javob siyosatini muhokama qilayotganda Moliya vazirligi iqtisodiy maslahatchi sifatida ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The careful management of public finances to avoid excessive debt and ensure long-term sustainability.
words.example1: Fiscal responsibility means not spending beyond what the government can sustainably afford.
words.example1Situation: Siz hukumat byudjeti va davlat moliyasini boshqarish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our treasury department emphasizes fiscal responsibility by maintaining clear spending rules and regular financial audits.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning moliyaviy boshqaruv siyosatini yangi bo'lim rahbariga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Fiscal responsibility must be understood dynamically rather than as a fixed debt-to-GDP target, as appropriate fiscal positions depend on economic conditions, interest rates, investment opportunities, and intergenerational equity considerations that vary across time and circumstance.
words.example3Translation: Fiskal mas'uliyatni qat'iy qarz-YaIM nisbati maqsadi sifatida emas, balki dinamik ravishda tushunish kerak, chunki tegishli fiskal pozitsiyalar vaqt va sharoitga ko'ra farq qiladigan iqtisodiy sharoitlar va boshqa omillarga bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy byudjet qoidalari va fiskal tizimlar bo'yicha xalqaro fiskal siyosat forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Services provided by the government to all citizens such as healthcare, education, and policing.
words.example1: Access to quality public services is essential for a functioning and fair society.
words.example1Situation: Siz hukumat roli va ijtimoiy adolat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization advocates for well-funded public services as the foundation of social equality.
words.example2Situation: Siz notijorat tashkilotingizning siyosat pozitsiyasini davlat amaldorlariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: High-quality public services are not merely a cost but a productive investment that builds human capital, reduces inequality, supports economic participation, and creates the social infrastructure on which market economies ultimately depend.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori sifatli davlat xizmatlari nafaqat xarajat, balki inson kapitalini yarataydigan, tengsizlikni kamaytiruvchi va bozor iqtisodiyotlari oxir-oqibat tayanadigan ijtimoiy infratuzilmani yaratuvchi unumli investitsiyadir.
words.example3Situation: Siz davlat xizmatlarini moliyalashtirish va iqtisodiy o'sish bo'yicha xalqaro iqtisodiy siyosat forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Government expenditure on military forces and national security.
words.example1: Defense spending has increased in many countries amid growing geopolitical tensions.
words.example1Situation: Siz global xavfsizlik tendensiyalari va hukumat byudjet ustuvorliklari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company supplies components to defense spending contracts and has seen increased demand in recent years.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning biznes portfelini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Defense spending decisions involve complex trade-offs between security imperatives and opportunity costs, as resources allocated to military capability are unavailable for healthcare, education, and infrastructure that also contribute to national security through social stability.
words.example3Translation: Mudofaa xarajatlari bo'yicha qarorlar xavfsizlik talablari va muqobil xarajatlar o'rtasidagi murakkab murosalarni o'z ichiga oladi, chunki harbiy imkoniyatlarga ajratilgan resurslar sog'liqni saqlash va ta'lim uchun mavjud emas.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy xavfsizlik byudjeti ustuvorliklari bo'yicha parlament mudofaa va xavfsizlik qo'mitasida ekspert sifatida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Government budget cuts and tax increases introduced to reduce fiscal deficits.
words.example1: Austerity measures led to significant cuts in public sector jobs and social programs.
words.example1Situation: Siz hukumat byudjet qisqartirishlari va ularning ijtimoiy ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our business faced challenging conditions during the period of austerity measures as consumer spending fell sharply.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning moliyaviy qiyinchiliklar davrini investorlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The empirical record on austerity measures is deeply contested, with evidence suggesting that poorly timed fiscal consolidation can be self-defeating by suppressing growth, reducing tax revenues, and worsening debt ratios despite intended deficit reduction.
words.example3Translation: Qattiqqo'llik choralari bo'yicha empirik yozuv chuqur bahsli bo'lib, dalillar noto'g'ri vaqtda o'tkazilgan fiskal konsolidatsiyaning o'sishni bo'g'ish orqali o'z-o'zini yo'qotuvchi bo'lishi mumkinligini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qattiqqo'llik iqtisodiyoti va fiskal konsolidatsiya muqobillari bo'yicha xalqaro iqtisodiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Government income collected mainly through taxes and other sources.
words.example1: Government revenue fell sharply when unemployment rose during the economic crisis.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqtisodiy inqiroz va hukumat moliyaviy muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our tax advisory team helps governments design revenue systems that are fair, efficient, and growth-friendly.
words.example2Situation: Siz soliq maslahat kompaniyangizning xizmatlarini potensial hukumat mijozlariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sustainable government revenue requires a diversified tax base that is resilient to economic cycles, supported by effective tax administration that maximizes compliance, minimizes avoidance, and ensures large corporations and wealthy individuals pay their fair share.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror hukumat daromadi iqtisodiy tsikllarga chidamli diversifikatsiyalangan soliq bazasini talab qiladi va muvofiqlikni maksimallashtiruvchi, qochishni minimallashtirvchi samarali soliq ma'muriyati bilan qo'llab-quvvatlanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy soliq islohoti strategiyasini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha moliya vazirligi bilan ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Allocating government funds to the most important areas first.
words.example1: Priority spending on education and healthcare yields the greatest long-term social returns.
words.example1Situation: Siz hukumat byudjeti ustuvorliklari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our policy brief recommends priority spending on early childhood development as the highest-return public investment available.
words.example2Situation: Siz siyosat tadqiqot institutida hukumat amaldorlariga siyosat tavsiyalarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Determining priority spending requires evidence-based assessment of relative returns across competing uses, political consensus on social objectives, and institutional capacity to implement programs efficiently and equitably in practice.
words.example3Translation: Ustuvor xarajatlarni aniqlash raqobatchi foydalanishlardagi nisbiy daromadlarning dalillarga asoslangan baholashini, ijtimoiy maqsadlar bo'yicha siyosiy konsensusni va dasturlarni samarali amalga oshirish uchun institutsional imkoniyatni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy byudjet ishchi guruhida hukumat xarajatlar dasturlarini baholash metodologiyasi bo'yicha ekspert sifatida ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A diet containing a variety of nutrients in proper proportions for good health.
words.example1: A balanced diet with plenty of vegetables reduces the risk of chronic disease.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq va ovqatlanish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our school canteen was redesigned to offer students a balanced diet at affordable prices.
words.example2Situation: Siz maktab oziq-ovqat siyosatini ota-onalar va rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Maintaining a balanced diet requires navigating complex food environments designed to promote highly profitable processed products, highlighting that individual dietary choices are shaped as much by food system design as personal knowledge and motivation.
words.example3Translation: Muvozanatli ovqatlanishni saqlash murakkab oziq-ovqat muhitlarini boshqarishni talab qiladi va individual ovqatlanish tanlovlari shaxsiy bilim va motivatsiya kabi oziq-ovqat tizimi dizayni bilan shakllanishini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy oziq-ovqat va ovqatlanish siyosatini ishlab chiqish bo'yicha sog'liqni saqlash vazirligi bilan ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Foods that have been altered from their natural state, often with additives, preservatives, or sugar.
words.example1: Excessive consumption of processed foods is linked to obesity and heart disease.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq va ovqatlanish odatlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our supermarket chain is reducing shelf space for processed foods to encourage healthier purchasing choices.
words.example2Situation: Siz chakana savdo strategiyasining o'zgarishlarini investorlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Ultra-processed foods are disproportionately marketed to lower-income communities and children through sophisticated behavioral targeting, creating health inequalities that cannot be addressed through nutritional education alone without concurrent regulatory intervention.
words.example3Translation: Ultra-qayta ishlangan oziq-ovqat mahsulotlari murakkab xulqiy maqsadlash orqali past daromadli jamoatlar va bolalarga mutanosib ravishda marketing qilinadi va faqat oziqlanish ta'limi orqali hal qilib bo'lmaydigan sog'liq tengsizliklarini yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz oziq-ovqat marketing tartibga solish va jamoat salomatligi bo'yicha parlament tinglovida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Reliable access to sufficient, safe, and nutritious food for an active and healthy life.
words.example1: Climate change threatens food security by disrupting crop yields in vulnerable regions.
words.example1Situation: Siz global oziq-ovqat tizimi muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization works with governments to develop food security strategies for populations vulnerable to supply disruptions.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro oziq-ovqat va qishloq xo'jaligi tashkilotida loyiha natijalarini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Food security requires addressing availability, access, utilization, and stability simultaneously, recognizing that hunger is rarely caused by absolute food scarcity but rather by distributional failures, poverty, and political systems that leave some populations without reliable access.
words.example3Translation: Oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi mavjudlik, kirish imkoniyati, foydalanish va barqarorlikni bir vaqtda hal qilishni talab qiladi va ochlik kamdan-kam hollarda mutlaq oziq-ovqat tanqisligi bilan emas, balki taqsimlash muvaffaqiyatsizliklari va qashshoqlik bilan bog'liqligini tan oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz global oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi va iqlim moslashuvi bo'yicha xalqaro qishloq xo'jaligi rivojlanish fondi sammitida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Farming practices that meet current food needs without depleting resources for future generations.
words.example1: Sustainable agriculture techniques like crop rotation help maintain soil health.
words.example1Situation: Siz qishloq xo'jaligi va atrof-muhit haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our food company sources ingredients only from certified sustainable agriculture suppliers.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning barqaror ta'minot zanjiri siyosatini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
