words.example3: Transitioning global food systems to sustainable agriculture requires redesigning subsidy structures, reforming land tenure systems, investing in agroecological research, and supporting smallholder farmers who currently produce the majority of the world's food.
words.example3Translation: Global oziq-ovqat tizimlarini barqaror qishloq xo'jaligiga o'tkazish subsidiya tuzilmalarini qayta loyihalashni, yer egaligi tizimlarini isloh qilishni va kichik fermerlarni qo'llab-quvvatlashni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz BMTning oziq-ovqat va qishloq xo'jaligi tashkilotida global qishloq xo'jaligi tizimini isloh qilish bo'yicha siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Foods derived from organisms whose genetic material has been altered using biotechnology.
words.example1: Genetically modified foods have sparked debate about safety, labeling, and environmental impact.
words.example1Situation: Siz biotexnologiya va oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our food brand clearly labels all products to indicate whether they contain genetically modified foods.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning shaffoflik va iste'molchi ishonchi siyosatini marketing jamoasiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The debate over genetically modified foods reflects broader tensions between technological optimism about biotech's potential and legitimate concerns about corporate control of seed supplies, ecological risks, and inadequate regulatory frameworks.
words.example3Translation: Genetik jihatdan o'zgartirilgan oziq-ovqat bo'yicha munozara biotexnologiyaning imkoniyati haqidagi texnologik optimizm va urug' ta'minotini korporativ nazorat qilish va ekologik xavflar haqidagi asosli tashvishlar o'rtasidagi keng keskinliklarni aks ettiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qishloq xo'jaligi biotexnologiyasi tartibga solish va oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ekspertlar paneliida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Farming without synthetic pesticides, fertilizers, or genetically modified organisms.
words.example1: Organic farming protects soil health and reduces chemical runoff into waterways.
words.example1Situation: Siz barqaror qishloq xo'jaligi va atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company transitioned to organic farming practices to meet growing consumer demand and improve sustainability credentials.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning barqarorlik strategiyasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While organic farming demonstrates important ecological benefits, its higher production costs and lower yields raise genuine questions about scalability as a global food system solution without accompanying changes to consumption patterns and food waste reduction.
words.example3Translation: Organik dehqonchilik muhim ekologik foydalarga ega bo'lsa-da, uning yuqori ishlab chiqarish xarajatlari va past hosildorligi iste'mol namunalari o'zgarishisiz global oziq-ovqat tizimi yechimi sifatida kengayish imkoniyati haqida haqiqiy savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz global oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi va barqaror qishloq xo'jaligi tizimlari bo'yicha siyosat forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Poor nutrition resulting from insufficient food intake, excessive consumption, or nutritional imbalance.
words.example1: Malnutrition in early childhood can cause irreversible damage to cognitive development.
words.example1Situation: Siz global sog'liq va rivojlanish muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our NGO's nutrition program has reduced malnutrition rates among children under five in the target communities.
words.example2Situation: Siz notijorat tashkilotingizning dastur ta'sirini donor tashkilotlarga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Malnutrition in its multiple forms, including undernutrition, micronutrient deficiency, and obesity, represents a global triple burden that requires food systems approaches addressing both scarcity and abundance dimensions simultaneously.
words.example3Translation: Noto'g'ri ovqatlanish o'z ko'p shakllarida, jumladan kam ovqatlanish, mikroelementlar tanqisligi va semizlikni o'z ichiga olib, bir vaqtda kamchilik va mo'lchilik o'lchamlarini hal qiluvchi yondashuvlarni talab qiluvchi global uch tomonlama yukni ifodalaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro oziq-ovqat va qishloq xo'jaligi tashkilotida global ovqatlanish siyosati strategiyasini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The distance food travels from where it is produced to where it is consumed.
words.example1: Buying local produce reduces food miles and supports farmers in your region.
words.example1Situation: Siz barqaror iste'mol va mahalliy oziq-ovqat tizimlarini qo'llab-quvvatlash haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our restaurant chain has reduced food miles by sourcing 70 percent of ingredients from suppliers within 100 kilometers.
words.example2Situation: Siz restoran tarmog'ingizning barqarorlik tashabbuslarini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While reducing food miles intuitively appeals as an environmental strategy, lifecycle analyses reveal that transportation often accounts for a small fraction of food's carbon footprint compared to production methods, meaning locally grown intensive agriculture can exceed the footprint of efficient overseas production.
words.example3Translation: Oziq-ovqat masofasini kamaytirish intuitiv ravishda atrof-muhit strategiyasi sifatida jozibali bo'lsa-da, hayot tsikli tahlillari transportning ko'pincha oziq-ovqatning karbon izining kichik qismini tashkil etishini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz oziq-ovqat tizimining atrof-muhit ta'siri va iqlimga mos ovqatlanish bo'yicha sanoat forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Long-term patterns of food choice and eating behavior that influence health outcomes.
words.example1: Poor dietary habits developed in childhood often persist into adulthood.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq ta'limi va uzoq muddatli xulq-atvor o'zgarishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our wellness program helps employees improve their dietary habits through nutritional coaching and healthy meal options.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar farovonligi dasturini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Dietary habits are deeply embedded in cultural identity, social relationships, and economic constraints, meaning sustainable change requires environmental redesign and systemic interventions rather than relying solely on individual nutritional education and willpower.
words.example3Translation: Ovqatlanish odatlari madaniy o'ziga xoslik, ijtimoiy munosabatlar va iqtisodiy cheklovlarga chuqur singdirilgan bo'lib, barqaror o'zgarish faqat individual oziqlanish ta'limi va irodasiga tayanish o'rniga atrof-muhit qayta loyihalash va tizimli aralashuvlarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz aholi ovqatlanish xulq-atvori va oziq-ovqat muhitini o'zgartirish bo'yicha jamoat salomatligi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Food that is discarded or lost uneaten throughout the supply chain.
words.example1: Reducing food waste at home is one of the most impactful environmental actions individuals can take.
words.example1Situation: Siz atrof-muhit va barqaror yashash haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our food company has implemented supply chain optimization to cut food waste by 35 percent over two years.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning barqarorlik natijalari hisobotini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Food waste represents a catastrophic inefficiency in global food systems, consuming approximately one third of all food produced while generating 8 to 10 percent of global greenhouse gas emissions, making its reduction a critical climate and food security priority.
words.example3Translation: Oziq-ovqat isrofgarchiligi global oziq-ovqat tizimlarida halokatli samarasizlikni ifodalaydi, ishlab chiqarilgan barcha oziq-ovqatning taxminan uchdan birini iste'mol qilib, global issiqxona gazlari chiqindilarining 8 dan 10 foizini keltirib chiqaradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz global oziq-ovqat tizimi samaradorligi va iqlim harakati bo'yicha xalqaro sammitda taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The content of essential nutrients in a food item and its contribution to health.
words.example1: Cooking methods can significantly affect the nutritional value of vegetables.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'lom pishirish usullari haqida hamkasbingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our food manufacturer displays clear nutritional value information on all products to help consumers make informed choices.
words.example2Situation: Siz oziq-ovqat brendingizning shaffoflik va iste'molchi ishonchi siyosatini marketing jamoasiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Nutritional value assessments are complicated by food matrix effects, individual biological variation, and the gap between controlled laboratory measurements and actual nutrient absorption in real dietary contexts, challenging simple rankings of foods as universally healthy or unhealthy.
words.example3Translation: Ozuqaviy qiymatni baholash oziq-ovqat matritsa ta'sirlari va nazorat qilinadigan laboratoriya o'lchovlari va haqiqiy ovqatlanish kontekstlarida haqiqiy ozuqa so'rilishi o'rtasidagi bo'shliq bilan murakkablashgan.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy ovqatlanish bo'yicha ko'rsatmalarni yangilash bo'yicha sog'liqni saqlash vazirligi ilmiy qo'mitasida ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A movement promoting the preference for eating food grown or produced locally.
words.example1: The locavore movement encourages people to shop at farmers' markets and buy seasonal produce.
words.example1Situation: Siz barqaror ovqatlanish va mahalliy iqtisodiyotni qo'llab-quvvatlash haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our restaurant has embraced the locavore movement by sourcing all ingredients from farms within 50 kilometers.
words.example2Situation: Siz restoran konseptsiyangizni potensial mijozlar va media vakillariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The locavore movement captures genuine values around community resilience and agricultural sustainability but requires nuanced application, as local food systems can have higher environmental footprints than optimized global supply chains depending on production methods and geography.
words.example3Translation: Mahalliy oziq-ovqat harakati jamoat barqarorligi va qishloq xo'jaligi barqarorligi atrofida haqiqiy qadriyatlarni aks ettiradi, lekin nozik qo'llashni talab qiladi, chunki mahalliy tizimlar ishlab chiqarish usullariga qarab yuqori atrof-muhit iziga ega bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz oziq-ovqat tizimi barqarorligi va mahalliy iqtisodiy rivojlanish bo'yicha qishloq xo'jaligi va ovqatlanish siyosati forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Information provided on food packaging about nutritional content, ingredients, and origin.
words.example1: Clear food labeling helps consumers make healthier and more informed purchasing decisions.
words.example1Situation: Siz iste'molchi huquqlari va oziq-ovqat shaffofligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company redesigned its food labeling to use front-of-pack traffic light indicators for key nutrients.
words.example2Situation: Siz oziq-ovqat brendingizning yangi qadoqlash dizayni strategiyasini marketing jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Mandatory food labeling regulations face persistent industry resistance but evidence consistently shows that clear, standardized front-of-pack information improves consumer decision-making, particularly for lower-literacy populations who struggle with complex nutritional tables.
words.example3Translation: Majburiy oziq-ovqat yorlig'i qoidalari sanoatning doimiy qarshiligiga duch keladi, lekin dalillar izchil ravishda aniq, standartlashtirilgan qadoq old qismidagi ma'lumotning iste'molchi qarorlarini yaxshilashini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz oziq-ovqat yorlig'i tartibga solish islohoti bo'yicha parlament komissiyasida jamoat salomatligi advokati sifatida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A diet consisting mostly or entirely of foods derived from plants.
words.example1: Switching to a plant-based diet can significantly reduce your environmental footprint.
words.example1Situation: Siz barqaror yashash va atrof-muhit haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our food company launched a new plant-based diet product line to meet rising consumer demand.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi mahsulot liniyasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Widespread adoption of plant-based diets could significantly reduce agricultural greenhouse gas emissions, land use, and water consumption, but requires food system redesign, cultural shift, and ensuring nutritional adequacy for populations transitioning from animal-based food traditions.
words.example3Translation: O'simlikka asoslangan ovqatlanishning keng qo'llanishi qishloq xo'jaligi issiqxona gazi chiqindilarini sezilarli darajada kamaytirishi mumkin, lekin oziq-ovqat tizimini qayta loyihalashni va madaniy o'zgarishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz global ovqatlanish o'tishi va iqlim harakati bo'yicha xalqaro oziq-ovqat va barqarorlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Illness caused by consuming food contaminated with bacteria, viruses, or toxins.
words.example1: Proper food storage and cooking temperatures prevent most foodborne illness.
words.example1Situation: Siz oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi va gigiena haqida hamkasbingizga amaliy maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our food company conducts rigorous safety testing at every stage of production to prevent foodborne illness incidents.
words.example2Situation: Siz oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi tizimingizni sertifikatlash auditorlariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Foodborne illness causes enormous global health and economic burdens, disproportionately affecting low-income populations with limited access to refrigeration and safe water, highlighting that food safety is fundamentally a public health equity challenge requiring systemic infrastructure solutions.
words.example3Translation: Oziq-ovqat orqali yuqadigan kasallik katta global sog'liq va iqtisodiy yuklar yaratadi, sovutish va xavfsiz suvga kirish imkoni cheklangan past daromadli aholini mutanosib ravishda ta'sir qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlarda oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi infratuzilmasi bo'yicha xalqaro sog'liqni saqlash konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A family unit consisting of two parents and their children living together.
words.example1: The nuclear family became the dominant household model in many countries after industrialization.
words.example1Situation: Siz oila tuzilmalari va ijtimoiy o'zgarishlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company's family benefits package was designed with the nuclear family in mind but now includes diverse family structures.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar imtiyozlari siyosatini yangilash bo'yicha HR jamoasi bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The idealization of the nuclear family as the universal and optimal household structure has been challenged by demographic evidence showing the diversity of family forms that successfully nurture children and provide mutual support across cultures and economic conditions.
words.example3Translation: Yadro oilasini universal va optimal uy xo'jaligi tuzilmasi sifatida ideallashtirish turli madaniyatlar va iqtisodiy sharoitlarda bolalarni muvaffaqiyatli tarbiyalaydigan oila shakllarining xilma-xilligini ko'rsatuvchi demografik dalillar bilan shubha ostiga qo'yildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz oila siyosati va ijtimoiy farovonlik tizimlari bo'yicha siyosat tadqiqot institutida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The approaches and strategies parents use to raise their children.
words.example1: Research shows that authoritative parenting styles tend to produce the best child outcomes.
words.example1Situation: Siz bolalarni tarbiyalash va rivojlanish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our parenting support program helps caregivers understand different parenting styles and choose approaches suited to their children.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoat oilasi qo'llab-quvvatlash dasturini moliyalashtiruvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Parenting styles interact with child temperament, cultural context, and socioeconomic circumstances in ways that complicate universal prescriptions, as styles effective in one context may be less adaptive in different social, economic, or cultural environments.
words.example3Translation: Ota-ona tarbiya uslublari bola temperamenti, madaniy kontekst va ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy sharoitlar bilan universal retseptlarni murakkablashtiruvchi usullarda o'zaro ta'sir qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz bolalar rivojlanishi va ota-ona qo'llab-quvvatlash siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro psixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The process of raising and caring for children from infancy through adolescence.
words.example1: Child-rearing practices differ significantly between cultures and generations.
words.example1Situation: Siz oilaviy qadriyatlar va tarbiya an'analari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization provides practical child-rearing support to first-time parents through home visits and community groups.
words.example2Situation: Siz notijorat oila qo'llab-quvvatlash tashkilotingizning dasturlari haqida donor tashkilotga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Child-rearing has been progressively recognized as skilled, demanding work that produces vital social goods, yet remains systematically undervalued in economic measurement systems and inadequately supported by public policy in most countries.
words.example3Translation: Bolani tarbiyalash muhim ijtimoiy ne'matlarni yarataydigan malakali, talab qiluvchi ish sifatida asta-sekin tan olinmoqda, lekin iqtisodiy o'lchov tizimlarida tizimli ravishda kam baholanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz oilaviy iqtisodiyot va parvarishlash ishi bo'yicha xalqaro mehnat tashkilotida siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The patterns of interaction, communication, and relationships within a family.
words.example1: Healthy family dynamics include open communication and mutual respect between all members.
words.example1Situation: Siz oilaviy munosabatlar va sog'lom aloqa haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our counseling service helps families improve their dynamics by developing better communication strategies.
words.example2Situation: Siz oilaviy maslahat xizmatlaringizni potensial mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Family dynamics are shaped by historical trauma, economic stress, cultural expectations, and individual personalities in ways that create both remarkable resilience and vulnerability, making family-level interventions one of the most powerful leverage points for improving long-term individual outcomes.
words.example3Translation: Oilaviy dinamika tarixiy travma, iqtisodiy stress, madaniy kutishlar va individual shaxsiyatlar bilan ajoyib barqarorlik va zaifliklarni yaratuvchi usullarda shakllanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz oila terapiyasi va ijtimoiy ishlash bo'yicha klinik psixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A household where both partners work and contribute financially.
words.example1: Dual-income households have become more common as the cost of living has risen.
words.example1Situation: Siz zamonaviy oila tuzilmalari va iqtisodiy bosimlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company's flexible working policy was designed to support dual-income households managing childcare alongside professional commitments.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning moslashuvchan ish siyosatini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The normalization of dual-income households has transformed gender roles and labor market participation but created new pressures around childcare, domestic labor distribution, and work-life integration that existing social infrastructure has been slow to adapt to.
words.example3Translation: Ikki daromadli oilalarning normallashishi gender rollarini va mehnat bozorida ishtirokni o'zgartirdi, lekin mavjud ijtimoiy infratuzilma moslashishga sekin bo'lgan bolalar parvarishi va uy xo'jaligi mehnatini taqsimlash atrofida yangi bosimlar yaratdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz oila siyosati va mehnat bozori islohotlari bo'yicha hukumat iqtisodiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Differences in attitudes, values, and behaviors between younger and older generations.
words.example1: The generation gap in technology use creates communication challenges within families.
words.example1Situation: Siz oilaviy munosabatlar va avlodlar o'rtasidagi tushunmovchiliklar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company addresses the generation gap by creating reverse mentoring programs where younger employees share digital skills with senior colleagues.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning iste'dod boshqaruvi va bilim almashish tashabbuslarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The generation gap reflects genuinely different formative experiences rather than simply age-related conservatism, as each cohort's values are shaped by the specific historical, economic, and technological conditions of their developmental years.
words.example3Translation: Avlodlar orasidagi farq shunchaki yosh bilan bog'liq konservatizmni emas, balki haqiqatan ham farqli shakllanuvchi tajribalarni aks ettiradi, chunki har bir avlodning qadriyatlari uning rivojlanish yillarining o'ziga xos sharoitlari bilan shakllanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz avlodlararo muloqot va ko'p avlodli ish joyini boshqarish bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A parenting style combining high responsiveness with clear expectations and consistent boundaries.
words.example1: Authoritative parenting balances warmth with firm boundaries, helping children develop self-discipline.
words.example1Situation: Siz bolalarni tarbiyalash usullari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our parenting program teaches authoritative parenting techniques that improve children's emotional regulation and academic performance.
words.example2Situation: Siz erta bolalik ta'limi va oila qo'llab-quvvatlash dasturini moliyalashtiruvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Research consistently identifies authoritative parenting as associated with better child outcomes across academic, social, and psychological domains, though effectiveness varies with cultural context and the specific challenges and resources available to individual families.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqotlar izchil ravishda vakolatli ota-onalikni akademik, ijtimoiy va psixologik sohalarda yaxshiroq bola natijalari bilan bog'liq deb aniqlaydi, garchi samaradorlik madaniy kontekst va mavjud resurslar bilan farq qilsa ham.
words.example3Situation: Siz bolalar rivojlanishi va oilaviy qo'llab-quvvatlash siyosati bo'yicha milliy erta bolalik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Family beyond the immediate household, including grandparents, aunts, uncles, and cousins.
words.example1: An extended family network provides emotional support and practical help in difficult times.
words.example1Situation: Siz oilaviy qo'llab-quvvatlash tizimlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company's relocation support package helps employees maintain connections with their extended family when moving internationally.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro xodimlar uchun ko'chib o'tish imtiyozlari paketini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Extended family networks serve as informal social protection systems in societies with limited state welfare, providing childcare, eldercare, financial support, and psychological resources that enable families to navigate economic shocks and life transitions.
words.example3Translation: Kengaytirilgan oila tarmoqlari cheklangan davlat ijtimoiy himoyasi bo'lgan jamiyatlarda norasmiy ijtimoiy himoya tizimlari sifatida xizmat qiladi, bolalar parvarishi, keksalar parvarishi va moliyaviy qo'llab-quvvatlashni taqdim etadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy kapital va oilaviy qo'llab-quvvatlash tarmoqlari bo'yicha ijtimoiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The equilibrium between professional work responsibilities and personal or family life.
words.example1: Parents often struggle with work-life balance when childcare demands conflict with job requirements.
words.example1Situation: Siz oilaviy mas'uliyatlar va kasbiy majburiyatlar o'rtasidagi muvozanat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company introduced family leave policies and flexible hours to help employees achieve better work-life balance.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yangi oilaviy qo'llab-quvvatlash siyosatlarini xodimlarga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Work-life balance is shaped by workplace culture, institutional support structures, and gender norms that determine who bears primary responsibility for domestic labor, making structural policy changes more effective than individual time management advice in achieving genuine balance.
words.example3Translation: Ish va hayot muvozanati ish joyi madaniyati, institutsional qo'llab-quvvatlash tuzilmalari va uy xo'jaligi mehnatiga birlamchi mas'uliyatni kim ko'tarishini belgilaydigan gender normalari bilan shakllanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz gender adolati va oilaviy qo'llab-quvvatlash siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro mehnat tashkiloti konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A supportive and caring setting that promotes healthy growth and development.
words.example1: A nurturing environment at home helps children develop confidence and emotional security.
words.example1Situation: Siz bolalarni tarbiyalash va erta rivojlanish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our school strives to create a nurturing environment where every student feels valued and supported.
words.example2Situation: Siz maktab madaniyati va talaba farovonligi siyosatini ota-onalar bilan uchrashuvda tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Creating a nurturing environment for children requires responsive caregiving, physical safety, cognitive stimulation, and emotional attunement, with early childhood experiences establishing neural foundations that influence psychological resilience and social functioning across the life course.
words.example3Translation: Bolalar uchun tarbiyalovchi muhit yaratish javob beruvchi parvarishlash, jismoniy xavfsizlik va kognitiv rag'batlantirishni talab qiladi, erta bolalik tajribalari esa hayot davomida psixologik barqarorlikka ta'sir qiladigan neyron poydevorlarni o'rnatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz erta bolalik rivojlanishi va miya asosidagi parvarishlash yondashuvlari bo'yicha pediatriya sog'liqni saqlash konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A family consisting of one parent raising children without a partner.
words.example1: Single-parent families often face greater financial pressures than two-parent households.
words.example1Situation: Siz oila tuzilmalari va ijtimoiy qo'llab-quvvatlash tizimlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company offers enhanced childcare support for single-parent families among our workforce.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar farovonligi va xilma-xil oilaviy tuzilmalarni qo'llab-quvvatlash siyosatini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Single-parent families face structural disadvantages rooted in gendered labor market inequalities, inadequate childcare provision, and social policy frameworks designed around two-parent households, requiring targeted support rather than stigmatizing framings of family diversity.
words.example3Translation: Yagona ota-ona oilalari gender mehnat bozori tengsizliklariga va ikki ota-ona uy xo'jaliklari atrofida tuzilgan ijtimoiy siyosat tizimlariga asoslangan tarkibiy kamchiliklarga duch keladi va maqsadli qo'llab-quvvatlashni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz oila siyosati va ijtimoiy adolat bo'yicha hukumat siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The degree to which parents participate in their child's education and daily life.
words.example1: High parental involvement in education is consistently linked to better academic outcomes.
words.example1Situation: Siz bolalarni maktab ta'limi va rivojlanishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our school designed a parental involvement program to help families support learning at home.
words.example2Situation: Siz maktab va oila hamkorlik dasturini ota-onalar bilan uchrashuvda taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Parental involvement benefits from institutional support and flexible working conditions, as socioeconomic constraints and work demands make meaningful engagement significantly harder for low-income families, creating gaps that schools must work actively to bridge rather than attribute to indifference.
words.example3Translation: Ota-onaning ishtiroki institutsional qo'llab-quvvatlash va moslashuvchan ish sharoitidan foyda oladi, chunki ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy cheklovlar kam daromadli oilalar uchun mazmunli ishtirokni sezilarli darajada qiyinlashtiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz oila-maktab hamkorligi va o'quvchilarning o'quv natijalarini oshirish bo'yicha ta'lim siyosati forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The moral principles and beliefs traditionally upheld and transmitted within families.
words.example1: Family values such as honesty, respect, and compassion shape how children treat others.
words.example1Situation: Siz tarbiya va axloqiy rivojlanish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company was founded on strong family values of integrity and community responsibility that continue to guide our culture.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning korporativ madaniyati va tarixi haqida yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Family values are deeply contested in pluralistic societies, as different communities hold legitimately different views on gender roles, religious observance, and intergenerational obligation, making respect for this diversity essential in social policy and public discourse.
words.example3Translation: Oilaviy qadriyatlar ko'pchilikchi jamiyatlarda chuqur bahsli, chunki turli jamoatlar gender rollar va diniy amaliyot bo'yicha qonuniy ravishda turlicha qarashlarga ega va bu xilma-xillikka hurmat ijtimoiy siyosatda zarur.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy pluralizm va oila siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro qiyosiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The physical, emotional, cognitive, and social changes occurring during teenage years.
words.example1: Understanding adolescent development helps parents respond more effectively to teenage behavior.
words.example1Situation: Siz ota-onalar uchun o'smirlik tarbiyasi bo'yicha seminar o'tkazayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our school curriculum incorporates adolescent development research to better support students during this critical period.
words.example2Situation: Siz maktab o'quv dasturini yangilash bo'yicha ta'lim qo'mitasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Adolescent development involves fundamental neurobiological changes in the prefrontal cortex and reward systems that increase risk-taking and peer sensitivity, making this period both a window of vulnerability and an opportunity for positive intervention that shapes lifelong trajectories.
words.example3Translation: O'smirlik rivojlanishi prefrontal korteks va mukofot tizimlarida riskka borishni va tengdoshlar sezuvchanligini oshiradigan fundamental neyrobiyologik o'zgarishlarni o'z ichiga oladi va bu davrni ham zaiflik oynasi, ham ijobiy aralashuv imkoniyatiga aylantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'smirlik salomatligi va rivojlanishi bo'yicha pediatriya va psixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Feelings of sadness, loneliness, or loss experienced by parents when children leave home.
words.example1: Many parents experience empty nest syndrome when their last child leaves for university.
words.example1Situation: Siz hayot bosqichlari va ota-ona psixologiyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our employee assistance program includes counseling support for parents experiencing empty nest syndrome.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar qo'llab-quvvatlash xizmatlarini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Empty nest syndrome reflects the profound identity reorganization required when parenting ceases to be the central organizer of daily life, with outcomes depending significantly on the quality of the marital relationship, individual identity beyond parenthood, and social support networks.
words.example3Translation: Bo'sh uy sindromi ota-onalik kundalik hayotning markaziy tashkilotchisi bo'lishdan to'xtaganda talab qilinadigan chuqur shaxsiyat qayta tashkillanishini aks ettiradi va natijalar turmush munosabatlari sifati va ijtimoiy qo'llab-quvvatlash tarmoqlariga sezilarli darajada bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'rta yoshli psixologik farovonlik va hayot o'tishlari bo'yicha klinik psixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ability to perceive, respond to, and find meaning in beauty in art, nature, and human expression.
words.example1: Developing aesthetic appreciation for music enriches everyday life and emotional experience.
words.example1Situation: Siz san'at va madaniyatning ahamiyati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our museum designs interactive exhibitions to help visitors develop aesthetic appreciation across different artistic traditions.
words.example2Situation: Siz muzey dasturlari va ta'lim tashabbuslarini homiylar va jamoat manfaatdor tomonlariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Aesthetic appreciation is cultivated through exposure, education, and reflective practice, developing capacities for attention, emotional responsiveness, and interpretive judgment that enrich engagement not only with art but with the broader texture of human experience.
words.example3Translation: Estetik qadrlash ta'sir, ta'lim va fikrli amaliyot orqali rivojlantiriladi va nafaqat san'at, balki inson tajribasining kengroq to'qimasi bilan ishtirokni boyitadigan diqqat va hissiy javob berish qobiliyatlarini rivojlantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz san'at ta'limi va madaniy rivojlanish bo'yicha xalqaro ta'lim konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The use of creative arts processes to improve mental, emotional, and psychological well-being.
words.example1: Art therapy helps trauma survivors express emotions that are difficult to put into words.
words.example1Situation: Siz ruhiy sog'liq va alternativ terapiya usullari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our hospital introduced art therapy programs to support patients' mental health during long-term treatment.
words.example2Situation: Siz shifoxonaning bemorlar farovonligi tashabbuslarini homiylar va rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Art therapy provides a non-verbal pathway to emotional processing and self-expression that reaches individuals who struggle with traditional talk therapies, making it particularly valuable for trauma survivors, children, and those with communication difficulties.
words.example3Translation: San'at terapiyasi an'anaviy suhbat terapiyalari bilan qiynaluvchi shaxslarga yetib boruvchi hissiy qayta ishlash va o'z-o'zini ifodalashning og'zaki bo'lmagan yo'lini taqdim etadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz integratsiyalashgan sog'liqni saqlash va ijodiy terapiyalar bo'yicha klinik konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An artist's commitment to their own creative vision, free from commercial or external pressures.
words.example1: The musician refused to change her lyrics, citing artistic integrity as her reason.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijodiy sanoat va tijorat bosimi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our record label prides itself on respecting artists' artistic integrity rather than dictating commercial formulas.
words.example2Situation: Siz musiqa kompaniyangizni iste'dod agentlariga va potensial rassomlar vakillariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Artistic integrity exists in productive tension with commercial viability, as artists must navigate the competing demands of authentic self-expression, audience expectations, and financial sustainability in ways that require sophisticated negotiation of creative and economic priorities.
words.example3Translation: Badiiy yaxlitlik tijorat qobiliyati bilan samarali keskinlikda mavjud bo'lib, rassomllar haqiqiy o'z-o'zini ifodalash, auditoriya kutilishlari va moliyaviy barqarorlikning raqobatdosh talablarini hal qilishlari kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijodiy sanoat iqtisodiyoti va rassomllar huquqlari bo'yicha madaniy siyosat forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Financial support from governments for artistic projects, institutions, and cultural programs.
words.example1: Public funding for the arts enables experimental work that would not survive on commercial revenue alone.
words.example1Situation: Siz madaniyat siyosati va hukumatning san'atga investitsiyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our theater company depends on public funding for the arts to keep ticket prices affordable for all communities.
words.example2Situation: Siz teatr tashkilotining moliyaviy modeli va ijtimoiy missiyasini potensial homiylar va hukumat vakillariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Public funding for the arts generates significant economic and social returns through tourism, creative industry spillovers, and community cohesion that exceed direct expenditure, making cultural investment a productive use of public resources rather than an optional luxury.
words.example3Translation: San'atni davlat moliyalashtirishi turizm va jamoat uyushqoqligi orqali sezilarli iqtisodiy va ijtimoiy daromadlarni keltirib chiqaradi va madaniy investitsiyani ixtiyoriy hashamat emas, balki samarali foydalanish qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy madaniyat moliyalashtirish siyosati bo'yicha parlament madaniyat qo'mitasida ekspert sifatida guvohlik berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ability to read, write, and understand musical notation and structure.
words.example1: Musical literacy allows musicians to communicate and collaborate across language barriers.
words.example1Situation: Siz musiqa ta'limi va universal muloqot haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our music school program develops musical literacy alongside practical performance skills from an early age.
words.example2Situation: Siz musiqa maktabi o'quv dasturini ota-onalar va potensial o'quvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Musical literacy enhances cognitive development, pattern recognition, and mathematical thinking, with research demonstrating that systematic music education correlates with improved academic performance across multiple disciplines beyond music itself.
words.example3Translation: Musiqa savodxonligi kognitiv rivojlanishni va matematik fikrlashni kuchaytiradi, tadqiqotlar esa tizimli musiqa ta'limining musiqadan tashqari bir nechta fanlarda yaxshilangan akademik ko'rsatkichlar bilan korrelyatsiyalanishini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz musiqa ta'limi va kognitiv rivojlanish bo'yicha xalqaro ta'lim tadqiqot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Non-physical cultural expressions including music, dance, oral traditions, and rituals recognized as heritage.
words.example1: Traditional music forms part of a nation's intangible cultural heritage and deserves protection.
words.example1Situation: Siz madaniy meros saqlanishi va an'anaviy san'at shakllari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our cultural foundation works to document and promote intangible cultural heritage through festivals and digital archives.
words.example2Situation: Siz madaniy meros saqlanishi fondining dasturlari va tashabbuslarini homiylar va hukumat vakillariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: UNESCO's intangible cultural heritage framework recognizes that living traditions require community transmission and adaptation to survive, distinguishing effective protection from museumification that freezes cultural practices in ways that disconnect them from the communities that give them meaning.
words.example3Translation: UNESCO'ning nomoddiy madaniy meros tizimi tirik an'analar omon qolish uchun jamoat uzatishi va moslashishni talab qilishini tan oladi va samarali muhofazani madaniy amaliyotlarni muzlatadigan muzeylashtirish bilan farqlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz UNESCO nomoddiy madaniy meros ro'yxatini amalga oshirish bo'yicha milliy meros organi bilan ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Economic sectors that generate value through creativity, talent, and intellectual property.
words.example1: The creative industry including film, music, and design employs millions worldwide.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqtisodiyot va madaniyat o'rtasidagi munosabat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our city's economic development strategy prioritizes growing the creative industry to attract talent and investment.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar iqtisodiy rivojlanish rejasini investor va manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The creative industry generates significant economic value through exports, employment, and spillover effects on tourism and urban regeneration, while contributing to soft power and national brand identity in ways that justify strategic public investment.
words.example3Translation: Ijodiy sanoat eksport, ish bilan ta'minlash va turizm va shahar qayta tiklanishiga tarqalish ta'sirlari orqali sezilarli iqtisodiy qiymat keltirib chiqaradi va strategik davlat investitsiyasini asoslaydigan yumshoq kuch va milliy brend identifikatsiyasiga hissa qo'shadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy ijodiy sanoat strategiyasi va iqtisodiy rivojlanish bo'yicha hukumat vazirliklari bilan ishlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A system of symbols used to represent music in written form.
words.example1: Musical notation allows composers to precisely communicate their ideas to performers.
words.example1Situation: Siz musiqa nazariyasi va kompozitsiya haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our music education program teaches musical notation from the first year to give students a complete understanding of music.
words.example2Situation: Siz musiqa maktabi o'quv dasturining afzalliklarini ota-onalarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While Western musical notation has become a global standard for classical music transmission, it incompletely captures the tonal nuances and expressive qualities central to many non-Western musical traditions, raising questions about cultural imperialism in music education.
words.example3Translation: G'arb musiqa notatsiyasi klassik musiqani uzatish uchun global standartga aylanib bo'lsa-da, u ko'p G'arb bo'lmagan musiqa an'analarining tonal nozikliklari va ekspressiv sifatlarini to'liq aks ettirmaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz global musiqa ta'limi va madaniy xilma-xillik bo'yicha xalqaro musiqa ta'lim konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A work of outstanding artistry, skill, or craftsmanship that represents the highest achievement in its field.
words.example1: The painting is considered a masterpiece of Renaissance art.
words.example1Situation: Siz san'at tarixi va madaniy meros haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team spent three years restoring the architectural masterpiece to its original splendor.
words.example2Situation: Siz meros restavratsiyasi loyihasining natijalarini homiylar va media vakillariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The designation of any work as a masterpiece reflects culturally embedded aesthetic values and canon-formation processes that have historically privileged certain traditions while marginalizing others, making canonical revision an ongoing and necessary aspect of cultural discourse.
words.example3Translation: Har qanday asarni shoh asar sifatida belgilash tarixan boshqalarni marginallashtirib, muayyan an'analarni imtiyozli qilgan madaniy jihatdan singdirilgan estetik qadriyatlar va kanon shakllantirish jarayonlarini aks ettiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kanon shakllanishi va san'at tarixining xilma-xilligi bo'yicha madaniy tanqid akademik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Artistic work created or presented using digital technology and computational tools.
words.example1: Digital art has opened creative possibilities that were impossible with traditional media.
words.example1Situation: Siz zamonaviy san'at va texnologiyaning bir-biriga ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our gallery expanded into digital art exhibitions to attract younger audiences and reflect contemporary creative practice.
words.example2Situation: Siz galereyangizning strategik yo'nalishini homiylar va kengash a'zolariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Digital art challenges traditional notions of originality, authenticity, and scarcity in art markets, with blockchain-based NFT technologies attempting to create artificial scarcity in infinitely reproducible digital works while raising questions about speculation, environmental cost, and artistic value.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli san'at san'at bozorlarida an'anaviy originallik, haqiqiylik va kamyoblik tushunchalarini shubha ostiga qo'yadi, blockchain asosidagi NFT texnologiyalari esa sun'iy kamyoblik yaratishga urinayotganda spekulyatsiya va badiiy qiymat haqida savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli san'at bozori va ijodiy sanoatning kelajagi bo'yicha san'at va texnologiya forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A person or organization that provides financial support to artists or artistic institutions.
words.example1: The museum would not exist without generous patrons of the arts who funded its construction.
words.example1Situation: Siz madaniy institutlar va ularning moliyalashtirish modellari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company acts as a patron of the arts by sponsoring local theater productions and commissioning public sculptures.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning madaniy homiylik va ijtimoiy mas'uliyat tashabbuslarini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Private patrons of the arts fill crucial gaps left by declining public arts funding but introduce risks of elite taste preferences determining which art receives support, potentially narrowing the diversity of voices and forms given space to develop.
words.example3Translation: San'atning shaxsiy homiylar kamayib borayotgan davlat san'atini moliyalashtirishi tomonidan qoldirilgan muhim bo'shliqlarni to'ldiradi, lekin elita did afzalliklarining qaysi san'at qo'llab-quvvatlanishini belgilash xavflarini kiritadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz san'atni moliyalashtirish va kultural siyosat bo'yicha xalqaro madaniy iqtisodiyot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A collective tendency in art sharing a common style, philosophy, and historical period.
words.example1: Impressionism was an artistic movement that revolutionized the way painters depicted light.
words.example1Situation: Siz san'at tarixi va madaniy rivojlanish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our gallery specializes in works from the Central Asian artistic movement of the late 20th century.
words.example2Situation: Siz galereya kolleksiyasi va tarixiy ahamiyatini potensial xaridorlar yoki jurnalistlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Artistic movements emerge from specific social, political, and cultural conditions that create shared sensibilities among artists, making their study inseparable from understanding the historical circumstances that gave rise to their distinctive aesthetic and philosophical concerns.
words.example3Translation: Badiiy harakatlar rassomllar o'rtasida umumiy his-tuyg'ularni yaratuvchi o'ziga xos ijtimoiy, siyosiy va madaniy sharoitlardan paydo bo'ladi va ularni o'rganish tarixiy sharoitlarni tushunishdan ajralmas.
words.example3Situation: Siz san'at harakatlari va ularning ijtimoiy-siyosiy kontekstlari bo'yicha san'at tarixi akademik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The act of creating music, art, or performance spontaneously without preparation.
words.example1: Jazz musicians are known for their skill in improvisation during live performances.
words.example1Situation: Siz musiqa janrlari va ijro texnikasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our drama workshop uses improvisation exercises to help participants think creatively under pressure.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoat ijodiy ko'nikmalar treningini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Improvisation demands deep mastery of musical or artistic fundamentals, as genuine spontaneous creation draws on internalized knowledge and technique rather than operating in the absence of skill or structure.
words.example3Translation: Improvizatsiya musiqiy yoki badiiy asoslarni chuqur egallashni talab qiladi, chunki haqiqiy spontan ijod ko'nikma yoki tuzilma yo'qligida emas, balki o'zlashtirilgan bilim va texnikaga tayanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz musiqa ta'limi metodologiyasi va ijodiy rivojlanish bo'yicha xalqaro musiqa ta'lim konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The act of protecting and maintaining cultural heritage including arts, traditions, and practices.
words.example1: Cultural preservation through music education keeps traditional forms alive for future generations.
words.example1Situation: Siz an'anaviy san'at shakllari va ularni saqlanishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our foundation funds cultural preservation projects that train young artists in endangered traditional art forms.
words.example2Situation: Siz madaniy meros fondining grantlar dasturini homiylar va hukumat vakillariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Meaningful cultural preservation in the arts requires supporting living practitioners rather than merely archiving past works, as artistic traditions only survive when communities with practitioners who transmit skills and creative energy to new generations remain engaged.
words.example3Translation: San'atda mazmunli madaniy merosni saqlanishi faqat o'tgan asarlarni arxivlash emas, balki tirik amaliyotchilarni qo'llab-quvvatlashni talab qiladi, chunki badiiy an'analar faqat yangi avlodlarga ko'nikma va ijodiy energiyani uzatuvchi amaliyotchilar bilan jamoatlar faol bo'lganda omon qoladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tirik an'anaviy san'atni saqlanishi bo'yicha UNESCO nomoddiy meros dasturini baholayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The power of art or music to evoke deep personal feelings and meaningful responses in an audience.
words.example1: The film's emotional resonance moved audiences to tears in cinemas around the world.
words.example1Situation: Siz musiqa yoki film ta'sirini hamkasbingiz bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our advertising campaign achieved high emotional resonance by featuring real stories from ordinary people.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyatli marketing kampaniyangizning natijalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Emotional resonance in art arises from the intersection of universal human experiences with culturally specific expression, enabling works to transcend their original contexts and speak meaningfully to audiences separated by time, geography, and culture.
words.example3Translation: San'atdagi hissiy ta'sir universal inson tajribalari va madaniy jihatdan o'ziga xos ifodalashning kesishishidan paydo bo'ladi va asarlarga vaqt, geografiya va madaniyat bilan ajratilgan auditoriyalarga mazmunli tarzda murojaat qilish imkonini beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz san'at psixologiyasi va estetik tajriba bo'yicha madaniyat va kognitiv fan konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Data acquired by observation or experimentation.
words.example1: Scientists rely on empirical evidence to support their theories.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilmiy tadqiqot metodlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research team collects empirical evidence through controlled experiments before drawing conclusions.
words.example2Situation: Siz laboratoriya tadqiqot jarayonini yangi xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Empirical evidence, gathered through rigorous systematic observation and controlled experimentation, forms the epistemological foundation of modern science, distinguishing scientific claims from speculation and enabling the progressive refinement of theoretical models.
words.example3Translation: Qat'iy tizimli kuzatuv va nazorat qilinadigan tajribalar orqali to'plangan tajribaga asoslangan dalillar zamonaviy ilmning epistemologik asosini tashkil etadi va ilmiy da'volarni taxmindan ajratib, nazariy modellarning bosqichma-bosqich takomillashuviga imkon beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilmiy metodologiya va bilim nazariyasi bo'yicha xalqaro akademik konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Pioneering study that brings major new discoveries.
words.example1: The scientist published groundbreaking research on gene editing.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi ilmiy kashfiyot haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our institute has invested heavily in groundbreaking research that challenges long-held assumptions in neuroscience.
words.example2Situation: Siz institutingizning ilmiy yutuqlarini moliyalashtiruvchi tashkilotlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Groundbreaking research typically emerges at the intersection of disciplines, requiring not only exceptional intellectual creativity but also institutional courage to pursue questions that challenge prevailing paradigms and risk professional credibility within established academic communities.
words.example3Translation: Yangilik kirituvchi tadqiqotlar odatda fanlar kesishmasida paydo bo'lib, nafaqat yuqori darajadagi intellektual ijodkorlikni, balki mavjud paradigmalarga shubha soluvchi va o'rnatilgan akademik jamoalarda kasbiy obro'ni xavf ostiga qo'yuvchi savollarga intilishda institutsional jasoratni ham talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilmiy innovatsiyalar va tadqiqot siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ilmiy forum konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Evaluation of scientific work by others in the same field.
words.example1: The study passed peer review before it was published in the journal.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilmiy nashr jarayoni haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our journal requires rigorous peer review from at least three independent experts before accepting any manuscript.
words.example2Situation: Siz jurnalingizning nashr standartlarini mualliflarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While peer review remains the cornerstone of scientific quality control, its limitations including reviewer bias, publication pressure, and the difficulty of detecting sophisticated fraud have prompted calls for open peer review systems and post-publication evaluation platforms.
words.example3Translation: Ilmiy hamkasblar tomonidan baholash ilmiy sifat nazoratining asosi bo'lib qolsa-da, uning sharhlovchi tarafkashligi, nashr bosimi va murakkab firibgarlikni aniqlash qiyinligi kabi kamchiliklari ochiq baholash tizimlari va nashrdan keyingi platformalar yaratish talablarini keltirib chiqarmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilmiy nashr etika va sifat standartlari bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Development and application of new technologies.
words.example1: Technological innovation has transformed how we communicate.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnologiyaning kundalik hayotga ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company prioritizes technological innovation to remain competitive in rapidly evolving global markets.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning strategik rivojlanish rejasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Technological innovation, while driving unprecedented economic growth and solving complex societal challenges, simultaneously creates displacement risks for workers, raises urgent questions about equitable access, and demands proactive regulatory frameworks capable of governing emergent technologies responsibly.
words.example3Translation: Texnologik innovatsiyalar misli ko'rilmagan iqtisodiy o'sishni rag'batlantirish va murakkab ijtimoiy muammolarni hal qilish bilan bir vaqtda ishchilar uchun siqib chiqarish xavflarini yaratadi, teng kirish imkoniyati bo'yicha muhim savollarni ko'taradi va yangi texnologiyalarni mas'uliyatli boshqarishga qodir faol tartibga solish tizimlarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz texnologik taraqqiyot va ijtimoiy ta'sir bo'yicha xalqaro siyosat forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Moral principles guiding the conduct of research.
words.example1: Research ethics require scientists to obtain informed consent from participants.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilmiy tadqiqot qoidalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our university's ethics committee reviews all studies involving human subjects to ensure full compliance with research ethics.
words.example2Situation: Siz universitetingizning tadqiqot jarayonini yangi tadqiqotchilarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Research ethics encompasses not only procedural requirements such as informed consent and data protection but also deeper obligations around honest reporting, responsible authorship, and the equitable distribution of research benefits across the communities whose participation makes scientific progress possible.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqot etikasi nafaqat ma'lumotlangan rozilik va ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish kabi protsessual talablarni, balki halol hisobot berish, mas'uliyatli mualliflik va ilmiy taraqqiyotni mumkin qiluvchi jamoatlar o'rtasida tadqiqot natijalarini adolatli taqsimlash bo'yicha chuqurroq majburiyatlarni ham o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tadqiqot etikasi va ilmiy yaxlitlik bo'yicha xalqaro akademik konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Ability to understand scientific concepts and processes.
words.example1: Scientific literacy helps people evaluate health information critically.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilm-fan va kundalik hayot bog'liqligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our school curriculum was redesigned to strengthen scientific literacy across all year groups.
words.example2Situation: Siz maktab ta'lim dasturini isloh qilish rejasini ota-onalar va rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Scientific literacy extends beyond memorizing facts to encompass the capacity to evaluate evidence, recognize uncertainty, understand probability, and critically assess media representations of research, skills increasingly essential for democratic participation in societies shaped by complex technological decisions.
words.example3Translation: Ilmiy savodxonlik faktlarni yodlashdan tashqariga chiqib, dalillarni baholash, noaniqlikni tan olish, ehtimollikni tushunish va tadqiqotlarning media tasvirlarini tanqidiy baholash qobiliyatini o'z ichiga oladi, bu ko'nikmalar murakkab texnologik qarorlar bilan shakllanadigan jamiyatlarda demokratik ishtirok etish uchun tobora zarur bo'lib bormoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilmiy savodxonlik va fuqarolik ta'limi bo'yicha xalqaro ta'lim siyosati konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Process of inspecting and modeling data to discover useful information.
words.example1: Data analysis revealed a clear pattern in customer behavior.
words.example1Situation: Siz tadqiqot natijalarini hamkasbingiz bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our data analysis team identified key market trends that shaped our product strategy for the next quarter.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning strategik qarorlarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Advanced data analysis techniques, including machine learning and predictive modeling, are transforming research across disciplines, yet their power raises critical concerns about algorithmic bias, data privacy, interpretability of results, and the risk of finding spurious correlations in large datasets.
words.example3Translation: Mashinali o'qitish va prognozli modellashtirish kabi ilg'or ma'lumotlarni tahlil qilish usullari turli sohalarda tadqiqotlarni o'zgartirmoqda, ammo ularning kuchi algoritmik tarafkashlik, ma'lumotlar maxfiyligi, natijalarning izohlash imkoniyati va katta ma'lumotlar to'plamlarida soxta korrelyatsiyalar topish xavfi haqida muhim tashvishlarni keltirib chiqaradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ma'lumotlar etikasi va sun'iy intellekt tadqiqot metodologiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A proposed explanation based on limited evidence, as a starting point for investigation.
words.example1: The researcher formed a hypothesis before designing the experiment.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilmiy tadqiqot bosqichlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team tested the hypothesis that flexible working hours improve employee productivity.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning mehnat unumdorligini tadqiq qilish natijalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A well-constructed hypothesis must be specific, falsifiable, and grounded in existing theoretical knowledge, serving not merely as a prediction but as a conceptual bridge between prior research and the empirical investigation designed to extend, refine, or challenge established understanding.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi tuzilgan faraz aniq, inkor qilinishi mumkin va mavjud nazariy bilimga asoslangan bo'lishi kerak, u nafaqat bashorat sifatida, balki avvalgi tadqiqotlar va o'rnatilgan tushunchani kengaytirish, takomillashtirish yoki shubha ostiga qo'yish uchun mo'ljallangan empirik tergov o'rtasidagi kontseptual ko'prik sifatida xizmat qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilmiy tadqiqot dizayni va metodologiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro akademik seminar konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Experiment where neither participants nor researchers know who receives a particular treatment.
words.example1: The drug trial used a double-blind study to avoid bias.
words.example1Situation: Siz klinik tadqiqot metodlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our clinical team designed a double-blind study to ensure objective measurement of the new treatment's effectiveness.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi dori vositasining samaradorligini tekshirish jarayonini hamkorlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The double-blind study design minimizes expectation bias from both researchers and participants, yet its applicability is limited in fields where treatment concealment is impossible, necessitating alternative methodological safeguards to maintain internal validity in open-label or behavioral intervention research.
words.example3Translation: Ikki tomonlama ko'r tadqiqot dizayni tadqiqotchilar ham, ishtirokchilar ham tomonidan kutish tarafkashligini minimallashtiradi, biroq uning qo'llanilishi davolanishni yashirish mumkin bo'lmagan sohalarda cheklangan bo'lib, ochiq yorliqli yoki xulqiy aralashuv tadqiqotlarida ichki asoslilikni saqlash uchun muqobil metodologik kafolatlarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz klinik tadqiqot metodologiyasi va tibbiy dalillarga asoslangan amaliyot bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Process of distributing financial resources for research purposes.
words.example1: Funding allocation decisions shape which scientific questions get answered.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilmiy tadqiqotni moliyalashtirish siyosati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our foundation reviews funding allocation annually to ensure resources reach the highest-impact research areas.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamg'arma strategiyasini kengash a'zolariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Funding allocation in research is inherently political, reflecting societal priorities, industry lobbying, and geopolitical considerations that systematically favor applied over basic research, creating structural gaps in foundational knowledge that may only become apparent when applied fields require theoretical advances that were never adequately supported.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqotlarda moliyalashtirish taqsimoti o'z mohiyatiga ko'ra siyosiy bo'lib, amaliy tadqiqotlarni asosiy tadqiqotlardan tizimli ravishda ustun qo'yuvchi ijtimoiy ustuvorliklar, sanoat lobbysi va geosiyosiy mulohazalarni aks ettiradi va amaliy sohalar hech qachon yetarli darajada qo'llab-quvvatlanmagan nazariy yutuqlarni talab qilganida namoyon bo'ladigan asosiy bilimlar bo'shlig'ini yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilmiy moliyalashtirish siyosati va tadqiqot ustuvorliklari bo'yicha xalqaro davlat va ilmiy hamkorlik forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Set of assumptions used to understand a phenomenon.
words.example1: The researcher chose a clear theoretical framework before collecting data.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilmiy tadqiqot rejalashtirish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our consulting team applies a robust theoretical framework to ensure our recommendations are grounded in established research.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlaringizga maslahat metodologiyangizni tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A theoretical framework does not merely organize existing knowledge but actively shapes what questions researchers consider worth asking, what data they collect, and how they interpret findings, making the choice of framework a consequential epistemological decision with direct implications for research validity and applicability.
words.example3Translation: Nazariy asos nafaqat mavjud bilimlarni tartibga solibgina qolmay, balki tadqiqotchilar qaysi savollarni so'rash arziydi deb hisoblaydigan, qanday ma'lumot to'playdigan va natijalarni qanday talqin qilishini faol ravishda shakllantiradi, bu asos tanlashni tadqiqot asosliligi va qo'llanilishiga bevosita ta'sir ko'rsatuvchi muhim epistemologik qarorga aylantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy fanlar metodologiyasi va epistemologiya bo'yicha xalqaro akademik konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Methodological crisis where many scientific studies are difficult to replicate.
words.example1: The reproducibility crisis has raised doubts about many published findings.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilmiy ishonchlilik muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research institute adopted open data practices to directly address concerns raised by the reproducibility crisis.
words.example2Situation: Siz institutingizning ilmiy shaffoflik tashabbuslarini moliyalashtiruvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The reproducibility crisis reflects systemic incentive structures that reward novelty and statistical significance over rigorous methodology, encouraging underpowered studies, selective reporting, and p-hacking, problems that open science reforms including pre-registration, data sharing, and replication journals are attempting to systematically address.
words.example3Translation: Takrorlanish inqirozi qat'iy metodologiya o'rniga yangilik va statistik ahamiyatni mukofotlovchi tizimli rag'bat tuzilmalarini aks ettiradi, kam quvvatli tadqiqotlarni, tanlab hisobot berishni va p-xakingni rag'batlantiradi, bu muammolarni oldindan ro'yxatga olish, ma'lumotlarni ulashish va takrorlash jurnallarini o'z ichiga olgan ochiq ilm islohotlari tizimli ravishda hal qilishga urinmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilmiy yaxlitlik va ochiq ilm islohotlari bo'yicha xalqaro tadqiqot metodologiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Research combining methods and insights from multiple academic disciplines.
words.example1: Interdisciplinary research helped scientists understand the social causes of disease.
words.example1Situation: Siz turli fanlarning birlashishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our university encourages interdisciplinary research by funding joint projects across departments.
words.example2Situation: Siz universitetingizning tadqiqot strategiyasini yangi fakultet a'zolariga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Interdisciplinary research generates transformative insights by dissolving artificial boundaries between fields, yet faces persistent institutional barriers including disciplinary hiring practices, siloed funding streams, and journal structures that make it difficult for scholars to build careers outside narrowly defined academic territories.
words.example3Translation: Fanlararo tadqiqot sohalar o'rtasidagi sun'iy chegaralarni yo'q qilib, transformativ tushunchalar hosil qiladi, ammo fanlar bo'yicha yollash amaliyotlari, alohida moliyalashtirish oqimlari va olimlar uchun tor belgilangan akademik hududlardan tashqarida martaba qurish qiyinligini keltirib chiqaruvchi jurnal tuzilmalari kabi doimiy institutsional to'siqlarga duch keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz fanlararo hamkorlik va akademik tuzilmani isloh qilish bo'yicha xalqaro oliy ta'lim siyosati konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Policy developed based on objective evidence from research.
words.example1: Evidence-based policy helped the government reduce road accident rates.
words.example1Situation: Siz davlat boshqaruvi va tadqiqot o'rtasidagi bog'liqlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization advocates for evidence-based policy in public health to ensure limited resources are directed toward proven interventions.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning jamoat salomatligi siyosati bo'yicha tavsiyalarini hukumat vakillariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Evidence-based policy faces the fundamental challenge that research findings are rarely unambiguous, policy contexts are rarely identical to research conditions, and political actors selectively interpret evidence to support predetermined positions, making the translation of research into governance an inherently contested and value-laden process.
words.example3Translation: Dalillarga asoslangan siyosat tadqiqot natijalari kamdan-kam hollarda bir ma'noli bo'lishi, siyosat kontekstlari tadqiqot shartlariga kamdan-kam mos kelishi va siyosiy aktyorlar oldindan belgilangan pozitsiyalarni qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun dalillarni tanlab talqin qilishi kabi asosiy muammolarga duch keladi, bu tadqiqotning boshqaruvga tarjima qilinishini o'z mohiyatiga ko'ra bahsli va qadriyatlarga bog'liq jarayonga aylantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tadqiqot va siyosat o'rtasidagi munosabat bo'yicha xalqaro davlat boshqaruvi va ijtimoiy fanlar konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Research pursued for the sake of knowledge, without immediate practical application.
words.example1: Curiosity-driven research often leads to unexpected breakthroughs decades later.
words.example1Situation: Siz asosiy ilm va uning uzoq muddatli ahamiyati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our foundation dedicates thirty percent of its grants to curiosity-driven research with no required commercial outcomes.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamg'armangizning moliyalashtirish falsafasini ilmiy hamjamiyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Curiosity-driven research, historically responsible for foundational discoveries underpinning technologies from antibiotics to the internet, is increasingly threatened by funding models that demand short-term impact metrics, creating a structural tension between the unpredictable nature of genuine discovery and the accountability requirements of public and private research investment.
words.example3Translation: Qiziquvchanlikka asoslangan tadqiqot, tarixan antibiotiklar va internetga qadar texnologiyalarni ta'minlovchi asosiy kashfiyotlar uchun mas'ul bo'lib, qisqa muddatli ta'sir ko'rsatkichlarini talab qiluvchi moliyalashtirish modellari tomonidan tobora tahdid ostiga olinmoqda, bu haqiqiy kashfiyotning oldindan aytib bo'lmaydigan tabiati va davlat hamda xususiy tadqiqot investitsiyalarining hisobdorlik talablari o'rtasida tarkibiy ziddiyat yaratmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz asosiy ilm moliyalashtirish va uzoq muddatli innovatsiya siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro tadqiqot siyosati konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Transport services available to the general public (buses, trains, etc.).
words.example1: Public transportation reduces the number of private cars on the road.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar harakatchanligi va atrof-muhit haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our city council approved a budget increase to expand public transportation routes to underserved neighborhoods.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar infratuzilmasi rivojlanish rejasini jamoat yig'ilishida taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective public transportation systems reduce urban congestion, lower carbon emissions, and improve social equity by providing mobility to populations who cannot afford private vehicles, yet require sustained political will and long-term investment that often conflicts with short electoral cycles.
words.example3Translation: Samarali jamoat transporti tizimlari shahar tiqilinchini kamaytiradi, karbon chiqindilarini pasaytiradi va xususiy transport vositalariga qodir bo'lmagan aholini harakatchanlik bilan ta'minlab ijtimoiy tenglikni yaxshilaydi, ammo qisqa saylov tsikllari bilan ziddiyatga kiradigan barqaror siyosiy iroda va uzoq muddatli investitsiyalarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar transporti siyosati va barqaror harakatchanlik bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Condition of excessive traffic causing slow movement and long queues.
words.example1: Traffic congestion in the city centre gets worse during rush hour.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
