words.example2: Our logistics company rescheduled deliveries to avoid traffic congestion during peak hours.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yetkazib berish samaradorligini oshirish strategiyasini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Traffic congestion imposes enormous economic costs through lost productivity, increased fuel consumption, and elevated emissions, yet conventional responses of expanding road capacity consistently fail due to induced demand, making demand management and public transport investment more effective long-term solutions.
words.example3Translation: Transport tiqilinchi yo'qotilgan unumdorlik, ortib borayotgan yoqilg'i sarfi va chiqindilar ortishi orqali katta iqtisodiy xarajatlar yuklaydi, ammo yo'l quvvatini kengaytirish bo'yicha an'anaviy javoblar qo'zg'atilgan talab tufayli muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'ladi, bu talab boshqaruvi va jamoat transportiga sarmoya kiritishni samaraliroq uzoq muddatli yechimga aylantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar transporti muammolari va talab boshqaruvi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro shahar rejalashtirish konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Transport methods with low environmental impact (walking, cycling, electric vehicles).
words.example1: Cycling is one of the most practical forms of sustainable transport in urban areas.
words.example1Situation: Siz atrof-muhitga qulay turmush tarzi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company transitioned its entire delivery fleet to electric vehicles as part of our sustainable transport strategy.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning barqarorlik tashabbuslarini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sustainable transport transitions require coordinated policy interventions including carbon pricing, infrastructure investment, land use reform, and behavioral incentives, recognizing that technology adoption alone cannot achieve emissions targets without addressing the spatial patterns and cultural norms that generate transport demand.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror transportga o'tish uglerod narxlash, infratuzilma investitsiyalari, yer foydalanishni isloh qilish va xulqiy rag'batlarni o'z ichiga olgan muvofiq siyosat aralashuvlarini talab qiladi, texnologiyani qabul qilish yolg'iz transport talabini keltirib chiqaruvchi fazoviy naqshlar va madaniy me'yorlarni hal qilmasdan emissiya maqsadlariga erishib bo'lmasligini tan olgan holda.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror shahar harakatchanligi va iqlim siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro transport konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Planning and improvement of foundational systems like roads and railways.
words.example1: Infrastructure development is essential for connecting rural communities to urban centres.
words.example1Situation: Siz mintaqaviy rivojlanish va iqtisodiy o'sish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our government agency is overseeing infrastructure development projects worth over two billion dollars across the transport sector.
words.example2Situation: Siz davlat infratuzilma sarmoyasi dasturini parlament qo'mitasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Infrastructure development decisions have multi-generational consequences, locking in spatial patterns and carbon dependencies for decades, making it critical that current investments anticipate future mobility needs, climate resilience requirements, and technological shifts rather than simply replicating twentieth-century automobile-centric models.
words.example3Translation: Infratuzilmani rivojlantirish qarorlari ko'p avlodli oqibatlarga ega bo'lib, o'nlab yillar davomida fazoviy naqshlar va uglerod bog'liqliklarini mustahkamlaydi, bu joriy investitsiyalar shunchaki yigirmanchi asr avtomobil markazli modellarini takrorlash o'rniga kelajakdagi harakatchanlik ehtiyojlarini, iqlim chidamliligi talablarini va texnologik o'zgarishlarni kutishini muhim qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz uzoq muddatli infratuzilma rejalashtirish va barqaror rivojlanish bo'yicha xalqaro davlat sarmoyasi forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Person who travels regularly between home and work.
words.example1: Many commuters spend over an hour travelling to work each day.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar hayoti va ish-uy muvozanati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company introduced flexible hours to reduce peak-time pressure on commuters who use public transport.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar farovonligi tashabbuslarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The daily commuter experience profoundly affects mental health, productivity, and residential location choices, with research consistently showing that commute duration and unpredictability are stronger predictors of life dissatisfaction than many other work-related factors, driving demand for remote work and transit-oriented development.
words.example3Translation: Kundalik yo'lovchi tajribasi ruhiy salomatlik, unumdorlik va yashash joyi tanlashiga chuqur ta'sir qiladi, tadqiqotlar esa yo'lda o'tkazilgan vaqt va oldindan aytib bo'lmaslik ko'plab boshqa ish bilan bog'liq omillarga qaraganda hayotdan norozilikning kuchliroq bashoratchilaari ekanligini izchil ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar harakatchanligi va ish joyi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ish va farovonlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Release of carbon dioxide (CO₂) into the atmosphere.
words.example1: Reducing carbon emissions from transport is a key climate change priority.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqlim o'zgarishi va transport haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our airline has committed to offsetting all carbon emissions from domestic flights by 2027.
words.example2Situation: Siz aviakompaniyangizning barqarorlik majburiyatlarini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Transport carbon emissions, accounting for approximately a quarter of global greenhouse gas output, are particularly difficult to decarbonize due to the long asset lifecycles of vehicles and infrastructure, the energy density requirements of aviation and shipping, and the political sensitivity of fuel taxation.
words.example3Translation: Global issiqxona gazi chiqindilarining taxminan chorak qismini tashkil etuvchi transport karbon chiqindilari, transport vositalari va infratuzilmaning uzoq aktiv hayot tsikllari, aviatsiya va dengiz transportining energiya zichligi talablari va yoqilg'i soliqqa tortishning siyosiy sezgirligi tufayli dekarbonizatsiya qilish ayniqsa qiyin.
words.example3Situation: Siz transport sektori dekarbonizatsiyasi va iqlim siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro iqlim harakati konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Designed to be safe and convenient for people walking.
words.example1: The new city centre design is pedestrian-friendly with wide pavements and no through traffic.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar dizayni va yashash sifati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our urban planning team redesigned the district to be pedestrian-friendly by removing parking lots and adding green walkways.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar qayta qurish loyihasini mahalliy hokimiyat vakillari va jamoatchilikka taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Pedestrian-friendly urban design generates measurable economic, health, and environmental benefits including increased retail spending, reduced obesity rates, and lower emissions, yet faces resistance from car-dependent business models and residents who perceive walkability improvements as threats to parking availability and vehicle access.
words.example3Translation: Piyodalar uchun qulay shahar dizayni savdo xarajatlarining oshishi, semizlik darajasining kamayishi va chiqindilarning pasayishi kabi o'lchov iqtisodiy, sog'liq va atrof-muhit foydalari keltiradi, ammo avtomobilga bog'liq biznes modellar va yurish qulayligi yaxshilanishini to'xtash joyi mavjudligi va transport vositalariga kirish huquqiga tahdid sifatida qabul qiluvchi aholining qarshiligiga duch keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz piyoda harakatchanligi va barqaror shahar dizayni bo'yicha xalqaro shahar rejalashtirish konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Transportation system that carries many passengers.
words.example1: The city's mass transit system carries over two million passengers daily.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar transporti infratuzilmasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our government is investing in a new mass transit system to connect the airport with the city centre.
words.example2Situation: Siz milliy transport infratuzilmasi loyihasini parlament a'zolariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Successful mass transit systems require not only capital investment in vehicles and infrastructure but also network design that prioritizes coverage and frequency, fare structures that balance revenue and accessibility, and institutional governance capable of coordinating across municipal boundaries and competing transport operators.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli ommaviy tranzit tizimlari nafaqat transport vositalari va infratuzilmaga kapital investitsiyalarni, balki qamrov va chastotani ustuvor qo'yuvchi tarmoq dizaynini, daromad va qulaylikni muvozanatlashtiruvchi tarif tuzilmalarini va munitsipal chegaralar va raqobatchi transport operatorlari bo'ylab muvofiqlashtira oladigan institutsional boshqaruvni ham talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ommaviy tranzit boshqaruvi va shahar harakatchanligi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro transport konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Arrangement where passengers share a vehicle for a trip.
words.example1: Ride-sharing apps have made it easier to split travel costs with strangers.
words.example1Situation: Siz zamonaviy transport yechimlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company partnered with a ride-sharing platform to provide subsidised commutes for employees working night shifts.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar transporti dasturini HR jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Ride-sharing platforms promised to reduce vehicle ownership and congestion but evidence suggests they have increased urban vehicle miles traveled by cannibalizing public transport use, raising fundamental questions about whether platform-mediated mobility services complement or undermine sustainable urban transport goals.
words.example3Translation: Transport vositasini ulashish platformalari transport vositasiga egalikni va tiqilinchini kamaytirishi va'dasini berdi, ammo dalillar ularning jamoat transportidan foydalanishni yeb, shahar avtomobil milyalarini ko'paytirganligi ko'rsatadi va platforma vositachiligi harakatchanlik xizmatlari barqaror shahar transporti maqsadlarini to'ldirishi yoki buzishi haqida asosiy savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli harakatchanlik platformalari va shahar transport siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro transport innovatsiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Detailed organization and implementation of complex operations (e.g., freight transport).
words.example1: Good logistics ensures products arrive on time and in good condition.
words.example1Situation: Siz ta'minot zanjiri va yetkazib berish samaradorligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our logistics team redesigned the warehouse layout to reduce fulfilment time by forty percent.
words.example2Situation: Siz operatsion samaradorlik yaxshilanishlarini boshqaruvga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Modern logistics systems integrate real-time data analytics, predictive demand modeling, and multimodal coordination to optimize cost, speed, and reliability across global supply chains, yet remain vulnerable to geopolitical disruptions, extreme weather events, and the concentration risks created by lean inventory practices.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy logistika tizimlari global ta'minot zanjirlari bo'ylab narx, tezlik va ishonchlilikni optimallashtirish uchun real vaqt ma'lumotlar tahlili, prognozli talab modellashtirish va ko'p modalli muvofiqlashtiruvni birlashtiradi, ammo geosiyosiy uzilishlar, ekstremal ob-havo hodisalari va tejamli inventar amaliyotlari yaratgan kontsentratsiya xavflarga nisbatan zaif bo'lib qoladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz global ta'minot zanjiri chidamliligi va logistika innovatsiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro savdo va transport konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Self-driving cars or trucks that operate without human input.
words.example1: Autonomous vehicles could significantly reduce road accidents caused by human error.
words.example1Situation: Siz transport texnologiyasi kelajagi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our engineering firm is developing safety protocols for autonomous vehicles operating in mixed urban traffic environments.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnologiya kompaniyangizning avtomatsizlashtirish loyihasini sarmoyadorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Autonomous vehicles present transformative potential for mobility, safety, and efficiency, yet their widespread deployment raises unresolved questions about liability frameworks, cybersecurity vulnerabilities, algorithmic bias in safety decisions, labor displacement of professional drivers, and infrastructure requirements that challenge existing regulatory systems.
words.example3Translation: Avtonom transport vositalari harakatchanlik, xavfsizlik va samaradorlik uchun transformativ salohiyat taqdim etadi, ammo ularning keng tarqalishi javobgarlik tizimlari, kiberhujum zaifliklari, xavfsizlik qarorlarida algoritmik tarafkashlik, professional haydovchilarning mehnat siqib chiqarilishi va mavjud tartibga solish tizimlarini qiyinlashtiradigan infratuzilma talablari haqida hal qilinmagan savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz avtonom transport texnologiyalari tartibga solish va xavfsizlik siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro transport innovatsiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Transport links connecting a hub to the final destination.
words.example1: Last-mile connectivity is often the biggest challenge in urban delivery networks.
words.example1Situation: Siz yetkazib berish tizimlari va shahar logistikasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our transport authority introduced e-scooter schemes to improve last-mile connectivity from train stations to workplaces.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar harakatchanligi yechimlarini mahalliy hokimiyat vakillari va jamoatchilikka taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Last-mile connectivity represents the most expensive and logistically complex segment of both passenger and freight transport networks, disproportionately affecting accessibility in low-density areas and driving innovation in micro-mobility solutions, autonomous delivery systems, and demand-responsive transport services.
words.example3Translation: So'nggi mil ulanishi yo'lovchi ham, yuk transport tarmoqlari ham ning eng qimmat va logistik jihatdan murakkab segmentini ifodalaydi, past zichlikdagi hududlarda qulaylikka mutanosib ravishda ta'sir qiladi va mikro-harakatchanlik yechimlari, avtonom yetkazib berish tizimlari va talabga javob beruvchi transport xizmatlaridagi innovatsiyalarni harakatga keltiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz so'nggi mil logistikasi va shahar harakatchanligi innovatsiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro transport va shahar rivojlanishi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Urban planning that concentrates housing and jobs near public transport.
words.example1: Transit-oriented development reduces car dependency by placing amenities within walking distance of train stations.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar rejalashtirish va barqaror turmush tarzi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our planning department is promoting transit-oriented development around the new metro line to maximize ridership and reduce sprawl.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar rivojlanish strategiyasini investorlar va jamoatchilikka taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Transit-oriented development integrates land use and transport planning to create walkable, mixed-use neighborhoods that generate sufficient density to support viable public transport, yet faces implementation barriers including land speculation around stations, displacement of existing residents, and fragmented governance between transport and planning authorities.
words.example3Translation: Tranzitga yo'naltirilgan rivojlanish barqaror jamoat transportini qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun yetarli zichlik yaratiladigan piyoda yuriladigan, aralash foydalaniladigan mahallalar yaratish uchun yer foydalanish va transport rejalashtiruvini birlashtiradi, ammo stansiyalar atrofida yer spekulyatsiyasi, mavjud aholini ko'chirish va transport va rejalashtirish organlari o'rtasida bo'lingan boshqaruv kabi amalga oshirish to'siqlari bilan duch keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tranzitga yo'naltirilgan rivojlanish va shahar zichligi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro shahar rejalashtirish konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Relationship between distance traveled and fuel consumed.
words.example1: Newer car models have much better fuel efficiency than older ones.
words.example1Situation: Siz avtomobil texnologiyasi va atrof-muhit haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our fleet management program improved fuel efficiency by fifteen percent through driver training and route optimization.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning operatsion xarajatlarni kamaytirish natijalari bo'yicha hisobotni rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Fuel efficiency standards represent one of the most cost-effective climate policies available to governments, delivering consumer savings, energy security benefits, and emissions reductions simultaneously, yet face persistent industry lobbying that historically secured weaker standards than technically achievable at prevailing vehicle costs.
words.example3Translation: Yoqilg'i samaradorligi standartlari hukumatlar uchun mavjud bo'lgan eng tejamli iqlim siyosatlaridan birini ifodalaydi, iste'molchi tejamkorligini, energiya xavfsizligi imtiyozlarini va emissiyalarni kamaytirish maqsadlarini bir vaqtda ta'minlaydi, ammo tarixan mavjud transport vositasi xarajatlarida texnik jihatdan erishilishi mumkin bo'lganidan zaifroq standartlarni ta'minlagan doimiy sanoat lobbysiga duch keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz transport sektori uchun iqlim siyosati va yoqilg'i standartlari islohoti bo'yicha xalqaro energiya va transport konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Seamless linking of different transport modes (e.g., train to bus).
words.example1: Good intermodal connectivity allows passengers to switch from train to bus without long waits.
words.example1Situation: Siz transport tizimlari integratsiyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our transport authority invested in intermodal connectivity hubs to make transfers between rail, bus, and cycling infrastructure seamless.
words.example2Situation: Siz milliy transport tizimini modernizatsiya qilish rejasini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Intermodal connectivity transforms fragmented transport networks into coherent mobility systems, but requires institutional coordination across operators, unified ticketing infrastructure, synchronized scheduling, and physical interchange design that prioritizes passenger experience over operational convenience for individual service providers.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p modalli ulanish bo'lingan transport tarmoqlarini izchil harakatchanlik tizimlariga aylantiradi, ammo operatorlar bo'ylab institutsional muvofiqlashtirish, yagona chipta chiqarish infratuzilmasi, sinxronlashtirilgan jadval va individual xizmat ko'rsatuvchilar uchun operatsion qulaylik o'rniga yo'lovchilar tajribasini ustuvor qo'yuvchi fizik almashinuv dizaynini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ko'p modalli transport integratsiyasi va milliy harakatchanlik tizimlari siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro transport konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Trail of data left by a person's online activity.
words.example1: Your digital footprint includes every website you visit and every post you make.
words.example1Situation: Siz internet xavfsizligi va maxfiylik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company trains employees to manage their digital footprint responsibly when representing the brand online.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning raqamli kommunikatsiya siyosatini yangi xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The permanence and breadth of digital footprints raise profound questions about privacy, consent, and the right to be forgotten, particularly as data aggregation enables detailed behavioral profiles to be constructed from seemingly innocuous individual data points across platforms.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli izlarning doimiyligi va kengligi maxfiylik, rozilik va unutilish huquqi haqida chuqur savollarni ko'taradi, ayniqsa ma'lumotlarni yig'ish platformalar bo'ylab ko'rinishda zararsiz individual ma'lumot nuqtalaridan batafsil xulqiy profillar tuzishga imkon berganda.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli maxfiylik huquqi va ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Existence and visibility of an individual or brand on the internet.
words.example1: A strong online presence helps businesses attract new customers.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqamli marketing va biznes rivojlanishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our marketing team developed a strategy to strengthen the company's online presence across all major platforms.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning raqamli marketing strategiyasini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Managing online presence has become a critical professional skill, requiring individuals and organizations to balance authentic communication with strategic positioning, while navigating platform algorithms that reward engagement over accuracy and amplify divisive content to maximize attention.
words.example3Translation: Onlayn mavjudlikni boshqarish muhim kasbiy ko'nikmaga aylandi, jismoniy shaxslar va tashkilotlar haqiqiy muloqotni strategik pozitsiyalash bilan muvozanatlashtirishi kerak, bir vaqtda aniqlik o'rniga jalb qilishni mukofotlovchi va e'tiborni maksimallashtirish uchun bo'lingan kontentni kuchaytiruvchi platforma algoritmlarini boshqarishi zarur.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli brend boshqaruvi va onlayn obro'ni shakllantirish bo'yicha xalqaro marketing konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Use of technology to bully, harass, or threaten others.
words.example1: Cyberbullying can cause serious psychological harm to young people.
words.example1Situation: Siz internet xavfsizligi va yoshlar salomatligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our school implemented a cyberbullying prevention program that includes digital citizenship education for all students.
words.example2Situation: Siz maktabingizning raqamli xavfsizlik tashabbuslarini ota-onalar va rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Cyberbullying presents unique harms compared to traditional bullying due to its persistent visibility, potential for anonymous perpetration, and unlimited audience reach, requiring school, platform, and legislative responses that address both immediate victim support and the systemic design features that enable harassment to spread.
words.example3Translation: Kibertahdid an'anaviy bezorilikka nisbatan doimiy ko'rinuvchanlik, anonim jinoyatchilik imkoniyati va cheksiz auditoriya qamrovi tufayli o'ziga xos zarar keltiradi, maktab, platforma va qonunchilik javoblarini talab qiladi, bu javoblar ham zudlik bilan jabrlanuvchiga yordam ko'rsatishni, ham tahdidni tarqalishga imkon beruvchi tizimli dizayn xususiyatlarini hal qilishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli zo'ravonlik va onlayn xavfsizlik siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro yoshlar va texnologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Content that spreads rapidly through online sharing.
words.example1: The funny video became viral content overnight, reaching millions of viewers.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy media tendentsiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our communications team studied what makes viral content to improve the reach of our public health campaigns.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning raqamli kommunikatsiya strategiyasini jamoaga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Viral content spreads through emotional resonance and social identity signaling rather than factual accuracy, meaning that misinformation often outperforms verified information on platform algorithms optimized for engagement, creating fundamental tensions between free expression, public safety, and platform commercial interests.
words.example3Translation: Viral kontent haqiqiy aniqlik o'rniga hissiy rezonans va ijtimoiy identifikatsiya signallari orqali tarqaladi, ya'ni dezinformatsiya ko'pincha jalb qilish uchun optimallashtirilgan platforma algoritmlarida tasdiqlangan ma'lumotlardan ustun keladi, bu erkin ifoda, jamoat xavfsizligi va platforma tijorat manfaatlari o'rtasida asosiy ziddiyatlar yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy media algoritmlar va ma'lumot tarqalishi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro raqamli media konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Online environment where a person only encounters beliefs they already hold.
words.example1: Social media algorithms can trap users in an echo chamber of similar opinions.
words.example1Situation: Siz media savodxonligi va tanqidiy fikrlash haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research team studied how echo chambers form on social platforms and how they affect political polarization.
words.example2Situation: Siz raqamli media va jamiyat bo'linishi bo'yicha tadqiqot natijalarini akademik auditoriyaga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Echo chambers on social media reinforce pre-existing beliefs by algorithmically filtering out challenging perspectives, contributing to political polarization and reducing citizens' capacity for constructive cross-ideological dialogue, though research suggests that selective exposure often reflects pre-existing preferences rather than purely algorithmic curation.
words.example3Translation: Ijtimoiy mediada aks-sado kameralari algoritmik tarzda muqobil nuqtai nazarlarni filtrlash orqali mavjud e'tiqodlarni mustahkamlaydi, siyosiy qutblanishga hissa qo'shadi va fuqarolarning konstruktiv mafkuralararo muloqot qobiliyatini kamaytiradi, ammo tadqiqotlar selektiv ta'sirning ko'pincha sof algoritmik tanlash o'rniga oldindan mavjud afzalliklarni aks ettirishini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli demokratiya va onlayn siyosiy muloqot bo'yicha xalqaro siyosatshunoslik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Using influential people to promote products or services.
words.example1: Many brands now prefer influencer marketing over traditional advertising.
words.example1Situation: Siz zamonaviy marketing strategiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our brand launched an influencer marketing campaign targeting young consumers through micro-influencers in the fitness space.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yangi mahsulot reklamasi strategiyasini marketing jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Influencer marketing exploits parasocial relationships and perceived authenticity to circumvent audience skepticism toward traditional advertising, raising regulatory questions about disclosure requirements, targeting of vulnerable populations including children, and the commodification of personal identity and intimate life experiences.
words.example3Translation: Influenser marketing an'anaviy reklamaga nisbatan auditoriya skeptitsizmini chetlab o'tish uchun parasosial munosabatlar va idrok qilingan haqiqiylikdan foydalanadi, oshkor qilish talablari, bolalar jumlasidan zaif aholini maqsad qilish va shaxsiy identifikatsiya va shaxsiy hayot tajribalarini tovar sifatida ko'rsatish haqida tartibga solish savollarini ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli reklama etikasi va iste'molchilarni himoya qilish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro marketing va huquq konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Period when a person refrains from using digital electronic devices.
words.example1: She went on a digital detox during her holiday and felt much less stressed.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnologiya va ruhiy salomatlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our HR department introduced digital detox hours to reduce screen fatigue and improve employee focus.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar farovonligi dasturini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Digital detox practices reflect growing awareness of problematic technology use, yet framing the issue as individual behavioral choice obscures the deliberate design of persuasive technology systems engineered to maximize engagement through variable reward mechanisms that exploit psychological vulnerabilities.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli detoks amaliyotlari texnologiyadan muammoli foydalanish haqida o'sib borayotgan xabardorlikni aks ettiradi, ammo masalani individual xulqiy tanlov sifatida ko'rsatish psixologik zaifliklarni ekspluatatsiya qiladigan o'zgaruvchan mukofot mexanizmlari orqali jalb qilishni maksimallashtirish uchun mo'ljallangan ishontiruvchi texnologiya tizimlarining ataylab dizaynini yashiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz texnologiya dizayni etikasi va raqamli farovonlik siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ruhiy salomatlik va texnologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Content created by users of an online platform.
words.example1: User-generated content like reviews and comments helps other customers make decisions.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqamli iste'molchi xulq-atvori haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our platform encourages user-generated content by rewarding contributors with early access to new features.
words.example2Situation: Siz platformangizning kontent strategiyasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: User-generated content has transformed media production economics by enabling platforms to build enormously valuable content libraries at near-zero cost, raising unresolved questions about creator compensation, intellectual property ownership, and the labor conditions of those whose contributions generate platform revenue without corresponding remuneration.
words.example3Translation: Foydalanuvchi tomonidan yaratilgan kontent platformalarga deyarli nol xarajatda nihoyatda qimmatli kontent kutubxonalari yaratishga imkon berish orqali media ishlab chiqarish iqtisodiyotini o'zgartirdi, ijodkorlar kompensatsiyasi, intellektual mulkka egalik va tegishli haq to'lamasdan platforma daromadi yaratiladigan hissalari bo'yicha hal qilinmagan savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli mehnat huquqlari va platforma iqtisodiyoti siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro texnologiya va iqtisodiyot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: False or inaccurate information spread regardless of intent to deceive.
words.example1: Misinformation about vaccines spread quickly on social media during the pandemic.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqamli savodxonlik va ma'lumot ishonchliligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization launched a fact-checking initiative to counter misinformation about public health on social platforms.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning jamoat salomatligi kommunikatsiyasi tashabbuslarini moliyalashtiruvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Misinformation spreads faster and further than accurate information on social platforms because it tends to provoke stronger emotional responses, exploit cognitive biases, and align with existing beliefs, making technical fact-checking insufficient without addressing the underlying platform incentive structures that amplify emotionally engaging falsehoods.
words.example3Translation: Noto'g'ri ma'lumot ijtimoiy platformalarda aniq ma'lumotdan tezroq va uzoqroq tarqaladi, chunki u kuchiroq hissiy reaktsiyalarni qo'zg'atadi, kognitiv tarafkashliklardan foydalanadi va mavjud e'tiqodlarga mos keladi, bu hissiy jalb qiluvchi yolg'onlarni kuchaytiruvchi platforma rag'bat tuzilmalarini hal qilmasdan texnik faktlarni tekshirishni yetarli bo'lmasdek qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz dezinformatsiya va raqamli jamoat salomatligi kommunikatsiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro media va demokratiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Anxiety that others are experiencing events one is not part of, often aroused by social media.
words.example1: Constantly checking social media feeds can increase FOMO and anxiety.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy media va ruhiy salomatlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our wellness program addresses FOMO by teaching employees to set healthy boundaries with social media use.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning raqamli farovonlik dasturini xodimlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: FOMO, amplified by social media's curated presentation of idealized experiences, drives compulsive platform engagement that correlates with reduced life satisfaction and increased anxiety, particularly among adolescents whose identity formation processes make them especially vulnerable to social comparison and peer validation seeking.
words.example3Translation: Ideallashtiirilgan tajribalarning tanlab taqdim etilishi orqali ijtimoiy media tomonidan kuchaytirilgan qolib ketish qo'rquvi hayotdan qoniqishning kamayishi va tashvishning ortishi bilan bog'liq kompulsiv platforma jalb qilishni harakatga keltiradi, ayniqsa identifikatsiyani shakllantirish jarayonlari ularni ijtimoiy taqqoslash va tengdoshlar tomonidan tasdiqlash izlashga ayniqsa zaif qiladigan o'smirlarda.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy media psixologiyasi va o'smirlar ruhiy salomatligi bo'yicha xalqaro raqamli farovonlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Systematic errors in a computer system that create unfair outcomes.
words.example1: Algorithmic bias in hiring software can unfairly disadvantage certain groups of applicants.
words.example1Situation: Siz sun'iy intellekt etikasi va adolat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our technology team audited our recommendation system to identify and reduce algorithmic bias affecting minority users.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning sun'iy intellekt xavfsizligi va adolat tashabbuslarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Algorithmic bias emerges from historical data that encodes past discrimination, proxy variables that correlate with protected characteristics, and optimization objectives that prioritize aggregate performance over equitable outcomes across subgroups, requiring ongoing auditing, diverse development teams, and regulatory frameworks that mandate fairness accountability.
words.example3Translation: Algoritmik tarafkashlik o'tgan diskriminatsiyani kodlaydigan tarixiy ma'lumotlar, himoyalangan xususiyatlar bilan bog'liq proksi o'zgaruvchilar va kichik guruhlar bo'ylab adolatli natijalarga nisbatan umumiy samaradorlikni ustuvor qo'yuvchi optimizatsiya maqsadlaridan kelib chiqadi, doimiy audit, xilma-xil ishlab chiqish jamoalari va adolat javobgarligini majburiy qiladigan tartibga solish tizimlarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sun'iy intellekt adolati va algoritmik javobgarlik siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro texnologiya va huquq konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: State of being connected or interconnected, especially via technology.
words.example1: Good internet connectivity is now essential for education and remote work.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqamli infratuzilma va tenglik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our telecommunications company is expanding connectivity to rural areas through satellite internet infrastructure.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning raqamli inklyuziya tashabbuslarini hukumat hamkorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Universal connectivity has become a prerequisite for economic participation, educational access, and civic engagement, yet the digital divide persists along lines of income, geography, age, and disability, requiring public investment in infrastructure and digital skills that markets alone will not deliver to underserved communities.
words.example3Translation: Universal ulanganlik iqtisodiy ishtirok, ta'limga kirish va fuqarolik faoliyati uchun zarur shart bo'lib qoldi, ammo raqamli bo'linish daromad, geografiya, yosh va nogironlik bo'yicha davom etmoqda, bu bozorlar yolg'iz xizmat ko'rsatilmagan jamoatlarga yetkazib bera olmaydigan infratuzilma va raqamli ko'nikmalarga davlat sarmoyasini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli tenglik va universal ulanganlik siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro telekommunikatsiya va rivojlanish konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Practice of monitoring and applying rules to user-generated content.
words.example1: Content moderation helps prevent hate speech and harmful material from spreading online.
words.example1Situation: Siz onlayn xavfsizlik va platforma javobgarligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our platform invested heavily in content moderation tools and human reviewers to meet new regulatory requirements.
words.example2Situation: Siz platformangizning xavfsizlik va muvofiqlik strategiyasini regulyatorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Content moderation at platform scale requires automated systems that inevitably make errors affecting free expression, disproportionately impacting marginalized communities whose speech patterns are underrepresented in training data, while the outsourcing of human review work to low-wage contractors in developing countries raises serious labor rights concerns.
words.example3Translation: Platforma miqyosida kontent moderatsiyasi erkin ifodaga ta'sir qiladigan xatolar qiluvchi avtomatlashtirilgan tizimlarni talab qiladi, o'qitish ma'lumotlarida yetarlicha taqdim etilmagan nutq namunalariga ega marginallashgan jamoatlarga mutanosib ravishda ta'sir qiladi, rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlardagi past maoshli pudratchilar ishchi kuchiga inson tomonidan ko'rib chiqish ishini autsorsing qilish esa jiddiy mehnat huquqlari tashvishlarini ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz platforma javobgarligi va onlayn kontent tartibga solish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro raqamli huquqlar konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Ability to use, understand, and critically evaluate digital technology.
words.example1: Digital literacy is now as important as reading and writing for young people.
words.example1Situation: Siz ta'lim va texnologiya haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our school district introduced digital literacy programs to help students identify misinformation and use technology responsibly.
words.example2Situation: Siz maktab o'quv dasturi yangilanishlarini ota-onalar va jamoatchilikka taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Digital literacy encompasses not only technical skills but also critical evaluation of information sources, understanding of algorithmic curation, awareness of privacy implications, and the capacity for ethical online participation, making it a foundational competency for democratic citizenship in information-saturated societies.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli savodxonlik nafaqat texnik ko'nikmalarni, balki ma'lumot manbalarini tanqidiy baholash, algoritmik tanlashni tushunish, maxfiylik oqibatlaridan xabardorlik va onlayn ishtirok etishning etik qobiliyatini o'z ichiga oladi, bu uni axborot bilan to'yingan jamiyatlarda demokratik fuqarolik uchun asosiy kompetentsiyaga aylantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli savodxonlik ta'limi va fuqarolik kompetentsiyasi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ta'lim va texnologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Way an individual deliberately presents themselves online.
words.example1: On social media, most people share a self-curated identity that highlights their best moments.
words.example1Situation: Siz onlayn o'zini taqdim etish va haqiqiylik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research explored how professionals manage their self-curated identity on LinkedIn versus personal platforms.
words.example2Situation: Siz raqamli identifikatsiya va kasbiy brending bo'yicha tadqiqot natijalarini akademik auditoriyaga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Self-curated identity on social media creates a systematic gap between performed and lived experience, contributing to social comparison anxiety, imposter syndrome, and authenticity paradoxes where the labor of constructing an appealing online persona can itself undermine the genuine self-expression it purports to represent.
words.example3Translation: Ijtimoiy mediada o'z-o'zini shakllantirgan identifikatsiya ijro etilgan va yashab o'tilgan tajriba o'rtasida tizimli bo'shliq yaratadi, ijtimoiy taqqoslash tashvishi, firibgar sindromi va haqiqiylik paradokslariga hissa qo'shadi, bunda jozibali onlayn persona yaratish mehnati o'zi ifodalashi kerak bo'lgan haqiqiy o'zini ifodani buzishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli identifikatsiya psixologiyasi va ijtimoiy media ta'siri bo'yicha xalqaro ijtimoiy psixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ability to speak two languages fluently.
words.example1: Bilingualism gives children cognitive advantages in problem-solving and multitasking.
words.example1Situation: Siz til o'rganish va kognitiv rivojlanish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company values bilingualism and offers language training to employees working in international markets.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning til rivojlanish dasturini yangi xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Bilingualism confers cognitive advantages including enhanced executive function, delayed onset of dementia symptoms, and greater metalinguistic awareness, while also carrying social and economic capital in globalized labor markets, making it both a personal developmental asset and a structural advantage that correlates with socioeconomic background.
words.example3Translation: Ikki tillilik kuchaytirilgan ijroiya funksiyasi, dementsiya alomatlarining kechiktirilgan boshlanishi va kattaroq metalinguistik xabardorlikni o'z ichiga olgan kognitiv ustunliklarni beradi, shu bilan birga globallashgan mehnat bozorlarida ijtimoiy va iqtisodiy kapital tashiydi, bu uni ham shaxsiy rivojlanish aktiviga, ham ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy fon bilan bog'liq tarkibiy ustunlikka aylantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ikki tillilik va kognitiv rivojlanish bo'yicha xalqaro psixolingvistika konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The natural process of learning a language, especially as a child.
words.example1: Language acquisition in early childhood happens naturally through exposure and interaction.
words.example1Situation: Siz bolalar rivojlanishi va ta'lim haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our language school applies research on language acquisition to design more effective adult learning programs.
words.example2Situation: Siz til o'qitish metodologiyangizni potensial o'quvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Language acquisition research reveals a tension between nativist theories proposing innate grammatical structures and usage-based models emphasizing pattern extraction from input, with implications for pedagogy ranging from explicit grammar instruction to immersive communicative approaches that prioritize meaningful interaction over formal accuracy.
words.example3Translation: Til o'zlashtirish tadqiqotlari tug'ma grammatik tuzilmalarni taklif qiluvchi nativist nazariyalar va kirishdan naqsh chiqarishni ta'kidlovchi foydalanishga asoslangan modellar o'rtasida ziddiyatni ochib beradi, bu formal aniqlik o'rniga mazmunli muloqotni ustuvor qo'yuvchi immersiv kommunikativ yondashuvlargacha bo'lgan aniq grammatika o'qitishdan tortib pedagogik oqibatlarga ega.
words.example3Situation: Siz til o'zlashtirish nazariyasi va ikkinchi til pedagogikasi bo'yicha xalqaro amaliy tilshunoslik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The degree of skill and competence in a language.
words.example1: A high level of linguistic proficiency is required for professional translation work.
words.example1Situation: Siz til ko'nikmalari va kasbiy talablar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company assesses linguistic proficiency using standardized tests before assigning staff to client-facing international roles.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni baholash va xalqaro lavozimga tayinlash jarayonini HR jamoasiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Linguistic proficiency assessments must account for the multidimensional nature of language competence including accuracy, fluency, pragmatic appropriateness, and discourse coherence, recognizing that standardized testing often privileges formal register knowledge over the communicative flexibility required in authentic professional and social contexts.
words.example3Translation: Lingvistik malaka baholash aniqlik, ravonlik, pragmatik muvofiqlik va diskurs izchilligini o'z ichiga olgan til kompetentsiyasining ko'p o'lchamli tabiatini hisobga olishi kerak, standart testlash ko'pincha haqiqiy kasbiy va ijtimoiy kontekstlarda talab qilinadigan kommunikativ moslashuvchanlik o'rniga rasmiy registr bilimini imtiyozga ega qilishini tan oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz til baholash va xalqaro standartlashtirish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro til ta'limi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A method of learning a language by being surrounded by it.
words.example1: She improved her French dramatically after joining an immersion program in Paris.
words.example1Situation: Siz til o'rganish usullari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization sponsors immersion programs abroad for employees who need advanced language skills for international assignments.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xalqaro kadrlar rivojlanish dasturini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Immersion programs accelerate language acquisition by providing comprehensible input across multiple contexts and creating genuine communicative need, though their effectiveness depends heavily on the quality of social integration with native speakers rather than merely physical presence in a target language environment.
words.example3Translation: Til muhitiga to'liq sho'ng'ish dasturlari bir nechta kontekstlar bo'ylab tushunarli kirish ta'minlash va haqiqiy kommunikativ ehtiyoj yaratish orqali til o'zlashtirishni tezlashtiradi, ammo ularning samaradorligi maqsad til muhitida jismoniy mavjudlikdan ko'ra asli so'zlovchilar bilan ijtimoiy integratsiya sifatiga ko'p bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz til o'rganish metodologiyasi va ikkinchi til ta'lim samaradorligi bo'yicha xalqaro ta'lim konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The study of speech sounds and their production.
words.example1: Studying phonetics helps language learners produce sounds more accurately.
words.example1Situation: Siz til o'rganish va talaffuz haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our language training center uses phonetics-based methods to help professionals reduce strong foreign accents.
words.example2Situation: Siz til o'qitish metodologiyangizni korporativ mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Phonetics provides the analytical foundation for understanding cross-linguistic sound differences, informing both second language pedagogy and speech technology development, while also revealing how listeners use contextual information to interpret acoustically ambiguous signals in ways that challenge simple input-output models of speech perception.
words.example3Translation: Fonetika tillararo tovush farqlarini tushunish uchun tahliliy asos ta'minlaydi, ikkinchi til pedagogikasi va nutq texnologiyasi rivojlanishini ma'lumotlantiradi, shu bilan birga tinglovchilar nutq idrokining oddiy kirish-chiqish modellariga shubha soluvchi akustik noaniq signallarni talqin qilish uchun kontekstual ma'lumotdan qanday foydalanishini ochib beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz fonetika tadqiqoti va nutqni qayta ishlash texnologiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro tilshunoslik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The arrangement of words to form grammatical sentences.
words.example1: Understanding syntax helps learners construct correct and natural-sounding sentences.
words.example1Situation: Siz grammatika va til tuzilmasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our curriculum includes explicit syntax instruction to help advanced learners produce complex academic writing.
words.example2Situation: Siz til ta'lim dasturining tuzilmasini akademik auditoriyaga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Syntax represents one of the most theoretically contested domains in linguistics, with generative approaches positing universal underlying structures and functional frameworks emphasizing how syntactic patterns emerge from communicative needs and frequency of use in ways that vary significantly across the world's languages.
words.example3Translation: Sintaksis tilshunoslikda nazariy jihatdan eng ko'p bahslashiladigan sohalardan birini ifodalaydi, generativ yondashuvlar universal asosiy tuzilmalarni postulat qiladi va funksional tizimlar sintaktik naqshlar dunyo tillari bo'ylab sezilarli farq qiladigan kommunikativ ehtiyojlar va foydalanish chastotasidan qanday paydo bo'lishini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sintaksis nazariyasi va universal grammatika bo'yicha xalqaro nazariy tilshunoslik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The process of learning new words and their meanings.
words.example1: Reading widely is one of the most effective strategies for vocabulary acquisition.
words.example1Situation: Siz til o'rganish strategiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our language app uses spaced repetition algorithms to accelerate vocabulary acquisition for business professionals.
words.example2Situation: Siz til ta'lim ilovangizning metodologik yondashuvini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Vocabulary acquisition research distinguishes between incidental learning through exposure and intentional study, finding that deep processing through meaningful use produces more durable retention than rote memorization, and that achieving functional fluency requires acquiring not just word forms but also collocational patterns, pragmatic constraints, and register-appropriate usage.
words.example3Translation: Lug'at boyligini o'zlashtirish tadqiqotlari ta'sir orqali tasodifiy o'rganish va ataylab o'qish o'rtasini farqlaydi, mazmunli foydalanish orqali chuqur qayta ishlash yodlab olishdan ko'ra mustahkamroq eslab qolishni ta'minlashini aniqlaydi va funksional ravonlikka erishish nafaqat so'z shakllarini, balki kollokatsion naqshlarni, pragmatik cheklovlarni va registrga mos foydalanishni ham o'zlashtirishni talab qilishini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz lug'at o'rgatish metodologiyasi va ikkinchi til ta'limidagi leksik rivojlanish bo'yicha xalqaro amaliy tilshunoslik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Difficulties in communication due to speaking different languages.
words.example1: The language barrier made it difficult for the refugee family to access healthcare services.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy integratsiya va til haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our international team uses translation tools and visual aids to overcome language barriers in cross-cultural projects.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro loyiha jamoasining kommunikatsiya strategiyasini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Language barriers in healthcare, legal, and educational settings can produce serious equity consequences, as limited proficiency prevents individuals from fully exercising their rights, understanding risks, and accessing services, requiring institutional investment in professional interpretation services rather than reliance on family members or informal intermediaries.
words.example3Translation: Sog'liqni saqlash, huquqiy va ta'lim muhitlaridagi til to'siqlari jiddiy tenglik oqibatlarini keltirib chiqarishi mumkin, chunki cheklangan malaka shaxslarga o'z huquqlarini to'liq amalga oshirishga, xavflarni tushunishga va xizmatlarga kirishga to'sqinlik qiladi, oila a'zolari yoki norasmiy vositachilarga tayanish o'rniga professional tarjima xizmatlarига institutsiоnal investitsiyalarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ko'p madaniyatli xizmat ko'rsatish va til kirish tenglik siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ijtimoiy tenglik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The process of modifying one's foreign accent.
words.example1: Many non-native speakers pursue accent reduction to improve professional communication.
words.example1Situation: Siz kasbiy kommunikatsiya va til ko'nikmalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our corporate training program offers accent reduction coaching to international staff in client-facing roles.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xalqaro xodimlar uchun kasbiy rivojlanish dasturini HR jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Accent reduction training raises complex questions about linguistic discrimination and cultural identity, as pressure on non-native speakers to conform to dominant accent norms reflects sociolinguistic power hierarchies rather than objective intelligibility requirements, potentially reinforcing inequities that disadvantage speakers from lower-status language backgrounds.
words.example3Translation: Aksent kamaytirish treningi lingvistik kamsitish va madaniy identifikatsiya haqida murakkab savollarni ko'taradi, chunki ona tili bo'lmagan so'zlovchilarga dominant aksent normalariga muvofiq kelish bosimi ob'ektiv tushunilish talablari o'rniga sosiolingvistik kuch ierarxiyalarini aks ettiradi va past maqomli til fonidagi so'zlovchilarga zarar beruvchi tengsizliklarni mustahkamlashi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz sosiolingvistika va til kamsitish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro tilshunoslik va ijtimoiy tenglik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ability to speak several languages.
words.example1: Multilingualism is a valued skill in international organisations and diplomatic services.
words.example1Situation: Siz global kasbiy ko'nikmalar va til haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our consultancy promotes multilingualism by hiring staff from diverse linguistic backgrounds and offering translation support.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning xilma-xillik va inklyuziya strategiyasini yangi hamkorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Multilingualism is the global norm rather than the exception, with the majority of the world's population speaking more than one language, yet monolingual ideologies in many nation-states continue to frame linguistic diversity as a problem requiring assimilation rather than a resource to be leveraged for educational and social benefit.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p tillilik dunyo aholisining ko'pchiligi bir nechta tilni gaplashishi bilan global me'yor hisoblanadi, istisnо emas, ammo ko'plab millat-davlatlarning bir tilli mafkuralari lingvistik xilma-xillikni ta'lim va ijtimoiy foyda uchun ishlatish resursi sifatida emas, balki assimilatsiyani talab qiluvchi muammo sifatida ko'rsatishni davom ettirmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz ko'p tilli ta'lim siyosati va lingvistik xilma-xillik bo'yicha xalqaro ta'lim va tilshunoslik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The loss of language ability over time.
words.example1: Language attrition can happen when a person stops using their native language regularly.
words.example1Situation: Siz til va emigratsiya haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our language institute offers refresher programs for returnees experiencing language attrition after years abroad.
words.example2Situation: Siz til ta'lim institutingizning xizmatlarini potensial o'quvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Language attrition research demonstrates that even highly proficient speakers can experience measurable decline in first language competence under conditions of reduced use and dominant second language exposure, with lexical retrieval and morphosyntactic accuracy typically showing the earliest signs of attrition.
words.example3Translation: Til ko'nikmalarining yo'qolishi tadqiqotlari hatto yuqori malakali so'zlovchilar ham kamaygan foydalanish va dominant ikkinchi til ta'siri sharoitida birinchi til kompetentsiyasida o'lchov mumkin bo'lgan pasayishni boshdan kechirishi mumkinligini ko'rsatadi, leksik qidirish va morfosintaktik aniqlik odatda yo'qolishning dastlabki belgilarini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz birinchi til yo'qolishi va ikki tilli kognitiv jarayon bo'yicha xalqaro psixolingvistika konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ability to use language appropriately in different social contexts.
words.example1: Communicative competence goes beyond grammar to include knowing when and how to speak.
words.example1Situation: Siz til ko'nikmalari va ijtimoiy muloqot haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our business English program focuses on developing communicative competence for negotiations and professional presentations.
words.example2Situation: Siz til ta'lim dasturingizning amaliy faydalarini korporativ mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Communicative competence integrates grammatical, sociolinguistic, discourse, and strategic knowledge, recognizing that effective communication requires not only structural accuracy but also pragmatic appropriateness, cultural sensitivity, and the ability to manage communication breakdowns through repair and negotiation strategies.
words.example3Translation: Kommunikativ kompetentsiya grammatik, sosiolingvistik, diskurs va strategik bilimlarni birlashtiradi, samarali muloqot nafaqat tarkibiy aniqlikni, balki pragmatik muvofiqlikni, madaniy sezgirlikni va tuzatish va muzokarа strategiyalari orqali kommunikatsiya buzilishlarini boshqarish qobiliyatini ham talab qilishini tan oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kommunikativ til o'qitish va pragmatik kompetentsiya rivojlanishi bo'yicha xalqaro til pedagogikasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The language a learner is aiming to acquire.
words.example1: Spending time in a country where the target language is spoken accelerates learning.
words.example1Situation: Siz til o'rganish strategiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our language school encourages students to use the target language exclusively during class sessions.
words.example2Situation: Siz til maktabingizning o'qitish yondashuvini yangi o'quvchilarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The role of the target language in classroom instruction remains debated, with research suggesting that judicious use of the learner's first language can support comprehension and reduce anxiety while excessive first language use undermines the communicative immersion conditions that accelerate acquisition.
words.example3Translation: Sinf o'qitishida maqsad tilning roli bahslashilmoqda, tadqiqotlar o'quvchining birinchi tilini oqilona ishlatish tushunishni qo'llab-quvvatlashi va tashvishni kamaytirishi mumkinligini ko'rsatadi, haddan tashqari birinchi til foydalanish esa o'zlashtirishni tezlashtiruvchi kommunikativ sho'ng'ish sharoitlarini buzadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sinf tilidan foydalanish siyosati va ikkinchi til ta'lim samaradorligi bo'yicha xalqaro til ta'limi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The method and practice of teaching languages.
words.example1: Modern language pedagogy emphasizes communication over memorization of grammar rules.
words.example1Situation: Siz til o'qitish usullari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our teacher training program equips educators with evidence-based language pedagogy strategies for diverse classroom contexts.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'qituvchilar tayyorlash dasturingizni ta'lim vazirligi vakillariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Language pedagogy has evolved from grammar-translation and audiolingual methods toward communicative and task-based approaches, reflecting shifting understandings of how languages are acquired, though practitioners often navigate tensions between learner preferences for explicit instruction and research evidence favoring implicit learning through meaningful use.
words.example3Translation: Til pedagogikasi grammatika-tarjima va audiolingual usullardan kommunikativ va vazifaga asoslangan yondashuvlarga qarab rivojlandi, tillarning qanday o'zlashtirilishini o'zgaruvchan tushunishlarni aks ettiradi, ammo amaliyotchilar ko'pincha o'quvchilarning aniq o'qitishga bo'lgan afzalliklari va mazmunli foydalanish orqali yashirin o'rganishni qo'llab-quvvatlovchi tadqiqot dalillari o'rtasidagi ziddiyatlarni boshqaradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz til o'qitish metodologiyasi va ikkinchi til ta'lim innovatsiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro amaliy tilshunoslik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A particular form of a language specific to a region or social group.
words.example1: The local dialect includes words and pronunciations not found in standard speech.
words.example1Situation: Siz til xilma-xilligi va madaniy meros haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sociolinguistics research team is documenting endangered dialects before they disappear from living use.
words.example2Situation: Siz tilshunoslik tadqiqot loyihangizni moliyalashtiruvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Dialects represent linguistically complete systems rather than deficient versions of standard languages, yet dialect speakers in educational and professional settings frequently face discrimination based on accent and variety, reflecting social hierarchies that conflate linguistic difference with cognitive or educational deficit in ways that research consistently refutes.
words.example3Translation: Shevalar standart tillarning yetarli bo'lmagan versiyalari o'rniga lingvistik jihatdan to'liq tizimlarni ifodalaydi, ammo ta'lim va kasbiy muhitlardagi sheva so'zlovchilari ko'pincha aksent va navga asoslangan kamsitishga duch keladi, bu lingvistik farqni kognitiv yoki ta'lim kamchiligi bilan aralashtiradigan ijtimoiy ierarxiyalarni aks ettiradi va tadqiqotlar buni izchil rad etadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sosiolingvistika va sheva kamsitish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro tilshunoslik va ijtimoiy tenglik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A change in the structure of a population, especially age structure.
words.example1: The demographic shift toward an older population is affecting pension systems worldwide.
words.example1Situation: Siz demografiya va ijtimoiy siyosat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our government agency is developing strategies to manage the economic consequences of the demographic shift in our country.
words.example2Situation: Siz milliy demografik siyosat rejasini parlament qo'mitasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The demographic shift toward population ageing across developed and many developing economies creates simultaneous pressures on pension systems, healthcare expenditure, and labor supply, requiring coordinated policy responses that balance intergenerational equity, fiscal sustainability, and social cohesion.
words.example3Translation: Rivojlangan va ko'plab rivojlanayotgan iqtisodiyotlarda aholining qarishiga yo'naltirilgan demografik o'zgarish pensiya tizimlari, sog'liqni saqlash xarajatlari va mehnat ta'minotiga bir vaqtda bosim yaratadi, avlodlararo tenglik, fiskal barqarorlik va ijtimoiy uyushqoqlikni muvozanatlashtiruvchi muvofiq siyosat javoblarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz aholi qarishi va ijtimoiy xavfsizlik tizimlarini isloh qilish bo'yicha xalqaro demografiya va ijtimoiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A government or organizational plan providing income to retired people.
words.example1: Many countries are reforming their pension system to cope with an ageing population.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy xavfsizlik va iqtisodiy siyosat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company offers a defined contribution pension system that allows employees to build retirement savings with matched employer contributions.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar nafaqa imtiyozlari dasturini yangi xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Pension system sustainability depends on the ratio of contributors to beneficiaries, asset return assumptions, and benefit levels, making demographic ageing particularly challenging for pay-as-you-go systems that rely on current worker contributions to fund current retiree benefits without pre-funded reserves.
words.example3Translation: Pensiya tizimining barqarorligi hissachilar va foydalanuvchilar nisbatiga, aktiv daromad taxminlariga va nafaqa darajalariga bog'liq, bu demografik qarishni oldindan mablag' bilan ta'minlangan zahiralar bo'lmagan holda joriy pensionerlar imtiyozlarini moliyalash uchun joriy ishchi hissalariga tayanadigan to'lov-siz-bor tizimlar uchun ayniqsa qiyin qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz pensiya tizimi islohoti va uzoq muddatli fiskal barqarorlik bo'yicha xalqaro ijtimoiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The average number of years a person is expected to live.
words.example1: Life expectancy has increased significantly due to improvements in healthcare and nutrition.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liqni saqlash va ijtimoiy rivojlanish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our insurance company adjusts its products based on updated life expectancy data from national health statistics.
words.example2Situation: Siz sug'urta kompaniyangizning aktuariya bazasini manfaatdor tomonlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Life expectancy gains mask significant inequalities across socioeconomic groups, with differences of a decade or more between the wealthiest and most deprived populations, reflecting how income, housing, occupation, and access to healthcare shape biological ageing in ways that challenge purely medical explanations of longevity.
words.example3Translation: Umr ko'rish davomiyligi o'sishi ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy guruhlar bo'ylab sezilarli tengsizliklarni yashiradi, eng boy va eng kambag'al aholiyat o'rtasida o'n yil va undan ko'p farqlar bilan, daromad, uy-joy, kasb va sog'liqni saqlashga kirish biologik qarishni qanday shakllantirishi umr ko'rish uzunligining sof tibbiy tushuntirishlariga shubha soladigan tarzda ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy tengsizlik va sog'liq natijalari bo'yicha xalqaro jamoat salomatligi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Medical and personal care for elderly people.
words.example1: Geriatric care requires specialized training to address the complex needs of older patients.
words.example1Situation: Siz keksa yoshdagi bemorlarni parvarishlash haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our hospital expanded its geriatric care department to meet rising demand from an ageing local population.
words.example2Situation: Siz kasalxonangizning strategik rivojlanish rejasini boshqaruv kengashiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Geriatric care faces growing demand alongside persistent workforce shortages, funding pressures, and the challenge of delivering person-centered care to patients with complex comorbidities, cognitive impairment, and social isolation within systems designed primarily for acute episodic rather than longitudinal relationship-based care.
words.example3Translation: Geriatrik parvarishlash doimiy ishchi kuchi tanqisligi, moliyalashtirish bosimi va asosan uzoq muddatli munosabatga asoslangan emas, balki o'tkir epizodik parvarishlash uchun mo'ljallangan tizimlarda murakkab birgalikdagi kasalliklar, kognitiv buzilish va ijtimoiy yolg'izlik bilan bemorlarni shaxsga yo'naltirilgan parvarishlash etkazish muammosi bilan bir vaqtda o'sib borayotgan talabga duch keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz geriatrik tibbiyot va keksa yoshdagilarni parvarishlash tizimi islohoti bo'yicha xalqaro sog'liqni saqlash konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ratio of non-working to working-age people in a population.
words.example1: A rising dependency ratio puts more pressure on working-age people to support the elderly.
words.example1Situation: Siz demografiya va iqtisodiy barqarorlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our government is using immigration policy to manage the rising dependency ratio caused by declining birth rates.
words.example2Situation: Siz milliy demografik siyosat strategiyasini parlament qo'mitasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The dependency ratio as an economic metric has limitations as it treats all non-working age individuals as burdens rather than recognizing the productive contributions of older adults as carers, volunteers, and consumers, and fails to account for productivity improvements that can sustain living standards with fewer workers.
words.example3Translation: Iqtisodiy ko'rsatkich sifatida qaramlik koeffitsienti cheklangan, chunki u ishchi yoshdagi bo'lmagan barcha shaxslarni yuklama sifatida ko'rib chiqadi, keksa kattallarning parvarish qiluvchilar, ko'ngillilar va iste'molchilar sifatidagi samarali hissalarini tan olmaydi va kamroq ishchi bilan turmush darajasini qo'llab-quvvatlashi mumkin bo'lgan unumdorlik yaxshilanishlarini hisobga olmaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz demografik iqtisodiyot va qarishga javob siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ijtimoiy demografiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The increasing average age of employed people in an economy.
words.example1: Companies must adapt their workplace policies to retain an ageing workforce.
words.example1Situation: Siz inson resurslari boshqaruvi va demografiya haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our HR strategy includes flexible retirement options and retraining programs to support our ageing workforce.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning uzoq muddatli kadrlar strategiyasini boshqaruv kengashiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Managing an ageing workforce requires organizational strategies that leverage experience and institutional knowledge while addressing age-related health needs, supporting transitions between full-time work and retirement, and combating ageist assumptions that associate older workers with reduced adaptability or technological competence.
words.example3Translation: Qarayotgan ishchi kuchini boshqarish tajriba va institutsional bilimdan foydalangan holda yosh bilan bog'liq sog'liq ehtiyojlarini hal qiladigan, to'liq vaqtli ish va nafaqa o'rtasidagi o'tishlarni qo'llab-quvvatlaydigan va keksa ishchilarni kamaygan moslashuvchanlik yoki texnologik kompetentsiya bilan bog'laydigan yoshga oid taxminlarga qarshi turadigan tashkiliy strategiyalarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mehnat bozori qarishi va ish joyi siyosati islohoti bo'yicha xalqaro iqtisodiyot va ish kuchi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Economic opportunities arising from the spending power of older people.
words.example1: The silver economy is growing as more older consumers demand specialized products and services.
words.example1Situation: Siz bozor tendentsiyalari va demografiya haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is developing products specifically for the silver economy, targeting consumers aged sixty and above.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yangi bozor segmenti strategiyasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The silver economy represents a significant and underserved market opportunity, as older consumers command substantial disposable income and seek products addressing longevity, health, independence, and social connection, yet many industries continue to design for younger demographics and underestimate the purchasing power and preferences of ageing populations.
words.example3Translation: Kumush iqtisodiyot katta va xizmat ko'rsatilmagan bozor imkoniyatini ifodalaydi, chunki keksa iste'molchilar katta sarflanadigan daromadga ega va uzoq umr ko'rish, sog'liq, mustaqillik va ijtimoiy aloqani hal qiluvchi mahsulotlar qidiradi, ammo ko'plab sanoatlar yosh demografik ko'rsatkichlar uchun loyihalashtirishni davom ettiradi va qarayotgan aholining xarid quvvati va afzalliklarini past baholaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qarishning iqtisodiy imkoniyatlari va kumush iqtisodiyot innovatsiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro biznes va demografiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Cooperation and support between different age groups.
words.example1: Intergenerational solidarity programmes pair elderly residents with young volunteers for mutual support.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy hamjihatlik va jamoat rivojlanishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our foundation funds intergenerational solidarity projects that bring together young and elderly people in shared community activities.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamg'armangizning ijtimoiy ta'sir dasturlarini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Intergenerational solidarity is increasingly strained by growing inequalities in wealth, housing access, and economic security between age cohorts, requiring policy responses that address structural generational inequities rather than relying solely on appeals to family obligation or civic virtue.
words.example3Translation: Avlodlararo hamjihatlik yosh kohortalari o'rtasida boylik, uy-joyga kirish va iqtisodiy xavfsizlikdagi o'sib borayotgan tengsizliklar tufayli tobora zo'riqib bormoqda, oilaviy majburiyat yoki fuqarolik fazilati murojaat qilishga faqat tayanish o'rniga tarkibiy avlodlararo tengsizliklarni hal qiluvchi siyosat javoblarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz avlodlararo tenglik va ijtimoiy hamjihatlik siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ijtimoiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Assistance for people with chronic illnesses or disabilities over a long period.
words.example1: Long-term care for elderly people is a growing challenge for families and governments alike.
words.example1Situation: Siz keksa yoshdagilarni parvarishlash va ijtimoiy siyosat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
