words.example2: Our insurance product is designed to cover long-term care costs that standard health insurance policies typically exclude.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi sug'urta mahsulotingizni potensial mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Long-term care systems face a triple challenge of rising demand from ageing populations, chronic underfunding that leaves many needs unmet, and an undervalued and underpaid care workforce whose working conditions undermine the quality and continuity of care that vulnerable individuals require.
words.example3Translation: Uzoq muddatli parvarishlash tizimlari qarayotgan aholidan o'sib borayotgan talab, ko'plab ehtiyojlarni qondirilmaydigan surunkali moliyasizlik va zaif shaxslarga kerak bo'lgan parvarishlash sifati va uzluksizligini buzuvchi ish sharoitiga ega past baholangan va past maoshli parvarishlash ishchi kuchining uch tomonlama muammosiga duch keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz uzoq muddatli parvarishlash moliyalashtirish islohoti va parvarishlash ish kuchi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro sog'liqni saqlash konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Optimizing health, participation, and security as people age.
words.example1: Active ageing policies encourage older people to stay engaged in work and community life.
words.example1Situation: Siz keksa yoshdagilar farovonligi va ijtimoiy siyosat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our local government launched an active ageing initiative offering free fitness classes and digital skills training for retirees.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahalliy ijtimoiy rivojlanish dasturini jamoatchilikka taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Active ageing frameworks, while valuable in promoting positive visions of later life, risk placing excessive responsibility on individuals for health outcomes shaped by lifelong socioeconomic determinants, potentially stigmatizing those whose health limitations reflect structural inequalities rather than personal lifestyle choices.
words.example3Translation: Faol qarish tizimlari keyingi hayot haqida ijobiy tasavvurlarni rag'batlantirishda qimmatli bo'lsa-da, sog'liq natijalari uchun individual shaxslarga haddan tashqari mas'uliyat yuklash xavfiga ega, ularning sog'liq cheklovlari shaxsiy turmush tarzi tanlovi o'rniga tarkibiy tengsizliklarni aks ettiradigan shaxslarni potentsial stigmatizatsiya qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz faol qarish siyosati va keksalik sog'liq tengligi bo'yicha xalqaro gerontologiya va ijtimoiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A graph showing the age and sex distribution of a population.
words.example1: The population pyramid of Japan shows a top-heavy shape reflecting its ageing society.
words.example1Situation: Siz demografik ma'lumotlar va jamiyat o'zgarishlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our policy team used population pyramid projections to model future healthcare and pension demands over the next thirty years.
words.example2Situation: Siz uzoq muddatli demografik prognozlash natijalarini davlat rejalashtirishchi guruhiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Population pyramids have shifted from classic triangular shapes reflecting high birth and death rates to rectangular or inverted forms in post-demographic transition societies, visualizing structural changes that have profound implications for intergenerational wealth transfers, public service design, and labor market composition.
words.example3Translation: Aholi piramidalari demografik o'tishdan keyingi jamiyatlarda yuqori tug'ilish va o'lim darajasini aks ettiruvchi klassik uchburchak shakllardan to'rtburchak yoki teskari shakllarga o'zgardi, avlodlararo boylik o'tkazmalari, davlat xizmatlarini loyihalash va mehnat bozori tarkibi uchun chuqur oqibatlarga ega tarkibiy o'zgarishlarni ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz demografik prognozlash va aholini rivojlantirish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro demografiya va iqtisodiyot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The age at which people typically stop working and claim pensions.
words.example1: Many governments are raising the retirement age to reduce pension costs.
words.example1Situation: Siz nafaqa siyosati va iqtisodiy barqarorlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our HR department updated its flexible retirement age policy to allow employees to transition gradually from full-time work.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning nafaqa va uzoq muddatli ish rejasini xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Retirement age reform is politically contentious because it affects different population subgroups unequally, with workers in physically demanding occupations or with shorter life expectancies bearing disproportionate costs of increases, while longer retirement in cognitively stimulating careers represents a very different experience of extended working life.
words.example3Translation: Nafaqa yoshi islohoti siyosiy jihatdan bahsli, chunki u aholi kichik guruhlarini teng bo'lmagan tarzda ta'sir qiladi, jismoniy talabchan kasblardagi yoki qisqaroq umr ko'rish davomiyligi bo'lgan ishchilar o'sishning mutanosib bo'lmagan xarajatlarini ko'taradi, kognitiv jihatdan rag'batlaydigan kasblarda uzun nafaqa esa uzaytirilgan ish hayotining juda farqli tajribasini ifodalaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz nafaqa tizimi islohoti va kech hayot ish bozori siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ijtimoiy xavfsizlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Designed to be accessible and suitable for older people.
words.example1: The city redesigned its public spaces to be more age-friendly for elderly residents.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar dizayni va ijtimoiy inklyuziya haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our technology team is developing an age-friendly interface to make our application accessible to users with reduced dexterity or vision.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahsulotingizning inklyuziv dizayn strategiyasini ishlab chiqish jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Age-friendly design principles, when applied systematically to built environments, digital interfaces, and service delivery, benefit not only older people but also individuals with disabilities, parents with young children, and anyone navigating environments under stress, demonstrating that universal design serves the full diversity of human capacity.
words.example3Translation: Yoshga qulay dizayn tamoyillari, qurilgan muhitlar, raqamli interfeyslar va xizmat ko'rsatishga tizimli ravishda qo'llanilganda, nafaqat keksa odamlarga, balki nogironligi bo'lgan shaxslarga, yosh bolali ota-onalarga va stress ostida muhitni boshqarayotgan har kimga foyda keltiradi, universal dizayn inson qobiliyatining to'liq xilma-xilligiga xizmat qilishini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz universal dizayn va inklyuziv qurilgan muhit siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro shahar rejalashtirish va aholini rivojlantirish konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The pressure on families or the state to provide care for older people.
words.example1: The elderly care burden falls disproportionately on women who reduce work hours to care for relatives.
words.example1Situation: Siz gender tenglik va parvarishlash siyosati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company introduced elder care leave policies to help employees manage the growing elderly care burden without sacrificing career progression.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar farovonligi va parvarishlash qo'llab-quvvatlash siyosatini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The elderly care burden increasingly falls on informal family caregivers, predominantly women, whose unpaid labor substitutes for inadequate formal care provision and generates significant economic costs through reduced workforce participation, pension accumulation, and lifetime earnings that rarely receive policy recognition commensurate with their social value.
words.example3Translation: Keksalarni parvarishlash yuki tobora ko'proq norasmiy oila parvarish qiluvchilariga, asosan ayollarga tushmoqda, ularning haq to'lanmagan mehnati etarli bo'lmagan rasmiy parvarishlash ta'minotini almashtiradi va kamaygan ish kuchida ishtirok etish, pensiya to'plash va umr bo'yi daromadlar orqali sezilarli iqtisodiy xarajatlar yaratadi, bu ijtimoiy qiymatiga mos siyosat tan olishini kamdan-kam oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz norasmiy parvarishlash tan olish va keksalarni parvarishlash tizimi moliyalashtirish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro gender va ijtimoiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Economic growth resulting from a large working-age population.
words.example1: Countries with a young population can benefit from a demographic dividend if jobs are available.
words.example1Situation: Siz rivojlanayotgan iqtisodiyotlar va demografik imkoniyatlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our development agency is helping governments design policies to capture the demographic dividend before their populations begin to age.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro rivojlanish loyihasining strategik maqsadlarini donor tashkilotlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Realizing the demographic dividend requires investment in education, healthcare, and job creation that enables a large working-age cohort to be productively employed, with countries that fail to create sufficient formal sector opportunities risking social instability rather than growth when youth bulges encounter structural unemployment.
words.example3Translation: Demografik dividendni amalga oshirish katta ishchi yoshdagi kohortni samarali bandligiga imkon beruvchi ta'lim, sog'liqni saqlash va ish joyi yaratishga sarmoya talab qiladi, yetarli rasmiy sektor imkoniyatlarini yaratishda muvaffaqiyatsizlikka uchragan mamlakatlar yoshlar ko'pligi tarkibiy ishsizlikka duch kelganda o'sish o'rniga ijtimoiy beqarorlikni xavf ostiga qo'yadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz demografik dividend va iqtisodiy rivojlanish strategiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro rivojlanish iqtisodiyoti konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The difference in earnings between men and women.
words.example1: The gender pay gap remains significant in most countries despite legal protections.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish joyi tengligi va mehnat huquqlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company published its gender pay gap data and committed to closing it within three years through targeted promotion and pay review processes.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning gender tenglik majburiyatlarini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The gender pay gap reflects both direct discrimination and structural factors including occupational segregation, the motherhood penalty, undervaluation of feminized industries, and differential negotiation norms, requiring comprehensive policy responses that address hiring, promotion, care responsibilities, and sector-level wage setting simultaneously.
words.example3Translation: Gender ish haqi farqi to'g'ridan-to'g'ri kamsitishni ham, kasbiy ajratish, onalik jarima, ayollik sanoatlarini past baholash va differensial muzokarа me'yorlarini o'z ichiga olgan tarkibiy omillarni ham aks ettiradi, bir vaqtda yollash, ko'tarilish, parvarishlash mas'uliyatlari va sektor darajasidagi ish haqi belgilashni hal qiluvchi keng qamrovli siyosat javoblarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mehnat bozori gender tengsizligi va ish joyidagi adolat siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro gender va iqtisodiyot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An invisible barrier preventing women from reaching top positions.
words.example1: Despite strong qualifications, many women hit a glass ceiling when seeking senior leadership roles.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish joyi tengligi va rahbarlikdagi gender dinamikasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization is implementing mentorship programs and blind promotion processes to break the glass ceiling for women in senior management.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning gender tenglik tashabbuslarini boshqaruv kengashiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The glass ceiling operates through a combination of explicit gatekeeping, homosocial reproduction in leadership selection, and cumulative microaggressions that erode women's confidence and networks, making incremental diversity initiatives insufficient without structural changes to how leadership potential is defined and evaluated.
words.example3Translation: Shisha shift aniq eshik qo'riqlash, rahbarlikni tanlashda gomososial ko'paytirish va ayollar ishonchi va tarmoqlarini eroziya qiluvchi kumulyativ mikroagressiyalar kombinatsiyasi orqali ishlaydi, bu qo'shimcha xilma-xillik tashabbuslarini rahbarlik salohiyatini qanday belgilash va baholashga tarkibiy o'zgartirishsiz yetarli bo'lmaydigan qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlikdagi gender tengsizligi va ish joyidagi kuch tuzilmalari bo'yicha xalqaro gender va tashkilot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Oversimplified ideas about how men and women should behave.
words.example1: Gender stereotypes in advertising can reinforce harmful expectations about male and female roles.
words.example1Situation: Siz media ta'siri va gender me'yorlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our school developed a curriculum to challenge gender stereotypes and encourage students of all backgrounds to explore diverse career paths.
words.example2Situation: Siz maktabingizning gender inklyuziv ta'lim tashabbuslarini ota-onalar va jamoatchilikka taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Gender stereotypes are perpetuated through socialization processes, media representation, educational practices, and institutional structures that naturalize culturally contingent behavioral expectations, making their disruption require coordinated intervention across family, school, workplace, and policy domains rather than individual attitude change alone.
words.example3Translation: Gender stereotiplari madaniy jihatdan shartli xulqiy kutishlarni tabiiylashtiruvchi sotsializatsiya jarayonlari, media tasviri, ta'lim amaliyotlari va institutsional tuzilmalar orqali davom ettiriladi, ularni buzish faqat individual munosabatni o'zgartirish o'rniga oila, maktab, ish joyi va siyosat sohalari bo'ylab muvofiq aralashuvni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz gender stereotiplari va ijtimoiy me'yor o'zgarishi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro gender va ta'lim konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Automatic prejudice or stereotypes that affect judgment unconsciously.
words.example1: Unconscious bias in recruitment can lead to qualified candidates being overlooked due to their gender or ethnicity.
words.example1Situation: Siz adolatli yollash amaliyotlari va ish joyi xilma-xilligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company introduced unconscious bias training and structured interview protocols to make our hiring process more equitable.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xilma-xillik va inklyuziya tashabbuslarini HR jamoasiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Unconscious bias training has become a common organizational response to discrimination concerns, yet evidence for its effectiveness in changing behavior is mixed, with critics arguing that awareness training without accompanying structural changes to evaluation processes, accountability mechanisms, and incentive systems produces limited durable impact.
words.example3Translation: Ongsiz tarafkashlik treningi kamsitish tashvishlariga umumiy tashkiliy javobga aylandi, ammo xulq-atvorni o'zgartirishdagi samaradorligi bo'yicha dalillar aralash, tanqidchilar baholash jarayonlari, javobgarlik mexanizmlari va rag'bat tizimlariga hamroh tarkibiy o'zgartirishsiz xabardorlik treningi cheklangan doimiy ta'sir ko'rsatishini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyidagi kamsitish va tashkiliy xilma-xillik aralashuv samaradorligi bo'yicha xalqaro gender va tashkilot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Leave from work granted to fathers after the birth of a child.
words.example1: More companies are offering generous paternal leave to support new fathers and promote gender equality at home.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish joyi siyosati va oilaviy tenglik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company extended paternal leave to twelve weeks to encourage fathers to take an equal role in early childcare.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yangi oilaviy ta'til siyosatini xodimlarga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Generous and non-transferable paternal leave policies, as implemented in Nordic countries, demonstrate that when fathers are incentivized to take substantial leave, it normalizes male caregiving, reduces the motherhood penalty, and contributes to more equitable distributions of domestic labor that persist beyond the leave period.
words.example3Translation: Shimoliy Evropa mamlakatlarida amalga oshirilgan saxiy va o'tkazib bo'lmaydigan otalik ta'tili siyosatlari, otalar katta ta'til olishga rag'batlantirilganda erkak parvarishni normallashtirishi, onalik jarimani kamaytirishi va ta'til davridan tashqarida davom etadigan maishiy mehnatning adolatliroq taqsimlanishiga hissa qo'shishini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz otalik ta'tili siyosati va gender tenglik natijalari bo'yicha xalqaro gender va mehnat siyosati konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Expanding women's capacity to make life choices.
words.example1: Women's empowerment programs in rural areas have increased school enrolment and reduced early marriage rates.
words.example1Situation: Siz gender rivojlanishi va ijtimoiy o'zgarish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our NGO focuses on women's empowerment through microfinance, leadership training, and legal literacy programs in underserved communities.
words.example2Situation: Siz notijorat tashkilotingizning dastur natijalari va ta'sir ko'rsatkichlarini donor tashkilotlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Women's empowerment discourse must navigate the tension between universal rights frameworks and cultural relativism, recognizing that sustainable change requires engaging men, community structures, and institutional systems rather than treating empowerment as an individual behavioral transformation project imposed from outside.
words.example3Translation: Ayollarni kuchaytirish diskursi universal huquqlar tizimlari va madaniy relativizm o'rtasidagi ziddiyatni boshqarishi kerak, barqaror o'zgarish tashqaridan yuklangan individual xulqiy o'zgarish loyihasi sifatida kuchaytirish bilan kurashish o'rniga erkaklar, jamoat tuzilmalari va institutsional tizimlarni jalb qilishni talab qilishini tan oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz gender rivojlanish siyosati va ayollarni kuchaytirish dastur dizayni bo'yicha xalqaro rivojlanish va gender konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Integrating a gender perspective into all policies and programs.
words.example1: Gender mainstreaming ensures that policy decisions consider their different impacts on men and women.
words.example1Situation: Siz siyosat ishlab chiqish va gender tenglik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our development agency applies gender mainstreaming across all projects by conducting gender impact assessments at the design stage.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning gender integratsiya metodologiyasini xalqaro hamkorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Gender mainstreaming represents a shift from targeted women's programs to transforming institutional systems and decision-making processes, but risks becoming a bureaucratic checkbox exercise unless accompanied by genuine political commitment, adequate resources, technical capacity, and accountability mechanisms that enforce gender-responsive outcomes.
words.example3Translation: Genderni asosiy oqimga kiritish maqsadli ayollar dasturlaridan institutsional tizimlar va qaror qabul qilish jarayonlarini o'zgartirishga o'tishni ifodalaydi, ammo haqiqiy siyosiy majburiyat, yetarli resurslar, texnik quvvat va genderga sezgir natijalarni ta'minlovchi javobgarlik mexanizmlari hamrohligi bo'lmasa byurokratik belgilash mashqiga aylanib qolish xavfi bor.
words.example3Situation: Siz gender mainstreaming amaliyoti va institutsional gender o'zgarish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro gender va boshqaruv konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A significant difference between genders, often in opportunities or treatment.
words.example1: Gender disparity in STEM education begins in secondary school and widens at university level.
words.example1Situation: Siz ta'lim va gender tenglik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research found significant gender disparity in performance review scores despite equal competency assessments.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR tadqiqot natijalarini ish joyi adolat qo'mitasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Gender disparity in political representation persists across most democracies due to structural barriers including campaign finance requirements, party gatekeeping, hostile media coverage, and care responsibilities that disproportionately constrain women's candidacy, requiring systemic reforms beyond voluntary diversity commitments.
words.example3Translation: Siyosiy vakillikdagi gender tengsizligi kampaniya moliyasi talablari, partiya eshik qo'riqlash, dushman media qamrovi va ayollar nomzodligini mutanosib ravishda cheklovchi parvarishlash mas'uliyatlarini o'z ichiga olgan tarkibiy to'siqlar tufayli ko'pchilik demokratiyalarda davom etmoqda, ixtiyoriy xilma-xillik majburiyatlaridan tashqari tizimli islohotlarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz gender va siyosiy ishtirok siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro demokratiya va gender konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The proportion of women in positions of power or influence.
words.example1: Female representation on corporate boards has increased but remains below parity in most sectors.
words.example1Situation: Siz korporativ boshqaruv va gender tenglik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our industry association launched a campaign to improve female representation in senior technical and leadership roles.
words.example2Situation: Siz sanoat xilma-xillik tashabbusini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Female representation in leadership positions generates measurable organizational benefits including improved decision quality, risk management, and financial performance, yet barriers persist due to cultural norms around leadership style, sponsorship gaps, and the double bind where women face criticism for exhibiting both traditionally feminine and assertive behaviors.
words.example3Translation: Rahbarlik lavozimlaridagi ayollar vakilligi qaror sifati, risk boshqaruvi va moliyaviy samaradorlikni o'z ichiga olgan o'lchov mumkin bo'lgan tashkiliy foydalar keltiradi, ammo to'siqlar rahbarlik uslubi atrofidagi madaniy me'yorlar, homiylik bo'shliqlari va ayollar an'anaviy ayolcha ham, qat'iy xulq-atvorni ham namoyon etgani uchun tanqidga uchragan ikki tomonlama majburiyat tufayli davom etmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ rahbarlik gender xilma-xilligi va tashkiliy samaradorlik bo'yicha xalqaro biznes va gender konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Cultural norms that associate masculinity with dominance, aggression, and stoicism.
words.example1: Toxic masculinity discourages men from seeking help for mental health problems.
words.example1Situation: Siz gender me'yorlari va ruhiy salomatlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our workplace wellness program addresses toxic masculinity by creating safe spaces for men to discuss stress and emotional wellbeing.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning gender inklyuziv farovonlik dasturini xodimlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Toxic masculinity describes not masculinity itself but specific harmful cultural scripts that pressure men to suppress vulnerability, demonstrate dominance, and avoid help-seeking, producing negative outcomes for men's health, relationship quality, and workplace behavior while contributing to broader patterns of gender-based violence and inequality.
words.example3Translation: Toksik maskulinlik maskulinlikning o'zini emas, balki erkaklar zaiflikni bostirish, ustunlikni namoyish etish va yordam so'rashdan qochishga bosim qiladigan o'ziga xos zararli madaniy skriptlarni tasvirlaydi, erkaklar sog'ligi, munosabat sifati va ish joyi xulq-atvori uchun salbiy natijalar beradi va genderga asoslangan zo'ravonlik va tengsizlikning keng naqshlariga hissa qo'shadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz maskulinlik me'yorlari va gender asosli zo'ravonlik profilaktikasi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro gender va sog'liq konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Minimum number of positions reserved for a particular gender.
words.example1: Several European countries use gender quotas to increase female representation in parliament.
words.example1Situation: Siz siyosiy vakillik va gender tenglik mexanizmlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our board adopted a gender quota requiring at least forty percent representation of each gender in senior leadership positions.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ boshqaruv islohoti qarorini manfaatdor tomonlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Gender quotas generate significant debate between those who view them as essential correctives to structural barriers that voluntary approaches fail to overcome and those who argue they compromise meritocracy, though evidence consistently shows that qualified candidates exist in abundance and quotas primarily accelerate pipelines rather than lowering standards.
words.example3Translation: Gender kvotalari ularni ixtiyoriy yondashuvlar engib o'ta olmaydigan tarkibiy to'siqlarga zaruriy tuzatuvchi vosita sifatida ko'radiganlar va ular meritokratiyani buzadi deb ta'kidlaganlar o'rtasida sezilarli bahsni keltirib chiqaradi, ammo dalillar izchil ravishda malakali nomzodlar mo'l-ko'l mavjudligini va kvotalar asosan standartlarni tushirish o'rniga quvurlarni tezlashtirishini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz gender kvotasi siyosati va vakillik demokratiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro gender va siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Equilibrium between professional work and personal/family life.
words.example1: Poor work-life balance leads to burnout and reduced productivity over time.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish joyi farovonligi va unumdorlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company redesigned its policies to improve work-life balance through flexible hours, remote work options, and mandatory leave.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yangilangan xodimlar farovonligi siyosatini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Work-life balance discourse often obscures how the burden of managing the boundary between paid work and unpaid care falls disproportionately on women, making individual flexibility policies insufficient without structural changes to care infrastructure, parental leave policies, and workplace cultures that penalize caregiving roles.
words.example3Translation: Ish-hayot muvozanati diskursi ko'pincha haq to'lanadigan ish va haq to'lanmaydigan parvarishlash o'rtasidagi chegarani boshqarish yukining ayollarga mutanosib ravishda qanday tushishini yashiradi, bu individual moslashuvchanlik siyosatlarini parvarishlash infratuzilmasi, ota-ona ta'tili siyosatlari va parvarishlash rollarini jazolaydigan ish joyi madaniyatlariga tarkibiy o'zgartirishsiz yetarli bo'lmagan qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyi moslashuvchanligi va gender tenglik natijalari bo'yicha xalqaro mehnat va gender siyosati konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Not associated with either gender; applicable to all.
words.example1: The company introduced gender-neutral job titles to create a more inclusive workplace.
words.example1Situation: Siz inklyuziv ish joyi siyosati va til haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our school updated its uniform policy to be gender-neutral, allowing all students to choose the clothing they feel most comfortable in.
words.example2Situation: Siz maktab inklyuzivlik siyosatini ota-onalar va o'quvchilarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Gender-neutral policy design reduces the risk of inadvertently embedding gendered assumptions into public services, yet requires careful analysis to avoid false neutrality that ignores existing inequalities, as treating structurally unequal groups identically can perpetuate rather than reduce disparity.
words.example3Translation: Gendersiz siyosat dizayni davlat xizmatlariga tasodifan gender taxminlarini kiritish xavfini kamaytiradi, ammo mavjud tengsizliklarni e'tiborsiz qoldiruvchi yolg'on neytrallikdan qochish uchun ehtiyotkor tahlil talab qiladi, chunki tarkibiy jihatdan teng bo'lmagan guruhlarni bir xil darajada ko'rib chiqish tafovutni kamaytirish o'rniga davom ettirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz gendersiz siyosat dizayni va inklyuziv boshqaruv bo'yicha xalqaro gender va davlat siyosati konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Social systems and attitudes where men hold primary power.
words.example1: Patriarchal norms can limit women's access to education and economic opportunities.
words.example1Situation: Siz gender kuchi tuzilmalari va ijtimoiy o'zgarish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our development program works to challenge patriarchal norms by engaging male community leaders in gender equality advocacy.
words.example2Situation: Siz rivojlanish dasturingizning gender transformatsiya metodologiyasini xalqaro hamkorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Patriarchal norms are reproduced through everyday practices, institutional structures, and cultural narratives that naturalize male authority, making their transformation require not only legal reform and women's empowerment but also engagement with men and boys to reconstruct masculinity norms in ways that support rather than resist gender equality.
words.example3Translation: Patriarxal me'yorlar erkaklar vakolatini tabiiylashtiruvchi kundalik amaliyotlar, institutsional tuzilmalar va madaniy rivoyatlar orqali takrorlanadi, ularni o'zgartirish nafaqat huquqiy islohotni va ayollarni kuchaytirni, balki gender tengligiga qarshilik ko'rsatish o'rniga qo'llab-quvvatlash yo'lida maskulinlik me'yorlarini qayta tuzish uchun erkaklar va o'g'il bolalar bilan munosabatni ham talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz patriarxal tuzilmalar va gender transformatsiya strategiyalari bo'yicha xalqaro gender va rivojlanish konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The interconnected nature of social categories like race, class, and gender.
words.example1: Intersectionality helps explain why women of colour face unique barriers that neither race nor gender analysis alone can capture.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy tenglik va kuch tuzilmalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization applies an intersectionality framework to ensure our inclusion programs address the compound disadvantages faced by women from minority backgrounds.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning xilma-xillik va inklyuziya strategiyasini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Intersectionality as an analytical framework reveals how gender discrimination cannot be understood in isolation from race, class, disability, sexuality, and other axes of identity, demonstrating that policies designed for the average woman systematically fail those facing compounded marginalization at the intersection of multiple subordinated identities.
words.example3Translation: Tahliliy tizim sifatida kesishuvchilik gender kamsitishni irq, sinf, nogironlik, jinsiy yo'nalish va identifikatsiяning boshqa o'qlaridan alohida holda tushunib bo'lmasligini ochib beradi, o'rtacha ayol uchun mo'ljallangan siyosatlar bir nechta qo'shimcha identifikatsiya kesishmasida murakkab marjinallashtirish bilan duch kelayotganlarni tizimli ravishda mag'lub qilishini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kesishuvchilik tahlili va qo'shma kamsitishga qarshi siyosat bo'yicha xalqaro gender va ijtimoiy tenglik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The shift from fossil fuels to renewable energy sources.
words.example1: The energy transition is creating new jobs in solar and wind industries.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqlim siyosati va yashil iqtisodiyot haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our energy company is investing heavily in the energy transition by retiring coal plants and expanding renewable capacity.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning uzoq muddatli barqarorlik strategiyasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The energy transition requires simultaneous transformation of generation, storage, transmission, and end-use systems, creating complex coordination challenges across technologies, markets, and institutions while managing distributional consequences for fossil fuel workers, communities, and energy-importing developing economies.
words.example3Translation: Energetika o'tishi avlod, saqlash, uzatish va oxirgi foydalanish tizimlarining bir vaqtda o'zgarishini talab qiladi, qazib olinadigan yoqilg'i ishchilari, jamoatlar va energiya import qiluvchi rivojlanayotgan iqtisodiyotlar uchun taqsimlovchi oqibatlarni boshqarish bilan texnologiyalar, bozorlar va institutlar bo'ylab murakkab muvofiq muammolarni yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz energetika o'tishi siyosati va iqlim moliyalashtirish mexanizmlari bo'yicha xalqaro energetika va iqlim konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Achieving net-zero carbon emissions by balancing emissions with removal.
words.example1: The airline aims to become carbon-neutral by offsetting all its flights by 2030.
words.example1Situation: Siz korporativ barqarorlik majburiyatlari va iqlim maqsadlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company achieved carbon-neutral status by combining deep emission reductions with verified carbon offset purchases.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning barqarorlik yutuqlarini manfaatdor tomonlar hisobotida taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Carbon-neutral claims require scrutiny of whether they represent genuine emission reductions or primarily offset purchases, as high-quality carbon removal at the scale required to meet climate targets remains technically and economically challenging, making net-zero pathways that delay abatement in favor of future offsets scientifically questionable.
words.example3Translation: Uglerod neytral da'volar ular haqiqiy emissiyalarni kamaytirish yoki asosan ofset xaridlarini ifodalayotganligini tekshirishni talab qiladi, iqlim maqsadlarini bajarish uchun zarur miqyosda yuqori sifatli ugleroddan olib tashlash texnik va iqtisodiy jihatdan qiyin bo'lib qolmoqda, kelajak ofsetlari foydasiga pasaytirishni kechiktiruvchi nol-net yo'llarini ilmiy jihatdan shubhali qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ iqlim majburiyatlari va uglerod ofset sifati standartlari bo'yicha xalqaro iqlim va moliya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Technology that converts sunlight directly into electricity.
words.example1: Solar photovoltaic panels are now one of the cheapest sources of new electricity generation.
words.example1Situation: Siz qayta tiklanadigan energiya texnologiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our factory installed solar photovoltaic panels across its roof to reduce energy costs and meet sustainability targets.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning energiya tejash va barqarorlik investitsiyalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Solar photovoltaic technology has experienced extraordinary cost reductions driven by manufacturing scale, technical improvements, and supply chain development, becoming the cheapest electricity source in history in many markets, yet grid integration at high penetration levels requires complementary storage, grid flexibility, and demand response solutions.
words.example3Translation: Quyosh fotoelektrik texnologiyasi ishlab chiqarish miqyosi, texnik yaxshilanishlar va ta'minot zanjiri rivojlanishi tomonidan harakatga keltirilgan favqulodda narx qisqarishlarini boshdan kechirdi, ko'plab bozorlarda tarixdagi eng arzon elektr energiyasi manbasiga aylandi, ammo yuqori kirib borish darajasida tarmoqqa integratsiya qilish qo'shimcha saqlash, tarmoq moslashuvchanligi va talab javob echimlarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz quyosh energiyasini joylashtirish siyosati va tarmoqqa integratsiya muammolari bo'yicha xalqaro qayta tiklanadigan energiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Methods of storing energy for later use (e.g., batteries).
words.example1: Energy storage allows solar power generated during the day to be used at night.
words.example1Situation: Siz qayta tiklanadigan energiya tizimlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our utility company is deploying grid-scale energy storage systems to manage peak demand and integrate more renewable generation.
words.example2Situation: Siz energetika kompaniyangizning tarmoq modernizatsiya strategiyasini tartibga soluvchi organlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Energy storage is a critical enabler of high renewable penetration, addressing the temporal mismatch between variable generation and demand, yet current battery technology faces limitations in energy density, duration, materials supply chains, and end-of-life recycling that require continued innovation alongside deployment.
words.example3Translation: Energiya saqlash yuqori qayta tiklanadigan kirib borish imkonini beruvchi muhim omil bo'lib, o'zgaruvchan avlod va talab o'rtasidagi vaqtinchalik nomuvofiqlikni hal qiladi, ammo joriy batareya texnologiyasi energiya zichligi, davomiyligi, materiallar ta'minot zanjirlari va ishlab chiqilgan chiqindilarni qayta ishlashda cheklovlarga duch keladi, bu joylashtirish bilan birga doimiy innovatsiyani talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz energiya saqlash texnologiyalari va qayta tiklanadigan tarmoq integratsiya siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro energetika konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Heat energy generated and stored within the Earth.
words.example1: Iceland uses geothermal energy to heat most of its homes and generate electricity.
words.example1Situation: Siz qayta tiklanadigan energiya manbalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our energy company is exploring geothermal energy potential in volcanic regions to diversify our renewable portfolio.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning qayta tiklanadigan energiya diversifikatsiya strategiyasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Geothermal energy offers baseload renewable electricity generation with low surface footprint and high capacity factors, yet its deployment is geographically constrained by resource availability, and enhanced geothermal systems that could expand access require drilling technologies and seismic risk management that remain commercially immature.
words.example3Translation: Geotermal energiya past yer usti izi va yuqori quvvat omillari bilan bazaviy yuk qayta tiklanadigan elektr energiyasi avlodini taklif qiladi, ammo uning joylashtirilishi resurslarning mavjudligi bilan geografik jihatdan cheklangan va kirishni kengaytirishi mumkin bo'lgan kuchaytirilgan geotermal tizimlar tijorat jihatdan yetuk bo'lmagan qazish texnologiyalari va seysmik xavf boshqaruvini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz geotermal energiya rivojlanish imkoniyatlari va bazaviy yuk qayta tiklanadigan energiya siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro energetika konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The reduction or elimination of carbon dioxide emissions.
words.example1: Decarbonization of the transport sector requires rapid adoption of electric vehicles.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqlim o'zgarishi va sektor o'tish strategiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our industrial company has committed to full decarbonization of its manufacturing processes by 2040 through electrification and green hydrogen.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning iqlim majburiyatlarini investorlarga va tartibga soluvchi organlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Decarbonization pathways vary significantly across sectors, with electricity generation offering relatively low-cost near-term solutions while hard-to-abate sectors including heavy industry, aviation, and shipping face higher costs and greater technical uncertainty, requiring sector-specific policy instruments, carbon pricing, and public investment in innovation.
words.example3Translation: Dekarbonizatsiya yo'llari sektorlar bo'ylab sezilarli farqlanadi, elektr energiyasi avlodi nisbatan past xarajatli qisqa muddatli echimlarni taklif qiladi, og'ir sanoat, aviatsiya va dengiz transportini o'z ichiga olgan qisqartirish qiyin sektorlar esa sektorga xos siyosat vositalari, uglerod narxlash va innovatsiyaga davlat sarmoyasini talab qiladigan yuqori xarajatlar va kattaroq texnik noaniqlikka duch keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sanoat dekarbonizatsiyasi va iqlim siyosati mexanizmlari bo'yicha xalqaro iqlim va energetika konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Device that converts wind energy into electricity.
words.example1: Offshore wind turbines can generate more power than onshore ones due to stronger winds.
words.example1Situation: Siz qayta tiklanadigan energiya texnologiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our energy company is building a wind farm with two hundred wind turbines off the coast to power three hundred thousand homes.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi energiya loyihasi rejasini tartibga soluvchi organlarga va jamoatchilikka taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Wind turbine technology has advanced rapidly in scale and efficiency, with offshore floating turbines now accessing wind resources previously unavailable to fixed foundations, yet supply chain bottlenecks, grid connection backlogs, and planning permission challenges are constraining deployment at the rate required by national decarbonization targets.
words.example3Translation: Shamol turbinasi texnologiyasi miqyos va samaradorlikda tez rivojlandi, dengizdan tashqaridagi suzuvchi turbinalar endi qattiq poydevorlar uchun ilgari mavjud bo'lmagan shamol resurslariga kirishmoqda, ammo ta'minot zanjiri to'siqlari, tarmoqqa ulanish orqada qolishlari va rejalashtirish ruxsati muammolari milliy dekarbonizatsiya maqsadlari talab qilgan tezlikda joylashtirishni cheklamoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz dengizdan tashqarida shamol energiyasini kengaytirish va ta'minot zanjiri siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro qayta tiklanadigan energiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Fuel derived directly from living matter (e.g., ethanol, biodiesel).
words.example1: Biofuel from agricultural waste can reduce transport emissions without competing with food production.
words.example1Situation: Siz barqaror transport va energiya haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our airline is trialling biofuel blends on selected routes as part of its commitment to reducing aviation emissions.
words.example2Situation: Siz aviakompaniyangizning barqarorlik innovatsiyalarini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Biofuel sustainability depends critically on feedstock source and production pathway, as first-generation food crop biofuels have been associated with land use change emissions, food price impacts, and biodiversity losses that can exceed the climate benefits, while advanced lignocellulosic and algae-based biofuels remain cost-competitive challenges.
words.example3Translation: Bioyoqilg'i barqarorligi ozuqa manba va ishlab chiqarish yo'liga tanqidiy bog'liq, chunki birinchi avlod oziq-ovqat ekinlari bioyoqilg'ilari iqlim foydalaridan oshishi mumkin bo'lgan yer foydalanishini o'zgartirish chiqindilari, oziq-ovqat narxi ta'sirlari va biologik xilma-xillik yo'qotishlari bilan bog'liq, rivojlangan lignosellyuloza va suvo'tlarga asoslangan bioyoqilg'ilar esa narx jihatidan raqobatdosh muammo bo'lib qolmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror bioyoqilg'i siyosati va ilg'or yoqilg'i sertifikatlash tizimlari bo'yicha xalqaro energetika va qishloq xo'jaligi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The inconsistent availability of renewable sources like sun and wind.
words.example1: Intermittency is a key challenge for solar and wind power, which depend on weather conditions.
words.example1Situation: Siz qayta tiklanadigan energiya muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our grid operator manages intermittency by combining diverse renewable sources with battery storage and flexible gas backup.
words.example2Situation: Siz tarmoq boshqaruvi va energiya ta'minoti ishonchliligi strategiyasini tartibga soluvchi organlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Intermittency is increasingly managed through portfolio diversification across geographies and technologies, demand flexibility, grid interconnection, and storage deployment, reducing the role of dispatchable backup generation, though seasonal storage at the scale needed for fully renewable systems remains an unsolved challenge requiring innovation in long-duration storage technologies.
words.example3Translation: Uzluksizmaslik tobora ko'proq geografiyalar va texnologiyalar bo'ylab portfel diversifikatsiya, talab moslashuvchanligi, tarmoq o'zaro ulanishi va saqlash joylashtirilishi orqali boshqarilmoqda, jo'natilishi mumkin bo'lgan zaxira avlodining rolini kamaytiradi, ammo to'liq qayta tiklanadigan tizimlar uchun zarur bo'lgan mavsumiy saqlash uzoq muddatli saqlash texnologiyalarida innovatsiyani talab qiluvchi hal qilinmagan muammo bo'lib qolmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz tarmoq moslashuvchanligi va yuqori qayta tiklanadigan energiya tizimlarini boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro energetika tizimi operatorlari konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An electricity network that uses digital technology to manage supply and demand.
words.example1: A smart grid can automatically redirect power to areas with the highest demand.
words.example1Situation: Siz energiya infratuzilmasi modernizatsiyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our utility is investing in smart grid technology to reduce outages, integrate rooftop solar, and enable electric vehicle charging management.
words.example2Situation: Siz energetika kompaniyangizning raqamli infratuzilma investitsiya rejasini tartibga soluvchi organlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Smart grid infrastructure enables bidirectional energy flows, real-time demand response, distributed energy resource integration, and dynamic pricing, transforming electricity consumers into active prosumers, yet requires substantial investment in cybersecurity, interoperability standards, and consumer privacy protections that existing regulatory frameworks inadequately address.
words.example3Translation: Aqlli tarmoq infratuzilmasi ikki tomonlama energiya oqimlarini, real vaqt talab javobini, taqsimlangan energiya resursi integratsiyasini va dinamik narxlashni yoqadi, elektr iste'molchilarini faol prosyumerlarga aylantiradi, ammo mavjud tartibga solish tizimlari yetarli darajada hal qilmayotgan kiberhujum xavfsizligi, o'zaro ishlash qobiliyati standartlari va iste'molchi maxfiyligini muhofaza qilishga katta sarmoya talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz aqlli tarmoq texnologiyasi va raqamli energetika infratuzilmasi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro energetika va texnologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Electricity generated by harnessing the energy of flowing water.
words.example1: Hydropower provides a reliable source of renewable electricity in mountainous regions.
words.example1Situation: Siz qayta tiklanadigan energiya manbalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our country relies heavily on hydropower for electricity generation, but climate change is threatening water availability.
words.example2Situation: Siz milliy energiya xavfsizligi va iqlim moslashishi bo'yicha strategik muloqot olib borayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Hydropower provides dispatchable renewable generation and grid balancing services that complement intermittent solar and wind, yet large dam projects carry significant social and ecological costs including displacement of communities, ecosystem disruption, and methane emissions from reservoir decomposition that complicate simplistic renewable classifications.
words.example3Translation: Gidroenergetika o'zgaruvchan quyosh va shamolni to'ldiruvchi jo'natiladigan qayta tiklanadigan avlod va tarmoqni muvozanatlash xizmatlarini taklif qiladi, ammo yirik to'g'on loyihalari jamoatlarni ko'chirish, ekotizim buzilishi va qayta tiklanadigan klassifikatsiyalarni murakkablashtiruvchi suv ombori parchalanishidan metan chiqindilari kabi sezilarli ijtimoiy va ekologik xarajatlarni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz gidroenergetika barqarorligi baholash va katta suv ombori siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro qayta tiklanadigan energiya va atrof-muhit konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Using less energy to provide the same service.
words.example1: Improving energy efficiency in buildings can significantly cut heating and cooling costs.
words.example1Situation: Siz barqaror binolar va energiya tejash haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manufacturing plant reduced energy costs by thirty percent through an energy efficiency audit and equipment upgrades.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning energiya xarajatlarini kamaytirish natijalari bo'yicha hisobotni rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Energy efficiency represents the first fuel of the clean energy transition, offering the lowest-cost emissions reductions while improving energy security and affordability, yet faces persistent market failures including split incentives between landlords and tenants, high upfront costs, and information barriers that require policy intervention to overcome.
words.example3Translation: Energiya samaradorligi energiya xavfsizligi va qulayligini yaxshilash bilan birga eng past xarajatli emissiyalarni kamaytirish taklif qilib, toza energiya o'tishining birinchi yoqilg'isini ifodalaydi, ammo er egasi va ijarachilar o'rtasidagi bo'lingan rag'batlar, yuqori oldindan to'lanadigan xarajatlar va engib o'tish uchun siyosat aralashuvini talab qiluvchi axborot to'siqlari kabi doimiy bozor muvaffaqiyatsizliklariga duch keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz energiya samaradorligi siyosati va bino dekarbonizatsiyasi mexanizmlari bo'yicha xalqaro energetika va iqlim konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Hydrogen fuel produced using renewable energy.
words.example1: Green hydrogen could help decarbonize industries that are difficult to electrify directly.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilg'or energiya texnologiyalari va sanoat dekarbonizatsiyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our chemical company is piloting green hydrogen production to replace fossil-fuel-based feedstocks in our manufacturing process.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning sanoat dekarbonizatsiya innovatsiya loyihasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Green hydrogen has significant potential for hard-to-abate sectors including steel, chemicals, and long-haul shipping, but current production costs remain substantially higher than fossil fuel alternatives, requiring cost reductions through electrolyzer scale-up, renewable electricity cost declines, and supportive policy frameworks to achieve commercial viability.
words.example3Translation: Yashil vodorod po'lat, kimyo va uzoq masofali dengiz transportini o'z ichiga olgan qisqartirish qiyin sektorlar uchun sezilarli salohiyatga ega, ammo joriy ishlab chiqarish xarajatlari qazib olinadigan yoqilg'i muqobillaridan sezilarli darajada yuqori bo'lib qolmoqda, tijorat qobiliyatiga erishish uchun elektrolizator miqyosini kengaytirish, qayta tiklanadigan elektr narxi pasayishi va qo'llab-quvvatlovchi siyosat tizimlari orqali xarajatlarni kamaytirish talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yashil vodorod rivojlanish siyosati va sanoat dekarbonizatsiya moliyalashtirishi bo'yicha xalqaro energetika va sanoat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A policy guaranteeing renewable energy producers a fixed price for their power.
words.example1: The feed-in tariff encouraged thousands of households to install solar panels.
words.example1Situation: Siz qayta tiklanadigan energiya siyosatlari va rag'batlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our energy company benefited from early feed-in tariff contracts that provided revenue certainty during the initial solar deployment phase.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning qayta tiklanadigan energiya portfeli va daromad tuzilmasini investorlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Feed-in tariffs successfully drove early renewable deployment by reducing investor risk through revenue certainty, but their fixed price design proved costly as technology costs fell faster than expected, prompting policy transitions toward competitive auction mechanisms that better reflect market conditions while maintaining deployment momentum.
words.example3Translation: Tarmoqqa ulash tariflari daromad aniqligи orqali investor xavfini kamaytirib, dastlabki qayta tiklanadigan energiya joylashtiruvini muvaffaqiyatli harakatga keltirdi, ammo ularning qat'iy narx dizayni texnologiya xarajatlari kutilganidan tezroq tushgani sababli qimmatga tushdi, bu joylashtirish momentumini saqlab, bozor sharoitlarini yaxshiroq aks ettiruvchi raqobatdosh auktsion mexanizmlariga siyosat o'tishlarini qo'zg'atdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qayta tiklanadigan energiya siyosati dizayni va auktsion mexanizmlari bo'yicha xalqaro energetika va qonunchilik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: When renewable energy costs the same as or less than traditional grid power.
words.example1: Solar energy has reached grid parity in many countries, making subsidies less necessary.
words.example1Situation: Siz qayta tiklanadigan energiya iqtisodiyoti haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our investment team monitors grid parity trends across markets to identify the most attractive renewable energy opportunities.
words.example2Situation: Siz energiya investitsiya strategiyangizni fond boshqaruvchilariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Grid parity is a milestone rather than an endpoint, as achieving cost competitiveness with existing generation does not automatically resolve integration challenges, system balancing costs, or the investment required to replace retiring fossil fuel infrastructure at the pace needed to meet climate targets.
words.example3Translation: Tarmoq tenglik qo'shimcha nuqta emas, balki muhim bosqich, chunki mavjud avlod bilan narx raqobatbardoshligiga erishish avtomatik ravishda integratsiya muammolarini, tizim muvozanatlash xarajatlarini yoki iqlim maqsadlarini bajarish uchun zarur bo'lgan tezlikda nafaqaga chiquvchi qazib olinadigan yoqilg'i infratuzilmasini almashtirish uchun zarur sarmoyani hal qilmaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qayta tiklanadigan energiya iqtisodiy raqobatbardoshligi va energetika o'tish moliyalashtirish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro energetika va iqlim konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Establishing permanent human settlements outside Earth.
words.example1: Space colonization requires solving major challenges in life support, radiation protection, and food production.
words.example1Situation: Siz kelajak texnologiyalari va kosmosni o'rganish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our aerospace company is developing habitat technology for space colonization missions to the Moon and Mars.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning kosmik yashash joyi rivojlanish loyihasini sarmoyadorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Space colonization proposals raise unresolved questions about governance, resource rights, and who bears the costs and reaps the benefits of extraterrestrial expansion, with critics arguing that the resources devoted to space settlement could more effectively address pressing terrestrial challenges including climate change and global poverty.
words.example3Translation: Kosmosni mustamlaka qilish takliflari yer sirtidan tashqarida kengayishning xarajatlarini kim ko'tarishi va foydalari kimga tegishi haqidagi boshqaruv, resurs huquqlari va hal qilinmagan savollarni ko'taradi, tanqidchilar kosmik aholi punktiga bag'ishlangan resurslar iqlim o'zgarishi va global qashshoqlikni o'z ichiga olgan dolzarb yer muammolarini yanada samarali hal qilishi mumkinligini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kosmik boshqaruv siyosati va yer sirtidan tashqarida kengayishning etikasi bo'yicha xalqaro kosmik huquq va siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Scientific study of celestial objects and phenomena.
words.example1: Astronomical research has revealed thousands of exoplanets orbiting distant stars.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilm-fan va kosmosni o'rganish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our university's astronomical research team received a major grant to study dark matter distribution in nearby galaxies.
words.example2Situation: Siz universitetingizning ilmiy tadqiqot yutuqlari va moliyalashtirishini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Astronomical research generates knowledge with profound implications for understanding our cosmic origins, the prevalence of life in the universe, and the long-term fate of Earth, while also driving technological innovations in optics, signal processing, and computing that find applications far beyond their original scientific purpose.
words.example3Translation: Astronomik tadqiqot kosmik kelib chiqishimizni, koinotda hayotning tarqalishini va Yerning uzoq muddatli taqdirini tushunish uchun chuqur oqibatli bilim yaratadi, shu bilan birga asl ilmiy maqsaddan ancha uzoqda qo'llaniladigan optika, signal qayta ishlash va hisoblash texnologik innovatsiyalarini ham harakatga keltiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz astronomik tadqiqot moliyalashtirish ustuvorliklari va koinot tadqiqotining jamiyat uchun ahamiyati bo'yicha xalqaro astronomiya va ilm siyosati konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Life that may exist or originate outside Earth.
words.example1: Scientists are searching for signs of extraterrestrial life on Mars and in ocean moons.
words.example1Situation: Siz astrobiology va kosmik kashfiyotlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research institute is developing biosignature detection instruments to search for extraterrestrial life in future planetary missions.
words.example2Situation: Siz institutingizning kosmik biologiya tadqiqot dasturini moliyalashtiruvchi agentliklarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The search for extraterrestrial life has moved from speculative inquiry to systematic scientific investigation, with astrobiologists identifying potentially habitable environments in our solar system and developing frameworks for detecting biosignatures that could indicate life, though distinguishing biological from abiotic processes remotely presents extraordinary methodological challenges.
words.example3Translation: Yer sirtidan tashqaridagi hayot izlash spekulyativ so'rovdan tizimli ilmiy tergov sifatida ko'chdi, astrobiologlar quyosh tizimimizda potensial yashash mumkin bo'lgan muhitlarni aniqlamoqda va hayotni ko'rsatishi mumkin bo'lgan biosignaturalarni aniqlash tizimlarini ishlab chiqmoqda, ammo biologik jarayonlarni uzoqdan abiotik jarayonlardan ajratish favqulodda metodologik muammolarni taqdim etadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz astrobiology metodologiyasi va hayot izlash missiya dizayni bo'yicha xalqaro sayyora fanlari konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Technology related to artificial satellites orbiting Earth.
words.example1: Satellite technology enables GPS navigation, weather forecasting, and global communications.
words.example1Situation: Siz kosmik infratuzilma va kundalik hayotga ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our telecommunications company operates a constellation of satellites to deliver broadband internet to remote areas.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning kosmik infratuzilma xizmatlarini hukumat va korporativ mijozlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Satellite technology underpins critical global infrastructure for navigation, communications, Earth observation, and financial transactions, creating strategic dependencies that are increasingly recognized as national security concerns, while the rapid growth of commercial satellite constellations raises governance questions about orbital spectrum allocation and debris management.
words.example3Translation: Sun'iy yo'ldosh texnologiyasi navigatsiya, kommunikatsiyalar, Yer kuzatuvi va moliyaviy tranzaktsiyalar uchun muhim global infratuzilmani qo'llab-quvvatlaydi, tobora milliy xavfsizlik tashvishlari sifatida tan olinayotgan strategik bog'liqliklarni yaratadi, tijorat sun'iy yo'ldosh konstellyatsiyalarining tez o'sishi esa orbital spektr ajratish va chiqindilarni boshqarish haqidagi boshqaruv savollarini ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kosmik boshqaruv va sun'iy yo'ldosh konstellyatsiyasi tartibga solish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro kosmik huquq konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Defunct satellites and rocket parts orbiting Earth.
words.example1: Space debris poses a collision risk to operational satellites and the International Space Station.
words.example1Situation: Siz kosmik xavfsizlik va muhit muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our space agency is developing active debris removal technology to reduce the risk of collision cascades in low Earth orbit.
words.example2Situation: Siz kosmik agentligingizning orbital barqarorlik dasturini xalqaro hamkorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Space debris represents a classic tragedy of the commons, where individual operators have insufficient incentives to mitigate their orbital footprint, creating collision cascade risks that could render certain orbits unusable and requiring binding international governance frameworks that current voluntary guidelines have failed to deliver.
words.example3Translation: Kosmik chiqindilar klassik umumiy fojiasini ifodalaydi, bu erda individual operatorlar orbital izlarini kamaytirish uchun yetarli rag'batlarga ega emas, muayyan orbitalarni foydalanib bo'lmaydigan holga keltirishi mumkin bo'lgan to'qnashuv kaskad xavflarini yaratadi va joriy ixtiyoriy ko'rsatmalar yetkazib bera olmagan majburiy xalqaro boshqaruv tizimlarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz orbital chiqindilarni boshqarish siyosati va kosmik barqarorlik bo'yicha xalqaro kosmik operatorlar konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The hypothetical process of modifying a planet to support human life.
words.example1: Terraforming Mars would require thousands of years and technologies we do not yet possess.
words.example1Situation: Siz kelajak kosmosini o'rganish va ilmiy fantaziya haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research team is studying atmospheric chemistry processes relevant to terraforming as part of a long-term planetary science program.
words.example2Situation: Siz sayyora fanlari tadqiqot dasturingizni moliyalashtiruvchi tashkilotlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Terraforming raises profound ethical questions about the permissibility of radically transforming planetary environments, particularly if those environments harbor any form of life, forcing consideration of whether human survival and expansion interests justify the potential destruction of alien ecosystems that may be the only examples of their kind in the universe.
words.example3Translation: Terrafirm sayyora muhitlarini tubdan o'zgartirishning maqsadga muvofiqligi haqida chuqur etik savollarni ko'taradi, ayniqsa agar bu muhitlar hayotning har qanday shaklini o'z ichiga olsa, inson omon qolish va kengayish manfaatlarining koinotda o'zlarining yagona namunaları bo'lishi mumkin bo'lgan chet el ekotizimlarining potensial yo'q qilishini oqlashi yoki oqlamasligi haqida mulohaza qilishni majbur qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sayyora o'zgarishi etikasi va kosmik muhitni muhofaza qilish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro kosmik etika va siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An environment creating a sensation of weightlessness.
words.example1: Astronauts train extensively to adapt to zero-gravity conditions before going to space.
words.example1Situation: Siz astronavtlar tayyorligi va kosmik tibbiyot haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our biomedical company is researching how zero-gravity affects bone density and muscle mass during long-duration space missions.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning kosmik tibbiyot tadqiqot dasturini moliyalashtiruvchi agentliklarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Extended exposure to zero-gravity produces significant physiological changes including bone density loss, muscle atrophy, fluid redistribution, and cardiovascular deconditioning that pose serious challenges for long-duration deep space missions, requiring countermeasures such as exercise protocols, pharmacological interventions, and potentially artificial gravity generation.
words.example3Translation: Og'irliksizlikka uzoq vaqt ta'sir ko'rsatish suyak zichligi yo'qolishi, mushak atrofiyasi, suyuqlik qayta taqsimlanishi va yurak-qon tomir deshonditsionlashini o'z ichiga olgan sezilarli fiziologik o'zgarishlarni keltirib chiqaradi, bu uzoq muddatli chuqur kosmik missiyalar uchun jiddiy muammolarni keltirib chiqaradi, mashq protokollari, farmakologik aralashuvlar va potentsial sun'iy tortishish avlodi kabi qarshi choralarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kosmik fiziologiya va uzoq muddatli missiya tibbiy qarshi choralari bo'yicha xalqaro kosmik tibbiyot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Understanding humanity's place in the vast universe.
words.example1: A cosmic perspective reminds us how small Earth is compared to the universe.
words.example1Situation: Siz falsafa va insoniyat ma'nosi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our science communication team uses the cosmic perspective to engage the public with astronomy and inspire curiosity about the universe.
words.example2Situation: Siz ilmiy muloqot strategiyangizni jamoatchilik bilan aloqa jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The cosmic perspective, by revealing Earth's fragility and humanity's brief tenure in an ancient universe, has the potential to cultivate both humility about human significance and urgency about protecting the only biosphere known to support complex life, though translating this insight into behavioral and policy change remains an open challenge.
words.example3Translation: Kosmik nuqtai nazar, Yerning mo'rtligini va qadimiy koinotda insoniyatning qisqa muddatini ochib berish orqali, inson ahamiyati haqida kamtarlikni ham va murakkab hayotni qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun ma'lum bo'lgan yagona biosferani muhofaza qilish bo'yicha zudlikni ham o'stirish salohiyatiga ega, ammo bu tushunchani xulqiy va siyosiy o'zgarishga tarjima qilish ochiq muammo bo'lib qolmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz kosmik ilm va inson qadriyatlari va siyosatiga ta'siri bo'yicha xalqaro falsafa va kosmologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Travel between planets within a solar system.
words.example1: Interplanetary travel to Mars would take approximately seven months with current rocket technology.
words.example1Situation: Siz kelajak kosmosini o'rganish texnologiyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our aerospace company is developing propulsion systems that could reduce interplanetary travel time to Mars by more than half.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ilg'or dvigatel tadqiqot dasturini agentlik hamkorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Interplanetary travel faces challenges that extend beyond propulsion technology to include radiation exposure during transit, psychological effects of isolation and confinement, communication delays that prevent real-time mission control support, and the need for closed-loop life support systems capable of operating independently for years.
words.example3Translation: Sayyoralararo sayohat dvigatel texnologiyasidan tashqariga chiqadigan muammolarga duch keladi, bu tranzit davomida radiatsiya ta'siri, yolg'izlik va qamoqlilikdagi psixologik ta'sirlar, real vaqt missiya nazorati qo'llab-quvvatlashiga to'sqinlik qiluvchi aloqa kechikishlari va yillar davomida mustaqil ishlashga qodir yopiq doira hayotni qo'llab-quvvatlash tizimlariga bo'lgan ehtiyojni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sayyoralararo missiya dizayni va chuqur kosmik hayot qo'llab-quvvatlash tizimlari bo'yicha xalqaro kosmik muhandislik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A government organization responsible for space activities (e.g., NASA, ESA).
words.example1: Space agencies from multiple countries are collaborating on the Lunar Gateway project.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro kosmik hamkorlik va ilmiy diplomatiya haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research institute partners with space agencies to develop instruments for planetary exploration missions.
words.example2Situation: Siz institutingizning kosmik agentlik hamkorlik dasturini rahbariyat va moliyalashtiruvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Space agencies occupy an evolving role in an increasingly commercialized space sector, shifting from direct mission operators toward regulators, anchor customers, and technology developers, while navigating geopolitical tensions that complicate international scientific cooperation and raise questions about militarization of space.
words.example3Translation: Kosmik agentliklar tobora tijoratlashayotgan kosmik sektorda rivojlanuvchi rol egallaydi, to'g'ridan-to'g'ri missiya operatorlaridan tartibga soluvchilar, asosiy mijozlar va texnologiya ishlab chiquvchilarga o'tmoqda, xalqaro ilmiy hamkorlikni murakkablashtiruvchi va kosmosni militarizatsiya qilish haqidagi savollarni ko'taruvchi geosiyosiy keskinliklarni boshqarmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz kosmik boshqaruv va davlat-xususiy kosmik sektor munosabatlari bo'yicha xalqaro kosmik siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The study of the origin, evolution, and distribution of life in the universe.
words.example1: Astrobiology draws on chemistry, geology, and astronomy to search for signs of life beyond Earth.
words.example1Situation: Siz fanlararo tadqiqot va kosmik hayot izlash haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our university's astrobiology department is studying extremophile organisms on Earth to understand what life might look like on other planets.
words.example2Situation: Siz universitetingizning fanlararo tadqiqot dasturini moliyalashtiruvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Astrobiology confronts the challenge that our understanding of life's requirements is based entirely on a single example, creating a risk of anthropocentric bias in biosignature definitions and habitability assessments that could cause scientists to overlook life forms operating on fundamentally different biochemical principles from those developed on Earth.
words.example3Translation: Astrobiology hayot talablarini tushunishimiz butunlay bitta misolga asoslanishi muammosiga duch keladi, bu biosignatura ta'riflarida va yashash mumkinligi baholashlarida antropotsentrik tarafkashlik xavfini yaratadi va olimlarni Yerda rivojlangan hayot shakllaridan tubdan farqli biokimyoviy tamoyillar asosida ishlaydigan hayot shakllarini e'tiborsiz qoldirish xavfi bor.
words.example3Situation: Siz astrobiology metodologiyasi va koinotda hayotni izlash tizimlarini aniqlash bo'yicha xalqaro sayyora fanlari konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: System that launches and propels rockets into space.
words.example1: Advances in rocket propulsion have reduced the cost of launching satellites significantly.
words.example1Situation: Siz kosmik texnologiya innovatsiyasi va sanoat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our aerospace company is developing next-generation rocket propulsion systems using liquid methane as a fuel source for reusable deep space vehicles.
words.example2Situation: Siz kosmik dvigatel tadqiqot dasturingizni agentlik va sarmoyador hamkorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Rocket propulsion technology is undergoing its most significant transformation since the Space Race, with reusable launch vehicles dramatically reducing payload costs, while research into nuclear thermal, solar electric, and other advanced propulsion concepts aims to enable the transit times and payload capacities required for ambitious deep space exploration and eventual human settlement beyond Earth.
words.example3Translation: Raketa dvigatori texnologiyasi Kosmik Poyga davridan beri eng muhim o'zgarishni boshdan kechiryapti, qayta foydalaniladigan uchiruv transport vositalari yuk xarajatlarini keskin kamaytiryapti, yadroli issiqlik, quyosh elektrik va boshqa ilg'or dvigatel kontseptsiyalari tadqiqoti esa Yerdan tashqarida ambiziozli chuqur kosmosni o'rganish va oxir-oqibat inson aholi punkti uchun zarur tranzit vaqtlari va yuk sig'imlarini yoqishga qaratilgan.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilg'or dvigatel texnologiyasi va chuqur kosmik missiya imkonlari bo'yicha xalqaro kosmik muhandislik va tadqiqot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Space travel for private individuals.
words.example1: Space tourism is becoming a reality with commercial companies offering suborbital flights.
words.example1Situation: Siz kosmik sanoat tijoratlashtirish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our travel company is partnering with a commercial space provider to offer orbital space tourism packages for high-net-worth clients.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi luksus sayohat mahsulotingizni premium mijozlar auditoriyasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Space tourism raises questions about equitable access to a profoundly transformative experience, the carbon footprint of rocket launches relative to the negligible contribution of individual passengers, and whether the public subsidies and regulatory frameworks that enabled commercial space development should deliver broader social returns than exclusive experiences for the ultra-wealthy.
