words.example3Translation: Kosmik turizm chuqur transformativ tajribaga teng kirish imkoniyati, individual yo'lovchilarning ahamiyatsiz hissasiga nisbatan raketa uchiruvlarining karbon izi va tijorat kosmosini rivojlantirishga imkon bergan davlat subsidiyalari va tartibga solish tizimlari ultra-boy uchun eksklyuziv tajribalardan keng ijtimoiy daromad keltirishi kerakmi yoki yo'qmi haqidagi savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kosmik turizm tartibga solish va tijorat kosmosining etikasi bo'yicha xalqaro kosmik siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Principles and practices aimed at preventing biological contamination between planets.
words.example1: Planetary protection protocols require spacecraft to be sterilized before landing on Mars.
words.example1Situation: Siz kosmik biologiya va missiya standartlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our space agency strictly follows planetary protection guidelines to ensure that scientific missions do not contaminate potential extraterrestrial habitats.
words.example2Situation: Siz kosmik agentligingizning missiya moslik jarayonini xalqaro hamkorlar bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Planetary protection requirements create tension between scientific rigor in the search for extraterrestrial life and the commercial and logistical pressures of crewed missions, as human presence inevitably introduces contamination that could permanently compromise our ability to determine whether any life discovered on Mars is indigenous or Earth-derived.
words.example3Translation: Sayyorani muhofaza qilish talablari yer sirtidan tashqaridagi hayot izlashdagi ilmiy qat'iylik va bemor missiyalarning tijorat va logistik bosimlar o'rtasida ziddiyat yaratadi, chunki inson mavjudligi Marsda aniqlangan har qanday hayot mahalliy yoki Yerdan olinganligini aniqlash qobiliyatimizni doimiy ravishda buzishi mumkin bo'lgan ifloslanishni muqarrar ravishda kiritadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sayyorani muhofaza qilish siyosati va insonlarga oid kosmik missiya biogavfsizligi bo'yicha xalqaro kosmik biologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A large spacecraft in orbit around Earth (e.g., the International Space Station).
words.example1: The International Space Station serves as an orbital station for scientific research in microgravity.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro kosmik hamkorlik va kosmik tadqiqot haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our aerospace company is designing a commercial orbital station to replace the International Space Station as it approaches the end of its operational life.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning keyingi avlod kosmik stantsiya rivojlanish rejasini agentlik va sarmoyadorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Orbital stations enable continuous human presence in space for scientific research, technology demonstration, and operational experience, but their construction and maintenance costs raise questions about the opportunity cost relative to robotic missions that can achieve many scientific objectives at far lower expense and without life support complexity.
words.example3Translation: Orbital stansiyalar ilmiy tadqiqot, texnologiya namoyishi va operatsion tajriba uchun kosmosda doimiy inson mavjudligini yoqadi, ammo ularning qurilish va texnik xizmat xarajatlari ko'p ilmiy maqsadlarni ancha past xarajat va hayotni qo'llab-quvvatlash murakkabligisiz erishishi mumkin bo'lgan robotli missiyalarga nisbatan imkoniyat xarajati haqida savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz orbital stantsiya iqtisodiyoti va inson kosmik tadqiqot ustuvorliklari bo'yicha xalqaro kosmik siyosat va iqtisodiyot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Cheaply and rapidly produced clothing following the latest trends.
words.example1: Fast fashion makes trendy clothes affordable but contributes to enormous textile waste.
words.example1Situation: Siz moda va atrof-muhit ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our retail company is moving away from fast fashion by reducing collection frequency and investing in higher-quality, longer-lasting garments.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning barqaror kiyim-kechak tijorat modeliga o'tish strategiyasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Fast fashion's business model depends on accelerating consumption through artificial trend cycles, low prices enabled by labor cost suppression in global supply chains, and designed obsolescence that normalizes treating clothing as disposable, generating environmental impacts including microplastic pollution, water contamination, and carbon emissions that current pricing systems do not internalize.
words.example3Translation: Tez moda biznes modeli sun'iy trend tsikllari, global ta'minot zanjirlarida mehnat xarajatlarini bostirib arzon narxlar va kiyim-kechakni yo'q qilinadigan deb ko'rishni normallashtiruvchi mo'ljallangan eskirish orqali iste'molni tezlashtirishga bog'liq, mikroplastik ifloslanish, suv ifloslanishi va joriy narx tizimlari ichkilashtirilmagan karbon chiqindilarini o'z ichiga olgan atrof-muhit ta'sirlarini yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moda sanoati barqarorligi va kiyim-kechak iste'molini tartibga solish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro moda va atrof-muhit konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Clothing produced and consumed in environmentally and ethically responsible ways.
words.example1: Sustainable fashion encourages buying fewer, better-quality garments that last longer.
words.example1Situation: Siz mas'uliyatli iste'mol va moda haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our clothing brand achieved sustainable fashion certification by using organic materials, fair-trade supply chains, and carbon-neutral shipping.
words.example2Situation: Siz brendingizning barqarorlik yutuqlari va sertifikatlash jarayonini savdo hamkorlariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sustainable fashion faces a credibility challenge from greenwashing, where brands adopt environmental language without substantive changes to production systems, making independent certification, mandatory supply chain transparency, and regulatory standards essential for consumers to distinguish genuine commitment from marketing performance.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror moda yashil yuvinishdan ishonchlilik muammosiga duch keladi, bu erda brendlar ishlab chiqarish tizimlariga muhim o'zgartirishsiz atrof-muhit tilini qabul qiladi, bu iste'molchilarning haqiqiy majburiyatni marketing amaliyotidan ajratishi uchun mustaqil sertifikatlash, majburiy ta'minot zanjiri shaffofligi va tartibga solish standartlarini zarur qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror moda standartlash va yashil da'vo tartibga solish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro moda va barqarorlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A social and economic order that encourages the acquisition of goods in ever-greater amounts.
words.example1: Consumerism drives economic growth but also contributes to overconsumption and environmental damage.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqtisodiy tizimlar va atrof-muhit haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research team studied how digital platforms intensify consumerism through personalized advertising and frictionless purchasing.
words.example2Situation: Siz iste'molchi xulq-atvori bo'yicha tadqiqot natijalarini akademik auditoriyaga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Consumerism as a cultural and economic system is structurally embedded in GDP measurement frameworks, corporate profit imperatives, and identity formation processes that equate acquisition with status and wellbeing, making behavioral change insufficient without systemic reforms to economic measurement, advertising regulation, and the public provision of non-commercial sources of meaning and belonging.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy va iqtisodiy tizim sifatida konsyumerizm YaIM o'lchov tizimlariga, korporativ foyda imperativlariga va yig'inni maqom va farovonlik bilan tenglashtiruvchi identifikatsiyani shakllantirish jarayonlariga tarkibiy jihatdan singdirilgan, bu iqtisodiy o'lchov, reklama tartibga solish va ma'no va mansublikning tijorat bo'lmagan manbalarini davlat ta'minotigagacha tizimli islohotlarsiz xulqiy o'zgarishni yetarli bo'lmagan qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz iste'molchi jamiyati va barqaror iqtisodiy tizim islohoti bo'yicha xalqaro iqtisodiyot va jamiyat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The image a company constructs through logos, messaging, and customer experience.
words.example1: A strong brand identity helps customers recognize and trust a company's products.
words.example1Situation: Siz marketing strategiyasi va korporativ muloqot haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company redesigned its brand identity to reflect its shift toward sustainability and attract younger, values-driven consumers.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning brend yangilash strategiyasini marketing va boshqaruv jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Brand identity in the digital age requires managing coherence across proliferating touchpoints while allowing authentic adaptation to platform-specific contexts, as consumers increasingly scrutinize brands for consistency between stated values and operational practices in ways that amplify reputational risks from perceived hypocrisy.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli asrda brend identifikatsiyasi platforma-xos kontekstlarga haqiqiy moslashishga imkon berish bilan birga ko'payib borayotgan aloqa nuqtalari bo'ylab izchillikni boshqarishni talab qiladi, iste'molchilar tobora ko'proq brendlarni e'lon qilingan qadriyatlar va operatsion amaliyotlar o'rtasidagi izchillik uchun tekshiradi va bu idrok etilgan ikkiyuzlamachilikdan obro'ga zarar yetkazish xavflarini kuchaytiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli brend boshqaruvi va iste'molchi ishonchi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro marketing va kommunikatsiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: High-fashion, custom-fitted clothing made to order for specific clients.
words.example1: Haute couture garments can take hundreds of hours to hand-stitch and cost tens of thousands of dollars.
words.example1Situation: Siz luksus moda sanoati va hunarmandchilik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our fashion house presents its haute couture collection twice yearly during Paris Fashion Week to international clients and press.
words.example2Situation: Siz moda uyingizning to'plam taqdimot strategiyasini biznes hamkorlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Haute couture functions simultaneously as commercial enterprise, artistic expression, and brand marketing platform, with collections that rarely generate direct profit serving primarily to establish prestige that drives revenue across accessible ready-to-wear lines, fragrances, and accessories, making the economics of fashion houses inseparable from their symbolic capital.
words.example3Translation: Oliy moda bir vaqtda tijorat korxonasi, badiiy ifoda va brend marketing platformasi sifatida ishlaydi, to'g'ridan-to'g'ri foyda kamdan-kam keltiradigan to'plamlar asosan tayyor-kiyish liniyalari, atirlar va aksessuarlar bo'ylab daromad harakatga keltiradigan nufuzni o'rnatishga xizmat qiladi, moda uylari iqtisodiyotini ularning ramziy kapitalidan ajralmaslikka aylantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz luksus moda iqtisodiyoti va haute couture tijorat modeli bo'yicha xalqaro moda va dizayn konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Clothing intended for short-term use before being discarded.
words.example1: Disposable fashion fills landfills with synthetic fabrics that take centuries to decompose.
words.example1Situation: Siz moda va chiqindilar muammolari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our brand explicitly rejects disposable fashion by offering repair services and take-back schemes for all garments.
words.example2Situation: Siz brendingizning kengaytirilgan mahsulot mas'uliyati modelini barqarorlik hamkorlari va investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Disposable fashion represents the extreme end of the throwaway culture, generating textile waste at rates that overwhelm recycling infrastructure, contaminate developing country environments through second-hand clothing exports, and externalise social costs onto producing communities and future generations who bear the ecological consequences of current consumption patterns.
words.example3Translation: Bir martalik moda qayta ishlash infratuzilmasini bosib o'tadigan, ikkinchi qo'l kiyim eksporti orqali rivojlanayotgan mamlakat muhitlarini ifloslantiruvchi va joriy iste'mol naqshlarining ekologik oqibatlarini ko'taradigan ishlab chiqarish jamoalari va kelajak avlodlariga ijtimoiy xarajatlarni tashqilashtiruvchi tezda tashlab yuborish madaniyatining ekstremal uchini ifodalaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz to'qimachilik chiqindilari va kengaytirilgan ishlab chiqaruvchi mas'uliyati siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro barqaror iste'mol konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The adoption of elements of a minority culture by members of the dominant culture, often without understanding or respect.
words.example1: Critics accused the designer of cultural appropriation for using sacred indigenous patterns as decorative motifs.
words.example1Situation: Siz moda etikasi va madaniy hurmat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our brand introduced a community collaboration model to avoid cultural appropriation by working directly with artisans from the cultures that inspire our collections.
words.example2Situation: Siz brendingizning etik dizayn va madaniy hamkorlik yondashuvini xalqaro media vakillariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Cultural appropriation in fashion occurs on a spectrum from shallow aesthetic borrowing to the commercial exploitation of sacred symbols, with the harm dependent on power dynamics between borrowing and source communities, economic benefits and attribution, and whether the practice reinforces or challenges stereotypical representations of the source culture.
words.example3Translation: Modada madaniy o'zlashtirib olish yuzaki estetik qarzolishdan muqaddas ramzlarni tijorat maqsadida ekspluatatsiya qilishgacha bo'lgan spektrda sodir bo'ladi, zarar qarzolish va manba jamoatlar o'rtasidagi kuch dinamikasiga, iqtisodiy foyda va atributsiyaga va amaliyot manba madaniyatning stereotipik tasvirlarini mustahkamlaydimi yoki ularga shubha soladimi yoki yo'qligiga bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz moda madaniy o'zlashtirib olish va etik dizayn amaliyotlari bo'yicha xalqaro moda va madaniy huquqlar konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A classic, versatile clothing item that forms the foundation of one's wardrobe.
words.example1: A white shirt and tailored trousers are considered wardrobe essentials for professional settings.
words.example1Situation: Siz kiyim-kechak uslubi va korporativ kiyinish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our clothing brand focuses exclusively on wardrobe essentials designed to outlast trend cycles and justify a higher price through durability.
words.example2Situation: Siz brendingizning tijоrat strategiyasi va mahsulot pozitsiyalashuvini savdo hamkorlariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The concept of wardrobe essentials reflects a minimalist philosophy that prioritizes quality and versatility over quantity, positioned as both a response to fast fashion excess and a more sustainable consumption model, though the premium pricing of quality basics creates access inequalities that limit its reach to higher-income consumers.
words.example3Translation: Garderob asosi kontseptsiyasi miqdor o'rniga sifat va ko'p qo'llanilishni ustuvor qo'yuvchi minimalist falsafani aks ettiradi, tez moda ortiqchaligiga javob va yanada barqaror iste'mol modeli sifatida joylashtiriladi, ammo sifatli asoslarning premium narxlash premium narxlash yuqori daromadli iste'molchilarga yetishini cheklovchi kirish tengsizliklarini yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror iste'mol naqshlarini va kiyim-kechak sanoatida sifat va hajm o'rtasidagi munosabatni tahlil qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Manufacturing work involving low pay, poor conditions, and excessively long hours.
words.example1: Consumer campaigns against sweatshop labor have pressured some brands to improve factory conditions.
words.example1Situation: Siz global ta'minot zanjiri etikasi va mehnat huquqlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company conducts annual audits of all suppliers to ensure zero tolerance for sweatshop labor in our manufacturing chain.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ta'minot zanjiri javobgarligi va etik ishlab chiqarish standartlarini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sweatshop labor persists because global value chains systematically transfer competitive pressure to the most vulnerable production stages, where workers lack bargaining power, regulatory oversight is weak, and brands maintain plausible deniability through subcontracting structures that obscure direct employment relationships and responsibility for working conditions.
words.example3Translation: Ter to'kadigan mehnat davom etmoqda, chunki global qiymat zanjirlari tizimli ravishda raqobat bosimini eng zaif ishlab chiqarish bosqichlariga uzatadi, bu erda ishchilar muzokarа kuchiga ega emas, tartibga solish nazorati zaif va brendlar to'g'ridan-to'g'ri ish va ish sharoitlari mas'uliyati munosabatlarini yashiruvchi pudrat konstruktsiyalari orqali mantiqiy rad etish imkoniyatini saqlab qoladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz global moda ta'minot zanjiri mehnat standartlari va kiyim-kechak sanoatini tartibga solish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro savdo va mehnat huquqlari konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A social movement focused on the acceptance of all body types and challenging beauty standards.
words.example1: The body positivity movement has encouraged more brands to use diverse models in advertising.
words.example1Situation: Siz moda sanoatidagi ijtimoiy o'zgarishlar va inklyuzivlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our clothing brand embraced body positivity by expanding its size range and using models of all body types in campaigns.
words.example2Situation: Siz brendingizning inklyuziv marketing strategiyasini reklama agentligiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Body positivity has evolved from a radical fat acceptance movement to a mainstream marketing message, raising concerns that commercial co-optation has diluted its political critique of discriminatory beauty standards while simultaneously using diverse representation to sell products without addressing the industry structures that created exclusion in the first place.
words.example3Translation: Tana ijobiyligi radikal yog' qabul qilish harakatidan asosiy marketing xabariga rivojlandi, tijorat ixtiyoriy jalb qilish kamsituvchi go'zallik standartlarining siyosiy tanqidini suyultirgani haqidagi tashvishlarni ko'taradi, bir vaqtda birinchi o'rinda istisno yaratgan sanoat tuzilmalarini hal qilmasdan mahsulotlarni sotish uchun xilma-xil vakil belgilarni ishlatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz go'zallik standartlari, jinsiy diskriminatsiya va moda sanoatidagi inklyuziv vakillik siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro gender va media konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An economic system aimed at eliminating waste through recycling, repairing, and reusing clothing.
words.example1: Circular fashion models encourage consumers to repair, rent, or resell clothing rather than discard it.
words.example1Situation: Siz barqaror moda tizimlari va iste'molchi xulq-atvori haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our brand launched a circular fashion program that allows customers to return worn garments for store credit and refurbishment.
words.example2Situation: Siz brendingizning qayta foydalanish va to'plov dasturini savdo hamkorlariga va iste'molchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Circular fashion requires systemic redesign of production processes, materials selection, and business models, as current textile recycling technology cannot process blended fabrics at scale, making fiber-to-fiber circularity dependent on investment in materials innovation and collection infrastructure that individual brand initiatives cannot deliver without policy coordination.
words.example3Translation: Aylanma moda ishlab chiqarish jarayonlari, materiallarni tanlash va biznes modellarni tizimli qayta loyihalashni talab qiladi, chunki joriy to'qimachilik qayta ishlash texnologiyasi miqyosda aralash matolarni qayta ishlashga qodir emas, bu toladan-tolaga aylanmani siyosat muvofiqlanmasdan individual brend tashabbuslar yetkazib bera olmaydigan materiallar innovatsiyasi va to'plash infratuzilmasiga investitsiyaga bog'liq qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz aylanma moda tizimlarini va to'qimachilik sanoatida kengaytirilgan ishlab chiqaruvchi mas'uliyatini tartibga solish bo'yicha xalqaro barqaror moda konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The environmental impact of a garment throughout its lifecycle.
words.example1: Buying second-hand clothes significantly reduces your fashion footprint.
words.example1Situation: Siz barqaror turmush tarzi va atrof-muhit ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our brand publishes annual fashion footprint reports detailing the carbon, water, and waste impacts of each product line.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning atrof-muhit ta'siri hisobotini barqarorlik auditorlariga va manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Calculating fashion footprint requires lifecycle assessment that accounts for raw material extraction, processing, dyeing, transportation, consumer use including washing frequency, and end-of-life disposal, revealing that the use phase often contributes substantially to total impact, making garment longevity and care practices as important as production sustainability.
words.example3Translation: Moda izini hisoblash xom ashyoni qazib olish, qayta ishlash, bo'yash, transport, yuvish chastotasini o'z ichiga olgan iste'molchi foydalanish va hayot oxirida utilizatsiya hisobga oluvchi hayot tsikli baholashni talab qiladi, foydalanish fazasi ko'pincha umumiy ta'sirga sezilarli hissa qo'shishini ochib beradi, kiyim-kechak uzoq muddatliligi va parvarish amaliyotlarini ishlab chiqarish barqarorligi kabi muhim qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moda sanoati hayot tsikli baholash metodologiyasi va kiyim-kechak barqarorlik o'lchov standartlari bo'yicha xalqaro barqaror moda konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Excessive prominence or obsession with brand logos on clothing.
words.example1: Logo mania returned to fashion runways as a symbol of conspicuous consumption.
words.example1Situation: Siz moda tendentsiyalari va iste'mol madaniyati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our luxury brand moved away from logo mania toward understated designs to attract a more discerning clientele.
words.example2Situation: Siz brendingizning pozitsiyalash va maqsadli iste'molchi strategiyasini rahbariyat jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Logo mania functions as a form of conspicuous consumption and social signaling, allowing wearers to communicate wealth, brand affiliation, and cultural belonging, with its cyclical resurgence reflecting broader societal shifts between periods of ostentatious display and restrained luxury aesthetics that correlate with macroeconomic confidence cycles.
words.example3Translation: Logo maniyasi ko'zga ko'rinuvchi iste'mol va ijtimoiy signal shakli sifatida ishlaydi, kiyuvchilarga boylik, brend mansubligini va madaniy tegishlilikni muloqot qilishga imkon beradi, uning davriy qayta jonlanishi ko'ringan ko'rsatish va makroiqtisodiy ishonch tsikllari bilan bog'liq jilovlangan luksus estetikasi davrlari o'rtasidagi keng ijtimoiy o'zgarishlarni aks ettiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz luksus brendning ijtimoiy semiotikasi va conspicuous consumption madaniyati bo'yicha xalqaro moda va iste'mol tadqiqotlari konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Manufacturing that ensures fair wages, safe working conditions, and respect for workers' rights.
words.example1: Consumers are increasingly willing to pay more for products from brands committed to ethical production.
words.example1Situation: Siz mas'uliyatli biznes amaliyotlari va iste'molchi xulq-atvori haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company earned ethical production certification after demonstrating fair wages, safe facilities, and worker representation across all our manufacturing sites.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning mehnat standartlari muvofiqligini xalqaro sertifikatlash organlari va xaridorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Ethical production in global fashion supply chains requires moving beyond periodic auditing toward deeper structural changes including living wage commitments, long-term supplier relationships, price transparency, and brand purchasing practice reform, as audit-based compliance systems have repeatedly failed to prevent disasters including factory fires and building collapses.
words.example3Translation: Global moda ta'minot zanjirlarida etik ishlab chiqarish vaqti-vaqti bilan auditdan tashqariga chiqishni talab qiladi va tirik ish haqi majburiyatlari, uzoq muddatli yetkazib beruvchi munosabatlari, narx shaffofligi va brend xarid amaliyoti islohoti kabi chuqurroq tarkibiy o'zgarishlar sari borishi kerak, chunki auditga asoslangan muvofiqlik tizimlari zavod yong'inlari va bino qulamashlari kabi halokatlarga to'sqinlik qilishda qayta-qayta muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moda ta'minot zanjiri mehnat standartlari va global ishlab chiqarish javobgarligi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro savdo va inson huquqlari konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Designing products with a deliberately limited lifespan to encourage frequent replacement.
words.example1: Many smartphones are accused of planned obsolescence because they slow down after a few years.
words.example1Situation: Siz iste'molchi elektronikasi va mahsulot dizayni haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our product team was challenged to move away from planned obsolescence and design goods that last longer and generate less waste.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning barqaror mahsulot strategiyasini boshqaruv kengashiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Planned obsolescence, which involves deliberately engineering products to fail or become unfashionable within a predictable timeframe, has been widely criticised as an environmentally destructive business model that prioritises short-term corporate profit over consumer rights, resource conservation, and long-term ecological sustainability, prompting regulators in several jurisdictions to introduce right-to-repair legislation and mandatory durability standards.
words.example3Translation: Rejalashtirilgan eskirish — mahsulotlarni bashorat qilinadigan muddatda ishdan chiqishi yoki eskirishi uchun ataylab loyihalashni o'z ichiga oladi — iste'molchi huquqlari, resurslarni tejash va uzoq muddatli ekologik barqarorlik ustidan qisqa muddatli korporativ foyda ustuvorligini qo'yuvchi atrof-muhitga zarar keltiruvchi biznes modeli sifatida keng tanqid qilingan va bir qancha jurisdiktsiyalarda qonun chiqaruvchilarni ta'mirlash huquqi to'g'risidagi qonunchilik va majburiy chidamlilik standartlarini joriy etishga undagan.
words.example3Situation: Siz rejalashtirilgan eskirish va iste'molchi huquqlari bo'yicha xalqaro barqaror iqtisodiyot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: State in which an individual can cope with life's stresses and contribute to their community.
words.example1: Regular exercise and good sleep habits support mental well-being.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'lom turmush tarzi va ruhiy salomatlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company launched a mental well-being program offering counselling, flexible hours, and stress management workshops to all employees.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar farovonligi dasturini rahbariyat va HR jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Mental well-being is shaped by the interaction of individual psychological factors with social determinants including income security, housing stability, meaningful work, and social connection, meaning that clinical interventions alone cannot achieve population-level improvements without addressing the structural conditions that generate psychological distress.
words.example3Translation: Ruhiy farovonlik individual psixologik omillarning daromad xavfsizligi, uy-joy barqarorligi, mazmunli ish va ijtimoiy aloqani o'z ichiga olgan ijtimoiy determinantlar bilan o'zaro ta'siri orqali shakllanadi, ya'ni klinik aralashuvlar yolg'iz psixologik distressni keltirib chiqaruvchi tarkibiy sharoitlarni hal qilmasdan aholi darajasidagi yaxshilanishga erisha olmaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ruhiy salomatlikni ijtimoiy determinantlari va aholi farovonligi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro jamoat salomatligi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A mark of disgrace associated with a particular circumstance, quality, or person.
words.example1: Stigma around mental illness prevents many people from seeking help.
words.example1Situation: Siz ruhiy salomatlik va ijtimoiy munosabatlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization runs public education campaigns to reduce the stigma associated with mental health conditions in the workplace.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning ruhiy salomatlik xabardorlik tashabbusini jamoatchilik va korxonalar vakillari bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Mental health stigma operates at personal, social, and structural levels, with self-stigma internalizing negative stereotypes, social stigma producing discrimination in relationships and employment, and structural stigma reflected in funding disparities and policy neglect that together create barriers to help-seeking, treatment access, and recovery.
words.example3Translation: Ruhiy salomatlik ijtimoiy tamg'asi shaxsiy, ijtimoiy va tarkibiy darajalarda ishlaydi, o'z-o'zini tamg'alash salbiy stereotiplarni ichkilashtiradi, ijtimoiy tamg'a munosabatlar va ish joyidagi kamsitishni keltirib chiqaradi va tarkibiy tamg'a moliyalashtirish farqlari va siyosiy e'tiborsizlikni aks ettiradi, ular birgalikda yordam izlash, davolanishga kirish va tiklanishga to'siqlar yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ruhiy salomatlik tamg'asi va tibbiy xizmatlar kirish tenglik siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ruhiy salomatlik va ijtimoiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A mental health condition characterized by excessive fear, worry, and related behavioral disturbances.
words.example1: Anxiety disorders are among the most common mental health conditions worldwide.
words.example1Situation: Siz ruhiy salomatlik holatlari va davolanish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our employee assistance program provides confidential counselling for workers experiencing anxiety disorders and stress-related conditions.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar ruhiy salomatlik qo'llab-quvvatlash xizmatlarini HR jamoasiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Anxiety disorders encompass a spectrum of conditions including generalized anxiety, panic disorder, social anxiety, and specific phobias, sharing features of disproportionate fear responses that impair functioning, with evidence-based treatments including cognitive behavioral therapy and pharmacotherapy demonstrating significant efficacy that remains underutilized due to access barriers and stigma.
words.example3Translation: Tashvish buzilishlari umumlashgan tashvish, vahima buzilishi, ijtimoiy tashvish va o'ziga xos fobiyalarni o'z ichiga olgan holatlari spektrini qamraydi, funksiyani buzuvchi mutanosib bo'lmagan qo'rquv javoblari xususiyatlarini baham ko'radi, kognitiv xulq-atvor terapiyasi va farmakoterapiyani o'z ichiga olgan dalillarga asoslangan davolanishlar kirish to'siqlari va ijtimoiy tamg'a tufayli yetarli darajada ishlatilmayotgan sezilarli samaradorlikni ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashvish buzilishlarining epidemiologiyasi va davolanishga kirishni yaxshilash siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ruhiy salomatlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Treatment for a psychological disorder, especially through talking.
words.example1: Many people find that therapy helps them process difficult emotions and develop healthier coping strategies.
words.example1Situation: Siz ruhiy salomatlikni davolash va o'z-o'zini rivojlantirish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company's employee assistance program provides up to twelve sessions of free therapy for staff experiencing personal or work-related difficulties.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar qo'llab-quvvatlash imtiyozlarini yangi xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Therapy encompasses diverse evidence-based modalities including cognitive behavioral, psychodynamic, acceptance and commitment, and interpersonal approaches, with research suggesting that therapeutic alliance quality predicts outcomes as strongly as specific technique, highlighting the relational dimension of psychological healing that standardized treatment protocols can undervalue.
words.example3Translation: Psixoterapiya kognitiv xulq-atvor, psixodinamik, qabul qilish va majburiyat va shaxslararo yondashuvlarni o'z ichiga olgan xilma-xil dalillarga asoslangan modalliklarni qamraydi, tadqiqotlar terapevtik ittifoq sifati natijalarni o'ziga xos texnika kabi kuchli bashorat qilishini ko'rsatadi, standartlashtirilgan davolanish protokollar past baholashi mumkin bo'lgan psixologik shifo qilishning munosabat o'lchamini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz psixoterapiya samaradorligi tadqiqoti va ruhiy salomatlik xizmat ko'rsatish modellari bo'yicha xalqaro klinik psixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: State of physical and emotional exhaustion caused by prolonged stress, often related to work.
words.example1: Burnout is increasingly common in high-pressure professions like medicine and law.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish joyi stressı va ruhiy salomatlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization introduced mandatory rest periods and workload monitoring to prevent burnout among frontline staff.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning xodimlar farovonligi va mehnat yukini boshqarish siyosatini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Burnout, recognized by the WHO as an occupational phenomenon, reflects systemic organizational and structural failures rather than individual weakness, manifesting through exhaustion, cynicism, and reduced efficacy, requiring organizational redesign of workloads, autonomy, recognition, fairness, and community rather than resilience training that pathologizes individual responses to dysfunctional work environments.
words.example3Translation: DSS tomonidan kasb hodisasi sifatida tan olingan charchoq individual zaiflik o'rniga tizimli tashkiliy va tarkibiy muvaffaqiyatsizliklarni aks ettiradi, holsizlik, kinizm va kamaygan samaradorlik orqali namoyon bo'ladi, buzilgan ish muhitlariga individual javoblarni patologik qiladigan bardoshlilik treningi o'rniga ish yuklari, avtonomiya, tan olish, adolat va jamoatning tashkiliy qayta loyihalashni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyi charchoqlari profilaktikasi va tashkiliy ruhiy salomatlik boshqaruvi bo'yicha xalqaro mehnat va ruhiy salomatlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Practice of focusing awareness on the present moment.
words.example1: Mindfulness meditation can help reduce stress and improve focus in daily life.
words.example1Situation: Siz stress boshqaruvi va ruhiy farovonlik amaliyotlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our workplace wellness program includes daily mindfulness sessions and guided meditation resources for all employees.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ruhiy salomatlik va ishda diqqat dasturini xodimlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Mindfulness-based interventions have demonstrated efficacy for stress reduction, depression relapse prevention, and chronic pain management, yet their widespread adoption in corporate wellness programs risks medicalizing individual responses to structural workplace problems while diverting attention from organizational changes that would more effectively address the sources of distress.
words.example3Translation: Hushyorlikka asoslangan aralashuvlar stress kamaytirish, depressiya qaytalanishini oldini olish va surunkali og'riqni boshqarish uchun samaradorlikni ko'rsatdi, ammo korporativ farovonlik dasturlarida keng qo'llanilishi tarkibiy ish joyi muammolariga individual javoblarni tibbiylashtirish va distress manbalarini yanada samarali hal qiluvchi tashkiliy o'zgartirishlardan e'tiborni chalg'itish xavfiga ega.
words.example3Situation: Siz hushyorlik asosidagi aralashuvlarning klinik samaradorligi va ish joyida ruhiy salomatlikni qo'llash bo'yicha xalqaro ruhiy salomatlik va tashkilot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A deeply distressing or disturbing experience that may cause long-term psychological effects.
words.example1: Trauma from childhood adversity can affect mental health and relationships throughout life.
words.example1Situation: Siz ruhiy salomatlik va inson rivojlanishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our mental health organization provides trauma-informed care training to healthcare workers, teachers, and social workers.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning travmaga sezgir amaliyot dasturini xizmat ko'rsatuvchi hamkorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Trauma-informed approaches recognize that adverse experiences shape neurological development, emotional regulation, and behavioral responses in ways that standard service delivery models often misinterpret as non-compliance or personality disorder, requiring practitioners to shift from asking what is wrong with a person to understanding what happened to them.
words.example3Translation: Travmaga xabardor yondashuvlar noqulay tajribalar nevrologik rivojlanish, hissiy tartibga solish va xulqiy javoblarni standart xizmat ko'rsatish modellari ko'pincha nokonformlik yoki shaxsiyat buzilishi sifatida noto'g'ri talqin qiladigan usullarda shakllantirishi mumkinligini tan oladi, amaliyotchilardan shaxs bilan nima noto'g'ri ekanligini so'rashdan ularga nima yuz berganini tushunishga o'tishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz travmaga xabardor parvarishlash amaliyoti va tizimlarda sog'liqni saqlash va ijtimoiy ta'minot bo'yicha xalqaro ruhiy salomatlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Strategy a person uses to manage stressful situations or difficult emotions.
words.example1: Exercise, journaling, and talking to friends are healthy coping mechanisms for stress.
words.example1Situation: Siz stress boshqaruvi va ruhiy farovonlik amaliyotlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our employee assistance program helps staff identify healthy coping mechanisms and replace harmful patterns with constructive alternatives.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ruhiy salomatlik qo'llab-quvvatlash dasturini yangi xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Coping mechanisms range from adaptive strategies that address stressors directly or regulate emotional responses constructively to maladaptive patterns including avoidance, substance use, and self-harm that provide short-term relief while compounding long-term psychological difficulties, with treatment approaches aiming to build repertoires of flexible, context-appropriate responses.
words.example3Translation: Kurashish mexanizmlari stress omillarini to'g'ridan-to'g'ri hal qiladigan yoki hissiy javoblarni konstruktiv tartibga soladigan adaptiv strategiyalardan qisqa muddatli yengillik beradigan va uzoq muddatli psixologik qiyinchiliklarni murakkablashtiruvchi qochish, modda foydalanish va o'z-o'ziga zarar etkazishni o'z ichiga olgan maladaptiv naqshlargacha bo'lib, davolanish yondashuvlari moslashuvchan, kontekstga mos javoblar repertuarlarini qurishga qaratilgan.
words.example3Situation: Siz stress va travma javoblarining klinik psixologiyasi va adaptiv kurashish ko'nikmalarini o'rgatish bo'yicha xalqaro klinik psixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Mental health condition marked by persistent sadness, loss of interest, and low energy.
words.example1: Depression is a leading cause of disability worldwide and affects people of all ages.
words.example1Situation: Siz ruhiy salomatlik holatlari va global sog'liq yuklar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our occupational health team provides early intervention support for employees showing signs of depression before they reach crisis point.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ish joyi ruhiy salomatlik erta aralashuvi protokolini HR va tibbiyot xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Depression is a heterogeneous condition encompassing biological, psychological, and social dimensions, with evidence suggesting that social and economic factors including poverty, unemployment, loneliness, and housing insecurity are among its strongest predictors, challenging purely biomedical framings that locate causation in neural chemistry rather than life circumstances.
words.example3Translation: Depressiya biologik, psixologik va ijtimoiy o'lchamlarni qamrab oluvchi heterojen holat bo'lib, qashshoqlik, ishsizlik, yolg'izlik va uy-joy xavfsizligi kabi ijtimoiy va iqtisodiy omillar uning eng kuchli bashoratchilaridan ekanligi va sababiyatni hayot sharoiti o'rniga neyral kimyoga joylashtiruvchi sof biomedik tizimchalarga shubha solishini ko'rsatadigan dalillar mavjud.
words.example3Situation: Siz depressiyaning ijtimoiy determinantlva ruhiy salomatlikda ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy tengsizlikni hal qilish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ruhiy salomatlik va jamoat sog'ligi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The capacity to recover quickly from difficulties; mental toughness.
words.example1: Building resilience helps people adapt to setbacks without losing their sense of purpose.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy rivojlanish va ruhiy kuch haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our leadership development program includes resilience training to prepare managers for high-pressure decision-making environments.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning boshqaruv rivojlanish dasturini rahbariyat va HR jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Resilience is not a fixed personality trait but a dynamic capacity shaped by social support networks, material resources, cultural narratives, and institutional protections, meaning that policies promoting resilience without addressing underlying vulnerability are potentially counterproductive if they normalize individual adaptation to preventable harms.
words.example3Translation: Chidamlilik qat'iy shaxsiyat xususiyati emas, balki ijtimoiy qo'llab-quvvatlash tarmoqlari, moddiy resurslar, madaniy rivoyatlar va institutsional himoya tomonidan shakllangan dinamik quvvat, ya'ni asosiy zaiflikni hal qilmasdan chidamlilikni rag'batlantiruvchi siyosatlar oldini olish mumkin bo'lgan zararlarga individual moslashuvni normallashtirsa potensial kontraproduktiv bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz chidamlilik tuzilmaviy omillar va ruhiy salomatlik tengligi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ruhiy salomatlik va ijtimoiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The practice of taking action to preserve or improve one's own health.
words.example1: Self-care practices like adequate sleep and regular breaks improve both physical and mental health.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'lom turmush tarzi va shaxsiy farovonlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our HR team developed self-care guidelines to help employees maintain boundaries between work and personal time.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ish-hayot muvozanati siyosatini xodimlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Self-care discourse has been commercially appropriated to sell wellness products and individualize responsibility for health outcomes that are substantially determined by structural conditions, creating a tension between genuinely supportive personal practices and a neoliberal framing that shifts accountability from institutions to individuals.
words.example3Translation: O'z-o'zini parvarish qilish diskursi farovonlik mahsulotlarini sotish va tarkibiy sharoitlar tomonidan sezilarli darajada belgilanadigan sog'liq natijalari mas'uliyatini individuallashtirish uchun tijorat tomonidan o'zlashtirib olindi, haqiqiy qo'llab-quvvatlovchi shaxsiy amaliyotlar va mas'uliyatni institutlardan shaxslarga o'tkazuvchi neoliberal tizimcha o'rtasida ziddiyat yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'z-o'zini parvarish qilish siyosati va farovonlik sanoatining ijtimoiy ta'siri bo'yicha xalqaro ruhiy salomatlik va jamiyat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Lack of social connections and contact with others.
words.example1: Social isolation among elderly people is a serious public health concern.
words.example1Situation: Siz keksalar farovonligi va jamoat salomatligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our community program tackles social isolation by creating regular group activities for people living alone in urban areas.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoat rivojlanish dasturingizning ijtimoiy ta'sirini moliyalashtiruvchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Social isolation carries mortality risks comparable to smoking fifteen cigarettes daily and is associated with elevated risks of depression, cognitive decline, and cardiovascular disease, yet receives insufficient policy attention relative to its scale and impact, requiring investment in community infrastructure, urban design, and social prescribing that connects isolated individuals to meaningful activities and relationships.
words.example3Translation: Ijtimoiy yolg'izlik kuniga o'n besh sigareta chekishga taqqoslanadigan o'lim xavfini tashiydi va depressiya, kognitiv pasayish va yurak-qon tomir kasalligi ortib borayotgan xavfi bilan bog'liq, ammo uning ko'lami va ta'siriga nisbatan yetarli siyosiy e'tiborni olmaydi, jamoat infratuzilmasi, shaharsozlik dizayni va yolg'iz shaxslarni mazmunli faoliyatlar va munosabatlarga ulovchi ijtimoiy retsept qilishga investitsiyalarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy yolg'izlik epidemiologiyasi va jamoat sog'ligi aralashuvi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro jamoat salomatligi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Providing education and information about mental health conditions to individuals and families.
words.example1: Psychoeducation helps patients understand their diagnosis and actively participate in their treatment.
words.example1Situation: Siz ruhiy salomatlikni davolash va bemor salohiyatini oshirish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our clinical team delivers psychoeducation workshops to families of patients with bipolar disorder to improve home support and reduce relapse rates.
words.example2Situation: Siz klinika ruhiy salomatlik xizmatlarini va oilaviy qo'llab-quvvatlash dasturlarini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Psychoeducation improves treatment outcomes by normalizing help-seeking, building condition management skills, reducing self-stigma, and enhancing medication adherence, representing a cost-effective intervention that can be delivered at scale through group formats and digital platforms to extend mental health support beyond individual therapy capacity.
words.example3Translation: Psikhoeducatsiya yordam izlashni normallashtirish, holat boshqarish ko'nikmalarini rivojlantirish, o'z-o'zini tamg'alashni kamaytirish va dori vositalariga rioya qilishni kuchaytirish orqali davolanish natijalarini yaxshilaydi, individual terapiya quvvatidan tashqarida ruhiy salomatlik qo'llab-quvvatlashni kengaytirish uchun guruh formatlari va raqamli platformalar orqali miqyosda yetkazib berilishi mumkin bo'lgan tejamkor aralashuvni ifodalaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz psikhoeducatsiya samaradorligi va ruhiy salomatlikni targ'ib qilish strategiyalari bo'yicha xalqaro klinik psixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ability to understand, use, and manage one's own emotions in positive ways.
words.example1: Leaders with high emotional intelligence tend to build stronger teams and resolve conflicts more effectively.
words.example1Situation: Siz rahbarlik ko'nikmalari va ish joyi munosabatlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our management training program includes emotional intelligence assessments and coaching to develop more effective people leaders.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning rahbarlik rivojlanish dasturini boshqaruv kengashiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Emotional intelligence encompasses self-awareness, self-regulation, motivation, empathy, and social skills, with research suggesting that it predicts leadership effectiveness, relationship quality, and occupational performance beyond what traditional cognitive intelligence measures capture, though debate continues about its conceptual boundaries and measurement validity as a distinct construct.
words.example3Translation: Hissiy intellekt o'z-o'zini anglash, o'z-o'zini tartibga solish, motivatsiya, empatiya va ijtimoiy ko'nikmalarni qamraydi, tadqiqotlar an'anaviy kognitiv intellekt o'lchovlari qamrab olganidan tashqarida rahbarlik samaradorligi, munosabat sifati va kasbiy samaradorlikni bashorat qilishini ko'rsatadi, ammo alohida konstrukt sifatida uning kontseptual chegaralari va o'lchov asosliligi haqidagi munozara davom etmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz hissiy intellekt tadqiqoti va tashkiliy psixologiya amaliyoti bo'yicha xalqaro ish va tashkiliy psixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Relating to physical symptoms caused or exacerbated by mental factors such as stress.
words.example1: Headaches and digestive problems can sometimes be psychosomatic responses to prolonged stress.
words.example1Situation: Siz stress va jismoniy salomatlik o'rtasidagi bog'liqlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our occupational health team recognizes psychosomatic symptoms as valid indicators of workplace stress that require both medical attention and organizational intervention.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish joyidagi stress va uning jismoniy ko'rinishlari bo'yicha tibbiyot xodimlarga va menejerlariga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Psychosomatic medicine recognizes that the mind-body distinction is artificial, with psychological states producing measurable physiological changes through neuroendocrine and immune pathways, making psychological distress a genuine causal factor in physical illness rather than a secondary or imagined phenomenon that requires both biomedical and psychosocial treatment approaches.
words.example3Translation: Psikosomatik tibbiyot aql-tana farqi sun'iy ekanligini tan oladi, psixologik holatlar neyroeendokrin va immun yo'llar orqali o'lchov fiziologik o'zgarishlarni keltirib chiqaradi, psixologik distressni jismoniy kasallikning ikkinchi darajali yoki xayoliy hodisa o'rniga haqiqiy sabab omili sifatida ko'rsatadi va biomedik hamda psixosocial davolanish yondashuvlarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz psikosomatik tibbiyot va aql-tana integratsiyasi klinik amaliyot bo'yicha xalqaro psikosomatik tibbiyot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Fair and respectful treatment of others in a sports contest.
words.example1: He showed great sportsmanship by congratulating his opponent after losing the match.
words.example1Situation: Siz sport musobaqalari va halol raqobat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our school awards a sportsmanship trophy each year to the student who best demonstrates respect and fairness on the field.
words.example2Situation: Siz maktabingizning sport dasturi va qadriyatlarini ota-onalar va homiylariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sportsmanship, which encompasses not only adherence to the rules of competition but also the demonstration of respect, humility, and grace under pressure, is increasingly recognised as a core educational outcome of youth sport participation, with research suggesting that athletes who receive explicit sportsmanship coaching develop stronger conflict resolution skills and ethical reasoning capacities that transfer meaningfully into professional and civic life.
words.example3Translation: Sportchilik madaniyati — raqobat qoidalariga rioya qilishni emas, balki bosim ostida hurmat, kamtarlik va munosib xulq-atvorni namoyish etishni ham o'z ichiga oladi — yoshlar sportiga ishtirokining asosiy ta'lim natijasi sifatida tobora ko'proq tan olinmoqda, tadqiqotlar esa sportchilik madaniyatiga oid maxsus treninglar olgan sportchilar kasbiy va fuqarolik hayotiga mazmunli tarzda o'tadigan kuchliroq mojarolarni hal qilish ko'nikmalari va axloqiy fikrlash qobiliyatlarini rivojlantirishini ko'rsatmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz yoshlar sporti va xarakter tarbiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro sport ta'limi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Exceptional skill or ability in sports.
words.example1: Her athletic prowess was evident from a young age when she began breaking school records.
words.example1Situation: Siz sport iqtidori va yoshlarni rivojlantirish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our scouting programme identifies children with athletic prowess early and provides them with professional coaching and development pathways.
words.example2Situation: Siz sport akademiyangizning iste'dod izlash strategiyasini homiylar va moliyachilariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While athletic prowess remains the primary criterion for elite selection, contemporary sports science increasingly recognises that physical capability alone is insufficient for sustained high performance, with psychological resilience, tactical intelligence, and recovery management now considered equally determinative of long-term competitive success at the international level.
words.example3Translation: Atletik mahorat elit tanlash uchun asosiy mezon bo'lib qolsa-da, zamonaviy sport fani yuqori jismoniy qobiliyat yolg'iz o'zi uzoq muddatli yuqori natijalarga erishish uchun yetarli emasligini tobora ko'proq tan olmoqda, psixologik chidamlilik, taktik intellekt va tiklanishni boshqarish esa xalqaro darajada uzoq muddatli raqobat muvaffaqiyatini bir xil darajada belgilovchi omillar sifatida ko'rilmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz elit sportchilarni tanlash metodologiyasi va yuqori natijalar fani bo'yicha xalqaro sport psixologiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The bond that holds a team together and motivates collective effort.
words.example1: Team cohesion improved significantly after the players spent a weekend training together.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamoa ishlashi va guruh dinamikasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our coaching staff prioritises team cohesion exercises at the start of every season to build trust and shared purpose among players.
words.example2Situation: Siz sport klubingizning mavsumiy tayyorgarlik metodologiyasini boshqaruv kengashiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Team cohesion, which encompasses both task cohesion related to shared performance goals and social cohesion arising from interpersonal bonds, has been consistently identified in sports psychology literature as a significant predictor of competitive outcomes, with highly cohesive teams demonstrating superior communication patterns, greater resilience under adversity, and more effective collective decision-making in high-pressure situations.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa birligi — umumiy ishlash maqsadlariga bog'liq vazifa birligi va shaxslararo aloqalardan kelib chiqadigan ijtimoiy birlikni o'z ichiga oladi — sport psixologiyasi adabiyotida raqobat natijalarining muhim bashoratchisi sifatida doimiy ravishda aniqlangan, yuqori darajada birlashgan jamoalar esa qiyin vaziyatlarda ustunroq muloqot namunalari, katta chidamlilik va bosimli vaziyatlarda samaraliroq jamoaviy qaror qabul qilishni namoyish etadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa dinamikasi va sport psixologiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro yuqori natijalar konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Use of banned performance-enhancing drugs in sports.
words.example1: The athlete was disqualified after a doping test revealed a banned substance in his system.
words.example1Situation: Siz sport halolligi va musobaqа qoidalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our national federation has introduced stricter doping controls and education programmes to protect the integrity of the sport.
words.example2Situation: Siz milliy sport federatsiyangizning antidoping siyosatini xalqaro tashkilotlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Doping in competitive sport represents a multidimensional ethical failure that simultaneously undermines the principle of fair competition, endangers athlete health through the use of substances with potentially severe long-term side effects, and erodes public trust in sporting institutions, necessitating a coordinated international response that combines rigorous out-of-competition testing, whistleblower protection mechanisms, and meaningful sanctions against both athletes and the officials who facilitate prohibited substance use.
words.example3Translation: Raqobatli sportda doping bir vaqtning o'zida adolatli raqobat tamoyilini buzadigan, uzoq muddatli og'ir nojo'ya ta'sirlarga ega bo'lishi mumkin bo'lgan moddalardan foydalanish orqali sportchi salomatligini xavf ostiga qo'yadigan va sport muassasalariga jamoatchilik ishonchini yo'qotadigan ko'p o'lchovli axloqiy muvaffaqiyatsizlikni ifodalaydi va musobaqa tashqarisidagi qat'iy tekshiruvlar, xabardorlarni himoya qilish mexanizmlari va sportchilarga ham, taqiqlangan moddalardan foydalanishga ko'maklashgan rasmiylarga ham nisbatan mazmunli sanksiyalarni birlashtirgan muvofiqlashtirilgan xalqaro javobni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz antidoping siyosati va sport halolligi boshqaruvi bo'yicha xalqaro olimpiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A factor that gives a competitor an advantage over others.
words.example1: Years of daily practice gave her a competitive edge over other athletes in her age group.
words.example1Situation: Siz sport tayyorgarligi va muvaffaqiyat omillari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sports science team provides athletes with data-driven training programmes that deliver a measurable competitive edge at national and international level.
words.example2Situation: Siz sport ilmi xizmatlaringizni professional sport klublari va milliy federatsiyalarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In modern elite sport, the competitive edge is increasingly derived not from physical training alone but from the sophisticated integration of biomechanical analysis, nutritional periodisation, sleep optimisation, and mental performance coaching, with marginal gains philosophy suggesting that small percentage improvements across multiple performance variables can cumulatively produce decisive advantages in closely contested international competitions.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy elit sportda raqobat ustunligi tobora ko'proq faqat jismoniy mashg'ulotdan emas, balki biomexanik tahlil, oziqlanish periodizatsiyasi, uyquni optimallashtirish va aqliy ishlash koutslingining murakkab integratsiyasidan kelib chiqmoqda, marjinal yutuqlar falsafasi esa bir nechta ishlash o'zgaruvchilari bo'yicha kichik foizli yaxshilanishlar qattiq bahslashilgan xalqaro musobaqalarda hal qiluvchi afzalliklarni to'planib berishi mumkinligini ko'rsatmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz sport texnologiyasi va yuqori natijalar optimizatsiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro sport fani konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Sports at the local, amateur level, often for children and communities.
words.example1: Investing in grassroots sports helps children develop healthy habits and social skills from an early age.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamoat sog'ligi va yoshlar rivojlanishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our foundation has funded grassroots sports programmes in underserved communities to increase physical activity and reduce youth unemployment.
words.example2Situation: Siz xayriya jamg'armangizning jamoat investitsiya dasturlarini homiylar va davlat sheriklarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Grassroots sports infrastructure represents a critical but chronically underfunded component of national sporting ecosystems, with evidence consistently demonstrating that accessible local facilities, volunteer coach training, and subsidised participation programmes are essential preconditions for both elite talent development pipelines and the population-level physical activity improvements that reduce long-term healthcare expenditure.
words.example3Translation: Ommaviy sport infratuzilmasi milliy sport ekotizimlarining muhim, ammo surunkali ravishda kam moliyalashtiriladigan tarkibiy qismini ifodalaydi, dalillar esa qulay mahalliy inshootlar, ko'ngilli murabbiylarni o'qitish va subsidiyalangan ishtirok dasturlari ham elit iste'dod rivojlantirish yo'laqlari, ham uzoq muddatli sog'liqni saqlash xarajatlarini kamaytiradigan aholi darajasidagi jismoniy faollik yaxshilanishi uchun zaruriy oldinshartlar ekanligini doimiy ravishda ko'rsatmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz ommaviy sport siyosati va jamoat sog'lig'i moliyalashtirish bo'yicha xalqaro sport boshqaruvi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ability to sustain prolonged physical or mental effort.
words.example1: Marathon runners train for months to build the endurance needed to complete the race.
words.example1Situation: Siz uzoq masofali yugurish va jismoniy tayyorgarlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our endurance training programme combines aerobic conditioning, strength work, and mental resilience coaching to prepare athletes for sustained high-level performance.
words.example2Situation: Siz sport akademiyangizning mashg'ulot metodologiyasini professional jamoalar va milliy federatsiyalarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Endurance, understood both as a physiological capacity determined by cardiovascular efficiency and metabolic adaptations and as a psychological disposition involving tolerance of discomfort and maintenance of effort under fatigue, is increasingly recognised as a trainable and transferable attribute whose development through sport participation yields measurable benefits for occupational performance, stress regulation, and long-term mental health outcomes.
words.example3Translation: Chidamlilik — yurak-qon tomir samaradorligi va metabolik moslashuvlar bilan belgilanadigan fiziologik qobiliyat va charchoq ostida noqulaylikka chidash va sa'y-harakatni saqlashni o'z ichiga olgan psixologik moyillik sifatida tushuniladi — sport ishtirokida rivojlanishi kasbiy ishlash, stressni tartibga solish va uzoq muddatli ruhiy salomatlik natijalari uchun o'lchanadigan foydalar keltiradigan o'qitiladigan va o'tkazuvchan xususiyat sifatida tobora ko'proq tan olinmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz chidamlilik fani va sport ishtirokining sog'liqqa ta'siri bo'yicha xalqaro fiziologiya va sport tibbiyoti konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The process of managing or running something principally for financial gain.
words.example1: The commercialisation of football has made top clubs some of the wealthiest organisations in the world.
words.example1Situation: Siz professional sport va biznes modellari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our league has carefully managed the commercialisation of broadcasting rights to ensure revenue is shared equitably among all member clubs.
words.example2Situation: Siz sport ligangizning moliyaviy boshqaruv strategiyasini investorlar va media sheriklariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The accelerating commercialisation of elite sport, driven by exponential growth in broadcasting revenues, corporate sponsorship, and global merchandising, has generated significant tensions between sport's traditional values of participation, community, and fair competition and the financial imperatives of entertainment industry logic, raising fundamental governance questions about athlete welfare, competitive balance, and the preservation of sporting integrity in an increasingly market-driven landscape.
words.example3Translation: Translyatsiya daromadlari, korporativ homiylik va global savdo o'sishining eksponent o'sishi bilan bog'liq elit sportning tezlashgan tijoratlashtirishi sport'ning ishtirok, jamoa va adolatli raqobatning an'anaviy qadriyatlari va ko'ngilochar sanoat mantiqining moliyaviy imperativlari o'rtasida sezilarli ziddiyatlar yuzaga keltirdi va tobora bozor tomonidan boshqariladigan muhitda sportchi farovonligi, raqobat balansi va sport halolligini saqlash haqida asosiy boshqaruv savollarini ko'tarilmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz sport tijoratlashtirish va boshqaruv islohoti bo'yicha xalqaro sport iqtisodiyoti konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A sportsperson who competes at the highest professional level.
words.example1: Elite athletes often train twice a day and follow strict nutrition and recovery protocols.
words.example1Situation: Siz professional sport hayoti va tayyorgarlik rejimlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our performance centre provides elite athletes with world-class facilities, sports science support, and psychological coaching under one roof.
words.example2Situation: Siz yuqori natijalar markazingizning xizmatlarini milliy olimpiya qo'mitalari va professional sport tashkilotlariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Elite athletes occupy a unique sociocultural position in which exceptional physical performance generates extraordinary public visibility and commercial value while simultaneously exposing individuals to chronic performance pressure, identity foreclosure risks, and career transition challenges that current sporting institutions remain insufficiently equipped to address, necessitating more comprehensive athlete welfare frameworks that extend support beyond competitive years into post-sport life.
words.example3Translation: Elit sportchilar noyob ijtimoiy-madaniy mavqeni egallaydi, unda g'ayrioddiy jismoniy ishlash katta jamoatchilik ko'rinishi va tijorat qiymatini hosil qiladi, ayni paytda surunkali ishlash bosimi, shaxsiyat to'siqlanishi xavflari va hozirgi sport institutlari etarli darajada hal qilishga tayyor bo'lmagan martabaga o'tish qiyinchiliklariga shaxslarni duchor qiladi va raqobat yillaridan keyin hayotga yordam ko'rsatishni kengaytiruvchi keng qamrovli sportchi farovonligi ramkalarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sportchi farovonligi va karyeradan keyingi o'tish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro sport boshqaruvi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The state of equal representation of men and women in sports.
words.example1: Gender parity in sport means giving women and men equal access to funding, facilities, and media coverage.
words.example1Situation: Siz sport sohasida tenglik va inklyuzivlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our national sports authority has introduced a gender parity policy requiring equal prize money and broadcasting time for men's and women's competitions.
words.example2Situation: Siz milliy sport tashkilotingizning tenglik siyosatini davlat organlari va xalqaro federatsiyalarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Achieving gender parity in sport requires addressing not only structural inequalities in funding allocation and media representation but also deeply embedded cultural attitudes that devalue women's athletic achievement, with research demonstrating that sustained progress depends on the simultaneous implementation of governance quotas, transparent pay equity reporting, investment in female coaching pathways, and the active dismantling of stereotypes that limit girls' sport participation from childhood.
words.example3Translation: Sportda gender tengligiga erishish nafaqat moliyalashtirish taqsimoti va media vakilligidagi tarkibiy tengsizliklarni, balki ayollarning atletik yutuqlarini kamaytiruvchi chuqur o'rnashgan madaniy munosabatlarni ham bartaraf etishni talab qiladi, tadqiqotlar esa barqaror taraqqiyot boshqaruv kvotalari, shaffof ish haqi tengligi hisobotlari, ayol murabbiylar yo'llariga investitsiyalar va bolalikdan qizlarning sportga ishtiroki imkoniyatlarini cheklovchi stereotiplarni faol buzishni bir vaqtda amalga oshirishga bog'liqligini ko'rsatmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz sportda gender tengligi va inklyuziv sport siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ayollar va sport konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Feeling of pride in one's country, often evoked by international sports events.
words.example1: Winning the World Cup filled the entire nation with national pride and joy.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro sport musobaqalari va milliy his-tuyg'ular haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our Olympic committee invests heavily in athlete development because international success generates national pride and increases participation in sport across the country.
words.example2Situation: Siz olimpiya dasturingizning milliy rivojlanishga ta'sirini hukumat va jamoatchilikka taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: National pride generated by international sporting success is a powerful but complex social phenomenon that governments have historically leveraged to build collective identity and political legitimacy, yet scholars caution that its mobilisation can also intensify nationalist sentiment, fuel hostility toward rival nations, and create unrealistic expectations that place damaging psychological pressure on athletes who become involuntary symbols of their country's prestige.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro sport muvaffaqiyati tomonidan yaratilgan milliy g'urur hukumatlar tarixan jamoaviy shaxsiyat va siyosiy legitimlikni shakllantirish uchun foydalangan kuchli, ammo murakkab ijtimoiy hodisadir, biroq olimlar uning harakatga keltirilishi millatchiliq his-tuyg'ularini kuchaytirishi, raqib millatlarga qarshi dushmanlikni avj oldirishi va o'z mamlakatining obro'sining ixtiyorsiz ramzlariga aylanadigan sportchilarga zararli psixologik bosim o'tkazadigan haqiqatga to'g'ri kelmaydigan kutilmalar yaratishi mumkinligi haqida ogohlantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy sport siyosati va xalqaro musobaqalarning ijtimoiy ta'siri bo'yicha xalqaro sport sotsiologiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A way of life involving little or no physical activity.
words.example1: A sedentary lifestyle increases the risk of obesity, heart disease, and diabetes.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'lom turmush tarzi va jismoniy faollik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our workplace wellness programme was designed to combat the sedentary lifestyle that comes with desk-based office work through regular movement breaks and standing desk options.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning xodimlar salomatligi tashabbusini boshqaruv va HR bo'limiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The proliferation of sedentary lifestyle patterns driven by occupational automation, screen-based entertainment, and car-dependent urban design represents one of the most significant preventable contributors to the global non-communicable disease burden, with public health researchers arguing that effective intervention requires not merely individual behaviour change campaigns but systemic environmental redesign that makes physical activity the default rather than the effortful choice.
words.example3Translation: Kasbiy avtomatlashtirish, ekranga asoslangan ko'ngilochar va avtomobilga bog'liq shahar dizayni bilan bog'liq harakatsiz turmush tarzi namunalarining tarqalishi global yuqumli bo'lmagan kasalliklar yukiga eng muhim oldini olish mumkin bo'lgan hissalardan birini ifodalaydi, jamoat salomatligi tadqiqotchilari esa samarali aralashuv nafaqat shaxsiy xulq-atvor o'zgarishi kampaniyalarini, balki jismoniy faollikni sa'y-harakat talab qiladigan tanlov o'rniga odatiy holga keltiradigan tizimli atrof-muhit qayta loyihalashini talab qiladi deb ta'kidlamoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz harakatsiz xulq-atvor epidemiologiyasi va sog'liqni saqlash aralashuvi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro jamoat salomatligi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ability, confidence, and desire to be physically active for life.
words.example1: Physical literacy developed in childhood makes people more likely to stay active throughout their lives.
words.example1Situation: Siz yoshlar jismoniy ta'limi va uzoq muddatli sog'liq haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our primary school curriculum has been redesigned to embed physical literacy development across all year groups, not just during dedicated PE lessons.
words.example2Situation: Siz maktabingizning jismoniy ta'lim strategiyasini ta'lim vazirligi va ota-onalarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Physical literacy, conceptualised as a holistic and lifelong disposition encompassing movement competence, motivational orientation, and embodied self-understanding, offers a more comprehensive framework for physical education than traditional skill-based approaches, with advocates arguing that its cultivation from early childhood is essential for addressing population-level physical inactivity and the associated health, economic, and social costs that burden contemporary healthcare systems.
words.example3Translation: Jismoniy savodxonlik — harakat qobiliyati, motivatsion yo'nalish va gavdaga asoslangan o'zini anglashni o'z ichiga olgan yaxlit va umrbod moyillik sifatida tushuniladi — an'anaviy ko'nikmalarga asoslangan yondashuvlarga qaraganda jismoniy ta'lim uchun kengroq doira taklif qiladi, tarafdorlar esa uni bolalikdan tarbiyalash aholi darajasidagi jismoniy faolsizlik va zamonaviy sog'liqni saqlash tizimlarini yuklaydigan tegishli sog'liq, iqtisodiy va ijtimoiy xarajatlarni bartaraf etish uchun muhim ekanligini ta'kidlamoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz jismoniy savodxonlik siyosati va umr bo'yi jismoniy faollik bo'yicha xalqaro jismoniy ta'lim konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The behaviors, traditions, and collective identity of sports fans.
words.example1: Fan culture at the stadium creates an electric atmosphere that motivates players to perform at their best.
words.example1Situation: Siz sport tomoshabinlari va musobaqa muhiti haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our club has developed a fan culture strategy that celebrates supporter traditions while actively addressing discriminatory behaviour in the stands.
words.example2Situation: Siz futbol klubingizning muxlislar bilan munosabat siyosatini liga boshqaruvi va homiylariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
