words.example3: Fan culture in contemporary sport functions simultaneously as a source of deep communal belonging and shared identity, a commercially exploitable consumer market, and a site of social tension where expressions of passionate support can shade into tribalism, xenophobia, and violence, requiring clubs, governing bodies, and policymakers to navigate the complex challenge of preserving authentic supporter culture while enforcing standards of behaviour that make stadia safe and inclusive environments.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy sportdagi muxlislar madaniyati bir vaqtning o'zida chuqur jamoaviy tegishlilik va umumiy shaxsiyat manbai, tijorat jihatidan ekspluatatsiya qilinadigan iste'molchi bozori va ishtiyoqli qo'llab-quvvatlash ifodalari qabilachilik, ksenofobiya va zo'ravonlikka o'tishi mumkin bo'lgan ijtimoiy zo'riqish joyi sifatida ishlaydi va bu klublar, boshqaruvchi organlar va siyosat ishlovchilarni stadionlarni xavfsiz va inklyuziv muhit qiladigan xulq-atvor standartlarini joriy etish bilan birga haqiqiy muxlislar madaniyatini saqlashning murakkab muammosini hal qilishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sport muxlislari sotsialogiyasi va stadion xavfsizligi boshqaruvi bo'yicha xalqaro sport boshqaruvi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Excessive worry about performing poorly in a competitive situation.
words.example1: Many athletes experience performance anxiety before major competitions, which can affect their concentration and results.
words.example1Situation: Siz sport psixologiyasi va musobaqa tayyorgarligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sports psychology team works with athletes to develop evidence-based strategies for managing performance anxiety, including breathing techniques, visualisation, and pre-competition routines.
words.example2Situation: Siz sport psixologiyasi xizmatlaringizni professional sport tashkilotlari va milliy akademiyalarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Performance anxiety in elite sport, characterised by cognitive symptoms including intrusive thoughts and attentional narrowing alongside somatic manifestations such as muscle tension and elevated heart rate, represents a significant barrier to optimal competitive performance and long-term athlete wellbeing, with contemporary sport psychology research indicating that interventions combining acceptance and commitment therapy, mindfulness-based stress reduction, and systematic desensitisation produce the most durable reductions in anxiety symptomatology.
words.example3Translation: Elit sportda ishlash tashvishi — tajovuzkor fikrlar va diqqat torayishi kabi kognitiv belgilar va mushak tarangligi va yurak urish tezligining oshishi kabi somatik ko'rinishlar bilan tavsiflanadi — optimal raqobat ishlashi va sportchining uzoq muddatli farovonligiga muhim to'siqni ifodalaydi, zamonaviy sport psixologiyasi tadqiqotlari esa qabul va majburiyat terapiyasini, mindfulness asosidagi stress kamaytirishni va tizimli desensibilizatsiyani birlashtiradigan aralashuvlar tashvish simptomlarini eng barqaror kamaytirishni ta'minlashini ko'rsatmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz ishlash tashvishi va sport psixologiyasi aralashuvi bo'yicha xalqaro sport psixologiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A species facing a rapid decrease in population or loss of habitat.
words.example1: The giant panda was once critically endangered but conservation efforts have helped increase its population.
words.example1Situation: Siz yovvoyi tabiat muhofazasi va hayvonlar populyatsiyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organisation works with governments to identify and protect endangered species before their populations fall below viable recovery thresholds.
words.example2Situation: Siz tabiatni muhofaza qilish tashkilotingizning dasturlarini xalqaro moliyachilar va hukumat sheriklarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The designation of a species as endangered under international frameworks such as the IUCN Red List triggers a cascade of conservation responses including habitat protection, captive breeding programmes, and trade restrictions, yet critics argue that listing processes remain insufficiently proactive, with many species receiving protected status only after population declines have already reached a point where recovery requires extraordinary and expensive intervention.
words.example3Translation: IUCN Qizil ro'yxati kabi xalqaro doiralar doirasida turni yo'qolib borayotgan deb belgilash yashash joyi muhofazasi, sun'iy ko'payish dasturlari va savdo cheklovlarini o'z ichiga olgan muhofaza choralarining kaskadini keltirib chiqaradi, biroq tanqidchilar ro'yxatga olish jarayonlari etarlicha proaktiv emasligini, ko'plab turlar esa populyatsiya kamayishi allaqachon tiklanish favqulodda va qimmat aralashuvni talab qiladigan darajaga yetgandan keyingina himoya maqomini olishini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yo'qolib borayotgan turlar siyosati va xalqaro muhofaza huquqi bo'yicha xalqaro biologik xilma-xillik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The decline in the variety of plant and animal life in a habitat or globally.
words.example1: Biodiversity loss threatens the stability of ecosystems that humans depend on for food and clean water.
words.example1Situation: Siz atrof-muhit muammolari va ekologik barqarorlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our environmental impact assessment revealed that the proposed development would contribute to significant biodiversity loss in the surrounding wetland area.
words.example2Situation: Siz qurilish loyihangizning atrof-muhitga ta'sirini regulyatorlar va jamoatchilikka taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Biodiversity loss, now proceeding at rates estimated to be one hundred to one thousand times higher than natural background extinction levels, represents a planetary boundary transgression with potentially irreversible consequences for ecosystem function, agricultural resilience, and pharmaceutical discovery, prompting scientists to characterise the current period as the sixth mass extinction event in Earth's geological history.
words.example3Translation: Biologik xilma-xillikning yo'qolishi — hozirda tabiiy fon yo'qolish darajalaridan yuz dan ming barobar yuqori deb baholangan sur'atlarda davom etmoqda — ekotizim funksiyasi, qishloq xo'jaligi chidamliligi va farmatsevtik kashfiyotlar uchun qaytarib bo'lmaydigan oqibatlar bilan sayyora chegarasini buzishni ifodalaydi va olimlarni hozirgi davrni Yerning geologik tarixidagi oltinchi ommaviy yo'qolish hodisasi sifatida tavsiflashga undamoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz biologik xilma-xillik inqirozi va global ekotizim boshqaruvi bo'yicha xalqaro atrof-muhit siyosati konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The process by which a natural habitat becomes incapable of supporting its native species.
words.example1: Habitat destruction caused by deforestation is one of the leading causes of species extinction worldwide.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'rmonlarni yo'q qilish va yovvoyi tabiatga ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our conservation team monitors habitat destruction in protected areas using satellite imagery to detect illegal land clearing before it causes irreversible damage.
words.example2Situation: Siz tabiatni muhofaza qilish monitoring tizimingizni davlat organlari va xalqaro sheriklariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Habitat destruction, driven primarily by agricultural expansion, urban development, and extractive industries, remains the single greatest threat to global biodiversity, with ecologists emphasising that the fragmentation of continuous habitat into isolated patches is particularly devastating because it disrupts species movement corridors, reduces genetic exchange between populations, and creates edge effects that render even nominally protected areas vulnerable to cascading ecological degradation.
words.example3Translation: Asosan qishloq xo'jaligi kengayishi, shahar qurilishi va qazib oluvchi sanoatlar tomonidan boshqariladigan yashash joyining yo'q qilinishi global biologik xilma-xillikka eng katta tahdid bo'lib qolmoqda, ekologlar esa uzluksiz yashash joyining izolyatsiyalangan bo'laklarga bo'linishi ayniqsa halokatli ekanligini ta'kidlaydi, chunki u turlar harakati yo'laklarini buzadi, populyatsiyalar o'rtasidagi genetik almashinuvni kamaytiradi va hatto rasmiy himoyalangan hududlarni ham ketma-ket ekologik degradatsiyaga zaif qiluvchi chegara ta'sirlarini yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yashash joyi muhofazasi siyosati va er foydalanish boshqaruvi bo'yicha xalqaro ekologiya va muhofaza konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The illegal hunting, capturing, or killing of wild animals.
words.example1: Poaching has driven several rhino species to the brink of extinction due to demand for their horns.
words.example1Situation: Siz yovvoyi tabiat jinoyatchiligi va turlarni muhofaza qilish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our anti-poaching unit uses drone surveillance and community ranger networks to protect elephants across the reserve.
words.example2Situation: Siz qo'riqxona boshqaruvingizning brakonierlikka qarshi strategiyasini homiylar va hukumat sheriklariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Poaching represents a complex conservation challenge that cannot be addressed through enforcement alone, as research consistently demonstrates that sustainable reductions in illegal wildlife killing require simultaneous investment in community-based conservation models that provide local populations with economic alternatives, demand reduction campaigns in consumer markets, and international judicial cooperation to dismantle the organised criminal networks that coordinate and profit from wildlife trafficking.
words.example3Translation: Brakonierlik faqat huquqni muhofaza qilish orqali hal qilib bo'lmaydigan murakkab muhofaza muammosidir, chunki tadqiqotlar noqonuniy yovvoyi tabiat o'ldiruvini barqaror kamaytirish mahalliy aholini iqtisodiy alternativlar bilan ta'minlaydigan jamoaga asoslangan muhofaza modellariga, iste'molchi bozorlaridagi talabni kamaytirish kampaniyalariga va yovvoyi tabiat savdosini muvofiqlashtiradigan va undan foyda oladigan uyushgan jinoyat tarmoqlarini tugatish uchun xalqaro sud hamkorligiga bir vaqtda investitsiyalarni talab qilishini doimiy ravishda ko'rsatmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz yovvoyi tabiat jinoyatchiligi va transmilliy jinoyatchilikka qarshi muhofaza siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro yovvoyi tabiat huquqi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Actions to protect and preserve natural resources and wildlife.
words.example1: Conservation efforts by local communities have helped restore fish populations in coastal waters.
words.example1Situation: Siz tabiatni muhofaza qilish tashabbuslari va jamoat ishtiroki haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our foundation funds conservation efforts across three continents, focusing on habitat restoration and community education programmes.
words.example2Situation: Siz xayriya jamg'armangizning global muhofaza dasturlarini xalqaro donorlar va sherik tashkilotlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective conservation efforts increasingly require moving beyond traditional protectionist models toward integrated approaches that recognise the interdependence of human wellbeing and ecological health, with evidence suggesting that conservation programmes achieving the greatest long-term success are those that meaningfully engage indigenous communities as knowledge holders and stewards, align ecological goals with local economic development priorities, and secure sustained political commitment across successive government administrations.
words.example3Translation: Samarali muhofaza sa'y-harakatlari tobora ko'proq an'anaviy himoyachilik modellaridan inson farovonligi va ekologik salomatlikning o'zaro bog'liqligini tan oladigan integratsiyalashgan yondashuvlarga o'tishni talab qilmoqda, dalillar esa eng katta uzoq muddatli muvaffaqiyatga erishadigan muhofaza dasturlari mahalliy aholi va bilim egalari va boshqaruvchilar sifatida tub aholini mazmunli jalb etadigan, ekologik maqsadlarni mahalliy iqtisodiy rivojlanish ustuvorliklari bilan muvofiqlashtiruvchi va ketma-ket hukumat ma'muriyatlari bo'ylab barqaror siyosiy majburiyatni ta'minlaydigan dasturlar ekanligini ko'rsatmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz muhofaza strategiyasi va jamoaga asoslangan tabiatni boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro muhofaza biologiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Breeding animals in controlled environments to increase population numbers.
words.example1: Captive breeding programmes have successfully increased the number of Arabian oryx in the wild.
words.example1Situation: Siz hayvonlarni muhofaza qilish va tur tiklanishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our zoo participates in an international captive breeding network that coordinates genetic management to maintain healthy, diverse animal populations.
words.example2Situation: Siz hayvonot bog'ingizning muhofaza missiyasi va xalqaro hamkorliklarini homiylar va jamoatchilikka taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Captive breeding, while representing a valuable last-resort tool for preventing immediate extinction, is widely recognised among conservation biologists as an insufficient long-term solution unless accompanied by parallel efforts to restore and secure sufficient wild habitat, address the underlying threats that drove population decline, and develop robust reintroduction protocols that maximise post-release survival rates in increasingly fragmented and human-modified landscapes.
words.example3Translation: Sun'iy ko'payish darhol yo'qolishning oldini olish uchun qimmatli so'nggi chora vositasini ifodalaydi, biroq muhofaza biologlari orasida keng tan olinganidek, bu yovvoyi yashash joyini tiklash va ta'minlashga parallel sa'y-harakatlar, populyatsiya kamayishiga olib kelgan asosiy tahdidlarni bartaraf etish va tobora bo'lingan va inson tomonidan o'zgartirilgan landshaftlarda ozod qilingandan keyin tirik qolish darajasini maksimal darajaga ko'taradigan mustahkam qayta kirgazish protokollarini ishlab chiqish bilan birga bo'lmasa, etarli uzoq muddatli yechim emas.
words.example3Situation: Siz sun'iy ko'payish etikasi va qayta kirgazish ekologiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro muhofaza biologiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The illegal trade of animals and animal parts.
words.example1: Wildlife trafficking is one of the most profitable illegal industries in the world, after drugs and arms.
words.example1Situation: Siz yovvoyi tabiat jinoyatchiligi va uning ekologik oqibatlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our customs agency has strengthened border controls and staff training to detect and intercept wildlife trafficking shipments more effectively.
words.example2Situation: Siz bojxona agentligingizning yovvoyi tabiat jinoyatchiligiga qarshi choralarini xalqaro hamkor tashkilotlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Wildlife trafficking, estimated to generate billions of dollars annually for transnational criminal organisations, poses a dual threat to biodiversity and public health, as the movement of live animals across international borders creates pathways for zoonotic disease transmission while simultaneously driving population declines in the world's most iconic and ecologically significant species, necessitating coordinated multilateral enforcement, financial intelligence cooperation, and targeted consumer demand reduction strategies.
words.example3Translation: Transmilliy jinoyat tashkilotlari uchun yillik milliardlab dollar daromad keltirishi taxmin qilinadigan yovvoyi tabiat savdosi biologik xilma-xillik va jamoat salomatligi uchun ikki tomonlama tahdid tug'diradi, chunki tirik hayvonlarning xalqaro chegaralar orqali harakati zoonotik kasallik tarqalishi uchun yo'llar yaratadi va ayni vaqtda dunyoning eng mashhur va ekologik jihatdan muhim turlarida populyatsiya kamayishini keltirib chiqaradi va muvofiqlashtirilgan ko'p tomonlama ijro, moliyaviy razvedka hamkorligi va maqsadli iste'molchi talabini kamaytirish strategiyalarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yovvoyi tabiat savdosiga qarshi siyosat va transmilliy jinoyatchilikni bostirish bo'yicha xalqaro muhofaza huquqi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A species on which other species depend; if removed, the ecosystem would change drastically.
words.example1: Wolves are a keystone species because their presence controls deer populations and allows vegetation to recover.
words.example1Situation: Siz ekotizim dinamikasi va turlararo bog'liqlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our ecological restoration project identified the beaver as a keystone species and reintroduced it to stabilise riverbank habitats across the region.
words.example2Situation: Siz ekologik tiklanish loyihangizning ilmiy asosi va natijalarini hukumat va moliyachilariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The keystone species concept, which highlights the disproportionately large ecological role that certain species play relative to their biomass or abundance, has profoundly influenced conservation prioritisation frameworks by demonstrating that protecting functionally critical species can generate ecosystem-wide benefits that extend far beyond the conservation of the target species itself, making keystone species identification a powerful tool for maximising the impact of limited conservation resources.
words.example3Translation: Tayanch tur tushunchasi — ma'lum turlar o'zlarining biomassasi yoki ko'pligiga nisbatan o'ynaydigan mutanosib bo'lmagan katta ekologik rolni ta'kidlaydi — funksional jihatdan muhim turlarni muhofaza qilish maqsadli tur muhofazasidan ancha uzoqqa cho'ziladigan ekotizim miqyosidagi foydalarni keltirib chiqarishi mumkinligini ko'rsatib, muhofaza ustuvorlik doiralariga chuqur ta'sir ko'rsatdi va tayanch turlarni aniqlashni cheklangan muhofaza resurslarining ta'sirini maksimal darajaga ko'tarish uchun kuchli vositaga aylantirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muhofaza ekologiyasi va ekotizim funktsiyasi boshqaruvi bo'yicha xalqaro ekologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Benefits that humans freely gain from the natural environment and properly functioning ecosystems.
words.example1: Forests provide ecosystem services such as clean air, fresh water, and climate regulation.
words.example1Situation: Siz tabiatning inson farovonligiga hissasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our environmental consultancy helps businesses quantify the ecosystem services provided by natural assets on their land to support sustainable management decisions.
words.example2Situation: Siz atrof-muhit maslahatchiligi xizmatlaringizni korporativ mijozlar va moliyaviy institutlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The ecosystem services framework, which categorises nature's contributions to human wellbeing into provisioning, regulating, cultural, and supporting services, has transformed conservation economics by enabling the monetisation of previously unpriced natural capital, though critics caution that reducing ecological relationships to financial values risks subordinating biodiversity protection to market logic and may inadequately capture the intrinsic and relational values that motivate many people's commitment to nature conservation.
words.example3Translation: Ekotizim xizmatlari doirasi — tabiatning inson farovonligiga hissasini ta'minlovchi, tartibga soluvchi, madaniy va qo'llab-quvvatlovchi xizmatlarga tasniflaydi — ilgari narxlanmagan tabiiy kapitalning monetizatsiyasiga imkon berish orqali muhofaza iqtisodini o'zgartirdi, biroq tanqidchilar ekologik munosabatlarni moliyaviy qiymatlarga kamaytirish biologik xilma-xillikni muhofaza qilishni bozor mantig'iga bo'ysundirilishi xavfini tug'diradi va ko'plab odamlarning tabiatni muhofaza qilishga sodiqligini rag'batlantiradigan ichki va munosabatli qadriyatlarni etarlicha aks ettirmasligi mumkin deb ogohlantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ekotizim xizmatlari baholash metodologiyasi va tabiiy kapital hisobi bo'yicha xalqaro atrof-muhit iqtisodiyoti konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Non-native species that spread widely and cause harm to the ecosystem.
words.example1: Invasive species like the cane toad have caused significant damage to native wildlife in Australia.
words.example1Situation: Siz ekologik muammolar va tashqi turlarning ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our biosecurity team implements strict inspection protocols at ports of entry to prevent invasive species from establishing themselves in our coastal ecosystems.
words.example2Situation: Siz biosecurity strategiyangizni hukumat regulyatorlari va xalqaro savdo sheriklariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Invasive species represent one of the primary drivers of native biodiversity loss globally, with their ecological impacts ranging from direct predation and competition to more subtle disruptions of pollination networks, nutrient cycling, and fire regimes, while the economic costs of management and lost ecosystem services run to hundreds of billions of dollars annually, highlighting the critical importance of prevention-focused biosecurity systems over reactive eradication campaigns.
words.example3Translation: Bosqinchi turlar global miqyosda mahalliy biologik xilma-xillikning yo'qolishining asosiy harakatlantiruvchi omillaridan birini ifodalaydi, ularning ekologik ta'sirlari to'g'ridan-to'g'ri yirtqichlik va raqobatdan changlashtirish tarmoqlari, ozuqa aylanishi va yong'in rejimlarining yanada nozik buzilishlarigacha yetadi, boshqaruv va yo'qotilgan ekotizim xizmatlarining iqtisodiy xarajatlari esa yillik yuz milliardlab dollarga yetadi va reaktiv tugatish kampaniyalari ustidan oldini olishga yo'naltirilgan biosecurity tizimlarining muhim ahamiyatini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz bosqinchi turlar boshqaruvi va biosecurity siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro biologik xilma-xillik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Ocean zones where human activities are more strictly regulated to protect natural resources.
words.example1: Marine protected areas help fish populations recover by limiting commercial fishing in sensitive zones.
words.example1Situation: Siz dengiz muhofazasi va baliqchilik boshqaruvi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our government has committed to designating thirty percent of national waters as marine protected areas by the end of the decade in line with global biodiversity targets.
words.example2Situation: Siz milliy dengiz muhofazasi strategiyangizni xalqaro atrof-muhit forumlarida va diplomatik uchrashuvlarda taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Marine protected areas, when effectively enforced and strategically located to encompass ecologically critical habitats such as spawning grounds, nursery areas, and migratory corridors, have demonstrated measurable capacity to restore fish biomass, enhance coral reef resilience, and generate spillover benefits for adjacent fisheries, though research consistently emphasises that paper parks with inadequate surveillance and enforcement resources fail to deliver meaningful conservation outcomes regardless of their formal designation.
words.example3Translation: Dengiz muhofaza hududlari samarali ijro etilganda va tuxum qo'yish joylari, bolalar yashash joylari va migratsiya yo'laqlari kabi ekologik jihatdan muhim yashash joylarini o'z ichiga olish uchun strategik joylashtirilganda baliq biomasasini tiklash, marjon rifi chidamliligini oshirish va qo'shni baliqchiliklar uchun qo'shimcha foyda yaratish qobiliyatini o'lchanadigan darajada ko'rsatdi, biroq tadqiqotlar etarli kuzatuv va ijro resurslari bo'lmagan qog'oz parklarning rasmiy belgilanishidan qat'i nazar mazmunli muhofaza natijalarini etkazib bera olmasligini doimiy ravishda ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz dengiz muhofaza hududi samaradorligi va okean boshqaruvi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro dengiz biologiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An effort to re-establish a species in an area where it has become extinct or endangered.
words.example1: A reintroduction program successfully brought white-tailed eagles back to parts of England after centuries of absence.
words.example1Situation: Siz yovvoyi tabiatni tiklash va tur tiklanishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our conservation partnership launched a reintroduction program for the Eurasian lynx, working closely with farmers and local communities to address concerns about livestock predation.
words.example2Situation: Siz yovvoyi tabiatni tiklash loyihangizni hukumat organlari va manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Reintroduction programs represent some of the most logistically complex and politically contested interventions in conservation practice, requiring not only rigorous assessment of habitat suitability, prey availability, and genetic source population quality, but also extensive community engagement to manage the conflicts that inevitably arise when apex predators or other ecologically disruptive species are returned to landscapes shared with agricultural and pastoral communities.
words.example3Translation: Qayta kirgazish dasturlari muhofaza amaliyotidagi eng murakkab logistik va siyosiy jihatdan bahs-munozarali aralashuvlardan ba'zilarini ifodalaydi, nafaqat yashash joyi yaroqliligi, o'lja mavjudligi va genetik manba populyatsiya sifatini qat'iy baholashni, balki qishloq xo'jaligi va chorvachilik jamoalari bilan bo'lishiladigan landshaftlarga cho'qqisi yirtqichlar yoki boshqa ekologik jihatdan buzg'unchi turlar qaytarilganda muqarrar ravishda kelib chiqadigan ziddiyatlarni boshqarish uchun keng jamoat ishtirokini ham talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tur qayta kirgazish ekologiyasi va jamoat muhofazasi hamkorligi bo'yicha xalqaro yovvoyi tabiatni tiklash konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Hunting practices that do not lead to long-term decline of animal populations.
words.example1: Sustainable hunting requires setting quotas based on population surveys to ensure species are not overhunted.
words.example1Situation: Siz yovvoyi tabiatni boshqarish va barqaror resurs foydalanish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our wildlife authority issues sustainable hunting licences only after conducting annual population assessments and consulting with conservation scientists.
words.example2Situation: Siz yovvoyi tabiat boshqaruvi organingizning litsenziya berish jarayoni va ilmiy asosini manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sustainable hunting occupies a contested position within conservation discourse, with proponents arguing that well-regulated trophy hunting and subsistence harvesting can generate revenue streams and local community incentives that make wildlife worth more alive than converted to agricultural land, while critics contend that the ecological, ethical, and reputational costs of lethal wildlife use outweigh its conservation benefits and that alternative non-consumptive economic models such as ecotourism can deliver equivalent financial returns without requiring the killing of animals.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror ov muhofaza diskursida bahs-munozarali mavqeni egallaydi, tarafdorlar yaxshi tartibga solingan trofey ovi va tirikchilik uchun yig'ish yovvoyi tabiatni qishloq xo'jaligi yeriga aylantirish uchun tirikdan ko'ra qimmatroq qiladigan daromad oqimlari va mahalliy jamoat rag'batlarini yarata oladi deb ta'kidlaydi, tanqidchilar esa o'ldirib foydalanadigan yovvoyi tabiatning ekologik, axloqiy va obro'ga oid xarajatlari uning muhofaza foydalaridan ustun keladi va ekoturizm kabi muqobil iste'mol qilmaydigan iqtisodiy modellar hayvonlarni o'ldirmasdan teng moliyaviy daromad olishi mumkin deb ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror ov siyosati va yovvoyi tabiatdan foydalanish etikasi bo'yicha xalqaro muhofaza boshqaruvi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Variety of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species.
words.example1: Low genetic diversity in cheetah populations makes them highly vulnerable to disease outbreaks.
words.example1Situation: Siz tur omon qolishi va biologik xilma-xillik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our captive breeding programme uses genetic databases to pair animals strategically and maintain sufficient genetic diversity across the managed population.
words.example2Situation: Siz hayvonot bog'ingizning ilmiy boshqaruv amaliyotlarini muhofaza sheriklariga va akademik muassasalarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Genetic diversity, which underpins a species' adaptive capacity to respond to environmental change, disease pressure, and novel ecological challenges, is increasingly recognised as a foundational conservation target alongside species abundance and habitat extent, with population geneticists emphasising that small, isolated populations subject to inbreeding depression and genetic drift can experience rapid fitness decline even when absolute numbers appear superficially stable.
words.example3Translation: Genetik xilma-xillik — atrof-muhit o'zgarishi, kasallik bosimi va yangi ekologik muammolarga javob berish uchun turning moslashuvchan qobiliyatini ta'minlaydi — tur ko'pligi va yashash joyi ko'lami bilan birga asosiy muhofaza maqsadi sifatida tobora ko'proq tan olinmoqda, populyatsiya genetikchilari esa mutlaq sonlar sirtdan barqaror ko'ringanda ham inbriding depressiyasi va genetik drift ta'siridagi kichik, izolyatsiyalangan populyatsiyalar tez jismoniy pasayishni boshdan kechirishi mumkinligini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muhofaza genetikasi va kichik populyatsiya boshqaruvi bo'yicha xalqaro muhofaza biologiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A species selected for conservation whose protection indirectly benefits many other species in the ecosystem.
words.example1: The tiger is an umbrella species because protecting its vast forest habitat also preserves thousands of other plants and animals.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhofaza strategiyasi va ekotizim boshqaruvi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our national park system was designed around umbrella species requirements, ensuring that habitat corridors large enough for tigers and elephants also support hundreds of smaller species.
words.example2Situation: Siz milliy park boshqaruvi strategiyangizni hukumat organlari va xalqaro muhofaza sheriklariga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The umbrella species concept offers conservation planners a pragmatic tool for designing protected area networks that deliver biodiversity benefits disproportionate to their spatial extent, though ecologists caution that the effectiveness of umbrella species as surrogates for broader biodiversity depends critically on the ecological congruence between the target species' habitat requirements and those of the co-occurring species whose conservation is the ultimate objective.
words.example3Translation: Soyabon tur tushunchasi muhofaza rejalashtiruvchilariga o'z fazoviy ko'lamiga mutanosib bo'lmagan biologik xilma-xillik foydalarini etkazuvchi muhofaza hududi tarmoqlarini loyihalash uchun pragmatik vosita taklif qiladi, biroq ekologlar soyabon turlarning keng biologik xilma-xillik uchun o'rinbosarlar sifatidagi samaradorligi maqsadli tur yashash joyi talablari va muhofazasi yakuniy maqsad bo'lgan birga yashaydigan turlarning talablari o'rtasidagi ekologik muvofiqlikka kritik darajada bog'liqligini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz soyabon tur metodologiyasi va muhofaza hududlarini rejalashtirish bo'yicha xalqaro muhofaza ekologiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A type of AI that enables systems to learn and improve from experience without explicit programming.
words.example1: Machine learning helps email apps automatically filter spam messages.
words.example1Situation: Siz sun'iy intellekt texnologiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company uses machine learning algorithms to predict customer purchasing behavior and personalize product recommendations.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi texnologiya strategiyangizni jamoa yig'ilishida taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Machine learning models, when trained on sufficiently large and representative datasets, can identify complex patterns that would be impossible for human analysts to detect manually, enabling organizations to make data-driven decisions with unprecedented accuracy and speed.
words.example3Translation: Mashinaviy o'rganish modellari, yetarlicha katta va vakillik ma'lumotlar to'plamida o'qitilganda, inson analistlari qo'lda aniqlay olmaydigan murakkab naqshlarni aniqlashi mumkin, bu esa tashkilotlarga misli ko'rilmagan aniqlik va tezlik bilan ma'lumotlarga asoslangan qarorlar qabul qilish imkonini beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ma'lumotlar fani va mashinaviy o'rganish bo'yicha xalqaro texnologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Systematic errors caused by automated systems due to biased training data.
words.example1: Algorithmic bias can cause a hiring tool to unfairly reject qualified candidates.
words.example1Situation: Siz sun'iy intellektning kamchiliklari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization conducted an independent audit to detect and correct algorithmic bias in our automated loan approval system.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy texnologiyalar va adolatli kreditlash amaliyotlari bo'yicha hamkorlaringizga hisobot taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Algorithmic bias poses a significant threat to equitable outcomes in high-stakes domains such as criminal justice, healthcare, and employment, as systems trained on historically skewed data tend to perpetuate and even amplify existing societal inequalities, underscoring the urgent need for rigorous fairness auditing and diverse training datasets.
words.example3Translation: Algoritmik tarafkashlik jinoiy adolat, sog'liqni saqlash va bandlik kabi yuqori tavakkalchilikli sohalarda adolatli natijalarga jiddiy tahdid soladi, chunki tarixan noto'g'ri ma'lumotlarda o'qitilgan tizimlar mavjud ijtimoiy tengsizliklarni davom ettirish va hatto kuchaytirish tendentsiyasiga ega, bu esa qattiq adolatlilik auditi va xilma-xil o'quv ma'lumotlar to'plamlariga shoshilinch ehtiyojni ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz axloqli sun'iy intellekt va algoritmik adolat bo'yicha xalqaro siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Technology used to perform tasks with minimal human input.
words.example1: Automation in car factories allows robots to assemble vehicles faster than humans.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishlab chiqarish texnologiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company invested in warehouse automation to reduce order processing time and minimize human error.
words.example2Situation: Siz operatsion samaradorlik strategiyangizni rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: As automation increasingly displaces routine cognitive and manual tasks, policymakers face the dual challenge of facilitating economic productivity gains while simultaneously designing robust social safety nets and retraining programs to support workers whose livelihoods are disrupted by the rapid adoption of intelligent machines.
words.example3Translation: Avtomatlashtirish odatiy kognitiv va qo'lda bajariladigan vazifalarni tobora ko'proq siqib chiqarishi bilan, siyosatchilar iqtisodiy unumdorlik o'sishini ta'minlash va bir vaqtning o'zida aqlli mashinalarning tez joriy etilishi natijasida tirikchiligi izdan chiqqan ishchilarni qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun mustahkam ijtimoiy xavfsizlik to'rlari va qayta tayyorlash dasturlarini loyihalashning ikki tomonlama muammosiga duch kelmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz mehnat bozori va avtomatlashtirish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro iqtisodiy forum konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Hypothetical point when AI surpasses human intelligence, leading to rapid, unpredictable change.
words.example1: Some scientists believe the technological singularity could arrive within this century.
words.example1Situation: Siz sun'iy intellektning kelajagi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research institute published a report examining the economic and social implications of a potential technological singularity.
words.example2Situation: Siz kelajak texnologiyalari va ularning jamiyatga ta'siri bo'yicha manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The concept of technological singularity, popularized by futurists such as Ray Kurzweil, posits that once artificial general intelligence surpasses human cognitive capacity, the resulting recursive self-improvement cycle will generate transformative changes so profound and rapid that existing social, economic, and philosophical frameworks will prove wholly inadequate to anticipate or govern them.
words.example3Translation: Texnologik singularity tushunchasi, Rey Kurzveyl kabi futuristlar tomonidan ommalashtirilgan, umumiy sun'iy intellekt inson kognitiv qobiliyatini oshib ketgach, natijada paydo bo'ladigan rekursiv o'z-o'zini takomillashtirish tsikli mavjud ijtimoiy, iqtisodiy va falsafiy asoslar ularni oldindan bilish yoki boshqarish uchun mutlaqo yetarli bo'lmagan darajada chuqur va tez o'zgarishlarni yaratishini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sun'iy intellektning kelajagi va uning sivilizatsiyaga ta'siri bo'yicha xalqaro futurologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: AI systems designed to be fair, transparent, and accountable.
words.example1: Ethical AI ensures that facial recognition software does not discriminate against any group.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnologiya va adolat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company adopted an ethical AI framework to ensure all automated decisions can be explained and challenged by affected individuals.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ mas'uliyat va texnologiya boshqaruvi bo'yicha direktorlar kengashiga hisobot taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The development of ethical AI requires interdisciplinary collaboration among computer scientists, ethicists, legal scholars, and civil society representatives to establish normative principles and enforceable standards that ensure AI systems respect fundamental human rights, avoid perpetuating structural discrimination, and remain subject to meaningful human oversight throughout their operational lifecycle.
words.example3Translation: Axloqiy sun'iy intellektni rivojlantirish kompyuter olimlari, etiklar, huquqshunoslar va fuqarolik jamiyati vakillari o'rtasidagi fanlararo hamkorlikni talab qiladi, bu esa sun'iy intellekt tizimlari asosiy inson huquqlarini hurmat qilishini, tarkibiy kamsitishni davom ettirishdan qochishini va operatsion hayoti davomida ma'noli inson nazorati ostida qolishini ta'minlovchi me'yoriy tamoyillar va ijro etiladigan standartlarni belgilash uchun zarur.
words.example3Situation: Siz sun'iy intellekt siyosati va global boshqaruv standartlari bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Machine learning using neural networks to simulate human decision-making.
words.example1: Deep learning allows apps to recognize your face and unlock your phone automatically.
words.example1Situation: Siz zamonaviy texnologiyalar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company's deep learning model analyzes medical images to detect early signs of disease with greater accuracy than traditional screening methods.
words.example2Situation: Siz sog'liqni saqlash texnologiyalari va sun'iy intellektning tibbiyotdagi roli bo'yicha investorlarga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Deep learning architectures, particularly convolutional and transformer-based neural networks trained on massive datasets, have achieved superhuman performance on tasks ranging from image classification and natural language processing to protein structure prediction, fundamentally reshaping what is computationally achievable and raising new questions about the interpretability and reliability of opaque model outputs.
words.example3Translation: Chuqur o'rganish arxitekturalari, xususan ulkan ma'lumotlar to'plamlarida o'qitilgan konvolyutsion va transformatorga asoslangan neyron tarmoqlar, tasvirlarni tasniflash va tabiiy tilni qayta ishlashdan tortib oqsil tuzilishini bashorat qilishgacha bo'lgan vazifalar bo'yicha insondan ustun ko'rsatkichlarga erishdi, bu esa kompyuter hisoblash imkoniyatlarini tubdan o'zgartirdi va noaniq model natijalarining talqin qilinishi va ishonchliligi haqida yangi savollarni tug'dirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz neyron tarmoqlar va chuqur o'rganishning ilmiy tadqiqotlardagi qo'llanilishi bo'yicha xalqaro kompyuter fanlari konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The protection of personal information collected and processed by digital systems.
words.example1: Data privacy laws require apps to ask your permission before collecting your location.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy ma'lumotlar himoyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company updated its data privacy policy to comply with the latest international regulations and protect our customers' sensitive information.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi ma'lumotlar boshqaruvi siyosatini huquqiy va muvofiqlik jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Data privacy has emerged as a foundational concern of the digital age, as the pervasive collection of personal information by commercial platforms and state actors alike creates asymmetries of power that threaten individual autonomy, enable discriminatory profiling, and undermine democratic institutions, necessitating comprehensive legislative frameworks that balance innovation incentives with robust rights-based protections.
words.example3Translation: Ma'lumotlar maxfiyligi raqamli davrning asosiy muammosi sifatida namoyon bo'ldi, chunki tijorat platformalari va davlat organlari tomonidan shaxsiy ma'lumotlarning keng ko'lamda yig'ilishi individual avtomoniyani tahdid qiladigan, kamsituvchi profilni yaratishga imkon beradigan va demokratik institutlarni buzadigan kuch assimetriyalarini yaratadi, bu esa innovatsion rag'batlarni mustahkam huquqlarga asoslangan himoya bilan muvozanatlashtiradigan keng qonunchilik asoslarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli huquqlar va ma'lumotlar maxfiyligi siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Partnership where humans and AI systems work together to enhance outcomes.
words.example1: Human-AI collaboration helps doctors diagnose diseases faster by combining expert judgment with AI analysis.
words.example1Situation: Siz tibbiyotda texnologiyaning roli haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company's customer service team uses human-AI collaboration to handle routine inquiries automatically while escalating complex cases to experienced agents.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish samaradorligi strategiyangizni rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective human-AI collaboration depends not only on the technical capabilities of intelligent systems but also on the thoughtful design of interaction interfaces that leverage complementary strengths, preserve meaningful human agency in consequential decisions, and foster the mutual trust necessary for practitioners to critically evaluate and appropriately calibrate their reliance on algorithmic recommendations.
words.example3Translation: Samarali inson-sun'iy intellekt hamkorligi nafaqat intellektual tizimlarning texnik imkoniyatlariga, balki to'ldiruvchi kuchlardan foydalangan, muhim qarorlarda ma'noli inson agentligini saqlaydigan va amaliyotchilarga algoritmik tavsiyalarga ishonchni tanqidiy baholash va to'g'ri kalibrlash uchun zarur o'zaro ishonchni rivojlantiradigan o'zaro ta'sir interfeyslarini o'ylab chizilgan loyihasiga ham bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz inson va sun'iy intellekt hamkorligi va kelajak ish muhiti bo'yicha xalqaro texnologiya va mehnat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Use of data, statistical algorithms, and machine learning to identify future outcomes.
words.example1: Predictive analytics helps retailers know which products to stock before a holiday season.
words.example1Situation: Siz biznes strategiyasi va ma'lumotlardan foydalanish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company uses predictive analytics to identify customers who are likely to cancel their subscriptions so we can offer them targeted retention incentives.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlarni saqlash strategiyangizni marketing jamoasiga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Predictive analytics platforms that integrate structured transactional data with unstructured behavioral signals can generate probabilistic forecasts of considerable accuracy, yet their deployment in sensitive domains such as credit scoring, recidivism prediction, and clinical triage raises profound ethical questions about the legitimacy of making consequential decisions about individuals based on statistical patterns derived from the behavior of demographic groups.
words.example3Translation: Tuzilgan tranzaktsiya ma'lumotlarini tuzilmagan xulq-atvor signallari bilan birlashtirgan bashoratli tahlil platformalari sezilarli aniqlikdagi ehtimoliy prognozlarni yaratishi mumkin, ammo ularning kredit baholash, retsidivizm bashorati va klinik triaj kabi sezgir sohalarda qo'llanilishi demografik guruhlar xatti-harakatlaridan olingan statistik naqshlarga asoslanib shaxslar haqida oqibatli qarorlar qabul qilishning qonuniyligi haqida chuqur axloqiy savollarni tug'diradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ma'lumotlarga asoslangan qaror qabul qilish va algoritm axloqi bo'yicha xalqaro biznes tahlili konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Systems that perform tasks independently without human control.
words.example1: Autonomous systems like self-driving cars use sensors to navigate roads without a human driver.
words.example1Situation: Siz zamonaviy transport texnologiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company deployed autonomous systems in our logistics network to sort and route packages around the clock without human intervention.
words.example2Situation: Siz avtomatlashtirilgan logistika va operatsion samaradorlik bo'yicha hamkorlaringizga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The proliferation of autonomous systems in critical infrastructure, defense, and public services necessitates the development of rigorous safety certification standards and legal liability frameworks that can address the unique challenges posed by systems capable of consequential action without real-time human authorization, particularly in edge cases where sensor failures or adversarial conditions push the system beyond its validated operational parameters.
words.example3Translation: Muhim infratuzilma, mudofaa va davlat xizmatlarida avtonom tizimlarning ko'payishi real vaqtda inson ruxsatisiz oqibatli harakat qilishga qodir tizimlar tomonidan qo'yilgan o'ziga xos muammolarni hal qila oladigan qat'iy xavfsizlik sertifikatlash standartlari va huquqiy javobgarlik asoslarini ishlab chiqishni talab qiladi, ayniqsa sensor nosozliklari yoki dushmanlik sharoitlari tizimni tasdiqlangan operatsion parametrlaridan tashqariga chiqaradigan chekka holatlarda.
words.example3Situation: Siz avtonom tizimlar xavfsizligi va boshqaruvi bo'yicha xalqaro muhandislik va siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The framework of laws, regulations, and standards guiding AI development and use.
words.example1: AI governance rules help prevent companies from using facial recognition to invade people's privacy.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnologiya qoidalari va jamiyatga ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization established an internal AI governance committee to review all new AI deployments for compliance, fairness, and potential risks before launch.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ muvofiqlik va sun'iy intellekt boshqaruvi bo'yicha boshqaruv kengashiga hisobot taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective AI governance requires a multi-layered approach that combines binding international agreements to prevent regulatory arbitrage, sector-specific national regulations tailored to the risk profiles of particular applications, and voluntary industry standards that encourage responsible innovation, all underpinned by independent auditing mechanisms capable of verifying that deployed systems conform to declared design principles and deliver equitable outcomes across diverse user populations.
words.example3Translation: Samarali sun'iy intellekt boshqaruvi tartibga solish arbitrajini oldini olish uchun majburiy xalqaro kelishuvlar, muayyan ilovalarning xavf profillariga moslashtirilgan tarmoqqa xos milliy qoidalar va mas'uliyatli innovatsiyalarni rag'batlantiradigan ixtiyoriy sanoat standartlarini birlashtirgan ko'p qatlamli yondashuvni talab qiladi, bularning barchasi joylashtirilgan tizimlar e'lon qilingan dizayn tamoyillariga muvofiqligi va xilma-xil foydalanuvchi aholisi bo'ylab adolatli natijalar berishini tekshira oladigan mustaqil audit mexanizmlari bilan ta'minlangan.
words.example3Situation: Siz sun'iy intellekt siyosati va xalqaro boshqaruv mexanizmlari bo'yicha global siyosat forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: AI systems that simulate human thought processes to improve decision-making.
words.example1: Cognitive computing allows virtual assistants to understand your questions and give helpful answers.
words.example1Situation: Siz aqlli texnologiyalar va ularning kundalik hayotdagi roli haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company integrated cognitive computing into our legal research platform, enabling lawyers to analyze thousands of case precedents in minutes rather than weeks.
words.example2Situation: Siz huquqiy texnologiyalar va sun'iy intellektning professional xizmatlar sohasidagi qo'llanilishi bo'yicha mijozlaringizga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Cognitive computing systems that incorporate natural language understanding, contextual reasoning, and adaptive learning represent a significant advance beyond rule-based expert systems, yet their practical deployment in high-stakes professional environments demands rigorous validation of domain-specific accuracy, transparent explanation of inferential pathways, and carefully managed human-in-the-loop oversight protocols to prevent automation bias from eroding the critical judgment of experienced practitioners.
words.example3Translation: Tabiiy tilni tushunish, kontekstual fikrlash va moslashuvchan o'rganishni o'z ichiga olgan kognitiv hisoblash tizimlari qoida asosidagi ekspert tizimlardan ancha ilg'or bo'lib, ammo ularning yuqori tavakkalchilikli professional muhitlarda amaliy joylashtirilishi soha-spetsifik aniqlikni qattiq tasdiqlashni, xulosa chiqarish yo'llarini shaffof tarzda tushuntirishni va tajribali amaliyotchilarning tanqidiy hukmini avtomatizatsiya tarafkashligi eroziyasidan saqlash uchun ehtiyotkorlik bilan boshqariladigan insonni tsiklda nazorat protokollarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kognitiv hisoblash va sun'iy intellektning professional qaror qabul qilishdagi roli bo'yicha xalqaro kompyuter fanlari konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The loss of jobs caused by machines or software replacing human labor.
words.example1: Job displacement in manufacturing has pushed many workers to seek new skills in technology.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnologiya va mehnat bozorining o'zgarishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company offers a retraining program specifically designed for employees facing job displacement due to the introduction of automated production systems.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni qo'llab-quvvatlash va qayta tayyorlash dasturlari bo'yicha HR va rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While technological optimists argue that historical precedent demonstrates that automation-driven job displacement ultimately generates more employment than it destroys by creating entirely new industries and occupational categories, critics contend that the pace and breadth of current AI-driven disruption may overwhelm the adaptive capacity of labor markets, disproportionately affecting low-skilled workers and exacerbating income inequality in ways that demand proactive policy intervention.
words.example3Translation: Texnologiya optimistlari tarixiy misol avtomatlashtirishga bog'liq ish o'rinlarini siqib chiqarish oxir-oqibat butunlay yangi sanoat va kasbiy toifalarni yaratib, yo'q qilgandan ko'ra ko'proq ish o'rinlari yaratishini ko'rsatishini ta'kidlasa ham, tanqidchilar hozirgi sun'iy intellektga asoslangan buzilishning sur'ati va kengligi mehnat bozorlarining moslashish qobiliyatidan oshib ketishi, past malakali ishchilariga mutanosib ta'sir ko'rsatishi va faol siyosiy aralashuvni talab qiladigan tarzda daromad tengsizligini kuchaytirishi mumkinligini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz avtomatlashtirish, mehnat iqtisodiyoti va ijtimoiy siyosat bo'yicha xalqaro iqtisodiy forum konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: AI designed to perform a specific, limited task (e.g., facial recognition).
words.example1: Narrow AI powers the recommendation engine that suggests movies based on your watching history.
words.example1Situation: Siz sun'iy intellektning turlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company relies on narrow AI tools for specific functions like invoice processing, fraud detection, and customer sentiment analysis, rather than a single general-purpose system.
words.example2Situation: Siz sun'iy intellektni biznes jarayonlariga qo'llash strategiyangizni texnologiya hamkorlaringizga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although narrow AI systems have achieved remarkable, often superhuman performance within their designated task domains, they remain fundamentally brittle outside those boundaries, lacking the general reasoning, common-sense understanding, and cross-domain transfer capability that characterize human intelligence, which is why researchers continue to regard the development of artificial general intelligence as an open and formidable scientific challenge.
words.example3Translation: Tor sun'iy intellekt tizimlari belgilangan vazifa doirasida ajoyib, ko'pincha insondan ustun ko'rsatkichlarga erishgan bo'lsa-da, ular o'sha chegaralardan tashqarida asosan mo'rt bo'lib qoladi, inson intellektiga xos umumiy fikrlash, oddiy fikrlash va fanlararo o'tkazish qobiliyatiga ega emas, shu sababli tadqiqotchilar umumiy sun'iy intellektni rivojlantirishni ochiq va muazzam ilmiy muammo sifatida ko'rishda davom etmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz sun'iy intellektning hozirgi holati va kelajak yo'nalishlari bo'yicha xalqaro kompyuter fanlari va sun'iy intellekt konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Clarity and openness about how an AI system makes decisions.
words.example1: Transparency in AI means users can understand why they were denied a loan by an algorithm.
words.example1Situation: Siz sun'iy intellektning adolatliligi va hisobdorligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company publishes an annual AI transparency report disclosing the datasets, decision logic, and performance metrics of all customer-facing automated systems.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ mas'uliyat va ommaga ochiqlik bo'yicha manfaatdor tomonlarga yillik hisobot taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Transparency in AI decision-making is not merely a technical challenge of model interpretability but a governance imperative that demands proactive disclosure of training data provenance, algorithmic logic, performance disaggregated by demographic subgroup, and avenues for affected individuals to contest automated decisions, thereby preserving the accountability norms that underpin legitimate institutional authority in democratic societies.
words.example3Translation: Sun'iy intellekt qaror qabul qilishdagi shaffoflik nafaqat model talqin qilinishining texnik muammosi, balki o'quv ma'lumotlarining kelib chiqishini, algoritmik mantiqni, demografik kichik guruhlar bo'yicha disaggregatsiyalangan ko'rsatkichlarni va ta'sirlangan shaxslarning avtomatlashtirilgan qarorlarga e'tiroz bildirish yo'llarini faol oshkor qilishni talab qiladigan boshqaruv imperatividir, shu bilan demokratik jamiyatlarda qonuniy institutsional hokimiyatni ta'minlaydigan hisobdorlik me'yorlarini saqlab qoladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sun'iy intellekt shaffoflik standartlari va demokratik boshqaruv bo'yicha xalqaro siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Incident where personal information is accessed without authorization.
words.example1: A data breach at the bank exposed millions of customers' account details to hackers.
words.example1Situation: Siz kiberxavfsizlik xavflari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company immediately notified all affected users and launched a full security investigation after discovering a data breach in our cloud storage system.
words.example2Situation: Siz kiberxavfsizlik inqirozi va mijozlarga munosabat strategiyangizni rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The increasing frequency and scale of data breaches targeting both private enterprises and public institutions underscore the systemic vulnerabilities inherent in centralized data architectures, prompting regulators worldwide to impose mandatory breach notification timelines, significant financial penalties, and enhanced due diligence obligations on organizations entrusted with large volumes of personal data.
words.example3Translation: Xususiy korxonalar va davlat muassasalarini nishonga olgan ma'lumotlar buzilishlarining ortib borayotgan chastotasi va miqyosi markazlashtirilgan ma'lumotlar arxitekturalarida mavjud bo'lgan tizimli zaifliklarni ko'rsatib beradi, bu esa dunyo bo'ylab regulyatorlarni ko'p miqdordagi shaxsiy ma'lumotlarga ishonib topshirilgan tashkilotlarga majburiy buzilish xabarnomasi muddatlari, sezilarli moliyaviy jarimalar va kuchaytirilgan ehtiyot choralarini joriy etishga undamoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qonunchiligi va korporativ kiberxavfsizlik majburiyatlari bo'yicha xalqaro huquqiy konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A government that closely monitors its citizens' activities, often infringing on privacy.
words.example1: In a surveillance state, cameras on every street corner record people's movements throughout the day.
words.example1Situation: Siz fuqarolik erkinliklari va davlat nazorati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization published a policy brief warning that unchecked expansion of smart city technologies could inadvertently create the infrastructure of a surveillance state.
words.example2Situation: Siz raqamli huquqlar va shahar texnologiyalari siyosati bo'yicha hukumat va shahar boshqaruvchilariga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The emergence of the surveillance state as a governing paradigm, enabled by the convergence of biometric identification, predictive policing algorithms, and pervasive sensor networks, poses an existential challenge to the liberal democratic tradition, as the chilling effects of mass monitoring on freedom of expression, political dissent, and civil society participation erode the very conditions necessary for meaningful democratic participation.
words.example3Translation: Biometrik identifikatsiya, bashoratli politsiya algoritmlari va keng tarqalgan sensor tarmoqlarining birlashishi bilan ta'minlangan kuzatuv davlatining boshqaruv paradigmasi sifatida paydo bo'lishi liberal demokratik an'anaga ekzistensial muammo tug'diradi, chunki ifoda erkinligi, siyosiy muxolifat va fuqarolik jamiyatiga ishtirok etishdagi ommaviy monitoringning sovutuvchi ta'siri ma'noli demokratik ishtirok uchun zarur bo'lgan barcha shartlarni yemiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli avtoritarizm va fuqarolik erkinliklari bo'yicha xalqaro inson huquqlari konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Converting data into a code to prevent unauthorized access.
words.example1: Encryption protects your messages so that only the intended recipient can read them.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqamli xavfsizlik va maxfiylik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company uses end-to-end encryption for all internal communications to ensure that sensitive business information cannot be intercepted by third parties.
words.example2Situation: Siz ma'lumotlar xavfsizligi va korporativ axborot himoyasi bo'yicha IT jamoasiga va rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Strong encryption serves as the cryptographic foundation of digital trust, protecting everything from financial transactions and confidential communications to medical records and national security data, yet ongoing policy debates about mandatory backdoor access for law enforcement illustrate the profound tension between legitimate security imperatives and the mathematical reality that any deliberate vulnerability introduced into an encryption system can be exploited by malicious actors as readily as by authorized agencies.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli shifrlash moliyaviy tranzaktsiyalar va maxfiy muloqotlardan tortib tibbiy yozuvlar va milliy xavfsizlik ma'lumotlarigacha bo'lgan hamma narsani himoya qilib, raqamli ishonchning kriptografik asosi bo'lib xizmat qiladi, ammo huquqni muhofaza qilish organlari uchun majburiy orqa eshik kirishiga oid davom etayotgan siyosat bahs-munozaralari qonuniy xavfsizlik imperativlari va shifrlash tizimiga kiritilgan har qanday ataylab zaiflik vakolatli agentliklar tomonidan bo'lgani kabi zararli aktyorlar tomonidan ham osongina ekspluatatsiya qilinishi mumkinligi matematik haqiqati o'rtasidagi chuqur ziddiyatni ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kriptografiya, kiberxavfsizlik siyosati va fuqarolik erkinliklari bo'yicha xalqaro texnologiya va siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The fraudulent acquisition and use of a person's private identifying information.
words.example1: Identity theft occurred when criminals used stolen credit card details to make purchases online.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy moliyaviy xavfsizlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company provides employees with identity theft protection services as part of the benefits package, recognizing that personal data breaches can have serious professional consequences.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarning shaxsiy xavfsizligi va korporativ foyda paketlari bo'yicha HR jamoasiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Identity theft has evolved from a primarily physical crime involving stolen wallets and forged documents into a sophisticated digital phenomenon in which cybercriminals harvest credentials through phishing campaigns, data breaches, and social engineering attacks, subsequently monetizing stolen identities through fraudulent credit applications, tax refund schemes, and the sale of personally identifiable information on dark web marketplaces.
words.example3Translation: Shaxsni o'g'irlash o'g'irlangan hamyonlar va soxta hujjatlarni o'z ichiga olgan asosan jismoniy jinoyatdan kiberjinoyatchilar fishing kampaniyalari, ma'lumotlar buzilishlari va ijtimoiy muhandislik hujumlari orqali hisob ma'lumotlarini yig'adigan, keyinchalik o'g'irlangan shaxslarni firibgar kredit arizalari, soliq qaytarish sxemalari va qorong'u veb bozorlarida shaxsiy identifikatsiya ma'lumotlarini sotish orqali pul ishlashga aylanadigan murakkab raqamli hodisaga aylanib ketdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kiberjinoyatchilk tendentsiyalari va raqamli shaxsni himoya qilish strategiyalari bo'yicha xalqaro kiberxavfsizlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The protection of an individual's personal information and activities online.
words.example1: Digital privacy means websites cannot share your browsing history with advertisers without your consent.
words.example1Situation: Siz onlayn huquqlar va shaxsiy ma'lumotlar himoyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company conducts annual digital privacy assessments to ensure that all data collection practices comply with user consent requirements and applicable regulations.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvofiqlik va ma'lumotlar boshqaruvi auditlari bo'yicha yuridik va texnik jamoalarga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Digital privacy in the platform economy is structurally undermined by business models that treat personal data as the primary unit of exchange, incentivizing companies to maximize data collection while minimizing transparency about how that data is processed, shared, and used to influence individual behavior, which is why genuine privacy protection ultimately requires not only individual informed consent mechanisms but also collective regulatory interventions that constrain the structural power of data-intensive industries.
words.example3Translation: Platforma iqtisodiyotida raqamli maxfiylik shaxsiy ma'lumotlarni birlamchi almashinuv birligi sifatida ko'ruvchi biznes modellari tomonidan tarkibiy jihatdan zaiflashtirilib, kompaniyalarni ma'lumotlar to'plashni maksimallashtirishga undaydi, ayni paytda bu ma'lumotlar qanday qayta ishlanganligi, ulashilganligi va individual xulq-atvorga ta'sir qilish uchun ishlatilganligi haqidagi shaffoflikni minimallashtirishga undaydi, shu sababli haqiqiy maxfiylikni himoya qilish oxir-oqibat nafaqat individual ma'lumotlangan rozilik mexanizmlarini, balki ma'lumot-intensiv sanoatlarning tarkibiy kuchini cheklaydigan jamoaviy tartibga solish aralashuvlarini ham talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz platforma iqtisodiyoti, ma'lumotlar huquqlari va raqamli boshqaruv bo'yicha xalqaro siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Protection of systems, networks, and programs from digital attacks.
words.example1: Good cybersecurity practices like using strong passwords help keep your personal accounts safe.
words.example1Situation: Siz onlayn xavfsizlik odatlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company increased its cybersecurity budget this year to address growing threats from ransomware attacks targeting organizations in our industry.
words.example2Situation: Siz IT xavfsizligi investitsiyalari va tavakkalchilikni boshqarish bo'yicha katta rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: As critical infrastructure becomes increasingly digitized and interconnected, cybersecurity has transcended its origins as a technical IT discipline to become a core dimension of national security strategy, requiring governments to coordinate across intelligence, defense, law enforcement, and regulatory agencies while simultaneously fostering public-private partnerships that enable rapid threat intelligence sharing and coordinated incident response across the essential services upon which modern societies depend.
words.example3Translation: Muhim infratuzilma tobora raqamlashib va o'zaro bog'lanib borar ekan, kiberxavfsizlik texnik IT intizomi sifatidagi kelib chiqishidan oshib, milliy xavfsizlik strategiyasining asosiy o'lchoviga aylandi, bu esa hukumatlardan razvedka, mudofaa, huquqni muhofaza qilish va tartibga solish agentliklari bo'yicha muvofiqlashtirish talab qilinsa, ayni paytda zamonaviy jamiyatlar bog'liq bo'lgan muhim xizmatlar bo'yicha tez tahdid razvedkasini almashish va muvofiqlashtirish intsidentlariga javob berishni ta'minlaydigan davlat-xususiy sherikliklarni rivojlantirish talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy kiberxavfsizlik strategiyasi va davlat-xususiy sektor hamkorligi bo'yicha xalqaro xavfsizlik va mudofaa konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unique physical or behavioral characteristics used for identification (e.g., fingerprints, facial recognition).
words.example1: Biometric data like your fingerprint lets you unlock your phone securely without a password.
words.example1Situation: Siz zamonaviy xavfsizlik texnologiyalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company implemented biometric data verification at office entry points to replace traditional ID badges and improve physical security.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofis xavfsizligi va kirish nazorati tizimlarining yangilanishi bo'yicha boshqaruv va IT jamoasiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The collection and processing of biometric data warrants a higher standard of legal protection than conventional personal data because its inherently permanent, non-reissuable nature means that a biometric data breach cannot be remediated by simply issuing new credentials, creating irreversible privacy harms that demand strict purpose limitation, robust security standards, and explicit informed consent as preconditions for any lawful biometric processing.
words.example3Translation: Biometrik ma'lumotlarni yig'ish va qayta ishlash an'anaviy shaxsiy ma'lumotlarga qaraganda yuqori huquqiy himoya standartini talab qiladi, chunki uning o'z ichiga xos doimiy, qayta chiqarib bo'lmaydigan tabiati biometrik ma'lumotlar buzilishini shunchaki yangi hisob ma'lumotlarini chiqarish orqali bartaraf etib bo'lmasligini anglatadi, bu esa har qanday qonuniy biometrik qayta ishlash uchun oldindan shart sifatida qat'iy maqsad cheklash, mustahkam xavfsizlik standartlari va aniq ma'lumotlangan rozilikni talab qiladigan qaytarib bo'lmaydigan maxfiylik zararlarini yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biometrik ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish va raqamli identifikatsiya siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The widespread monitoring of an entire or substantial fraction of a population.
words.example1: Mass surveillance through public CCTV cameras allows authorities to track suspicious activity across the city.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamoat xavfsizligi va fuqarolik erkinliklari o'rtasidagi muvozanat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization filed a legal challenge against mass surveillance programs that collect citizens' communications data without individualized judicial authorization.
words.example2Situation: Siz fuqarolik huquqlari va davlat kuzatuvi bo'yicha qonunchilik organlari va siyosatchilariga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Mass surveillance programs, even when justified by national security imperatives, impose systemic chilling effects on freedom of expression and association that go far beyond their ostensible targets, as the awareness of persistent monitoring alters individual behavior, suppresses political dissent, and erodes the trust between citizens and state institutions that constitutes the relational foundation of legitimate democratic governance.
words.example3Translation: Ommaviy kuzatuv dasturlari, milliy xavfsizlik imperativlari bilan asoslangan bo'lsa ham, ko'rinadigan maqsadlardan ancha uzoqqa boradigan ifoda va uyushish erkinligiga tizimli sovutuvchi ta'sir ko'rsatadi, chunki doimiy monitoringdan xabardorlik individual xulq-atvorni o'zgartiradi, siyosiy muxolifatni bostiradi va qonuniy demokratik boshqaruvning munosabat asosini tashkil etuvchi fuqarolar va davlat institutlari o'rtasidagi ishonchni yemiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ommaviy kuzatuv, fuqarolik erkinliklari va demokratik boshqaruv bo'yicha xalqaro inson huquqlari konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Legislation designed to protect personal data and regulate its use by organizations.
words.example1: Data protection laws require companies to delete your personal information when you request it.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy ma'lumotlar huquqlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company appointed a dedicated data protection officer to ensure all business operations comply with applicable data protection laws across every jurisdiction where we operate.
words.example2Situation: Siz ma'lumotlar muvofiqlik tuzilmasi va tartibga soluvchi majburiyatlar bo'yicha boshqaruv kengashiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The extraterritorial application of comprehensive data protection laws such as the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation has effectively established a de facto global standard for privacy compliance, compelling multinational corporations to restructure their data governance architectures and compelling regulators in other jurisdictions to consider whether comparable legislative frameworks are necessary to protect their citizens' rights in an increasingly borderless digital economy.
words.example3Translation: Yevropa Ittifoqining Umumiy Ma'lumotlarni Himoya Qilish Reglamenti kabi keng qamrovli ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qonunlarining hududdan tashqari qo'llanilishi amalda maxfiylik muvofiqligining global standartini belgilab berdi, ko'p millatli korporatsiyalarni ma'lumotlar boshqaruvi arxitekturalarini qayta tuzlashga majbur qildi va boshqa yurisdiksiyadagi regulyatorlarni tobora chegarasizlashib borayotgan raqamli iqtisodiyotda o'z fuqarolarining huquqlarini himoya qilish uchun taqqoslanadigan qonunchilik asoslari zarurmi degan savolni o'ylashga majbur qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish muvofiqligining yurisdiktsiyalardagi muvofiqlashtirilishi bo'yicha xalqaro ma'lumotlar huquqi va boshqaruv konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An action that violates an individual's right to privacy.
words.example1: Sharing someone's medical records without their permission is a serious privacy infringement.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy ma'lumotlar huquqlari va axloq haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company was found liable for privacy infringement after an internal audit revealed that employee monitoring software collected data far beyond what was disclosed in the workplace policy.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish joyidagi maxfiylik siyosati va xodimlarning huquqiy majburiyatlari bo'yicha HR va yuridik jamoaga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Privacy infringement in the digital environment takes increasingly subtle forms, encompassing not only overt unauthorized disclosure of personal information but also practices such as dark pattern design that manipulates users into surrendering data against their genuine interests, algorithmic inference of sensitive attributes from ostensibly innocuous behavioral data, and the aggregation of individually harmless data points into profiles that reveal intimate details individuals never consciously chose to disclose.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli muhitda maxfiylikni buzish tobora nozik shakllarni olmoqda, nafaqat shaxsiy ma'lumotlarning aniq ruxsatsiz oshkor etilishini, balki foydalanuvchilarni o'zlarining haqiqiy manfaatlariga qarshi ma'lumotlardan voz kechishga undaydigan qorong'u naqsh dizayni, ko'rinishda begunoh xulq-atvor ma'lumotlaridan sezgir atributlarning algoritmik xulosasi va shaxslar ongli ravishda oshkor qilishni hech qachon tanlamagan intim tafsilotlarni ochib beradigan profillarga alohida zararsiz ma'lumot nuqtalarini jamlash kabi amaliyotlarni o'z ichiga olmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli maxfiylik huquqi va kelajak tartibga solish yondashuvlari bo'yicha xalqaro ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The trail of data left by a person's online activity.
words.example1: Every website you visit and post you like contributes to your digital footprint.
words.example1Situation: Siz onlayn xavfsizlik va shaxsiy ma'lumotlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
