words.example2: Our company advises employees to be mindful of their digital footprint, as publicly accessible social media content can affect both personal reputation and corporate brand image.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarning onlayn xulq-atvori va korporativ obro'sini boshqarish bo'yicha HR jamoasiga ko'rsatma berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The cumulative digital footprint generated by an individual's interactions across multiple platforms and devices constitutes a remarkably detailed behavioral portrait that data brokers, advertisers, and state actors can exploit to infer psychological attributes, predict future behavior, and exert targeted influence, raising fundamental questions about whether meaningful informational self-determination is achievable within digital ecosystems architected to maximize data extraction.
words.example3Translation: Shaxsning bir nechta platforma va qurilmalar bo'yicha o'zaro ta'sirlari natijasida hosil bo'lgan kümülatif raqamli iz ma'lumotlar brokerlari, reklamchilar va davlat aktyorlari psixologik xususiyatlarni xulosa qilish, kelajakdagi xulq-atvorni bashorat qilish va maqsadli ta'sir ko'rsatish uchun foydalanishi mumkin bo'lgan juda batafsil xulq-atvor portretini tashkil qiladi, bu esa ma'lumotlarni maksimal darajada chiqarib olish uchun arxitektura qilingan raqamli ekotizimlarda ma'noli axborot o'z-o'zini belgilash mumkinmi degan asosiy savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli shaxs, ma'lumotlarni monetizatsiya qilish va onlayn maxfiylik huquqlari bo'yicha xalqaro internet boshqaruvi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The use of hacking to promote a political or social cause.
words.example1: Hacktivism was behind the attack on the government website to protest the new censorship law.
words.example1Situation: Siz siyosiy protest va raqamli faollik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization's cybersecurity team developed new protocols after studying hacktivism incidents that targeted companies with controversial environmental records.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ kiberxavfsizlik tahdidlari va obro'ni boshqarish strategiyalari bo'yicha xavfsizlik jamoasiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Hacktivism occupies an ethically contested space between civil disobedience and cybercrime, as its practitioners justify unauthorized intrusions into digital systems on the grounds that conventional channels of political expression are inadequate to challenge powerful institutional actors, while critics argue that the extralegal nature of hacking undermines the rule of law and frequently causes disproportionate collateral harm to uninvolved individuals and organizations.
words.example3Translation: Haktivizm fuqarolik itoatsizligi va kiberjinoyat o'rtasidagi axloqiy jihatdan bahsli maydonni egallaydi, chunki uning amaliyotchilari raqamli tizimlarga ruxsatsiz kirishlarni siyosiy ifodaning an'anaviy kanallari kuchli institutsional aktyorlarni tanqid qilish uchun yetarli emas degan asosda oqlasa, tanqidchilar xakerlikning qonundan tashqari tabiati huquqning ustunligini yemiradi va ko'pincha ishtirok etmagan shaxslar va tashkilotlarga mutanosib bo'lmagan garov zarari yetkazadi deb ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli fuqarolik itoatsizligi, kibersiyosat va onlayn faollikning huquqiy chegaralari bo'yicha xalqaro internet boshqaruvi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A security process requiring two forms of identification to access an account.
words.example1: Two-factor authentication sends a code to your phone that you must enter after your password.
words.example1Situation: Siz onlayn hisob xavfsizligini kuchaytirish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company made two-factor authentication mandatory for all employees accessing internal systems remotely after a phishing attack compromised several accounts.
words.example2Situation: Siz kiberxavfsizlik siyosati yangilanishlari va kirish nazorati protokollari bo'yicha IT xavfsizligi jamoasiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While two-factor authentication significantly reduces the risk of unauthorized account access by requiring attackers to compromise both a user's credentials and a separate verification channel, its effectiveness as a security control is increasingly challenged by sophisticated adversarial techniques including real-time phishing proxies, SIM-swapping attacks, and social engineering schemes that exploit the human element to intercept one-time authentication codes.
words.example3Translation: Ikki bosqichli autentifikatsiya tajovuzkorlardan foydalanuvchining hisob ma'lumotlari va alohida tekshirish kanalini ham buzishni talab qilib, ruxsatsiz hisob kirishini sezilarli darajada kamaytirsa ham, xavfsizlik nazorati sifatidagi samaradorligi real vaqtda fishing proksilari, SIM almashtirish hujumlari va bir martalik autentifikatsiya kodlarini ushlab qolish uchun inson elementidan foydalanadigan ijtimoiy muhandislik sxemalari kabi murakkab dushman texnikalari tomonidan tobora ko'proq shubha ostiga olinmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz autentifikatsiya texnologiyalari va kiberxavfsizlikning rivojlanayotgan tahdid landshafti bo'yicha xalqaro axborot xavfsizligi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A person who exposes wrongdoing or illegal activity within an organization.
words.example1: The whistleblower reported the company's illegal dumping of chemicals to the environmental agency.
words.example1Situation: Siz korporativ axloq va mas'uliyat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization established a confidential whistleblower hotline so employees can safely report financial misconduct or regulatory violations without fear of retaliation.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ muvofiqlik va ichki hisobot mexanizmlari bo'yicha rahbariyat va audit qo'mitasiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Robust whistleblower protection frameworks are essential to the integrity of democratic governance and market regulation, as individuals who risk their careers and personal safety to disclose institutional wrongdoing perform a vital public interest function that formal oversight mechanisms frequently fail to deliver, yet the effectiveness of such protections depends critically on the scope of legal immunity granted, the independence of investigative authorities, and the cultural willingness of organizations to treat internal dissent as a legitimate governance resource rather than a threat to be suppressed.
words.example3Translation: Mustahkam xabardor qiluvchilarni himoya qilish asoslari demokratik boshqaruv va bozor tartibga solishning yaxlitligi uchun zarur, chunki institutsional noto'g'ri xatti-harakatlarni oshkor etish uchun kareralari va shaxsiy xavfsizliklarini xavf ostiga qo'yadigan shaxslar rasmiy nazorat mexanizmlari tez-tez amalga oshira olmaydigan muhim jamoat manfaati funktsiyasini bajaradi, ammo bunday himoyalarning samaradorligi berilgan huquqiy immunitetning ko'lami, tergov organlari mustaqilligi va tashkilotlarning ichki muxolifatni bostiriladigan tahdid emas, balki qonuniy boshqaruv resursi sifatida ko'rishga madaniy tayyor ekanligiga bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ hisobdorlik, ichki nazorat tizimlari va xabardor qiluvchilarni himoya qilish qonunchiligi bo'yicha xalqaro korporativ boshqaruv konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The legal concept that individuals can request removal of personal information from internet searches.
words.example1: The right to be forgotten allowed him to request that old news articles about his arrest be removed from search results.
words.example1Situation: Siz onlayn obro'ni boshqarish va raqamli huquqlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company developed a structured process for handling right to be forgotten requests to ensure compliance with privacy regulations while balancing legitimate public interest considerations.
words.example2Situation: Siz ma'lumotlarni o'chirish talablari va maxfiylik muvofiqligini boshqarish bo'yicha yuridik va operatsion jamoalarga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The right to be forgotten encapsulates a fundamental tension in the digital age between an individual's legitimate interest in controlling their personal narrative and escaping the permanent stigma of past mistakes, and the public's interest in accessing accurate historical information, a tension that courts and regulators must resolve through case-by-case proportionality analysis that weighs the sensitivity of the information, the time elapsed, the individual's public or private status, and the continuing relevance of the data to matters of genuine public concern.
words.example3Translation: Unutilish huquqi raqamli asrning asosiy ziddiyatini mujassamlashtiradi — bu shaxsning o'z shaxsiy rivoyatini nazorat qilish va o'tgan xatolarning doimiy stigmasidan qochishning qonuniy manfaati bilan jamoatning aniq tarixiy ma'lumotlarga kirish manfaati o'rtasidagi ziddiyat bo'lib, sudlar va regulyatorlar ma'lumotlarning sezgirligi, o'tgan vaqt, shaxsning ommaviy yoki xususiy holati va ma'lumotlarning haqiqiy jamoat manfaati bilan bog'liq masalalarga tegishliligini tortib o'lchaydigan holatma-holat mutanosiblik tahlili orqali hal qilishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli maxfiylik huquqi, axborot erkinligi va shaxsiy ma'lumotlarni tartibga solish bo'yicha xalqaro internet huquqi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A person's own assessment of their life satisfaction and emotional health.
words.example1: Subjective well-being improves when people spend more time doing activities they genuinely enjoy.
words.example1Situation: Siz hayot sifati va shaxsiy baxt haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization conducted an employee survey measuring subjective well-being to identify which workplace factors most significantly affect staff morale and productivity.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarning ish qoniqishi va farovonligi bo'yicha HR jamoasi va rahbariyatga natijalar taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Research in positive psychology consistently demonstrates that subjective well-being is shaped less by objective life circumstances than by individual dispositional factors such as trait optimism, quality of social relationships, and the degree to which daily activities align with personally meaningful goals, findings that have profound implications for public policy design insofar as they suggest that investments in relational infrastructure and meaningful work may yield greater population-level well-being dividends than equivalent investments in material consumption.
words.example3Translation: Pozitiv psixologiyada tadqiqotlar sub'yektiv farovonlik ob'ektiv hayot sharoitlaridan ko'ra individual dispozitsion omillar — xususiyat optimizmi, ijtimoiy munosabatlar sifati va kundalik faoliyatning shaxsan mazmunli maqsadlarga muvofiqlik darajasi bilan ko'proq shakllanishini doimiy ravishda ko'rsatmoqda; bu topilmalar munosabat infratuzilmasi va mazmunli mehnatga investitsiyalar material iste'molga ekvivalent investitsiyalarga qaraganda aholi darajasida kattaroq farovonlik dividendlari berishi mumkinligini taklif qiladigan darajada davlat siyosatini loyihalash uchun chuqur oqibatlarga ega.
words.example3Situation: Siz pozitiv psixologiya, baxt iqtisodiyoti va farovonlikka asoslangan siyosat bo'yicha xalqaro ijtimoiy fanlar konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The equilibrium between professional responsibilities and personal life.
words.example1: Good work-life balance means leaving the office on time to spend evenings with your family.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'lom ish odatlari va shaxsiy hayot haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company introduced flexible working hours and remote work options to help employees achieve a healthier work-life balance and reduce burnout.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni ushlab turish va ish joyidagi farovonlik strategiyalari bo'yicha rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The concept of work-life balance has been fundamentally complicated by digital connectivity, which has dissolved the temporal and spatial boundaries that once separated professional obligations from personal life, creating an "always-on" culture that research consistently links to elevated stress, burnout, impaired cognitive performance, and deteriorating personal relationships, outcomes that impose measurable costs not only on individual workers but also on organizational productivity and long-term economic sustainability.
words.example3Translation: Ish va hayot muvozanati tushunchasi raqamli ulanish bilan tubdan murakkablashdi, bu esa bir vaqtlar professional majburiyatlarni shaxsiy hayotdan ajratib turgan vaqt va fazoviy chegaralarni yemirdi, tadqiqotlar doimiy ravishda yuqori stress, burnout, kognitiv faoliyatning buzilishi va shaxsiy munosabatlarning yomonlashishi bilan bog'laydigan "doimo yoqiq" madaniyatni yaratdi; bu natijalar nafaqat individual ishchilar, balki tashkiliy unumdorlik va uzoq muddatli iqtisodiy barqarorlik uchun ham o'lchovli xarajatlar yuklaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli mehnat, xodimlarning farovonligi va tashkiliy unumdorlik bo'yicha xalqaro inson resurslari va boshqaruv konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A mental practice of focusing one's awareness on the present moment.
words.example1: Practicing mindfulness for ten minutes each morning helps reduce daily stress and anxiety.
words.example1Situation: Siz aqliy salomatlik va stressni boshqarish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company introduced mindfulness training sessions for all staff after research showed that regular practice significantly reduced employee burnout and improved focus.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarning farovonligi va unumdorligini oshirish bo'yicha rahbariyatga yangi dasturni taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Clinical research has demonstrated that structured mindfulness-based interventions produce measurable neuroplastic changes in prefrontal cortex thickness and amygdala reactivity, translating into sustained reductions in anxiety, depression relapse rates, and pain catastrophizing, yet scholars caution that the secular, decontextualized appropriation of contemplative practices originally embedded in comprehensive ethical and philosophical frameworks risks reducing a profound transformative discipline to a productivity optimization tool that reinforces the very achievement-oriented pressures it purports to alleviate.
words.example3Translation: Klinik tadqiqotlar tuzilgan hushyorlikka asoslangan aralashuvlar prefrontal korteks qalinligi va amigdala reaktivligida o'lchovli neytroplastik o'zgarishlarni keltirib chiqarishini, bu esa tashvish, depressiyaning qaytalanish darajasi va og'riqni falokatlashtirish kamayishining doimiy qisqarishiga aylanishini isbotladi; biroq olimlar keng axloqiy va falsafiy asoslarga o'rnatilgan meditatsion amaliyotlarning dunyoviy, kontekstdan tashqarida o'zlashtirilishi chuqur transformatsion intizomni yengillashtirmoqchi bo'lgan yutuqqa yo'naltirilgan bosimlarni o'zi kuchaytirgan unumdorlikni optimallashtirish vositasiga aylantirib yuborish xavfini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hushyorlik tadqiqoti, aqliy salomatlik ilmi va uning klinik qo'llanilishi bo'yicha xalqaro psixologiya va neyropsixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A social and economic order that encourages the constant acquisition of goods.
words.example1: Consumerism encourages people to buy the newest phone model even when their old one still works well.
words.example1Situation: Siz zamonaviy jamiyat va xarid qilish madaniyati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is reconsidering its marketing strategy to move away from consumerism-driven messaging and instead promote the durability and repairability of our products.
words.example2Situation: Siz brendning qadriyatlari va barqaror biznes strategiyasi bo'yicha marketing va rahbariyat jamoasiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Consumerism as a dominant cultural ideology is increasingly scrutinized not only for its ecological consequences, as the throughput economy it generates places unsustainable demands on finite natural resources and accelerates planetary boundary transgressions, but also for its capacity to colonize individual identity and social relations, substituting commodified self-expression for authentic human connection and fostering a hedonic treadmill dynamic in which rising consumption expenditure yields diminishing marginal returns in genuine life satisfaction.
words.example3Translation: Hukmron madaniy mafkura sifatida konsyumerizm nafaqat ekologik oqibatlari uchun tobora ko'proq tekshirilmoqda, u yaratadigan o'tkazish iqtisodiyoti chekli tabiiy resurslarga barqaror bo'lmagan talablarni qo'yadi va sayyoraviy chegara buzilishlarini tezlashtiradi; balki individual shaxsiyat va ijtimoiy munosabatlarni mustamlaka qilish qobiliyati uchun ham, tovarlashtiruvchi o'z-o'zini ifodalashni haqiqiy insoniy muloqot uchun almashtirib va iste'mol xarajatlarining oshishi haqiqiy hayotiy qoniqishda pasayuvchi chegara daromadini keltirib chiqaruvchi gedonik yugurish yuli dinamikasini rivojlantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz konsyumerizm, barqarorlik va jamiyat qadriyatlari bo'yicha xalqaro iqtisodiy antropologiya va ijtimoiy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The tendency to return to a stable level of happiness after positive or negative events.
words.example1: Hedonic adaptation explains why the excitement of buying a new car fades within a few months.
words.example1Situation: Siz baxt va hayotdan qoniqish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization's wellness program incorporates insights from hedonic adaptation research to design benefits that sustain employee satisfaction over time rather than delivering a short-lived boost.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarning uzoq muddatli qoniqishi va farovonlik dasturlari bo'yicha HR va boshqaruv jamoasiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Hedonic adaptation represents a fundamental constraint on the capacity of material acquisition and circumstantial improvement to generate lasting increases in subjective well-being, as the psychological immune system's tendency to normalize both positive windfalls and adverse conditions implies that durable happiness depends less on the achievement of desired outcomes than on the cultivation of intrinsically rewarding activities, meaningful relationships, and cognitive orientations that resist the normalizing pull of the hedonic baseline.
words.example3Translation: Gedonik moslashuv material sotib olish va vaziyat yaxshilanishining sub'yektiv farovonlikda doimiy o'sish yaratish qobiliyatiga asosiy cheklov ifodalaydi, chunki psixologik immunitet tizimining ijobiy kutilmagan daromadlar va noqulay sharoitlarni normallashtirish tendentsiyasi doimiy baxt istagan natijalarni erishishdan ko'ra gedonik bazisning normallashtirovchi tortishiga qarshilik ko'rsatuvchi ichki jihatdan mukofotlovchi faoliyatlar, mazmunli munosabatlar va kognitiv yo'nalishlarga bog'liqligini anglatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz baxt iqtisodiyoti, psixologik farovonlik nazariyasi va sub'yektiv farovonlikning tarkibiy komponentlari bo'yicha xalqaro pozitiv psixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A lifestyle that emphasizes living with fewer possessions and greater intentionality.
words.example1: Minimalism inspired her to donate unused clothes and keep only what she truly needed.
words.example1Situation: Siz hayot tarzi va qadriyatlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company adopted minimalism principles in its office redesign, creating a clutter-free environment that employees reported made them feel calmer and more focused.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish muhitini loyihalash va xodimlar unumdorligi bo'yicha rahbariyat va operatsion jamoaga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Contemporary minimalism, while often critiqued as an aesthetic privilege accessible primarily to affluent individuals who have the material security to choose scarcity, represents a meaningful cultural counter-movement to hyperconsumerism that invites practitioners to interrogate the relationship between possession and identity, redirecting personal resources from accumulation toward experiences, relationships, and contributions that research consistently associates with higher and more durable levels of subjective well-being.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy minimalizm, ko'pincha asosan tanqislikni tanlash uchun moddiy xavfsizlikka ega bo'lgan badavlat shaxslarga kirish mumkin bo'lgan estetik imtiyoz sifatida tanqid qilinsa ham, amaliyotchilarni egalik va identitet o'rtasidagi munosabatni so'roq qilishga taklif etuvchi giperkonsyumerizmga mazmunli madaniy qarshi harakat ifodalaydi va tadqiqotlar sub'yektiv farovonlikning yuqori va barqarorroq darajalari bilan doimiy ravishda bog'liqligini ko'rsatadigan tajribalar, munosabatlar va hisslarga shaxsiy resurslarni to'plashdan qayta yo'naltiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz minimalizm, barqarorlik va post-konsyumerist hayot tarzi modellari bo'yicha xalqaro ijtimoiy psixologiya va madaniyat tadqiqotlari konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The relationships and sense of belonging with other people.
words.example1: Social connection with close friends and family is one of the strongest predictors of long-term happiness.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy farovonlik va munosabatlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company organizes regular team-building activities to strengthen social connection among employees, particularly those working remotely.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarning uyushmasini va hamkorlik ruhini rivojlantirish bo'yicha HR jamoasiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Longitudinal epidemiological studies, including the landmark Harvard Study of Adult Development, have consistently identified the quality of social connection as one of the most powerful determinants of both psychological well-being and physical health outcomes across the lifespan, with social isolation producing mortality risks comparable to smoking fifteen cigarettes daily, findings that position investment in relational infrastructure as a legitimate and urgent public health priority.
words.example3Translation: Kavarning Garvard kattalik rivojlanishi tadqiqoti kabi uzunlamasiga epidemiologik tadqiqotlar ijtimoiy aloqa sifatini umr bo'yi psixologik farovonlik va jismoniy sog'liq natijalari uchun eng kuchli determinantlardan biri sifatida doimiy ravishda aniqlagan, ijtimoiy izolyatsiya kuniga o'n besh sigaret chekishga taqqoslanadigan o'lim xavflarini keltirib chiqaradi; bu topilmalar munosabat infratuzilmasiga investitsiyalarni qonuniy va shoshilinch jamoat sog'ligi ustuvorligi sifatida joylashtiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy kapital, yolg'izlik epidemiyasi va aholi sog'lig'i siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro jamoat sog'lig'i va ijtimoiy epidemiologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The habit of regularly reflecting on and appreciating the positive aspects of life.
words.example1: A simple gratitude practice like writing three good things about your day can boost your mood.
words.example1Situation: Siz aqliy salomatlik va ijobiy odatlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company's leadership team adopted a gratitude practice at the start of weekly meetings, which team members reported improved the overall tone and collaborative spirit of discussions.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish joyidagi madaniyatni yaxshilash va jamoa dinamikasini mustahkamlash strategiyalari bo'yicha rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Empirical research in positive psychology has demonstrated that structured gratitude practices, including gratitude journaling and gratitude letter writing, produce robust and replicable improvements in subjective well-being, prosocial behavior, and relationship quality, with neuroimaging studies suggesting that these interventions strengthen medial prefrontal cortex activation associated with moral cognition and interpersonal generosity, though researchers note that the effects are most pronounced when practices are varied rather than habitual to prevent hedonic adaptation from diminishing their emotional salience.
words.example3Translation: Pozitiv psixologiyada empirik tadqiqotlar minnatdorlik jurnali yuritish va minnatdorlik xati yozish kabi tuzilgan minnatdorlik amaliyotlari sub'yektiv farovonlik, prososial xulq-atvor va munosabatlar sifatida mustahkam va takrorlanadigan yaxshilanishlar keltirib chiqarishini isbotladi; neyroimaj tadqiqotlari bu aralashuvlar axloqiy kognitiv va shaxslararo saxiylik bilan bog'liq medial prefrontal korteks faollashishini mustahkamlashini ko'rsatmoqda, biroq tadqiqotchilar gedonik moslashuvning ularning emotsional ahamiyatini kamaytirishi uchun amaliyotlar odatiy emas, balki xilma-xil bo'lganida ta'sirlar eng yaqqol bo'lishini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz minnatdorlik ilmi, ijobiy psixologiya interventsiyalari va ularning klinik va tashkiliy qo'llanilishi bo'yicha xalqaro ijobiy psixologiya va neyropsixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A life lived with clear goals and a sense of meaning beyond oneself.
words.example1: Living a purpose-driven life motivated him to volunteer every weekend at a local shelter.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy qadriyatlar va hayot ma'nosi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company redesigned its onboarding process to help new employees connect their daily roles to the organization's broader mission and live a more purpose-driven life at work.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarning aloqadorligi va tashkiliy missiya bilan bog'liqligini oshirish bo'yicha HR va rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Psychological research on eudaimonic well-being consistently demonstrates that a sense of purpose — defined as a stable and generalized intention to accomplish something that is both personally meaningful and of consequence to the world beyond the self — functions as a powerful buffer against existential anxiety, cognitive decline, and cardiovascular disease risk, while also predicting greater resilience in the face of adversity, underscoring the public health significance of social and educational investments that help individuals identify and pursue purposeful engagement.
words.example3Translation: Evdamonik farovonlikka oid psixologik tadqiqotlar maqsad hissi — shaxsan mazmunli va o'z-o'zidan tashqaridagi dunyo uchun oqibatli narsani amalga oshirishga barqaror va umumlashtirilgan niyat sifatida belgilangan — mavjudiy tashvish, kognitiv tanazzul va yurak-qon tomir kasalligi xavfiga qarshi kuchli bufer vazifasini bajarishini va ayni paytda qiyinchiliklarga duch kelganda kattaroq chidamlilikni bashorat qilishini doimiy ravishda ko'rsatmoqda; bu esa shaxslarga maqsadli aloqadorlikni aniqlash va kuzatishga yordam beruvchi ijtimoiy va ta'lim investitsiyalarining jamoat sog'lig'i ahamiyatini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hayot ma'nosi, evdamonik farovonlik va maqsadga yo'naltirilgan hayot bo'yicha xalqaro psixologiya va jamoat sog'lig'i konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A period of time when a person refrains from using electronic devices to reduce stress.
words.example1: She felt much more relaxed after a weekend digital detox away from her phone and laptop.
words.example1Situation: Siz stressni boshqarish va texnologiyadan dam olish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company introduced a digital detox policy encouraging employees to avoid work emails after 7 p.m. to protect personal recovery time.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarning farovonligi va ish va hayot chegaralarini boshqarish bo'yicha rahbariyatga yangi siyosatni taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The growing cultural interest in digital detox reflects a deepening awareness of the neuropsychological costs of chronic hyperconnectivity, including attentional fragmentation, sleep architecture disruption caused by blue light exposure and notification-driven arousal, and the displacement of restorative face-to-face social interaction by parasocial digital engagement, with researchers emphasizing that effective disconnection requires structural rather than merely volitional interventions, including device-free environmental design and organizational norms that genuinely protect recovery time.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli detoksga o'sib borayotgan madaniy qiziqish diqqatning parchalanishi, ko'k yorug'lik ta'siri va bildirishnomaga asoslangan uyg'onish keltirib chiqaruvchi uyqu arxitekturasi buzilishi va tiklovchi yuzma-yuz ijtimoiy muloqotni paraijtimoiy raqamli aloqa bilan almashtirish kabi surunkali giperkonnektivlikning neyroppsixologik xarajatlaridan chuqurroq xabardorlikni aks ettiradi; tadqiqotchilar samarali uzilish qurilmasiz atrof-muhit dizayni va haqiqatan himoya qiluvchi tiklanish vaqtiga ega tashkiliy me'yorlarni o'z ichiga olgan shunchaki ixtiyoriy emas, balki tarkibiy aralashuvlarni talab qilishini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli farovonlik, texnologiya foydalanishini boshqarish va sog'lom inson-texnologiya munosabatlarini rivojlantirish bo'yicha xalqaro raqamli salomatlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The general well-being of individuals and societies, encompassing mental, physical, and social factors.
words.example1: Access to clean water, safe housing, and good healthcare greatly improves quality of life.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy rivojlanish va fuqarolar farovonligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company relocated its headquarters to a city with a higher quality of life index to attract and retain top talent in a competitive job market.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik joylashuv qarorlari va iste'dodni jalb qilish bo'yicha boshqaruv kengashiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Quality of life indices that move beyond GDP per capita to incorporate multidimensional measures of health, education, environmental quality, civic participation, and social cohesion provide policymakers with a far richer diagnostic framework for identifying the structural determinants of human flourishing, enabling more targeted and equitable resource allocation than aggregate economic indicators alone can support, though researchers caution that the translation of such indices into actionable policy requires careful attention to the culturally specific dimensions of well-being that universal composite measures inevitably obscure.
words.example3Translation: Aholi jon boshiga YAIMdan tashqariga chiqib sog'liq, ta'lim, atrof-muhit sifati, fuqarolik ishtiroki va ijtimoiy uyushqoqlikni ko'p o'lchovli o'lchashni o'z ichiga olgan hayot sifati indekslari siyosatchilarni inson gullab-yashnashining tarkibiy determinantlarini aniqlash uchun ancha boy diagnostik asos bilan ta'minlaydi, yig'ma iqtisodiy ko'rsatkichlar yolg'iz qo'llab-quvvatlashi mumkin bo'lganiga qaraganda yanada maqsadli va adolatli resurs taqsimotiga imkon beradi; biroq tadqiqotchilar bunday indekslarni amalga oshiriladigan siyosatga aylantirish universal kompozit o'lchovlar muqarrar ravishda yashiradigan farovonlikning madaniy-spetsifik o'lchovlariga diqqat talab qilishini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hayot sifati o'lchovlari, insonparvar rivojlanish ko'rsatkichlari va farovonlikka asoslangan siyosat dizayni bo'yicha xalqaro siyosat tadqiqotlari va ijtimoiy iqtisodiyot konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The realization or fulfillment of one's talents and potential.
words.example1: Pursuing painting after retirement was her way of achieving self-actualization.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy o'sish va hayot maqsadi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company's leadership development program is designed to support self-actualization by giving high-potential employees the autonomy, resources, and mentorship to grow beyond their current roles.
words.example2Situation: Siz iste'dodni rivojlantirish va xodimlarning shaxsiy o'sish yo'llari bo'yicha HR va rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Maslow's concept of self-actualization, positioned at the apex of his motivational hierarchy as the drive to realize one's fullest human potential, has been both profoundly influential in humanistic psychology and subject to substantive critique for its implicit assumption that growth needs can only be authentically pursued once deficiency needs are met, an assumption that cross-cultural research challenges by documenting how individuals in conditions of material scarcity and social adversity frequently achieve remarkable expressions of creativity, transcendence, and purposeful contribution.
words.example3Translation: Maslounning motivatsion ierarxiyasining cho'qqisida inson to'liq imkoniyatini amalga oshirish harakati sifatida joylashgan o'z-o'zini ro'yobga chiqarish tushunchasi insonparvar psixologiyada chuqur ta'sirli bo'lish bilan birga, o'sish ehtiyojlari faqat tanqislik ehtiyojlari qondirilgandan keyin haqiqiy ravishda quvlanishi mumkin degan bevosita taxminiga ko'ra jiddiy tanqidga ham uchradi; bu taxminni madaniyatlararo tadqiqotlar moddiy tanqislik va ijtimoiy qiyinchiliklar sharoitida yashovchi shaxslar ko'pincha ijodkorlik, transtsendentsiya va maqsadli hissaning ajoyib ifodalari erishishini hujjatlashtirish orqali shubha ostiga oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz insonparvar psixologiya, motivatsiya nazariyasi va inson rivojlanishi bo'yicha xalqaro psixologiya va ta'lim fanlari konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A tendency to consider material possessions and physical comfort more important than values or spiritual goals.
words.example1: Materialism led him to spend most of his salary on luxury goods rather than saving for the future.
words.example1Situation: Siz moliyaviy qadriyatlar va hayot ustuvorliklari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company's internal survey revealed that employees increasingly valued meaningful work and growth opportunities over purely material benefits, prompting us to redesign our total rewards strategy.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarning motivatsiyasi va kompensatsiya strategiyalari bo'yicha rahbariyat va HR jamoasiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Decades of empirical research in consumer psychology and well-being science have established that dispositional materialism — characterized by the centrality of acquisition to personal identity and the equation of wealth with success and happiness — is robustly and inversely associated with subjective well-being, relationship quality, and civic engagement, a pattern that researchers attribute to the opportunity costs imposed by materialistic goal pursuit, including the crowding out of intrinsically rewarding activities and the corrosive effect of social comparison on self-esteem.
words.example3Translation: Iste'molchi psixologiya va farovonlik fanidagi o'nlab yillik empirik tadqiqotlar dispozitsional materializm — shaxsiy shaxsiyatga egalikning markaziy ahamiyati va boylikni muvaffaqiyat va baxt bilan tenglash bilan tavsiflanuvchi — sub'yektiv farovonlik, munosabatlar sifati va fuqarolik ishtiroki bilan mustahkam va teskari bog'liqligini aniqladi; bu namunani tadqiqotchilar ichki jihatdan mukofotlovchi faoliyatni siqib chiqarish va o'z-o'ziga hurmatga ijtimoiy taqqosning korroziv ta'sirini o'z ichiga olgan materialistik maqsadni quvlashning muqobil xarajatlariga bog'laydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz materializm, sub'yektiv farovonlik va iste'molchi qadriyatlar bo'yicha xalqaro iste'molchi psixologiya va ijtimoiy farovonlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ability to recover quickly from difficulties; mental toughness.
words.example1: Her resilience helped her bounce back after losing her job and find a better opportunity.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy kuch va qiyinchiliklarni engish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company invested in resilience training for all managers to help them support their teams effectively during periods of organizational change and uncertainty.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbariyatni rivojlantirish va o'zgarishlarni boshqarish strategiyalari bo'yicha HR jamoasiga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Contemporary resilience research has shifted away from conceptualizing resilience as a fixed personality trait toward understanding it as a dynamic capacity shaped by the interaction of individual cognitive appraisal styles, the quality and accessibility of social support networks, and structural environmental factors that either buffer or amplify the impact of adversity, a reconceptualization with important implications for intervention design insofar as it locates resilience-building capacity not only within individuals but also within communities, institutions, and policy environments.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy chidamlilik tadqiqoti chidamlilikni qat'iy shaxsiyat xususiyati sifatida tushunishdan individual kognitiv baholash uslublari, ijtimoiy qo'llab-quvvatlash tarmoqlarining sifati va kirish imkoniyati va qiyinchiliklarning ta'sirini buferlovchi yoki kuchaytiruvchi tarkibiy muhit omillari o'zaro ta'siri bilan shakllanadigan dinamik qobiliyat sifatida tushunishga o'tdi; bu qayta tushuntirish chidamlilikni rivojlantirish qobiliyatini nafaqat shaxslar, balki jamoatlar, muassasalar va siyosat muhitlari ichida ham joylashtirishi jihatidan aralashuv dizayni uchun muhim oqibatlarga ega.
words.example3Situation: Siz chidamlilik ilmi, travma-ma'lumotli siyosat va ijtimoiy-ekologik barqarorlik bo'yicha xalqaro psixologiya va jamoat sog'lig'i konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An approach to health that considers the whole person (physical, mental, emotional, and social).
words.example1: Holistic well-being means taking care of your body, mind, and relationships, not just your physical health.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'lom hayot tarzi va shaxsiy g'amxo'rlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company's holistic well-being program covers physical health screenings, mental health counseling access, financial literacy workshops, and team social events.
words.example2Situation: Siz keng qamrovli xodimlar farovonligi dasturini rahbariyat va moliyaviy qo'mita oldida taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Holistic well-being frameworks that integrate physical, psychological, social, and spiritual dimensions of health challenge the reductive biomedical model's tendency to treat symptoms in isolation from their relational, environmental, and existential contexts, and emerging evidence from integrative medicine and positive health research suggests that interventions addressing multiple well-being dimensions simultaneously produce synergistic effects that exceed the sum of their components, pointing toward a paradigm shift in how healthcare systems conceptualize and pursue the promotion of genuine human flourishing.
words.example3Translation: Sog'liqning jismoniy, psixologik, ijtimoiy va ma'naviy o'lchovlarini birlashtiruvchi yaxlit farovonlik asoslari reduktiv biomeditsina modelining alomatlarni munosabat, atrof-muhit va mavjudiy kontekstlardan alohida davolash tendentsiyasiga qarshi turadi va integrativ tibbiyot va pozitiv sog'liq tadqiqotlaridan paydo bo'layotgan dalillar bir vaqtning o'zida bir nechta farovonlik o'lchovlariga murojaat qiluvchi aralashuvlar komponentlari yig'indisidan oshuvchi sinergetik ta'sirlar hosil qilishini ko'rsatadi; bu esa tibbiyot tizimlari haqiqiy inson gullab-yashnashini qanday tushunishi va quvlanishi bo'yicha paradigma almashinuviga yo'naltirilmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz integrativ sog'liq, yaxlit tibbiyot va insonni gullab-yashnashga asoslangan sog'liqni saqlash tizimlarini loyihalash bo'yicha xalqaro sog'liqni saqlash va farovonlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

name: 24 Vocabulary Challenge
description: Master idioms and phrases used by fluent English speakers

words.definition: To reach a point where one eventually does something, often after a process of change, reflection, or development.
words.example1: I came to enjoy classical music after years of ignoring it.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiziqishlaringizning vaqt o'tishi bilan qanday o'zgarganini hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team came to rely on remote tools after the pandemic forced us to adapt.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning raqamli transformatsiya jarayonini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Over the course of her career, she came to understand that sustainable leadership requires not only strategic vision but also the emotional intelligence to bring people through uncertainty.
words.example3Translation: Karyerasi davomida u barqaror yetakchilik nafaqat strategik ko'rinishni, balki odamlarni noaniqlik orqali olib o'tish uchun hissiy intellektni ham talab qilishini tushunib yetdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik rivojlanishi va tashkiliy o'zgarish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A strong warning used to prohibit an action, implying serious consequences if disobeyed.
words.example1: Don't you dare touch my files without asking first.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz ruxsatsiz narsalaringizga tegmoqchi bo'lganda qat'iy ogohlantirish berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager made it clear — don't you dare submit a report without double-checking the figures.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoangizga hisobot sifati standartlarini mustahkamlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In high-stakes negotiations, experienced diplomats understand that don't you dare moments — implicit or explicit — mark the boundaries beyond which further pressure will produce breakdown rather than concession.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori stavkali muzokaralarda tajribali diplomatlar "jur'at etma" lahzalari — yashirin yoki ochiq — qo'shimcha bosim yon berish o'rniga buzilishni keltirib chiqaradigan chegaralarni belgilashini tushunishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz diplomatik muzokaralar va chegara belgilash bo'yicha xalqaro nizolarni hal qilish seminarida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To lose emotional control and react with visible anger or frustration.
words.example1: He lost his cool during the meeting when his idea was rejected again.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish joyidagi emotsional boshqaruv haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our senior negotiator reminded the team never to lose your cool at the table, no matter how provocative the other side becomes.
words.example2Situation: Siz muzokaralar jamoasini qiyin muloqotlarga tayyorlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Leaders who lose their cool under pressure inadvertently signal to their teams that the situation is out of control, triggering collective anxiety that compounds the very problem they were struggling to manage.
words.example3Translation: Bosim ostida o'zini yo'qotadigan rahbarlar jamoalariga vaziyat nazoratdan chiqib ketganini beixtiyor signal berishadi va ular boshqarishga harakat qilayotgan muammoni kuchaytiruvchi jamoaviy tashvishni keltirib chiqarishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik psixologiyasi va stress ostida qaror qabul qilish bo'yicha korporativ trening o'tkazayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Lacking information or awareness about a situation.
words.example1: I was completely in the dark about the budget cuts until the announcement.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhim kompaniya yangiliklari haqida kech xabardor bo'lganingizni hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our clients should never be left in the dark about project delays — transparency builds long-term trust.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan muloqot standartlarini jamoangizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Keeping stakeholders in the dark during organizational restructuring is one of the most damaging communication failures a leadership team can make, as information vacuums are reliably filled by rumour and speculation.
words.example3Translation: Tashkiliy qayta tuzish davomida manfaatdor tomonlarni xabarsiz qoldirish rahbariyat jamoasi qilishi mumkin bo'lgan eng zararli kommunikatsiya muvaffaqiyatsizliklaridan biri bo'lib, axborot bo'shliqlari ishonchli ravishda mish-mish va taxminlar bilan to'ldiriladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashkiliy o'zgarishlarni boshqarish va ichki kommunikatsiya strategiyasi bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To break into pieces physically or collapse emotionally or mentally.
words.example1: The old chair came apart as soon as someone sat on it.
words.example1Situation: Siz ofis jihozlari yoki uskunalari haqida hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our carefully prepared proposal came apart when the client raised objections we hadn't anticipated.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijoz bilan muzokaralar natijasini jamoangizga tahlil qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Teams come apart not usually because of single catastrophic failures but because accumulated small miscommunications, unresolved tensions, and eroding psychological safety gradually undermine the trust that collective performance depends on.
words.example3Translation: Jamoalar odatda yagona halokatli muvaffaqiyatsizliklar tufayli emas, balki to'plangan kichik noto'g'ri muloqotlar, hal qilinmagan keskinliklar va psixologik xavfsizlikning eroziyasi asta-sekin jamoaviy ishlash tayanadigan ishonchni buzishi tufayli parchalanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa dinamikasi va tashkiliy barqarorlik bo'yicha boshqaruv psixologiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be unable to keep track of a number due to its size or repetition.
words.example1: I've lost count of how many times we've revised this document.
words.example1Situation: Siz uzoq davom etgan loyiha jarayonini hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our customer service team has lost count of the complaints received since the system outage began.
words.example2Situation: Siz tizim muammosi ta'sirini rahbariyatga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When organizations lose count of the number of competing priorities, initiatives, and metrics they are tracking simultaneously, it is a reliable signal that strategic focus has been sacrificed in favour of the illusion of comprehensiveness.
words.example3Translation: Tashkilotlar bir vaqtda kuzatayotgan raqobatdosh ustuvorliklar, tashabbuslar va ko'rsatkichlar sonini yo'qotganda, bu strategik diqqat keng qamrovlilik illyuziyasi foydasiga qurbonlik qilinganining ishonchli signali hisoblanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik rejalashtirish va tashkiliy diqqatni boshqarish bo'yicha korporativ strategiya sessiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A large underwater ecosystem formed by coral polyps, characterized by exceptional biodiversity.
words.example1: The coral reef near the island attracts divers from around the world.
words.example1Situation: Siz tabiat va ekologik turistik manzillar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our environmental report warns that rising sea temperatures are causing irreversible damage to coral reef ecosystems globally.
words.example2Situation: Siz atrof-muhit barqarorligi hisobotini rahbariyat va investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Coral reef degradation represents a catastrophic loss not only of marine biodiversity but also of the coastal protection, fisheries productivity, and tourism revenues that millions of people in tropical regions depend on for their livelihoods.
words.example3Translation: Marjon rifi degradatsiyasi nafaqat dengiz biologik xilma-xilligining, balki tropik mintaqalardagi millionlab odamlar tirikchilik uchun tayanadigan qirg'oqni muhofaza qilish, baliqchilik unumdorligi va turizm daromadlarining ham halokatli yo'qolishini ifodalaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz dengiz ekotizimlari va iqlim o'zgarishi bo'yicha xalqaro atrof-muhit sammitida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: At the very earliest moment of daylight.
words.example1: She wakes up at the crack of dawn every day to go for a run.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning tartibli kundalik odatlari haqida hamkasbingizga aytayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our logistics team starts operations at the crack of dawn to ensure deliveries reach clients before business hours begin.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning operatsion samaradorlik strategiyasini mijozlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The discipline of rising at the crack of dawn, long associated with military and agricultural traditions, has been reframed in contemporary productivity culture as a marker of ambition, though research suggests sleep quality matters far more than wake time for cognitive performance.
words.example3Translation: Tongda turish intizomi, uzoq vaqt harbiy va qishloq xo'jaligi an'analari bilan bog'liq bo'lib, zamonaviy unumdorlik madaniyatida ambitsiyaning belgisi sifatida qayta talqin etilgan, garchi tadqiqotlar bilish ishlashi uchun uyg'onish vaqtidan ko'ra uyqu sifati ancha muhimroq ekanligini ko'rsatsa ham.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish unumdorligi va inson ishlash ritmi bo'yicha korporativ farovonlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Expected to happen very soon or located very nearby.
words.example1: Summer is just around the corner — it's time to plan the team retreat.
words.example1Situation: Siz yaqinlashib kelayotgan tadbirlarni rejalashtirish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our product launch is just around the corner, so all departments need to be fully aligned by next week.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahsulot chiqarilishiga tayyorgarlik yig'ilishida jamoani muvofiqlashtirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The assumption that economic recovery is always just around the corner can lead policymakers to defer necessary structural reforms, substituting optimistic forecasting for the difficult decisions that sustainable growth actually requires.
words.example3Translation: Iqtisodiy tiklanish har doim yaqin atrofda degan taxmin siyosatchilarni zarur tarkibiy islohotlarni kechiktirishga undashi mumkin, optimistik prognozlashni barqaror o'sish haqiqatan ham talab qiladigan qiyin qarorlar o'rniga qo'yadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz iqtisodiy siyosat va tsiklik prognozlash bo'yicha xalqaro moliya institutida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To begin to exist; to be created or established.
words.example1: The organization came into being after a group of volunteers decided to formalize their efforts.
words.example1Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning tarixi va tashkil topish jarayonini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our current data protection policy came into being following a comprehensive audit that identified critical compliance gaps.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ma'lumotlarni muhofaza qilish siyosati tarixini huquqiy bo'lim bilan ko'rib chiqayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: International institutions come into being not through spontaneous cooperation but through protracted negotiation among states with competing interests, which is why the compromises embedded in their founding documents so often constrain their subsequent effectiveness.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro institutlar o'z-o'zidan hamkorlik orqali emas, balki raqobatdosh manfaatlarga ega davlatlar o'rtasidagi uzoq muzokaralar orqali vujudga keladi, shuning uchun ularning ta'sis hujjatlariga singdirilgan murosalar keyingi samaradorliklarini ko'pincha cheklaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro institutlar tarixi va boshqaruvi bo'yicha diplomatiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A sudden realization or moment of clarity about something previously unclear.
words.example1: It suddenly dawned on me that I had forgotten to send the meeting invitation.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhim narsani kechikib anglagan paytingizni hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: It suddenly dawned on our team that the client's real concern was not the price but the delivery timeline.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijoz muzokarasidan keyin jamoangiz bilan tahlil qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It suddenly dawned on the research team that the anomalous results they had been trying to explain away were not errors but evidence of a phenomenon that fundamentally challenged the theoretical framework underpinning their entire research programme.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqot jamoasiga to'satdan ayon bo'ldiki, ular tushuntirishga harakat qilayotgan g'ayritabiiy natijalar xatolar emas, balki ularning butun tadqiqot dasturini asoslaydigan nazariy tizimni tubdan shubha ostiga qo'yadigan hodisaning dalili edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilmiy kashfiyot metodologiyasi va tadqiqot paradigmasi o'zgarishlari bo'yicha akademik konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Rural areas as opposed to urban or metropolitan regions.
words.example1: She grew up in the country and found city life overwhelming at first.
words.example1Situation: Siz qishloq va shahar hayoti o'rtasidagi farqlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is considering opening a distribution centre in the country to reduce urban congestion and lower operational costs.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi logistika strategiyasi bo'yicha rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The persistent economic and social gap between the country and urban centres drives rural-urban migration, depletes rural communities of young talent, and creates regional inequalities that urban-focused policy frameworks are structurally ill-equipped to address.
words.example3Translation: Qishloq va shahar markazlari o'rtasidagi doimiy iqtisodiy va ijtimoiy tafovut qishloqdan shaharga migratsiyani haydaydi, qishloq jamoatlarini yosh iste'dodlardan mahrum qiladi va shahar markazlashgan siyosat tizimlarini tarkibiy jihatdan hal qilishga tayyor emas bo'lgan mintaqaviy tengsizliklarni yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mintaqaviy rivojlanish va qishloq-shahar tengsizligi bo'yicha hukumat siyosati konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Pluck up the courage to do sth
words.definition: To gather sufficient confidence or bravery to perform a difficult or frightening action.
words.example1: He finally plucked up the courage to ask for a promotion after two years.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin qarorlar yoki suhbatlar haqida hamkasbingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our junior analyst plucked up the courage to challenge the senior partner's assumptions during the strategy review, which turned out to be a pivotal moment.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoaviy muhokamada qo'rqmasdan fikr bildirishning muhimligini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Organizations that create psychologically safe environments make it far easier for employees to pluck up the courage to raise concerns early, which is precisely when intervention is most effective and least costly.
words.example3Translation: Psixologik xavfsiz muhit yaratadigan tashkilotlar xodimlarga tashvishlarni erta ko'tarishda jasorat to'plashni ancha osonlashtiradi va bu aralashuv eng samarali va eng kam xarajatli bo'lgan payt hisoblanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz psixologik xavfsizlik va tashkiliy madaniyat bo'yicha HR va boshqaruv konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To stop working or end an activity, usually because sufficient progress has been made.
words.example1: We've been in meetings for six hours — let's call it a day.
words.example1Situation: Siz uzoq ish kunidan keyin jamoangizni uyga yuborayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our project manager decided to call it a day after the team reached the key milestone ahead of schedule.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha jamoasining muvaffaqiyatli ish kunini jamoangizga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Knowing when to call it a day on a failing initiative requires the same leadership courage as launching one, since sunk cost bias and reputational concerns routinely cause organizations to persist with strategies long after the evidence has made discontinuation the rational choice.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatsiz tashabbusni qachon tugatishni bilish uni boshlash bilan bir xil rahbarlik jasoratini talab qiladi, chunki cho'kkan xarajat tendentsiyasi va obro'ga oid tashvishlar tashkilotlarga to'xtatish oqilona tanlov bo'lganidan ancha keyin ham strategiyalarni davom ettirishga undaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashkiliy qaror qabul qilish va strategik to'xtatish bo'yicha boshqaruv konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A direct and often hostile meeting or conflict between opposing parties.
words.example1: The confrontation between the two colleagues made the whole office uncomfortable.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish joyidagi mojaro va uning ta'siri haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our mediation team was brought in to prevent a full confrontation between the two departments from escalating further.
words.example2Situation: Siz konfliktni boshqarish jarayonini HR rahbariyatiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Avoiding confrontation entirely may preserve short-term harmony but allows unresolved tensions to accumulate until they erupt in far more damaging ways, suggesting that managed, respectful confrontation is often preferable to prolonged avoidance.
words.example3Translation: To'qnashuvdan butunlay qochish qisqa muddatli uyg'unlikni saqlashi mumkin, lekin hal qilinmagan keskinliklarni ancha zararli yo'llar bilan portlashiga qadar to'planishiga imkon beradi, bu esa boshqariladigan, hurmatli to'qnashuv ko'pincha uzoq muddatli qochishdan afzalroq ekanligini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz konfliktni hal qilish va tashkiliy salomatlik bo'yicha ish joyi psixologiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be in a difficult situation with limited options or ways out.
words.example1: We were in a tight corner when the supplier cancelled our order last minute.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan muammoni hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our negotiating team found itself in a tight corner when the client demanded a 40 percent price reduction with no room for compromise.
words.example2Situation: Siz muzokaralar jarayonidagi qiyin vaziyatni rahbariyatga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Governments that find themselves in a tight corner fiscally often face a deeply unattractive choice between austerity measures that suppress growth and monetary expansion that risks inflation, with neither option offering a clean path to sustainable recovery.
words.example3Translation: Moliyaviy jihatdan qiyin ahvolda qolgan hukumatlar ko'pincha o'sishni to'xtatuvchi qattiqqo'llik choralari va inflyatsiya xavfini tug'diradigan pul kengayishi o'rtasida juda jozibador bo'lmagan tanlovga duch keladi, hech bir variant barqaror tiklanish uchun toza yo'l taklif etmaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz fiskal siyosat va iqtisodiy inqirozni boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro moliya institutida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To become known or revealed, especially after being hidden or unknown.
words.example1: New evidence came to light that changed the outcome of the investigation.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhim yangi ma'lumotlar kashf etilgani haqida hamkasbingizga xabar berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Several compliance issues came to light during our internal audit that required immediate corrective action.
words.example2Situation: Siz audit natijalari va tashkiliy javob choralari haqida rahbariyatga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When corporate misconduct comes to light, the reputational damage is invariably amplified by the cover-up rather than the original act, underscoring why transparent and timely disclosure is almost always the strategically superior response.
words.example3Translation: Korporativ noto'g'ri xulq-atvor oshkor bo'lganda, obro'ga zarar deyarli har doim asl harakat emas, balki yashirish bilan kuchaytiriladi, bu shaffof va o'z vaqtida oshkor qilish deyarli har doim strategik jihatdan ustun javob ekanligini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ shaffoflik va inqirozni boshqarish bo'yicha biznes etikasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Polite behaviour demonstrating respect and consideration for others.
words.example1: He showed basic courtesy by holding the door open for his colleagues.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish joyida muomala madaniyati haqida yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our customer service policy requires that all staff extend the same level of courtesy to every client regardless of the size of their account.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish standartlarini jamoangizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Professional courtesy is not merely a social nicety but a strategic asset, as organisations whose members consistently treat colleagues, clients, and competitors with respect build the reputational capital that sustains long-term collaborative relationships.
words.example3Translation: Kasbiy odob nafaqat ijtimoiy noziklik, balki strategik aktiv bo'lib, a'zolari hamkasblar, mijozlar va raqobatchilarga izchil hurmat bilan muomala qiladigan tashkilotlar uzoq muddatli hamkorlik munosabatlarini qo'llab-quvvatlaydigan obro'li kapital yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ madaniyat va kasbiy munosabatlar bo'yicha biznes etikasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be subjected to intense criticism or attack.
words.example1: The new policy came under fire from employees who felt they weren't consulted.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi kompaniya siyosatiga bo'lgan reaktsiya haqida rahbariyatga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our marketing campaign came under fire on social media for being culturally insensitive, requiring an immediate public response.
words.example2Situation: Siz PR inqirozini boshqarish jarayonini jamoangiz bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Public institutions that come under fire for poor performance face a difficult balance between defending their record to maintain staff morale and demonstrating sufficient accountability to retain public legitimacy and political support.
words.example3Translation: Yomon ishlashi uchun tanqidga uchragan davlat muassasalari xodimlar ruhiyatini saqlash uchun o'z rekordini himoya qilish va jamoat qonuniyligini va siyosiy qo'llab-quvvatlashni saqlab qolish uchun etarli javobgarlikni namoyish etish o'rtasidagi qiyin muvozanatga duch keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz davlat muassasalari javobgarligi va reputatsiyani boshqarish bo'yicha davlat boshqaruvi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To deal with events as they occur, without excessive worry or planning ahead.
words.example1: I've stopped stressing about the future — I just take things as they come now.
words.example1Situation: Siz hayot va ish haqida moslashuvchan yondashuv haqida hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team has learned to take challenges as they come rather than trying to predict every obstacle in advance.
words.example2Situation: Siz agile loyiha boshqaruvi yondashuvini yangi jamoaga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While the disposition to take things as they come can reflect admirable resilience and psychological flexibility, it becomes problematic when used to justify the absence of strategic foresight in contexts where anticipating and mitigating risks is an organizational obligation.
words.example3Translation: Bo'lganicha qabul qilish moyilligi maqtovli barqarorlik va psixologik moslashuvchanlikni aks ettirishi mumkin bo'lsa-da, u xatarlarni oldindan ko'rish va yumshatish tashkiliy majburiyat bo'lgan kontekstlarda strategik oldindan ko'rishning yo'qligini oqlash uchun ishlatilganda muammoli bo'lib qoladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashkiliy barqarorlik va strategik xavflarni boshqarish bo'yicha boshqaruv konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A dead human body, especially prior to burial or cremation.
words.example1: The discovery of the corpse led to a major police investigation in the area.
words.example1Situation: Siz jinoyat dramasi yoki hujjatli film haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our forensic team was called to examine the corpse and determine the cause of death.
words.example2Situation: Siz tibbiy yoki sud ekspertizasi jarayonini kasbiy kontekstda tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In literary and philosophical tradition, the corpse occupies a liminal space between personhood and object, generating profound ethical and cultural questions about the obligations the living owe to the dead and the social rituals through which communities process mortality.
words.example3Translation: Adabiy va falsafiy an'anada jasad shaxsiyat va ob'ekt o'rtasida chegara makonni egallaydi, tiriklar o'liklardan qarzdor bo'lgan majburiyatlar va jamoatlar o'lim bilan ishlaydigan ijtimoiy rituallar haqida chuqur axloqiy va madaniy savollarni tug'diradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tibbiy etika va madaniy antropologiya bo'yicha akademik konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To accept a difficult reality, often after emotional struggle.
words.example1: It took her months to come to terms with losing her job unexpectedly.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin hayotiy o'zgarishlarni qabul qilish jarayoni haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our leadership team had to come to terms with the fact that the original business model was no longer viable in the current market.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik qayta yo'naltirish zaruriyatini kengashga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Coming to terms with failure is not a passive process of resignation but an active cognitive and emotional task that requires honest self-assessment, extraction of lessons, and reconstruction of a forward-looking narrative that preserves agency and motivation.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatsizlikni qabul qilish taslimiyatning passiv jarayoni emas, balki halol o'z-o'zini baholash, darslarni chiqarish va agentlik va motivatsiyani saqlovchi kelajakka yo'naltirilgan rivoyatni qayta qurishni talab qiladigan faol kognitiv va hissiy vazifadir.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashkiliy moslashuvchanlik va psixologik barqarorlik bo'yicha boshqaruv psixologiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To regain success, popularity, or status after a period of decline or absence.
words.example1: The band made a comeback after ten years with a surprise new album.
words.example1Situation: Siz mashhur shaxs yoki brend tiklanishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our brand made a remarkable comeback in the market after a complete product redesign and rebranding campaign.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya tiklanish strategiyasini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Corporate comebacks require more than superficial rebranding; they demand genuine strategic transformation, leadership credibility, and the patience to rebuild stakeholder trust incrementally over time rather than through a single dramatic gesture.
words.example3Translation: Korporativ tiklanish yuzaki rebrendingdan ko'proq narsani talab qiladi; ular haqiqiy strategik transformatsiyani, rahbarlik ishonchliligini va manfaatdor tomonlar ishonchini bitta dramatik harakat orqali emas, balki vaqt o'tishi bilan bosqichma-bosqich qayta qurishga sabr-toqatni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ tiklanish va strategik transformatsiya bo'yicha biznes strategiyasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To provide emotional or physical relief to someone in distress.
words.example1: A simple phone call can bring comfort to someone going through a difficult time.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin davrni boshdan kechirayotgan odamni qo'llab-quvvatlash haqida hamkasbingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our employee assistance programme was specifically designed to bring comfort and practical support during personal crises.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar qo'llab-quvvatlash dasturini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Leaders who bring comfort to their teams during uncertainty do so not by false reassurance but by communicating honestly, demonstrating presence, and modelling the calm and purposeful behaviour that signals the situation remains navigable.
words.example3Translation: Noaniqlik davrida jamoalariga tasalli beradigan rahbarlar buni soxta ishontirish orqali emas, balki halol muloqot qilish, mavjudlikni namoyish etish va vaziyat boshqarib bo'lishini signal beruvchi sokin va maqsadli xulq-atvorni modellashtirish orqali amalga oshiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik va inqiroz davrida kommunikatsiya bo'yicha korporativ boshqaruv konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A post-working life supported by sufficient financial security and personal well-being.
words.example1: He started saving early to ensure a comfortable retirement in his later years.
words.example1Situation: Siz moliyaviy rejalashtirish va kelajakka tayyorgarlik haqida hamkasbingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our pension scheme is designed to give employees the best possible chance of a comfortable retirement after years of service.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar nafaqa imtiyozlarini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The concept of a comfortable retirement is becoming increasingly precarious for younger generations facing longer working lives, volatile investment markets, and welfare systems under fiscal pressure, necessitating a fundamental rethinking of how societies support people in later life.
words.example3Translation: Qulay nafaqa davri tushunchasi uzoqroq ish hayoti, o'zgaruvchan investitsiya bozorlari va fiskal bosim ostidagi farovonlik tizimlari bilan duch kelayotgan yosh avlodlar uchun tobora xavfliroq bo'lib bormoqda, bu jamiyatlar keksaygan odamlarni qanday qo'llab-quvvatlashini tubdan qayta o'ylashni talab qilmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy himoya va demografik o'zgarishlar bo'yicha xalqaro siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To greatly please or cheer someone up, making their day memorable.
words.example1: Her unexpected thank-you note completely made my day.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijobiy his-tuyg'ular va minnatdorchilikni ifodalash haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: A personal message from the CEO to thank an employee for exceptional work can truly make someone's day and reinforce a culture of recognition.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni tan olish va rag'batlantirish madaniyatini HR rahbariyatiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In customer experience management, interactions that make someone's day are disproportionately powerful drivers of loyalty and advocacy, as positive emotional peaks are remembered far more vividly than average service quality across an entire customer journey.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlar tajribasini boshqarishda birovni xursand qiladigan muloqotlar sodiqlik va advokatsiyaning mutanosib ravishda kuchli harakatlantiruvchilari bo'lib, ijobiy hissiy cho'qqilar butun mijoz sayohati davomida o'rtacha xizmat sifatidan ancha yorqinroq esda qoladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlar tajribasi dizayni va hissiy iqtisodiyot bo'yicha marketing konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Expressions intended to reassure or emotionally support someone in distress.
words.example1: She offered comforting words when her colleague received difficult news.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish joyida hissiy qo'llab-quvvatlash haqida hamkasbingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our managers are trained to offer comforting words without making false promises during periods of organisational uncertainty.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik kommunikatsiyasi treningini HR jamoasiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective comforting words in professional contexts acknowledge the reality of difficulty without minimising it, validate the emotional response as legitimate, and convey genuine presence and concern rather than formulaic reassurance delivered from a safe emotional distance.
words.example3Translation: Kasbiy kontekstlarda samarali tasalli so'zlari qiyinchilikning haqiqatini kamaytirmasdan tan oladi, hissiy reaktsiyani qonuniy sifatida tasdiqlaydi va xavfsiz hissiy masofadan yetkazilgan formulaik ishontirishdan ko'ra haqiqiy mavjudlik va tashvishni bildiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyi hissiy intellekti va rahbarlik kommunikatsiyasi bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Physical attractiveness, especially facial appeal.
words.example1: Good looks may open doors, but talent and hard work keep them open.
words.example1Situation: Siz tashqi ko'rinish va professional muvaffaqiyat o'rtasidagi munosabat haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our casting brief specified that good looks alone were insufficient — the brand ambassador also needed to be articulate and credible.
words.example2Situation: Siz brend vakili tanlash mezonlarini marketing jamoasiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Research on attractiveness bias demonstrates that good looks confer measurable advantages in hiring, earning, and social influence, raising uncomfortable questions about the extent to which meritocratic ideals are undermined by physical appearance in professional contexts.
words.example3Translation: Jozibadorlik tendentsiyasi bo'yicha tadqiqotlar chiroyli ko'rinish yollash, daromad va ijtimoiy ta'sirda o'lchanadigan afzalliklarni beradi, bu professional kontekstlarda meritokratik ideallarning jismoniy ko'rinish bilan qay darajada buzilayotganligi haqida noqulay savollarni ko'taradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyida tenglik va tendentsiya bo'yicha xalqaro tashkiliy psixologiya konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To honour the memory of a person or event through a ceremony, monument, or other formal recognition.
words.example1: The city erected a statue to commemorate the founding of the university 200 years ago.
words.example1Situation: Siz tarixiy voqealar va ularni eslab qolish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our annual company gathering is held in April to commemorate the founding of the organisation and celebrate its achievements.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya an'anavy tadbirining maqsadini yangi xodimga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: How societies choose to commemorate contested historical events reveals their current values and power dynamics as much as it reflects the original events, which is why commemoration is invariably a site of political negotiation rather than simply a neutral act of collective memory.
words.example3Translation: Jamiyatlar bahsli tarixiy voqealarni qanday xotirlashni tanlashi asl voqealarni aks ettirishdan ko'ra ularning hozirgi qadriyatlari va kuch dinamikasini ko'rsatadi, shuning uchun xotirlash har doim faqat jamoaviy xotiraning neytral harakati emas, balki siyosiy muzokaralar maydoni hisoblanadi.
