words.example3Situation: Siz tarix, xotira va milliy shaxsiyat bo'yicha madaniy siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To take strict and decisive action to suppress illegal or undesirable behaviour.
words.example1: The government cracked down on illegal street vendors operating in the city centre.
words.example1Situation: Siz hukumat tartib-intizom choralari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our compliance department has cracked down on expense report irregularities following last year's audit findings.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ muvofiqlik choralarini xodimlarga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When authorities crack down on dissent rather than corruption, it signals a fundamental misalignment between the stated values of good governance and the actual priorities of those in power, eroding the institutional legitimacy that effective governance depends on.
words.example3Translation: Hokimiyatlar korrupsiya o'rniga norozilikka qarshi qattiqqo'llik qilganda, bu yaxshi boshqaruv e'lon qilingan qadriyatlari va hokimiyatdagilarning haqiqiy ustuvorliklari o'rtasidagi fundamental nomuvofiqlikni bildiradi va samarali boshqaruv tayanadigan institutsional qonuniylikni yo'q qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz boshqaruv, javobgarlik va fuqarolik erkinliklari bo'yicha xalqaro siyosat konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To begin formally or officially.
words.example1: The meeting will commence at 9 a.m.
words.example1Situation: Siz yig'ilish boshlanishi haqida xabar berganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our onboarding programme will commence next Monday for all new employees.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi xodimlar uchun kirish jarayonini e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Once all stakeholders have signed the agreement, the project will formally commence and the team will begin executing the first phase of the plan.
words.example3Translation: Barcha manfaatdor tomonlar shartnomani imzolashi bilanoq, loyiha rasman boshlanadi va jamoa rejaning birinchi bosqichini amalga oshirishga kirishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro shartnoma imzolash marosimida so'zga chiqayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An exceptionally impressive display of skill or talent.
words.example1: Everyone was talking about her dazzling performance at the concert.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror kishining ajoyib chiqishi haqida do'stingiz bilan suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sales team delivered a dazzling performance this quarter, exceeding all targets.
words.example2Situation: Siz kvartal natijalarini yuqori rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The young engineer's dazzling performance during the product demo impressed the investors so much that they agreed to fund the next development phase immediately.
words.example3Translation: Yosh muhandisning mahsulot taqdimotidagi ajoyib chiqishi investorlarni shunchalik hayratda qoldirdiki, ular keyingi ishlanma bosqichini darhol moliyalashtirishga rozi bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro investitsiya forumida jamoa yutuqlari haqida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: o'zini biror ishga bag'ishlash, zimmasiga olish
words.definition: To devote oneself fully to a course of action or responsibility.
words.example1: She committed herself to learning a new skill every month.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy rivojlanish rejalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our department has committed itself to reducing response times by 30% this year.
words.example2Situation: Siz bo'lim maqsadlarini yillik rejalashtirish uchrashuvida e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: If you truly commit yourself to delivering high-quality results, your reputation as a reliable professional will grow steadily across the industry.
words.example3Translation: Agar siz yuqori sifatli natijalarni taqdim etishga o'zingizni chin dildan bag'ishlasangiz, ishonchli mutaxassis sifatidagi obro'yingiz sohada barqaror o'sib boradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yosh mutaxassislarga mentorlik qilayotgan konferensiyada nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: o'rta yo'l topish, mushtarak nuqta topish
words.definition: To identify shared views or interests in order to reach agreement.
words.example1: Despite their differences, the two friends managed to find common ground.
words.example1Situation: Siz ikki kishi o'rtasidagi kelishuv haqida boshqalarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team worked hard to find common ground with the client before signing the contract.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijoz bilan muzokaralar olib borilgandan so'ng jamoangizga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although the two departments had conflicting priorities, the project manager facilitated a workshop that helped both sides find common ground and agree on a unified timeline.
words.example3Translation: Ikki bo'lim qarama-qarshi ustuvorliklarga ega bo'lishiga qaramay, loyiha menejeri seminar o'tkazib, har ikki tomonga mushtarak nuqta topishga va yagona vaqt jadvaliga kelishishga yordam berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashkilotlar o'rtasidagi hamkorlik muzokaralarida vositachi sifatida ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Able to exist or function together without conflict.
words.example1: Make sure the new software is compatible with your laptop.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi dastur o'rnatish haqida hamkasbingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our new system must be compatible with all existing tools used across the company.
words.example2Situation: Siz IT infratuzilmasini yangilash rejasini texnik jamoaga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Before finalising the merger, the legal team must confirm that the two companies' operational frameworks are fully compatible to avoid costly conflicts down the line.
words.example3Translation: Birlashuvni yakunlashdan oldin, yuridik jamoa kelajakda qimmatbaho ziddiyatlarning oldini olish uchun ikkala kompaniyaning operatsion tizimlarini to'liq mos kelishini tasdiqlashi shart.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniyalar birlashuvi jarayonini xalqaro biznes forumida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An extremely offensive expression telling someone to die; also used literally to mean die suddenly.
words.example1: He was so angry that he told her to drop dead.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning jahl ustida aytgan so'zlari haqida hikoya qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our HR policy strictly prohibits language like "drop dead" in any workplace communication.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish joyi xulq-atvor qoidalarini yangi xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While the phrase "drop dead" is often used in frustration as a dramatic expression of dismissal, using it in a professional setting can seriously damage your reputation and relationships.
words.example3Translation: "Drop dead" iborasi ko'pincha jahllanish paytida keskin rad etish ifodasi sifatida ishlatilsa-da, uni kasbiy muhitda qo'llash obro'yingizga va munosabatlaringizga jiddiy zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyi muloqot madaniyati bo'yicha treningda ma'ruza qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To counterbalance a loss or disadvantage by providing an equivalent benefit.
words.example1: He worked extra hours to compensate for the time he missed.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishda kechikish yoki yo'qlama haqida tushuntirish berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company offered additional benefits to compensate for the delay in salary increases.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarning noroziligi sababli ular bilan muloqot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although the product launch was delayed by two months, the marketing team ran an intensive campaign to compensate for the lost momentum and successfully met the annual sales target.
words.example3Translation: Mahsulot taqdimoti ikki oyga kechikishiga qaramay, marketing jamoasi yo'qolgan suratni qoplash uchun keng qamrovli kampaniya o'tkazdi va yillik savdo rejasini muvaffaqiyatli bajarди.
words.example3Situation: Siz yillik hisobot taqdimotida kechikishlarning oqibatlarini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: o'zini past his qilish, kamchilik kompleksi
words.definition: A persistent belief in one's own inadequacy compared to others.
words.example1: Growing up with constant criticism gave him an inferiority complex.
words.example1Situation: Siz insonning o'z-o'ziga bo'lgan ishonchi haqida psixolog bilan suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our mentorship programme is designed to help employees overcome an inferiority complex and build professional confidence.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni rivojlantirish dasturini HR yig'ilishida taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: An inferiority complex can quietly undermine a professional's performance, causing them to avoid challenging assignments even when they possess the skills required to succeed.
words.example3Translation: Kamchilik kompleksi mutaxassisning ish faoliyatini sekin-asta buzishi mumkin, muvaffaqiyat uchun zarur ko'nikmalarga ega bo'lsa ham uni qiyin topshiriqlardan qochishga majbur qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kasbiy psixologiya mavzusida xalqaro konferensiyada ma'ruza qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The natural colour and condition of a person's skin, especially the face.
words.example1: She has a fair complexion and freckles.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror kishining tashqi ko'rinishini tavsiflab berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our skincare line is formulated to suit every complexion, from very light to deep.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi kosmetika mahsulotlari kolleksiyasini savdo jamoanghizga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Dermatologists recommend choosing sunscreen based on your complexion and the amount of UV exposure you typically receive during your daily commute or outdoor work.
words.example3Translation: Dermatologlar kun davomida ish safarida yoki ochiq havoda qancha UV nurlanish olishingizga qarab, teri rangingizga mos quyoshdan himoya kremini tanlashni tavsiya qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sog'liqni saqlash va teri parvarishi bo'yicha xalqaro tibbiy seminarда nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be ignored or receive no response.
words.example1: His advice fell on deaf ears — nobody listened.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning maslahatiga e'tibor berilmagan vaziyat haqida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our repeated requests for updated equipment seemed to fall on deaf ears until the manager escalated the issue.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoangizning so'rovlari e'tiborga olinmagan vaziyatni muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Despite presenting clear data on employee burnout, the HR team's recommendations fell on deaf ears until the company lost several key staff members in a single month.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlarning charchoq muammosi bo'yicha aniq ma'lumotlar taqdim etilishiga qaramay, HR jamoasining tavsiyalari bir oy ichida bir nechta asosiy xodim ketib qolguncha e'tiborga olinmadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyi farovonligi bo'yicha xalqaro HR konferensiyasida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An additional difficulty that makes a situation more complex or problematic.
words.example1: The trip went well, but there was a complication with the hotel booking.
words.example1Situation: Siz safar yoki tadbirda yuzaga kelgan muammo haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our project faced an unexpected complication when the supplier failed to deliver on time.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha borishini yig'ilishda muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A last-minute regulatory complication forced the team to revise the entire submission before the deadline, putting significant pressure on both the legal and technical departments.
words.example3Translation: So'nggi daqiqada yuzaga kelgan me'yoriy asorat jamoani muddatga qadar butun hujjatni qayta ko'rib chiqishga majbur qildi va bu yuridik hamda texnik bo'limlarga katta bosim o'tkazdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha boshqaruvi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada risk menejmentini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Dead; a formal or legal term for someone who has died.
words.example1: The property was left to the family of the deceased.
words.example1Situation: Siz meros yoki yuridik masalalar haqida rasmiy muhitda gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our legal team is handling the estate of a deceased former partner of the firm.
words.example2Situation: Siz yuridik firma yoki kompaniyada meros masalasini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Under the terms of the contract, all outstanding obligations of the deceased party must be fulfilled by the designated representative within 90 days of the official notification.
words.example3Translation: Shartnoma shartlariga ko'ra, vafot etgan tomonning barcha muddati o'tmagan majburiyatlari rasmiy xabarnomadan so'ng 90 kun ichida tayinlangan vakil tomonidan bajarilishi shart.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro meros huquqi bo'yicha yuridik konferensiyada nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A settlement in which each side gives up part of its demands.
words.example1: They reached a compromise and agreed to meet halfway.
words.example1Situation: Siz ikki tomon o'rtasidagi kelishuv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team had to compromise on the deadline in order to maintain the quality of the final product.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijoz bilan muzokaralar natijasini jamoangizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After three rounds of negotiation, both parties reached a compromise that allowed the project to move forward without either side sacrificing its core requirements.
words.example3Translation: Uch bosqichli muzokaradan so'ng, har ikki tomon hech biri o'z asosiy talablaridan voz kechmasdan loyihani oldinga siljitishga imkon beradigan murosa topdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro biznes muzokaralari bo'yicha seminar olib borayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To deteriorate gradually due to neglect or age.
words.example1: The old house fell into decay after the owners moved away.
words.example1Situation: Siz tashlandiq bino yoki joy haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our regional office building fell into decay because maintenance was underfunded for years.
words.example2Situation: Siz infratuzilma moliyalashtirish muammolarini rahbariyatga hisobot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Once-thriving industrial districts can fall into decay when businesses relocate and local governments fail to invest in regeneration programmes.
words.example3Translation: Ilgari gullab-yashnagan sanoat tumanlari korxonalar ko'chib ketganda va mahalliy hukumatlar qayta tiklanish dasturlariga sarmoya kiritishni e'tiborsiz qoldirganida xarob bo'lib qolishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar rivojlanishi va iqtisodiy siyosat bo'yicha xalqaro forumda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A psychological condition characterized by uncontrollable eating behaviours.
words.example1: She sought help after realising she had a compulsive eating disorder.
words.example1Situation: Siz ruhiy salomatlik va yordam izlash haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our wellness programme includes support for employees dealing with a compulsive eating disorder.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ sog'liqni saqlash dasturini xodimlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A compulsive eating disorder is a serious psychological condition that often requires a combination of cognitive behavioural therapy and nutritional guidance to manage effectively.
words.example3Translation: Nazorat qilib bo'lmaydigan ovqatlanish buzilishi — bu jiddiy psixologik holat bo'lib, uni samarali boshqarish uchun ko'pincha kognitiv-xulq-atvor terapiyasi va ovqatlanish bo'yicha maslahatning uyg'unligini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ruhiy salomatlik va ovqatlanish buzilishlari bo'yicha xalqaro tibbiy konferensiyada ma'ruza qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The element that ultimately determines an outcome.
words.example1: Price was the deciding factor when she chose between the two offers.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror tanlov yoki qaror haqida tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our client said that after-sales support was the deciding factor in choosing our product over competitors.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijoz bilan shartnoma imzolangandan so'ng savdo jamoasiga tahlil qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When evaluating candidates for a senior role, cultural fit can sometimes be the deciding factor even when two applicants have nearly identical qualifications and experience.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori lavozimga nomzodlarni baholashda, ikkita ariza beruvchining malakasi va tajribasi deyarli bir xil bo'lgan hollarda ham, korporativ muhitga moslashuvchanlik ba'zan hal qiluvchi omilga aylanishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz HR va iste'dod boshqaruvi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: nazorat qilib bo'lmaydigan kontent tomosha qilish
words.definition: Habitual and uncontrollable consumption of visual content, often media.
words.example1: He stayed up until 3 a.m. due to compulsive viewing of online videos.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqamli vositalarning haddan ortiq ishlatilishi haqida suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our digital wellness policy encourages employees to set screen time limits and avoid compulsive viewing during work hours.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar uchun raqamli gigiena siyosatini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Compulsive viewing has become a growing concern in modern workplaces, as excessive screen consumption outside of work hours can significantly reduce productivity and focus during the day.
words.example3Translation: Nazorat qilib bo'lmaydigan kontent tomosha qilish zamonaviy ish joylarida tobora ortib borayotgan muammoga aylandi, chunki ish vaqtidan tashqari ekranning haddan ziyod ishlatilishi kunduzgi unumdorlik va diqqatni sezilarli darajada pasaytirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli farovonlik va ish samaradorligi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada ma'ruza qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To hide deliberately from view or knowledge.
words.example1: She tried to conceal her disappointment with a smile.
words.example1Situation: Siz birov his-tuyg'ularini yashirishga urinsganini tasvirlaayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our audit revealed that some data had been concealed from the financial reports.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy tekshiruv natijalari haqida rahbariyatga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Any attempt to conceal material information during a regulatory investigation can result in severe legal penalties and irreparable damage to the organisation's reputation.
words.example3Translation: Tartibga solish tekshiruvi davomida muhim ma'lumotlarni yashirishga har qanday urinish og'ir huquqiy jazolarga va tashkilot obro'siga tuzatib bo'lmaydigan zararga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ boshqaruv va qonunchilikka rioya qilish bo'yicha xalqaro forumda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: axloqsiz deb topilgan, nomaqbul deb baholangan
words.definition: Judged or considered to violate accepted moral standards.
words.example1: Lying to a friend is generally deemed immoral in most cultures.
words.example1Situation: Siz axloqiy me'yorlar haqida fikr almashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company immediately distanced itself from the partner whose practices were deemed immoral by industry regulators.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ etika va sheriklik qarorlari haqida jamoatchilikka bayonot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Business practices that were once widely accepted can later be deemed immoral as societal values evolve, which is why companies must regularly review their ethical frameworks.
words.example3Translation: Ilgari keng qabul qilingan biznes amaliyotlari jamiyat qadriyatlari o'zgarishi bilan keyinchalik axloqsiz deb topilishi mumkin, shuning uchun kompaniyalar o'z etik asoslarini muntazam ko'rib chiqishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ ijtimoiy mas'uliyat bo'yicha xalqaro biznes konferensiyasida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: manman, o'zini maqtaydigan, kibr bilan to'la
words.definition: Excessively proud of oneself; vain.
words.example1: Nobody liked working with him because he was so conceited.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror hamkasbning munosabati haqida fikr bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team values humility, and conceited behaviour is something we actively discourage during collaboration.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa madaniyati va qiymatlarini yangi xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even highly talented professionals can damage their careers if they become conceited, because effective leadership depends on listening to others and acknowledging one's own limitations.
words.example3Translation: Hatto juda iste'dodli mutaxassislar ham manman bo'lib qolsa, o'z karerasiga putur yetkazishi mumkin, chunki samarali rahbarlik boshqalarni tinglash va o'z kamchiliklarini tan olishga bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz liderlik va kasbiy rivojlanish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A large proportion or intensity of a particular substance or element.
words.example1: The river showed a high concentration of pollutants after the factory leak.
words.example1Situation: Siz atrof-muhit muammolari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research found a high concentration of skilled engineers in the southern region, making it ideal for our new facility.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi ofis yoki zavod joyini tanlash bo'yicha rahbariyatga tavsiyalar berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The report highlighted a high concentration of market power among just three firms, raising serious concerns about competition and consumer choice in the sector.
words.example3Translation: Hisobot faqat uchta firma o'rtasidagi bozor kuchining yuqori konsentratsiyasini ta'kidladi va bu sektorda raqobat va iste'molchilar tanlovi bo'yicha jiddiy xavotirlarni uyg'otdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor raqobati va monopoliyani tartibga solish bo'yicha xalqaro iqtisodiy forumda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To accept something less than originally demanded, often to reach agreement.
words.example1: She made a concession and agreed to finish the project a day earlier.
words.example1Situation: Siz muzokaralar yoki kelishuvlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our negotiating team had to make a concession on pricing to secure the long-term contract.
words.example2Situation: Siz muhim shartnoma bo'yicha muzokaralar natijasini jamoangizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In complex international deals, knowing when to make a concession without undermining your core position is a skill that separates experienced negotiators from novices.
words.example3Translation: Murakkab xalqaro bitimlarda asosiy mavqeingizga putur yetkazmasdan qachon yon berishni bilish — bu tajribali muzokarachilarni yangi boshlovchilardan ajratib turadigan mahoratdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro savdo muzokaralari strategiyasi bo'yicha konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To make a judgement without sufficient evidence.
words.example1: Don't jump to conclusions — you don't know the full story yet.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror kishiga vaziyatni yaxshilab o'rganmasdan hukm chiqarmaslikni maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our managers are trained not to jump to conclusions when reviewing performance data without full context.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni baholash jarayoni haqida HR treningida tushuntirish berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Jumping to conclusions based on incomplete data is one of the most common errors in business decision-making, often leading to costly strategies that could have been avoided with proper analysis.
words.example3Translation: To'liq bo'lmagan ma'lumotlar asosida shoshilinch xulosa chiqarish — bu biznes qarorlar qabul qilishdagi eng keng tarqalgan xatolardan biri bo'lib, to'g'ri tahlil bilan oldini olish mumkin bo'lgan qimmatbaho strategiyalarga olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ma'lumotlarga asoslangan qaror qabul qilish bo'yicha xalqaro boshqaruv konferensiyasida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To express strong disapproval of; to officially declare as unacceptable.
words.example1: The community condemned the act of vandalism in the neighbourhood.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamoatchilik biror nojo'ya xatti-harakatni qoralagani haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organisation officially condemned the supplier's unethical labour practices.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ etika yoki hamkorlikni bekor qilish to'g'risida bayonot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: World leaders were quick to condemn the policy as a violation of international human rights standards, calling for an immediate review by the relevant bodies.
words.example3Translation: Dunyo rahbarlari siyosatni xalqaro inson huquqlari standartlarining buzilishi sifatida tezda qoralab, tegishli organlardan darhol ko'rib chiqishni talab qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro inson huquqlari yoki diplomatiya masalalarini muhokama qilayotgan forumda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: biror narsaga shartlangan bo'lmoq, odatlanib qolmoq
words.definition: To be trained or psychologically shaped to respond in a particular way.
words.example1: Children are often conditioned to say please and thank you from an early age.
words.example1Situation: Siz odatlar va tarbiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sales staff are conditioned to remain calm and professional even when dealing with difficult clients.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo jamoasini o'qitish metodikasi haqida HR yig'ilishida tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Over time, employees can become conditioned to accept poor management practices as normal, which is why independent workplace audits are essential for maintaining healthy organisational culture.
words.example3Translation: Vaqt o'tishi bilan xodimlar yomon boshqaruv amaliyotlarini oddiy holat sifatida qabul qilishga ko'nikmasi mumkin, shuning uchun mustaqil ish joyi tekshiruvlari sog'lom tashkiliy madaniyatni saqlash uchun juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashkiliy psixologiya va boshqaruv madaniyati bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To behave in a particular manner, especially in public or formal situations.
words.example1: It's important to conduct yourself professionally at all times.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovga rasmiy muhitda o'zini qanday tutish haqida maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our code of conduct sets clear expectations for how employees should conduct themselves during client meetings.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi xodimlarga korporativ xulq-atvor standartlarini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The way you conduct yourself during high-pressure negotiations reveals far more about your professionalism than your words alone ever could.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli bosim ostidagi muzokaralarda o'zingizni qanday tutishingiz sizning professionalligingiz haqida faqat so'zlaringizdan ko'ra ko'proq narsa aytadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz liderlik va kasbiy muloqot mahorati bo'yicha xalqaro seminar olib borayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Shared privately with the expectation it will not be disclosed.
words.example1: She told me in confidence that she was planning to resign.
words.example1Situation: Siz birov sizga maxfiy aytgan ma'lumot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our client shared the financial projections in confidence, and we are legally bound not to disclose them.
words.example2Situation: Siz maxfiy biznes ma'lumotlarini boshqalar bilan baham ko'rish chegaralarini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Information shared in confidence during a professional consultation must be protected by strict confidentiality agreements to preserve both trust and legal compliance.
words.example3Translation: Kasbiy maslahat jarayonida maxfiy tarzda ulashilgan ma'lumotlar ishonch va qonuniy muvofiqlikni saqlab qolish uchun qat'iy maxfiylik shartnomalari bilan himoyalanishi shart.
words.example3Situation: Siz kasbiy sir saqlash va huquqiy majburiyatlar bo'yicha xalqaro yuridik konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: biror joyga yoki holatga cheklangan bo'lmoq
words.definition: To be restricted or limited to a particular place or condition.
words.example1: After the injury, he was confined to bed for two weeks.
words.example1Situation: Siz kasallik yoki jarohat sababli harakat cheklangan inson haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our discussion today will be confined to the key items on the agenda to respect everyone's time.
words.example2Situation: Siz yig'ilish boshida munozarani mavzuga yo'naltirish uchun gapni boshlaayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: If innovation is confined to a single department rather than encouraged across the whole organisation, the company risks missing breakthroughs that could emerge from unexpected areas.
words.example3Translation: Agar innovatsiya butun tashkilot bo'ylab rag'batlantirilmasdan faqat bitta bo'limga cheklangan bo'lsa, kompaniya kutilmagan joylardan kelib chiqishi mumkin bo'lgan yutuqlarni qo'ldan boy berish xavfiga duch keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashkiliy innovatsiya va korporativ strategiya bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A situation where personal interests interfere with professional duties.
words.example1: The judge stepped down due to a conflict of interest in the case.
words.example1Situation: Siz manfaatlar to'qnashuvi tufayli birov vazifasidan chetlatilgan holatni tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our procurement policy requires staff to declare any conflict of interest before evaluating supplier bids.
words.example2Situation: Siz xarid jarayonlari va ichki nazorat qoidalarini xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Failing to disclose a conflict of interest in a senior leadership role can lead to disciplinary action, legal liability, and lasting damage to both individual and organisational credibility.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori rahbarlik lavozimida manfaatlar to'qnashuvini oshkor qilmaslik intizomiy choralar, huquqiy javobgarlik va shaxs hamda tashkilot ishonchliligiga uzoq muddatli zarar keltirishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ boshqaruv va etika me'yorlari bo'yicha xalqaro forumda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To face a difficult situation or person directly.
words.example1: She decided to confront her colleague about the repeated lateness.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish joyidagi qiyin vaziyatni bevosita hal qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our leadership team must confront the issue of declining morale before it affects overall performance.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa ruhiyati bilan bog'liq muammoni rahbariyat yig'ilishida ko'tarayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Leaders who are willing to confront difficult truths early — rather than waiting for a crisis — build stronger, more resilient organisations that can adapt to change.
words.example3Translation: Inqirozni kutmasdan qiyin haqiqatlarga erta yuzma-yuz kelishga tayyor bo'lgan rahbarlar o'zgarishlarga moslasha oladigan mustahkam va chidamli tashkilotlar quradilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz liderlik va tashkiliy o'zgarishlarni boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To achieve general agreement among all parties involved.
words.example1: After a long discussion, the friends reached a consensus on where to go for dinner.
words.example1Situation: Siz guruh qaroriga kelish jarayoni haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team finally reached a consensus on the project timeline after two rounds of meetings.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha rejalashtirish yig'ilishi natijasini hamkasblaringizga ma'lum qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Reaching a consensus among stakeholders with competing priorities requires skilled facilitation and a clear framework for evaluating each proposal objectively.
words.example3Translation: Qarama-qarshi ustuvorliklarga ega manfaatdor tomonlar o'rtasida kelishuvga erishish malakali boshqaruvni va har bir taklifni ob'ektiv baholash uchun aniq tizimni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ko'p tomonlama muzokaralar strategiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Voluntary permission or agreement.
words.example1: You need parental consent before signing up for the trip.
words.example1Situation: Siz ruxsatnoma yoki rasmiy rozilik talab qilingan holat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our data policy requires that users give explicit consent before their information is shared with third parties.
words.example2Situation: Siz ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish siyosatini mijozlar yoki xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Under international data protection regulations, organisations must obtain informed consent from individuals before collecting or processing any personal data.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qoidalariga ko'ra, tashkilotlar har qanday shaxsiy ma'lumotlarni yig'ish yoki qayta ishlashdan oldin jismoniy shaxslardan ongli rozilik olishlari shart.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli huquqlar va maxfiylik bo'yicha xalqaro yuridik forumda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be fully engaged in an intense or meaningful discussion.
words.example1: They were so deep in conversation that they didn't notice the time.
words.example1Situation: Siz ikki kishining qizg'in suhbatga berilib ketgani haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our CEO and the client were deep in conversation for over an hour before the formal meeting began.
words.example2Situation: Siz muhim uchrashuv oldidan bo'lgan norasmiy muloqot haqida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When two professionals are deep in conversation about a shared challenge, the insights that emerge can often lead to solutions that neither would have reached independently.
words.example3Translation: Ikki mutaxassis umumiy muammo haqida chuqur suhbatga sho'ng'iganda, paydo bo'ladigan fikrlar ko'pincha ularning birortasi mustaqil ravishda ololmaydigan yechimga olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hamkorlik va bilim almashish madaniyati bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Sustained and regular application of effort over time.
words.example1: Learning a language requires consistent effort every day.
words.example1Situation: Siz til o'rganish yoki ko'nikma orttirish haqida maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our success this year is the result of consistent effort from every member of the team.
words.example2Situation: Siz yillik natijalarni rahbariyat yoki jamoa oldida taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Consistent effort over months and years is what separates professionals who achieve lasting results from those who rely on short bursts of motivation.
words.example3Translation: Oylar va yillar davomida izchil harakat qilish — bu uzoq muddatli natijalarga erishadigan mutaxassislarni qisqa muddatli motivatsiyaga tayanadigan kishilardan ajratib turadigan narsa.
words.example3Situation: Siz kasbiy rivojlanish va unumdorlik bo'yicha xalqaro seminar olib borayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A person's physical resilience or susceptibility to illness.
words.example1: She has a strong constitution and rarely gets sick even in winter.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning sog'liq holati yoki jismoniy chidamliligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our occupational health adviser noted that employees with a weak constitution may need additional support during high-stress periods.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar sog'lig'ini qo'llab-quvvatlash dasturini HR yig'ilishida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Professionals who travel frequently across time zones and climates often discover whether they have a strong or weak constitution, and adjust their health routines accordingly.
words.example3Translation: Vaqt mintaqalari va iqlimlar bo'ylab tez-tez sayohat qiladigan mutaxassislar ko'pincha o'zlarining jismoniy chidamliligi kuchli yoki zaifligini aniqlab, sog'liqni saqlash tartiblarini shunga moslashtiradilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro biznes safari va sog'liqni saqlash mavzusidagi korporativ treningda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Limitations caused by insufficient money or resources.
words.example1: Due to financial constraints, they decided to postpone the holiday.
words.example1Situation: Siz byudjet yoki mablag' cheklovlari tufayli qaror o'zgartirilgani haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our expansion plans were put on hold because of financial constraints following the restructuring.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya rivojlanish rejalaridagi o'zgarishlarni manfaatdor tomonlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even organisations operating under significant financial constraints can achieve meaningful outcomes by prioritising high-impact activities and forming strategic partnerships.
words.example3Translation: Hatto jiddiy moliyaviy cheklovlar ostida faoliyat yuritayotgan tashkilotlar ham yuqori samarali faoliyatlarni ustuvor qo'yib va strategik hamkorliklar o'rnatib, muhim natijalarga erisha oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz notijorat tashkilotlarni boshqarish yoki ijtimoiy ta'sir strategiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro forumda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: chuqur ildiz otgan bo'lmoq, kuchli his qilinmoq
words.definition: To be strongly felt or deeply rooted emotionally.
words.example1: The loyalty between the two old friends runs deep.
words.example1Situation: Siz ikki kishining o'rtasidagi chuqur his yoki bog'liqlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company's commitment to quality runs deep — it's been part of our culture since the very beginning.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning asosiy qadriyatlari haqida mijozlar yoki hamkorlar oldida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In organisations with a long history, cultural values tend to run deep, which can be both a strength and a barrier when navigating significant change.
words.example3Translation: Uzoq tarixga ega tashkilotlarda madaniy qadriyatlar odatda chuqur ildiz otgan bo'ladi, bu esa sezilarli o'zgarishlarni boshqarishda ham kuch, ham to'siq bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashkiliy o'zgarishlarni boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be overwhelmingly affected by feelings of remorse.
words.example1: After forgetting his friend's birthday, he was consumed by guilt for days.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning pushaymonlik his-tuyg'usi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager was consumed by guilt after realising the deadline pressure had caused burnout in the team.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik xatosi va uning ruhiy oqibatlari haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Being consumed by guilt after a professional mistake is natural, but allowing it to paralyse your decision-making is far more damaging than the original error itself.
words.example3Translation: Kasbiy xato uchun aybdorlik hissi ostida ezilish tabiiy holat, ammo uning qaror qabul qilishingizni falaj qilishiga yo'l qo'yish dastlabki xatoning o'zidan ancha ko'p zarar keltiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kasbiy psixologiya va xatolardan o'rganish bo'yicha xalqaro seminar olib borayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: g'azabini jilovlamoq, jahli chiqishiga yo'l qo'ymaslik
words.definition: To restrain or control angry emotions.
words.example1: She managed to contain her anger and responded calmly.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning qiyin vaziyatda o'zini tuta olgani haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our client-facing staff are trained to contain their anger even when dealing with unreasonable complaints.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish treningini xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The ability to contain your anger under pressure is a hallmark of emotional intelligence and often determines how effectively a leader navigates conflict.
words.example3Translation: Bosim ostida g'azabingizni jilovlash qobiliyati hissiy intellektning belgisi bo'lib, ko'pincha rahbarning ziddiyatni qanchalik samarali boshqarishini belgilaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz liderlik va hissiy intellekt bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A large amount of sugar present in a product or substance.
words.example1: Always check the label — some fruit juices have a high sugar content.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'lom ovqatlanish yoki mahsulot tarkibini tekshirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our nutrition team flagged several canteen items for having a high sugar content that exceeded daily recommended levels.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ ovqatlanish va xodimlar salomatligi dasturini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Regulatory bodies in several countries now require manufacturers to display warnings on products with a high sugar content in order to help consumers make more informed choices.
words.example3Translation: Bir qancha mamlakatdagi tartibga soluvchi organlar iste'molchilarga ongli tanlov qilishda yordam berish maqsadida ishlab chiqaruvchilardan yuqori shakar miqdoriga ega mahsulotlarda ogohlantirish belgilashni talab qilmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz oziq-ovqat sanoatini tartibga solish va iste'molchilar huquqlari bo'yicha xalqaro forumda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Firmly held beliefs about right and wrong.
words.example1: She refused to lie, guided by her strong moral convictions.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning tamoyillari asosida qaror qilgani haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our leadership team made the decision based on moral convictions, even though it came at a financial cost.
words.example2Situation: Siz etik qarorlar va ularning biznesga ta'siri haqida muhokama olib borayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Professionals with strong moral convictions often face pressure to compromise their values in competitive environments, but those who hold firm tend to earn greater long-term trust.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli axloqiy e'tiqodlarga ega mutaxassislar raqobatbardosh muhitda o'z qadriyatlaridan voz kechishga ko'pincha bosim ostida qoladi, ammo o'z tamoyillariga sodiq qolganlar uzoq muddatda ko'proq ishonchga sazovor bo'ladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ etika va qadriyatlarga asoslangan liderlik bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To remain calm and rational in stressful situations.
words.example1: It's important to keep a cool head when things don't go to plan.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin vaziyatlarda xotirjamlikni saqlash haqida maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our project manager kept a cool head throughout the crisis and guided the team to a solution.
words.example2Situation: Siz inqiroz paytida rahbarning roli haqida jamoangizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In high-stakes negotiations, the ability to keep a cool head while the other party becomes emotional can be the single most powerful advantage at the table.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori darajali muzokaralarda, boshqa tomon hissiy bo'lib qolayotgan paytda xotirjamlikni saqlash qobiliyati stolda eng kuchli afzallik bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro biznes muzokaralari mahorati bo'yicha konferensiyada nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To suffer a mental breakdown or suddenly burst into laughter (context-dependent).
words.example1: The joke was so funny that everyone cracked up.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror hazil yoki kulgili vaziyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our colleague nearly cracked up during the presentation when the slides appeared in the wrong order.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish joyida kulgili yoki kutilmagan holat yuz bergani haqida hikoya qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When workloads become unmanageable and support is absent, even the most resilient professionals can crack up, which is why proactive mental health policies are essential in any organisation.
words.example3Translation: Ish hajmi boshqarib bo'lmaydigan darajaga yetib, qo'llab-quvvatlash yo'q bo'lganda, hatto eng chidamli mutaxassislar ham asab buzilishiga uchrashi mumkin, shuning uchun har qanday tashkilotda proaktiv ruhiy salomatlik siyosati muhim ahamiyat kasb etadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyi ruhiy salomatligi va burnout oldini olish bo'yicha xalqaro HR konferensiyasida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: qattiq ishtiyoq bilan xohlamoq, juda sog'inmoq
words.definition: To experience an intense and often uncontrollable desire for something.
words.example1: After a long trip, she craved a home-cooked meal.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning biror narsaga bo'lgan kuchli ishtiyoqi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research shows that employees crave recognition just as much as financial rewards.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni rag'batlantirish va motivatsiya bo'yicha HR yig'ilishida ma'lumot taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Talented professionals who crave meaningful work and intellectual stimulation are increasingly choosing employers whose missions align with their personal values.
words.example3Translation: Mazmunli ish va intellektual rag'batlantirishni qattiq istagan iste'dodli mutaxassislar tobora ko'proq o'z shaxsiy qadriyatlariga mos keladigan missiyaga ega ish beruvchilarni tanlashmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz iste'dod jalb qilish va ish beruvchi brendi bo'yicha xalqaro HR konferensiyasida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A clear, typical, and outstanding instance of something.
words.example1: Her dedication to the project is a prime example of professionalism.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning xatti-harakatini yaxshi namuna sifatida ko'rsatayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our customer service team is a prime example of how empathy can turn a complaint into loyalty.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish tajribasini boshqalarga o'rnak sifatida taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The company's rapid recovery after the supply chain crisis is a prime example of how strong leadership and clear communication can transform adversity into a competitive advantage.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyaning ta'minot zanjiri inqirozidan tez tiklanishi kuchli rahbarlik va aniq muloqot qiyinchiliklarni raqobatbardosh ustunlikka qanday aylantira olishining ajoyib namunasidir.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqirozni boshqarish va tashkiliy chidamlilik bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To settle disagreements through discussion or negotiation.
words.example1: The two neighbours eventually resolved their differences over the fence.
words.example1Situation: Siz ikki tomon o'rtasidagi mojaroni tinch yo'l bilan hal qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our management team worked through the weekend to resolve the differences between the two departments before the deadline.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki mojaro va uni boshqarish jarayoni haqida rahbariyatga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In cross-cultural business environments, the ability to resolve differences diplomatically and without loss of face for either party is an essential leadership competency.
words.example3Translation: Madaniyatlararo biznes muhitda kelishmovchiliklarni diplomatik yo'l bilan va har ikki tomon uchun obro' yo'qotmasdan hal qilish qobiliyati muhim liderlik kompetensiyasidir.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro muzokaralar va madaniyatlararo muloqot bo'yicha konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: himoya holati olmoq, ta'sirchanlik bilan munosabat bildirmoq
words.definition: To react protectively or with sensitivity when a subject is criticised.
words.example1: He tends to be defensive about his work whenever anyone offers feedback.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning tanqidga qanday munosabat bildirishi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team noticed that the client became very defensive about the budget figures during the review.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijoz yoki hamkor bilan bo'lgan qiyin uchrashuvni hamkasblaringizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When professionals are defensive about their decisions in collaborative settings, it often signals a lack of psychological safety rather than a genuine belief that they were right.
words.example3Translation: Mutaxassislar hamkorlik muhitida o'z qarorlarini himoya qilgan holda munosabat bildirganda, bu ko'pincha o'zlarining to'g'ri ekaniga chin ishonchdan ko'ra psixologik xavfsizlikning yo'qligini bildiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashkiliy psixologiya va jamoa dinamikasi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: hissiy jihatdan betaraf qolmoq, xolislikni saqlash
words.definition: To remain emotionally uninvolved and objective.
words.example1: It's hard to stay detached when a close friend is involved in the dispute.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy munosabatlar aralashgan mojaroda xolislikni saqlash qiyinligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our auditors are trained to stay detached when reviewing financial records, regardless of who prepared them.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy audit jarayoni va mustaqillik tamoyili haqida tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective mediators must stay detached from the emotional dynamics of a dispute in order to guide both parties towards a fair and workable resolution.
words.example3Translation: Samarali vositachilar adolatli va amaliy yechimga erishish uchun har ikki tomonni yo'naltirish maqsadida mojaronin hissiy dinamikasidan xolis qolishi shart.
words.example3Situation: Siz mojarolarni hal qilish va vositachilik mahorati bo'yicha xalqaro treningda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: biror narsaga kuchli ishtiyoq his qilmoq
words.definition: To feel a strong, persistent desire for something.
words.example1: I always have a craving for chocolate when I'm stressed.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'z his-tuyg'ulari yoki odatlari haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our wellness survey showed that many employees have a craving for more flexible working arrangements.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar so'rovnomasi natijalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Psychologists note that having a craving for structure and routine is particularly common among high-performing professionals who work in unpredictable or fast-changing environments.
words.example3Translation: Psixologlar tartib va muntazamlikka bo'lgan kuchli ishtiyoq ayniqsa oldindan aytib bo'lmaydigan yoki tez o'zgaruvchan muhitda ishlaydigan yuqori samarali mutaxassislar orasida keng tarqalganligini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kasbiy psixologiya va ish samaradorligi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: o'zingizdan o'tib ketmoq, kutilganidan yaxshiroq natija ko'rsatmoq
words.definition: To surpass your previous achievements or performance.
words.example1: She really excelled herself with that presentation — it was her best yet.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning o'z eng yaxshi natijasini yanada oshirib yuborgani haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our design team excelled themselves this quarter by delivering three major projects ahead of schedule.
words.example2Situation: Siz kvartal natijalarini maqtov bilan jamoangizga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The most driven professionals are not content with simply meeting expectations — they consistently look for opportunities to excel themselves and raise the standard for those around them.
words.example3Translation: Eng intiluvchi mutaxassislar faqat kutilganlarni qondirish bilan qanoatlanmaydi — ular doimo o'zlaridan o'tib ketish va atrofidagilar uchun standartni ko'tarish imkoniyatlarini izlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yuqori samarali jamoa yaratish va kasbiy o'sish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A lack of essential vitamins required for normal bodily function.
words.example1: The doctor told him his fatigue was caused by a vitamin deficiency.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq muammolari va ularning sabablari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company health screening identified that over 30% of staff had some form of vitamin deficiency.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ sog'liqni saqlash tekshiruvi natijalarini HR yig'ilishida taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Vitamin deficiency is increasingly common among professionals with demanding schedules, as irregular meals and limited sunlight exposure can deplete critical nutrient levels over time.
words.example3Translation: Vitamin yetishmovchiligi band jadvalga ega mutaxassislar orasida tobora ko'proq uchramoqda, chunki tartibsiz ovqatlanish va quyosh nuridan cheklangan foydalanish vaqt o'tishi bilan muhim ozuqa moddalarini kamaytirib boradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyi salomatligi va korporativ farovonlik bo'yicha xalqaro tibbiy konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Serving to discourage or prevent an action through fear of consequences.
words.example1: The security camera was installed as a deterrent against theft.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavfsizlik choralari yoki oldini olish usullari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company introduced stricter data policies as a deterrent against internal information leaks.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ xavfsizlik siyosatini xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Regulators argue that financial penalties must be substantial enough to function as a genuine deterrent, rather than merely a manageable cost of doing business.
words.example3Translation: Tartibga soluvchilar moliyaviy jarimalar faqat boshqariladigan biznes xarajatiga aylanib qolmasdan, haqiqiy to'siq sifatida ishlash uchun yetarlicha katta bo'lishi kerakligini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ tartibga solish va qonunchilikka rioya qilish bo'yicha xalqaro yuridik forumda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A sense of self-respect and personal worth expressed through behaviour.
words.example1: She handled the criticism with great dignity and composure.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning qiyin vaziyatda o'zini munosib tutgani haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our workplace policy ensures that every employee is treated with dignity, regardless of their role or background.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish joyi madaniyati va xodimlarni hurmat qilish tamoyillarini yangi xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Leaders who treat every person — regardless of rank or status — with dignity are far more likely to inspire loyalty and create psychologically safe environments where people thrive.
words.example3Translation: Har bir kishiga — lavozimi yoki maqomidan qat'i nazar — qadr-qimmat bilan munosabatda bo'ladigan rahbarlar odamlar kamol topadigan psixologik jihatdan xavfsiz muhit yaratib, sadoqatni ilhomlantirish ehtimoli ancha yuqori.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro liderlik va tashkiliy madaniyat bo'yicha konferensiyada nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Deserving praise for a positive action or quality.
words.example1: To his credit, he admitted the mistake without being asked.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning munosib xatti-harakatini maqtab ta'kidlaayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: To the team's credit, our product was delivered on time despite the unexpected technical issues.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoangizning qiyinchilik sharoitida erishgan yutuqlarini rahbariyat oldida ta'kidlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: To the organisation's credit, it responded to the public criticism swiftly and transparently, which ultimately strengthened rather than damaged its reputation.
words.example3Translation: Tashkilot sharafiga shuni ta'kidlash kerakki, u jamoatchilik tanqidiga tezda va shaffof tarzda javob berdi, bu esa oxir-oqibat uning obro'siga putur yetkazish o'rniga uni mustahkamladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ obro' boshqaruvi va inqirozga munosabat bo'yicha xalqaro forumda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Something that exists independently, especially an organisation or institution.
words.example1: The new branch will operate as a separate legal entity.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi kompaniya yoki bo'linma tashkil etilishi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our parent company treats each regional office as a distinct entity with its own budget and responsibilities.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ tuzilma va filiallar avtonomiyasi haqida rahbariyatga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When two organisations merge, it can take years to align their cultures and processes before they truly function as a single cohesive entity.
words.example3Translation: Ikki tashkilot birlashganda, ular haqiqatan ham yagona mushtarak birlik sifatida faoliyat yuritishidan oldin madaniyat va jarayonlarni muvofiqlashtirish uchun yillar kerak bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ birlashuv va o'zlashtirish bo'yicha xalqaro biznes konferensiyasida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: xonadan sekin-asta chiqib ketmoq, bildirmay chiqib ketmoq
words.definition: To leave quietly and cautiously, often to avoid attention.
words.example1: He crept out of the room so as not to wake the baby.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning boshqalarni bezovta qilmaslik uchun jim chiqib ketgani haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our intern quietly crept out of the room when the meeting ran two hours over schedule.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish joyidagi kulgili yoki noqulay vaziyat haqida hikoya qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Rather than creep out of the room when difficult topics arose, she chose to stay engaged and contribute constructively to the conversation.
words.example3Translation: Qiyin mavzular ko'tarilganda xonadan sekin chiqib ketish o'rniga, u suhbatga faol ishtirok etishda davom etdi va konstruktiv hissa qo'shdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoaviy muhokamalar va jasurlik bilan qatnashish madaniyati bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Extremely jealous of someone else's success or possessions.
words.example1: She was green with envy when her colleague got the promotion she had hoped for.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning boshqasining muvaffaqiyatiga hasad qilgani haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our competitors were green with envy when we landed the biggest contract of the year.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning katta yutuqqa erishgani va raqobatchilarga ta'sirini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Rather than being green with envy at a colleague's success, the most effective professionals channel that energy into identifying what they can learn and apply in their own work.
words.example3Translation: Hamkasbning muvaffaqiyatiga hasaddan yonish o'rniga, eng samarali mutaxassislar bu energiyani o'z ishlarida nima o'rganish va qo'llash mumkinligini aniqlashga yo'naltiradilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz kasbiy rivojlanish va ish joyi psixologiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro seminar olib borayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To feel offended or strongly object to something.
words.example1: She took exception to the way he spoke to her in front of others.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning muomalasiga norozilik bildirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our client took exception to the clause in the contract that limited liability too broadly.
words.example2Situation: Siz shartnoma muzokaralarida mijozning e'tirozlari haqida yuridik jamoaga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It is entirely reasonable to take exception to feedback that is delivered disrespectfully, as constructive criticism should challenge ideas without diminishing the person.
words.example3Translation: Hurmatsizlik bilan berilgan fikrga e'tiroz bildirish mutlaqo o'rinli, chunki konstruktiv tanqid g'oyalarga munosabat bildirishda insonni kamsitmasdan bo'lishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz kasbiy muloqot va fikr-mulohaza madaniyati bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A final and authoritative response that leaves no doubt.
words.example1: After weeks of uncertainty, they finally received a definitive answer from the bank.
words.example1Situation: Siz uzoq kutilgan aniq javob yoki qaror haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our legal team is still reviewing the contract — we'll have a definitive answer by Friday.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijoz yoki hamkorga jarayon holati haqida xabar berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In complex regulatory environments, it can be difficult to obtain a definitive answer, as interpretations often vary between jurisdictions and are subject to ongoing review.
words.example3Translation: Murakkab tartibga solish muhitida aniq javob olish qiyin bo'lishi mumkin, chunki talqinlar ko'pincha yurisdiktsiyalar bo'yicha farqlanadi va doimiy ko'rib chiqishga bo'ysunadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro huquqiy muvofiqlik va tartibga solish bo'yicha konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: salqin va yangi havo, serg'ayrat ob-havo
words.definition: Pleasantly cool, fresh, and clear atmospheric conditions.
words.example1: She went for a walk in the crisp weather and felt refreshed afterwards.
words.example1Situation: Siz salqin va yoqimli ob-havo haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our outdoor team-building event was perfectly timed — the crisp weather made the activities enjoyable for everyone.
words.example2Situation: Siz ochiq havoda o'tkazilgan korporativ tadbir haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many professionals find that a morning walk in crisp weather before the working day begins significantly improves their focus and mental clarity throughout the day.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab mutaxassislar ish kuni boshlanishidan oldin salqin havoda ertalabki sayr ularning kun davomidagi diqqat va aqliy ravshanligi sezilarli darajada yaxshilanishini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kasbiy samaradorlik va sog'lom kun tartibi bo'yicha xalqaro seminar olib borayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Products that are faulty, damaged, or fail to meet required quality or safety standards.
words.example1: The customer returned the defective goods and asked for a full refund.
words.example1Situation: Siz mijoz shikoyati yoki mahsulot qaytarish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our quality control team identified a batch of defective goods before they were shipped to retailers.
words.example2Situation: Siz sifat nazorati yoki ishlab chiqarish jarayonini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Under consumer protection law, buyers are entitled to a replacement or full refund if defective goods cause harm or fail to perform as described at the point of sale.
words.example3Translation: Iste'molchilarni himoya qilish qonuniga ko'ra, nuqsonli mahsulotlar zarar yetkazsa yoki sotish paytida ta'riflanganidek ishlamasa, xaridorlar almashtirish yoki to'liq pulni qaytarib olish huquqiga ega.
words.example3Situation: Siz iste'molchi huquqlari yoki savdo huquqi bo'yicha xalqaro yuridik konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unusual or rare conditions that justify making an exception to standard rules or procedures.
words.example1: The deadline was extended only due to exceptional circumstances.
words.example1Situation: Siz muddatni uzaytirish sababini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company policy allows remote work only under exceptional circumstances.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish joyidagi qoidalarni hamkasblaringizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The board agreed to waive the standard approval process because the merger presented exceptional circumstances that required an immediate and decisive response.
words.example3Translation: Kengash standart tasdiqlash jarayonidan voz kechishga rozi bo'ldi, chunki birlashish jarayoni zudlik bilan hal qilishni talab qiladigan istisno holatlarni keltirib chiqardi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro biznes konferensiyada korporativ qarorlar haqida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Considered too unimportant or inappropriate for someone of one's status or self-respect.
words.example1: He felt it was beneath his dignity to apologise first.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning g'ururli munosabati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager said that gossiping about colleagues is beneath the dignity of any professional.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish joyidagi xulq-atvor standartlari haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although some executives consider attending routine staff meetings beneath their dignity, effective leaders understand that direct engagement with their teams is essential to building trust.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi rahbarlar oddiy xodimlar yig'ilishlarida ishtirok etishni o'z qadr-qimmatlariga yarashmaslik deb bilsalar-da, samarali liderlar jamoalari bilan bevosita muloqot ishonchni mustahkamlash uchun zarur ekanini tushunishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik uslublari haqida biznes treningida ma'ruza qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A harmful or damaging impact on something or someone.
words.example1: Lack of sleep has a detrimental effect on your concentration.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq yoki turmush tarzi haqida do'stingiz bilan suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research shows that poor communication has a detrimental effect on team productivity.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoaviy samaradorlik bo'yicha hisobot taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Prolonged exposure to high-pressure work environments can have a detrimental effect on employees' mental health, which ultimately leads to higher turnover rates and reduced organisational performance.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori bosimli ish muhitida uzoq vaqt bo'lish xodimlarning ruhiy salomatligiga zararli ta'sir ko'rsatishi mumkin, bu esa oxir-oqibat kadrlar almashinuvini oshirishga va tashkilot samaradorligini pasaytirishga olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro HR konferensiyasida xodimlar farovonligi mavzusida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: korruptsiyani yo'q qilish, poraxo'rlikni bartaraf etish
words.definition: To completely eliminate corrupt or dishonest practices from a system or organisation.
words.example1: The new government promised to eradicate corruption at every level.
words.example1Situation: Siz siyosiy yangiliklar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organisation has launched a whistleblower programme to help eradicate corruption from within.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ etika siyosatini xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Without strong institutional frameworks, transparent procurement processes, and an independent judiciary, any attempt to eradicate corruption will remain superficial and short-lived.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli institutsional tizimlar, shaffof xarid jarayonlari va mustaqil sud tizimisiz korruptsiyani yo'q qilishga har qanday urinish yuzaki va qisqa muddatli bo'lib qoladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz davlat boshqaruvi islohoti bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: haddan tashqari qilish, me'yordan oshirib yuborish
words.definition: To do something far beyond what is reasonable, healthy, or appropriate.
words.example1: He drinks coffee to excess and can't sleep at night.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning odatiy yomon odati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our HR team warned staff against doing overtime to excess, as it leads to burnout.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish-hayot muvozanati haqida xodimlarga yo'riqnoma berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While ambition is an admirable quality in any professional, doing anything to excess — whether working, networking, or even exercising — can undermine both personal wellbeing and long-term career sustainability.
words.example3Translation: Ambitsiya har qanday mutaxassisda maqtovga loyiq fazilatdir, ammo har qanday narsani haddan tashqari qilish — xoh ishlash, xoh muloqot o'rnatish, xoh jismoniy mashq qilish bo'lsin — shaxsiy farovonlik va uzoq muddatli kasbiy barqarorlikka zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz kasbiy rivojlanish va sog'lom ish odatlari bo'yicha seminar olib borayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To meet or encounter someone unexpectedly or by chance.
words.example1: I'm glad our paths crossed at the conference last year.
words.example1Situation: Siz eski tanishingiz bilan kutilmaganda uchrashganingizda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our CEO mentioned that the most valuable partnerships often happen when the right people's paths cross at the right time.
words.example2Situation: Siz biznes networking tadbiri haqida hamkasblaringizga gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Had she not decided to attend that industry summit on a whim, she would never have crossed paths with the investor who would later fund her startup.
words.example3Translation: Agar u o'sha sanoat sammitiga o'z xohishi bilan qatnashmaslikka qaror qilganida, keyinchalik startapini moliyalashtirgan investor bilan hech qachon yo'li kesishmagan bo'lar edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tadbirkorlik yo'lidagi burilish nuqtalari haqida biznes-forumda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A gradual and steady decline in trust or self-belief, often caused by repeated setbacks or disappointments.
words.example1: A series of failed attempts can cause an erosion of confidence in anyone.
words.example1Situation: Siz motivatsiya va ruhiy chidamlilik haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our leadership team is concerned about the erosion of confidence among junior staff following the recent restructuring.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ o'zgarishlar jarayonida xodimlar kayfiyatini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The repeated failure to deliver on promised deadlines caused a gradual erosion of confidence among stakeholders, which ultimately threatened the entire project's credibility.
words.example3Translation: Va'da qilingan muddatlarga qayta-qayta rioya qilmaslik manfaatdor tomonlar orasida ishonchning asta-sekin yemirilishiga olib keldi, bu esa oxir-oqibat butun loyihaning ishonchliligini xavf ostiga qo'ydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha boshqaruvi va manfaatdor tomonlar munosabatlari bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A vague or unclear memory of something from the past.
words.example1: I have a dim recollection of meeting him at a party years ago.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'tmishdagi uchrashuvni yoki voqeani eslashga harakat qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our oldest employee had only a dim recollection of the company's founding days.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyaning tarixi haqida suhbat qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Despite having only a dim recollection of the original agreement, the senior partner was able to reconstruct the key terms with the help of archived correspondence.
words.example3Translation: Asl shartnomaning faqat xira xotirasiga ega bo'lishiga qaramay, katta sherik arxivlashtirilgan yozishmalar yordamida asosiy shartlarni tiklashga muvaffaq bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz uzoq muddatli shartnomalar yoki huquqiy nizolar bo'yicha professional muhokamada ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: ishonish qiyin bo'lmoq, aql bovar qilmaslik
words.definition: To be so extraordinary, surprising, or outrageous that it is very hard to accept or understand.
words.example1: The amount of food he ate at dinner defied belief.
words.example1Situation: Siz hayratlanarli yoki kulgili voqea haqida do'stingizga gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our quarterly losses defied belief — no one expected the situation to be so severe.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy natijalar haqida rahbariyat bilan muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The speed at which the small startup grew from a two-person operation into a global enterprise within three years simply defies belief, even by the most optimistic industry standards.
words.example3Translation: Kichik startapning ikki kishilik tashkilotdan uch yil ichida global korxonaga aylanish tezligi, hatto eng optimistik sanoat standartlari bilan ham, shunchaki aql bovar qilmaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz texnologiya sanoatidagi muvaffaqiyat tarixi haqida xalqaro tadbirkorlik forumida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A roughly drafted or poorly developed strategy that lacks detail and sophistication.
words.example1: We had a crude plan for the trip, but no real schedule.
words.example1Situation: Siz rejalashtirilmagan yoki yetarlicha tayyorlanmagan faoliyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our initial proposal was just a crude plan — we still needed to add the budget and timeline.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyihaning dastlabki bosqichi haqida jamoangizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: What began as a crude plan sketched on a napkin during a lunch break eventually evolved into a fully funded, award-winning social enterprise.
words.example3Translation: Tushlik tanaffusida salfetka ustiga chizilgan xom reja sifatida boshlangan narsa oxir-oqibat to'liq moliyalashtirilgan, mukofotga sazovor ijtimoiy korxonaga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes g'oyalarining rivojlanishi haqida tadbirkorlik masterklassida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To feel a strong but usually temporary romantic attraction towards someone.
words.example1: Everyone in school knew she had a crush on the new student.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingizning romantik his-tuyg'ulari haqida hazil aralash suhbat qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team noticed that the new intern clearly had a crush on one of the junior designers.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofisdagi engil mavzudagi suhbatda ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although having a crush on a colleague is not uncommon in a professional setting, it is important to maintain clear boundaries to ensure a respectful and productive work environment.
words.example3Translation: Garchi ish muhitida hamkasb bilan muhabbat his qilish g'ayritabiiy bo'lmasa-da, hurmatli va samarali ish muhitini ta'minlash uchun aniq chegaralarni saqlash muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyidagi munosabatlar etikasi bo'yicha HR treningida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
