words.definition: A person or company that creates software, applications, or builds properties and real estate projects.
words.example1: She works as a developer at a tech startup downtown.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi tanishingizning kasbi haqida suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is looking for an experienced developer to lead the mobile app project.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish e'loni yoki ish qidirish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: As a full-stack developer, she was responsible for both the front-end user experience and the back-end infrastructure that supported thousands of concurrent users.
words.example3Translation: To'liq stek dasturchisi sifatida u ham old qism foydalanuvchi tajribasi, ham minglab bir vaqtdagi foydalanuvchilarni qo'llab-quvvatlagan orqa qism infratuzilmasi uchun javobgar edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz texnologiya sanoatidagi kasbiy rollar haqida IT konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To carry out a plan in an effective, organised, and systematic way.
words.example1: It's one thing to have a good idea — it's another to execute a plan successfully.
words.example1Situation: Siz g'oya va amaliyot o'rtasidagi farq haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our project manager was praised for her ability to execute the plan on time and within budget.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha boshqaruvi natijalarini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: To execute a plan of this scale successfully, every department must align its resources, timelines, and priorities towards a single, clearly defined objective.
words.example3Translation: Bunday ko'lamdagi rejani muvaffaqiyatli amalga oshirish uchun har bir bo'lim o'z resurslari, muddatlari va ustuvorliklarini bitta aniq belgilangan maqsad sari yo'naltirishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ strategiyani amalga oshirish bo'yicha rahbarlar sammitida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The degree of uncertainty or acceptable inaccuracy in a measurement, estimate, or calculation.
words.example1: The estimate has a margin of error of about five percent.
words.example1Situation: Siz hisob-kitob yoki bashorat natijalari haqida hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our financial forecast carries a margin of error due to fluctuating market conditions.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy hisobot yoki prognoz taqdimotida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When conducting large-scale surveys, researchers must clearly state the margin of error so that stakeholders can accurately interpret the data and avoid overstating the findings.
words.example3Translation: Keng ko'lamli so'rovlar o'tkazishda tadqiqotchilar xato chegarasini aniq ko'rsatishlari kerak, shunda manfaatdor tomonlar ma'lumotlarni to'g'ri talqin qilishlari va natijalarni bo'rttirib ko'rsatmaslik imkoniga ega bo'lsinlar.
words.example3Situation: Siz tadqiqot metodologiyasi bo'yicha akademik yoki korporativ konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To reduce the brightness of lights in a room, usually to create a particular mood or atmosphere.
words.example1: She dimmed the lights and put on some soft music before dinner.
words.example1Situation: Siz kayfiyat yaratish yoki dam olish uchun muhit tayyorlayotganingizda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our events team always dims the lights just before a keynote presentation to focus the audience's attention.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ tadbir yoki konferentsiya tashkilotchisi sifatida ko'rsatmalar berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: As soon as the moderator signalled the start of the session, the technicians dimmed the lights and the first slide appeared on the screen, immediately drawing the audience into the presentation.
words.example3Translation: Moderator sessiyani boshlash ishorasini berishi bilanoq, texniklar chiroqlarni pasaytirdi va birinchi slayd ekranda paydo bo'ldi, bu esa darhol tinglovchilar e'tiborini taqdimotga jalb qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional tadbir yoki konferentsiya jarayonini tasvirlab, jamoangizga ko'rsatma berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To assign specific responsibilities or duties to other people, especially those in your team.
words.example1: A good manager knows when to delegate tasks rather than do everything alone.
words.example1Situation: Siz samarali rahbarlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our department head asked us to delegate tasks more effectively to avoid bottlenecks in the workflow.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoaviy ish jarayonini takomillashtirish haqida muhokamada ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: To scale the business efficiently, the founder had to learn to delegate tasks to trusted team members, even when it was difficult to let go of direct control over every process.
words.example3Translation: Biznesni samarali rivojlantirish uchun asoschiga har bir jarayon ustidan bevosita nazoratni qo'yib yuborish qiyin bo'lsa-da, ishonchli jamoa a'zolariga vazifalarni topshirishni o'rganishga to'g'ri keldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tadbirkorlik va liderlik rivojlanishi bo'yicha masterklassda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: sinab ko'rish va xatolar orqali, urinish va yanglishish yo'li bilan
words.definition: Through repeated attempts, learning from mistakes each time until a successful result is achieved.
words.example1: I learned to cook mostly by trial and error.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi ko'nikmani qanday o'rganganingiz haqida do'stingizga gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our development team built the first prototype by trial and error before finding the most efficient solution.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahsulot ishlab chiqish jarayonini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many of the most successful innovations in the tech industry were not the result of a single brilliant insight but were achieved by trial and error over years of iterative testing and refinement.
words.example3Translation: Texnologiya sanoatidagi eng muvaffaqiyatli innovatsiyalarning ko'pchiligi yagona ajoyib tushunchaning natijasi emas, balki yillar davomida takroriy sinov va takomillashtirish jarayonida sinab ko'rish va xatolar orqali erishildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz innovatsion jarayonlar va tadqiqot metodologiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To make use of one's authority, legal right, or influence to take a particular action.
words.example1: As a citizen, you should exercise your power to vote in every election.
words.example1Situation: Siz fuqarolik huquqlari va mas'uliyati haqida birov bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our board chair exercised her power to veto the proposal before it could be put to a vote.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ boshqaruv jarayonlarini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Under the terms of the agreement, the licensor may exercise its power to terminate the contract if the licensee fails to meet the agreed performance benchmarks within the specified timeframe.
words.example3Translation: Shartnoma shartlariga ko'ra, litsenziar litsenziat belgilangan muddatda kelishilgan samaradorlik ko'rsatkichlarini bajara olmasa, shartnomani bekor qilish vakolatini ishlatishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz shartnoma huquqi yoki korporativ boshqaruv bo'yicha xalqaro huquqiy forumda so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: ko'z yoshi to'kib yig'lamoq, ko'p yig'lamoq
words.definition: To cry a great deal for a long period of time, especially from sadness or distress.
words.example1: She cried her eyes out after watching that emotional film.
words.example1Situation: Siz his-tuyg'ular haqida do'stingiz bilan hazil aralash suhbat qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team lead admitted she cried her eyes out the night before the big product launch due to the stress.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish bosimi va emotsional holatlar haqida ochiq muhokamada ishtirok etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although she had cried her eyes out after learning that her application had been rejected, she gathered herself, sought feedback, and reapplied the following year with a much stronger proposal.
words.example3Translation: Arizasi rad etilganini bilib ko'z yoshlarini to'kib yig'lagach, u o'zini qo'lga oldi, fikr-mulohazalar so'radi va keyingi yili ancha kuchli taklif bilan qayta ariza topshirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan keyin yengib o'tish va barqarorlik haqida kasbiy rivojlanish seminarida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Leave someone to their own devices
words.translation: kimnidir o'z holiga qo'ymoq, mustaqil harakat qilishiga ruxsat bermoq
words.definition: To allow someone to do what they want or handle a situation independently, without supervision or interference.
words.example1: The kids were left to their own devices while the parents prepared dinner.
words.example1Situation: Siz mustaqillik yoki nazorat etishmaslik haqida kundalik suhbatda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager tends to leave high-performing employees to their own devices rather than micromanaging them.
words.example2Situation: Siz boshqaruv uslublari va xodimlarni mustaqillashtirish haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Research suggests that experienced professionals often perform better when left to their own devices, provided they have clear objectives and access to the resources they need.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqotlar shuni ko'rsatadiki, tajribali mutaxassislar ko'pincha aniq maqsadlarga va zarur resurslarga ega bo'lganda, o'z holiga qoldirilganda yaxshiroq ishlashadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz avtonomiya va mehnat unumdorligi o'rtasidagi bog'liqlik bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: dard shifo beruvchi do'st, qo'llab-quvvatlovchi odam
words.definition: A person who offers comfort, emotional support, and a willing ear during difficult times.
words.example1: After the break-up, she needed a shoulder to cry on.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingizning qiyin vaqtida yonida bo'lganingizda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team leader is always available as a shoulder to cry on when staff face personal difficulties.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish joyidagi empatiya va xodimlarni qo'llab-quvvatlash haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In high-pressure industries, having a mentor who can serve as a shoulder to cry on during tough periods is just as important as having one who can provide strategic career guidance.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori bosimli sohalarda qiyin davrlarida dard ulashib, ko'ngil so'rab beradigan murabbiyga ega bo'lish strategik kasbiy yo'l-yo'riq bera oladigan murabbiyga ega bo'lish kabi muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz mentorlik va kasbiy rivojlanish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Completely obvious, easy to understand, or free of any doubt or confusion.
words.example1: His instructions were crystal clear — no one had any questions.
words.example1Situation: Siz boshqaruvchi ko'rsatmalar sifati haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our policy on data privacy must be crystal clear to all employees from day one.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi xodimlarga kompaniya siyosatini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Before signing any partnership agreement, it must be crystal clear to both parties what the deliverables, timelines, and financial obligations are, in order to prevent disputes down the line.
words.example3Translation: Har qanday sheriklik shartnomasini imzolashdan oldin, keyinchalik nizolarning oldini olish uchun har ikki tomonga ham natijalari, muddatlari va moliyaviy majburiyatlari nima ekanligi mutlaqo aniq bo'lishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz shartnoma muzokaralari yoki huquqiy tayyorgarlik bo'yicha biznes seminarida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The most important or fundamental aspect of an argument, discussion, or issue.
words.example1: The essential point of his argument was that we need to act now.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhokama yoki bahs asosiy g'oyasini izohlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our presentation covered many details, but the essential point was the need to cut operational costs.
words.example2Situation: Siz taqdimot xulosasini jamoangizga yetkazayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While the report contained extensive data and analysis, the essential point — that the current strategy is unsustainable without a significant increase in investment — was not lost on the board.
words.example3Translation: Hisobot keng qamrovli ma'lumotlar va tahlillarni o'z ichiga olgan bo'lsa-da, asosiy nuqta — hozirgi strategiya investitsiyalarni sezilarli oshirmasdan barqaror emas — kengash diqqatidan chetda qolmadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ hisobot yoki strategik reja natijalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Hands that are soft, fine-featured, or sensitive, often associated with careful or precise work.
words.example1: The pianist had delicate hands that moved effortlessly across the keys.
words.example1Situation: Siz musiqachi yoki san'atkor haqida tavsif berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our jewellery designer is known for her delicate hands and extraordinary attention to detail.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimning noyob qobiliyati yoki ijodiy ishi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The surgeon's delicate hands and years of precise training allowed her to perform the complex procedure with minimal risk to the surrounding tissue.
words.example3Translation: Jarrohning nozik qo'llari va yillar davomida olgan aniq tayyorgarligi unga atrof to'qimalarga minimal zarar bilan murakkab amaliyotni bajarishga imkon berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tibbiyot yoki inson anatomiyasi bo'yicha professional konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: iqtisodiy jihatdan qoloq, iqtisodiy tanazzulga uchragan
words.definition: Describing an area or community suffering from prolonged economic decline, high unemployment, and limited opportunities.
words.example1: He grew up in an economically depressed town with few job opportunities.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy yoki iqtisodiy sharoit haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our foundation focuses on providing micro-loans to entrepreneurs in economically depressed regions.
words.example2Situation: Siz ijtimoiy mas'uliyat yoki xayriya dasturlari haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Investing in digital infrastructure and vocational training programmes is one of the most effective ways to revitalise economically depressed communities that have been left behind by rapid industrialisation.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli infratuzilma va kasb-hunar o'quv dasturlariga sarmoya kiritish jadal industriallashtirish natijasida orqada qolgan iqtisodiy jihatdan qoloq jamoalarni jonlantirishning eng samarali usullaridan biridir.
words.example3Situation: Siz iqtisodiy rivojlanish siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: mas'ul bo'lmoq, boshqaruvda bo'lmoq, javobgar bo'lmoq
words.definition: To have authority, control, or responsibility over people, a situation, or an organisation.
words.example1: Who is in charge when the manager is away?
words.example1Situation: Siz vakolatlar va mas'uliyat taqsimoti haqida ofisda so'rayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our regional director will be in charge of the new branch until a permanent manager is hired.
words.example2Situation: Siz vaqtinchalik mas'uliyat topshirishlari haqida jamoangizga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Being in charge of a large cross-functional team requires not only strong decision-making skills but also the emotional intelligence to manage diverse personalities and competing priorities.
words.example3Translation: Katta ko'p funksiyali jamoani boshqarish nafaqat kuchli qaror qabul qilish qobiliyatini, balki turli shaxsiyatlar va raqobatdosh ustuvorliklarni boshqarish uchun hissiy intellektni ham talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz liderlik va boshqaruv qobiliyatlari bo'yicha xalqaro biznes konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To carefully think up and design a plan or strategy, often in a creative or inventive way.
words.example1: We need to devise a plan before the meeting tomorrow.
words.example1Situation: Siz yig'ilish yoki muammo oldidan tayyorgarlik ko'rayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team was asked to devise a plan to improve customer retention within the next quarter.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoaga strategik vazifa topshirayotganda yoki bunday vazifani qabul qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The crisis management team worked through the night to devise a plan that would address the supply chain disruption while minimising financial losses and maintaining client confidence.
words.example3Translation: Inqiroz boshqaruvi guruhi moliyaviy yo'qotishlarni minimallashtirib va mijozlar ishonchini saqlab qolgan holda ta'minot zanjirining buzilishini bartaraf etadigan reja ishlab chiqish uchun butun kechani ishladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz boshqaruvi va favqulodda reja tuzish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To limit, reduce, or control criminal activity through targeted measures or policies.
words.example1: Better street lighting can help curb crime in urban areas.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahardagi xavfsizlik choralari haqida suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organisation partners with local authorities to curb crime by offering youth employment programmes.
words.example2Situation: Siz ijtimoiy mas'uliyat yoki jamoa rivojlanish tashabbuslari haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Experts argue that to effectively curb crime in densely populated urban areas, governments must invest not only in law enforcement but also in education, mental health services, and economic opportunity.
words.example3Translation: Mutaxassislar aholisi zich shaharlarda jinoyatchilikni samarali kamaytirish uchun hukumatlar nafaqat huquq-tartibot organlariga, balki ta'lim, ruhiy salomatlik xizmatlari va iqtisodiy imkoniyatlarga ham sarmoya kiritishi kerak, deb ta'kidlashadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaharlar xavfsizligi va ijtimoiy siyosat bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The condition of not getting enough sleep over a period of time, resulting in physical and mental impairment.
words.example1: Sleep deprivation makes it hard to focus on even simple tasks.
words.example1Situation: Siz charchoq yoki uyqusizlik haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our workplace wellness survey revealed that sleep deprivation is one of the leading causes of reduced productivity among staff.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar sog'lig'i va ish unumdorligi bo'yicha hisobot taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Chronic sleep deprivation has been linked not only to impaired cognitive function and weakened immunity but also to an increased risk of serious cardiovascular conditions, making it a significant public health concern.
words.example3Translation: Surunkali uyqu etishmasligi nafaqat kognitiv funktsiyaning buzilishi va immunitetning zaiflashishi, balki jiddiy yurak-qon tomir kasalliklarining ortib borishi xavfi bilan ham bog'liq bo'lib, bu uni muhim jamoat salomatligi muammosiga aylantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro sog'liqni saqlash yoki ish joyi farovonligi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To compel someone to leave their country and live abroad, usually for political reasons.
words.example1: The journalist was forced into exile after criticising the government.
words.example1Situation: Siz siyosiy repressiya yoki matbuot erkinligi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our documentary covers the story of activists who were forced into exile for speaking out against authoritarian rule.
words.example2Situation: Siz insonhuquqlari yoki siyosiy erkinliklar mavzusida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After the coup, dozens of opposition leaders were forced into exile, effectively silencing the most vocal critics of the new regime and consolidating its grip on power.
words.example3Translation: To'ntarishdan so'ng o'nlab muxolifat rahbarlari surgun qilindi, bu esa yangi rejimning eng faol tanqidchilarini amalda jim qilib, uning hokimiyatini mustahkamladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz siyosiy tarix yoki geosiyosat bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Relating to moral principles; conforming to accepted standards of right and honest behaviour.
words.example1: It's important to make ethical choices even when no one is watching.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy qadriyatlar va xulq-atvor me'yorlari haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is committed to ethical sourcing and fair treatment of all workers in the supply chain.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ ijtimoiy mas'uliyat siyosatini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: As artificial intelligence becomes more integrated into decision-making processes, organisations must establish clear ethical guidelines to ensure that these systems operate fairly and transparently.
words.example3Translation: Sun'iy intellekt qaror qabul qilish jarayonlariga tobora ko'proq kirib borar ekan, tashkilotlar ushbu tizimlar adolatli va shaffof ishlashini ta'minlash uchun aniq axloqiy ko'rsatmalar belgilashi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz AI va texnologiya etikasi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: salbiy ta'sirdan himoya qilmoq, yumshatuvchi vosita bo'lmoq
words.definition: To reduce or soften the negative impact of something harmful or adverse.
words.example1: Savings provide a cushion against unexpected expenses.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy moliyaviy rejalashtirish haqida do'stingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our reserve fund is designed to provide a cushion against sudden drops in revenue.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyaning moliyaviy barqarorligi haqida investorlarga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Diversifying your investment portfolio across multiple asset classes can provide a cushion against market volatility, reducing the overall risk of significant financial loss during economic downturns.
words.example3Translation: Investitsiya portfelingizni bir nechta aktivlar sinflari bo'ylab diversifikatsiya qilish bozor o'zgaruvchanligidan himoya vositasi bo'lib, iqtisodiy inqirozlar davrida katta moliyaviy yo'qotish umumiy xavfini kamaytirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy xavflarni boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro investitsiya forumida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: qo'lidan kelmaslik, bilimi yetmaslik, o'z o'rnida bo'lmaslik
words.definition: To be in a situation that is too difficult or complex for one's level of knowledge or ability.
words.example1: I felt completely out of my depth at the advanced coding workshop.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi yoki qiyin vaziyatga duch kelganingizda o'zingizni ifodalayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our new recruit was clearly out of his depth during the client negotiation and needed additional support.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi xodimni tayyorlash yoki baholash haqida rahbar sifatida suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even experienced managers can feel out of their depth when leading a cross-cultural team for the first time, as it requires a level of emotional and cultural intelligence that goes beyond technical expertise.
words.example3Translation: Hatto tajribali menejerlar ham birinchi marta madaniyatlararo jamoaga rahbarlik qilishda o'z o'rnida bo'lmaslik hissini his qilishlari mumkin, chunki bu texnik bilimdan tashqari hissiy va madaniy intellektni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro liderlik va moslashuvchanlik bo'yicha boshqaruv treningida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be officially identified by a medical professional as having a particular illness or condition.
words.example1: She was diagnosed with diabetes last year and changed her diet completely.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq va turmush tarzi o'zgarishlari haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our employee assistance programme supports staff who have been diagnosed with chronic conditions.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish joyidagi sog'liqni saqlash va farovonlik dasturlari haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After being diagnosed with burnout, she took an extended leave of absence, restructured her workload, and returned to her role with a much healthier approach to professional boundaries.
words.example3Translation: Emotsional tukanchlik tashxisi qo'yilgandan so'ng, u uzoq muddatli ta'til oldi, ish yukini qayta tuzdi va professional chegaralarga ancha sog'lom munosabat bilan o'z lavozimiga qaytdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyidagi ruhiy salomatlik va xodimlar farovonligi bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An unexpected and serious development that leads to significant harm, loss, or suffering.
words.example1: What started as a peaceful protest ended in a tragic turn of events.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan yomon natija haqida xabar berayotganda yoki muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our crisis team was activated following the tragic turn of events at the construction site.
words.example2Situation: Siz favqulodda hodisa yoki inqiroz boshqaruvi haqida hisobot taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: What had begun as a promising merger between the two firms took a tragic turn of events when financial irregularities were discovered, leading to legal action and the collapse of both companies.
words.example3Translation: Ikki firma o'rtasidagi istiqbolli birlashish sifatida boshlanган narsa moliyaviy qoidabuzarliklar aniqlanganda fojiaviy voqealar silsilasiga aylandi va bu yuridik da'vo hamda ikkala kompaniyaning ham yemirilishiga olib keldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ inqiroz tahlili yoki biznes etikasi bo'yicha konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A day filled with many notable, exciting, or significant events or incidents.
words.example1: It was quite an eventful day — three meetings cancelled and a new client signed.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishdan qaytib kunni xulosa qilayotganda hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team had an eventful day at the trade fair — we made contact with over twenty potential partners.
words.example2Situation: Siz biznes tadbir yoki ko'rgazma natijalarini hisobot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After an eventful day that included an unplanned board meeting, a last-minute pitch to investors, and a product launch delay, the CEO still found time to personally thank each member of the team.
words.example3Translation: Rejalashtirilmagan kengash yig'ilishini, investorlarga oxirgi daqiqadagi taqdimotni va mahsulot ishga tushirishning kechikishini o'z ichiga olgan voqealarga boy kundan so'ng, bosh direktor baribir jamoa a'zolarining har birini shaxsan minnatdorlik bildirish uchun vaqt topdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik uslubi va jamoa boshqaruvi haqida biznes treningida misol keltira­yotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To arrest or detain someone, typically by police or authorities, under legal authority.
words.example1: The suspect was taken into custody shortly after the incident.
words.example1Situation: Siz jinoyat xabari yoki huquqiy voqea haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our legal team was informed immediately after the former employee was taken into custody on fraud charges.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ huquqiy muammolar yoki ichki tekshiruv haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Following a months-long investigation, the authorities took the chief financial officer into custody on charges of embezzlement, sending shockwaves through the entire financial sector.
words.example3Translation: Oylar davom etgan tergov­dan so'ng, hokimiyat moliya direktori xo'jasini o'g'irlash ayblovlari bilan hibsga oldi va bu butun moliya sektorida katta shov-shuv qo'zg'atdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ firibgarlik yoki moliyaviy jinoyat bo'yicha xalqaro yuridik konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Knives, forks, and spoons used for eating or serving food.
words.example1: Could you set the cutlery on the table before dinner?
words.example1Situation: Siz uy yoki restoran muhitida dasturxon yozilishini so'rayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our catering team ensures that polished cutlery and clean glassware are arranged before every corporate event.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ tadbir tayyorgarligi yoki mehmonxona xizmati haqida ko'rsatma berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When hosting international business dinners, it is important to be mindful of cultural preferences, as some guests may prefer to use chopsticks rather than Western cutlery.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro biznes kechki ovqatlarini uyushtirganingizda madaniy afzalliklarga e'tibor berish muhim, chunki ba'zi mehmonlar G'arb oshxona anjomlariga qaraganda tayoqchalardan foydalanishni afzal ko'rishlari mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro mehmonlarni qabul qilish yoki diplomatik protokol bo'yicha xodimlarni tayyorlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To gain enjoyment, satisfaction, or happiness from a particular activity or experience.
words.example1: She derives great pleasure from reading historical novels in her spare time.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning sevimli mashg'uloti yoki hobbysi haqida suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team members derive genuine pleasure from mentoring junior colleagues and watching them grow.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish joyidagi motivatsiya va kasbiy qoniqish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Research consistently shows that employees who derive pleasure from their daily tasks are significantly more productive, more loyal to their organisations, and less susceptible to burnout.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqotlar muntazam ravishda shuni ko'rsatadiki, kundalik vazifalaridan zavq oladigan xodimlar sezilarli darajada unumdorroq, tashkilotlariga sodiqroq va emotsional tukanchlikka kamroq moyil bo'lishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi va kasbiy qoniqish bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To take a risk on an uncertain outcome, leaving the result largely to chance.
words.example1: Starting a business without a plan is basically rolling the dice.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavfli yoki puxta o'ylanmagan qaror haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our investors are not prepared to roll the dice on a project without solid market research.
words.example2Situation: Siz investitsiya qarorlari yoki xavf baholash haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Entering an untested market without thorough due diligence is essentially rolling the dice, and even well-capitalised companies have suffered serious losses by underestimating local complexities.
words.example3Translation: Chuqur tekshiruvsiz sinovdan o'tmagan bozorga kirish aslida xavfga qo'l urish demak, va hatto yaxshi kapitallashtirilgan kompaniyalar ham mahalliy murakkabliklarni past baholab jiddiy yo'qotishlar ko'rgan.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozorga kirish strategiyasi va xavflarni boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro biznes konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: tafsilotlarni oshkor qilmoq, ma'lumotlarni ochib bermoq
words.definition: To formally reveal or make known information that was previously kept private or confidential.
words.example1: The company refused to disclose the details of the settlement.
words.example1Situation: Siz korporativ shaffoflik yoki ommaviy axborot haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our legal team advised us not to disclose the details of the merger until the agreement was finalised.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ maxfiylik va yuridik muvofiqlik haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Under data protection regulations, organisations are required to disclose the details of any security breach to affected individuals within a specified timeframe, regardless of the potential reputational consequences.
words.example3Translation: Ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qoidalariga ko'ra, tashkilotlar belgilangan muddatda potentsial obro'ga zarar yetkazadigan oqibatlardan qat'i nazar, har qanday xavfsizlik buzilishi tafsilotlarini ta'sirlangan shaxslarga oshkor qilishlari shart.
words.example3Situation: Siz kiberxavfsizlik va ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qoidalariga rioya etish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: doimiy o'zgarib turuvchi dunyo, doim o'zgaradigan olam
words.definition: A world or environment that is constantly evolving, shifting, and transforming.
words.example1: In this ever-changing world, adaptability is one of the most valuable skills.
words.example1Situation: Siz zamonaviy hayot va moslashuvchanlik haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our training programmes are updated regularly to keep pace with the ever-changing world of technology.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ o'quv dasturlarini yoki kasbiy rivojlanish strategiyasini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: To remain competitive in an ever-changing world, organisations must cultivate a culture of continuous learning, where employees are encouraged to acquire new skills before those skills become essential.
words.example3Translation: Doimiy o'zgarib turuvchi dunyoda raqobatbardosh bo'lib qolish uchun tashkilotlar doimiy o'rganish madaniyatini rivojlantirishi kerak, bunda xodimlar ko'nikmalar zaruriy bo'lib qolishidan oldin yangi ko'nikmalarni egallashga undanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ innovatsiya va iqtisodiy barqarorlik bo'yicha xalqaro sammitda taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Distrustful of people's sincerity and inclined to believe that others are motivated purely by self-interest.
words.example1: After several broken promises, he became increasingly cynical about politics.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning munosabati yoki dunyoqarashi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our focus group showed that younger consumers are cynical about corporate sustainability claims.
words.example2Situation: Siz bozor tadqiqoti yoki brend imidjini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While a degree of cynicism can be a healthy defence mechanism in competitive business environments, becoming excessively cynical can damage professional relationships and prevent genuine collaboration.
words.example3Translation: Muayyan darajadagi sinizm raqobatdosh biznes muhitida sog'lom himoya mexanizmi bo'lishi mumkin bo'lsa-da, haddan ziyod sinik bo'lib ketish professional munosabatlarga zarar yetkazishi va haqiqiy hamkorlikni to'sishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional munosabatlar va ishonch muhiti bo'yicha biznes liderlik treningida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A critical or extremely serious condition that requires urgent action and offers few good options.
words.example1: The flood victims were in a desperate situation with no shelter or clean water.
words.example1Situation: Siz favqulodda vaziyat yoki insonparvarlik inqirozi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our emergency response team was deployed to assist communities facing a desperate situation following the earthquake.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashkilotingizning inqirozga javob berish faoliyati haqida hisobot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Finding themselves in a desperate situation after their primary supplier suddenly ceased operations, the management team had just seventy-two hours to secure an alternative source and prevent a complete production shutdown.
words.example3Translation: Asosiy yetkazib beruvchilari to'satdan faoliyatini to'xtatgandan so'ng o'zlarini og'ir ahvolda topgan boshqaruv guruhi muqobil manba ta'minlash va ishlab chiqarishning to'liq to'xtashining oldini olish uchun atigi yetmish ikki soatga ega edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ta'minot zanjirini boshqarish va biznes davomiyligini rejalashtirish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: mayda to'g'ralgan piyoz, kubchalar shaklida kesilgan piyoz
words.definition: Onions that have been peeled and cut into small, evenly sized cubes for cooking.
words.example1: Add the diced onions to the pan and cook until golden.
words.example1Situation: Siz retsept bo'yicha ko'rsatma berayotganda yoki taom tayyorlash haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our chef prepares a large batch of diced onions every morning to save time during the lunch rush.
words.example2Situation: Siz oshxona yoki ovqatlanish xizmati jarayonlarini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The recipe calls for finely diced onions that are sautéed in olive oil until translucent before the remaining ingredients are added to the pan.
words.example3Translation: Retsept qolgan ingredientlar qo'shilishidan oldin zaytun moyi­da shaffof bo'lguncha qovuriladigan mayda to'g'ralgan piyozni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional oshpaz treningida yoki kulinariya masterklassida ishtirokchilarga ko'rsatma berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Occasionally; at irregular but not uncommon intervals.
words.example1: Every so often, I take a day off just to recharge.
words.example1Situation: Siz dam olish va shaxsiy farovonlik odatlari haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team meets every so often to review progress and recalibrate priorities.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoaviy uchrashuv yoki ishni ko'rib chiqish tartibi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even the most disciplined professionals need to step back every so often and reflect on whether their current path still aligns with their long-term career objectives.
words.example3Translation: Hatto eng intizomli mutaxassislar ham vaqti-vaqti bilan orqaga qadam tashlashi va o'zlarining hozirgi yo'li uzoq muddatli kasbiy maqsadlari bilan mos kelishini o'ylashi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz kasbiy o'z-o'zini baholash va faoliyatni ko'rib chiqish bo'yicha liderlik seminarida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The amount of money spent on a particular item, area, or activity.
words.example1: Our expenditure on coffee and snacks has increased since we started working late.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy yoki ish bilan bog'liq kundalik xarajatlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our annual expenditure on staff training has increased by twenty percent this year.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy hisobot yoki byudjet baholash natijalarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Government expenditure on public healthcare has a direct and measurable impact on population wellbeing, productivity levels, and the long-term economic resilience of a nation.
words.example3Translation: Davlatning davlat sog'liqni saqlashga sarflangan mablag'lari aholi farovonligi, mehnat unumdorligi darajalari va millat uzoq muddatli iqtisodiy barqarorligiga bevosita va o'lchanadigan ta'sir ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz davlat moliyasi va ijtimoiy siyosat bo'yicha xalqaro iqtisodiy forumda taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Stated clearly and in detail, leaving no room for confusion or misinterpretation.
words.example1: The instructions were explicit — no phones during the meeting.
words.example1Situation: Siz aniq va to'g'ridan-to'g'ri ko'rsatmalar yoki qoidalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our contracts include explicit clauses on data ownership and confidentiality to avoid future disputes.
words.example2Situation: Siz shartnoma tuzish yoki yuridik hujjatlar haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective communication in a professional setting requires leaders to be explicit about expectations, deadlines, and consequences, so that all team members can align their efforts accordingly.
words.example3Translation: Professional muhitda samarali muloqot rahbarlardan kutilgan natijalar, muddatlar va oqibatlar haqida aniq bo'lishni talab qiladi, shunda barcha jamoa a'zolari o'z sa'y-harakatlarini shunga muvofiq yo'naltira olsinlar.
words.example3Situation: Siz liderlik kommunikatsiyasi va jamoaviy samaradorlik bo'yicha boshqaruv treningida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A strong feeling of revulsion or intense moral disapproval towards something considered offensive or unacceptable.
words.example1: She expressed disgust at the poor hygiene standards in the kitchen.
words.example1Situation: Siz yoqimsiz yoki qabul qilib bo'lmaydigan narsa haqida munosabat bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our customers voiced their disgust on social media after the product recall was mishandled.
words.example2Situation: Siz iste'molchilar shikoyatlari yoki obro'ni boshqarish inqirozi haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The whistleblower made no attempt to conceal her disgust at the company's decision to falsify safety reports, and her testimony proved instrumental in the subsequent regulatory investigation.
words.example3Translation: Xabarchi kompaniyaning xavfsizlik hisobotlarini soxtalashtirish qaroriga nisbatan nafratini yashirishga urinmadi va uning ko'rsatmalari keyingi tartibga solish tekshiruvida hal qiluvchi ahamiyat kasb etdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ etika va ichki hisobot berish mexanizmlari bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: o'z o'rniga tushmoq, tushunilmoq, joyiga tushmoq
words.definition: To begin to make sense, work out correctly, or develop as hoped after a period of confusion or uncertainty.
words.example1: Once I understood the grammar rule, everything started to fall into place.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi ko'nikma yoki bilimdagi tushunish lahzasini tasvirlab berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Once we hired the right project manager, the whole plan began to fall into place.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha jamoasini shakllantirish yoki kadrlar tanlash jarayonini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After months of seemingly unrelated research and consultation, the pieces finally began to fall into place when the team identified a single underlying cause connecting all the performance issues.
words.example3Translation: Ko'rinishda bog'liq bo'lmagan tadqiqot va maslahatlarning oylaridan so'ng, jamoa barcha samaradorlik muammolarini bog'laydigan bitta asosiy sababni aniqlagan­ida, nihoyat hamma narsa o'z o'rniga tusha boshladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammo hal qilish va tizimli tahlil bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A weapon or mechanical object engineered to explode and cause destruction, injury, or death.
words.example1: Authorities confirmed that a suspicious package containing an explosive device was found near the station.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavfsizlik tahdidlari yoki yangiliklar voqealari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our security team conducts regular drills to prepare for scenarios involving an explosive device in a public space.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ xavfsizlik mashg'ulotlari yoki tahdidlarga tayyorgarlik bo'yicha ko'rsatma berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The discovery of an explosive device at the international summit venue forced security agencies to evacuate the building and conduct a thorough sweep before the conference could resume.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro sammit maydonida portlovchi qurilma topilishi xavfsizlik idoralarini binoni evakuatsiya qilishga va konferentsiya davom ettirilishidan oldin to'liq tekshiruv o'tkazishga majbur qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro xavfsizlik va inqirozga javob berish bo'yicha sammitda taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: maqsadga erishish vositasi, natijaga erishish yo'li
words.definition: Something done not for its own value, but purely as a way of achieving a desired goal.
words.example1: For him, this job is just a means to an end — he's saving up to start his own business.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning motivatsiyasi yoki uzoq muddatli maqsadlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our partnership with that firm is purely a means to an end — it gives us access to their distribution network.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik hamkorlik yoki biznes aloqalarining maqsadi haqida suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While some professionals view formal qualifications as a means to an end, others find that the process of studying itself builds critical skills that prove invaluable throughout their careers.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi mutaxassislar rasmiy malakalarni maqsadga erishish vositasi sifatida ko'rsalar, boshqalari o'qish jarayonining o'zi kasbiy faoliyatlari davomida bebaho bo'lib chiqadigan muhim ko'nikmalarni shakllantirishini his qilishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ta'lim va kasbiy rivojlanish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: vaziyatga qarab harakat qilmoq, oldindan rejalashtirilmagan harakat qilmoq
words.definition: To decide how to respond to a situation as it develops, rather than following a fixed plan in advance.
words.example1: I'm not sure what the client will ask, so I'll just play it by ear.
words.example1Situation: Siz noaniq yoki kutilmagan vaziyatga tayyorgarlik ko'rayotganingizda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team didn't have a fixed agenda for the negotiation — we decided to play it by ear based on the client's priorities.
words.example2Situation: Siz moslashuvchan muzokaralar strategiyasi haqida hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although structured planning is essential for large-scale projects, experienced consultants know when it is more effective to play it by ear during complex client interactions, adapting their approach in real time.
words.example3Translation: Tuzilgan rejalashtirish yirik loyihalar uchun muhim bo'lsa-da, tajribali maslahatchilar murakkab mijozlar bilan o'zaro munosabatlar davomida yondashuvini real vaqtda moslashtirib, vaziyatga qarab harakat qilish qachon samaraliroq ekanini bilishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlarni boshqarish va muzokaralar mahorati bo'yicha xalqaro biznes treningida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The degree or level to which something is true, occurs, or has an effect.
words.example1: I was surprised by the extent to which stress affects physical health.
words.example1Situation: Siz ma'lum bir omilning ta'siri yoki ko'lami haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our survey measured the extent to which remote working has improved staff satisfaction.
words.example2Situation: Siz tadqiqot natijalari yoki xodimlar so'rovini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The extent to which digital transformation reshapes traditional industries depends largely on leadership commitment, available investment, and the organisation's capacity for sustained cultural change.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli transformatsiya an'anaviy sanoat tarmoqlarini qay darajada o'zgartirishi ko'p jihatdan rahbariyat ishtiyoqi, mavjud investitsiyalar va tashkilotning barqaror madaniy o'zgarishlarni amalga oshirish qobiliyatiga bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli transformatsiya va tashkiliy o'zgarishlar bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To become a victim of something harmful, deceptive, or difficult to resist.
words.example1: Many people fall prey to online scams because they look increasingly convincing.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqamli xavfsizlik yoki firibgarlikdan ogohlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our training helps employees avoid falling prey to phishing attacks and social engineering tactics.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ kiberxavfsizlik treningi yoki xodimlarni xabardor qilish dasturi haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Organisations that lack robust internal controls are significantly more likely to fall prey to financial fraud, particularly during periods of rapid growth when oversight mechanisms tend to lag behind operational expansion.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli ichki nazorat tizimiga ega bo'lmagan tashkilotlar moliyaviy firibgarlikka qurbonga aylanish xavfi ancha yuqori bo'lib, bu ayniqsa nazorat mexanizmlari operatsion kengayishdan orqada qoladigan tez o'sish davrlarida yaqqol namoyon bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy nazorat va korporativ boshqaruv xavflari bo'yicha xalqaro auditorlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Feeling extremely happy or joyful, typically as a result of success or good news.
words.example1: She was elated when she found out she got the promotion.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning muvaffaqiyati yoki yaxshi yangilikka bo'lgan reaksiyasini tasvirlab berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our whole team was elated when the client confirmed they wanted to extend the contract for another three years.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa muvaffaqiyatini nishonlash yoki yaxshi yangilik haqida xabar berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The research team was elated to discover that the new compound had exceeded all projected efficacy benchmarks, a result that could accelerate the path to clinical trials by more than a year.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqot guruhi yangi birikmaning barcha prognoz qilingan samaradorlik ko'rsatkichlaridan oshganini aniqlaganida quvonchdan to'lib-toshdi — bu natija klinik sinovlarga o'tish yo'lini bir yildan ko'proq tezlashtirishi mumkin edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tibbiy tadqiqot yoki ilmiy innovatsiya bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To feel depressed, unhappy, or in very low spirits.
words.example1: He's been down in the dumps ever since he missed out on the job opportunity.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingiz yoki hamkasbingizning kayfiyati past bo'lganda unga hamdardlik bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager noticed that several team members were down in the dumps after the project was cancelled.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa motivatsiyasini boshqarish yoki xodimlar ruhiy holati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even the most resilient professionals can find themselves down in the dumps after a significant setback, which is why organisations that invest in psychological support tend to recover team performance more quickly.
words.example3Translation: Hatto eng bardoshli mutaxassislar ham jiddiy muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan so'ng o'zlarini tushkunlikda his qilishlari mumkin, shuning uchun psixologik yordamga sarmoya kiritadigan tashkilotlar jamoa samaradorligini tezroq tiklashga erishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyidagi ruhiy barqarorlik va xodimlar yordami bo'yicha xalqaro HR konferensiyasida so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: yetib bormоq, kutilgan darajaga ета олмасlик
words.definition: To fail to reach or achieve a required, expected, or desired standard or level.
words.example1: His performance fell short of what the role required.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish samaradorligi yoki natija baholash haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sales figures fell short of the annual target by nearly fifteen percent.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy hisobot yoki kvartal natijalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When a product launch falls short of market expectations, it is essential to conduct a thorough post-mortem analysis to identify whether the shortfall stemmed from the product itself, the marketing strategy, or the timing of the release.
words.example3Translation: Mahsulot taqdimoti bozor kutilganlaridan orqada qolganda, kamchilik mahsulotning o'zidan, marketing strategiyasidan yoki chiqarish vaqtidan kelib chiqqanligini aniqlash uchun to'liq tahlil o'tkazish muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz mahsulot boshqaruvi va bozor strategiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unquestionably true or accepted by everyone; not open to doubt or argument.
words.example1: It is beyond dispute that regular exercise improves mental health.
words.example1Situation: Siz keng ma'lum yoki isbotlangan haqiqat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our audit confirmed results that were beyond dispute — the accounts had been mismanaged for years.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy tekshiruv yoki audit xulosalarini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It is beyond dispute that strong corporate governance reduces the risk of financial misconduct, yet many organisations continue to underinvest in the oversight structures that make such governance possible.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli korporativ boshqaruv moliyaviy tartibsizlik xavfini kamaytirishini inkor etib bo'lmaydi, biroq ko'plab tashkilotlar bunday boshqaruvni mumkin qiladigan nazorat tuzilmalariga sarmoya kiritishni davom ettirmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ boshqaruv va moliyaviy shaffoflik bo'yicha xalqaro sammitda taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Excessively lavish or wasteful, especially in spending.
words.example1: She bought an extravagant bouquet of flowers just for the office desk.
words.example1Situation: Siz xarajatlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company avoided extravagant spending during the budget review period.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy hisobot taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although the conference venue was extravagant by most standards, the organizers justified the cost by pointing to the record number of international delegates it attracted.
words.example3Translation: Konferensiya maydoni ko'pchilik uchun haddan tashqari hashamatli bo'lsa-da, tashkilotchilar xarajatlarni jalb qilingan xalqaro delegatlarning rekord soni bilan oqladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro anjuman tashkilotchiligi bo'yicha taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: biror narsa bilan tanishib chiqmoq, o'rganib olmoq
words.definition: To become well informed about something.
words.example1: Take a few minutes to familiarize yourself with the new coffee machine in the break room.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi xodimga ofis jihozlarini tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team needs to familiarize itself with the updated compliance regulations before the audit.
words.example2Situation: Siz audit oldidan jamoaga ko'rsatma berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Before the merger is finalised, all department heads are expected to familiarize themselves with the incoming company's operational procedures and reporting structures.
words.example3Translation: Qo'shilish jarayoni yakunlanishidan oldin, barcha bo'lim boshliqlari kirib kelayotgan kompaniyaning operatsion tartiblari va hisobot tizimi bilan tanishib chiqishlari kutilmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro korporativ birlashuv bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: yashirmoq, niqob ostiga olmoq; niqob, libos
words.definition: To conceal the true nature or appearance of something.
words.example1: He tried to disguise his nervousness by speaking slowly.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhim uchrashuv oldidan o'zingizni tuta bilish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our report was designed to disguise the minor setbacks as opportunities for growth.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbariyatga hisobot taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While the new policy was presented as a cost-saving measure, critics argued that it was merely a disguise for reducing employee benefits without public backlash.
words.example3Translation: Yangi siyosat xarajatlarni kamaytirish chorasi sifatida taqdim etilgan bo'lsa-da, tanqidchilar bu shunchaki jamoatchilik noroziligi bo'lmasdan xodimlar imtiyozlarini qisqartirishning niqobi ekanligini ta'kidladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mehnat siyosati bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: mutaassib, g'oyibona muxlis, haddan tashqari ishtiyoqli odam
words.definition: A person with extreme, uncritical enthusiasm or devotion.
words.example1: My colleague is a complete fanatic about keeping the shared workspace tidy.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizning odatlari haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our marketing director is a fanatic when it comes to tracking conversion rates.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida hamkasblaringizni tanishtirish paytida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although being a fanatic about data accuracy can sometimes slow down the decision-making process, it ultimately leads to more reliable outcomes in high-stakes environments.
words.example3Translation: Ma'lumotlar aniqligi bo'yicha mutaassiblik ba'zida qarorlar qabul qilish jarayonini sekinlashtirishi mumkin bo'lsa-da, bu yuqori mas'uliyatli muhitlarda oxir-oqibat yanada ishonchli natijalarga olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ma'lumotlarga asoslangan qarorlar qabul qilish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: hozircha hamma narsa yaxshi, shu paytgacha muammo yo'q
words.definition: Indicating that progress has been satisfactory up to a certain point.
words.example1: I asked how the new employee was settling in, and her manager said, "So far so good."
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi xodim haqida menejerdan so'rayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our system migration started yesterday and so far so good — no major issues reported.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnik jamoa bilan progress haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The pilot programme has only been running for two months, but so far so good — participant engagement is above target and preliminary data suggests the intervention is effective.
words.example3Translation: Pilot dastur atigi ikki oydan beri amalga oshirilmoqda, ammo hozircha hamma narsa yaxshi — ishtirokchilar faolligi maqsaddan yuqori va dastlabki ma'lumotlar aralashuvning samarali ekanligini ko'rsatmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz pilot loyiha natijalari bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To attract attention visually.
words.example1: A bright red jacket in the shop window caught my eye on my way to work.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingiz bilan ish yo'lida ko'rgan narsalar haqida suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our new product display was designed to catch the eye of potential clients at the trade fair.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo ko'rgazmasi natijalarini jamoangizga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Among the dozens of applications received, one candidate's portfolio immediately caught the eye of the selection committee due to its originality and clear strategic thinking.
words.example3Translation: O'nlab qabul qilingan arizalar orasida bir nomzodning portfoliosi o'zining original va aniq strategik tafakkuri bilan tanlov komissiyasining darhol diqqatini tortdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz iste'dod tanlovi natijalarini xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The capacity to withstand hardship or prolonged effort.
words.example1: Running a marathon requires incredible endurance.
words.example1Situation: Siz sport va sog'liqni saqlash haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our project team showed remarkable endurance during the six-month product launch sprint.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yutuqlari haqida rahbariyatga hisobot taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The endurance required to lead a large organisation through a prolonged economic downturn is often underestimated by those who have not experienced such sustained pressure firsthand.
words.example3Translation: Katta tashkilotni uzoq muddatli iqtisodiy tushkunlik davrida boshqarish uchun zarur bo'lgan bardoshlilik, bunday uzoq davom etgan bosimni shaxsan boshdan kechirmaganlar tomonidan ko'pincha kam baholanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashkilotni boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To bring shame or dishonour upon someone or something.
words.example1: Leaving the kitchen messy is a disgrace to everyone who shares the office.
words.example1Situation: Siz ofis tartib-qoidalari haqida hamkasblaringiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager said that missing deadlines repeatedly would be a disgrace to the department's reputation.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida muddatlarga rioya qilish muhimligi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The executive's decision to falsify financial records was widely condemned as a disgrace to the entire profession, prompting regulators to call for stricter oversight mechanisms.
words.example3Translation: Ijrochi direktorning moliyaviy hujjatlarni soxtalashtirish qarori butun kasb uchun uyat sifatida keng qoralandi va bu nazoratchilarni yanada qattiqroq nazorat mexanizmlarini talab qilishga undadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ etika bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: qisman haqiqat bo'lishi, bir oz haqiqat ulushi
words.definition: A partial or limited amount of accuracy in a statement.
words.example1: There's an element of truth in what she said about the project being delayed.
words.example1Situation: Siz loyiha muddatlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our competitors' claims may sound exaggerated, but there is an element of truth we cannot ignore.
words.example2Situation: Siz bozor tahlilini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While the report's conclusions were largely overstated, analysts acknowledged that there was an element of truth in its findings regarding the long-term impact of automation on mid-level employment.
words.example3Translation: Hisobot xulosalari asosan bo'rttirilgan bo'lsa-da, tahlilchilar avtomatlashtirishning o'rta darajadagi bandlikka uzoq muddatli ta'siri bo'yicha topilmalarda qisman haqiqat borligini tan olishdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mehnat bozori tadqiqotlari bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: ehtiyotkorlik, sir saqlash qobiliyati, xulosa chiqara olish
words.definition: The ability to make careful and prudent decisions, especially regarding confidentiality.
words.example1: Please handle this personal matter with discretion.
words.example1Situation: Siz maxfiy masala bo'yicha hamkasbingizga murojaat qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our HR department is trusted to manage sensitive employee data with full discretion.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR siyosati haqida yangi xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Professionals working in legal or medical fields must exercise a high degree of discretion, as any breach of confidentiality can have serious consequences for both clients and the organisation.
words.example3Translation: Huquqiy yoki tibbiy sohalarda ishlaydigan mutaxassislar yuqori darajada ehtiyotkorlik bilan ish yuritishlari shart, chunki maxfiylikni buzish mijozlar va tashkilot uchun ham jiddiy oqibatlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz kasbiy etika bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To participate actively in an activity.
words.example1: I try to engage in at least one networking event every month.
words.example1Situation: Siz kasbiy rivojlanish odatlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team regularly engages in cross-departmental workshops to improve collaboration.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa rivojlanish dasturlarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Organisations that actively encourage their employees to engage in continuous learning programmes tend to outperform competitors in both innovation and staff retention.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlarini doimiy ta'lim dasturlarida faol ishtirok etishga rag'batlantiruvchi tashkilotlar raqobatchilarga nisbatan innovatsiya va xodimlarni saqlab qolish bo'yicha ustunlik qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ ta'lim strategiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To agree completely with someone.
words.example1: My colleague and I don't always see eye to eye, but we respect each other's opinions.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish munosabatlari haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our leadership team doesn't always see eye to eye on budget priorities, but we reach decisions together.
words.example2Situation: Siz boshqaruv jarayoni haqida manfaatdor tomonlarga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although the two departments rarely see eye to eye on resource allocation, they have developed a structured mediation process that allows them to reach workable compromises efficiently.
words.example3Translation: Ikki bo'lim resurslarni taqsimlash masalasida kamdan-kam kelishsa-da, ular samarali ish murosalariga erishish imkonini beruvchi tizimli vositachilik jarayonini ishlab chiqqan.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashkilot ichidagi nizolarni hal etish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To deteriorate or decline in quality or condition.
words.example1: The service at that café has really gone downhill since the new management took over.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingiz bilan borib ko'rgan joy haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our client satisfaction scores began to go downhill after we changed the support process.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar xizmati natijalarini tahlil qilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Without a clear succession plan, many family-owned businesses begin to go downhill within the first generation of leadership transition, often due to unresolved internal conflicts.
words.example3Translation: Aniq vorislik rejasisiz, ko'plab oilaviy bizneslar, ko'pincha hal etilmagan ichki ziddiyatlar tufayli, boshqaruv almashinuvining birinchi avlodidayoq pasayib keta boshlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznesni boshqarish va vorislik rejalashtirish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: At an initial stage.
words.example1: I realized early on that I needed to improve my presentation skills.
words.example1Situation: Siz kasbiy rivojlanish tajribangiz haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team identified the technical flaw early on, which saved us weeks of rework.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha tahlilini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Identifying potential risks early on in the project lifecycle is critical, as unresolved issues tend to compound and become significantly more costly to address in later stages.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha hayot siklining boshida potensial xatarlarni aniqlash muhim ahamiyatga ega, chunki hal etilmagan muammolar to'planib, keyingi bosqichlarda hal qilish uchun ancha qimmatga tushadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyihani boshqarish metodologiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: erkin tasarruf etiladigan daromad, majburiy xarajatlardan keyingi pul
words.definition: Money available for spending after essential expenses are paid.
words.example1: After paying rent and bills, I have very little disposable income left each month.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy moliyaviy ahvolingiz haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our target customers are young professionals with moderate to high disposable income.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing strategiyasi bo'yicha rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: As inflation continues to erode purchasing power, households with limited disposable income are increasingly forced to cut back on non-essential goods and services, which in turn dampens consumer-driven economic growth.
words.example3Translation: Inflyatsiya xarid kuchini eroziyaga uchratib borar ekan, cheklangan erkin daromadga ega uy xo'jaliklari zaruriy bo'lmagan tovar va xizmatlardan voz kechishga majbur bo'lmoqda, bu esa o'z navbatida iste'molchi tomonidan boshqariladigan iqtisodiy o'sishni susaytirmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz iste'molchi iqtisodiyoti bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: kuzatib turmoq, hushyor bo'lmoq, ko'zni katta ochib turmoq
words.definition: To remain alert and watch carefully.
words.example1: Keep your eyes peeled for a parking spot — this area fills up fast.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan birgalikda muhim joyga borayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sales team should keep their eyes peeled for any new tenders published this quarter.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo jamoasiga haftalik ko'rsatmalar berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In rapidly evolving markets, businesses must keep their eyes peeled for disruptive innovations that could reshape the competitive landscape before traditional players have time to respond.
words.example3Translation: Tez o'zgaruvchan bozorlarda kompaniyalar raqobatbardosh muhitni o'zgartirishi mumkin bo'lgan buzg'unchi innovatsiyalarni an'anaviy ishtirokchilar ularga munosabat bildirgunga qadar kuzatib borishlari shart.
words.example3Situation: Siz innovatsiyalarni monitoring qilish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A naturally positive and optimistic temperament.
words.example1: Her cheerful disposition makes her a pleasure to work with every day.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizni boshqalarga tavsiya qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our receptionist's cheerful disposition sets a welcoming tone for everyone who visits our office.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofis muhiti va mijozlar tajribasi haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Research consistently shows that leaders with a cheerful disposition tend to foster more resilient teams, as positive energy at the top of an organisation naturally influences morale across all levels.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqotlar doimiy ravishda xushchaqchaq tabiatli rahbarlar ko'proq bardoshli jamoalar shakllantirish tendensiyasida ekanligini ko'rsatadi, chunki tashkilot tepasidagi ijobiy energiya barcha darajalarda ruhiyatga tabiiy ta'sir qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz liderlik psixologiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To gain admiration through actions or character.
words.example1: She earned the respect of her colleagues by always keeping her promises.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishonchli hamkasb bo'lish haqida suhbat qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our new director quickly earned the respect of the entire department through clear communication and fairness.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi rahbarni jamoaga tanishtirish paytida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: To truly earn the respect of a diverse, multicultural team, a leader must demonstrate not only competence but also genuine cultural sensitivity and a willingness to listen before making decisions.
words.example3Translation: Xilma-xil, ko'p madaniyatli jamoaning hurmatini chin ma'noda qozonish uchun rahbar nafaqat malakasini, balki chin madaniy sezgirligini va qaror qabul qilishdan oldin tinglashga tayyor ekanligini namoyish etishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz ko'p madaniyatli jamoalarni boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: haqiqatdan ham, kutilganidek, xuddi shunday bo'ldi
words.definition: As expected or predicted.
words.example1: I thought the meeting would run late, and sure enough, it did.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish uchrashuvi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our risk assessment flagged potential supply delays, and sure enough, the supplier missed the deadline.
words.example2Situation: Siz ta'minot zanjiri muammolari bo'yicha hisobot taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The market analysts warned of a potential correction in the third quarter, and sure enough, the data released last week confirmed a significant slowdown across the sector.
words.example3Translation: Bozor tahlilchilari uchinchi chorakda potensial tuzatish bo'lishi haqida ogohlantirgan edi va haqiqatdan ham, o'tgan hafta e'lon qilingan ma'lumotlar sohada sezilarli sekinlashishni tasdiqladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy prognozlar bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: in the blink of an eye
words.translation: ko'z ochib yumguncha, bir zumda, lahzada
words.definition: Extremely quickly or suddenly.
words.example1: The weekend passed in the blink of an eye.
words.example1Situation: Siz dam olish kunlari haqida ishga qaytganingizda hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our product went viral and in the blink of an eye we had ten thousand new sign-ups.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing kampaniyasi natijalarini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In today's digital economy, a company's reputation can be damaged in the blink of an eye if a crisis is not managed with both speed and strategic communication from the outset.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi raqamli iqtisodiyotda, agar inqiroz boshidanoq tezlik va strategik muloqot bilan boshqarilmasa, kompaniyaning obro'si bir zumda zarar ko'rishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ inqirozlarni boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Involved in a disagreement or conflict with someone.
words.example1: He's been in dispute with his landlord over the heating for weeks.
words.example1Situation: Siz kundalik hayot muammolari haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is currently in dispute with a supplier over delayed deliveries and compensation terms.
words.example2Situation: Siz ta'minot zanjiri muammolari bo'yicha yuridik bo'lim bilan maslahatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When an organisation finds itself in dispute with a regulatory body, it is essential to engage legal counsel early and maintain transparent communication to avoid escalation and reputational damage.
words.example3Translation: Tashkilot tartibga soluvchi organ bilan nizoga kirsa, kuchayish va obro'ga zarar yetkazishdan qochish uchun erta bosqichda yuridik maslahat olish va shaffof muloqotni saqlash zarur.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ huquqiy risklarni boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: g'ayrioddiy, o'ziga xos, qoliplariga to'g'ri kelmaydigan
words.definition: Unconventional or slightly strange in behaviour or thinking.
words.example1: Our neighbour is a bit eccentric — he waters his plants at midnight.
words.example1Situation: Siz qo'shnilari haqida do'stingiz bilan kulgili suhbat qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our most creative designer is known for being eccentric, but her ideas consistently produce results.
words.example2Situation: Siz ijodiy jamoaning ish uslublari haqida rahbariyatga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
