words.example3: History shows that many of the most transformative thinkers were considered eccentric in their time, as genuinely novel ideas often appear strange before the world is ready to understand their value.
words.example3Translation: Tarix ko'rsatadiki, eng inqilobiy mutafakkirlarning ko'pchiligi o'z davrida g'ayrioddiy hisoblangan, chunki chinakam yangi g'oyalar dunyo ularning qiymatini tushunishga tayyor bo'lishdan oldin ko'pincha g'alati tuyuladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz innovatsion tafakkur tarixi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To officially prevent someone from participating due to a rule violation.
words.example1: He was disqualified from the competition for submitting his entry after the deadline.
words.example1Situation: Siz musobaqa qoidalari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company was nearly disqualified from the tender process due to an incomplete compliance document.
words.example2Situation: Siz tender tayyorlash jarayonida xatolardan saqlanish haqida jamoangizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A bidding organisation can be disqualified from a public procurement process if it fails to meet the mandatory eligibility criteria, regardless of the technical strength of its proposal.
words.example3Translation: Ariza beruvchi tashkilot, taklifining texnik jihatdan kuchliligi qat'iy nazar, majburiy malaka mezonlarini bajarmasa, davlat xaridlari jarayonidan chetlatilishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz davlat xaridlari qoidalari bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: pasayish girdobiga tushib ketmoq, tobora yomonlashib bormoq
words.definition: To enter a continuous and accelerating decline.
words.example1: After losing his job, he went into a downward spiral and stopped taking care of himself.
words.example1Situation: Siz ruhiy salomatlik va qo'llab-quvvatlash haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our client's business went into a downward spiral after a series of poor investment decisions.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy maslahat berish jarayonida mijoz holati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When customer trust is lost due to a data breach, a company can quickly go into a downward spiral if it fails to communicate transparently and implement credible remediation measures without delay.
words.example3Translation: Ma'lumotlar xavfsizligi buzilishi sababli mijoz ishonchi yo'qotilganda, kompaniya shaffof muloqot olib bormasa va kechiktirmasdan ishonchli tuzatish choralarini amalga oshirmasa, tez pasayish girdobiga tushib ketishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz kiberxavfsizlik inqirozlarini boshqarish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: In one's imagination or mental vision.
words.example1: In my mind's eye, I can still picture my first day at this company.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish tajribalaring haqida hamkasbingiz bilan xotiralar ortiq gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our CEO asked us to picture in our mind's eye what the company would look like in ten years.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik rejalashtirishga bag'ishlangan korporativ sessiyada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective leaders are often those who can hold a vivid vision in their mind's eye and translate that clarity into concrete goals that motivate and align their entire organisation.
words.example3Translation: Samarali rahbarlar ko'pincha o'z tasavvurida aniq bir manzarani saqlay oladigan va bu ravshanlikni butun tashkilotni rag'batlantiradigan va bir yo'nalishda birlashtiruvchi aniq maqsadlarga aylantira oladigan kishilardir.
words.example3Situation: Siz vizioner liderlik bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: tartibni buzuvchi xulq-atvor, to'sqinlik qiluvchi harakat
words.definition: Actions that disturb order or normal functioning.
words.example1: Constantly interrupting others in meetings is considered disruptive behaviour.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamoa etikasi haqida yangi xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company policy clearly outlines the consequences of disruptive behaviour in the workplace.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki tartib qoidalarini xodimlarga tanishtirish paytida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Disruptive behaviour in professional settings, if left unaddressed, can erode team cohesion and create a toxic work environment that ultimately affects productivity and employee retention.
words.example3Translation: Kasbiy muhitda tartibni buzuvchi xulq-atvor, agar ularga munosabat bildirilmasa, jamoa hamjihatligini yo'q qilishi va oxir-oqibat unumdorlik hamda xodimlarni saqlab qolishga ta'sir qiluvchi zaharli ish muhitini yaratishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish muhitini sog'lomlashtirish bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: ustunlikka ega bo'lmoq, biroz afzallik qilmoq
words.definition: To possess a slight advantage.
words.example1: She has the edge over other applicants because of her additional language skills.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish uchun ariza berish jarayonida qo'shimcha ko'nikmalar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our firm has the edge over competitors thanks to our proprietary data analytics platform.
words.example2Situation: Siz raqobat tahlilini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In a highly competitive global market, companies that invest in employee development and embrace digital transformation consistently have the edge over those that rely solely on traditional operating models.
words.example3Translation: Juda raqobatbardosh global bozorda xodimlarni rivojlantirishga sarmoya kiritadigan va raqamli transformatsiyani qabul qiladigan kompaniyalar faqat an'anaviy operatsion modellarga tayanadigan kompaniyalarga nisbatan doimiy ustunlikka ega bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqobatbardoshlik strategiyasi bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: jamiyatning asosi, ijtimoiy tuzum, jamiyat to'qimasi
words.definition: The underlying structure of shared values and institutions.
words.example1: Volunteering helps strengthen the fabric of society in local communities.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy mas'uliyat va jamoatchilik faoliyati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organisation believes that education and equal opportunity are central to the fabric of society.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ ijtimoiy mas'uliyat dasturini taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Prolonged economic inequality, if left unaddressed by governments and institutions, risks tearing apart the fabric of society by deepening distrust between communities and eroding civic participation.
words.example3Translation: Uzoq muddatli iqtisodiy tengsizlik, agar hukumat va institutlar tomonidan hal etilmasa, jamoalar orasidagi ishonchsizlikni chuqurlashtirish va fuqarolik ishtirokini yo'q qilish orqali jamiyat to'qimasini parchalab yuborish xavfini tug'diradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy siyosat bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A family member not closely related.
words.example1: A distant relative I had never met before attended our family reunion last summer.
words.example1Situation: Siz oila yig'inlari haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company was founded by a distant relative of our current CEO, which is a point of pride in our history.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ tarix va kompaniya merosini yangi sheriklar bilan tanishtirish paytida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In genealogical research, identifying a distant relative requires cross-referencing multiple historical records, as the further back one searches, the more fragmented and unreliable the available documentation tends to be.
words.example3Translation: Genealogik tadqiqotlarda uzoq qarindoshni aniqlash bir nechta tarixiy yozuvlarni o'zaro taqqoslashni talab qiladi, chunki qanchalik uzoqqa qarab qidirilsa, mavjud hujjatlar shunchalik bo'lakchali va ishonchsiz bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz genealogiya va tarixi meros tadqiqotlari bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Highly respected and distinguished in a particular field.
words.example1: An eminent professor from the local university gave a talk at our office last week.
words.example1Situation: Siz mehmon ma'ruzachi haqida hamkasbingizga aytayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our panel discussion featured several eminent figures from the fields of finance and technology.
words.example2Situation: Siz konferensiya dasturini ishtirokchilarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The findings were independently reviewed by a panel of eminent scientists whose collective expertise spanned three decades of climate research, lending the report considerable credibility.
words.example3Translation: Natijalar uch o'n yillik iqlim tadqiqotlari tajribasiga ega bo'lgan nufuzli olimlar guruhiga mustaqil ravishda tekshirildi, bu esa hisobotga katta ishonchlilik baxsh etdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilmiy tadqiqot natijalari bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To continue for an excessively long time.
words.example1: This meeting is dragging on for months.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan uchrashuv muddati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our project has been dragging on for months.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha holati haqida rahbariyat oldida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although we expected quick results, the approval process has continued to drag on for months, affecting our launch timeline.
words.example3Translation: Biz tez natijalarni kutgan bo'lsak ham, tasdiqlash jarayoni oylar davomida cho'zilib, ishga tushirish muddatlarimizga ta'sir qilmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik rejalashtirish yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To suffer humiliation or loss of reputation.
words.example1: I don't want to lose face in front of the team.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan obro' haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company cannot afford to lose face in this negotiation.
words.example2Situation: Siz muzokaralar oldidan bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Experienced managers know how to admit mistakes gracefully without losing face in front of their international partners.
words.example3Translation: Tajribali rahbarlar xatolarini xalqaro hamkorlar oldida obro'ni yo'qotmasdan ehtiyotkorlik bilan tan olishni biladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik treningida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Visuals that cause shock, distress, or discomfort.
words.example1: Those disturbing images stayed in my mind.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingiz bilan film yoki yangilik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our marketing team avoids using disturbing images in campaigns.
words.example2Situation: Siz reklama muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The campaign was successful but received criticism for including disturbing images that affected sensitive audiences.
words.example3Translation: Kampaniya muvaffaqiyatli bo'ldi, lekin sezgir auditoriyaga ta'sir qilgan bezovta qiluvchi tasvirlardan foydalangani uchun tanqidga uchradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz brending strategiyasi haqidagi yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To release gases into the air.
words.example1: Factories emit gases into the atmosphere.
words.example1Situation: Siz atrof-muhit haqida suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our factory has reduced the gases it emits.
words.example2Situation: Siz ekologiya hisobotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Modern technologies help industries emit fewer harmful gases while maintaining high production levels.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy texnologiyalar yuqori ishlab chiqarish darajasini saqlab, sanoat korxonalariga zararli gazlarni kamroq chiqarishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror rivojlanish muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Kirishib ketmoq / Jon bilan ishga tushmoq
words.definition: To begin something enthusiastically and energetically.
words.example1: Let's dive into this new project.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi ish haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team is ready to dive into the new market.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After months of planning, the whole department was excited to dive into the challenging international project.
words.example3Translation: Oylar davomidagi rejalashtirishdan so'ng butun bo'lim xalqaro qiyin loyihaga jon bilan kirishishdan xursand edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha boshlanishi haqidagi uchrashuvda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Deoxyribonucleic acid, the molecule carrying genetic information.
words.example1: This is in our company's DNA.
words.example1Situation: Siz kompaniya madaniyati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Innovation is part of our company's DNA.
words.example2Situation: Siz brending yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Customer satisfaction has always been in the DNA of our organization, guiding every decision we make.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlar qoniqishi har doim tashkilotimizning DNKsida bo'lib, qabul qilinadigan har bir qarorga rahbarlik qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya qadriyatlari haqidagi taqdimotda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To maintain a serious expression, especially to avoid laughing.
words.example1: It was hard to keep a straight face.
words.example1Situation: Siz kulgili vaziyat haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager tried to keep a straight face during the presentation.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even when the client made an unexpected joke, the team managed to keep a straight face throughout the important negotiation.
words.example3Translation: Mijoz kutilmagan hazil qilgan bo'lsa ham, jamoa muhim muzokaralar davomida jiddiy qiyofani saqlab qoldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muzokaralar mahorati treningida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: It caused extreme physical or emotional exhaustion.
words.example1: The long meeting really drained me.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish kuningiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Preparing the annual report drained our whole team.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot tayyorlash jarayonida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Working overtime for three weeks straight to meet the deadline completely drained me both mentally and physically.
words.example3Translation: Muddadni bajarish uchun uch hafta davomida qo'shimcha ishlaganim meni aqliy va jismoniy jihatdan butunlay charchatib qo'ydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish yukini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Eng jasoratli orzularingizdan ham oshib ketadigan
words.definition: Far exceeding expectations or imagination.
words.example1: The result was beyond my wildest dreams.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The partnership success went beyond our wildest dreams.
words.example2Situation: Siz hamkorlik natijalarini taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The positive response from the international market was beyond our wildest dreams and opened many new opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro bozordan kelgan ijobiy javob bizning eng jasoratli orzularimizdan ham oshib ketdi va ko'plab yangi imkoniyatlarni ochdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz natijalar haqidagi rahbariyat yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To achieve the intended result effectively.
words.example1: This tool will do the job.
words.example1Situation: Siz oddiy maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our current system still does the job well.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnologiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although it's not the most advanced solution, this approach will do the job until we implement the full upgrade next year.
words.example3Translation: Eng ilg'or yechim bo'lmasa ham, bu yondashuv kelasi yil to'liq yangilash o'rnatilguncha ishni bajaradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz vaqtinchalik yechimlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Judging by appearances or initial evidence.
words.example1: On the face of it, it looks good.
words.example1Situation: Siz birinchi taassurot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: On the face of it, the project seems profitable.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha baholash yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: On the face of it, the deal appears very attractive, but we need to examine the contract details carefully.
words.example3Translation: Bir qarashda bitim juda jozibali ko'rinadi, ammo biz shartnoma tafsilotlarini sinchkovlik bilan ko'rib chiqishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz investitsiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To feel tense, nervous, or anxious.
words.example1: I've been on edge all day.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zingizning holatingiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sales team is on edge before the big presentation.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: With the upcoming merger announcement, many employees have been on edge, waiting for official news about their positions.
words.example3Translation: Yaqinlashib kelayotgan qo'shilish e'loni bilan ko'plab xodimlar o'z lavozimlari haqidagi rasmiy xabarni kutib, asabiy holatda bo'lishdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To represent or handle something adequately and fairly.
words.example1: This photo doesn't do justice to the view.
words.example1Situation: Siz tajriba haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our presentation needs to do justice to the hard work of the team.
words.example2Situation: Siz taqdimot tayyorlashda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The short video we created does full justice to the complexity and innovation behind our new product development.
words.example3Translation: Biz yaratgan qisqa video yangi mahsulotni ishlab chiqishdagi murakkablik va innovatsiyani to'liq ifodalaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mahsulot taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Yetarli bo'lmagan narsa bilan ish ko'rmoq
words.definition: To manage with limited or inadequate resources.
words.example1: We'll have to make do with what we have.
words.example1Situation: Siz cheklangan resurslar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our department had to make do with a small budget.
words.example2Situation: Siz byudjet muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During the supply chain crisis, we had to make do with fewer materials while still meeting customer demands.
words.example3Translation: Ta'minot zanjiri inqirozi paytida biz mijozlar talablarini bajarishda davom etgan holda kamroq materiallar bilan ish ko'rishga majbur bo'ldik.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz boshqaruvi yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An act perceived as a strong insult or humiliation.
words.example1: His comment was a slap in the face.
words.example1Situation: Siz noxush vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The decision felt like a slap in the face to our team.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa reaktsiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Rejecting the proposal without any explanation came as a slap in the face to the department that had worked on it for months.
words.example3Translation: Taklifni hech qanday tushuntirishsiz rad etish uni oylar davomida tayyorlagan bo'lim uchun yuzga shapaloq urishdek bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki aloqa muammolari haqida muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Oxirigacha / Qiyin bo'lsa ham davom ettirmoq
words.definition: Continuing despite extreme difficulty or opposition.
words.example1: We fought until the bitter end.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin jarayon haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team stayed committed until the bitter end.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha yakunlanishi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Despite many challenges and setbacks, the dedicated staff worked until the bitter end to successfully complete the project.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab qiyinchiliklar va to'sqinliklarga qaramay, fidoyi xodimlar loyihani muvaffaqiyatli yakunlash uchun oxirigacha ishlashdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat hikoyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To produce the desired effect.
words.example1: This solution should do the trick.
words.example1Situation: Siz oddiy maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: A small adjustment will do the trick for our system.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnik muammo muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Adding a simple user feedback form did the trick and significantly improved our customer satisfaction scores.
words.example3Translation: Oddiy foydalanuvchi fikr-mulohaza formasini qo'shish kerakli natijani berdi va mijozlar qoniqish ko'rsatkichlarini sezilarli oshirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yaxshilash strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to introduce an uncomfortable truth.
words.example1: Let's face it, we need more time.
words.example1Situation: Siz haqiqatni aytayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Let's face it, our current strategy isn't working.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Let's face it, without improving our digital presence we will continue losing ground to our competitors.
words.example3Translation: Ochig'ini aytaylik, raqamli mavjudligimizni yaxshilamasak, raqobatchilarimizdan ortda qolishda davom etamiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz ochiq strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An estimate based on knowledge and experience rather than certainty.
words.example1: It's just an educated guess.
words.example1Situation: Siz taxmin haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our analyst made an educated guess about sales.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Based on current market trends, her educated guess about next quarter's performance proved to be quite accurate.
words.example3Translation: Joriy bozor tendensiyalariga asoslanib, uning keyingi chorakdagi natijalar haqidagi asoslangan taxmini ancha aniq bo'lib chiqdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz prognoz muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A general atmosphere of pessimism and negativity.
words.example1: Stop with the doom and gloom.
words.example1Situation: Siz salbiy fikr bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need to avoid doom and gloom in our meetings.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Despite the challenging economic situation, our leadership refused to spread doom and gloom and focused on finding solutions.
words.example3Translation: Qiyin iqtisodiy vaziyatga qaramay, rahbariyatimiz pessimistik kayfiyat tarqatishdan bosh tortib, yechim topishga e'tibor qaratdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz davridagi rahbarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Not the end of the world
words.definition: Not as serious or disastrous as it seems.
words.example1: It's not the end of the world.
words.example1Situation: Siz xato yoki muammo haqida tasalli berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Losing this client is not the end of the world.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Missing the deadline by two days is not the end of the world if we communicate transparently with the client.
words.example3Translation: Agar mijoz bilan ochiq muloqot qilsak, muddatni ikki kunga o'tkazib yuborish dunyo tugashi emas.
words.example3Situation: Siz xato tahlili yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To feel weak or close to losing consciousness.
words.example1: I started to feel faint after lunch.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Some employees feel faint during long meetings.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofis farovonligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Working in a stuffy conference room without proper ventilation made several participants feel faint during the long strategy session.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi ventilyatsiya bo'lmagan havo o'tmaydigan konferensiya zalida uzoq strategik yig'ilish paytida bir necha ishtirokchi holsizlanib qoldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish sharoitlari haqidagi muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: In private, away from public view.
words.example1: They discussed it behind closed doors.
words.example1Situation: Siz maxfiy suhbat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Important decisions are made behind closed doors.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki boshqaruv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The final terms of the agreement were negotiated behind closed doors between the two CEOs.
words.example3Translation: Kelishuvning yakuniy shartlari ikki bosh direktor o'rtasida yopiq eshiklar ortida muzokara qilindi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muzokaralar jarayoni haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To stop discussing a particular topic.
words.example1: Let's drop the subject.
words.example1Situation: Siz noqulay suhbatni to'xtatayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We should drop the subject in the meeting.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the discussion became too heated, the manager wisely asked everyone to drop the subject and focus on the main agenda.
words.example3Translation: Muhokama haddan tashqari qiziganda, rahbar barchadan mavzuni yopib, asosiy kun tartibiga e'tibor qaratishni so'radi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yig'ilish boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Exactly at a specified time.
words.example1: He arrived on the dot.
words.example1Situation: Siz vaqtga rioya qilish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our meeting starts on the dot at 9 AM.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: International clients appreciate when we deliver reports and presentations exactly on the dot as promised.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro mijozlar va'da qilingan vaqtda hisobot va taqdimotlarni tochno yetkazib berishimizni yuqori baholaydilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To begin to apply or operate officially.
words.example1: The new rule will come into effect next month.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zgarishlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The policy will come into effect from January.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki qoida muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The updated data protection regulations will come into effect at the beginning of next year, requiring all departments to update their procedures.
words.example3Translation: Yangilangan ma'lumotlar himoyasi qoidalari kelasi yil boshida kuchga kiradi va barcha bo'limlardan tartib-qoidalarini yangilashni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz huquqiy o'zgarishlar haqidagi treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To cause uncertainty about the truth of something.
words.example1: This casts doubt on the plan.
words.example1Situation: Siz shubhali vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: New evidence cast doubt on our previous assumption.
words.example2Situation: Siz tahlil yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The unexpected market changes cast doubt on our earlier forecast, forcing us to revise our strategy.
words.example3Translation: Kutilmagan bozor o'zgarishlari oldingi prognozimizga shubha uyg'otdi va strategiyamizni qayta ko'rib chiqishga majbur qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz prognoz va rejalashtirish muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Without a shadow of a doubt
words.definition: With complete certainty.
words.example1: He is the best candidate without a shadow of a doubt.
words.example1Situation: Siz aniq fikr bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This is the right decision without a shadow of a doubt.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik tanlov haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Without a shadow of a doubt, investing in employee training is one of the smartest long-term decisions a company can make.
words.example3Translation: Hech qanday shubhasiz, xodimlarni o'qitishga sarmoya kiritish kompaniya qilishi mumkin bo'lgan eng oqilona uzoq muddatli qarorlardan biridir.
words.example3Situation: Siz rivojlanish strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Not have the faintest idea about
words.definition: To have absolutely no knowledge of something.
words.example1: I don't have the faintest idea about this topic.
words.example1Situation: Siz bilimsizligingizni bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Many team members don't have the faintest idea about the new system.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'qitish muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Before the training session, most of the staff did not have the faintest idea about the upcoming changes in company policy.
words.example3Translation: Trening oldidan ko'pchilik xodimlar kompaniya siyosatidagi yaqinlashib kelayotgan o'zgarishlar haqida hech qanday tasavvurga ega emas edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yangi tizimni joriy etish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An informal term for Australia (and sometimes New Zealand).
words.example1: My friend lives down under.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We have a partner company down under.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro hamkorlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our expansion plans now include establishing stronger connections with partners down under to tap into the growing Asia-Pacific market.
words.example3Translation: Bizning kengayish rejalari hozir Osiyo-Tinch okeani bozorining o'sishidan foydalanish uchun pastdagi (Avstraliya) hamkorlar bilan kuchliroq aloqa o'rnatishni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro biznes strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Money will go down the drain
words.translation: Pul behuda sarflanadi / Pul ko'kka sovuriladi
words.definition: Money will be wasted with no benefit.
words.example1: Don't buy that expensive gadget. It's useless and the money will go down the drain.
words.example1Situation: Siz byudjet haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company cannot afford this marketing campaign because the money will go down the drain.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha taqdimoti paytida rahbariyat oldida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Despite heavy investment, poor planning caused the entire project budget to go down the drain.
words.example3Translation: Katta investitsiyalarga qaramay, yomon rejalashtirish butun loyiha byudjetini behuda sarflab yubordi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro biznes uchrashuvida loyiha natijalarini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Expected or scheduled to happen; owed.
words.example1: The report is due by the end of this week.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan ish muddati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our payment to the supplier is due next Monday.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliya bo'limi bilan hisob-kitob muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The final version of the contract is due tomorrow, so we need to finish the review today.
words.example3Translation: Shartnomaning yakuniy versiyasi ertaga muddati yetadi, shuning uchun bugun ko'rib chiqishni tugatishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz huquqiy bo'lim bilan muddatlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Honest and respectful behaviour, especially in competition.
words.example1: Everyone appreciates fair play in the office.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasblar bilan raqobat haqida suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company always promotes fair play in business negotiations.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even when facing strong competitors, maintaining fair play builds a strong reputation in the industry.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli raqobatchilarga qarshi bo'lsa ham, adolatli munosabatni saqlash sanoatda kuchli obro' yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro konferensiyada biznes etikasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Savings set aside for future security.
words.example1: I'm saving to build a nice nest egg.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingiz bilan moliyaviy reja haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization encourages employees to build a nest egg for retirement.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Having a solid nest egg gives professionals more freedom to take calculated career risks.
words.example3Translation: Mustahkam jamg'armaga ega bo'lish mutaxassislarga karyera xavflarini hisoblab olish erkinligini beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy savodxonlik treningida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To pass, especially of time.
words.example1: Two weeks have elapsed since the deadline.
words.example1Situation: Siz loyiha holati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Several months have elapsed since our company started the new initiative.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A considerable amount of time has elapsed since we launched the product, yet sales remain below expectations.
words.example3Translation: Mahsulotni chiqarganimizdan beri ancha vaqt o'tdi, ammo savdo hali ham kutilgan darajadan past.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik rejalashtirish yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Not at all close to doing something; quite the opposite.
words.example1: I'm far from finishing this task.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish yukini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team is far from reaching this year's revenue target.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although we have improved, we are still far from becoming the market leader in this region.
words.example3Translation: Biz yaxshilangan bo'lsak ham, bu mintaqada bozor yetakchisiga aylanishga hali ancha yiroqdamiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbariyat oldida strategik hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Occurring very rarely and at long intervals.
words.example1: Such good jobs are few and far between.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasblar bilan imkoniyatlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Real innovation opportunities are few and far between in our industry.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Genuine chances to work on high-impact international projects are few and far between.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori ta'sirga ega xalqaro loyihalarda ishlashning chinakam imkoniyatlari juda kam uchraydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera rivoji haqidagi panel muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An inferior copy lacking the quality or authenticity of the original.
words.example1: This phone is just a cheap imitation of the real one.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingiz bilan mahsulot sifati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company refuses to sell cheap imitations of quality products.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Customers can easily recognize a cheap imitation, which damages brand reputation in the long run.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlar arzon nusxani osongina tanib oladi, bu esa uzoq muddatda brend obro'siga zarar yetkazadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz brending strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To sound insincere, unconvincing, or lacking genuine meaning.
words.example1: His apology rang hollow.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan munosabatlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The CEO's promises ring hollow without real action.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When leaders make big promises but never follow through, their words ring hollow to the entire team.
words.example3Translation: Rahbarlar katta va'dalar berib, lekin hech qachon bajarmasa, ularning so'zlari butun jamoa uchun ishonchsiz eshitiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbariyat samaradorligi haqidagi muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Lacking emotional or intellectual development appropriate to one’s age.
words.example1: His reaction was very immature.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan xatti-harakat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Immature behaviour can harm our company culture.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Making important business decisions based on emotions rather than data is considered immature in professional environments.
words.example3Translation: Muhim biznes qarorlarini ma'lumot o'rniga his-tuyg'ularga asoslab qabul qilish professional muhitda yetilmaganlik hisoblanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik treningida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Xavf qilmasang, hech narsa qo'lga kiritmaysan
words.definition: Progress requires taking risks; without risk, there is no reward.
words.example1: Let's try it. Nothing ventured, nothing gained.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi g'oyani muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company follows the principle that nothing ventured, nothing gained.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Entering new international markets is risky, but as they say, nothing ventured, nothing gained.
words.example3Translation: Yangi xalqaro bozorlarga kirish xavfli, ammo aytishlaricha, xavf qilmasang, hech narsa qo'lga kiritmaysan.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik rejalashtirish uchrashuvida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An immediate and impending threat.
words.example1: We are not in imminent danger.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavfsizlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is not facing any imminent danger at the moment.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbariyat yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although the market is changing rapidly, we are not in imminent danger if we adapt quickly.
words.example3Translation: Bozor tez o'zgarayotgan bo'lsa ham, agar tez moslashsak, biz yaqin xavf ostida emasmiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz boshqaruvi muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A family environment disrupted by separation, divorce, or dysfunction.
words.example1: He grew up in a broken home.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy tajriba haqida suhbatlashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our HR team supports employees from broken homes.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many successful professionals have overcome challenges of growing up in a broken home.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab muvaffaqiyatli mutaxassislar buzilgan oilada o'sganlik qiyinchiliklarini yengib o'tishgan.
words.example3Situation: Siz motivatsion treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to introduce the first reason in a list of arguments.
words.example1: I don't want the job. For one thing, the salary is too low.
words.example1Situation: Siz fikringizni izohlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We should not proceed with this plan. For one thing, the cost is too high.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: We need to reconsider the strategy. For one thing, current market conditions have changed dramatically.
words.example3Translation: Biz strategiyani qayta ko'rib chiqishimiz kerak. Birinchidan, hozirgi bozor sharoitlari keskin o'zgardi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To say a phrase that becomes famous or memorable over time.
words.example1: He managed to utter an immortal line in the meeting.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyatli chiqish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our CEO uttered an immortal line that everyone still remembers.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya tarixi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Great leaders often utter an immortal line during important moments that inspires their team for years.
words.example3Translation: Buyuk rahbarlar ko'pincha muhim paytlarda jamoani yillar davomida ilhomlantiradigan abadiy ibora aytadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik mahorati haqidagi seminarda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to emphasize sincerity and truthfulness.
words.example1: In all honesty, I'm not satisfied with the result.
words.example1Situation: Siz halol fikr bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: In all honesty, our team needs more time to complete the project.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot berishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In all honesty, we must admit that our current approach is not delivering the expected results.
words.example3Translation: Ochig'ini aytganda, biz hozirgi yondashuvimiz kutilgan natijalarni bermayotganini tan olishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz ochiq muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To risk one’s accumulated money on an uncertain outcome.
words.example1: Never gamble your savings on risky investments.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our financial advisor warns employees not to gamble their savings.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy maslahat yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Smart professionals avoid gambling their savings on trends that have not been properly researched.
words.example3Translation: Aqlli mutaxassislar to'liq o'rganilmagan trendlarga jamg'armalarini xavf ostiga qo'yishdan qochadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy savodxonlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unaffected or resistant to something.
words.example1: She seems immune to stress.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizning xususiyatlari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: No company is completely immune to market changes.
words.example2Situation: Siz biznes muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even experienced companies are not immune to sudden technological disruptions in the industry.
words.example3Translation: Hatto tajribali kompaniyalar ham sanoatdagi to'satdan texnologik buzilishlardan butunlay himoyalanmagan.
words.example3Situation: Siz innovatsiya va xavflar haqidagi muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Keep your finger on the pulse
words.definition: To remain fully aware of current developments or trends.
words.example1: As a manager, you must keep your finger on the pulse.
words.example1Situation: Siz rahbarlik maslahati berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our marketing team keeps their finger on the pulse of customer trends.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Successful leaders always keep their finger on the pulse of both market changes and team morale.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli rahbarlar har doim bozor o'zgarishlari va jamoa ruhiyatidan xabardor bo'lib turadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik haqidagi treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: It is absolutely necessary or essential that.
words.example1: It is imperative that we finish on time.
words.example1Situation: Siz muddatlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: It is imperative that our team meets the deadline.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It is imperative that we adapt our strategy before the new regulations take effect.
words.example3Translation: Yangi qoidalar kuchga kirishidan oldin strategiyamizni moslashtirishimiz juda muhim.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik rejalashtirish muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To organize, receive, or provide a venue for an event or activity.
words.example1: Our team will host the meeting.
words.example1Situation: Siz tadbir tashkil qilish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company will host the annual conference this year.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It is a great honor for our organization to host the international summit next month.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro sammitga keyingi oy mezbonlik qilish tashkilotimiz uchun katta sharafdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbariyat oldida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The process of putting a plan or decision into effect.
words.example1: The implementation will take two months.
words.example1Situation: Siz loyiha vaqt jadvali haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Successful implementation requires good team coordination.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The smooth implementation of the new system significantly improved our operational efficiency.
words.example3Translation: Yangi tizimni muvaffaqiyatli amalga oshirish operatsion samaradorligimizni sezilarli darajada oshirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha hisobotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To behave dishonestly or manipulatively rather than directly.
words.example1: Stop playing games and be honest.
words.example1Situation: Siz ochiq suhbatda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We don't play games with our clients.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In professional environments, people who play games usually lose trust from their colleagues quickly.
words.example3Translation: Professional muhitda o'yin o'ynaydigan odamlar odatda hamkasblarining ishonchini tez yo'qotadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa madaniyati haqida muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Strong animosity or opposition directed at someone or something.
words.example1: There is hostility towards the new policy.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zgarishlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need to reduce hostility towards our new strategy.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki kommunikatsiya yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Unexpected hostility towards the proposed changes showed us we needed better internal communication.
words.example3Translation: Taklif qilingan o'zgarishlarga kutilmagan dushmanlik bizga ichki kommunikatsiyani yaxshilash zarurligini ko'rsatdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'zgarishlarni boshqarish muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A possible consequence or meaning suggested rather than stated directly.
words.example1: The implication is clear.
words.example1Situation: Siz xulosa chiqarayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must understand the implication of this decision.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: One major implication of the new regulation is that we will need to restructure our compliance department.
words.example3Translation: Yangi qoidaning asosiy natijalaridan biri shundaki, biz moslashuv bo'limimizni qayta tuzishimiz kerak bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz huquqiy va biznes muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To devise a carefully structured strategy.
words.example1: We need to formulate a plan quickly.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammo yechimi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team will formulate a plan for the next quarter.
words.example2Situation: Siz rejalashtirish yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Before entering a new market, it is essential to formulate a plan that considers cultural differences and local regulations.
words.example3Translation: Yangi bozorga kirishdan oldin madaniy farqlar va mahalliy qoidalarni hisobga olgan reja tuzish juda muhim.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro kengayish strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To do something spontaneously without forethought.
words.example1: Don't act on impulse.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Good leaders rarely act on impulse.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Professionals who act on impulse often make decisions they later regret in important business situations.
words.example3Translation: Birinchi o'ydan harakat qiladigan mutaxassislar muhim biznes holatlarida keyin pushaymon bo'ladigan qarorlar qabul qilishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qaror qabul qilish treningida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Regardless of perspective or interpretation.
words.example1: However you look at it, we need to change.
words.example1Situation: Siz xulosangizni bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: However you look at it, this investment is necessary.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: However you look at it, improving employee wellbeing will benefit the company in the long term.
words.example3Translation: Qanday qarashingizdan qat'iy nazar, xodimlar farovonligini yaxshilash uzoq muddatda kompaniyaga foyda keltiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik rivojlanish yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An unmet consumer need presenting a business opportunity.
words.example1: This is a gap in the market.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi g'oya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company found a gap in the market.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Identifying a gap in the market and filling it quickly can give a company significant competitive advantage.
words.example3Translation: Bozordagi bo'sh joyni aniqlab, uni tez to'ldirish kompaniyaga kuchli raqobat ustunligini berishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes imkoniyatlari haqidagi muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Actions driven by sudden urges rather than rational consideration.
words.example1: Impulsive behaviour can cause problems.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy rivojlanish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We try to avoid impulsive behaviour in decision making.
words.example2Situation: Siz boshqaruv yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Impulsive behaviour in business negotiations often leads to unfavorable agreements that could have been avoided with better preparation.
words.example3Translation: Biznes muzokaralaridagi impulsiv xatti-harakatlar ko'pincha yaxshi tayyorgarlik bilan oldini olish mumkin bo'lgan noqulay kelishuvlarga olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muzokaralar mahorati treningida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To appear lost in thought or mentally detached.
words.example1: You have a faraway look today.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizning kayfiyati haqida so'rayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager had a faraway look during the meeting.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even during important presentations, he sometimes has a faraway look as if thinking about the next strategic move.
words.example3Translation: Muhim taqdimotlar paytida ham u ba'zan keyingi strategik qadam haqida o'ylayotgandek ko'zi olisga qaragandek bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik xususiyatlari haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Sharing the same difficult situation as others.
words.example1: We're all in the same boat.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasblar bilan qiyin vaziyatni muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our department is in the same boat as others.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: With the new regulations affecting everyone, all companies in our industry are in the same boat and must adapt together.
words.example3Translation: Barchaga ta'sir qiladigan yangi qoidalar bilan sanoatimizdagi barcha kompaniyalar bir xil vaziyatda va birgalikda moslashishlari kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz sanoatdagi o'zgarishlar haqida xalqaro konferensiyada gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To struggle to breathe, often due to shock or exertion.
words.example1: The news made me gasp for breath.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan yangilik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team was gasping for breath after the deadline rush.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha yakunlanishi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The rapid pace of changes in the market left many professionals gasping for breath as they tried to keep up.
words.example3Translation: Bozordagi tez o'zgarishlar ko'plab mutaxassislarni ularga yetib borishga urinayotganlarida nafas ololmay qoldirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish yukini muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To sing softly with closed lips.
words.example1: She was humming a song while working.
words.example1Situation: Siz ofis muhitida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our colleague often hums a song when focused.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa madaniyati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even under pressure, she hums a song quietly at her desk, which helps her stay calm and productive.
words.example3Translation: Bosim ostida ham u stolida jimgina qo'shiqni g'ingshiraydi, bu unga tinch va samarali ishlashga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz stressni boshqarish haqidagi treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To share information privately with an expectation of secrecy.
words.example1: I'll tell you in confidence.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingizga ishonchli ma'lumot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our CEO told us this in confidence.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The manager told the team in confidence that major organizational changes were coming in the next quarter.
words.example3Translation: Rahbar jamoaga kelasi chorakda katta tashkiliy o'zgarishlar bo'lishini maxfiy tarzda aytdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki kommunikatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A route that allows quicker advancement or progress.
words.example1: This project is a fast track to promotion.
words.example1Situation: Siz karyera imkoniyatlari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company offers a fast track program for talented employees.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Joining the international division provided her with a fast track to leadership positions within just three years.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro bo'limga qo'shilish unga atigi uch yil ichida rahbarlik lavozimlariga tez rivojlanish yo'lini ochib berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera rivoji haqidagi panelda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Near or close to a particular place or amount.
words.example1: The office is in the vicinity of the station.
words.example1Situation: Siz joy haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sales are in the vicinity of last year's figures.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The final cost of the project remained in the vicinity of our initial estimate despite several unexpected challenges.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha kutilmagan qiyinchiliklarga qaramay, loyiha yakuniy narxi dastlabki hisobimizga yaqin darajada qoldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz byudjet muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An admission of natural limitations or mistakes.
words.example1: Sorry, I am only human.
words.example1Situation: Siz xato qilganingizda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team understands that we are only human.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When leaders admit they are only human and make mistakes, it creates a more open and trusting work environment.
words.example3Translation: Rahbarlar o'zlarini faqat inson ekanliklarini va xato qilishlarini tan olganda, bu ochiqroq va ishonchli ish muhitini yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik va xatolar haqida treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Careful and attentive observation.
words.example1: He kept a watchful gaze on the market.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our analysts maintain a watchful gaze on competitors.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Successful managers keep a watchful gaze on both team performance and changing customer needs.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli rahbarlar ham jamoa natijalarini, ham mijozlar ehtiyojlaridagi o'zgarishlarni ehtiyotkorlik bilan kuzatib boradilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz monitoring va boshqaruv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To mark an occasion with great enthusiasm and scale.
words.example1: Let's celebrate in a big way!
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company decided to celebrate the milestone in a big way.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki tadbir muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After closing the biggest deal in company history, leadership chose to celebrate in a big way by organizing an international team event.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya tarixidagi eng katta bitimni yakunlagandan so'ng, rahbariyat xalqaro jamoaviy tadbir tashkil qilib, uni katta miqyosda nishonlashga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyatni nishonlash haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Extremely quickly or suddenly.
words.example1: It happened in a flash.
words.example1Situation: Siz tez sodir bo'lgan voqea haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team solved the problem in a flash.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The market opportunity appeared and disappeared in a flash, which taught us the importance of quick decision-making.
words.example3Translation: Bozor imkoniyati bir zumda paydo bo'lib yo'qoldi, bu bizga tez qaror qabul qilish muhimligini o'rgatdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor dinamikasi haqida strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The initial and undeveloped form of a thought or concept.
words.example1: That was just the germ of an idea.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi fikr haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The germ of an idea came during our brainstorming session.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: What started as the germ of an idea in a casual conversation eventually became our most successful product line.
words.example3Translation: Oddiy suhbatda boshlangan g'oyaning urug'i oxir-oqibat bizning eng muvaffaqiyatli mahsulot yo'nalishimizga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz innovatsiya jarayoni haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: A force to be reckoned with
words.definition: A person or entity possessing significant power or influence.
words.example1: She is a force to be reckoned with.
words.example1Situation: Siz kuchli shaxs haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is becoming a force to be reckoned with.
words.example2Situation: Siz brending yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After years of development, our startup has become a force to be reckoned with in the competitive fintech sector.
words.example3Translation: Yillar davomidagi rivojlanishdan so'ng, bizning startapimiz raqobatbardosh fintech sohasida hisobga olinadigan kuchga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya o'sishi haqidagi xalqaro konferensiyada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Assistance provided to relieve human suffering in crises.
words.example1: They sent humanitarian aid.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy masalalar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our organization contributes to humanitarian aid projects.
words.example2Situation: Siz KSS yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many global companies now include humanitarian aid initiatives as part of their corporate social responsibility programs.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab global kompaniyalar endi insonparvarlik yordami tashabbuslarini o'zlarining korporativ ijtimoiy mas'uliyat dasturlariga kiritmoqdalar.
words.example3Situation: Siz CSR strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To integrate something as part of a larger whole.
words.example1: We should incorporate this feedback.
words.example1Situation: Siz takliflar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team will incorporate these changes into the plan.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It is essential to incorporate sustainability principles into every stage of our product development process.
words.example3Translation: Barqarorlik tamoyillarini mahsulot ishlab chiqish jarayonining har bir bosqichiga kiritish juda muhim.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik rejalashtirish yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be consistent with rules, expectations, or standards.
words.example1: This is in line with our policy.
words.example1Situation: Siz qoida haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The decision is in line with our company values.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The new compensation package is fully in line with industry standards and will help us attract top talent.
words.example3Translation: Yangi kompensatsiya paketi sanoat standartlariga to'liq mos keladi va eng yaxshi mutaxassislarni jalb qilishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz HR strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To become organized and act responsibly.
words.example1: You need to get your act together.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team must get its act together before the launch.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: If we want to compete internationally, we need to get our act together and improve our operational efficiency.
words.example3Translation: Agar xalqaro miqyosda raqobatlashmoqchi bo'lsak, o'z faoliyatimizni tartibga solib, operatsion samaradorligimizni oshirishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya rivoji haqida strategik muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Modest and not overly proud, despite achievements.
words.example1: He is very humble.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy fazilat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our CEO remains humble despite success.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even after receiving multiple industry awards, she stayed humble and continued learning from her colleagues.
words.example3Translation: Sanoat bo'yicha bir nechta mukofotlarga sazovor bo'lganidan keyin ham u kamtarin bo'lib qoldi va hamkasblaridan o'rganishni davom ettirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik fazilatlari haqidagi treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Despite the presence of difficulty or opposition.
words.example1: She stayed calm in the face of criticism.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company succeeded in the face of strong competition.
words.example2Situation: Siz raqobat muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: True leaders demonstrate resilience in the face of unexpected challenges and inspire their teams to push forward.
words.example3Translation: Chin rahbarlar kutilmagan qiyinchiliklar qarshisida chidamlilikni namoyon etib, jamoalarini oldinga intilishga ilhomlantiradilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik haqida xalqaro konferensiyada gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A lifestyle characterized by speed, ambition, and intensity.
words.example1: He lives in the fast lane.
words.example1Situation: Siz turmush tarzi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Working in tech often means living in the fast lane.
words.example2Situation: Siz sanoat muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many young professionals choose the fast lane of startup culture, accepting high pressure in exchange for rapid growth opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab yosh mutaxassislar tez o'sish imkoniyatlari evaziga yuqori bosimni qabul qilib, startap madaniyatining tez hayot tarzini tanlaydilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera tanlovi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To suffer substantial financial damage.
words.example1: The company incurred huge losses.
words.example1Situation: Siz moliyaviy holat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must avoid incurring huge losses this quarter.
words.example2Situation: Siz byudjet yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Poor risk management caused the firm to incur huge losses during the market downturn last year.
words.example3Translation: Yomon risk boshqaruvi o'tgan yil bozor pasayishi paytida kompaniyaga katta zarar keltirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy tahlil haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To criticize by identifying flaws.
words.example1: He always finds fault with everything.
words.example1Situation: Siz salbiy xatti-harakat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We should not find fault with our partners.
words.example2Situation: Siz hamkorlik muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Constructive feedback is useful, but constantly finding fault with team members can damage morale and productivity.
words.example3Translation: Konstruktiv fikr-mulohaza foydali, ammo jamoa a'zolarida doimiy kamchilik topish ruhiyat va samaradorlikka zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa boshqaruvi haqida treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: At an early stage of development.
words.example1: The technology is still in its infancy.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi texnologiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our AI project is in its infancy.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although the electric vehicle market is still in its infancy in our region, experts predict rapid growth in the coming years.
words.example3Translation: Elektromobil bozori mintaqamizda hali boshlang'ich bosqichida bo'lsa ham, mutaxassislar kelgusi yillarda tez o'sishni bashorat qilmoqdalar.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor prognozi haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To achieve success despite an unprivileged start.
words.example1: She rose from humble beginnings.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilhomlantiruvchi hikoya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our founder rose from humble beginnings.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya tarixi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many great business leaders rose from humble beginnings and used their early challenges as motivation for future success.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab buyuk biznes rahbarlari oddiy boshlanishdan ko'tarilgan va erta qiyinchiliklarini kelajakdagi muvaffaqiyat uchun motivatsiyaga aylantirgan.
words.example3Situation: Siz motivatsion treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An illness that cannot be medically cured.
words.example1: It is an incurable disease.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq mavzusida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our foundation supports research on incurable diseases.
words.example2Situation: Siz ijtimoiy loyiha haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Modern medicine has transformed many previously incurable diseases into manageable chronic conditions through ongoing research.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy tibbiyot doimiy tadqiqotlar orqali ilgari davolab bo'lmaydigan ko'plab kasalliklarni boshqariladigan surunkali holatlarga aylantirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tibbiy innovatsiyalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To demonstrate modesty and lack of arrogance.
words.example1: It's important to show humility.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy rivojlanish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Leaders should show humility when receiving feedback.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Great leaders know when to show humility and acknowledge the contributions of their entire team to overall success.
words.example3Translation: Buyuk rahbarlar qachon kamtarinlik ko'rsatish va umumiy muvaffaqiyatda butun jamoa hissasini tan olishni biladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik fazilatlari haqida seminarda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To express suppressed feelings for emotional relief.
words.example1: I need to get this off my chest.
words.example1Situation: Siz his-tuyg'ularingizni bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team meeting allows people to get things off their chest.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki aloqa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Regular feedback sessions help employees get concerns off their chest before small issues become major problems.
words.example3Translation: Muntazam fikr-mulohaza sessiyalari kichik muammolar katta muammolarga aylanishidan oldin xodimlarning tashvishlarini bildirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi haqida muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An outward appearance of lack of concern.
words.example1: He had an air of indifference.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning munosabati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We cannot show an air of indifference to customer complaints.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: His air of indifference during the crisis meeting surprised everyone because the situation required immediate attention and action.
words.example3Translation: Inqiroz yig'ilishidagi parvo qilmaslik holati barchani hayratda qoldirdi, chunki vaziyat darhol e'tibor va harakat talab qilardi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To strongly desire success, achievement, or recognition.
words.example1: She is hungry for success.
words.example1Situation: Siz motivatsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our young team is hungry for new challenges.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Professionals who are hungry for continuous improvement usually achieve better long-term career growth.
words.example3Translation: Doimiy takomillashishga chanqoq mutaxassislar odatda uzoq muddatli karyera o'sishiga erishadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera rivoji haqidagi panel muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Separately or without interaction with others.
words.example1: We cannot work in isolation.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkorlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: No department should operate in isolation.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In today's interconnected business world, making decisions in isolation often leads to missed opportunities and inefficiencies.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi o'zaro bog'langan biznes dunyosida qarorlarni alohida qabul qilish ko'pincha imkoniyatlarni o'tkazib yuborish va samarasizlikka olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hamkorlik va aloqa haqida strategik muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Supporting or approving of something.
words.example1: I'm in favour of this idea.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingiz bilan fikr almashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team is in favour of the new policy.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Most managers are in favour of flexible working hours because they believe it improves both productivity and employee satisfaction.
words.example3Translation: Ko'pchilik rahbarlar moslashuvchan ish vaqtini yoqlaydilar, chunki ular bu samaradorlikni ham, xodimlar qoniqishini ham yaxshilashiga ishonadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz HR strategiyasi haqidagi muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Showing no interest or concern.
words.example1: He seemed indifferent to the news.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning munosabati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We cannot be indifferent to customer feedback.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Leaders who appear indifferent to team struggles often lose trust and motivation within their departments.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa qiyinchiliklariga be farq ko'rinadigan rahbarlar ko'pincha bo'lim ichidagi ishonch va motivatsiyani yo'qotadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik mahorati haqidagi treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Behaving in a way that contradicts one’s stated beliefs.
words.example1: That sounds hypocritical.
words.example1Situation: Siz nozik vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company avoids hypocritical marketing claims.
words.example2Situation: Siz brending muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Being publicly supportive of work-life balance while expecting employees to reply to emails at midnight is considered hypocritical by many professionals.
words.example3Translation: Ish-hayot muvozanatini ochiq qo'llab-quvvatlab, xodimlardan yarim tunda emailga javob berishni kutish ko'pchilik mutaxassislar tomonidan ikkiyuzlamachilik deb hisoblanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya madaniyati haqidagi yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Absolutely necessary and irreplaceable.
words.example1: You are indispensable to the team.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizni maqtayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This software has become indispensable for our workflow.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnologiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In modern business, the ability to adapt quickly has become indispensable for both individual career growth and company survival.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy biznesda tez moslashish qobiliyati ham shaxsiy karyera o'sishi, ham kompaniya omon qolishi uchun ajralmas bo'lib qoldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A beverage that has lost its carbonation.
words.example1: This cola has become a flat drink.
words.example1Situation: Siz oddiy kundalik holat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We should replace the flat drink at the meeting.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofis tadbiri haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Serving flat drinks to important clients during a hot summer meeting created an unprofessional impression we wanted to avoid.
words.example3Translation: Issiq yoz kunida muhim mijozlarga gazsiz ichimliklar taklif qilish biz oldini olishni istagan no professional taassurot qoldirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan uchrashuv tayyorgarligi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
