words.word: Be the tip of the iceberg
words.definition: A small visible part of a much larger problem.
words.example1: This is just the tip of the iceberg.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammo haqida ogohlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The reported issues are the tip of the iceberg.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The few customer complaints we received are the tip of the iceberg of deeper problems in our service quality.
words.example3Translation: Biz olgan bir necha mijoz shikoyatlari xizmat sifatidagi chuqurroq muammolarning faqat muz tog'ining uchi hisoblanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sifat nazorati yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: In the process of doing something
words.definition: Currently engaged in an ongoing action.
words.example1: We are in the process of hiring.
words.example1Situation: Siz joriy holat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is in the process of expanding.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: We are currently in the process of implementing a new CRM system that will significantly improve client relationship management.
words.example3Translation: Biz hozirda mijozlar bilan munosabatlarni sezilarli yaxshilaydigan yangi CRM tizimini joriy etish jarayonidamiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha hisobotini berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Fail to produce any useful result.
words.example1: Complaining will get you nowhere.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This old strategy will get us nowhere.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Continuing with outdated marketing methods in the digital age will get you nowhere in today's competitive business environment.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli davrda eskirgan marketing usullarini davom ettirish bugungi raqobatbardosh biznes muhitida hech narsaga olib kelmaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz marketing strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To allow oneself to enjoy something, often excessively.
words.example1: Sometimes I indulge in chocolate.
words.example1Situation: Siz kundalik odat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We rarely indulge in expensive team dinners.
words.example2Situation: Siz byudjet muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While it is fine to occasionally indulge in team celebrations, we must maintain discipline to achieve our long-term financial targets.
words.example3Translation: Jamoaviy bayramlarga vaqti-vaqti bilan berilish yaxshi bo'lsa ham, uzoq muddatli moliyaviy maqsadlarimizga erishish uchun intizomni saqlashimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy nazorat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Extremely lazy.
words.example1: He is bone idle.
words.example1Situation: Siz xatti-harakat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: No one in our company is bone idle.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Bone idle employees who avoid responsibility eventually become a burden on high-performing team members.
words.example3Translation: Mas'uliyatdan qochadigan juda dangasa xodimlar oxir-oqibat yuqori natija ko'rsatuvchi jamoa a'zolari uchun yuk bo'lib qoladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish intizomi haqidagi muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To cooperate or work together for a shared goal.
words.example1: Let's join forces on this.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkorlik taklif qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company wants to join forces with them.
words.example2Situation: Siz hamkorlik muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Two leading companies decided to join forces to develop innovative solutions that neither could achieve working alone.
words.example3Translation: Ikkita yetakchi kompaniya birgalikda hech biri yakka o'zi erisha olmaydigan innovatsion yechimlarni ishlab chiqish uchun kuchlarini birlashtirishga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik hamkorlik haqida xalqaro uchrashuvda gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A very young child or baby.
words.example1: She has a young infant.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizning shaxsiy hayoti haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company offers support for employees with infants.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR siyosati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many progressive companies now provide special facilities and flexible hours for parents of infants to support better work-life balance.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab ilg'or kompaniyalar endi chaqaloqli ota-onalarga yaxshiroq ish-hayot muvozanatini ta'minlash uchun maxsus sharoitlar va moslashuvchan ish vaqtini taklif qilmoqdalar.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi haqidagi yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to prevent misunderstanding before clarifying a point.
words.example1: Don't get me wrong, I like the plan.
words.example1Situation: Siz fikringizni aniqlashtirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Don't get me wrong, our team is doing well.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot berishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Don't get me wrong, I fully support digital transformation, but we must also consider the training needs of our older employees.
words.example3Translation: Meni noto'g'ri tushunmang, men raqamli transformatsiyani to'liq qo'llab-quvvatlayman, lekin keksa xodimlarimizning o'qitish ehtiyojlarini ham hisobga olishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'zgarishlarni boshqarish muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Lack of knowledge or awareness.
words.example1: Ignorance is not an excuse.
words.example1Situation: Siz mas'uliyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must reduce ignorance about our policies.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki o'qitish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In today's fast-changing business environment, ignorance of new technologies can seriously limit both personal and organizational growth.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi tez o'zgaruvchan biznes muhitida yangi texnologiyalardan bexabarlik ham shaxsiy, ham tashkiliy o'sishni jiddiy cheklashi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The matter currently being discussed or considered.
words.example1: The budget in question is sufficient.
words.example1Situation: Siz mavzuni aniqlashtirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The project in question needs more time.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The strategy in question requires thorough analysis before we can make a final decision on its implementation.
words.example3Translation: Muhokama qilinayotgan strategiya uni amalga oshirish bo'yicha yakuniy qaror qabul qilishdan oldin chuqur tahlilni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To draw a conclusion based on evidence or reasoning.
words.example1: What can we infer from this?
words.example1Situation: Siz tahlil qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We can infer from the data that sales are improving.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: From the positive customer feedback, we can infer that our recent changes to the user interface have significantly improved user experience.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlarning ijobiy fikr-mulohazalaridan biz foydalanuvchi interfeysiga kiritilgan so'nggi o'zgarishlar foydalanuvchi tajribasini sezilarli yaxshilagani haqida xulosa qilishimiz mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz ma'lumotlar tahlili haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Flowers with a strong and pleasant scent.
words.example1: The office has fragrant flowers.
words.example1Situation: Siz ofis muhiti haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We received fragrant flowers from our client.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijoz munosabati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The conference hall was beautifully decorated with fragrant flowers, creating a welcoming atmosphere for the international guests.
words.example3Translation: Konferensiya zali xalqaro mehmonlar uchun mehmondo'st muhit yaratish uchun xushbo'y gullar bilan chiroyli bezatilgan edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tadbir tashkil qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A large arrival of people or things in a short time.
words.example1: There was an influx of orders.
words.example1Situation: Siz savdo holati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We saw an influx of new customers.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The successful marketing campaign caused a sudden influx of applications that our HR team had difficulty processing in time.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli marketing kampaniyasi HR jamoamiz o'z vaqtida qayta ishlashda qiynalgan ariza oqimini keltirib chiqardi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kampaniya natijalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be in debt or operating at a financial loss.
words.example1: Our account is in the red.
words.example1Situation: Siz moliyaviy holat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The department was in the red last quarter.
words.example2Situation: Siz byudjet muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although we were in the red during the first half of the year, strong sales in the final quarter helped us finish the year profitably.
words.example3Translation: Yilning birinchi yarmida zarar ko'rgan bo'lsak ham, oxirgi chorakdagi kuchli savdo yilni foyda bilan yakunlashga yordam berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy hisobot taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Psychological restraints that limit free behaviour.
words.example1: He has no inhibitions.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy xususiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Team building helps reduce inhibitions.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoaviy tadbir haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Breaking down inhibitions between departments led to much better collaboration and more creative solutions across the organization.
words.example3Translation: Bo'limlar o'rtasidagi ichki to'siqlarni bartaraf etish tashkilot bo'ylab ancha yaxshi hamkorlik va ijodiy yechimlarga olib keldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoaviy rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To make something appear real or true when it is not.
words.example1: It creates the illusion of success.
words.example1Situation: Siz tashqi ko'rinish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We should not create the illusion of growth.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Using heavy advertising to create the illusion of high demand can backfire when customers discover the actual quality of the product.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori talab illyuziyasini yaratish uchun kuchli reklama qilish mijozlar mahsulotning haqiqiy sifatini bilib qolganda teskari natija berishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz marketing etikasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Cruel or lacking compassion.
words.example1: The conditions were inhuman.
words.example1Situation: Siz nohaq vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must avoid inhuman treatment of staff.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Asking employees to work 80 hours a week without proper compensation is considered inhuman in most modern professional environments.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlardan haftasiga 80 soat ishlashni tegishli kompensatsiyasiz talab qilish ko'pchilik zamonaviy professional muhitlarda insoniy bo'lmagan deb hisoblanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish sharoitlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To become uncontrollable.
words.example1: The situation got out of hand.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammo haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must not let costs get out of hand.
words.example2Situation: Siz byudjet nazorati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Without proper management, even small conflicts between team members can quickly get out of hand and affect overall productivity.
words.example3Translation: To'g'ri boshqaruvsiz, jamoa a'zolari o'rtasidagi kichik mojarolar ham tezda nazoratdan chiqib, umumiy samaradorlikka ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz konfliktlarni boshqarish haqida treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Looking back on a past event with the benefit of hindsight.
words.example1: In retrospect, it was a good decision.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'tmishdagi qaror haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: In retrospect, we should have invested earlier.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya tahlilida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In retrospect, expanding into the Asian market earlier would have given us a significant competitive advantage over our rivals.
words.example3Translation: Orqaga qarab ko'rganimizda, Osiyo bozoriga oldinroq kengayish raqobatchilarimiz oldida bizga katta ustunlik bergan bo'lardi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes strategiyasi haqidagi muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Completely unfamiliar or outside one’s experience or values.
words.example1: That idea is foreign to me.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi taklif haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Such aggressive tactics are foreign to our company.
words.example2Situation: Siz brend qadriyatlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Taking shortcuts that compromise quality is foreign to our corporate culture and values.
words.example3Translation: Sifatni pasaytiradigan qisqa yo'llar bizning korporativ madaniyatimiz va qadriyatlarimizga mutlaqo begona.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya madaniyati haqidagi taqdimotda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To formally begin or set a process in motion.
words.example1: We should initiate the project.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi ish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our CEO will initiate the partnership.
words.example2Situation: Siz hamkorlik muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The board decided to initiate a comprehensive review of all departments to identify areas for operational improvement.
words.example3Translation: Direksiya operatsion yaxshilanish yo'nalishlarini aniqlash uchun barcha bo'limlarni har tomonlama ko'rib chiqishni boshlashga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki audit haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The world as a whole; the Earth.
words.example1: We ship products across the globe.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro savdo haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company operates across the globe.
words.example2Situation: Siz brending yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In today's interconnected economy, companies that think on a global scale have a much better chance of sustained success.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi o'zaro bog'langan iqtisodiyotda global miqyosda fikrlaydigan kompaniyalar barqaror muvaffaqiyatga erishish imkoniyatiga ega.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro biznes strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To worsen an already bad situation through further offence or harm.
words.example1: That added insult to injury.
words.example1Situation: Siz noxush vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The late payment added insult to injury.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijoz munosabati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Cancelling the project after months of hard work was bad enough, but delaying the final payments added insult to injury for the entire team.
words.example3Translation: Oylar davomidagi mashaqqatli mehnatdan keyin loyihani bekor qilishning o'zi yetarli edi, ammo yakuniy to'lovlarni kechiktirish butun jamoa uchun yaraga tuz sepdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki aloqa muammolari haqida muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To learn how to do something competently through practice.
words.example1: I'm getting the hang of it.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'rganish jarayoni haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our new employees are getting the hang of the system.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'qitish muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Once you get the hang of using data analytics tools, you can make much more informed decisions in your daily work.
words.example3Translation: Ma'lumotlar tahlili vositalaridan foydalanishni o'zlashtirganingizdan so'ng, kundalik ishingizda ancha asosli qarorlar qabul qila olasiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional ko'nikmalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Trapped in a monotonous or unproductive routine.
words.example1: I feel stuck in a rut.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy his-tuyg'ularingiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our processes are stuck in a rut.
words.example2Situation: Siz jarayonlarni yaxshilash haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many professionals become stuck in a rut after several years in the same position, which is why continuous learning is so important.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab mutaxassislar bir lavozimda bir necha yil ishlagandan keyin bir xil holatda qolib ketadilar, shuning uchun doimiy o'rganish juda muhim.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera rivoji haqidagi panelda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A natural ability present from birth rather than acquired.
words.example1: She has an innate talent for music.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingizning qobiliyatlari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company looks for people with innate talent for sales.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While skills can be developed through training, innate talent often gives certain professionals a significant advantage in creative and strategic roles.
words.example3Translation: Ko'nikmalarni o'qitish orqali rivojlantirish mumkin bo'lsa ham, tug'ma iste'dod ba'zi mutaxassislarga ijodiy va strategik rollarda muhim ustunlik beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera rivoji haqidagi muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Considered the most likely candidate for victory.
words.example1: Our team is the favourite to win.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqobat haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is the favourite to win this contract.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After several successful projects, our firm has become the favourite to win the international tender announced last month.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha muvaffaqiyatli loyihalardan so'ng, kompaniyamiz o'tgan oy e'lon qilingan xalqaro tenderda g'alaba qozorishi eng ehtimoliy ishtirokchiga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes raqobati haqida xalqaro konferensiyada gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Because; for the reason that.
words.example1: I agree in that it's important.
words.example1Situation: Siz fikringizni izohlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We support the plan in that it saves costs.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: We decided to approve the proposal in that it aligns perfectly with our long-term sustainability goals and market positioning.
words.example3Translation: Biz taklifni tasdiqlashga qaror qildik, chunki u bizning uzoq muddatli barqarorlik maqsadlarimiz va bozordagi mavqeimizga to'liq mos keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik qarorlar haqida rahbariyat yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To understand a situation clearly, often after explanation.
words.example1: I get the picture now.
words.example1Situation: Siz tushuntirishdan keyin bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Does everyone get the picture?
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Once the CEO explained the new direction, all department heads quickly got the picture and began adjusting their strategies accordingly.
words.example3Translation: Bosh direktor yangi yo'nalishni tushuntirgandan so'ng, barcha bo'lim rahbarlari tezda tushunib yetdilar va o'z strategiyalarini moslashtira boshladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategiya taqdimoti haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Within a time frame that can reasonably be anticipated.
words.example1: We won't need it in the foreseeable future.
words.example1Situation: Siz rejalashtirish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company will not expand in the foreseeable future.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Given current market conditions, we do not expect major changes in consumer behaviour in the foreseeable future.
words.example3Translation: Joriy bozor sharoitlarini hisobga olgan holda, biz yaqin kelajakda iste'molchi xatti-harakatlarida katta o'zgarishlarni kutmayapmiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor prognozi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: The ins and outs of something
words.definition: All the details and complexities of a subject.
words.example1: I know the ins and outs of this.
words.example1Situation: Siz tajribangiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our expert knows the ins and outs of the market.
words.example2Situation: Siz mutaxassis haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After working here for eight years, she knows the ins and outs of our business processes better than anyone else in the organization.
words.example3Translation: Bu yerda sakkiz yil ishlaganidan so'ng, u bizning biznes jarayonlarining barcha nozik jihatlarini tashkilotdagi boshqa har qanday odamdan yaxshiroq biladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mutaxassislik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To laugh lightly and repeatedly, often nervously or with amusement.
words.example1: She started to giggle.
words.example1Situation: Siz kulgili vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team began to giggle during the presentation.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even in serious meetings, a well-timed joke can make the whole room giggle and help reduce tension among team members.
words.example3Translation: Jiddiy yig'ilishlarda ham o'z vaqtida aytilgan hazil butun xonani kulgilashga majbur qiladi va jamoa a'zolari o'rtasidagi taranglikni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa muhitini yaxshilash haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A formal request for information or investigation.
words.example1: I made an enquiry about the price.
words.example1Situation: Siz oddiy so'rov haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We received several enquiries from clients.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo bo'limi yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The customer service team handled over fifty enquiries last week, demonstrating the high level of interest in our new product line.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish bo'limi o'tgan hafta yangi mahsulotlarimizga bo'lgan yuqori qiziqishni ko'rsatgan holda ellikdan ortiq so'rovni ko'rib chiqdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlar faolligi haqida hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Countless difficulties, too many to be individually counted.
words.example1: There were innumerable problems.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin loyiha haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We faced innumerable problems during the launch.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Despite innumerable problems caused by supply chain disruptions, the team managed to deliver the project on schedule.
words.example3Translation: Ta'minot zanjiri uzilishlari sababli yuzaga kelgan son-sanoqsiz muammolarga qaramay, jamoa loyihani belgilangan muddatda yetkazib berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Legally judged to lack mental capacity and therefore not fully responsible for crimes.
words.example1: He was declared criminally insane.
words.example1Situation: Siz huquqiy mavzu haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The court found the defendant criminally insane.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The judge ruled that the accused was criminally insane at the time of the incident, leading to specialized medical treatment instead of standard imprisonment.
words.example3Translation: Sudya ayblanuvchini voqea sodir bo'lgan paytda jinoyatchi darajada aqli noraso deb topdi, bu oddiy qamoq o'rniga maxsus tibbiy davolanishga olib keldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz huquqiy masalalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To motivate someone through rewards or encouragement.
words.example1: We need to provide incentive for the team.
words.example1Situation: Siz motivatsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The bonus will provide incentive for our employees.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Good leaders understand that providing the right incentive for someone can dramatically improve both individual performance and overall team results.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi rahbarlar kimnidir to'g'ri rag'batlantirish ham shaxsiy natijani, ham butun jamoa ko'rsatkichlarini keskin yaxshilashi mumkinligini tushunadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz motivatsiya strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A lack of confidence or emotional stability.
words.example1: He has some insecurity about his work.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizning holati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must address employee insecurity during changes.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'zgarishlar muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Addressing feelings of insecurity among team members during major organizational changes is crucial for maintaining productivity and morale.
words.example3Translation: Katta tashkiliy o'zgarishlar paytida jamoa a'zolarining o'ziga ishonchsizlik his-tuyg'ularini bartaraf etish samaradorlik va ruhiyatni saqlash uchun juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Vivid, distressing memories that resurface uncontrollably.
words.example1: He had frantic images of the past.
words.example1Situation: Siz stress haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Avoid bringing up frantic images of the past.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During high-pressure periods, many professionals experience frantic images of the past failures that can negatively impact their current decision-making.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori bosimli davrlarda ko'plab mutaxassislar o'tmishdagi muvaffaqiyatsizliklarning bezovta qiluvchi tasvirlarini boshdan kechiradilar, bu ularning joriy qarorlariga salbiy ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz stress boshqaruvi treningida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Confidential or privileged information unavailable to the public.
words.example1: I have inside knowledge about this.
words.example1Situation: Siz maxfiy ma'lumot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our consultant has inside knowledge of the industry.
words.example2Situation: Siz maslahatchi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Having inside knowledge about upcoming regulatory changes gave our company a valuable advantage in preparing for the new market conditions.
words.example3Translation: Yaqinlashib kelayotgan tartibga solish o'zgarishlari haqida ichki ma'lumotga ega bo'lish kompaniyamizga yangi bozor sharoitlariga tayyorgarlik ko'rishda muhim ustunlik berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik ustunlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To cause or lead to the emergence of something.
words.example1: This may give rise to problems.
words.example1Situation: Siz ogohlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The new policy will give rise to better results.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Rapid technological advancement can give rise to both exciting opportunities and significant challenges for businesses worldwide.
words.example3Translation: Tez texnologik taraqqiyot butun dunyo bizneslari uchun ham ajoyib imkoniyatlar, ham jiddiy qiyinchiliklarni yuzaga keltirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz innovatsiya haqida xalqaro konferensiyada gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: After examining something more carefully.
words.example1: On closer inspection, it looks fine.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror narsani tahlil qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: On closer inspection, the report revealed issues.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: On closer inspection, the promising investment opportunity turned out to have several hidden risks that were not immediately apparent.
words.example3Translation: Sinchkov ko'rib chiqilganda, istiqbolli investitsiya imkoniyati dastlab sezilmaydigan bir necha yashirin xavflarga ega ekanligi ma'lum bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz investitsiya tahlili haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Display minimal willingness or desire to do something.
words.example1: They show little inclination to change.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zgarishlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Some team members show little inclination to adopt new tools.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'qitish muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Despite multiple training sessions, several senior staff still show little inclination to adopt the new digital workflow system.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha o'qitish sessiyalariga qaramay, bir qancha yuqori lavozimli xodimlar yangi raqamli ish jarayoni tizimini qabul qilishga hali ham kam moyillik ko'rsatmoqdalar.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'zgarishlarni joriy etish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Undamaged and complete.
words.example1: The package arrived intact.
words.example1Situation: Siz yetkazib berish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our reputation remained intact.
words.example2Situation: Siz inqiroz muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Despite the difficult economic period, our core values and company culture remained intact throughout the challenging times.
words.example3Translation: Qiyin iqtisodiy davrga qaramay, bizning asosiy qadriyatlarimiz va kompaniya madaniyati qiyin paytlarda butun saqlanib qoldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya barqarorligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To become legally valid or operational.
words.example1: The new law will come into force soon.
words.example1Situation: Siz qonun haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The policy will come into force next month.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki qoida muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The updated international trade agreement will come into force at the beginning of next year, affecting many of our export operations.
words.example3Translation: Yangilangan xalqaro savdo shartnomasi kelasi yil boshida kuchga kiradi va eksport operatsiyalarimizning ko'p qismiga ta'sir qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz huquqiy o'zgarishlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To express strong emotions openly.
words.example1: He gave vent to his anger.
words.example1Situation: Siz his-tuyg'ular haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We should not give vent to frustration in meetings.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Professional environments require us to manage emotions carefully rather than give vent to frustration in front of clients or senior management.
words.example3Translation: Professional muhitlarda mijozlar yoki yuqori rahbariyat oldida g'azabni bo'shatish o'rniga his-tuyg'ularni ehtiyotkorlik bilan boshqarish talab etiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz emotsional intellekt haqida treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Moral uprightness and adherence to ethical principles.
words.example1: He is a man of integrity.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy fazilat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company values integrity above all.
words.example2Situation: Siz brending yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In today's business world, maintaining integrity even when faced with difficult choices is what truly builds long-term trust with partners and clients.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi biznes dunyosida qiyin tanlovlar oldida ham halollikni saqlash hamkorlar va mijozlar bilan uzoq muddatli ishonchni yaratadigan narsadir.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes etikasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Possess a natural tendency or ability in the arts.
words.example1: She is artistically inclined.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our design team is very artistically inclined.
words.example2Situation: Siz kreativ bo'lim haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Being artistically inclined can be a great advantage in fields such as marketing, product design, and brand development.
words.example3Translation: San'atga moyil bo'lish marketing, mahsulot dizayni va brend rivojlantirish kabi sohalarda katta afzallik bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz kreativ kasblar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Legally protected creations of the mind, such as inventions or artistic works.
words.example1: We must protect our intellectual property.
words.example1Situation: Siz huquqiy masalalar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Intellectual property is our company's greatest asset.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In the technology sector, safeguarding intellectual property has become one of the most critical aspects of maintaining competitive advantage.
words.example3Translation: Texnologiya sohasida intellektual mulkni himoya qilish raqobatbardosh ustunlikni saqlab qolishning eng muhim jihatlaridan biriga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz innovatsiya va huquq haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A sudden and powerful creative idea.
words.example1: I had a flash of inspiration.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijodiy fikr haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team had a flash of inspiration during brainstorming.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many breakthrough innovations begin with a single flash of inspiration that later requires months of dedicated work to develop into a viable product.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab inqilobiy innovatsiyalar keyinchalik bir necha oy davomidagi mashaqqatli mehnat talab qiladigan bitta ilhom chaqnashidan boshlanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijodiy jarayon haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: For the benefit or sake of something.
words.example1: In the interest of time, let's move on.
words.example1Situation: Siz vaqtni tejash haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: In the interest of our company, we must adapt.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In the interest of long-term sustainability, we have decided to invest more in renewable energy sources despite higher initial costs.
words.example3Translation: Uzoq muddatli barqarorlik manfaatida biz yuqori boshlang'ich xarajatlarga qaramay, qayta tiklanadigan energiya manbalariga ko'proq sarmoya kiritishga qaror qildik.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror rivojlanish strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To deliberately cause difficulty or emotional distress.
words.example1: Don't give me a hard time.
words.example1Situation: Siz shikoyat qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We should not give our clients a hard time.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Experienced managers know that giving team members a hard time for small mistakes can damage morale and reduce overall productivity.
words.example3Translation: Tajribali rahbarlar jamoa a'zolarini kichik xatolari uchun qiynash ruhiyatga zarar yetkazishi va umumiy samaradorlikni pasaytirishini biladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik uslublari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Impossible to imagine or accept.
words.example1: That is inconceivable.
words.example1Situation: Siz hayratlanayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Failing now is inconceivable.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoani rag'batlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: For a company that has led the industry for decades, losing its top position in such a short time seemed almost inconceivable just a few years ago.
words.example3Translation: O'nlab yillar davomida sanoatda yetakchilik qilgan kompaniya uchun qisqa vaqt ichida birinchi o'rindan tushib qolishi bir necha yil oldin deyarli tasavvur qilib bo'lmaydigan holat edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor o'zgarishlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To regard as the greatest source of anxiety.
words.example1: This is what I fear the most.
words.example1Situation: Siz qo'rquv haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: What our company fears the most is losing market share.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The thing many business leaders fear the most is becoming irrelevant in a rapidly changing technological landscape.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab biznes rahbarlari eng ko'p qo'rquv bildiradigan narsa - bu tez o'zgaruvchan texnologik muhitda dolzarbligini yo'qotishdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik va kelajak haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A temporary measure until a permanent solution is found.
words.example1: This is just an interim solution.
words.example1Situation: Siz vaqtinchalik choralar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need an interim solution for this problem.
words.example2Situation: Siz muammo muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While we develop a permanent system, this interim solution will help us maintain service quality and meet customer expectations.
words.example3Translation: Doimiy tizimni ishlab chiqayotganimizda, bu vaqtinchalik yechim xizmat sifatini saqlash va mijozlar kutganlarini qondirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Go out of your way to do something
words.pronunciation: /ɡəʊ aʊt ɒv jɔːr weɪ tuː duː ˈsʌmθɪŋ/
words.definition: To make special effort beyond what is necessary.
words.example1: She went out of her way to help.
words.example1Situation: Siz yordam haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team went out of their way to meet the deadline.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Great customer service means employees are willing to go out of their way to solve problems and exceed client expectations.
words.example3Translation: Ajoyib mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish xodimlar muammolarni hal qilish va mijozlar kutganlaridan oshib ketish uchun qo'shimcha harakat qilishga tayyor bo'lishini anglatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Showing little concern for others’ feelings or needs.
words.example1: It was inconsiderate to be late.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz bilan odob haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company does not tolerate inconsiderate behaviour.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sending emails to the entire team late at night without any urgent need is considered inconsiderate and can negatively affect work-life balance.
words.example3Translation: Hech qanday shoshilinch ehtiyoj bo'lmaganda butun jamoaga kechasi email yuborish beparvolik hisoblanadi va ish-hayot muvozanatiga salbiy ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya madaniyati haqidagi muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To experience involuntary replays of traumatic memories.
words.example1: He suffers from flashbacks.
words.example1Situation: Siz stress haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Some employees suffer from flashbacks after tough projects.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Mental health support is essential for professionals who suffer from flashbacks after experiencing high-stress situations or failures.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori stressli vaziyatlar yoki muvaffaqiyatsizliklarni boshdan kechirgan mutaxassislar uchun ruhiy salomatlik yordami juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Treatment involving professional medical action.
words.example1: He needed medical intervention.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company provides medical intervention when needed.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar salomatligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Early medical intervention can significantly reduce the long-term impact of work-related stress and prevent more serious health complications.
words.example3Translation: Erta tibbiy aralashuv ish bilan bog'liq stressning uzoq muddatli ta'sirini sezilarli darajada kamaytirishi va jiddiyroq sog'liq muammolarining oldini olishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz sog'liqni saqlash dasturi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Perform tasks mechanically without genuine engagement.
words.example1: I was just going through the motions.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zingizning holatingiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team should not just go through the motions.
words.example2Situation: Siz motivatsiya yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When employees only go through the motions, creativity decreases and the quality of work suffers significantly over time.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlar faqat mashinalik bilan ishlaganda, ijodkorlik pasayadi va ish sifati vaqt o'tishi bilan sezilarli darajada yomonlashadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa samaradorligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Involving deception or dishonesty for personal gain.
words.example1: That claim was fraudulent.
words.example1Situation: Siz nohalol xatti-harakat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company has zero tolerance for fraudulent activity.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki audit yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Fraudulent practices in business not only damage a company's reputation but can also lead to serious legal consequences and loss of stakeholder trust.
words.example3Translation: Biznesdagi firibgarlik amaliyotlari nafaqat kompaniya obro'siga putur yetkazadi, balki jiddiy huquqiy oqibatlarga va manfaatdor tomonlar ishonchini yo'qotishga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes etikasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Highly personal or private information.
words.example1: I don't share intimate details.
words.example1Situation: Siz maxfiylik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We respect our clients' intimate details.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In a professional environment, sharing intimate details about colleagues can damage trust and create unnecessary workplace tension.
words.example3Translation: Professional muhitda hamkasblar haqida shaxsiy tafsilotlarni baham ko'rish ishonchni buzishi va ish joyida ortiqcha taranglik yaratishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz ofis madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Go so far as to do something
words.pronunciation: /ɡəʊ səʊ fɑːr æz tuː duː ˈsʌmθɪŋ/
words.definition: To take an action considered extreme.
words.example1: He went so far as to quit.
words.example1Situation: Siz keskin qaror haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our competitor went so far as to lower prices.
words.example2Situation: Siz raqobat muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The company went so far as to restructure the entire department in order to adapt to the rapidly changing market demands.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya tez o'zgaruvchan bozor talablariga moslashish uchun butun bo'limni qayta tashkil etish darajasiga bordi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik o'zgarishlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Feeling irritable or bad-tempered.
words.example1: He is in a foul mood today.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizning holati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager was in a foul mood after the meeting.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilishdan keyin bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When leaders come to work in a foul mood, it can negatively influence the entire team atmosphere and reduce overall productivity.
words.example3Translation: Rahbarlar yomon kayfiyatda ishga kelganda, bu butun jamoa muhitiga salbiy ta'sir qilishi va umumiy samaradorlikni pasaytirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik va emotsional intellekt haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: It goes against the grain to do something
words.pronunciation: /ɪt ɡəʊz əˈɡenst ðə ɡreɪn tuː duː ˈsʌmθɪŋ/
words.definition: To conflict with one’s natural tendencies or principles.
words.example1: It goes against the grain for me.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy qadriyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: It goes against the grain for our company to cut corners.
words.example2Situation: Siz brend qadriyatlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: For a company known for quality, it goes against the grain to reduce standards even when facing strong price competition from rivals.
words.example3Translation: Sifati bilan mashhur bo'lgan kompaniya uchun raqobatchilarning kuchli narx raqobatiga qaramay standartlarni pasaytirish o'z tabiatiga zid keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qadriyatlar va qarorlar haqida strategik muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: In addition; as an extra benefit or drawback.
words.example1: It's good quality into the bargain.
words.example1Situation: Siz mahsulot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We got the contract and good terms into the bargain.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The new partnership not only expanded our market reach but also brought valuable technological expertise into the bargain.
words.example3Translation: Yangi hamkorlik nafaqat bozordagi mavqeimizni kengaytirdi, balki ustiga-ustak qimmatli texnologik tajribani ham olib keldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hamkorlik natijalari haqida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To pursue the same path or career as another.
words.example1: I want to follow in his footsteps.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilhom haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Many young employees follow in our founder's footsteps.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya tarixi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: She successfully followed in her mentor's footsteps and became one of the youngest executives in the company's history.
words.example3Translation: U o'z ustozining izidan muvaffaqiyatli borib, kompaniya tarixidagi eng yosh rahbarlardan biriga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera rivoji haqidagi panelda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unwillingness to accept or respect differing religious beliefs.
words.example1: We must fight religious intolerance.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy mavzular haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company promotes diversity and rejects religious intolerance.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Modern global companies actively work to eliminate any form of religious intolerance to create truly inclusive and respectful work environments.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy global kompaniyalar chinakam inklyuziv va hurmatga asoslangan ish muhitini yaratish uchun har qanday diniy bag'ritorlikni bartaraf etish ustida faol ishlamoqdalar.
words.example3Situation: Siz xilma-xillik va inklyuziya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To increase suddenly and dramatically or become extremely angry.
words.example1: Prices have gone through the roof.
words.example1Situation: Siz narxlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sales went through the roof last month.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo hisobotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the CEO discovered the serious mistake in the financial report, his anger went through the roof, but it led to important improvements in our control system.
words.example3Translation: Bosh direktor moliyaviy hisobotdagi jiddiy xatoni aniqlaganda, uning g'azabi keskin oshdi, ammo bu bizning nazorat tizimimizda muhim yaxshilanishlarga olib keldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz va yaxshilanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To deliberately ignite something.
words.example1: Be careful not to set it on fire.
words.example1Situation: Siz ehtiyotkorlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our new campaign set the market on fire.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The innovative presentation delivered by our young specialist literally set the conference on fire and earned standing ovation from the audience.
words.example3Translation: Yosh mutaxassisimiz bergan innovatsion taqdimot konferensiyani tom ma'noda yondirdi va tomoshabinlardan olqish oldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyatli chiqish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A narrative that strongly arouses curiosity or interest.
words.example1: That was an intriguing story.
words.example1Situation: Siz suhbat mavzusi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our founder has an intriguing story of success.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya tarixi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Every successful brand has an intriguing story behind its creation that helps customers emotionally connect with the product.
words.example3Translation: Har bir muvaffaqiyatli brendning yaratilishi ortida mijozlarga mahsulot bilan emotsional bog'lanishga yordam beradigan qiziqarli hikoyasi bor.
words.example3Situation: Siz brending strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The outcome is highly uncertain.
words.example1: It's touch and go right now.
words.example1Situation: Siz noaniq vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The negotiation is touch and go at the moment.
words.example2Situation: Siz muzokaralar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The project deadline is approaching and it is touch and go whether we will finish everything on time without additional resources.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha muddati yaqinlashmoqda va qo'shimcha resurslarsiz hamma narsani o'z vaqtida yakunlashimiz noaniq holatda.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha holati haqida rahbariyat oldida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To consume eagerly or take great pleasure in.
words.example1: We feasted on delicious food.
words.example1Situation: Siz ovqat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team feasted on the success.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyatni nishonlash haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Participants feasted on the latest industry insights and innovative ideas presented during the international conference.
words.example3Translation: Ishtirokchilar xalqaro konferensiyada taqdim etilgan so'nggi sanoat yangiliklari va innovatsion g'oyalardan zavq bilan bahramand bo'lishdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz konferensiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Do someone the world of good
words.definition: To greatly benefit someone emotionally or physically.
words.example1: A break would do you the world of good.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Team building will do our staff the world of good.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Taking a proper vacation after months of intensive work can do someone the world of good and significantly improve both performance and creativity upon return.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha oy intensiv ishlagandan keyin to'g'ri dam olish kimdir uchun juda foydali bo'lib, qaytib kelganda ham natija, ham ijodkorlikni sezilarli oshirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An essential and inseparable component.
words.example1: It is an intrinsic part of our culture.
words.example1Situation: Siz kompaniya madaniyati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Innovation is an intrinsic part of our strategy.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Continuous learning has become an intrinsic part of successful careers in today's rapidly evolving professional environment.
words.example3Translation: Doimiy o'rganish bugungi tez rivojlanayotgan professional muhitda muvaffaqiyatli karyeraning ajralmas qismiga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An achievement requiring exceptional skill or effort.
words.example1: That was a remarkable feat.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Completing the project was a remarkable feat.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha yakunlanishi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Finishing the complex international project two weeks ahead of schedule was a remarkable feat that earned the team well-deserved recognition.
words.example3Translation: Murakkab xalqaro loyihani muddatdan ikki hafta oldin yakunlash jamoaga munosib e'tirof keltirgan ajoyib yutuq edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat hikoyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Elegant, controlled, and refined behaviour.
words.example1: She handled it in a graceful manner.
words.example1Situation: Siz odob haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager always acts in a graceful manner.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even when facing difficult criticism, responding in a graceful manner helps maintain respect and professionalism in the workplace.
words.example3Translation: Qiyin tanqidga duch kelganda ham naqis odob bilan javob berish ish joyida hurmat va professionallikni saqlashga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz konfliktlarni hal qilish haqida treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A person who is inward-focused and socially reserved.
words.example1: He is a typical introvert.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy xususiyatlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Many introverts excel in our technical teams.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Introverts often bring deep focus and thoughtful analysis to projects, making them valuable members of any high-performing team.
words.example3Translation: Introvertlar ko'pincha loyihalarga chuqur e'tibor va o'ylangan tahlil olib keladilar, bu ularni har qanday yuqori natijali jamoaning qimmatli a'zolariga aylantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa tarkibi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To tackle a difficult problem decisively.
words.example1: We need to grasp the nettle.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammo haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our leadership decided to grasp the nettle.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Successful managers know when to grasp the nettle and address difficult personnel issues before they affect the entire team performance.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli rahbarlar qachon qiyin kadr masalalarini hal qilish kerakligini biladilar, chunki ular butun jamoa natijasiga ta'sir qilishidan oldin bartaraf etilishi lozim.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik qiyinchiliklari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An unconvincing or weak justification.
words.example1: That's a feeble excuse.
words.example1Situation: Siz bahona haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We don't accept feeble excuses.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Offering a feeble excuse for missing an important deadline only damages professional credibility and trust within the organization.
words.example3Translation: Muhim muddatni o'tkazib yuborish uchun zaif bahona keltirish faqat professional ishonchlilik va tashkilot ichidagi ishonchni buzadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mas'uliyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unemployed.
words.example1: He is out of a job now.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must avoid making people out of a job.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During the restructuring process, the company made every effort to retrain staff rather than leave them out of a job.

words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz kommunikatsiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.example3Situation: Siz strategik rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To satisfy a demand or requirement.

words.definition: To relax and behave freely without restraint.
