words.example3: The collaboration started on the wrong foot due to poor communication, but both sides worked hard to improve the relationship.
words.example3Translation: Hamkorlik yomon muloqot tufayli noto'g'ri boshlandi, lekin ikkala tomon ham munosabatlarni yaxshilash uchun ko'p mehnat qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hamkorlik va muloqot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: As a result of someone’s actions, often harmful.
words.example1: The company suffered at the hands of poor management.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyatsizlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Many projects fail at the hands of bad planning.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muammolari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The small business nearly collapsed at the hands of dishonest suppliers who repeatedly failed to deliver on time.
words.example3Translation: Kichik biznes doimiy ravishda muddatida yetkazib bermaydigan insofsiz yetkazib beruvchilar tufayli deyarli qulash arafasiga keldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavf-xatarlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To identify the exact cause of a problem.
words.example1: I can't quite put my finger on it.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammo sababini izlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The manager put his finger on the real issue.
words.example2Situation: Siz tahlil haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After careful analysis, she was finally able to put her finger on the main reason for the declining sales figures.
words.example3Translation: Sinchkov tahlildan so'ng, u savdo ko'rsatkichlarining pasayishining asosiy sababini aniqlay oldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammo tahlili haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To gain control or advantage over others.
words.example1: We need to get the upper hand.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqobat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team got the upper hand in the negotiation.
words.example2Situation: Siz muzokaralar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: By improving product quality and customer service, the company managed to get the upper hand over its main competitors.
words.example3Translation: Mahsulot sifati va mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatishni yaxshilash orqali kompaniya asosiy raqobatchilari ustidan ustunlikka erishdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqobatbardoshlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To take a reckless risk likely to have serious consequences.
words.example1: Don't play with fire by skipping safety checks.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingizga xavf haqida maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company cannot play with fire when it comes to data security.
words.example2Situation: Siz xavfsizlik yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Entering new markets without proper research is playing with fire, as one wrong move can damage the company's reputation for years.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqot o'tkazmasdan yangi bozorlarga kirish olov bilan o'ynashdir, chunki bitta noto'g'ri qadam kompaniya obro'sini yillar davomida buzishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik xavflar haqida xalqaro konferensiyada gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To strike a surface forcefully to show anger or emphasis.
words.example1: He banged his fist on the table.
words.example1Situation: Siz g'azab haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager banged his fist during the meeting.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although he was tempted to bang his fist on the table in frustration, he chose a more professional approach to resolve the conflict.
words.example3Translation: G'azabdan stolga musht urishga ishtiyoqi bo'lsa ham, u mojarolarni hal qilish uchun professionalroq yondashuvni tanladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz emotsional intellekt haqidagi treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Take the law into your own hands
words.pronunciation: /teɪk ðə lɔː ˈɪntuː jɔːr əʊn hændz/
words.definition: To act independently of legal authority, often violently or illegally.
words.example1: You can't take the law into your own hands.
words.example1Situation: Siz huquqiy masalalar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company never takes the law into its own hands.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki siyosat muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: No matter how frustrated we become with slow legal processes, we must never take the law into our own hands as it can destroy our credibility.
words.example3Translation: Qonuniy jarayonlar sekinligidan qanchalik g'azablansak ham, hech qachon qonunni o'z qo'limizga olmasligimiz kerak, chunki bu bizning ishonchliligimizni yo'q qilishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes etikasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: O'zingizga qanday to'g'ri ko'rinsa, shunday qiling
words.definition: To act according to your own judgement.
words.example1: Do as you see fit.
words.example1Situation: Siz mas'uliyatni topshirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: You can do as you see fit with this budget.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: I trust your expertise on this matter, so please do as you see fit and keep me updated on the progress.
words.example3Translation: Men bu masalada sizning tajribangizga ishonaman, shuning uchun o'zingizga qanday to'g'ri ko'rinsa shunday qiling va jarayon haqida meni xabardor qiling.
words.example3Situation: Siz delegatsiya haqida rahbariyat yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To rest and relax.
words.example1: After work, I like to put my feet up.
words.example1Situation: Siz dam olish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our employees deserve to put their feet up after the project.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After successfully closing the biggest deal of the year, the whole team was encouraged to put their feet up and recharge before the next challenge.
words.example3Translation: Yilning eng katta bitimini muvaffaqiyatli yakunlagandan so'ng, butun jamoaga keyingi vazifadan oldin dam olish va kuch to'plash tavsiya qilindi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To deal with or manage a situation competently.
words.example1: She handled the situation well.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijobiy xatti-harakat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team can handle difficult clients.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The way our manager handled the crisis demonstrated exceptional leadership skills and earned respect from both employees and clients.
words.example3Translation: Rahbarimiz inqirozni qanday hal qilgani ajoyib rahbarlik mahoratini ko'rsatdi va ham xodimlar, ham mijozlar hurmatini qozondi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik haqida treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To perform an action stylishly and confidently.
words.example1: She always does her work with flair.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our design team does everything with flair.
words.example2Situation: Siz kreativ bo'lim haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The presenter delivered the complex technical information with such flair that even non-specialists were fully engaged throughout the session.
words.example3Translation: Taqdimotchi murakkab texnik ma'lumotni shunday did bilan yetkazib berdiki, hatto mutaxassis bo'lmaganlar ham butun sessiya davomida faol ishtirok etishdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz taqdimot mahorati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A large financial gain.
words.example1: We made a handsome profit.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This investment brought us a handsome profit.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy hisobotda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After months of careful planning and market research, the new product line generated a handsome profit that exceeded all our initial expectations.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha oy davomidagi sinchkov rejalashtirish va bozor tadqiqotidan so'ng, yangi mahsulot yo'nalishi barcha dastlabki kutganlarimizdan oshib ketgan katta foyda keltirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes natijalari haqida rahbariyat oldida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To catch fire suddenly and violently.
words.example1: The car burst into flames.
words.example1Situation: Siz baxtsiz hodisa haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The situation almost burst into flames.
words.example2Situation: Siz mojarolar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The heated argument between the two departments nearly burst into flames before senior management stepped in to calm the situation.
words.example3Translation: Ikki bo'lim o'rtasidagi qizg'in bahs rahbariyat aralashib, vaziyatni tinchlantirmaguncha deyarli yonib ketish arafasida edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz konfliktlarni boshqarish haqida muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To prove useful when needed.
words.example1: This tool will come in handy.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Knowing Spanish will come in handy on this trip.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro loyiha haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The negotiation skills I learned years ago came in handy during the recent high-stakes contract discussions with our international partners.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha yil oldin o'rgangan muzokara ko'nikmalarim yaqinda xalqaro hamkorlar bilan o'tkazilgan muhim shartnoma muzokaralarida juda foydali bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ko'nikmalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To appear suddenly on a screen or surface.
words.example1: A warning flashed up on the screen.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnik muammo haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Important notifications flash up during meetings.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofis texnologiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A breaking news alert flashed up on everyone's screens, causing an immediate shift in focus during the strategy meeting.
words.example3Translation: Strategik yig'ilish paytida hamma ekranlarida shoshilinch yangilik xabarnomasi to'satdan paydo bo'lib, diqqatni darhol o'zgartirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli kommunikatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To gain knowledge through unpleasant experience.
words.example1: I learned the hard way.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy xato haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team learned the hard way about market research.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha tahlilida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many entrepreneurs learn the hard way that ignoring customer feedback can lead to costly mistakes and lost opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab tadbirkorlar mijozlar fikr-mulohazasini e'tiborga olmaslik qimmat xatolarga va o'tkazib yuborilgan imkoniyatlarga olib kelishini og'riqli tajriba orqali o'rganadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes saboqlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To manage to survive financially or emotionally.
words.example1: We're just keeping our head above water.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin davr haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our department is keeping its head above water.
words.example2Situation: Siz byudjet muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During the economic downturn, many small businesses struggled to keep their head above water while waiting for the market to recover.
words.example3Translation: Iqtisodiy pasayish davrida ko'plab kichik bizneslar bozor tiklanishini kutib, suv ustida qolish uchun kurashdilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz davridagi boshqaruv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Seriously imperfect in fundamental ways.
words.example1: The plan is deeply flawed.
words.example1Situation: Siz tanqid haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This approach is deeply flawed.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although the original idea was promising, the execution strategy proved to be deeply flawed, requiring a complete overhaul.
words.example3Translation: Garchi asl g'oya istiqbolli bo'lsa ham, uni amalga oshirish strategiyasi jiddiy nuqsonli bo'lib chiqdi va to'liq qayta ko'rib chiqishni talab qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha tahlili haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Despite; even though.
words.example1: For all his efforts, he failed.
words.example1Situation: Siz harakat va natija haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: For all our hard work, the results were disappointing.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: For all the challenges we faced this year, we still managed to achieve record growth in our core business areas.
words.example3Translation: Bu yil boshdan kechirgan barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay, biz asosiy biznes yo'nalishlarida rekord o'sishga erishdik.
words.example3Situation: Siz yillik natijalar haqida rahbariyat oldida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To laugh uncontrollably.
words.example1: We laughed our heads off.
words.example1Situation: Siz kulgili voqea haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team laughed their heads off at the joke.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During the team building event, the hilarious stories shared by our colleagues had everyone laughing their heads off and strengthened team bonds.
words.example3Translation: Jamoaviy tadbir paytida hamkasblarimiz aytgan kulgili hikoyalar barchani qattiq kuldirib, jamoa aloqalarini mustahkamladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoaviy tadbirlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To look quickly through pages or content.
words.example1: I flicked through the report.
words.example1Situation: Siz tez ko'rib chiqish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our director flicked through the proposal.
words.example2Situation: Siz taqdimot oldidan bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Before the important meeting, she quickly flicked through the latest market research to refresh her knowledge of current trends.
words.example3Translation: Muhim uchrashuv oldidan u joriy tendensiyalarni yangilash uchun so'nggi bozor tadqiqotini tez varaqlab ko'rdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tayyorgarlik jarayoni haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The results or rewards of effort.
words.example1: These are the fruits of our labour.
words.example1Situation: Siz mehnat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We are enjoying the fruits of our success.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After years of dedicated research and development, the team is finally enjoying the fruits of their persistent efforts.
words.example3Translation: Yillar davomidagi sadoqatli tadqiqot va ishlab chiqishdan so'ng, jamoa nihoyat o'zlarining tinmaydigan mehnatlarining mevalaridan bahramand bo'lmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz uzoq muddatli loyihalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Have a roof over your head
words.definition: To have a place to live.
words.example1: At least you have a roof over your head.
words.example1Situation: Siz tasalli berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company helps employees have a roof over their head.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar yordami haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even during difficult financial periods, ensuring every employee has a roof over their head remains one of our core social responsibilities.
words.example3Translation: Qiyin moliyaviy davrlarda ham har bir xodimning boshpanasi borligini ta'minlash bizning asosiy ijtimoiy mas'uliyatlarimizdan biridir.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ ijtimoiy mas'uliyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To receive a large number of things at once.
words.example1: We were flooded with orders.
words.example1Situation: Siz savdo muvaffaqiyati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our support team was flooded with requests.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar xizmati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After the successful product launch, our customer service department was flooded with positive feedback and new inquiries from around the world.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli mahsulot chiqarilishidan keyin mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish bo'limi butun dunyodan ijobiy fikrlar va yangi so'rovlar bilan to'lib ketdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz marketing kampaniyasi natijalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To express genuine emotions openly.
words.example1: It's good to open your heart sometimes.
words.example1Situation: Siz his-tuyg'ular haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team leader encouraged us to open our hearts.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Great leaders know when to open their hearts and share vulnerabilities, which helps build deeper trust and stronger connections with their teams.
words.example3Translation: Buyuk rahbarlar qachon yuraklarini ochib, zaif tomonlarini baham ko'rish kerakligini biladilar, bu jamoa bilan chuqurroq ishonch va mustahkam aloqa o'rnatishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik va emotsional intellekt haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To grow or develop successfully.
words.example1: The business is flourishing.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our new department is starting to flourish.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Companies that invest in employee wellbeing and professional growth tend to flourish even during challenging economic conditions.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlar farovonligi va professional o'sishga sarmoya kiritadigan kompaniyalar hatto qiyin iqtisodiy sharoitlarda ham gullab-yashnaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To adapt easily to circumstances without resistance.
words.example1: Sometimes it's best to go with the flow.
words.example1Situation: Siz moslashuvchanlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team learned to go with the flow during changes.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'zgarishlar muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While having clear plans is important, successful professionals also know when to go with the flow and seize unexpected opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Aniq rejalarga ega bo'lish muhim bo'lsa ham, muvaffaqiyatli mutaxassislar qachon oqimga qo'shilib, kutilmagan imkoniyatlardan foydalanishni ham biladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz moslashuvchanlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be deeply affected emotionally.
words.example1: Don't take it to heart.
words.example1Situation: Siz tasalli berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We shouldn't take criticism to heart too much.
words.example2Situation: Siz fikr-mulohaza muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While it is good to learn from feedback, we should not take every negative comment to heart, as it can affect our confidence and performance.
words.example3Translation: Fikr-mulohazalardan o'rganish yaxshi bo'lsa ham, har bir salbiy sharhni yurakka yaqin olmasligimiz kerak, chunki bu o'ziga bo'lgan ishonch va natijaga ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz emotsional chidamlilik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: For the advantage or welfare of someone.
words.example1: I did it for your benefit.
words.example1Situation: Siz yordam haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This training is for everyone's benefit.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'qitish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The new flexible working policy was introduced for everyone's benefit to improve work-life balance and overall productivity.
words.example3Translation: Yangi moslashuvchan ish siyosati ish-hayot muvozanatini va umumiy samaradorlikni yaxshilash uchun barchaning manfaati uchun joriy etildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi dasturi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Time seems to pass very quickly.
words.example1: Time flies when you're busy.
words.example1Situation: Siz vaqt haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Time flies when we work on exciting projects.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It's amazing how time flies when you are fully engaged in meaningful work that aligns with your personal and professional goals.
words.example3Translation: Shaxsiy va professional maqsadlaringizga mos keladigan mazmunli ish bilan to'liq band bo'lganingizda vaqtning qanchalik tez o'tishi hayratlanarli.
words.example3Situation: Siz vaqt boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To imitate someone’s actions or behaviour.
words.example1: I try to follow her example.
words.example1Situation: Siz ilhom haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team follows the manager's example.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Young professionals who follow the example of ethical and hardworking leaders usually achieve faster career growth and greater respect.
words.example3Translation: Axloqiy va mehnatkash rahbarlar namunasi bo'yicha ish tutadigan yosh mutaxassislar odatda tezroq karyera o'sishi va kattaroq hurmatga erishadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To alter one’s opinion or feelings.
words.example1: She had a change of heart.
words.example1Situation: Siz fikr o'zgarishi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our client had a change of heart about the contract.
words.example2Situation: Siz muzokaralar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After listening to the team's concerns, the manager had a change of heart and decided to postpone the deadline to ensure better quality.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa tashvishlarini tinglagandan so'ng, rahbar fikrini o'zgartirib, yaxshiroq sifatni ta'minlash uchun muddatni kechiktirishga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moslashuvchan rahbarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be performing particularly well.
words.example1: You're on good form today.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijobiy kayfiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sales team is on good form this quarter.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the whole team is on good form, productivity increases dramatically and creative solutions emerge more naturally.
words.example3Translation: Butun jamoa yaxshi holatda bo'lganda, samaradorlik keskin oshadi va ijodiy yechimlar tabiiyroq paydo bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa samaradorligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To develop a personal judgement.
words.example1: I haven't formed an opinion yet.
words.example1Situation: Siz hali qaror qabul qilmaganingizda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need more data to form an opinion.
words.example2Situation: Siz tahlil yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It is important to gather sufficient information from multiple sources before forming an opinion on complex business matters.
words.example3Translation: Murakkab biznes masalalari bo'yicha fikr bildirishdan oldin bir necha manbadan yetarli ma'lumot to'plash muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz qaror qabul qilish jarayoni haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Organised in levels of authority or rank.
words.example1: The company has a hierarchical structure.
words.example1Situation: Siz tashkilot tuzilishi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company follows a hierarchical decision-making process.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki boshqaruv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In many traditional organizations, the hierarchical system ensures clear lines of responsibility but can sometimes slow down innovation and quick decision-making.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab an'anaviy tashkilotlarda ierarxik tizim mas'uliyatning aniq chegaralarini ta'minlaydi, ammo ba'zida innovatsiya va tez qaror qabul qilishni sekinlashtirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashkiliy boshqaruv haqidagi konferensiyada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An extremely difficult or demanding undertaking.
words.example1: This is a formidable task.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin ish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Completing the project on time is a formidable task.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Transforming our outdated IT infrastructure into a modern digital system within six months is undoubtedly a formidable task that will test the entire team's capabilities.
words.example3Translation: Eskirgan IT infratuzilmamizni olti oy ichida zamonaviy raqamli tizimga aylantirish butun jamoa imkoniyatlarini sinaydigan juda qiyin vazifadir.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik loyihalar haqida rahbariyat oldida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To lack evidence or justification.
words.example1: These claims have no foundation.
words.example1Situation: Siz mish-mishlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The criticism has no foundation.
words.example2Situation: Siz fikr-mulohaza muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The concerns raised about the safety of our new product have no foundation and are based purely on speculation rather than actual data.
words.example3Translation: Yangi mahsulotimiz xavfsizligi haqida bildirilgan tashvishlar asossiz bo'lib, haqiqiy ma'lumot o'rniga faqat taxminlarga asoslangan.
words.example3Situation: Siz brend obro'si haqidagi muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An economic system vulnerable to disruption.
words.example1: We have a fragile economy.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqtisodiy holat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The country is dealing with a fragile economy.
words.example2Situation: Siz biznes muhiti haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In a fragile economy, businesses must remain flexible and prepared to adapt quickly to sudden changes in market conditions and government policies.
words.example3Translation: Mo'rt iqtisodiyotda bizneslar bozor sharoitlari va hukumat siyosatidagi to'satdan o'zgarishlarga tez moslashishga tayyor va moslashuvchan bo'lishlari kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz iqtisodiy prognoz haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A light, subtle, and pleasant scent.
words.example1: The flowers have a delicate fragrance.
words.example1Situation: Siz atrof-muhit haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our new product has a delicate fragrance.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahsulot taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The delicate fragrance of the new perfume line perfectly reflects the brand's image of elegance and sophistication.
words.example3Translation: Yangi atir seriyasining nozik xushbo'y hidi brendning nafislik va naqislik obrazini mukammal aks ettiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz brending strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To escape from restrictions or control.
words.example1: She wants to break free from her routine.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy o'zgarish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is trying to break free from old practices.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many professionals dream of breaking free from traditional corporate structures to pursue more creative and fulfilling career paths.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab mutaxassislar an'anaviy korporativ tuzilmalardan ozod bo'lib, yanada ijodiy va mazmunli karyera yo'llarini tanlashni orzu qiladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera rivoji haqidagi panelda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A marginal or peripheral group or area.
words.example1: They live on the fringe of society.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy mavzular haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We focus on the mainstream, not the fringe.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Innovative ideas often start on the fringe of the industry before eventually becoming mainstream practices adopted by major corporations.
words.example3Translation: Innovatsion g'oyalar ko'pincha sanoatning chekkasida boshlanadi va keyinchalik yirik korporatsiyalar tomonidan asosiy amaliyotga aylantiriladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz innovatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A system of ranking or organisation by levels.
words.example1: The company has a clear hierarchy.
words.example1Situation: Siz tashkilot tuzilishi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We are working to flatten the hierarchy.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki o'zgarishlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Modern organizations are increasingly moving away from rigid hierarchy toward more collaborative structures to encourage innovation and faster decision-making.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy tashkilotlar innovatsiyani rag'batlantirish va tezroq qaror qabul qilish uchun qattiq ierarxiyadan hamkorlikka asoslangan tuzilmalarga o'tmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz zamonaviy boshqaruv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The most advanced or unexplored limits of a field.
words.example1: We work at the frontiers of technology.
words.example1Situation: Siz innovatsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our research is at the frontiers of AI.
words.example2Situation: Siz R&D bo'limi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our company is proud to be working at the frontiers of sustainable energy solutions, developing technologies that will shape the future of the industry.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyamiz sanoat kelajagini shakllantiradigan texnologiyalarni ishlab chiqib, barqaror energiya yechimlarining eng oldingi chegaralarida ishlashdan faxrlanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchi texnologiyalar haqida xalqaro konferensiyada gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To furrow the brow as an expression of concern or displeasure.
words.example1: She frowned at the news.
words.example1Situation: Siz noxush vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The boss frowned during the presentation.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even when faced with challenging feedback, he tried not to frown and instead focused on finding constructive solutions to the issues raised.
words.example3Translation: Qiyin fikr-mulohazalarga duch kelganda ham u qovog'ini solmaslikka harakat qilib, ko'tarilgan masalalarni hal qilish uchun konstruktiv yechimlarni izlashga e'tibor qaratdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional munosabat haqida treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Under the influence of narcotic substances.
words.example1: He was high on drugs.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq yoki xavfsizlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We have strict rules against coming to work high on drugs.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki qoidalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Any employee found high on drugs at the workplace will face immediate disciplinary action, including possible termination.
words.example3Translation: Ish joyida giyohvand moddalar ta'sirida topilgan har qanday xodimga darhol intizomiy choralar, shu jumladan ishdan bo'shatish qo'llaniladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavfsizlik va intizom haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To produce positive results.
words.example1: Our efforts are starting to bear fruit.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The new strategy is beginning to bear fruit.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After two years of consistent investment in employee training, our patience is finally bearing fruit with significantly improved performance across all departments.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlarni o'qitishga ikki yil davomida izchil sarmoya kiritgandan so'ng, sabrimiz nihoyat barcha bo'limlarda sezilarli yaxshilangan natijalar bilan meva bermoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz uzoq muddatli strategiyalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To praise or express strong approval of someone.
words.example1: Everyone speaks highly of her.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbni maqtayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Clients always speak highly of our support team.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar fikri haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our CEO speaks highly of the team that successfully delivered the project under extreme pressure and tight deadlines.
words.example3Translation: Bosh direktorimiz o'ta bosim va qattiq muddatlar ostida loyihani muvaffaqiyatli yakunlagan jamoani yuqori baholaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Work that provides personal satisfaction and purpose.
words.example1: This is a very fulfilling job.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We aim to create fulfilling jobs for our employees.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Finding a fulfilling job that aligns with your values and strengths is one of the most important factors for long-term career happiness and success.
words.example3Translation: Qadriyatlaringiz va kuchli tomonlaringizga mos keladigan ruhiy jihatdan qoniqarli ish topish uzoq muddatli karyera baxti va muvaffaqiyati uchun eng muhim omillardan biridir.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera va motivatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Attracting significant public attention.
words.example1: This is a high-profile project.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhim loyiha haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We signed a high-profile client.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Being chosen to lead this high-profile international project is a great opportunity to showcase our team's capabilities on a global stage.
words.example3Translation: Ushbu yuqori darajadagi xalqaro loyihani boshqarishga tanlanish jamoamiz imkoniyatlarini global miqyosda namoyish etish uchun ajoyib imkoniyatdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz muhim loyihalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be extremely busy or burdened.
words.example1: I have my hands full right now.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish yuklamasi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our department has its hands full with the new launch.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha holati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During the peak season, the customer service team usually has their hands full, which is why we hire temporary staff to maintain service quality.
words.example3Translation: Qizg'in mavsumda mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish jamoasi odatda qo'llari band bo'ladi, shuning uchun xizmat sifatini saqlash uchun vaqtinchalik xodimlar yollaymiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish yukini boshqarish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Lacking logical reasoning.
words.example1: His reaction was irrational.
words.example1Situation: Siz xatti-harakat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must avoid making irrational decisions.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Making important business decisions based on emotions rather than data is often considered irrational and can lead to costly mistakes.
words.example3Translation: Muhim biznes qarorlarini ma'lumot o'rniga his-tuyg'ularga asoslab qabul qilish ko'pincha mantiqsiz hisoblanadi va qimmat xatolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz qaror qabul qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To restrain intense anger.
words.example1: You need to control your fury.
words.example1Situation: Siz emotsional nazorat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Leaders must learn to control their fury.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik treningida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The ability to control your fury in difficult situations is one of the key qualities that separates good leaders from average ones.
words.example3Translation: Qiyin vaziyatlarda g'azabingizni boshqarish qobiliyati yaxshi rahbarlarni oddiy rahbarlardan ajratib turadigan asosiy fazilatlardan biridir.
words.example3Situation: Siz emotsional intellekt haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To obstruct or delay progress.
words.example1: This problem will hinder our progress.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammo haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must not let bureaucracy hinder innovation.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Poor internal communication can seriously hinder the company's ability to respond quickly to market changes.
words.example3Translation: Ichki aloqaning yomonligi kompaniyaning bozor o'zgarishlariga tez javob berish qobiliyatiga jiddiy xalaqit berishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz jarayonlarni yaxshilash haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Someone who is very selective about food.
words.example1: He is a fussy eater.
words.example1Situation: Siz kundalik hayot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We accommodate fussy eaters at our events.
words.example2Situation: Siz tadbir tashkil qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Organizing catering for a large corporate event with many fussy eaters requires careful planning and multiple menu options.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p tanlab ovqatlanuvchilar ishtirok etadigan katta korporativ tadbir uchun ovqat tashkil qilish sinchkov rejalashtirish va bir nechta menyuni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tadbirlar boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A smile that is highly attractive and charming.
words.example1: She has an irresistible smile.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy fazilat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The receptionist welcomed us with an irresistible smile.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar xizmati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Her irresistible smile and positive attitude helped ease the tension during the difficult client negotiation.
words.example3Translation: Uning qaytarib bo'lmaydigan tabassumi va ijobiy munosabati qiyin mijoz bilan muzokaralar paytida taranglikni yumshatishga yordam berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muloqot mahorati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A small or barely noticeable amount.
words.example1: There was a hint of sarcasm in his voice.
words.example1Situation: Siz nozik vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The report showed a hint of improvement.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot tahlilida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: There was just a hint of disappointment in the client's feedback, which we quickly addressed to maintain our strong relationship.
words.example3Translation: Mijozning fikr-mulohazasida bir oz umidsizlik belgisi bor edi, biz uni tezda hal qilib, kuchli munosabatlarni saqlab qoldik.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan ishlash haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Without regard to; regardless of.
words.example1: Irrespective of the cost, we must do it.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhim qaror haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We treat all employees equally, irrespective of position.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya qadriyatlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: All team members will receive the same training opportunities, irrespective of their current level or department.
words.example3Translation: Barcha jamoa a'zolari hozirgi darajasi yoki bo'limidan qat'iy nazar bir xil o'qitish imkoniyatlariga ega bo'ladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz tenglik va adolat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To become extremely angry.
words.example1: He hit the roof when he heard the news.
words.example1Situation: Siz g'azab haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The boss hit the roof after the mistake.
words.example2Situation: Siz xato muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the CEO discovered the serious delay in the project, he hit the roof, but later calmed down and focused on finding solutions.
words.example3Translation: Bosh direktor loyihadagi jiddiy kechikishni aniqlagach, g'azabdan portladi, ammo keyin tinchlanib, yechim topishga e'tibor qaratdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Harm that cannot be undone or repaired.
words.example1: This could cause irreversible damage.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavf haqida ogohlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must avoid irreversible damage to our reputation.
words.example2Situation: Siz brend muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Posting inappropriate content on company social media can cause irreversible damage to both personal and corporate reputation.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya ijtimoiy tarmoqlarida noo'rin kontent joylashtirish ham shaxsiy, ham korporativ obro'ga qaytarib bo'lmaydigan zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli obro' haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be logically sound or credible.
words.example1: This argument doesn't hold water.
words.example1Situation: Siz tanqid qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Your excuse doesn't hold water.
words.example2Situation: Siz bahona haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The proposed solution doesn't hold water under closer examination, as it fails to address several key technical challenges.
words.example3Translation: Taklif qilingan yechim chuqurroq ko'rib chiqilganda mantiqiy emas, chunki u bir nechta asosiy texnik qiyinchiliklarni hal qilmaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tahlil va baholash haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Easily annoyed or impatient.
words.example1: He is very irritable today.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning holati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Stress makes people more irritable.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish yuklamasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Working long hours without proper rest can make even the most patient employees irritable and reduce overall team performance.
words.example3Translation: To'g'ri dam olmasdan uzoq soatlar ishlash hatto eng sabrli xodimlarni ham tez asabiylashtirishi va butun jamoa natijasini pasaytirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz stress va farovonlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A single occurrence not part of a wider pattern.
words.example1: This is just an isolated case.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammo haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We believe this was an isolated case.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijoz shikoyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After thorough investigation, we concluded that the security breach was an isolated case and not part of a larger systemic issue.
words.example3Translation: Chuqur tergovdan so'ng biz xavfsizlik buzilishi alohida holat bo'lib, kengroq tizimli muammoning bir qismi emas degan xulosaga keldik.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz va xavfsizlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To make sound, well-reasoned decisions based on insight and experience.
words.example1: She has very good judgement.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy fazilat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager has excellent judgement.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Leaders with good judgement know how to balance data, experience, and intuition when making important strategic decisions.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi qaror qabul qilish qobiliyatiga ega rahbarlar muhim strategik qarorlar qabul qilishda ma'lumotlar, tajriba va intuitsiyani muvozanatlashtirishni biladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik fazilatlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To suffer negative consequences for one’s actions.
words.example1: You will pay the price later.
words.example1Situation: Siz ogohlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Companies that ignore customer feedback eventually pay the price.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Businesses that cut corners on quality usually pay the price through lost customer trust and declining sales in the long run.
words.example3Translation: Sifatni tejaydigan bizneslar odatda mijozlar ishonchini yo'qotish va uzoq muddatda savdoning pasayishi orqali narxini to'laydilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz sifat va obro' haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To create loud, disruptive noise.
words.example1: The kids are making a racket outside.
words.example1Situation: Siz kundalik hayot haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our neighbors made a racket all night.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofis muhiti haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The construction work next door made such a racket that we had to close the windows and move our important client meeting to another room.
words.example3Translation: Yonimizdagi qurilish ishlari shunday shovqin ko'tardiki, derazalarni yopib, muhim mijoz uchrashuvini boshqa xonaga ko'chirishga majbur bo'ldik.
words.example3Situation: Siz ofis sharoitlari haqida rahbariyat oldida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: With extremely thorough and precise attention to small elements.
words.example1: She explained everything in minute detail.
words.example1Situation: Siz tushuntirish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our engineer described the plan in minute detail.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The auditor reviewed the financial records in minute detail to ensure there were no discrepancies before the annual report was published.
