words.example3: Even small daily routines can serve a purpose if they contribute to long-term personal or professional development.
words.example3Translation: Hatto kichik kundalik odatlar ham agar uzoq muddatli shaxsiy yoki professional rivojlanishga hissa qo'shsa, maqsadga xizmat qilishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz samaradorlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To continue despite difficulty or opposition.
words.example1: We must persist.
words.example1Situation: Siz rag'batlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team persisted through tough times.
words.example2Situation: Siz inqiroz muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Those who persist through repeated failures often achieve greater success than those who give up at the first obstacle.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan keyin ham davom ettiradigan odamlar birinchi to'sqinlikda taslim bo'ladiganlarga qaraganda kattaroq muvaffaqiyatga erishadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz chidamlilik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Regular expenses or expenditures.
words.example1: Our outgoings are too high.
words.example1Situation: Siz byudjet haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need to reduce our monthly outgoings.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Careful management of outgoings is essential for maintaining healthy cash flow, especially during periods of business expansion.
words.example3Translation: Ayniqsa biznes kengayishi davrida sog'lom pul oqimini saqlab qolish uchun chiqimlarni sinchkov boshqarish juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy boshqaruv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An event or object of historical, cultural, or symbolic significance.
words.example1: This is a landmark achievement.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The new agreement is a landmark deal.
words.example2Situation: Siz hamkorlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Signing this international partnership represents a landmark moment in our company's journey toward global expansion.
words.example3Translation: Ushbu xalqaro hamkorlikni imzolash kompaniyamizning global kengayish yo'lidagi muhim lahzadir.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya rivoji haqidagi taqdimotda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: It is logically obvious or expected.
words.example1: It stands to reason that we need more time.
words.example1Situation: Siz mantiqiy xulosa chiqarayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: It stands to reason that we should invest more.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It stands to reason that companies investing in employee wellbeing will see better retention rates and higher overall productivity.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlar farovonligiga sarmoya kiritadigan kompaniyalar yaxshiroq xodimlar saqlanish darajasi va yuqori umumiy samaradorlikka erishishlari mantiqan to'g'ri.
words.example3Situation: Siz HR strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unattainable or inaccessible.
words.example1: That goal is beyond my reach.
words.example1Situation: Siz imkoniyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This technology is currently beyond our reach.
words.example2Situation: Siz byudjet muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While some advanced AI solutions are still beyond our reach due to cost, we can implement simpler tools that deliver significant value immediately.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi ilg'or sun'iy intellekt yechimlari narxi tufayli hali qo'limiz yetmayotgan bo'lsa ham, biz darhol katta foyda keltiradigan sodda vositalarni joriy eta olamiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz resurslar va imkoniyatlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A society driven primarily by wealth and consumption.
words.example1: We live in a materialist society.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company resists the materialist society trend.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ qadriyatlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In a materialist society, many people measure success by possessions rather than by personal growth or contribution to community.
words.example3Translation: Materialistik jamiyatda ko'pchilik odamlar muvaffaqiyatni shaxsiy o'sish yoki jamiyatga qo'shgan hissasi bilan emas, balki narsalar bilan o'lchaydilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz zamonaviy jamiyat haqidagi muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Subtle and non-forceful encouragement.
words.example1: She used gentle persuasion.
words.example1Situation: Siz muloqot uslubi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager prefers gentle persuasion over pressure.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik uslubi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Effective leaders often achieve better results through gentle persuasion and understanding rather than using authority and pressure.
words.example3Translation: Samarali rahbarlar ko'pincha hokimiyat va bosim o'rniga muloyim ishontirish va tushunish orqali yaxshiroq natijalarga erishadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik mahorati haqida treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To remain calm and avoid anger.
words.example1: Try to keep your temper.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: It's important to keep your temper in negotiations.
words.example2Situation: Siz muzokaralar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The ability to keep your temper during heated discussions is a valuable skill that helps maintain professional relationships and leads to better outcomes.
words.example3Translation: Qizg'in bahslar paytida o'zingizni tuta bilish professional munosabatlarni saqlashga va yaxshiroq natijalarga erishishga yordam beradigan qimmatli ko'nikmadir.
words.example3Situation: Siz emotsional intellekt haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The logical explanation or justification for an action or belief.
words.example1: What is the reasoning behind this?
words.example1Situation: Siz tushuntirish so'rayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We explained the reasoning behind our decision.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Understanding the reasoning behind management decisions helps employees feel more engaged and committed to company goals.
words.example3Translation: Rahbariyat qarorlarining mantiqiy asosini tushunish xodimlarda ko'proq ishtirok va kompaniya maqsadlariga sadoqat tuyg'usini uyg'otadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki aloqa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Minor criminal offences, such as theft or vandalism, causing limited harm.
words.example1: Petty crime is increasing.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We take measures to prevent petty crime.
words.example2Situation: Siz xavfsizlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even petty crime in the surrounding area can negatively affect employee morale and the overall perception of workplace safety.
words.example3Translation: Atrof-muhitdagi hatto mayda jinoyatlar ham xodimlar ruhiyatiga va ish joyi xavfsizligi haqidagi umumiy tasavvurga salbiy ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz ofis xavfsizligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The sudden start and rapid spread of something undesirable, especially disease or violence.
words.example1: There was an outbreak of flu.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We prepared for a possible outbreak.
words.example2Situation: Siz inqiroz rejasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The company activated its emergency plan immediately after the outbreak of the new virus variant to protect employees and maintain operations.
words.example3Translation: Yangi virus varianti avj olgandan so'ng kompaniya xodimlarni himoya qilish va faoliyatni davom ettirish uchun favqulodda rejasini darhol ishga tushirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Something dependent primarily on self-belief rather than skill or knowledge.
words.example1: It's a matter of confidence.
words.example1Situation: Siz psixologik masalalar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Success in sales is often a matter of confidence.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo bo'limi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: For many professionals, public speaking is more a matter of confidence than actual knowledge or preparation.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab mutaxassislar uchun ommaviy chiqish ko'proq bilim yoki tayyorgarlik masalasi emas, balki o'ziga ishonch masalasidir.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaxsiy rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Salespeople who are overly aggressive or persistent in persuading customers.
words.example1: I don't like pushy salesmen.
words.example1Situation: Siz xarid haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company avoids using pushy salesmen.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Modern customers prefer honest and helpful service rather than dealing with pushy salesmen who use high-pressure tactics.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy mijozlar yuqori bosimli taktikalardan foydalanadigan bosqichli savdo vakillari bilan ishlash o'rniga halol va yordam beruvchi xizmatni afzal ko'radilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlar xizmati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: There is no definitive conclusion or consensus yet.
words.example1: The jury is out on this matter.
words.example1Situation: Siz noaniq vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The jury is still out on the new strategy.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The jury is out on whether remote work will remain the dominant model or if companies will return to full-time office presence after the pandemic.
words.example3Translation: Masofaviy ish pandemiyadan keyin ham asosiy model bo'lib qoladimi yoki kompaniyalar to'liq ofis rejimiga qaytadimi degan savolga hali aniq javob yo'q.
words.example3Situation: Siz kelajak trendlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Showing no growth, movement, or development.
words.example1: The market is stagnant.
words.example1Situation: Siz bozor holati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We cannot afford to become stagnant.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Companies that remain stagnant in their approach while the industry evolves quickly often lose market share to more dynamic competitors.
words.example3Translation: Sanoat tez rivojlanayotgan paytda yondashuvida to'xtab qolgan kompaniyalar ko'pincha bozor ulushini yanada dinamik raqobatchilarga yo'qotadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqobatbardoshlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To recall or revisit past experiences nostalgically.
words.example1: Let's walk down memory lane.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'tmish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The reunion made us walk down memory lane.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoaviy tadbir haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During the anniversary celebration, employees enjoyed walking down memory lane and sharing stories of the company's early challenges and victories.
words.example3Translation: Yubiley tantanasida xodimlar xotiralar ko'chasida sayr qilib, kompaniyaning dastlabki qiyinchiliklari va g'alabalari haqidagi hikoyalarni baham ko'rishdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya tarixi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To identify something precisely.
words.example1: I can't quite put my finger on it.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammoni aniqlay olmayotganingizda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We finally put our finger on the main issue.
words.example2Situation: Siz tahlil yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After weeks of investigation, the team was able to put their finger on the root cause of the recurring technical problems.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha hafta davomidagi tergovdan so'ng, jamoa takrorlanuvchi texnik muammolarning ildiz sababini aniq aytib bera oldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammo tahlili haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To make someone remain alert or prepared.
words.example1: The manager keeps us on our toes.
words.example1Situation: Siz rahbarlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This competitive market keeps us on our toes.
words.example2Situation: Siz raqobat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A good leader knows how to keep the team on their toes without creating unnecessary stress, maintaining high performance standards.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi rahbar jamoani keraksiz stress yaratmasdan, yuqori natija standartlarini saqlab, hushyor bo'lishga majbur qilishni biladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik uslublari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Exceptionally impressive or extraordinary.
words.example1: The food was out of this world.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijobiy baho berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Their customer service is out of this world.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar xizmati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The innovation showcased at the conference was truly out of this world and set a new standard for the entire industry.
words.example3Translation: Konferensiyada namoyish etilgan innovatsiya haqiqatan ham dunyodan tashqari edi va butun sanoat uchun yangi standart o'rnatdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz texnologiya va innovatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Anger that is reasonable and morally warranted.
words.example1: His anger was justifiable.
words.example1Situation: Siz his-tuyg'ular haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We understand their justifiable anger.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While the customer's justifiable anger was understandable, our representative handled the situation calmly and professionally.
words.example3Translation: Mijozning oqlanadigan g'azabi tushunarli bo'lsa ham, vakilimiz vaziyatni tinch va professional tarzda hal qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan ishlash haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To increase financial gain to the highest possible level.
words.example1: We aim to maximize profits.
words.example1Situation: Siz moliyaviy maqsad haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The strategy is designed to maximize profits.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Smart businesses understand that maximizing profits should not come at the expense of ethical practices and long-term sustainability.
words.example3Translation: Aqlli bizneslar foydani maksimal darajada oshirish axloqiy amaliyotlar va uzoq muddatli barqarorlik hisobiga bo'lmasligini tushunadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror biznes haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A medical condition in which the kidneys lose their ability to function properly.
words.example1: He suffers from kidney failure.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq muammosi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our insurance covers kidney failure treatment.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar sug'urtasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Regular health check-ups can help detect early signs of kidney failure and allow for timely medical intervention.
words.example3Translation: Muntazam tibbiy ko'riklar buyrak yetishmovchiligining dastlabki belgilarni aniqlashga va o'z vaqtida tibbiy aralashuvga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar salomatligi dasturi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Words or actions intended to restore confidence or reduce anxiety.
words.example1: He needed some reassurance.
words.example1Situation: Siz yordam haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager gave the team reassurance.
words.example2Situation: Siz inqiroz davrida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During times of uncertainty, clear communication and reassurance from leadership play a crucial role in maintaining employee morale.
words.example3Translation: Noaniqlik davrida rahbariyatning aniq muloqoti va ishontirishi xodimlar ruhiyatini saqlab qolishda muhim rol o'ynaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik va kommunikatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Not confined, captured, or controlled.
words.example1: The suspect is still at large.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavfsizlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The issue remains at large.
words.example2Situation: Siz muammo muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Until we address the root cause, this systemic problem will remain at large and continue affecting our operations.
words.example3Translation: Ildiz sababni hal qilmagunimizcha, bu tizimli muammo erkin qoladi va operatsiyalarimizga ta'sir qilishda davom etadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammo yechimi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A person recently accepted into an organisation or group.
words.example1: We have a new recruit.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamoa haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The new recruit is doing well.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'qitish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Every new recruit brings fresh perspectives and energy that can help drive innovation within established teams.
words.example3Translation: Har bir yangi xodim yangi nuqtai nazarlar va energiya olib keladi, bu esa tashkil etilgan jamoalarda innovatsiyani rag'batlantirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar jalb qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: To be meant to do something
words.translation: Biror ishni qilish uchun yaratilgan bo'lmoq
words.definition: To be intended or destined to do something.
words.example1: I think I was meant to do this job.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy maqsad haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company was meant to lead in this field.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sometimes the most fulfilling careers come from realizing you were meant to do something that combines your natural talents with a real need in the market.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zida eng qoniqarli karyeralar sizning tug'ma qobiliyatlaringizni bozordagi haqiqiy ehtiyoj bilan birlashtiradigan ishni qilish uchun yaratilganligingizni anglashdan kelib chiqadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera va maqsad haqidagi panel muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To recover and rebuild after failure or loss.
words.example1: We need to pick up the pieces.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan keyin gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team is picking up the pieces after the setback.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: True leaders show their strength by helping the team pick up the pieces after a major failure and turning the experience into valuable lessons.
words.example3Translation: Chin rahbarlar katta muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan keyin jamoaga yordam berib, parchalarini yig'ishtirish va tajribani qimmatli saboqlarga aylantirish orqali kuchini ko'rsatadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqirozdan keyingi tiklanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Excessive bureaucratic rules that hinder efficiency.
words.example1: There is too much red tape.
words.example1Situation: Siz jarayonlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need to cut through the red tape.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Excessive red tape continues to slow down innovation and makes it difficult for businesses to respond quickly to changing market demands.
words.example3Translation: Haddan tashqari byurokratik to'siqlar innovatsiyani sekinlashtirishda davom etmoqda va bizneslarga bozor talablaridagi o'zgarishlarga tez javob berishni qiyinlashtirmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes muhiti haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unique; unlike anything else.
words.example1: She is one of a kind.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamni maqtayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our product is truly one of a kind.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The founder's vision combined with our team's creativity has created a company culture that is truly one of a kind in our industry.
words.example3Translation: Asoschi tasavvuri va jamoamiz ijodkorligi birlashib, sanoatimizda chinakam yagona kompaniya madaniyatini yaratdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To appear threatening or significant in one’s thoughts.
words.example1: The deadline looms large.
words.example1Situation: Siz muddat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The economic challenges loom large for us.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even though we have made good progress, the upcoming regulatory changes continue to loom large in our strategic planning discussions.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi taraqqiyotga erishgan bo'lsak ham, yaqinlashib kelayotgan tartibga solish o'zgarishlari strategik rejalashtirish muhokamalarimizda katta ko'rinishda qolmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz kelajak xavflari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: To be out of the question
words.translation: Mumkin emas / Gap ham bo'lishi mumkin emas
words.definition: Completely unacceptable or impossible.
words.example1: That is out of the question.
words.example1Situation: Siz rad etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Cutting corners is out of the question.
words.example2Situation: Siz sifat muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Compromising on product safety is completely out of the question, regardless of how much pressure we face from competitors.
words.example3Translation: Raqobatchilar tomonidan qancha bosim bo'lishidan qat'iy nazar, mahsulot xavfsizligi bo'yicha murosa qilish mutlaqo mumkin emas.
words.example3Situation: Siz axloqiy me'yorlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To reallocate financial resources more evenly within society.
words.example1: The government wants to redistribute wealth.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijtimoiy mavzular haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Some policies aim to redistribute wealth.
words.example2Situation: Siz iqtisodiy muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While many support efforts to redistribute wealth, finding the right balance between fairness and economic growth remains a complex challenge for policymakers.
words.example3Translation: Ko'pchilik boylikni qayta taqsimlash harakatlarini qo'llab-quvvatlasa ham, adolat va iqtisodiy o'sish o'rtasidagi to'g'ri muvozanatni topish siyosatchilar uchun murakkab muammo bo'lib qolmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy adolat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be a significant and difficult achievement.
words.example1: Finishing on time was no mean feat.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Reaching this target was no mean feat.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Building a successful international brand from a small local startup in just five years is no mean feat and deserves recognition.
words.example3Translation: Kichik mahalliy startapdan besh yil ichida muvaffaqiyatli xalqaro brend qurish oson ish emas va e'tirofga loyiqdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat hikoyalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To get married.
words.example1: They decided to tie the knot.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy hayot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our colleague is going to tie the knot next month.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many companies now offer special leave and support for employees who are about to tie the knot to help them balance work and personal life.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab kompaniyalar endi ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini saqlashga yordam berish uchun turmush qurmoqchi bo'lgan xodimlar uchun maxsus ta'til va yordam taklif qilmoqdalar.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Destitute, exhausted, or socially marginalised.
words.example1: He was down and out.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin holat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We helped him when he was down and out.
words.example2Situation: Siz yordam haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many successful entrepreneurs were once down and out before their big breakthrough, which shows the importance of persistence.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab muvaffaqiyatli tadbirkorlar katta muvaffaqiyatdan oldin qiyin ahvolda bo'lishgan, bu chidamlilik muhimligini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz motivatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To rest and regain energy.
words.example1: I need to recharge my batteries.
words.example1Situation: Siz dam olish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team needs time to recharge their batteries.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa farovonligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Taking regular breaks to recharge your batteries is essential for maintaining long-term productivity and preventing burnout.
words.example3Translation: Uzoq muddatli samaradorlikni saqlash va charchoqni oldini olish uchun muntazam tanaffuslar olib, kuch to'plash juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish va dam olish muvozanati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: I was reduced to doing something
words.definition: Forced by circumstances to take an undesirable action.
words.example1: I was reduced to working weekends.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team was reduced to cutting costs drastically.
words.example2Situation: Siz inqiroz muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Due to unexpected budget cuts, we were reduced to postponing several important projects until next year.
words.example3Translation: Kutilmagan byudjet qisqartirishlari tufayli biz bir nechta muhim loyihalarni kelasi yilga qoldirishga majbur bo'ldik.
words.example3Situation: Siz resurslar yetishmasligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A respectful reference to one’s deceased father.
words.example1: My late father taught me this.
words.example1Situation: Siz oilaviy tajriba haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Like my late father always said...
words.example2Situation: Siz ilhom manbai haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Just as my late father taught me, integrity in business is more valuable than any short-term financial gain.
words.example3Translation: Marhum otam o'rgatganidek, biznesdagi halollik har qanday qisqa muddatli moliyaviy foydadan qimmatliroqdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaxsiy qadriyatlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: On alternate days.
words.example1: I exercise every other day.
words.example1Situation: Siz odatlaringiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We review reports every other day.
words.example2Situation: Siz jarayonlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The team now meets every other day to ensure quick communication and fast problem resolution during the critical project phase.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa endi muhim loyiha bosqichida tez muloqot va muammolarni tez hal qilishni ta'minlash uchun kun o'tib yig'ilmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoaviy boshqaruv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to describe a sudden, unexpected development.
words.example1: The next thing I know, it was morning.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan voqea haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The next thing I know, the project was approved.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: I was just suggesting a small change and the next thing I know, the entire strategy was being rewritten based on my idea.
words.example3Translation: Men shunchaki kichik o'zgartirish taklif qilgan edim, birdan butun strategiya mening g'oyam asosida qayta yozila boshladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijodiy jarayon haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be highly knowledgeable or competent.
words.example1: She really knows her stuff.
words.example1Situation: Siz mutaxassis haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our technical team knows their stuff.
words.example2Situation: Siz bo'lim haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Clients trust us because our consultants genuinely know their stuff and provide practical solutions rather than generic advice.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlar bizga ishonishadi, chunki maslahatchilarimiz haqiqatan ham ishni yaxshi biladilar va umumiy maslahat o'rniga amaliy yechimlar taklif qiladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz mutaxassislik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: No later than a specified time.
words.example1: Please finish by Friday at the latest.
words.example1Situation: Siz muddat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need the report by next week at the latest.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: All departments must submit their quarterly forecasts by the 15th of the month at the latest to allow enough time for consolidation.
words.example3Translation: Barcha bo'limlar choraklik prognozlarini oyning 15-sanasiga qadar, eng kechi bilan topshirishlari kerak, bu birlashtirish uchun yetarli vaqt beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muddatlar va rejalashtirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: No longer needed or useful, often due to change or efficiency.
words.example1: This position has become redundant.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zgarishlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Some processes are now redundant.
words.example2Situation: Siz jarayonlarni yaxshilash haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: With the new automated system, several manual reporting tasks have become redundant, allowing staff to focus on higher-value activities.
words.example3Translation: Yangi avtomatlashtirilgan tizim bilan bir nechta qo'lbola hisobot topshiriqlari ortiqcha bo'lib qoldi va xodimlar yuqori qiymatli faoliyatlarga e'tibor qaratish imkoniyatiga ega bo'ldilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli transformatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A course of action likely to lead to serious failure.
words.example1: That's a recipe for disaster.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavf haqida ogohlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Ignoring customer feedback is a recipe for disaster.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Expanding too quickly without proper infrastructure and trained staff is a recipe for disaster in any growing business.
words.example3Translation: Tegishli infratuzilma va o'qitilgan xodimlarsiz juda tez kengayish har qanday o'sayotgan biznes uchun falokat retseptidir.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Certainly; used to give enthusiastic permission or agreement.
words.example1: By all means, go ahead.
words.example1Situation: Siz ruxsat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: By all means, implement the changes.
words.example2Situation: Siz qo'llab-quvvatlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: By all means, share your ideas during the meeting — we value every team member's input for better decision-making.
words.example3Translation: Albatta, yig'ilishda o'z g'oyalaringizni baham ko'ring — biz yaxshiroq qaror qabul qilish uchun har bir jamoa a'zosining fikrini qadrlaymiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz ochiq muhokama haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To lose emotional control or stop functioning effectively.
words.example1: She fell to pieces after the news.
words.example1Situation: Siz stress haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The project almost fell to pieces.
words.example2Situation: Siz qiyin loyiha haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even when everything seemed to fall to pieces around her, she stayed focused and guided the team through the crisis successfully.
words.example3Translation: Atrofida hamma narsa parcha-parcha bo'layotgandek tuyulgan paytda ham u diqqatini jamlagan holda jamoani inqirozdan muvaffaqiyatli o'tkazdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz chidamlilik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A situation that must be taken seriously.
words.example1: This is no laughing matter.
words.example1Situation: Siz jiddiy masala haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Losing this client is no laughing matter.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A serious data breach is no laughing matter and requires immediate attention from all departments to protect our customers and reputation.
words.example3Translation: Jiddiy ma'lumotlar oqishi hazil emas va mijozlarimizni hamda obro'mizni himoya qilish uchun barcha bo'limlarning darhol e'tiborini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavfsizlik masalalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Conventional, scientifically accepted medical treatment.
words.example1: He prefers orthodox medicine.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company supports orthodox medicine practices.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar salomatligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While alternative treatments are gaining popularity, orthodox medicine remains the foundation of healthcare systems worldwide due to its evidence-based approach.
words.example3Translation: Muqobil davolash usullari mashhurlik orttirayotgan bo'lsa ham, an'anaviy tibbiyot dalillarga asoslangan yondashuvi tufayli butun dunyo sog'liqni saqlash tizimlarining asosini tashkil etadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tibbiy yordam haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An extravagant and costly celebration.
words.example1: They threw a lavish party.
words.example1Situation: Siz tadbir haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The company hosted a lavish party for its employees.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki tadbir haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The lavish party celebrating the company's 10th anniversary helped strengthen relationships between employees and management.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyaning 10 yilligini nishonlash uchun o'tkazilgan dabdabali ziyofat xodimlar va rahbariyat o'rtasidagi munosabatlarni mustahkamlashga yordam berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoaviy tadbirlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Collapse of legal authority and public safety.
words.example1: There was a breakdown in law and order.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must prevent any breakdown in law and order.
words.example2Situation: Siz xavfsizlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A breakdown in law and order in the region would seriously affect our supply chain and force us to reconsider our expansion plans.
words.example3Translation: Mintaqada qonun va tartibning buzilishi ta'minot zanjirimizga jiddiy ta'sir qiladi va kengayish rejalarni qayta ko'rib chiqishga majbur qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz risklarni baholash haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To deliberately avoid doing something.
words.example1: Please refrain from using phones.
words.example1Situation: Siz qoida haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must refrain from making hasty decisions.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: All employees are asked to refrain from sharing confidential information on social media to protect our intellectual property.
words.example3Translation: Barcha xodimlardan intellektual mulkimizni himoya qilish uchun maxfiy ma'lumotlarni ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda baham ko'rmaslik so'raladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki siyosat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To possess sufficient financial resources to purchase something.
words.example1: I don't have the means to buy it now.
words.example1Situation: Siz moliyaviy holat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company has the means to buy new equipment.
words.example2Situation: Siz investitsiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: As our business grows, we are gaining the means to buy advanced technology that will significantly improve our operational efficiency.
words.example3Translation: Biznesimiz o'sgani sari biz operatsion samaradorligimizni sezilarli oshiradigan ilg'or texnologiyani sotib olish imkoniyatiga ega bo'lmoqdamiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya o'sishi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To do something with great enjoyment or enthusiasm.
words.example1: He does his work with relish.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishtiyoq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team tackles challenges with relish.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: She approaches every new project with relish, which inspires the whole team and leads to outstanding results.
words.example3Translation: U har bir yangi loyihaga zavq bilan yondashadi, bu butun jamoani ilhomlantiradi va ajoyib natijalarga olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz motivatsiya va ishtiyoq haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To guide someone logically towards a particular belief or judgement.
words.example1: This led me to a conclusion.
words.example1Situation: Siz tahlil haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The data led us to a conclusion.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The combination of customer feedback and market trends led us to the conclusion that we needed to redesign our flagship product.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlar fikr-mulohazasi va bozor tendensiyalarining birikmasi bizni flagman mahsulotimizni qayta dizayn qilish kerak degan xulosaga olib keldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qaror qabul qilish jarayoni haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Physically healthy enough to perform required tasks.
words.example1: He is medically fit.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: All drivers must be medically fit.
words.example2Situation: Siz xavfsizlik qoidalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Before sending employees on international assignments, we ensure they are medically fit to handle the physical and environmental demands of the new location.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlarni xalqaro topshiriqlarga yuborishdan oldin ularning yangi joyning jismoniy va atrof-muhit talablarini bajarishga tibbiy jihatdan sog'lom ekanligini ta'minlaymiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar salomatligi siyosati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Made private information publicly known, often without authorisation.
words.example1: The information was leaked to the press.
words.example1Situation: Siz maxfiy ma'lumotlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our internal report was leaked to the press.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki xavfsizlik yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The confidential strategy document being leaked to the press caused significant damage to our negotiations with international partners.
words.example3Translation: Maxfiy strategiya hujjatining matbuotga sizdirilishi xalqaro hamkorlar bilan muzokaralarimizga jiddiy zarar yetkazdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz kommunikatsiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be taking prescribed drugs to treat a medical condition.
words.example1: He is on medication.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq holati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Some employees are on medication for stress.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: We support employees who are on medication by offering flexible hours and understanding during their treatment period.
words.example3Translation: Biz dori ichayotgan xodimlarni davolanish davrida moslashuvchan ish vaqti va tushunish bilan qo'llab-quvvatlaymiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar salomatligi siyosati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To cause to become, provide, or perform a service; to make something in a particular state.
words.example1: This will render the old system useless.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnologiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our goal is to render excellent service.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar xizmati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The new software update will render our manual processes much more efficient and reduce human error significantly.
words.example3Translation: Yangi dastur yangilanishi qo'lbola jarayonlarimizni ancha samarali qiladi va insoniy xatolarni sezilarli darajada kamaytiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli transformatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To jump suddenly from a vehicle, usually in haste.
words.example1: He leaped out of the car.
words.example1Situation: Siz shoshilinch vaziyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The manager leaped out of the car to greet the client.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlarni kutib olish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the important guest arrived earlier than expected, our CEO leaped out of the car and personally welcomed him at the entrance.
words.example3Translation: Muhim mehmon kutilganidan oldin kelganda, bosh direktorimiz mashinadan sakrab tushib, uni kirish eshigida shaxsan kutib oldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mehmondo'stlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Progressing very rapidly or dramatically.
words.example1: Our sales are improving in leaps and bounds.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The company is growing in leaps and bounds.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Thanks to the new digital marketing strategy, our online presence has grown in leaps and bounds over the past six months.
words.example3Translation: Yangi raqamli marketing strategiyasi tufayli so'nggi olti oy ichida onlayn mavjudligimiz tez sur'atlar bilan o'sdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz marketing natijalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Operating a vehicle in a dangerously careless manner.
words.example1: Reckless driving is dangerous.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavfsizlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company has zero tolerance for reckless driving.
words.example2Situation: Siz transport qoidalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Reckless driving by company drivers not only endangers lives but can also seriously damage our corporate reputation and lead to legal issues.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya haydovchilarining ehtiyotsiz haydashi nafaqat hayotni xavf ostiga qo'yadi, balki korporativ obro'mizga jiddiy zarar yetkazishi va huquqiy muammolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavfsizlik siyosati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Especially due to; significantly influenced by.
words.example1: We succeeded, not least because of your help.
words.example1Situation: Siz minnatdorchilik bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The project was successful, not least because of teamwork.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our company has grown rapidly this year, not least because of the dedication and innovative ideas of our young talent.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyamiz bu yil tez o'sdi, ayniqsa yosh mutaxassislarimizning fidoyiligi va innovatsion g'oyalari tufayli.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To make every possible effort to achieve a result.
words.example1: We will leave no stone unturned.
words.example1Situation: Siz harakat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team left no stone unturned to meet the deadline.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The legal department left no stone unturned in their research to ensure the contract protected all our interests.
words.example3Translation: Huquqiy bo'lim shartnoma barcha manfaatlarimizni himoya qilishini ta'minlash uchun tadqiqotda hech narsani e'tiborsiz qoldirmadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sinchkovlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A period of authorised absence from work with remuneration.
words.example1: I am on paid leave.
words.example1Situation: Siz ta'til haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company offers generous paid leave.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR siyosati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The new policy provides more paid leave for parents, helping employees better balance family responsibilities and professional commitments.
words.example3Translation: Yangi siyosat ota-onalarga ko'proq haq to'lanadigan ta'til beradi va xodimlar oilaviy mas'uliyat bilan professional majburiyatlarni yaxshiroq muvozanatlashtirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be similar in appearance or character to someone or something.
words.example1: It bears resemblance to our old product.
words.example1Situation: Siz taqqoslash haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The new design bears resemblance to our competitor's.
words.example2Situation: Siz dizayn muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The new company culture bears strong resemblance to the innovative and open environment we admired in leading tech firms.
words.example3Translation: Yangi kompaniya madaniyati yetakchi texnologiya kompaniyalarida bizga yoqqan innovatsion va ochiq muhitga kuchli o'xshashlikka ega.
words.example3Situation: Siz madaniyat va brending haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Of only moderate quality; not outstanding.
words.example1: The service was mediocre.
words.example1Situation: Siz baho berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We refuse to deliver mediocre results.
words.example2Situation: Siz sifat yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In today's competitive market, being mediocre is no longer enough — companies must strive for excellence to survive and grow.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi raqobatbardosh bozorda o'rtacha bo'lish yetarli emas — kompaniyalar omon qolish va o'sish uchun mukammallikka intilishlari kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz sifat standartlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To legally take responsibility for a child without parents.
words.example1: They decided to adopt an orphan.
words.example1Situation: Siz oilaviy masalalar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company supports employees who adopt an orphan.
words.example2Situation: Siz ijtimoiy mas'uliyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Several employees have shown great courage by choosing to adopt an orphan while maintaining their professional careers.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha xodim professional karyerasini davom ettirgan holda yetim bola asrab olishni tanlab, katta jasorat ko'rsatdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy loyihalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To take authorised absence from work or duty.
words.example1: I am going on leave next week.
words.example1Situation: Siz ta'til haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager is going on leave for two weeks.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki rejalashtirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When key team members go on leave, we ensure proper handover procedures are followed to maintain smooth operations.
words.example3Translation: Muhim jamoa a'zolari ta'tilga chiqqanda, operatsiyalarning uzluksiz davom etishini ta'minlash uchun to'g'ri topshirish tartiblariga rioya qilamiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish jarayonlarini boshqarish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To have a source, beginning, or cause in a particular place or context.
words.example1: This idea originated from our team.
words.example1Situation: Siz g'oya manbai haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The tradition originated from our founder.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya tarixi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many of our best innovations originated from casual conversations between employees across different departments.
words.example3Translation: Eng yaxshi innovatsiyalarimizning ko'pchiligi turli bo'limlardagi xodimlar o'rtasidagi oddiy suhbatlardan kelib chiqqan.
words.example3Situation: Siz innovatsiya jarayoni haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A channel, method, or means of conveying something.
words.example1: Social media is a medium for communication.
words.example1Situation: Siz aloqa haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Email is our main medium for internal updates.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki kommunikatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Face-to-face meetings remain the most effective medium for building trust and resolving complex issues within the team.
words.example3Translation: Yuzma-yuz uchrashuvlar jamoa ichida ishonchni mustahkamlash va murakkab masalalarni hal qilish uchun eng samarali vosita bo'lib qolmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz muloqot usullari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Minimal financial remuneration for work or services rendered.
words.example1: The compensation is too low.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish haqi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We offer competitive compensation, not low compensation.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Offering low compensation in today's competitive job market makes it extremely difficult to attract and retain talented professionals.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi raqobatbardosh ish bozorida past haq taklif qilish iste'dodli mutaxassislarni jalb qilish va saqlab qolishni juda qiyinlashtiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar jalb qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To formally submit notice of leaving one’s employment.
words.example1: She handed in her resignation.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishdan ketish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: He decided to hand in his resignation.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After careful consideration, she chose to hand in her resignation to pursue a new opportunity that better aligned with her long-term career goals.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshilab o'ylab ko'rgach, u uzoq muddatli karyera maqsadlariga yaxshiroq mos keladigan yangi imkoniyatni ta'qib qilish uchun ishdan bo'shash arizasini topshirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera o'zgarishlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To remember or call to mind.
words.example1: I can't recollect his name.
words.example1Situation: Siz eslay olmayotganingizda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We recollect the early days fondly.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya tarixi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During the anniversary event, longtime employees recollected the challenges and victories from the company's founding years with great emotion.
words.example3Translation: Yubiley tadbirida uzoq vaqt ishlagan xodimlar kompaniyaning asos solingan yillardagi qiyinchilik va g'alabalarni katta his-tuyg'u bilan esladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz xotiralar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Laws collectively or the process of making laws.
words.example1: New legislation will affect us.
words.example1Situation: Siz qonun haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must comply with the latest legislation.
words.example2Situation: Siz huquqiy muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Keeping up with constantly changing legislation is essential for companies operating in regulated industries such as finance and healthcare.
words.example3Translation: Doimiy o'zgaruvchan qonunchilikdan xabardor bo'lib turish moliya va sog'liqni saqlash kabi tartibga solinadigan sohalarda faoliyat yurituvchi kompaniyalar uchun juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz huquqiy masalalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: It is obvious or evident.
words.example1: It is quite plain that we need change.
words.example1Situation: Siz aniq xulosa chiqarayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: It is quite plain that the old system is failing.
words.example2Situation: Siz tizim muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It is quite plain that without investing in digital transformation, we will fall behind our competitors in the coming years.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli transformatsiyaga sarmoya kiritmasak, kelgusi yillarda raqobatchilarimizdan ortda qolishimiz aniq ko'rinib turibdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik kelajak haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A justification that is reasonable, lawful, or morally acceptable.
words.example1: He had a legitimate reason.
words.example1Situation: Siz bahona haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We only accept legitimate reasons for absence.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki qoidalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The employee provided a legitimate reason for missing the important meeting, supported by official medical documentation.
words.example3Translation: Xodim muhim uchrashuvni o'tkazib yuborish uchun rasmiy tibbiy hujjat bilan tasdiqlangan qonuniy sabab ko'rsatdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz intizom va adolat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To successfully achieve all intended objectives.
words.example1: We met every goal this year.
words.example1Situation: Siz natijalar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team worked hard to meet every goal.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: With excellent coordination and dedication, the department successfully managed to meet every goal set for the financial year.
words.example3Translation: Ajoyib muvofiqlashtirish va fidoyilik bilan bo'lim moliyaviy yil uchun belgilangan barcha maqsadlarni muvaffaqiyatli bajara oldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yillik natijalar haqida rahbariyat oldida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Throughout the entirety of a space, area, or concept.
words.example1: We searched the length and breadth of the market.
words.example1Situation: Siz tadqiqot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The news spread the length and breadth of the company.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki aloqa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our products are now known the length and breadth of the country thanks to our strong distribution network.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli tarqatish tarmog'imiz tufayli mahsulotlarimiz endi butun mamlakat bo'ylab tanilgan.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor qamrovi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To talk about something extensively or in detail.
words.example1: We discussed the issue at length.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhokama haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The board discussed the proposal at length.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbariyat yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The leadership team discussed the new strategy at length before reaching a unanimous decision on its implementation.
words.example3Translation: Rahbariyat jamoasi yangi strategiyani amalga oshirish bo'yicha bir ovozdan qarorga kelishdan oldin uni batafsil muhokama qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qaror qabul qilish jarayoni haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To maintain emotional or physical distance from someone.
words.example1: She kept him at arm’s length.
words.example1Situation: Siz munosabatlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We keep difficult clients at arm’s length.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan ishlash haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While collaboration is important, experienced managers sometimes keep certain stakeholders at arm’s length to maintain objectivity in decision-making.
words.example3Translation: Hamkorlik muhim bo'lsa ham, tajribali rahbarlar ba'zida qaror qabul qilishda xolislikni saqlash uchun ayrim manfaatdor tomonlarni uzoqroq tutadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz munosabatlar boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To successfully achieve a set objective or goal.
words.example1: We managed to meet the target.
words.example1Situation: Siz natija haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sales team met the target early.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo hisobotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Thanks to excellent teamwork and strategic planning, the department successfully met the target two months ahead of schedule.
words.example3Translation: Ajoyib jamoaviy ish va strategik rejalashtirish tufayli bo'lim maqsadni muddatdan ikki oy oldin muvaffaqiyatli bajardi.
words.example3Situation: Siz natijalar haqida rahbariyat oldida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A final option used only when all others have failed.
words.example1: This is a last resort.
words.example1Situation: Siz oxirgi variant haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We use legal action only as a last resort.
words.example2Situation: Siz huquqiy masalalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Laying off staff is always considered a last resort after all other cost-saving measures have been exhausted.
words.example3Translation: Boshqa barcha xarajatlarni tejash choralari tugagandan keyingina xodimlarni ishdan bo'shatish har doim oxirgi chorasi sifatida ko'rib chiqiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unusual or exceptional.
words.example1: This is out of the ordinary.
words.example1Situation: Siz g'ayrioddiy holat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The results are out of the ordinary.
words.example2Situation: Siz natija haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The level of creativity shown by the new team member is truly out of the ordinary and has greatly benefited our project.
words.example3Translation: Yangi jamoa a'zosi ko'rsatgan ijodkorlik darajasi haqiqatan ham oddiy holatdan tashqari bo'lib, loyihamizga katta foyda keltirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz iste'dod haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To cause someone to begin questioning or distrusting something.
words.example1: His words planted doubts in my mind.
words.example1Situation: Siz shubha haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The report planted doubts in management's mind.
words.example2Situation: Siz tahlil natijalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The competitor's aggressive marketing campaign was designed to plant doubts in customers' minds about the reliability of our products.
words.example3Translation: Raqobatchining tajovuzkor marketing kampaniyasi mijozlar ongida mahsulotlarimiz ishonchliligi haqida shubha uyg'otish uchun mo'ljallangan edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqobat strategiyalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A punishment that is relatively mild or merciful.
words.example1: He received a lenient sentence.
words.example1Situation: Siz huquqiy masala haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The judge gave a lenient sentence.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki intizom haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Considering his clean record and cooperation, the court decided to give him a lenient sentence instead of the maximum penalty.
words.example3Translation: Toza biografiyasi va hamkorligini hisobga olgan holda, sud unga eng yuqori jazo o'rniga yengil jazo berishga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz adolat va jazo haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To cause someone to learn through consequences or correction.
words.example1: This mistake will teach him a lesson.
words.example1Situation: Siz xato va o'rganish haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company policy is designed to teach employees a lesson about punctuality.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki intizom haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sometimes losing an important client can teach someone a lesson about the importance of clear communication and attention to detail in business relationships.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zida muhim mijozni yo'qotish odamga biznes munosabatlarida aniq muloqot va tafsilotlarga e'tibor berish muhimligi haqida dars o'rgatishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz tajriba va o'rganish haqidagi xalqaro konferensiyada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To release physically, emotionally, or metaphorically; to relinquish.
words.example1: It's time to let go of the past.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy rivojlanish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company decided to let go of outdated practices.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Successful leaders know when to let go of old strategies that no longer serve the company's long-term vision and growth objectives.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli rahbarlar eski strategiyalarni qachon qo'yib yuborish kerakligini biladilar, agar ular kompaniyaning uzoq muddatli tasavvuri va o'sish maqsadlariga xizmat qilmasa.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'zgarishlarni boshqarish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Showing compassion or leniency, especially in judgement.
words.example1: The judge was merciful.
words.example1Situation: Siz adolat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager is merciful when mistakes happen.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa munosabatlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A good leader is both fair and merciful, knowing when to correct mistakes firmly and when to show understanding to maintain team morale.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi rahbar ham adolatli, ham rahmdil bo'ladi — xatolarni qachon qat'iy tuzatish va qachon tushunish kerakligini bilib, jamoa ruhiyatini saqlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik fazilatlari haqidagi treningda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To combine two or more entities into one.
words.example1: The two companies will merge.
words.example1Situation: Siz biznes o'zgarishlari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our department will merge with marketing next year.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki rejalashtirishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The decision to merge with a larger international firm will give us access to new markets while strengthening our technological capabilities.
words.example3Translation: Kattaroq xalqaro firma bilan birlashish qarori bizga yangi bozorlarga kirish imkonini beradi va texnologik imkoniyatlarimizni mustahkamlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik hamkorlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A reasonable or credible account or justification.
words.example1: That sounds like a plausible explanation.
words.example1Situation: Siz tushuntirish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The manager gave a plausible explanation.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The project manager provided a plausible explanation for the delay, supported by detailed data and market analysis.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha rahbari kechikish uchun batafsil ma'lumotlar va bozor tahlili bilan tasdiqlangan ishonarli tushuntirish berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hisobot va javobgarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be unable to remember.
words.example1: I have no recollection of that meeting.
words.example1Situation: Siz eslay olmayotganingizda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The witness had no recollection of the event.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki tergov haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Despite reviewing all the documents, I still have no recollection of approving that particular expense last quarter.
words.example3Translation: Barcha hujjatlarni ko'rib chiqqanimga qaramay, o'tgan chorakdagi o'sha xarajatni tasdiqlaganimni hali ham eslay olmayapman.
words.example3Situation: Siz xotira va mas'uliyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Able to find quick and clever ways to overcome difficulties.
words.example1: She is very resourceful.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy fazilat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team is resourceful in solving problems.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Resourceful employees who can find creative solutions under pressure are highly valued in fast-changing business environments.
words.example3Translation: Bosim ostida ijodiy yechim topa oladigan topqir xodimlar tez o'zgaruvchan biznes muhitida juda qadrlanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar fazilatlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To work late into the night.
words.example1: I had to burn the midnight oil.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish yuklamasi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team burned the midnight oil to finish the project.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While burning the midnight oil occasionally is necessary, doing it regularly can negatively affect long-term health and productivity.
words.example3Translation: Vaqt-vaqti bilan tun bo'yi ishlash zarur bo'lsa ham, doimiy ravishda bunday qilish uzoq muddatli salomatlik va samaradorlikka salbiy ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish va dam olish muvozanati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To maintain authority, power, or management over something.
words.example1: We need to retain control of the project.
words.example1Situation: Siz loyiha boshqaruvi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The company wants to retain control of its brand.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even after partnering with larger firms, we made sure to retain control over our core values and product quality standards.
words.example3Translation: Kattaroq firmalar bilan hamkorlik qilganimizdan keyin ham biz asosiy qadriyatlarimiz va mahsulot sifati standartlari ustidan nazoratni saqlab qoldik.
words.example3Situation: Siz hamkorlik va mustaqillik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: It astonished or overwhelmed me.
words.example1: The presentation blew my mind.
words.example1Situation: Siz hayratlanish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The new technology really blew my mind.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The level of innovation and creativity shown in the latest product prototype completely blew my mind and raised our expectations for the future.
words.example3Translation: Yangi mahsulot prototipida ko'rsatilgan innovatsiya va ijodkorlik darajasi aqlimni hayratda qoldirdi va kelajakka bo'lgan kutganlarimizni oshirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz texnologiya taqdimoti haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Showing no pity, compassion, or leniency.
words.example1: The competition is merciless.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqobat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The market can be merciless to weak companies.
words.example2Situation: Siz biznes muhiti haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In the fast-moving technology sector, competition is often merciless, rewarding only those who continuously innovate and adapt.
words.example3Translation: Tez sur'atli texnologiya sohasida raqobat ko'pincha shafqatsiz bo'ladi va faqat doimiy innovatsiya va moslashuv ko'rsatadiganlarni mukofotlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqobatbardoshlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To release pent-up energy, emotion, or stress.
words.example1: I need to let off steam.
words.example1Situation: Siz stress haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Team building helps employees let off steam.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoaviy tadbir haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Organizing regular sports activities allows employees to let off steam in a healthy way and improves overall team dynamics.
words.example3Translation: Muntazam sport tadbirlarini tashkil qilish xodimlarning g'azabini sog'lom yo'l bilan bo'shatishiga imkon beradi va jamoa munosabatlarini yaxshilaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be preoccupied with a thought or concern.
words.example1: You look like you have something on your mind.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning holatini so'rayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager had something on his mind during the meeting.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When a team member seems distracted and has something on their mind, good leaders take time to listen and offer support.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa a'zosi chalg'igandek va biror narsa haqida o'ylayotgandek tuyulsa, yaxshi rahbarlar vaqt ajratib, tinglaydi va yordam taklif qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa rahbarligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A method of execution or euthanasia involving poisonous injection.
words.example1: The prisoner received a lethal injection.
words.example1Situation: Siz huquqiy mavzular haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Some countries still use lethal injection.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro huquq haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The ethical debate around lethal injection as a method of capital punishment continues to divide legal experts and human rights organizations worldwide.
words.example3Translation: O'lim jazosi usuli sifatida o'ldiruvchi inyeksiya atrofidagi axloqiy bahs dunyo bo'ylab huquqshunoslar va inson huquqlari tashkilotlarini bo'lib turibdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz huquqiy va axloqiy masalalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The established system of governance and social structure within a state.
words.example1: The political order is changing.
words.example1Situation: Siz siyosiy mavzular haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This affects the political order in the region.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro biznes haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Major technological advancements often challenge the existing political order and force governments to adapt their policies and regulations.
words.example3Translation: Katta texnologik taraqqiyotlar ko'pincha mavjud siyosiy tartibni shubha ostiga qo'yadi va hukumatlarni siyosat va qoidalarini moslashtirishga majbur qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz global o'zgarishlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Long life or duration; the length of time something lasts.
words.example1: The company focuses on longevity.
