words.example2: We aim for the longevity of our products.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahsulot sifati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Building customer trust and delivering consistent quality are key factors in ensuring the longevity of any successful business.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlar ishonchini qurish va doimiy sifatni ta'minlash har qanday muvaffaqiyatli biznesning uzoq umr ko'rishining asosiy omillaridir.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror biznes haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To move aside or create space for someone or something.
words.example1: We must make way for new ideas.
words.example1Situation: Siz innovatsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The old system will make way for the new one.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnologiya yangilanishi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sometimes companies need to make way for fresh talent and innovative approaches to stay competitive in rapidly evolving markets.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zida kompaniyalar tez o'zgaruvchan bozorlarda raqobatbardosh bo'lib qolish uchun yangi iste'dodlar va innovatsion yondashuvlar uchun yo'l ochishlari kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'zgarishlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To expose oneself to the possibility of harm or loss.
words.example1: We cannot run the risk of losing clients.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavf haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company doesn't run the risk of ignoring regulations.
words.example2Situation: Siz huquqiy muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Expanding into new markets too quickly could run the risk of spreading our resources too thin and weakening our core business operations.
words.example3Translation: Yangi bozorlarga juda tez kengayish resurslarimizni haddan tashqari tarqatib yuborish va asosiy biznes operatsiyalarimizni zaiflashtirish xavfini tug'dirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik xavflar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Someone candid, transparent, and willing to share thoughts or feelings.
words.example1: He is a very open person.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy fazilat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our CEO is an open person who values transparency.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Being an open person who shares both successes and challenges helps build stronger trust and collaboration within the team.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatlar va qiyinchiliklarni baham ko'radigan ochiq odam bo'lish jamoa ichida kuchliroq ishonch va hamkorlikni yaratishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To continue or move forward, often after a pause or interruption.
words.example1: We can proceed with the plan.
words.example1Situation: Siz tasdiqlash haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The meeting will proceed as scheduled.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki yig'ilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After addressing all major concerns from the stakeholders, we were finally able to proceed with the full implementation of the new system.
words.example3Translation: Manfaatdor tomonlarning barcha asosiy tashvishlarini hal qilgandan so'ng, biz nihoyat yangi tizimni to'liq joriy etishni davom ettira oldik.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha bosqichlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A strong desire or yearning for something.

words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy orzular haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: There is a growing longing for better work-life balance.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar ehtiyojlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many professionals today feel a deep longing for meaningful work that provides both financial stability and personal fulfillment.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi mutaxassislarning ko'pchiligi ham moliyaviy barqarorlik, ham shaxsiy qoniqish beradigan mazmunli ishga bo'lgan chuqur intilishni his qilmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz motivatsiya va maqsadlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To laugh loudly and uncontrollably.
words.example1: The audience roared with laughter.
words.example1Situation: Siz kulgili voqea haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team roared with laughter at the joke.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoaviy tadbir haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The CEO's humorous story about his first business failure had the entire conference hall roaring with laughter and created a relaxed atmosphere.
words.example3Translation: Bosh direktorning birinchi biznes muvaffaqiyatsizligi haqidagi hazil hikoyasi butun konferensiya zalini qattiq kuldirib, tinch muhit yaratdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoaviy tadbirlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To establish a standard or example for future actions.
words.example1: This will set a precedent for future projects.
words.example1Situation: Siz qaror haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our success set a precedent for the whole industry.
words.example2Situation: Siz yetakchilik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The way we handled this difficult client situation will set a precedent for how we manage similar challenges in the future.
words.example3Translation: Biz bu qiyin mijoz bilan vaziyatni qanday hal qilganimiz kelajakda shunga o'xshash qiyinchiliklarni qanday boshqarishimiz uchun namuna bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki standartlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Starting at a particular point in time and continuing thereafter.
words.example1: From next month onwards, we will work remotely.
words.example1Situation: Siz reja haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: From January onwards, new policies will apply.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki o'zgarishlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: From the beginning of next quarter onwards, all departments will be required to submit monthly performance reports using the new digital system.
words.example3Translation: Keyingi chorak boshidan boshlab barcha bo'limlar yangi raqamli tizim yordamida oylik natijalar hisobotlarini topshirishlari shart bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yangi tartiblar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Enduring; continuing for a significant period.
words.example1: We want a long-lasting relationship.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkorlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our goal is to create long-lasting products.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahsulot sifati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Building long-lasting trust with clients requires consistent quality, transparency, and excellent after-sales support.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlar bilan uzoq muddatli ishonchni qurish doimiy sifat, ochiqlik va ajoyib sotuvdan keyingi yordamni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Yo'l olmoq / O'z yo'lingiz bilan bormoq
words.definition: To progress or move toward a destination or goal.
words.example1: Make your way to the meeting room.
words.example1Situation: Siz yo'nalish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We are making our way toward becoming market leaders.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik maqsad haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: With dedication and continuous learning, young professionals can steadily make their way toward leadership positions in their chosen fields.
words.example3Translation: Fidoyilik va doimiy o'rganish bilan yosh mutaxassislar o'zlari tanlagan sohalarda rahbarlik lavozimlariga asta-sekin yo'l ola oladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera rivoji haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: To be looking to do something
words.definition: To be intending, planning, or seeking to take a particular action.
words.example1: We are looking to expand our market.
words.example1Situation: Siz reja haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is looking to hire new talent.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: We are actively looking to do something innovative that will differentiate us from our competitors in the coming year.
words.example3Translation: Biz kelgusi yilda raqobatchilarimizdan ajralib turadigan innovatsion ishni qilishni faol rejalashtirmoqdamiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik rejalashtirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A person’s physical appearance, often their facial features or attractiveness.
words.example1: Don't judge by someone’s looks.
words.example1Situation: Siz tashqi ko'rinish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company values skills more than someone’s looks.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR siyosati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In professional environments, focusing on someone’s skills and character rather than their looks leads to better hiring decisions and stronger teams.
words.example3Translation: Professional muhitda odamning ko'nikmalari va xarakteriga e'tibor qaratish, tashqi ko'rinish o'rniga, yaxshiroq ishga olish qarorlari va kuchliroq jamoalarga olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tenglik va xilma-xillik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To make less tight, restrictive, or rigid.

words.example1Situation: Siz qoidalar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Management decided to loosen the deadline.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The new policy aims to loosen restrictions on remote work to improve employee satisfaction and work-life balance.
words.example3Translation: Yangi siyosat xodimlar qoniqishi va ish-hayot muvozanatini yaxshilash uchun masofaviy ish cheklovlarini bo'shatishni maqsad qilgan.
words.example3Situation: Siz moslashuvchanlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Finally; decisively; leaving no possibility for repetition.
words.example1: Let's solve this once and for all.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammoni hal qilish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need to address this issue once and for all.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It's time to resolve the long-standing conflict with our supplier once and for all so we can focus on future growth opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Yetkazib beruvchi bilan uzoq vaqtdan beri davom etayotgan mojarolarni bir marta va butunlay hal qilish vaqti keldi, shunda biz kelajakdagi o'sish imkoniyatlariga e'tibor qarata olamiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammolarni hal qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A relationship characterised by frequent difficulties, tension, or conflict.

words.example2: Our partnership with that supplier is quite rocky.
words.example2Situation: Siz hamkorlik muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Despite the rocky relationship between the two departments, they managed to collaborate successfully on the urgent project and deliver excellent results.
words.example3Translation: Ikki bo'lim o'rtasidagi qiyin munosabatlarga qaramay, ular shoshilinch loyiha bo'yicha muvaffaqiyatli hamkorlik qilib, ajoyib natijalarga erishdilar.

words.definition: Most common, powerful, or influential in a particular context.

words.example1Situation: Siz til yoki madaniyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.example3: In the current market, digital transformation has become the predominant factor determining which companies will thrive and which will struggle.
words.example3Translation: Joriy bozorda raqamli transformatsiya qaysi kompaniyalar gullab-yashnashi va qaysilari qiynalishini belgilaydigan asosiy omilga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor tendensiyalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To cause a noticeable disturbance, attract attention, or provoke change.

words.example2Situation: Siz marketing muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Innovative startups that make waves in traditional industries often face strong resistance at first but eventually drive meaningful progress.
words.example3Translation: An'anaviy sanoatlarda shovqin ko'taradigan innovatsion startaplar dastlab kuchli qarshilikka duch kelishadi, ammo oxirida mazmunli taraqqiyotga hissa qo'shadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz innovatsiya va o'zgarish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To achieve recognition or establish a reputation.
words.example1: He is trying to make a name for himself.
words.example1Situation: Siz ambitsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is making a name for itself in Europe.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro kengayish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: By consistently delivering high-quality work and showing strong leadership, she has made a name for herself as one of the most reliable professionals in the industry.
words.example3Translation: Doimiy yuqori sifatli ish va kuchli rahbarlik ko'rsatish orqali u sanoatdagi eng ishonchli mutaxassislardan biri sifatida nom chiqardi.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional obro' haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To fail to maintain awareness or consideration of something important.
words.example1: Don't lose sight of our main goal.
words.example1Situation: Siz asosiy maqsad haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must not lose sight of customer needs.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In the pursuit of rapid growth, many companies lose sight of their core values and long-term vision, which can lead to serious problems later.
words.example3Translation: Tez o'sishga intilishda ko'plab kompaniyalar asosiy qadriyatlarini va uzoq muddatli tasavvurlarini ko'zdan qochirib qo'yishadi, bu keyinchalik jiddiy muammolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik muvozanat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Immediately; in a particular place; under direct pressure or scrutiny.

words.example1Situation: Siz tez javob haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need a decision on the spot.
words.example2Situation: Siz muzokaralar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The ability to solve problems on the spot during client meetings is what separates good professionals from average ones.
words.example3Translation: Mijoz uchrashuvlarida muammolarni darhol hal qilish qobiliyati yaxshi mutaxassislarni oddiy mutaxassislardan ajratib turadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional ko'nikmalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be anxious or worried about something.
words.example1: I won't lose sleep over this.
words.example1Situation: Siz tashvish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager doesn't lose sleep over small issues.
words.example2Situation: Siz stress boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While we take our responsibilities seriously, we try not to lose sleep over things we cannot control and instead focus on solutions.
words.example3Translation: Mas'uliyatimizni jiddiy qabul qilgan holda, biz nazorat qila olmaydigan narsalar uchun tuni bilan uxlamaslikka harakat qilamiz va yechimlarga e'tibor qaratamiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz stress va farovonlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To frighten or shock someone intensely.

words.example1Situation: Siz qo'rqinchli yangilik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The accident statistics made our blood run cold.
words.example2Situation: Siz xavfsizlik hisobotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The detailed report about the potential risks made everyone's blood run cold, forcing the leadership to take immediate preventive measures.
words.example3Translation: Potensial xavflar haqidagi batafsil hisobot barchaning qonini muzlatdi va rahbariyatni darhol oldini olish choralarini ko'rishga majbur qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavf-xatar tahlili haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To acquire the basic skills and procedures of a task or role.

words.example1Situation: Siz yangi ish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: New employees need time to learn the ropes.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'qitish jarayoni haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The mentoring program helps new recruits learn the ropes faster and feel more confident in their roles within the first month.
words.example3Translation: Mentorlik dasturi yangi xodimlarga birinchi oy ichida ishni tezroq o'rganib olishga va o'z lavozimlarida ko'proq ishonch his qilishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yangi xodimlar moslashuvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A sudden fortunate or positive event.
words.example1: Meeting him was a stroke of luck.
words.example1Situation: Siz omad haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Getting that contract was a real stroke of luck.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Securing the partnership with that major client was a stroke of luck that significantly accelerated our growth this year.
words.example3Translation: O'sha yirik mijoz bilan hamkorlik o'rnatish bu yil o'sishimizni sezilarli tezlashtirgan omadning bir zarbasi bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat omillari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To take someone’s circumstances or limitations into consideration.
words.example1: We should make allowances for him.
words.example1Situation: Siz tushunish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Managers need to make allowances for personal situations.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Good leaders know how to make allowances for someone going through difficult personal times while still maintaining team standards and fairness.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi rahbarlar qiyin shaxsiy paytlarni boshdan kechirayotgan odam uchun imtiyoz qilishni biladilar, shu bilan birga jamoa standartlari va adolatni saqlaydilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz empatiya va rahbarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Mainly; primarily.
words.example1: Our clients are predominantly from Europe.
words.example1Situation: Siz mijozlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team is predominantly young professionals.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa tarkibi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our business is predominantly focused on digital solutions, although we still maintain some traditional services for long-term clients.
words.example3Translation: Bizning biznesimiz asosan raqamli yechimlarga yo'naltirilgan, ammo eski mijozlar uchun ba'zi an'anaviy xizmatlarni ham saqlab qolamiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya yo'nalishi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Employment that yields high financial reward.
words.example1: It is a very lucrative job.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We are offering a lucrative job opportunity.
words.example2Situation: Siz vakansiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While a lucrative job is attractive, many professionals now also seek roles that provide personal fulfillment and good work-life balance.
words.example3Translation: Daromadli ish jozibali bo'lsa ham, ko'plab mutaxassislar endi shaxsiy qoniqish va yaxshi ish-hayot muvozanatini ham beradigan lavozimlarni izlamoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera tanlovi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The deliberate and violent killing of many people.
words.example1: It was a terrible massacre.
words.example1Situation: Siz tarixiy yoki jiddiy voqea haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must prevent such massacres.
words.example2Situation: Siz inson huquqlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The international community strongly condemned the massacre and called for immediate humanitarian aid and investigation.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro hamjamiyat qirg'inni qattiq qoraladi va darhol insonparvarlik yordami hamda tergov o'tkazishga chaqirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz global masalalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Additionally or secretly, often alongside a primary occupation.
words.example1: He works on the side as a consultant.
words.example1Situation: Siz qo'shimcha ish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Many employees have side projects on the side.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar faolligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Some team members run small businesses on the side, which we support as long as it does not affect their main responsibilities.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi jamoa a'zolari asosiy mas'uliyatlariga ta'sir qilmasa, biz qo'llab-quvvatlaydigan kichik biznes bilan shug'ullanadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar rivoji haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Bring a lump to your throat
words.definition: To cause a strong feeling of emotion, typically sadness or awe.
words.example1: The story brought a lump to my throat.
words.example1Situation: Siz ta'sirli voqea haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The video brought a lump to everyone's throat.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki tadbir haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The farewell speech by our retiring founder brought a lump to everyone's throat as he recounted the company's journey from its humble beginnings.
words.example3Translation: Nafaqaga chiqayotgan asoschi rahbarimizning xayrlashuv nutqi kompaniyaning oddiy boshlanishidan boshlab o'tgan yo'lini aytib berganida barchaning tomog'ini tiqdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz his-tuyg'ular va motivatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To reconcile or come to terms with someone; to reach an understanding.
words.example1: We need to make so with them.
words.example1Situation: Siz mojarolarni hal qilish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Let's make so with our partners.
words.example2Situation: Siz hamkorlik muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After several difficult meetings, both sides finally managed to make so with each other and signed a mutually beneficial agreement.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha qiyin uchrashuvlardan so'ng, ikkala tomon ham bir-biri bilan murosaga kelib, o'zaro foydali shartnomani imzoladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muzokaralar va murosaga kelish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be scarce, highly valued, or in great demand.
words.example1: Skilled workers are at a premium.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishchi kuchi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Time is at a premium during this phase.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muddati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In today's market, experienced AI engineers are at a premium, which is why companies are offering competitive salaries and benefits to attract them.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi bozorda tajribali sun'iy intellekt muhandislari juda talabgir bo'lib, shuning uchun kompaniyalar ularni jalb qilish uchun raqobatbardosh ish haqi va imtiyozlar taklif qilmoqdalar.
words.example3Situation: Siz mutaxassislar bozori haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To have a lasting influence or noticeable impact.
words.example1: He wants to leave his mark.
words.example1Situation: Siz ambitsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company aims to leave its mark in the industry.
words.example2Situation: Siz brending haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: True leaders strive not just for success, but to leave their mark by mentoring others and creating positive change that lasts beyond their tenure.
words.example3Translation: Chin rahbarlar nafaqat muvaffaqiyatga, balki boshqalarni o'qitish va o'z lavozimlaridan keyin ham davom etadigan ijobiy o'zgarishlar yaratish orqali nom qoldirishga intiladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik merosi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The attractive appeal or temptation of wealth or renown.
words.example1: Many are drawn by the lure of fame.
words.example1Situation: Siz ambitsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Don't be blinded by the lure of money.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy qarorlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The lure of fame and money leads many talented young people away from their true passions and long-term fulfillment.
words.example3Translation: Shon-shuhrat va pul jozibasi ko'plab iqtidorli yoshlarni haqiqiy ehtiroslari va uzoq muddatli qoniqishdan uzoqlashtiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat va qadriyatlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to emphasise a point or introduce a cautionary remark.
words.example1: It's expensive, mind you.
words.example1Situation: Siz ogohlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The project is on time, mind you.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot berishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The solution works well, mind you, but we still need to test it thoroughly before full implementation.
words.example3Translation: Yechim yaxshi ishlaydi, ammo to'liq joriy etishdan oldin uni sinchkov sinovdan o'tkazishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvozanatli baho berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To focus on your own affairs rather than interfering with others.
words.example1: Mind your own business.
words.example1Situation: Siz aralashishni to'xtatayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We should all mind our own business sometimes.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofis madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While teamwork is important, learning when to mind your own business and respect others' privacy is equally crucial in a healthy workplace.
words.example3Translation: Jamoaviy ish muhim bo'lsa ham, qachon o'z ishing bilan band bo'lish va boshqalarning maxfiyligini hurmat qilishni bilish sog'lom ish muhitida bir xil darajada muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaxsiy chegaralar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Acting spontaneously without forethought.
words.example1: He bought it on impulse.
words.example1Situation: Siz xarid haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We should not make decisions on impulse.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik qarorlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While some successful ideas come on impulse, most important business decisions should be based on careful analysis rather than acting on impulse.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi muvaffaqiyatli g'oyalar birinchi o'ydan paydo bo'lsa ham, ko'pchilik muhim biznes qarorlari birinchi o'ydan emas, balki sinchkov tahlilga asoslanishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz qaror qabul qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To mix socially with others.
words.example1: Try to mingle with the guests.
words.example1Situation: Siz tadbir haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team likes to mingle with clients.
words.example2Situation: Siz networking haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: At international conferences, it is important to mingle with professionals from different backgrounds to expand your network and gain new perspectives.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro konferensiyalarda turli fonli mutaxassislar bilan aralashib, tarmoqlaringizni kengaytirish va yangi nuqtai nazarlarga ega bo'lish muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz networking va aloqalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: As soon as; immediately upon a particular event or moment.
words.example1: The minute that I heard the news...
words.example1Situation: Siz tez reaktsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Call me the minute that you arrive.
words.example2Situation: Siz aloqa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The minute that we receive the final approval, we will begin the full implementation of the new system across all departments.
words.example3Translation: Yakuniy tasdiqni olganimiz bilan birga, yangi tizimni barcha bo'limlarda to'liq joriy etishni boshlaymiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha bosqichlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An extremely small or insignificant quantity.
words.example1: There was only a minute amount left.
words.example1Situation: Siz yetishmovchilik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We only need a minute amount of this material.
words.example2Situation: Siz resurslar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even a minute amount of contamination in the production process can affect the quality of the entire batch and damage our reputation.
words.example3Translation: Ishlab chiqarish jarayonidagi hatto juda oz miqdordagi ifloslanish ham butun partiyaning sifatiga ta'sir qilishi va obro'mizga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz sifat nazorati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To authoritatively recommend or set out (usually medicine, rules, or treatment).
words.example1: The doctor will prescribe medicine.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The law prescribes strict procedures.
words.example2Situation: Siz huquqiy masalalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: International standards prescribe specific safety measures that all companies in this sector must follow to protect workers and the environment.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro standartlar ushbu sohadagi barcha kompaniyalar xodimlar va atrof-muhitni himoya qilish uchun bajarishi shart bo'lgan aniq xavfsizlik choralarini buyuradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qoidalar va standartlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An unsatisfactorily small or inadequate quantity.
words.example1: They offered a miserable amount.
words.example1Situation: Siz taklif haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The bonus was a miserable amount.
words.example2Situation: Siz rag'batlantirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Paying such a miserable amount for overtime work demotivates employees and can lead to higher turnover rates.
words.example3Translation: Qo'shimcha ish uchun bunchalik oz miqdorda haq to'lash xodimlarni demotivatsiya qiladi va yuqori kadr almashinuviga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish haqi va motivatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An unfortunate event resulting in serious consequences.
words.example1: It was a tragic mishap.
words.example1Situation: Siz baxtsiz hodisa haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must prevent such tragic mishaps.
words.example2Situation: Siz xavfsizlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The investigation revealed that the tragic mishap could have been avoided with better safety protocols and regular equipment checks.
words.example3Translation: Tergov shuni ko'rsatdiki, fojiali baxtsiz hodisa yaxshiroq xavfsizlik protokollari va muntazam jihozlarni tekshirish bilan oldini olish mumkin edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavfsizlik va oldini olish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Multiple unfortunate events occurring consecutively or repeatedly.
words.example1: It was a series of mishaps.
words.example1Situation: Siz ketma-ket muammolar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We faced a series of mishaps during the launch.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After a series of mishaps in the supply chain, the company decided to diversify its suppliers to reduce future risks.
words.example3Translation: Ta'minot zanjiridagi bir qator baxtsiz hodisalardan so'ng, kompaniya kelajakdagi xavflarni kamaytirish uchun yetkazib beruvchilarini xilma-xil qilishga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz risklarni boshqarish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To understand incorrectly; to give a wrong meaning to something.
words.example1: Don't misinterpret my words.
words.example1Situation: Siz suhbatda tushunmovchilik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The client misinterpret our proposal.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It is easy to misinterpret cultural differences in international business, which is why clear communication and cultural awareness training are essential.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro biznesda madaniy farqlarni noto'g'ri talqin qilish oson, shuning uchun aniq muloqot va madaniy xabardorlik treninglari juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro hamkorlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: Your job is on the line
words.definition: Your employment is at risk; your position depends on current performance.
words.example1: Your job is on the line if you don't improve.
words.example1Situation: Siz ogohlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The whole team's jobs are on the line with this project.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the company faced major losses, many employees realized their jobs were on the line, motivating everyone to work harder and find solutions.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya katta zarar ko'rganda, ko'plab xodimlar o'z ishlarining xavf ostida ekanligini anglab, barchani qattiqroq ishlashga va yechim topishga undadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz motivatsiya va inqiroz haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be the factor that determines the final outcome or success.
words.example1: This decision will prove decisive.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhim qaror haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our new strategy proved decisive in winning the contract.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The strong teamwork and quick problem-solving skills of our staff proved decisive in overcoming the unexpected challenges during the project.
words.example3Translation: Jamoamizning kuchli hamkorligi va muammolarni tez hal qilish qobiliyati loyiha davomidagi kutilmagan qiyinchiliklarni yengishda hal qiluvchi bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoaviy muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To fail to take advantage of an opportunity.
words.example1: Don't miss the boat on this deal.
words.example1Situation: Siz imkoniyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We almost missed the boat with this technology.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Companies that missed the boat on digital transformation several years ago are now struggling to catch up with more forward-thinking competitors.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha yil oldin raqamli transformatsiya imkoniyatini o'tkazib yuborgan kompaniyalar hozir oldinga qarab fikrlaydigan raqobatchilardan ortda qolmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor imkoniyatlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Tan olish / Javobgarlikni o'z zimmasiga olish
words.definition: To admit responsibility or confess to an action.
words.example1: You should own up to your mistake.
words.example1Situation: Siz mas'uliyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team always owns up when things go wrong.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Leaders who own up to their mistakes quickly earn more respect and trust from their teams than those who try to shift blame.
words.example3Translation: Xatolarini tez tan oladigan rahbarlar aybni boshqalarga yuklashga urinadiganlarga qaraganda jamoasidan ko'proq hurmat va ishonch qozonadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik va mas'uliyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Engaged in an important task or purpose, often with urgency or determination.
words.example1: She is on a mission to succeed.
words.example1Situation: Siz ambitsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our sales team is on a mission this quarter.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The entire department is on a mission to complete the transformation project before the end of the fiscal year.
words.example3Translation: Butun bo'lim moliyaviy yil tugashidan oldin transformatsiya loyihasini yakunlash uchun muhim topshiriq bilan band.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoaviy maqsadlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To complain persistently about something, usually in a low or whining tone.
words.example1: Stop moaning about the weather.
words.example1Situation: Siz salbiy munosabat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We don't moan about challenges at work.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Instead of moaning about difficulties, successful professionals focus on finding solutions and turning challenges into opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Qiyinchiliklar haqida shikoyat qilish o'rniga, muvaffaqiyatli mutaxassislar yechim topishga va qiyinchiliklarni imkoniyatga aylantirishga e'tibor qaratadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammolarni hal qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: On the spur of the moment
words.definition: Done impulsively, without prior planning.
words.example1: We decided on the spur of the moment.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan qaror haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The trip was planned on the spur of the moment.
words.example2Situation: Siz tez qarorlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While some great ideas come on the spur of the moment, most successful business strategies require careful planning and analysis.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi ajoyib g'oyalar to'satdan paydo bo'lsa ham, ko'pchilik muvaffaqiyatli biznes strategiyalari sinchkov rejalashtirish va tahlilni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qaror qabul qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: To be on the same wavelength
words.definition: To understand or think in a similar way as someone else.
words.example1: We are on the same wavelength.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamfikrlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team is on the same wavelength about this.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the whole leadership team is on the same wavelength, decision-making becomes faster and more effective.
words.example3Translation: Butun rahbariyat jamoasi bir to'lqin uzunligida bo'lganda, qaror qabul qilish tezroq va samaraliroq bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoaviy hamkorlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To increase in strength, influence, or speed over time.
words.example1: The project is gaining momentum.
words.example1Situation: Siz loyiha holati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our campaign is gaining momentum.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing natijalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After the successful pilot phase, the digital transformation initiative began to gain momentum across all departments.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli sinov bosqichidan so'ng, raqamli transformatsiya tashabbusi barcha bo'limlarda kuchayib bordi.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'sish va rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Relating to money, finance, or currency.
words.example1: We need monetary support.
words.example1Situation: Siz moliyaviy yordam haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The monetary value is very high.
words.example2Situation: Siz investitsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While monetary rewards are important, many employees also value non-monetary benefits such as flexible hours and professional development opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Pul mukofotlari muhim bo'lsa ham, ko'plab xodimlar moslashuvchan ish vaqti va professional rivojlanish imkoniyatlari kabi nomoliyaviy imtiyozlarni ham qadrlaydilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz motivatsiya va rag'batlantirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To attribute one’s achievements to a particular cause, person, or factor.
words.example1: I owe my success to my team.
words.example1Situation: Siz minnatdorchilik bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We owe our success to hard work and innovation.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: She openly says she owes her success to the mentors who guided her in the early stages of her career.
words.example3Translation: U o'z muvaffaqiyatini karyerasining dastlabki bosqichlarida yo'l-yo'riq ko'rsatgan ustozlariga qarzdor ekanligini ochiq aytadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat sabablari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Lacking ethical principles or a sense of right and wrong.
words.example1: He has no morals.
words.example1Situation: Siz axloq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We cannot work with people who have no morals.
words.example2Situation: Siz hamkorlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In business, dealing with partners who have no morals can lead to serious reputational damage and legal problems in the long run.
words.example3Translation: Biznesda axloqsiz hamkorlar bilan ish olib borish uzoq muddatda obro'ga jiddiy zarar yetkazishi va huquqiy muammolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes etikasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Actions taken to reduce the risk of harm or undesirable outcomes.
words.example1: We need preventive measures.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavfsizlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Preventive measures saved us from major losses.
words.example2Situation: Siz inqiroz muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Implementing preventive measures in cybersecurity is much more cost-effective than dealing with the consequences of a data breach.
words.example3Translation: Kiberxavfsizlikda oldini olish choralarini joriy etish ma'lumotlar oqishi oqibatlarini bartaraf etishdan ancha arzonroq va samaraliroqdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavfsizlik strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The frequency or proportion of deaths in a specific population over a period.
words.example1: The mortality rate is decreasing.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq statistikasi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We study the mortality rate in our industry.
words.example2Situation: Siz xavfsizlik hisobotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Thanks to improved safety standards and training, the mortality rate in our sector has dropped significantly over the past decade.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshilangan xavfsizlik standartlari va o'qitish tufayli so'nggi o'n yil ichida sanoatimizdagi o'lim darajasi sezilarli darajada pasaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavfsizlik va sog'liq haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Under no circumstances; absolutely not.
words.example1: On no account should you share this.
words.example1Situation: Siz maxfiylik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: On no account will we compromise quality.
words.example2Situation: Siz sifat standartlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: On no account should sensitive client data be stored on personal devices without proper encryption and security protocols.
words.example3Translation: Maxfiy mijoz ma'lumotlarini tegishli shifrlash va xavfsizlik protokollarisiz shaxsiy qurilmalarda saqlash hech qanday holatda mumkin emas.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavfsizlik qoidalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Nausea or discomfort caused by movement, typically in a vehicle.
words.example1: I suffer from motion sickness.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Many people get motion sickness on long flights.
words.example2Situation: Siz sayohat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: For employees who frequently travel for business, providing solutions for motion sickness can greatly improve their comfort and productivity during trips.
words.example3Translation: Tez-tez xizmat safarlariga chiqadigan xodimlar uchun harakat kasalligi yechimlarini taqdim etish ularning qulayligi va safar davomidagi samaradorligini sezilarli yaxshilashi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar qulayligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To formally suggest a course of action, usually in a meeting or legislative setting.
words.example1: I propose a motion to approve the budget.
words.example1Situation: Siz yig'ilishda taklif bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The chairman will propose a motion.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbariyat yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During the annual general meeting, a senior shareholder proposed a motion to increase investment in sustainable practices.
words.example3Translation: Yillik umumiy yig'ilishda katta aktsiyador barqaror amaliyotlarga investitsiyani oshirish bo'yicha taklif kiritdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ boshqaruv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Likely or expected to happen.
words.example1: A promotion is on the cards.
words.example1Situation: Siz karyera haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Expansion into Asia is on the cards.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik reja haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: With our current growth rate, a merger with a larger company is definitely on the cards within the next two years.
words.example3Translation: Joriy o'sish sur'atlarimizni hisobga olgan holda, kattaroq kompaniya bilan birlashish kelgusi ikki yil ichida aniq kutilmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz kelajak prognozi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To provoke a strong emotional reaction.
words.example1: His comment hit a nerve.
words.example1Situation: Siz nozik mavzu haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The criticism hit a nerve with the team.
words.example2Situation: Siz fikr-mulohaza muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The client's feedback about our service quality hit a nerve, prompting us to immediately review and improve our customer support processes.
words.example3Translation: Mijozning xizmat sifati haqidagi fikri og'riqli joyga tegib, mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish jarayonlarimizni darhol ko'rib chiqib, yaxshilashga undadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlar fikri haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To organise and launch a concerted effort to achieve a goal.
words.example1: We will mount a campaign.
words.example1Situation: Siz marketing haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team mounted a successful campaign.
words.example2Situation: Siz natijalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The marketing department mounted a campaign to raise awareness about our new sustainable product line across Europe.
words.example3Translation: Marketing bo'limi Yevropa bo'ylab yangi barqaror mahsulot seriyamiz haqida xabardorlikni oshirish uchun kampaniya o'tkazdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz reklama va brending haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Occurring or achieved very quickly or unexpectedly.
words.example1: Success doesn't happen overnight.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The market changed overnight.
words.example2Situation: Siz bozor o'zgarishlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While some startups seem to succeed overnight, most actually take years of hard work and iteration before achieving significant growth.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi startaplar bir kechada muvaffaqiyatga erishgandek tuyulsa ham, ko'pchiligi sezilarli o'sishga erishishdan oldin yillar davomida mashaqqatli mehnat va takomillashtirishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat yo'li haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To show audacity or courage to do something bold or challenging.
words.example1: She had the nerve to speak up.
words.example1Situation: Siz jasorat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: He had the nerve to challenge the CEO.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki muhokama haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It takes real courage to have the nerve to question established practices and propose radical changes in a traditional organization.
words.example3Translation: An'anaviy tashkilotda mavjud amaliyotlarni shubha ostiga qo'yib, radikal o'zgarishlarni taklif qilish uchun haqiqiy jasorat kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik va jasorat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be close to a particular state or event.
words.example1: We are on the verge of a breakthrough.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The company is on the verge of collapse.
words.example2Situation: Siz inqiroz haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After months of intensive research, our team is on the verge of discovering a revolutionary solution that could transform the industry.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha oy davomidagi intensiv tadqiqotlardan so'ng, jamoamiz sanoatni o'zgartirishi mumkin bo'lgan inqilobiy yechimni kashf etish arafasida turibdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz innovatsiya va kashfiyotlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Failure by healthcare professionals to provide adequate care, resulting in harm.
words.example1: This is a case of medical negligence.
words.example1Situation: Siz tibbiy xato haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must avoid any medical negligence.
words.example2Situation: Siz sog'liqni saqlash siyosati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Medical negligence can have devastating consequences for patients and lead to serious legal and reputational issues for healthcare providers.
words.example3Translation: Tibbiy beparvolik bemorlar uchun halokatli oqibatlarga olib kelishi va sog'liqni saqlash muassasalari uchun jiddiy huquqiy va obro'viy muammolarni keltirib chiqarishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz tibbiy xavfsizlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To coincide partially in time, space, or content.
words.example1: Our responsibilities overlap.
words.example1Situation: Siz vazifalar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The two projects overlap in several areas.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: There is some overlap between the marketing and sales strategies, which allows for better coordination and more effective campaigns.
words.example3Translation: Marketing va savdo strategiyalari o'rtasida bir oz o'xshashlik bor, bu yaxshiroq muvofiqlashtirish va samaraliroq kampaniyalarga imkon beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz bo'limlar hamkorligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Expenditure that is unnecessary or avoidable.
words.example1: This is a needless expense.
words.example1Situation: Siz byudjet haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must cut needless expenses.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy optimallashtirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Investing in proper training helps avoid needless expenses caused by repeated mistakes and inefficient processes.
words.example3Translation: To'g'ri o'qitishga sarmoya kiritish takroriy xatolar va samarasiz jarayonlar tufayli yuzaga keladigan keraksiz xarajatlardan qochishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xarajatlarni boshqarish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To counterbalance or compensate for something.
words.example1: The savings will offset the costs.
words.example1Situation: Siz moliyaviy hisob-kitob haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Increased sales will offset the higher expenses.
words.example2Situation: Siz byudjet muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The environmental benefits of our new sustainable practices will help offset the initial investment costs within the first two years.
words.example3Translation: Yangi barqaror amaliyotlarimizning ekologik foydalari dastlabki investitsiya xarajatlarini birinchi ikki yil ichida qoplashga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqarorlik va investitsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Regardless of cost, effort, or consequences.
words.example1: We must win this contract at any price.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqobat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Quality must be maintained at any price.
words.example2Situation: Siz sifat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: We are committed to delivering the best customer experience at any price because long-term loyalty is more valuable than short-term profits.
words.example3Translation: Biz uzoq muddatli sadoqat qisqa muddatli foydadan qimmatliroq bo'lgani uchun eng yaxshi mijoz tajribasini har qanday narxda ta'minlashga sodiqmiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Increasing stress, strain, or anxiety in a situation.
words.example1: There is mounting tension in the team.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamoa holati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Mounting tension between departments is a concern.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki munosabatlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The mounting tension before the product launch was relieved when the first positive customer feedback started coming in.
words.example3Translation: Mahsulot chiqarilishidan oldingi kuchayib borayotgan taranglik birinchi ijobiy mijoz fikrlari kelishi bilan bartaraf etildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz va bosim haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To pass a thread through the eye of a needle; metaphorically, to navigate a difficult task with precision.
words.example1: Threading a needle is hard with shaky hands.
words.example1Situation: Siz nozik ish haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team had to thread a needle with the tight deadline.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Negotiating the complex international contract required us to thread a needle between legal requirements, cultural sensitivities, and business interests.
words.example3Translation: Murakkab xalqaro shartnomani muzokara qilish huquqiy talablar, madaniy nozikliklar va biznes manfaatlari o'rtasida aniq harakat qilishni talab qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muzokaralar mahorati haqida xalqaro konferensiyada gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To get onto a horse, often implying readiness to ride.
words.example1: It's time to mount the horse and move forward.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi bosqich haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is ready to mount the horse and expand.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After months of preparation, the leadership team decided it was time to mount the horse and aggressively enter the new Asian markets.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha oy tayyorgarlikdan so'ng, rahbariyat jamoasi yangi Osiyo bozorlariga faol kirish vaqti kelganini qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kengayish strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To hurry or proceed more quickly.
words.example1: We need to get a move on.
words.example1Situation: Siz shoshilish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team must get a move on with the project.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muddati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: If we want to stay ahead of our competitors, we need to get a move on and implement the new marketing strategy before the end of this quarter.
words.example3Translation: Raqobatchilarimizdan oldinda bo'lishni istasak, yangi marketing strategiyasini shu chorak oxirigacha joriy etish uchun tezroq harakat qilishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqobat va tezlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unattractive or discouraging, causing aversion or discomfort.
words.example1: His attitude was quite off-putting.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning xulqi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The website design is a bit off-putting.
words.example2Situation: Siz brending muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: An off-putting customer service experience can cause clients to switch to competitors even if the product quality is superior.
words.example3Translation: Bezovta qiluvchi mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish tajribasi mahsulot sifati yaxshiroq bo'lsa ham, mijozlarni raqobatchilarga o'tkazib yuborishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlar tajribasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: To be not up to much
words.definition: To be of little quality, importance, or value.
words.example1: The movie was not up to much.
words.example1Situation: Siz baho berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Last quarter's results were not up to much.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although the first version of the app was not up to much, the latest update has significantly improved user experience and functionality.
words.example3Translation: Ilovaning birinchi versiyasi unchalik yaxshi bo'lmagan bo'lsa ham, so'nggi yangilanish foydalanuvchi tajribasi va funksionalligini sezilarli yaxshiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mahsulot rivoji haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To suppress one’s ego or pride in order to accept a situation or reconcile.
words.example1: Sometimes you have to swallow your pride.
words.example1Situation: Siz murosaga kelish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manager swallowed his pride and apologized.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Great leaders know when to swallow their pride, admit mistakes, and focus on finding solutions rather than protecting their ego.
words.example3Translation: Buyuk rahbarlar qachon g'ururlarini yutib, xatolarini tan olish va ego'larini himoya qilish o'rniga yechim topishga e'tibor qaratish kerakligini biladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik va kamtarinlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To hear a conversation unintentionally.
words.example1: I overheard them talking.
words.example1Situation: Siz tasodifiy suhbat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We overheard the clients' concerns.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar fikri haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While waiting in the lobby, I overheard two senior executives discussing the upcoming merger, which gave me valuable insight into future company plans.
words.example3Translation: Qabulxonada kutib o'tirganimda, ikki yuqori rahbarning yaqinlashib kelayotgan qo'shilish haqida suhbatini tasodifan eshitib qoldim, bu menga kompaniya kelajak rejalari haqida qimmatli ma'lumot berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki aloqa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A situation characterised by confusion or disorder.
words.example1: There was a big muddle with the orders.
words.example1Situation: Siz tartibsizlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The schedule change caused a big muddle.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Due to poor communication between departments, there was a big muddle with the delivery schedules that took several days to resolve.
words.example3Translation: Bo'limlar o'rtasidagi yomon aloqa tufayli yetkazib berish jadvalida katta chalkashlik yuzaga keldi, uni hal qilish uchun bir necha kun kerak bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki aloqa muammolari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: In close competition, with little to separate the competitors.
words.example1: The two teams are neck and neck.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqobat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We are neck and neck with our main competitor.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In the race for market leadership, our company is currently neck and neck with the industry leader, making the next quarter crucial.
words.example3Translation: Bozor yetakchiligi uchun poygada kompaniyamiz hozir sanoat yetakchisi bilan bo'yinma-bo'yin, shuning uchun keyingi chorak hal qiluvchi bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqobatbardoshlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: In a remote, unusual, or less-known location.
words.example1: The village is off the beaten track.
words.example1Situation: Siz joy haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We found a great restaurant off the beaten track.
words.example2Situation: Siz sayohat yoki tadbir haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Exploring markets off the beaten track often reveals unique opportunities that mainstream competitors have not yet discovered.
words.example3Translation: Oddiy yo'ldan tashqari bozorlarni o'rganish ko'pincha asosiy raqobatchilar hali kashf etmagan noyob imkoniyatlarni ochib beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor kashfiyoti haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Confused or unclear reasoning.
words.example1: That is muddled thinking.
words.example1Situation: Siz noto'g'ri fikr haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must avoid muddled thinking in strategy.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Muddled thinking during crisis situations often leads to poor decisions that can have long-lasting negative effects on the organization.
words.example3Translation: Inqiroz paytida chalkash fikrlash ko'pincha tashkilot uchun uzoq muddatli salbiy oqibatlarga olib keladigan yomon qarorlarga sabab bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Important, famous, or easily noticeable.
words.example1: She is a prominent lawyer.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhim shaxs haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is becoming a prominent player.
words.example2Situation: Siz brending haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The prominent industry expert praised our innovative approach during the international conference, which significantly boosted our visibility.
words.example3Translation: Mashhur sanoat mutaxassisi xalqaro konferensiyada bizning innovatsion yondashuvimizni maqtadi, bu bizning ko'rinishimizni sezilarli oshirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz obro' va tan olish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Close to crying; emotionally overwhelmed.
words.example1: She was near to tears.
words.example1Situation: Siz his-tuyg'ular haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team was near to tears after the bad news.
words.example2Situation: Siz inqiroz muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the founder announced his retirement after 25 years, many longtime employees were near to tears as they remembered the company's journey.
words.example3Translation: Asoschi 25 yildan keyin nafaqaga chiqishini e'lon qilganda, ko'p yillik xodimlar kompaniya yo'lini eslab, yig'lagudek holatda edilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz his-tuyg'ular va sadoqat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A soft or low sound, often of speech, complaint, or expression.
words.example1: She murmured something.
words.example1Situation: Siz past ovozda gapirish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The audience began to murmur.
words.example2Situation: Siz taqdimot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the CEO announced unexpected changes, a murmur spread through the hall as employees quietly discussed what it might mean for their future.
words.example3Translation: Bosh direktor kutilmagan o'zgarishlarni e'lon qilganda, xodimlar kelajaklari uchun nimani anglatishini pichirlab muhokama qilayotganlarida zal bo'ylab pichirlab ovoz tarqaldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki aloqa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Voluntarily; without being forced.
words.example1: He did it of his own accord.
words.example1Situation: Siz ixtiyoriy harakat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team volunteered of their own accord.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa tashabbusi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: She decided to take on extra responsibilities of her own accord, demonstrating strong initiative and dedication to the company's success.
words.example3Translation: U qo'shimcha mas'uliyatlarni o'z xohishi bilan o'z zimmasiga oldi va bu kompaniya muvaffaqiyatiga kuchli tashabbus va fidoyilikni namoyon etdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar tashabbusi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Having a natural tendency to do something or be affected by something.
words.example1: He is prone to stress.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy xususiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our industry is prone to rapid changes.
words.example2Situation: Siz bozor haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: People who work long hours without proper rest are prone to burnout, which is why we encourage regular breaks and work-life balance.
words.example3Translation: Uzoq soatlar to'g'ri dam olmasdan ishlaydigan odamlar charchoqqa moyil bo'ladilar, shuning uchun biz muntazam tanaffuslar va ish-hayot muvozanatini rag'batlantiramiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar salomatligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to indicate the inclusion of everything possible in a category.
words.example1: We have it all — you name it.
words.example1Situation: Siz tanlov haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team can handle any task — you name it.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa imkoniyatlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our company offers a wide range of services — marketing, design, development, consulting, you name it — to meet all client needs.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyamiz mijozlarning barcha ehtiyojlarini qondirish uchun marketing, dizayn, ishlab chiqish, maslahat — nima xohlasangiz, keng ko'lamli xizmatlarni taklif qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xizmatlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Extremely careful and precise, paying great attention to detail.
words.example1: She is very meticulous.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy fazilat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our quality control team is meticulous.
words.example2Situation: Siz sifat nazorati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The meticulous planning and attention to detail by the project team ensured that the international conference ran smoothly without any major issues.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha jamoasining sinchkov rejalashtirishi va tafsilotlarga e'tibori xalqaro konferensiyaning hech qanday katta muammosiz muvaffaqiyatli o'tishini ta'minladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional yondashuv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be full of self-assurance and certainty.
words.example1: She overflowed with confidence.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijobiy munosabat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team is overflowing with confidence.
words.example2Situation: Siz motivatsiya yig'ilishida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After several successful projects, the young designer overflowed with confidence and began taking on more challenging creative assignments.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha muvaffaqiyatli loyihalardan so'ng, yosh dizayner o'ziga bo'lgan ishonchga to'lib, yanada murakkab ijodiy topshiriqlarni o'z zimmasiga ola boshladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional o'sish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Possessing great strength, power, or influence.
words.example1: He is a mighty leader.
words.example1Situation: Siz yetakchi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is becoming a mighty force.
words.example2Situation: Siz brending haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The mighty influence of technology giants continues to shape global markets, consumer behavior, and even government policies worldwide.
words.example3Translation: Texnologiya gigantlarining ulkan ta'siri global bozorlarni, iste'molchi xatti-harakatlarini va hatto butun dunyo hukumat siyosatlarini shakllantirishda davom etmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz global kuchlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To make a fresh start or change one’s behaviour for the better.
words.example1: It's time to turn over a new leaf.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zgarish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is turning over a new leaf.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik yangilanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After the difficult year, the entire organization decided to turn over a new leaf by adopting more sustainable practices and transparent communication.
words.example3Translation: Qiyin yildan so'ng, butun tashkilot barqarorroq amaliyotlar va ochiq muloqotni qabul qilib, yangi sahifadan boshlashga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'zgarish va takomil haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To inform someone of important or often unpleasant information.
words.example1: I have to break the news to her.
words.example1Situation: Siz noxush xabar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The manager broke the news to the team.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki aloqa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The CEO personally broke the news to the staff about the upcoming merger to ensure transparency and address any concerns directly.
words.example3Translation: Bosh direktor yaqinlashib kelayotgan qo'shilish haqidagi xabarni xodimlarga shaxsan yetkazdi, shaffoflikni ta'minlash va har qanday tashvishlarni to'g'ridan-to'g'ri hal qilish uchun.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz kommunikatsiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To flourish, succeed, or achieve wealth and good fortune.
words.example1: The business continues to prosper.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is prospering in new markets.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro kengayish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Companies that invest in their people and sustainable practices tend to prosper even during challenging economic conditions.
words.example3Translation: Odamlariga va barqaror amaliyotlariga sarmoya kiritadigan kompaniyalar hatto qiyin iqtisodiy sharoitlarda ham gullab-yashnaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Physically unfit or not in good condition; also used metaphorically for poorly functioning systems.
words.example1: I'm feeling out of shape.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our old system is out of shape.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnologiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After months of remote work without proper exercise, many employees found themselves physically out of shape and less productive.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha oy masofaviy ishlash va to'g'ri jismoniy mashq qilmaslikdan so'ng, ko'plab xodimlar o'zlarini jismonan formadan chiqqan va kamroq samarali his qilishdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar salomatligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Despite extremely unlikely or difficult circumstances.
words.example1: We succeeded against all the odds.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team won against all the odds.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Against all the odds, the small startup managed to compete with industry giants and capture a significant market share within three years.
words.example3Translation: Barcha imkoniyatlarga qaramay, kichik startap sanoat gigantlari bilan raqobatlashib, uch yil ichida bozorning muhim ulushini egallay oldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilhomlantiruvchi hikoyalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The total quantity of goods produced by factories in a given period.
words.example1: Manufacturing output increased last month.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishlab chiqarish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our manufacturing output is at record levels.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot taqdimotida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Thanks to new automation technologies, our manufacturing output has risen by 35% while maintaining the same high quality standards.
words.example3Translation: Yangi avtomatlashtirish texnologiyalari tufayli ishlab chiqarish hajmimiz 35% ga oshdi, shu bilan birga yuqori sifat standartlarini saqlab qoldik.
words.example3Situation: Siz ishlab chiqarish samaradorligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A very small or insignificant part of something much larger.
words.example1: This donation is just a drop in the ocean.
words.example1Situation: Siz yordam haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our current budget is a drop in the ocean compared to what we need.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While the new funding is helpful, it is still only a drop in the ocean compared to the total investment required for full digital transformation.
words.example3Translation: Yangi mablag' foydali bo'lsa ham, to'liq raqamli transformatsiya uchun zarur bo'lgan umumiy investitsiyaga nisbatan hali dengizdagi bir tomchi hisoblanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz byudjet va ehtiyojlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To interfere in someone else’s affairs or business.
words.example1: Don't stick your nose into my business.
words.example1Situation: Siz aralashish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We should not stick our nose into client matters.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Good managers know when to offer guidance and when to avoid sticking their nose into every small detail of their team's daily work.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi rahbarlar qachon yo'l-yo'riq ko'rsatish va qachon jamoa kundalik ishining har bir mayda detallariga burni bilan aralashmaslik kerakligini biladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz delegatsiya va ishonch haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Very close to someone, often in plain view but unnoticed.
words.example1: The answer was just under your nose.
