words.example1Situation: Siz aniq javob haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The opportunity was right under our nose.
words.example2Situation: Siz bozor imkoniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The solution to our biggest problem was just under our nose the whole time — we simply needed to listen more carefully to our frontline employees.
words.example3Translation: Eng katta muammoimizning yechimi butun vaqt davomida burning ostida edi — biz shunchaki oldingi chiziqdagi xodimlarimizni diqqat bilan tinglashimiz kerak edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammo yechimi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To experience a sentimental longing for the past.
words.example1: I feel nostalgic when I see old photos.
words.example1Situation: Siz xotiralar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The reunion made everyone feel nostalgic.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoaviy tadbir haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Looking at the old company headquarters made many longtime employees feel nostalgic about the early days when the business was just starting.
words.example3Translation: Eski kompaniya bosh ofisini ko'rib, ko'p yillik xodimlar biznes endigina boshlangan dastlabki kunlar haqida nostalgik his qilishdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kompaniya tarixi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Repeated or compulsive actions driven by a persistent preoccupation.
words.example1: His obsessive behavior worries me.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizning holati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Obsessive behavior can affect team dynamics.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki muhit haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While dedication is important, obsessive behavior toward perfection can lead to burnout and reduced creativity among team members.
words.example3Translation: Fidoyilik muhim bo'lsa ham, mukammallikka obsessiv munosabat jamoa a'zolari orasida charchoq va ijodkorlikning pasayishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The main character or leading figure in a literary work, drama, or narrative.
words.example1: He is the protagonist of the story.
words.example1Situation: Siz hikoya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our CEO is the protagonist of this success.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In the story of our company's growth, the dedicated employees have been the true protagonists, driving innovation and overcoming challenges year after year.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyamiz o'sish hikoyasida fidoyi xodimlar yillar davomida innovatsiyani rag'batlantirib, qiyinchiliklarni yengib, chinakam bosh qahramon bo'lishdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: From the very beginning of an event or process.
words.example1: I knew from the outset.
words.example1Situation: Siz oldindan bilganingiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: From the outset, our company focused on quality.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: From the outset, the project was designed with sustainability in mind, which helped us meet both environmental goals and client expectations.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha boshidan boshlab barqarorlikni hisobga olgan holda ishlab chiqilgan edi, bu bizga ham ekologik maqsadlarni, ham mijozlar kutganlarini bajarishga yordam berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha rejalashtirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The transitional period marking the development from childhood into adulthood.
words.example1: It was an important passage from boyhood to manhood.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy rivojlanish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The training program supports the passage from boyhood to manhood.
words.example2Situation: Siz yosh xodimlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many leadership programs are designed to support the passage from boyhood to manhood by teaching young professionals responsibility, resilience, and strategic thinking.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab rahbarlik dasturlari yosh mutaxassislarga mas'uliyat, chidamlilik va strategik fikrlashni o'rgatish orqali bolalikdan o'smirlikka o'tishni qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun ishlab chiqilgan.
words.example3Situation: Siz yoshlar rivoji haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Neighbours who intrusively monitor or interfere in others’ affairs.
words.example1: We have nosy neighbors.
words.example1Situation: Siz kundalik hayot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Office gossip is like having nosy neighbors.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofis madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Dealing with nosy neighbors who constantly ask personal questions can be exhausting, which is why setting clear personal boundaries is important.
words.example3Translation: Doimiy shaxsiy savollar beradigan qiziquvchan qo'shnilar bilan muomala qilish charchatuvchi bo'lishi mumkin, shuning uchun shaxsiy chegaralarni aniq belgilash muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaxsiy hayot va chegaralar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To act in accordance with legal requirements.
words.example1: We must observe the law.
words.example1Situation: Siz huquqiy masalalar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company always observes the law.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki siyosat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even when facing strong competitive pressure, successful companies choose to observe the law and maintain ethical standards to protect their long-term reputation.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli raqobat bosimiga duch kelganda ham, muvaffaqiyatli kompaniyalar uzoq muddatli obro'larini himoya qilish uchun qonunga rioya qilishni va axloqiy standartlarni saqlashni tanlaydilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes etikasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To regulate the speed or effort of one’s actions to avoid exhaustion or mistakes.
words.example1: You need to pace yourself.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team learned to pace themselves during long projects.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Learning to pace yourself during high-pressure periods is essential to maintain consistent performance and prevent burnout in the long run.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori bosimli davrlarda o'zingizni boshqarishni o'rganish uzoq muddatda doimiy natijani saqlab qolish va charchoqni oldini olish uchun juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz stress boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Excessively dramatic, extreme, or exaggerated.
words.example1: His reaction was over the top.
words.example1Situation: Siz ortiqcha reaktsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The marketing campaign was a bit over the top.
words.example2Situation: Siz reklama muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While enthusiasm is good, making promises that are over the top can damage credibility when they cannot be fulfilled.
words.example3Translation: G'ayrat yaxshi bo'lsa ham, bajarib bo'lmaydigan haddan tashqari va'dalar berish ularni bajarmaganda ishonchlilikni buzishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz muloqot va va'dalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To have made a formal or informal agreement with someone.
words.example1: We have a pact.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkorlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team has a pact to support each other.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The two departments have a pact to share resources and information openly, which has greatly improved overall efficiency.
words.example3Translation: Ikki bo'lim resurslar va ma'lumotlarni ochiq baham ko'rish uchun kelishuvga ega bo'lib, bu umumiy samaradorlikni sezilarli oshirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki hamkorlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To demonstrate one’s abilities, competence, or worth.
words.example1: You need to prove yourself.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi ish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: New employees must prove themselves.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'qitish jarayoni haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In a competitive environment, it is important to prove yourself through consistent results rather than just promises or self-promotion.
words.example3Translation: Raqobatbardosh muhitda o'zingizni va'dalar yoki o'zini oqlash o'rniga doimiy natijalar orqali isbotlash muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To formally inform an employer of one’s intention to resign.
words.example1: She handed in her notice.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishdan ketish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: He decided to hand in his notice.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After careful consideration and securing a better opportunity, she chose to hand in her notice and pursue a new chapter in her career.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshilab o'ylab ko'rib va yaxshiroq imkoniyatni qo'lga kiritgandan so'ng, u ishdan bo'shash arizasini topshirib, karyerasida yangi sahifani ochishga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz karyera o'zgarishlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Extraordinarily large gains, often considered morally or ethically excessive.
words.example1: They made obscene profits.
words.example1Situation: Siz adolatsiz boylik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We don't chase obscene profits.
words.example2Situation: Siz biznes etikasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Making obscene profits at the expense of employee welfare and environmental responsibility ultimately harms a company's long-term reputation and sustainability.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlar farovonligi va ekologik mas'uliyat hisobiga haddan tashqari katta foyda olish kompaniyaning uzoq muddatli obro'si va barqarorligiga zarar yetkazadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz axloqiy biznes haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Something new, unusual, or unique that attracts attention or interest.
words.example1: The novelty will wear off.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi narsa haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We focus on more than just novelty.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahsulot strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While novelty attracts initial attention, long-term success depends on delivering consistent quality and real value to customers.
words.example3Translation: Yangilik dastlabki e'tiborni tortsa ham, uzoq muddatli muvaffaqiyat doimiy sifat va mijozlar uchun haqiqiy qiymatni ta'minlashga bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz mahsulot rivoji haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To experience a sudden, intense physical discomfort.
words.example1: I felt a sharp pain in my back.
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq muammosi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Many employees feel a sharp pain after long hours at the desk.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish sharoitlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After sitting for long meetings without proper posture, several participants began to feel a sharp pain in their necks and shoulders.
words.example3Translation: To'g'ri holatni saqlamasdan uzoq yig'ilishlarda o'tirgandan so'ng, bir necha ishtirokchi bo'yin va yelkalarda keskin og'riq seza boshladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ergonomika va salomatlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To instigate a dispute or disagreement.
words.example1: His comment provoked an argument.
words.example1Situation: Siz mojarolar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We try not to provoke an argument in meetings.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki muhokama haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Unprofessional emails that provoke an argument can damage working relationships and create unnecessary tension within the team.
words.example3Translation: Bahslashtiradigan professional bo'lmagan email xabarlar ish munosabatlariga zarar yetkazishi va jamoa ichida keraksiz taranglik yaratishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki muloqot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Occurring at an inappropriate or unusual time, outside the usual period.
words.example1: Strawberries are out of season now.
words.example1Situation: Siz mavsum haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Launching the product out of season was risky.
words.example2Situation: Siz marketing strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Promoting winter clothes out of season requires creative marketing strategies to create demand during off-peak periods.
words.example3Translation: Qishki kiyimlarni mavsumdan tashqari reklama qilish talabni past mavsumda yaratish uchun ijodiy marketing strategiyalarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mavsumiy marketing haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be of the highest significance or priority.
words.example1: Safety is of paramount importance.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavfsizlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Customer satisfaction is of paramount importance to us.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya qadriyatlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In today's competitive market, maintaining data security is of paramount importance for building and preserving customer trust.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi raqobatbardosh bozorda ma'lumotlar xavfsizligini saqlash mijozlar ishonchini qurish va saqlash uchun eng muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavfsizlik va ishonch haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: An activity one enjoys doing in one’s leisure time.
words.example1: Reading is my favorite pastime.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy odatlaringiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Team sports are a favorite pastime for many employees.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoaviy tadbirlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: For many professionals, learning new skills through online courses has become their favorite pastime, contributing to both personal growth and career advancement.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab mutaxassislar uchun onlayn kurslar orqali yangi ko'nikmalarni o'rganish shaxsiy o'sish va karyera rivojiga hissa qo'shadigan sevimli mashg'ulotga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'zini rivojlantirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To stroke or lightly touch a dog as a gesture of affection or care.
words.example1: She stopped to pat the dog.
words.example1Situation: Siz kundalik hayot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our office allows employees to pat the dog.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofis muhiti haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many modern offices now allow employees to bring their dogs to work because patting the dog during breaks can reduce stress and improve overall mood.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab zamonaviy ofislar endi xodimlarning itlarini ishga olib kelishlariga ruxsat beradi, chunki tanaffuslarda itni silash stressni kamaytiradi va umumiy kayfiyatni yaxshilaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ofis farovonligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to introduce an event that happened unexpectedly or suddenly.
words.example1: The next thing I knew, it was over.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan voqea haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The next thing I knew, the deal was signed.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: I was just explaining the problem and the next thing I knew, the whole team had come up with a brilliant solution together.
words.example3Translation: Men shunchaki muammoni tushuntirayotgan edim, birdan butun jamoa birgalikda ajoyib yechim topdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoaviy ijodkorlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be extremely happy or euphoric.
words.example1: I was on cloud nine.
words.example1Situation: Siz baxt haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team was on cloud nine after the success.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the company announced record profits and generous bonuses, the entire staff was on cloud nine for the rest of the week.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya rekord foyda va saxiy bonuslarni e'lon qilganda, butun xodimlar haftaning qolgan qismida to'qqizinchi osmonda bo'lishdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz motivatsiya va mukofotlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A chance or favourable situation became available.
words.example1: An opportunity presented itself.
words.example1Situation: Siz imkoniyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: When the opportunity presented itself, we acted quickly.
words.example2Situation: Siz tez qaror haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the opportunity presented itself to enter the European market through a strategic partnership, we seized it immediately and expanded our business successfully.
words.example3Translation: Yevropa bozoriga strategik hamkorlik orqali kirish imkoniyati paydo bo'lganda, biz uni darhol qo'lga kiritdik va biznesimizni muvaffaqiyatli kengaytirdik.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor kengayishi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Sound practical judgement that is independent of specialised knowledge.
words.example1: Use your common sense.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Common sense tells us this won't work.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In complex situations, combining technical expertise with good common sense often leads to the most practical and effective solutions.
words.example3Translation: Murakkab vaziyatlarda texnik tajriba va yaxshi oddiy aqlni birlashtirish ko'pincha eng amaliy va samarali yechimlarga olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qaror qabul qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A method based on practicality and real-world effectiveness rather than theory or ideals.
words.example1: We prefer a pragmatic approach.
words.example1Situation: Siz amaliy yechim haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: A pragmatic approach solved the problem.
words.example2Situation: Siz muammo hal qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The management team took a pragmatic approach to the budget cuts, focusing on efficiency improvements rather than across-the-board reductions.
words.example3Translation: Rahbariyat jamoasi byudjet qisqartirishlariga pragmatik yondashuvni qo'llab, umumiy qisqartirish o'rniga samaradorlikni oshirishga e'tibor qaratdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz amaliy boshqaruv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The exact or primary meaning of a word, phrase, or text.
words.example1: The literal meaning is different.
words.example1Situation: Siz talqin haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Don't take it in the literal meaning.
words.example2Situation: Siz muloqot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Understanding both the literal meaning and the cultural context is essential when translating important business documents and contracts.
words.example3Translation: Muhim biznes hujjatlari va shartnomalarni tarjima qilishda to'g'ridan-to'g'ri ma'noni ham, madaniy kontekstni ham tushunish juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro muloqot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be likely to do something, especially something undesirable.
words.example1: He is liable to make mistakes.
words.example1Situation: Siz xato haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The system is liable to crash under heavy load.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnik muammo haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Without proper maintenance, old equipment is liable to break down at the most critical moments during production.
words.example3Translation: To'g'ri texnik xizmat ko'rsatilmasa, eski jihozlar ishlab chiqarishning eng muhim lahzalarida buzilishga moyil bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavf-xatarlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To go back over the path previously taken in order to find something or reconsider actions.
words.example1: I had to retrace my steps.
words.example1Situation: Siz xato tuzatish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need to retrace our steps and find the error.
words.example2Situation: Siz muammo tahlilida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the project encountered unexpected problems, the team decided to retrace their steps to identify where the planning had gone wrong.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha kutilmagan muammolarga duch kelganda, jamoa rejalashtirishda qayerda xato qilinganini aniqlash uchun orqaga qaytishga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammo tahlili haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To correct or humble someone who is behaving arrogantly.
words.example1: She put him in his place.
words.example1Situation: Siz adolat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The manager had to put the arrogant employee in his place.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki intizom haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When the new team member started acting arrogantly, the experienced leader calmly put him in his place by highlighting the importance of teamwork and respect.
words.example3Translation: Yangi jamoa a'zosi takabburlik qila boshlaganda, tajribali rahbar jamoaviy ish va hurmat muhimligini ta'kidlab, uni tinchlantirib o'rnini ko'rsatdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jamoa rahbarligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: When a situation becomes critical or demanding decisive action.
words.example1: When push comes to shove, we deliver.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishonch haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: When push comes to shove, our team performs.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa muvaffaqiyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When push comes to shove during tight deadlines, our most experienced employees always step up and ensure the project is completed successfully.
words.example3Translation: Qattiq muddatlar paytida eng og'ir lahzalarda bizning eng tajribali xodimlarimiz har doim oldinga chiqib, loyihani muvaffaqiyatli yakunlashini ta'minlaydilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz va ishonch haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: People without specialist or professional knowledge in a particular field.
words.example1: This is explained for laymen.
words.example1Situation: Siz oddiy tushuntirish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We make our reports understandable for laymen.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our technical team does an excellent job of explaining complex concepts in simple terms so that laymen can easily understand the benefits of our solutions.
words.example3Translation: Texnik jamoamiz murakkab tushunchalarni oddiy so'zlar bilan tushuntirishda ajoyib ish qiladi, shunda oddiy odamlar bizning yechimlarimizning foydasini osongina tushunadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz muloqot va tushuntirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

name: Word Mastery
description: Master high-level C1 and B2 collocations

words.translation: oson kirish mumkin / oson yetib boriladigan
words.definition: Simple or convenient to reach, use, or obtain.
words.example1: The cafe is easily accessible by bus.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi joy yoki muassasa haqida hamkasbingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our new office is easily accessible by both public transport and car, which has improved attendance significantly.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi ofis joylashuvining afzalliklarini xodimlarga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Making quality education easily accessible to all citizens, regardless of geography or income, remains one of the most important goals of modern social policy.
words.example3Translation: Sifatli ta'limni geografiya yoki daromaddan qat'iy nazar barcha fuqarolar uchun oson kirish mumkin qilish zamonaviy ijtimoiy siyosatning eng muhim maqsadlaridan biri bo'lib qolmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz ta'lim siyosati va ijtimoiy tenglik bo'yicha xalqaro konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Easy to obtain or access without delay or difficulty.
words.example1: Fresh fruits are readily available in this season.
words.example1Situation: Siz bozor yoki do'konda mahsulotlar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our customer support team ensures that help is readily available to clients around the clock.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish sifatini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: When accurate information is readily available to the public, people are better equipped to make informed decisions about their health and finances.
words.example3Translation: Aniq ma'lumot jamoatchilik uchun oson mavjud bo'lganda, odamlar o'z sog'liq va moliyalari haqida ongli qarorlar qabul qilishga yaxshiroq tayyor bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz axborotga kirish va fuqarolar savodxonligi bo'yicha davlat siyosati konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To do something without intention or by mistake.
words.example1: I accidentally sent the message to the wrong person.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish joyida kichik xato qilganingizni hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team accidentally deleted the project files, which caused a two-day delay in the delivery schedule.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha kechikishining sababini mijoz yoki rahbariyatga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even when harm is accidentally caused rather than intentional, organisations still have a responsibility to acknowledge it and take corrective action promptly.
words.example3Translation: Zarar qasddan emas, tasodifan yetkazilgan bo'lsa ham, tashkilotlar uni tan olish va tezda tuzatuvchi chora ko'rish mas'uliyatini o'z zimmalarida his qilishlari kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz korporativ javobgarlik va inqirozni boshqarish bo'yicha biznes etikasi konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To change in a very significant and noticeable way.
words.example1: Xayrulla Asadov's life dramatically changed after one interview on YouTube.
words.example1Situation: Siz hayotda katta o'zgarish yasagan bir voqea haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our industry has dramatically changed over the past five years due to rapid advances in artificial intelligence.
words.example2Situation: Siz sanoat tendensiyalari va kelajak strategiyasi haqida investorlarga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The way people consume media has dramatically changed with the rise of streaming platforms, forcing traditional broadcasters to rethink their entire business model.
words.example3Translation: Odamlarning media iste'mol qilish tarzi streaming platformalarining rivojlanishi bilan keskin o'zgardi va an'anaviy televideniyelarni o'z biznes modellarini qayta ko'rib chiqishga majbur qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz media sanoati transformatsiyasi va raqamli strategiya bo'yicha biznes konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Situated in a place that is easy to reach or access.
words.example1: My university is conveniently located near a metro station.
words.example1Situation: Siz ta'lim muassasasi yoki ish joyi haqida hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our new branch is conveniently located in the city centre, making it easier for clients to visit us directly.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi filial ochilishini mijozlarga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A hotel that is conveniently located near both the airport and the conference centre can significantly reduce travel stress for international delegates.
words.example3Translation: Aeroport va konferentsiya markazi yaqinida qulay joylashgan mehmonxona xalqaro delegatlar uchun sayohat stressini sezilarli darajada kamaytirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro tadbirlarni tashkil etish va mehmonxona tanlash bo'yicha korporativ sayohat menejeriga tavsiya berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To consider something without being influenced by personal feelings or bias.
words.example1: Try to look at the situation objectively before making a decision.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkasbingizga qiyin qaror qabul qilishda maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our managers are trained to look at performance issues objectively and avoid letting personal relationships influence their assessments.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni baholash jarayoni standartlarini HR jamoasiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: To resolve a conflict fairly, both sides need to look at the situation objectively and separate the facts from their emotional reactions.
words.example3Translation: Nizoni adolatli hal qilish uchun har ikki tomon ham vaziyatga xolisona qarashi va faktlarni o'zlarining hissiy reaktsiyalaridan ajratishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz mediatsiya va nizolarni hal qilish bo'yicha korporativ trening o'tkazayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Inexpensive when compared to similar things or alternatives.
words.example1: This phone is relatively cheap compared to the new model.
words.example1Situation: Siz xarid qilish haqida hamkasbingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our production costs are relatively cheap compared to competitors in the region, giving us a clear pricing advantage.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning raqobat ustunliklarini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Renewable energy has become relatively cheap in recent years, making it a financially viable option for businesses looking to reduce their carbon footprint.
words.example3Translation: Qayta tiklanadigan energiya so'nggi yillarda nisbatan arzonlashdi va bu uni karbon izini kamaytirmoqchi bo'lgan korxonalar uchun moliyaviy jihatdan qulay variantga aylantirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz barqaror energiya va biznes xarajatlari bo'yicha korporativ barqarorlik konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Truly and sincerely happy, without pretending.
words.example1: I'm sure I'll look genuinely happy on my wedding day.
words.example1Situation: Siz kelajakdagi muhim voqealar haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our goal is to create a workplace where employees feel genuinely happy and motivated to give their best every day.
words.example2Situation: Siz korporativ madaniyat va xodimlar farovonligi strategiyasini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Research shows that people who are genuinely happy at work tend to be more productive, more creative, and less likely to leave their organisation.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqotlar shuni ko'rsatadiki, ishda chin dildan baxtli bo'lgan odamlar ko'proq samarali, ijodkor va tashkilotlarini tark etishga kamroq moyil bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi va unumdorlik o'rtasidagi bog'liqlik bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To make something noticeably or importantly better.
words.example1: Regular exercise can significantly improve your health.
words.example1Situation: Siz salomatlikni yaxshilash haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: This change will significantly improve our results.
words.example2Situation: Siz biror o'zgarishning katta ta'sirini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Learning English has significantly improved her career opportunities in international companies.
words.example3Translation: Ingliz tilini o'rganish uning xalqaro kompaniyalardagi kar'yera imkoniyatlarini sezilarli darajada oshirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'qish yoki ko'nikmalar rivojlanishining foydasi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To advise someone very enthusiastically that something is good or worth doing.
words.example1: I strongly recommend reading this book.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror narsani juda yaxshi deb maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The doctor strongly recommends rest.
words.example2Situation: Siz mutaxassis maslahatini bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: I strongly recommend visiting Samarkand at least once in your life — the history and architecture are breathtaking.
words.example3Translation: Men hayotingizda kamida bir marta Samarqandga borishni qattiq tavsiya qilaman — uning tarixi va arxitekturasi hayratlanarli.
words.example3Situation: Siz sayohat, kitob, film yoki tajriba haqida kuchli tavsiya berayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Eventually; at some point in the future.
words.example1: Sooner or later, I will achieve my goal.
words.example1Situation: Siz maqsad haqida do'stingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Sooner or later, our hard work will pay off.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoani rag'batlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Sooner or later, companies that ignore digital trends will lose their competitive advantage in the market.
words.example3Translation: Ertami-kechmi, raqamli tendensiyalarni e'tiborga olmaydigan kompaniyalar bozordagi raqobatbardosh ustunligini yo'qotadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor rivoji haqida strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Occasionally; from time to time.
words.example1: I still think about that day now and then.
words.example1Situation: Siz xotiralar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Now and then, we organize team outings.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoaviy tadbirlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even successful professionals feel uncertain about their choices now and then, which is completely normal.
words.example3Translation: Hatto muvaffaqiyatli mutaxassislar ham vaqti-vaqti bilan o'z tanlovlari haqida shubhalanadilar, bu butunlay normal holat.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaxsiy rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Qora va oq / Oddiy va aniq
words.definition: Simple and clear; with no grey areas.
words.example1: The issue isn't as black and white as it seems.
words.example1Situation: Siz murakkab masala haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Business decisions are rarely black and white.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While some rules are black and white, most real-world business situations require careful judgement and flexibility.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi qoidalar qora va oq bo'lsa ham, ko'pchilik real biznes vaziyatlari sinchkov baho va moslashuvchanlikni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qaror qabul qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: In many different places; all over.
words.example1: I've looked for my keys here, there and everywhere.
words.example1Situation: Siz qidirish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our products are sold here, there and everywhere.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our marketing team has been working here, there and everywhere to make sure our new product reaches customers across all major cities.
words.example3Translation: Marketing jamoamiz yangi mahsulotimizni barcha yirik shaharlardagi mijozlarga yetkazish uchun hamma joyda, har tomonda ishlamoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz marketing va tarqatish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: A matter of life and death
words.definition: Extremely urgent or important.
words.example1: To her, winning was a matter of life and death.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhim musobaqa haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This project is a matter of life and death for the company.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategik loyiha haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: For many small businesses during the crisis, securing a loan became a matter of life and death for their survival.
words.example3Translation: Inqiroz paytida ko'plab kichik bizneslar uchun kredit olish omon qolishlari uchun hayot-mamot masalasiga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inqiroz va muhim qarorlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Learning through repeated attempts and mistakes.
words.example1: I learned cooking by trial and error.
words.example1Situation: Siz tajriba haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team developed the product through trial and error.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Most successful innovations come from trial and error, where teams learn from failures and continuously improve their ideas.
words.example3Translation: Ko'pchilik muvaffaqiyatli innovatsiyalar xatoliklar orqali o'rganishdan kelib chiqadi, jamoalar muvaffaqiyatsizliklardan saboq olib, g'oyalarini doimiy ravishda takomillashtiradilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijodiy jarayon haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Not right away, but certainly in the future.
words.example1: You will succeed, not immediately but definitely.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingizni rag'batlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We will reach our goals, not immediately but definitely.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoani ilhomlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our expansion into new markets may not bring results immediately but definitely will strengthen our position in the long term.
words.example3Translation: Yangi bozorlarga kengayishimiz darhol natija bermaydi, lekin uzoq muddatda pozitsiyamizni mustahkamlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik reja haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Over a long period of time; eventually.
words.example1: Studying hard will benefit you in the long run.
words.example1Situation: Siz uzoq muddatli foyda haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: It may be difficult now, but in the long run it will be worth it.
words.example2Situation: Siz hozirgi qiyinchilik va kelajakdagi natija haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Investing in your education may feel expensive now, but in the long run it will open many more career opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Ta'limingizga sarmoya kiritish hozir qimmat tuyulishi mumkin, ammo uzoq muddatda bu sizga ko'proq kar'yera imkoniyatlarini ochib beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kelajakdagi foyda va investitsiya haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.word: At the end of the day
words.definition: Used to say what is most important or true after everything is considered.
words.example1: At the end of the day, your health is the most important thing.
words.example1Situation: Siz asl muhim narsani ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: At the end of the day, it's just a game.
words.example2Situation: Siz biror narsaning unchalik muhim emasligini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: At the end of the day, success depends more on consistent effort than on talent alone.
words.example3Translation: Oxir-oqibat, muvaffaqiyat ko'proq iste'dodga emas, balki doimiy harakatga bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz haqiqiy muhim omillar haqida xulosa qilayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to introduce a statement that says the opposite of what has just been said.
words.example1: I thought the movie would be boring. On the contrary, it was excellent.
words.example1Situation: Siz oldingi fikrga qarama-qarshi fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He is not lazy. On the contrary, he works very hard.
words.example2Situation: Siz noto'g'ri tushunchani tuzatayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Many people believe that money brings happiness. On the contrary, true happiness often comes from relationships and meaningful experiences.
words.example3Translation: Ko'pchilik pul baxt keltiradi deb o'ylaydi. Aksincha, chinakam baxt ko'pincha munosabatlar va mazmunli tajribalardan kelib chiqadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz umumiy noto'g'ri tushunchalarni rad etayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to introduce a balanced or fair comment about a situation.
words.example1: To be fair, she did try her best despite the difficulties.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning harakatini adolatli baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: To be fair, the prices are quite high, but the quality is excellent.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahsulot yoki xizmat haqida muvozanatli fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: To be fair, the project took longer than expected, but the final results were worth the wait.
words.example3Translation: Adolat yuzasidan aytganda, loyiha kutilganidan ko'proq vaqt oldi, ammo yakuniy natijalar kutishga arziydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha yoki ish natijasi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to say that something is probably true based on the information available.
words.example1: Presumably, the meeting was canceled due to the storm.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror voqea sababini taxmin qilib gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Presumably, he forgot about the appointment.
words.example2Situation: Siz birovning harakatini taxmin qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Presumably, the company will announce the new prices next week.
words.example3Translation: Chamasi, kompaniya kelasi hafta yangi narxlarni e'lon qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes yoki rasmiy yangiliklar haqida taxmin bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to say that a statement is possibly true but not certain.
words.example1: He is arguably the best player on the team.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning ustunligini baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: This is arguably the most important decision of your career.
words.example2Situation: Siz muhim qaror haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Arguably, no other invention has changed the world as much as the internet.
words.example3Translation: Aytish mumkinki, internetdan boshqa hech qanday ixtiro dunyoni shunchalik o'zgartirmagan.
words.example3Situation: Siz umumiy bahs yoki fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to introduce a surprising or notable fact.
words.example1: Interestingly enough, he doesn't even like chocolate.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan faktni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Interestingly enough, the oldest person in the village had never left the country.
words.example2Situation: Siz qiziqarli voqea yoki holatni ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Interestingly enough, despite living in different countries, they discovered they had gone to the same university.
words.example3Translation: Qiziq tomoni shundaki, turli mamlakatlarda yashashlariga qaramay, ular bir xil universitetda o'qishganini aniqlashdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tasodifiy yoki hayratlanarli holatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used when something happens that you did not expect.
words.example1: To my surprise, she agreed to the plan immediately.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan ijobiy natijani aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: To my surprise, the exam was much easier than I thought.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'zingizni hayratda qoldirgan holat haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: To my surprise, the quietest student in class gave one of the most impressive presentations.
words.example3Translation: Meni hayratlantirgan tomoni, sinfdagi eng jim talaba eng ta'sirli taqdimotlardan birini berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz odamlar haqidagi kutilmagan holatlarni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to say that something is generally true, but not in every case.
words.example1: By and large, the trip was a great success.
words.example1Situation: Siz umumiy baho berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: By and large, people are satisfied with the new system.
words.example2Situation: Siz umumiy fikrni bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: By and large, the reforms have been successful, although there are still some areas that need improvement.
words.example3Translation: Umuman olganda, islohotlar muvaffaqiyatli bo'ldi, garchi hali ham ba'zi yo'nalishlarda takomillashtirish kerak bo'lsa ham.
words.example3Situation: Siz katta loyiha yoki o'zgarishlar haqida umumiy xulosa chiqarayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to add emphasis to a statement or to correct what was previously said.
words.example1: As a matter of fact, I've been there before.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zingiz haqida qo'shimcha ma'lumot berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: As a matter of fact, I completely agree with you.
words.example2Situation: Siz rozilik bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: As a matter of fact, this is not the first time we've faced this problem.
words.example3Translation: Aslida, bu muammo bilan birinchi marta duch kelayotganimiz yo'q.
words.example3Situation: Siz tajriba yoki haqiqatni ta'kidlab gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to give a general opinion about something after considering all the facts.
words.example1: On the whole, the conference was very well organized.
words.example1Situation: Siz umumiy baho berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: On the whole, I enjoyed my time in the city.
words.example2Situation: Siz tajribangiz haqida umumiy fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: On the whole, the new teaching method has improved student engagement significantly.
words.example3Translation: Umuman olganda, yangi o'qitish usuli talabalar faolligini sezilarli darajada oshirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ta'lim yoki o'zgarishlar haqida umumiy xulosa chiqarayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used when you are about to say something honest or direct.
words.example1: Frankly speaking, I wasn’t very impressed with the service.
words.example1Situation: Siz tanqidiy fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Frankly speaking, I think we need to change our approach.
words.example2Situation: Siz ochiqchasiga maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Frankly speaking, this is one of the most challenging projects I have ever worked on.
words.example3Translation: Rostini aytganda, bu men ishlagan eng qiyin loyihalardan biri.
words.example3Situation: Siz haqiqatni ochiq aytayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to express your personal opinion on a matter.
words.example1: As far as I’m concerned, this is the best solution.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy fikringizni bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: As far as I’m concerned, money isn’t the most important thing in life.
words.example2Situation: Siz hayot haqidagi shaxsiy qarashingizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: As far as I’m concerned, remote work has more advantages than disadvantages.
words.example3Translation: Mening fikrimcha, masofaviy ishning afzalliklari kamchiliklaridan ko'proq.
words.example3Situation: Siz zamonaviy ish uslublari haqida fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to agree that someone has made a valid point.
words.example1: You've got a point there.
words.example1Situation: Siz suhbatda rozilik bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: You've got a point about the budget.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: You've got a point — we should test the new feature before full launch.
words.example3Translation: To'g'ri aytyapsan — yangi funksiyani to'liq ishga tushirishdan oldin sinab ko'rishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Umuman qiziq emas / Umuman parvo qilmayman
words.definition: Used to show complete lack of interest.
words.example1: I couldn't care less about the rumors.
words.example1Situation: Siz befarqlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Honestly, I couldn't care less what competitors say.
words.example2Situation: Siz raqobat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: I couldn't care less about short-term trends — long-term strategy matters more.
words.example3Translation: Qisqa muddatli trendlar menga umuman qiziq emas — uzoq muddatli strategiya muhimroq.
words.example3Situation: Siz ustuvorliklar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to advise against hasty judgements.
words.example1: Let's not jump to conclusions yet.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We shouldn't jump to conclusions about the client.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijoz bilan bog'liq masalada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Let's not jump to conclusions — we need more data to make an informed decision.
words.example3Translation: Shoshma-shosharlik bilan xulosa chiqarmaylik — qaror qabul qilish uchun ko'proq ma'lumot kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz tahlil va qaror qabul qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: It reveals a lot about a situation or person.
words.example1: His silence speaks volumes.
words.example1Situation: Siz jimlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The results speak volumes about our efforts.
words.example2Situation: Siz natijalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The fact that customers keep returning speaks volumes about the quality of our service.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlarning doimiy qaytib kelishi xizmat sifati haqida juda ko'p narsani anglatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijozlar sadoqati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Aytishga oson, amalga oshirish esa qiyin
words.definition: Something is much harder to actually do than to talk about.
words.example1: That's easier said than done.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Increasing sales is easier said than done.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Becoming the market leader is easier said than done — it requires years of dedication.
words.example3Translation: Bozor yetakchisiga aylanish aytishga oson, amalga oshirish esa qiyin — bu yillar davomidagi fidoyilikni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ambitsiyali maqsadlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: You are in a risky or dangerous situation.
words.example1: You're walking on thin ice with that attitude.
words.example1Situation: Siz ogohlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The company is walking on thin ice with this decision.
words.example2Situation: Siz xavfli qaror haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Ignoring customer complaints while focusing only on profit means the company is walking on thin ice.
words.example3Translation: Foydaga e'tibor qaratib, mijozlar shikoyatlarini e'tiborsiz qoldirish kompaniyani xavfli holatga qo'yadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavf-xatarlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to strongly agree with someone.
words.example1: I couldn't agree more with your idea.
words.example1Situation: Siz suhbatda rozilik bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: I couldn't agree more — this is the best solution.
words.example2Situation: Siz muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: I couldn't agree more with the decision to invest in staff training — it will bring long-term benefits to the company.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlarni o'qitishga sarmoya kiritish qarori bilan to'liq roziman — bu kompaniyaga uzoq muddatli foyda keltiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik qarorlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Qabul qil yoki rad et, boshqa yo'l yo'q
words.definition: An offer that must be accepted as it is or rejected.
words.example1: This is my final offer — take it or leave it.
words.example1Situation: Siz muzokaralarda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The contract is non-negotiable — take it or leave it.
words.example2Situation: Siz shartnoma haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In business, sometimes you have to say "take it or leave it" when the deal is already at its best possible terms.
words.example3Translation: Biznesda ba'zida kelishuv eng yaxshi shartlarda bo'lganda "qabul qil yoki rad et" deyishga to'g'ri keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muzokara va qat'iylik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to say you don't believe something.
words.example1: I'm not buying it — that excuse is too weak.
words.example1Situation: Siz shubha bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Sorry, but I'm not buying that story.
words.example2Situation: Siz gapni rad etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The client said the delay was due to weather, but I'm not buying it — I think there's another reason.
words.example3Translation: Mijoz kechikishni ob-havo bilan izohladi, lekin men bunga ishonmayman — boshqa sabab bor deb o'ylayman.
words.example3Situation: Siz tanqidiy fikr bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to acknowledge that someone’s point is reasonable or acceptable.
words.example1: Fair enough, I see your point now.
words.example1Situation: Siz suhbatdoshning fikrini qabul qilib, rozi bo'layotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Fair enough, you can do it your way this time.
words.example2Situation: Siz birovga o'z uslubida ishlashga ruxsat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Fair enough, the idea has some risks, but the potential rewards are worth considering.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi, bu fikrda ba'zi xavflar bor, ammo potensial foyda buni ko'rib chiqishga arziydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz taklif yoki fikrni muhokama qilib, muvozanatli baho berayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: The use of technology to perform tasks previously done by humans.
words.example1: Job automation is changing many industries.
words.example1Situation: Siz kelajak haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is investing in job automation.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnologiya strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While job automation increases efficiency and reduces costs, companies must also prepare employees for new roles that require human skills.
words.example3Translation: Ishlarni avtomatlashtirish samaradorlikni oshirib, xarajatlarni kamaytirsa ham, kompaniyalar xodimlarni insoniy ko'nikmalar talab qiladigan yangi rollarga tayyorlashi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz AI va ish o'rinlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Providing good value in relation to cost.
words.example1: This solution is very cost-effective.
words.example1Situation: Siz byudjet haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: AI is becoming more cost-effective every year.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnologiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Using AI for routine customer support has proven highly cost-effective while maintaining excellent service quality.
words.example3Translation: Oddiy mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatishda AI dan foydalanish xizmat sifatini saqlab qolgan holda juda tejamkor ekanligini isbotladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz samaradorlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To perform better than humans.
words.example1: AI can outperform humans in many tasks.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnologiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Machines often outperform humans in accuracy.
words.example2Situation: Siz ishlab chiqarish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In data analysis and repetitive tasks, AI systems consistently outperform humans in both speed and accuracy.
words.example3Translation: Ma'lumotlar tahlili va takroriy vazifalarda AI tizimlari tezlik va aniqlik bo'yicha odamlardan doim ustun turadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz AI imkoniyatlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Machines produce reliable and error-free results.
words.example1: Machines produce consistent accurate work.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnologiya afzalliklari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This is why we use machines for quality control.
words.example2Situation: Siz sifat nazorati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Unlike humans who can get tired, machines produce consistent accurate work even after working continuously for many hours.
words.example3Translation: Odamlar charchashi mumkin bo'lganidan farqli o'laroq, mashinalar ko'p soat davomida uzluksiz ishlaganda ham doimiy va xatosiz natija beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz AI va inson farqi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To destroy or reduce creative thinking.
words.example1: Too much routine can kill creativity.
words.example1Situation: Siz ijodkorlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must be careful not to kill creativity.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Over-reliance on AI without human input can eventually kill creativity in the workplace if not managed properly.
words.example3Translation: Insoniy hissa bo'lmasa, AI ga haddan tashqari bog'lanib qolish to'g'ri boshqarilmasa, ish joyida ijodkorlikni o'ldirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz AI va ijodkorlik muvozanati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Dependence on something to an excessive degree.
words.example1: Over-reliance on technology can be risky.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnologiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We should avoid over-reliance on one supplier.
words.example2Situation: Siz xavf-xatar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Over-reliance on artificial intelligence without human oversight may lead to serious mistakes in critical decision-making processes.
words.example3Translation: Inson nazoratisiz sun'iy intellektga ortiqcha bog'lanib qolish muhim qaror qabul qilish jarayonlarida jiddiy xatolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz AI va inson muvozanati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Something that endangers people's jobs.
words.example1: AI is seen as a threat to human employment.
words.example1Situation: Siz kelajak haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Automation can be a threat to human employment.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnologiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While automation is a threat to human employment in some sectors, it also creates new jobs that require creative and emotional intelligence.
words.example3Translation: Avtomatlashtirish ba'zi sohalarda odamlarning ishiga tahdid bo'lsa ham, u ijodkorlik va emotsional intellekt talab qiladigan yangi ish o'rinlarini ham yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz AI va ish o'rinlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To cause people to lose their jobs.
words.example1: Robots might put humans out of work.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnologiya ta'siri haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must ensure technology doesn't put humans out of work.
words.example2Situation: Siz mas'uliyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The goal is not to let AI put humans out of work, but to use it to make human jobs more meaningful and productive.
words.example3Translation: Maqsad AI ning odamlarni ishsiz qoldirishiga yo'l qo'ymaslik, balki uni inson ishlarini mazmunli va samaraliroq qilish uchun ishlatishdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz kelajakdagi ish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To replace people in performing certain tasks.
words.example1: AI may take over human jobs.
words.example1Situation: Siz texnologiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Robots are taking over some human jobs.
words.example2Situation: Siz avtomatlashtirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Instead of fearing that AI will take over human jobs, we should focus on how humans and AI can work together to achieve better results.
words.example3Translation: AI odam ishini egallab oladi deb qo'rqish o'rniga, inson va AI qanday qilib birgalikda yaxshiroq natijaga erishishi mumkinligiga e'tibor qaratishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz hamkorlik va kelajak haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Issues related to moral principles and potential harm caused by AI development and use.
words.example1: One of the biggest issues with AI is the ethical concerns surrounding data privacy and bias.
words.example1Situation: Siz AI ning salbiy tomonlarini muhokama qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Researchers are increasingly focusing on the ethical concerns of artificial intelligence.
words.example2Situation: Siz AI bo'yicha ilmiy yoki professional suhbatda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Before implementing AI systems in healthcare, we must address the ethical concerns regarding patient confidentiality.
words.example3Translation: Sog'liqni saqlash sohasida AI tizimlarini joriy etishdan oldin, bemorlar maxfiyligi bo'yicha axloqiy muammolarni hal qilishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz AI ning turli sohalardagi qo'llanilishi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Property consisting of land and buildings.
words.example1: I want to invest in real estate.
words.example1Situation: Siz investitsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Real estate prices are rising in Tashkent.
words.example2Situation: Siz bozor haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many successful professionals invest in real estate to generate passive income and secure their financial future.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab muvaffaqiyatli mutaxassislar passiv daromad olish va moliyaviy kelajagini ta'minlash uchun ko'chmas mulkka sarmoya kiritadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy strategiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Valuable items owned by a person or company.
words.example1: Real estate is a valuable asset.
words.example1Situation: Siz investitsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company has strong assets.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy holat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Diversifying assets between real estate, stocks, and gold helps protect wealth during economic uncertainty.
words.example3Translation: Ko'chmas mulk, aksiyalar va oltin o'rtasida aktivlarni diversifikatsiya qilish iqtisodiy noaniqlik paytida boylikni himoya qilishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy xavfsizlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Losing value over time.
words.example1: Cars are depreciating assets.
words.example1Situation: Siz xarid haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We avoid investing in depreciating items.
words.example2Situation: Siz investitsiya strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Understanding which assets are depreciating and which are appreciating is crucial for making smart long-term financial decisions.
words.example3Translation: Qaysi aktivlar qadrsizlanishi va qaysilari qimmatlashishini tushunish uzoq muddatli moliyaviy qarorlar qabul qilish uchun juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy savodxonlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To decrease in worth.
words.example1: Cars go down in value quickly.
words.example1Situation: Siz xarid haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The currency went down in value.
words.example2Situation: Siz iqtisodiy holat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Unlike real estate, most technological gadgets go down in value very quickly after purchase.
words.example3Translation: Ko'chmas mulkdan farqli o'laroq, ko'pchilik texnologik gadjetlar sotib olingandan keyin juda tez qiymatini yo'qotadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz investitsiya turlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A loan to buy property.
words.example1: He took a mortgage to buy a house.
words.example1Situation: Siz uy sotib olish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Mortgage rates are increasing this year.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy yangiliklar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Before taking a mortgage, it is important to carefully calculate monthly payments and consider long-term financial stability.
words.example3Translation: Ipoteka olishdan oldin oylik to'lovlarni sinchkov hisoblab chiqish va uzoq muddatli moliyaviy barqarorlikni hisobga olish muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy rejalashtirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To pay for something in several separate payments over time.
words.example1: I couldn't afford the full price, so I decided to pay in installments.
words.example1Situation: Siz xarid haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company allows customers to pay in installments.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo shartlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: For large purchases such as company equipment or vehicles, paying in installments helps manage cash flow and makes big investments more feasible.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya jihozlari yoki transport vositalari kabi katta xaridlar uchun bo'lib to'lash naqd pul oqimini boshqarishga yordam beradi va katta investitsiyalarni amalga oshirishni osonlashtiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy rejalashtirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Money earned with little ongoing effort after initial work.
words.example1: I'm planning to have a passive income.
words.example1Situation: Siz moliyaviy mustaqillik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Real estate is a good source of passive income.
words.example2Situation: Siz investitsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many successful professionals aim to build multiple streams of passive income so they can eventually work less while maintaining financial stability.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab muvaffaqiyatli mutaxassislar moliyaviy barqarorlikni saqlab qolgan holda kamroq ishlash uchun bir necha turdagi passiv daromad manbalarini yaratishga intiladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy erkinlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The general increase in prices and fall in the purchasing value of money.
words.example1: Inflation makes everyday items more expensive.
words.example1Situation: Siz iqtisodiy holat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must consider inflation in our budget planning.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy reja haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: High inflation forces companies to adjust salaries, pricing strategies, and investment plans to maintain profitability and competitiveness.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori inflyatsiya kompaniyalarni foydalilik va raqobatbardoshlikni saqlash uchun ish haqi, narx strategiyasi va investitsiya rejalarini o'zgartirishga majbur qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz iqtisodiy muammolar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The profit or gain made from an investment relative to its cost.
words.example1: The return on investment in real estate is quite high in growing cities.
words.example1Situation: Siz investitsiya imkoniyatlari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: We expect a good return on investment within two years.
words.example2Situation: Siz biznes-reja yoki loyiha haqida suhbatlashayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The return on investment was lower than we anticipated.
words.example3Translation: Investitsiya daromadi biz kutganimizdan past bo‘ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz natijani baholayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: A collection of investments owned by a person or organization.
words.example1: It's smart to diversify your portfolio by investing in different assets.
words.example1Situation: Siz investitsiya strategiyasi haqida maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She manages a large investment portfolio for high-net-worth clients.
words.example2Situation: Siz professional investitsiyalar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: You should review and update your portfolio every six months.
words.example3Translation: Portfel ingizni har olti oyda ko‘rib chiqib, yangilab turishingiz tavsiya etiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To carry out an illegal act.
words.example1: He committed a crime.
words.example1Situation: Siz huquqiy masala haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: No one should commit a crime.
words.example2Situation: Siz axloq haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Companies that commit a crime by violating environmental laws face heavy fines and loss of public trust.
words.example3Translation: Atrof-muhit qonunlarini buzish orqali jinoyat sodir etgan kompaniyalar katta jarimalar va jamoatchilik ishonchini yo'qotishga duch keladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes etikasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: People who commit crimes.
words.example1: Police catch criminals.
words.example1Situation: Siz huquq-tartibot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must prevent young people from becoming criminals.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamiyat muammolari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Modern technology and better law enforcement have helped significantly reduce the number of professional criminals in many cities.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy texnologiya va yaxshilangan huquq-tartibot ko'plab shaharlarda professional jinoyatchilar sonini sezilarli kamaytirishga yordam berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavfsizlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be charged with doing something wrong or illegal.
words.example1: He was accused of theft.
words.example1Situation: Siz ayblov haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The company was accused of corruption.
words.example2Situation: Siz biznes etikasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Even if someone is accused of wrongdoing, it is important to follow due process before reaching any conclusion.
words.example3Translation: Kimdir noto'g'ri ish qilganlikda ayblansa ham, har qanday xulosaga kelishdan oldin qonuniy jarayonni bajarish muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz adolat va huquq haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Illegal practices involving offering or accepting bribes.
words.example1: Bribery and corruption harm society.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamiyat muammolari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We have zero tolerance for bribery and corruption.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya siyosati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Countries with high levels of bribery and corruption struggle to attract foreign investment and achieve sustainable economic growth.
words.example3Translation: Poraxo'rlik va korrupsiya darajasi yuqori bo'lgan mamlakatlar xorijiy investitsiyalarni jalb qilish va barqaror iqtisodiy o'sishga erishishda qiyinchiliklarga duch keladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz iqtisodiy rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A claim that someone has done something wrong or illegal.
words.example1: The accusation was false.
words.example1Situation: Siz adolatsiz ayblov haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: He faced serious accusations.
words.example2Situation: Siz huquqiy masala haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: False accusations can destroy reputations, which is why companies must handle internal complaints with care and fairness.
words.example3Translation: Yolg'on ayblovlar obro'ni yo'q qilishi mumkin, shuning uchun kompaniyalar ichki shikoyatlarni ehtiyotkorlik va adolat bilan ko'rib chiqishlari kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki aloqa va adolat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The person who commits a crime or harmful act.
words.example1: The perpetrator was caught.
words.example1Situation: Siz jinoyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must identify the perpetrator.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki muammo haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Identifying the real perpetrator in cases of corporate fraud often requires deep investigation and cooperation between departments.
words.example3Translation: Korporativ firibgarlik holatlarida haqiqiy jinoyatchini aniqlash ko'pincha chuqur tergov va bo'limlar o'rtasidagi hamkorlikni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki xavfsizlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To officially charge someone with a crime and take them to court.
words.example1: The company decided to prosecute the thief.
words.example1Situation: Siz huquqiy choralar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: They will prosecute anyone involved in corruption.
words.example2Situation: Siz korrupsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The management promised to prosecute anyone found guilty of leaking confidential company information.
words.example3Translation: Rahbariyat maxfiy kompaniya ma'lumotlarini oshkor qilgan har qanday shaxsni sudga tortishga va'da berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki xavfsizlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The act of demanding money or action by threatening to reveal harmful information.
words.example1: He was accused of blackmail.
words.example1Situation: Siz jinoyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Blackmail is a serious crime.
words.example2Situation: Siz huquqiy masalalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Cyber blackmail has become a growing concern for companies as hackers threaten to release sensitive data unless ransom is paid.
words.example3Translation: Kiber tovlamachilik kompaniyalar uchun tobora ortib borayotgan muammoga aylandi, chunki xakerlar to'lov talab qilib, maxfiy ma'lumotlarni oshkor qilish bilan tahdid qilmoqdalar.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli xavfsizlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To discourage someone from doing something.
words.example1: Heavy fines help deter crime.
words.example1Situation: Siz oldini olish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need measures to deter theft.
words.example2Situation: Siz xavfsizlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Strict security policies and clear consequences are effective ways to deter employees from violating company rules.
words.example3Translation: Qattiq xavfsizlik siyosati va aniq oqibatlar xodimlarning kompaniya qoidalarini buzishini oldini olishning samarali usullaridir.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki intizom haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To reduce the amount of crime.
words.example1: We must work to minimize crime.
words.example1Situation: Siz jamiyat muammolari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Better education helps minimize crime.
words.example2Situation: Siz oldini olish choralari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Investing in education and job opportunities is one of the most effective ways to minimize crime in the long term.
words.example3Translation: Ta'lim va ish o'rinlariga sarmoya kiritish jinoyatni uzoq muddatda kamaytirishning eng samarali usullaridan biridir.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy muammolar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To find a good balance between two things.
