words.example1: I always strike a balance between work and rest.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish-hayot muvozanati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need to strike a balance between speed and quality.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muhokamasida bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Successful managers know how to strike a balance between achieving targets and maintaining team wellbeing.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli rahbarlar maqsadlarga erishish va jamoa farovonligini saqlash o'rtasidagi muvozanatni topishni biladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik va boshqaruv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To sell something at a higher than normal price.
words.example1: These tickets sell at a premium.
words.example1Situation: Siz narx haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our brand sells at a premium.
words.example2Situation: Siz brending haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Because of its superior quality and exclusivity, our product sells at a premium compared to competitors.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori sifati va ekskluzivligi tufayli mahsulotimiz raqobatchilarga nisbatan qimmatroqqa sotiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz brend strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To avoid something by going around it.
words.example1: He bypassed the traffic.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammoni chetlab o'tish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We cannot bypass the regulations.
words.example2Situation: Siz qonun-qoidalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Smart companies find ways to bypass traditional obstacles through innovation rather than breaking rules.
words.example3Translation: Aqlli kompaniyalar qoidalarni buzish o'rniga innovatsiyalar orqali an'anaviy to'siqlarni chetlab o'tish yo'llarini topadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz innovatsiya va muammolarni hal qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To make sure something is done.
words.example1: I make it a point to exercise daily.
words.example1Situation: Siz odatlaringiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We make it a point to reply quickly.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlarga xizmat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Great leaders make it a point to personally thank team members for their contributions.
words.example3Translation: Buyuk rahbarlar jamoa a'zolarining hissasi uchun shaxsan minnatdorchilik bildirishni odat qiladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik va motivatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A long time earlier.
words.example1: She left long before the meeting ended.
words.example1Situation: Siz vaqt haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We prepared long before the launch.
words.example2Situation: Siz tayyorgarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Successful companies start planning for the future long before their current products reach peak performance.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli kompaniyalar joriy mahsulotlari eng yuqori ko'rsatkichga chiqishidan ancha oldin kelajakni rejalashtira boshlaydilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik rejalashtirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To fail to make a payment or fulfill an obligation.
words.example1: He defaulted on his loan and had to pay a fine.
words.example1Situation: Siz moliyaviy majburiyatlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must not default on our payments.
words.example2Situation: Siz byudjet haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Companies that default on their financial obligations often face legal consequences and loss of trust from partners and investors.
words.example3Translation: Moliyaviy majburiyatlarini bajarmaydigan kompaniyalar ko'pincha huquqiy oqibatlar va hamkorlar hamda investorlar ishonchini yo'qotishga duch keladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy mas'uliyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To become known or revealed.
words.example1: The mistake came to light after the meeting.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi ma'lumot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Several issues came to light during the audit.
words.example2Situation: Siz tekshiruv haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The real reason behind the project delay came to light only after a thorough investigation by the management team.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha kechikishining haqiqiy sababi faqat rahbariyat jamoasi tomonidan chuqur tergovdan keyin oshkor bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammo tahlili haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To stay silent even when you want to speak.
words.example1: I wanted to speak, but I held my tongue.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zini tutish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Sometimes it's better to hold your tongue.
words.example2Situation: Siz muloqot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In difficult negotiations, knowing when to hold your tongue can be just as important as knowing when to speak.
words.example3Translation: Qiyin muzokaralarda qachon tilni tiyib turishni bilish, qachon gapirishni bilish kabi muhim bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz muzokaralar va muloqot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Tejash maqsadida sifatni pasaytirmoq / qisqa yo‘l tanlamoq
words.definition: To do something quickly or cheaply by skipping important steps, often reducing quality.
words.example1: Don't cut corners when it comes to safety.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavfsizlik yoki sifat haqida ogohlantirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The company cut corners to meet the deadline, which caused problems later.
words.example2Situation: Siz tez ishlaganlik oqibatlarini tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: If you keep cutting corners in your studies, your results will suffer.
words.example3Translation: Agar o‘qishingizda doim qisqa yo‘l tanlasangiz, natijalaringiz yomonlashadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz talabalar yoki o‘zini rivojlantirish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To remember and consider a piece of information when making decisions.
words.example1: Keep in mind that prices may increase next month.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhim ma’lumotni eslatayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: When planning your trip, keep in mind the weather can change suddenly.
words.example2Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Please keep in mind that this is a long-term project requiring patience and dedication.
words.example3Translation: Iltimos, yodda tutingki, bu uzoq muddatli loyiha bo‘lib, sabr va fidoyilik talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyiha yoki reja haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To be interested in or enjoy something.
words.example1: I'm into playing football.
words.example1Situation: Siz sevimli mashg'ulot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Many young employees are into technology.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our company likes to hire people who are into continuous learning and self-development.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyamiz doimiy o'rganish va o'zini rivojlantirishga qiziqadigan odamlarni ishga olishni yaxshi ko'radi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar tanlovi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To completely support or agree with something.
words.example1: I'm all for changing the plan.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zgarish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team is all for the new strategy.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa fikri haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Most employees are all for implementing flexible working hours to improve work-life balance.
words.example3Translation: Ko'pchilik xodimlar ish va hayot muvozanatini yaxshilash uchun moslashuvchan ish vaqtini joriy etishni to'liq qo'llab-quvvatlaydilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar takliflari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To oppose something.
words.example1: I'm against smoking indoors.
words.example1Situation: Siz qoida haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Many are against the new policy.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'zgarish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A significant number of employees were against moving to a new office building because of longer commute times.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlarning katta qismi yangi ofis binosiga ko'chishga qarshi edi, chunki yo'l vaqti uzayishi mumkin edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki muhokamalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be related to or connected with something.
words.example1: The problem is to do with your phone.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammo haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This issue is to do with communication.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki aloqa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The delay in delivery is to do with supply chain problems, not with our production capacity.
words.example3Translation: Yetkazib berishdagi kechikish ishlab chiqarish quvvati bilan emas, balki ta'minot zanjiri muammolari bilan bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammo tahlili haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be completely ready.
words.example1: I'm all set for the meeting.
words.example1Situation: Siz tayyorgarlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team is all set for the presentation.
words.example2Situation: Siz taqdimot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After weeks of preparation, our delegation was all set for the important international negotiations.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha hafta tayyorgarlikdan so'ng, delegatsiyamiz muhim xalqaro muzokaralarga to'liq tayyor edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muhim tadbirlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To stay awake all night.
words.example1: I was up all night studying.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin tayyorgarlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team was up all night finishing the project.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha muddati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During the product launch, many developers were up all night fixing last-minute bugs to ensure everything worked perfectly.
words.example3Translation: Mahsulot chiqarilishi paytida ko'plab dasturchilar oxirgi lahzada xatolarni tuzatish uchun tun bo'yi uxlamay ishladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz qiyin loyihalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be very critical or strict with someone.
words.example1: Don't be so hard on yourself.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zini ayblayotgan odamga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The manager is sometimes too hard on the team.
words.example2Situation: Siz rahbarlik uslubi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While high standards are important, being too hard on employees can reduce motivation and increase burnout.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori standartlar muhim bo'lsa ham, xodimlarga haddan tashqari qattiq munosabat motivatsiyani pasaytirishi va charchoqni kuchaytirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik va motivatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Cancelled or not happening.
words.example1: The meeting is off due to bad weather.
words.example1Situation: Siz bekor qilish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The event is off until next month.
words.example2Situation: Siz tadbir haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Due to technical issues, tomorrow's training session is off and will be rescheduled for next week.
words.example3Translation: Texnik muammolar tufayli ertangi o'quv mashg'uloti bekor qilindi va kelasi haftaga ko'chirildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'zgartirishlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be tired and annoyed with something.
words.example1: I'm fed up with all this work.
words.example1Situation: Siz charchoq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team is fed up with the delays.
words.example2Situation: Siz muammo haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many employees are fed up with working overtime every week without proper compensation.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab xodimlar har hafta to'g'ri kompensatsiyasiz ortiqcha ish vaqtidan bezib qolganlar.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar muammolari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: It would be wiser or more advantageous to do something.
words.example1: You're better off taking a rest today.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We are better off focusing on quality.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In this situation, you're better off waiting for more information before making a final decision.
words.example3Translation: Bu vaziyatda yakuniy qaror qabul qilishdan oldin ko'proq ma'lumot kutganingiz yaxshiroq.
words.example3Situation: Siz qaror qabul qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: To be on good terms with someone
words.pronunciation: /tuː biː ɒn ɡʊd tɜːmz wɪð ˈsʌmwʌn/
words.definition: To have a friendly relationship with someone.
words.example1: They are on good terms now.
words.example1Situation: Siz munosabatlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: It's important to be on good terms with clients.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan aloqa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Maintaining good terms with former colleagues and partners can open unexpected opportunities in the future.
words.example3Translation: Oldingi hamkasblar va hamkorlar bilan yaxshi munosabatlarni saqlab qolish kelajakda kutilmagan imkoniyatlarni ochishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz tarmoq va munosabatlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To support or approve of something.
words.example1: I'm in favor of going there a bit earlier.
words.example1Situation: Siz taklif bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team is in favor of the new plan.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa fikri haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Most board members are in favor of expanding into the European market this year.
words.example3Translation: Direktorlar kengashining ko'pchiligi bu yil Yevropa bozoriga chiqishni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik qarorlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Focused on material possessions and wealth.
words.example1: He is quite materialistic.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy fazilat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our society is becoming more materialistic.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While being ambitious is good, becoming overly materialistic can negatively affect personal relationships and happiness.
words.example3Translation: Ambitsiyali bo'lish yaxshi bo'lsa ham, haddan tashqari moddiyatchilikka berilish shaxsiy munosabatlar va baxtga salbiy ta'sir ko'rsatishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaxsiy rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Too interested in other people's affairs.
words.example1: Don't be so nosy.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy hayot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: She is very nosy about colleagues' lives.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofis madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Being nosy in the workplace can damage trust and create unnecessary tension among team members.
words.example3Translation: Ish joyida qiziquvchanlik ishonchni buzishi va jamoa a'zolari o'rtasida keraksiz taranglik yaratishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki munosabatlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Not sincere, behaving differently with different people.
words.example1: I don't trust two-faced people.
words.example1Situation: Siz ishonch haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: He is known for being two-faced.
words.example2Situation: Siz shaxs haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Working with two-faced colleagues makes the work environment toxic and reduces overall team productivity.
words.example3Translation: Ikkiyuzlamachi hamkasblar bilan ishlash ish muhitini zaharli qiladi va umumiy jamoa samaradorligini pasaytiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish muhiti haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Unfriendly and aggressive.
words.example1: His attitude was very hostile.
words.example1Situation: Siz xatti-harakat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We faced a hostile environment.
words.example2Situation: Siz raqobat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A hostile work environment can lead to high staff turnover and decreased motivation among employees.
words.example3Translation: Dushmanona ish muhiti xodimlarning tez-tez ish joyini o'zgartirishiga va motivatsiyaning pasayishiga olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish muhiti haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Skilled at controlling or influencing others in a clever but dishonest way.
words.example1: She is very manipulative.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxs haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We must be careful of manipulative people.
words.example2Situation: Siz hamkorlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Manipulative leaders may achieve short-term results, but they eventually lose the genuine respect and loyalty of their teams.
words.example3Translation: Boshqaruvchan rahbarlar qisqa muddatli natijalarga erishishi mumkin, ammo oxir-oqibat jamoasining chinakam hurmati va sadoqatini yo'qotadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik uslublari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Having an exaggerated sense of one’s own importance or abilities.
words.example1: His arrogant attitude makes him very difficult to work with.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning xatti-harakatini tanqid qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She came across as arrogant during the interview.
words.example2Situation: Siz suhbat yoki birinchi taassurot haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: An arrogant leader often fails to listen to their team’s valuable suggestions.
words.example3Translation: Takabbur rahbar ko‘pincha jamoasining qimmatli takliflarini eshitmaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik va jamoaviy ish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Not willing to listen to or accept new ideas or different opinions.
words.example1: Some people are so narrow-minded they refuse to accept new ideas.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamlarning eski fikrlarini tanqid qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Don't be so narrow-minded; there are many ways to solve this problem.
words.example2Situation: Siz suhbatdoshni yangi fikrlarga ochiq bo‘lishga chaqirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Narrow-minded attitudes can slow down social and cultural progress.
words.example3Translation: Tor fikrlilik jamiyat va madaniyat taraqqiyotini sekinlashtirishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy muammolar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Acting suddenly without thinking carefully about the consequences.
words.example1: She’s very impulsive and often regrets her decisions later.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning xatti-harakatlarini tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Making impulsive purchases is one of the main reasons people get into debt.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy masalalar haqida ogohlantirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: His impulsive nature has both advantages and serious drawbacks.
words.example3Translation: Uning impulsiv tabiati ham afzalliklar, ham jiddiy kamchiliklarga ega.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaxsiy xususiyatlar haqida muvozanatli gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.translation: Kinik, hamma narsaga shubha bilan qaraydigan
words.definition: Believing that people are motivated purely by self-interest; distrustful.
words.example1: He has a very cynical view of politics and politicians.
words.example1Situation: Siz siyosat yoki jamiyat haqidagi salbiy qarashlarni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She gave a cynical laugh when I said I wanted to change the world.
words.example2Situation: Siz birovning ishonchsizligini ko‘rsatayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: A cynical attitude can prevent you from building meaningful relationships.
words.example3Translation: Kinik munosabat sizga chinakam munosabatlarni qurishga to‘sqinlik qilishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaxsiy rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Thinking only about oneself and not considering other people’s feelings.
words.example1: She is quite self-centered and rarely thinks about others’ feelings.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning xudbinligini tanqid qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Being self-centered can ruin even the strongest friendships.
words.example2Situation: Siz do‘stlik va munosabatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The most successful leaders are those who are ambitious but not self-centered.
words.example3Translation: Eng muvaffaqiyatli rahbarlar - bu ambitsiyali, ammo o‘zini o‘ylamaydiganlar.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik sifatlari haqida muvozanatli fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Safe or suitable to eat.
words.example1: Are these mushrooms edible?
words.example1Situation: Siz ovqat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The plant is not edible.
words.example2Situation: Siz xavfsizlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Before using any wild plants in cooking, it is essential to confirm they are edible and safe for consumption.
words.example3Translation: Yovvoyi o'simliklarni ovqatga ishlatishdan oldin ularning yesa bo'ladigan va xavfsiz ekanligini aniqlash juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavfsizlik va ovqatlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Loud enough to be heard.
words.example1: His voice was barely audible.
words.example1Situation: Siz taqdimot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Make sure the sound is audible.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnika haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In large conference halls, it is important to use microphones so that every speaker's voice is clearly audible to all participants.
words.example3Translation: Katta konferensiya zallarida har bir spikerning ovozi barcha ishtirokchilarga aniq eshitilishi uchun mikrofondan foydalanish muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz taqdimot va muloqot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Able to be seen.
words.example1: The sign is clearly visible.
words.example1Situation: Siz reklama haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The improvement is now visible.
words.example2Situation: Siz natijalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The positive effects of the new training program became visible after just three months.
words.example3Translation: Yangi o'quv dasturining ijobiy natijalari atigi uch oy ichida ko'rinadigan bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Clear enough to read.
words.example1: Please write in legible handwriting.
words.example1Situation: Siz hujjat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The contract must be legible.
words.example2Situation: Siz huquqiy hujjatlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: All official documents must be written in clear, legible font to avoid misunderstandings and legal issues.
words.example3Translation: Barcha rasmiy hujjatlar tushunmovchilik va huquqiy muammolarni oldini olish uchun aniq va o'qiladigan shriftda yozilishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz hujjatlar va rasmiy aloqa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Easy to reach or use.
words.example1: The website must be accessible.
words.example1Situation: Siz raqamli mahsulot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We made the office more accessible.
words.example2Situation: Siz qulaylik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Making products and services accessible to people with disabilities is not only ethical but also expands market reach.
words.example3Translation: Mahsulot va xizmatlarni nogironligi bor odamlar uchun qulay qilish nafaqat axloqiy, balki bozor auditoriyasini kengaytiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inklyuzivlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Able to be repaired or corrected.
words.example1: The problem is fixable.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammo haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Don't worry, it's easily fixable.
words.example2Situation: Siz tinchlantirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Most software bugs are fixable if detected early, which is why regular testing is essential in development.
words.example3Translation: Ko'pchilik dasturiy xatolar erta aniqlansa tuzatish mumkin, shuning uchun ishlab chiqishda muntazam test o'tkazish juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz sifat nazorati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Able to be replaced.
words.example1: This part is replaceable.
words.example1Situation: Siz jihoz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: No employee is replaceable.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlar qadri haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: While machines and equipment are replaceable, experienced and skilled employees are much harder to replace.
words.example3Translation: Mashina va jihozlarni almashtirish mumkin bo'lsa ham, tajribali va malakali xodimlarni almashtirish ancha qiyin.
words.example3Situation: Siz inson resurslari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Bashorat qilsa bo'ladigan / Oldindan aytish mumkin
words.definition: Able to be predicted or expected.
words.example1: The result was predictable.
words.example1Situation: Siz natija haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: His behavior is quite predictable.
words.example2Situation: Siz odam haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In business, predictable cash flow is very important for long-term planning and stability.
words.example3Translation: Biznesda bashorat qilinadigan naqd pul oqimi uzoq muddatli rejalashtirish va barqarorlik uchun juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy rejalashtirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Able to be adjusted or changed.
words.example1: The chair is fully adjustable.
words.example1Situation: Siz qulaylik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need an adjustable plan.
words.example2Situation: Siz strategiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Modern office furniture is designed to be adjustable to suit different employees' needs and improve comfort.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy ofis mebellari turli xodimlarning ehtiyojlariga mos kelishi va qulaylikni oshirishi uchun moslashtiriladigan qilib ishlab chiqilgan.
words.example3Situation: Siz ergonomika va qulaylik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Able to be reversed or returned to the previous state.
words.example1: The decision is reversible.
words.example1Situation: Siz qaror haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Luckily, the damage is reversible.
words.example2Situation: Siz muammo haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Some environmental damage caused by industry is reversible if we take immediate and strong action now.
words.example3Translation: Sanoat tufayli yuzaga kelgan ba'zi ekologik zararlar hozir darhol va kuchli choralar ko'rilsa qayta tiklanishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz atrof-muhit va barqarorlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Everyone or everything is included, with no exceptions.
words.example1: Education in all schools is terrible — universities are no exception.
words.example1Situation: Siz tanqid haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Everyone must follow the rules, no exception.
words.example2Situation: Siz qoida haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: High standards apply to every department — no exception.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori standartlar har bir bo'limga taalluqli — mustasno yo'q.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki intizom haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The right to choose freely.
words.example1: Students have freedom of choice.
words.example1Situation: Siz ta'lim haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We give customers freedom of choice.
words.example2Situation: Siz xizmat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Giving employees freedom of choice in how they work often leads to higher motivation and better results.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlarga qanday ishlash bo'yicha tanlash imkoniyatini berish ko'pincha yuqori motivatsiya va yaxshi natijalarga olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar erkinligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Extremely surprising or impressive.
words.example1: The technology is beyond imagination.
words.example1Situation: Siz innovatsiya haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The results were beyond imagination.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The speed of development in artificial intelligence in recent years has been beyond imagination.
words.example3Translation: So'nggi yillarda sun'iy intellektning rivojlanish tezligi tasavvur qilib bo'lmas darajada edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz texnologiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Permanent access to a product or service for life.
words.example1: All students will have lifetime access.
words.example1Situation: Siz kurs haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The course offers lifetime access.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahsulot afzalliklari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our online platform provides lifetime access to all materials, allowing professionals to revisit lessons whenever they need to update their skills.
words.example3Translation: Bizning onlayn platformamiz barcha materiallarga umrbod kirish imkoniyatini beradi, bu mutaxassislar o'z ko'nikmalarini yangilash zarur bo'lganda darslarni qayta ko'rib chiqishlariga imkon beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ta'lim va professional rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Extremely clear and easy to understand.
words.example1: Your explanation is crystal clear.
words.example1Situation: Siz maqtov bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The instructions were crystal clear.
words.example2Situation: Siz ko'rsatma haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The CEO made the company's new strategy crystal clear during the meeting, so everyone understood their role and objectives.
words.example3Translation: Bosh direktor yig'ilishda kompaniyaning yangi strategiyasini juda aniq-tiniq tushuntirdi, shuning uchun hamma o'z vazifasi va maqsadini tushundi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muloqot va tushuntirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to emphasize that something is definitely true.
words.example1: Without a doubt, technology has changed the way we live.
words.example1Situation: Siz kuchli ishonch bilan fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She is, without a doubt, the best candidate for the position.
words.example2Situation: Siz kimnidir yuqori baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Without a doubt, this is one of the most important decisions of your life.
words.example3Translation: Hech shubhasiz, bu sizning hayotingizdagi eng muhim qarorlardan biri.
words.example3Situation: Siz muhim mavzuda gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Over a long period of time; eventually.
words.example1: Studying hard may be difficult now, but in the long run it will pay off.
words.example1Situation: Siz uzoq muddatli foyda haqida maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: In the long run, patience and consistency bring better results.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat kalitlari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Investing in education pays off in the long run.
words.example3Translation: Ta'limga sarmoya kiritish uzoq muddatda o'z samarasini beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kelajak haqida fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.word: At the end of the day
words.definition: Used to say what is most important after considering everything.
words.example1: At the end of the day, your health is more important than money.
words.example1Situation: Siz haqiqiy ustuvorliklarni ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: At the end of the day, it's your life and your choice.
words.example2Situation: Siz mas'uliyatni eslatayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: At the end of the day, happiness matters the most.
words.example3Translation: Oxir-oqibat, baxt eng muhimi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hayotiy falsafa haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to say that something is true, but it is even more extreme than you are saying.
words.example1: The service at that restaurant was poor, to say the least.
words.example1Situation: Siz tanqidni yumshatib, lekin kuchliroq ma'noni bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He was upset, to say the least.
words.example2Situation: Siz his-tuyg'uni kuchaytirib aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The movie was disappointing, to say the least.
words.example3Translation: Film umidsizlikka tushirdi, eng kamida aytganda.
words.example3Situation: Siz baho berayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used when you suddenly realize or remember something while speaking.
words.example1: Come to think of it, I haven’t seen him in weeks.
words.example1Situation: Siz suhbat davomida birdan eslab qolganingizda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Come to think of it, maybe that's why she was acting strange.
words.example2Situation: Siz sababni o‘ylab topayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Come to think of it, I should have called her earlier.
words.example3Translation: Endi o‘ylab qarasam, unga oldinroq qo‘ng‘iroq qilishim kerak edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kechikkan fikrni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Over a long period of time.
words.example1: It may be hard now, but in the long run you'll benefit.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Investing in education pays off in the long run.
words.example2Situation: Siz rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Although the new system is expensive now, in the long run it will save the company a lot of money and time.
words.example3Translation: Yangi tizim hozir qimmat bo'lsa ham, uzoq muddatda kompaniyaga ko'p pul va vaqtni tejab beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategik investitsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To have responsibility for something.
words.example1: I'm in charge of organizing the event.
words.example1Situation: Siz mas'uliyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: She is in charge of the marketing department.
words.example2Situation: Siz lavozim haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Being in charge of a large team requires strong leadership, communication, and decision-making skills.
words.example3Translation: Katta jamoani boshqarish kuchli yetakchilik, muloqot va qaror qabul qilish ko'nikmalarini talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Certain to happen.
words.example1: He is bound to win the game.
words.example1Situation: Siz bashorat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: With this effort, success is bound to come.
words.example2Situation: Siz motivatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: If we continue investing in innovation, we are bound to become one of the market leaders in the next few years.
words.example3Translation: Agar innovatsiyalarga sarmoya kiritishni davom ettirsak, kelgusi bir necha yil ichida bozor yetakchilaridan biriga aylanishimiz muqarrar.
words.example3Situation: Siz kelajak prognozi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Intended or designed for a particular purpose.
words.example1: This tool is meant to fix pronunciation.
words.example1Situation: Siz mahsulot haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The meeting was meant to solve the issue.
words.example2Situation: Siz yig'ilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: This training program is meant to develop leadership skills among mid-level managers.
words.example3Translation: Bu o'quv dasturi o'rta darajadagi rahbarlarda yetakchilik ko'nikmalarini rivojlantirish uchun mo'ljallangan.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'qitish va rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To the best of my knowledge.
words.example1: As far as I know, she is still working there.
words.example1Situation: Siz ma'lumot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: As far as I know, the project is on schedule.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha holati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: As far as I know, the new office will open next month, but I'll confirm with the manager.
words.example3Translation: Men bilganimcha, yangi ofis kelasi oy ochiladi, lekin rahbar bilan aniqlashtiraman.
words.example3Situation: Siz yangiliklar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To disappoint or fail to meet someone's expectations.
words.example1: I promised to help her, and I won't let her down.
words.example1Situation: Siz va'dangizni bajarish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We cannot let our clients down.
words.example2Situation: Siz mijozlar bilan munosabat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: As a team leader, I always try my best not to let my colleagues down when they count on me for support.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa rahbari sifatida hamkasblarim menga ishonganlarida ularni ko'nglini qoldirmaslik uchun qo'limdan kelganini qilaman.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik va mas'uliyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: One after another without a break.
words.example1: He won three games in a row.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We closed five deals in a row.
words.example2Situation: Siz savdo natijalari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The sales team achieved their targets for four months in a row, which earned them special recognition from the management.
words.example3Translation: Savdo jamoasi to'rt oy ketma-ket rejalarni bajardi va bu ularga rahbariyat tomonidan maxsus e'tirof keltirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz natijalar va mukofotlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: During the period of time between two events.
words.example1: Dinner will be ready soon. In the meantime, set the table.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The report is being prepared. In the meantime, review the previous data.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha jarayoni haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The new system will be launched next month. In the meantime, we will continue using the old one with some improvements.
words.example3Translation: Yangi tizim kelasi oy ishga tushadi. Shu paytgacha eski tizimdan ba'zi yaxshilanishlar bilan foydalanamiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'tish davri haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Suddenly and unexpectedly.
words.example1: She called me out of the blue.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan voqea haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The offer came out of the blue.
words.example2Situation: Siz imkoniyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The job opportunity came out of the blue, but after careful consideration I decided to take it.
words.example3Translation: Ish taklifi to'satdan paydo bo'ldi, lekin yaxshilab o'ylab ko'rib, uni qabul qilishga qaror qildim.
words.example3Situation: Siz kutilmagan imkoniyatlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Kimnidir kutilmaganda ushlab qolmoq / hayratda qoldirmoq
words.definition: To surprise someone by doing or saying something they were not expecting.
words.example1: His sudden question caught me off guard.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan savol yoki holatdan hayratda qolganingizda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The manager's announcement caught everyone off guard.
words.example2Situation: Siz kutilmagan xabar yoki qaror haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She caught him off guard by proposing marriage during dinner.
words.example3Translation: U kechki ovqat paytida turmushga chiqishni taklif qilib, uni hayratda qoldirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kutilmagan romantik yoki muhim voqea haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To prepare for a possible event.
words.example1: Take an umbrella, just in case.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: I brought extra documents just in case.
words.example2Situation: Siz tayyorgarlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It's always good to have a backup plan just in case something goes wrong during the presentation.
words.example3Translation: Taqdimot paytida biror narsa noto'g'ri ketib qolsa, zaxira reja bo'lishi har doim yaxshi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rejalashtirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to say that two things are not true.
words.example1: He neither called nor texted me.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning harakatini inkor qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She is neither interested in sports nor in music.
words.example2Situation: Siz ikkita narsani rad etayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: They neither apologized nor explained their behavior.
words.example3Translation: Ular na kechirim so'rashdi, na o'z xatti-harakatlarini tushuntirishdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz odamlarning javobgarligi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Not feeling like doing or having something.
words.example1: I'm not in the mood for pizza.
words.example1Situation: Siz ovqat yoki faoliyat haqida rad etayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She's not in the mood for jokes right now.
words.example2Situation: Siz birovning holatini hisobga olayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: I'm not in the mood for serious discussions tonight.
words.example3Translation: Bugun kechqurun jiddiy suhbatlar uchun kayfiyatim yo'q.
words.example3Situation: Siz kayfiyat haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To be very annoyed or bored with something.
words.example1: I'm sick and tired of his lies.
words.example1Situation: Siz bezor bo'lgan narsangizni ifodalayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: People are sick and tired of traffic jams in the city.
words.example2Situation: Siz umumiy muammoni bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: I'm sick and tired of waiting for him every time.
words.example3Translation: Men har safar uni kutishdan bezor bo'ldim.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaxsiy bezorlikni ifodalayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to reveal new or unexpected information.
words.example1: It turns out that he was right.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan natija haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: It turns out the meeting was canceled.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangilik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It turns out that the main cause of the delay was a small technical error we overlooked earlier.
words.example3Translation: Kechikishning asosiy sababi avval e'tibor bermagan kichik texnik xato bo'lib chiqdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammo tahlili haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: All you need to do is…
words.translation: Siz qilishingiz kerak bo'lgan yagona narsa bu…
words.definition: Used to suggest a simple solution.
words.example1: All you need to do is just stop thinking about it.
words.example1Situation: Siz oddiy yechim taklif qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: All you need to do is practice every day.
words.example2Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: All you need to do is stay focused and work hard.
words.example3Translation: Siz qilishingiz kerak bo'lgan yagona narsa - diqqatni jamlagan holda qattiq ishlash.
words.example3Situation: Siz motivatsiya berayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To have a valid argument.
words.example1: You have a point.
words.example1Situation: Siz rozilik bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: She has a good point about the budget.
words.example2Situation: Siz muhokamada bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The client has a point — we should improve the user interface before the next update.
words.example3Translation: Mijozning fikri to'g'ri — keyingi yangilanishdan oldin foydalanuvchi interfeysini yaxshilashimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz mijoz fikri haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To find something difficult to do.
words.example1: I had a hard time understanding her.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyinchilikni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She has a hard time waking up early.
words.example2Situation: Siz odatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Many students have a hard time pronouncing English sounds correctly.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab talabalar inglizcha tovushlarni to'g'ri talaffuz qilishda qiynalishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz til o'rganish qiyinchiliklari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.word: Be on the verge of + V-ing
words.translation: Arafsasida bo'lmoq / deyarli qilay deb turmoq
words.definition: To be very close to doing something.
words.example1: I was on the verge of crying.
words.example1Situation: Siz kuchli his-tuyg'uni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The company was on the verge of bankruptcy.
words.example2Situation: Siz muhim vaziyatni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She was on the verge of quitting her job when she got promoted.
words.example3Translation: U ishini tashlab ketish arafasida edi, shunda uni lavozimi oshirildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kutilmagan o'zgarishlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: It is pointless to do something.
words.example1: It's no use waiting anymore.
words.example1Situation: Siz befoyda harakatni to'xtatishni maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: It's no use arguing with him.
words.example2Situation: Siz nizolarni oldini olish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: It's no use crying over spilled milk.
words.example3Translation: To'kilgan sut uchun yig'lashning foydasi yo'q.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'tmishdagi xatolarga qaytmaslik haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: It is not worth doing something.
words.example1: There's no point in arguing.
words.example1Situation: Siz bahslashish befoyda ekanligini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: There's no point in worrying about things you can't change.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashvishlanishni maslahat bermayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: There's no point in buying expensive clothes if you don't wear them.
words.example3Translation: Agar kiymasangiz, qimmat kiyim sotib olishning ma'nosi yo'q.
words.example3Situation: Siz amaliy maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To become familiar with something and accept it as normal.
words.example1: It took me a while to get used to living alone.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi holatga ko'nikish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: You'll soon get used to waking up early.
words.example2Situation: Siz odamni tinchlantirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: It is difficult at first, but you will gradually get used to speaking English every day.
words.example3Translation: Avvaliga qiyin, ammo asta-sekin har kuni inglizcha gapirishga ko'nikib qolasiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz til o'rganish jarayonini tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Showing love for one's country.
words.example1: He is very patriotic.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy fazilat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The speech was patriotic.
words.example2Situation: Siz tadbir haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Many successful leaders are deeply patriotic and work hard to contribute to their country's development.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab muvaffaqiyatli rahbarlar chuqur vatanparvar bo'lib, mamlakat rivojiga hissa qo'shish uchun ko'p mehnat qiladilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik va jamiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Having a strong desire to succeed.
words.example1: She is very ambitious.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxs haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team is ambitious.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Ambitious professionals who set clear goals and work consistently usually achieve great success in their careers.
words.example3Translation: Aniq maqsadlar qo'yib, izchil ishlaydigan ambitsiyali mutaxassislar odatda karyerasida katta muvaffaqiyatga erishadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat va rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Skilled at controlling others in a dishonest way.
words.example1: Don't be manipulative.
words.example1Situation: Siz axloq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: He has a manipulative personality.
words.example2Situation: Siz shaxs haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Manipulative people may achieve short-term gains, but they eventually lose trust and respect from colleagues.
words.example3Translation: Boshqaruvchan odamlar qisqa muddatli foyda ko'rishi mumkin, ammo oxir-oqibat hamkasblarining ishonch va hurmatini yo'qotadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish munosabatlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Able to recover quickly from difficulties.
words.example1: She is very resilient.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy fazilat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team proved to be resilient.
words.example2Situation: Siz inqiroz haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Resilient employees who adapt quickly to change are extremely valuable in today's fast-paced business environment.
words.example3Translation: O'zgarishlarga tez moslashadigan chidamli xodimlar bugungi tez sur'atli biznes muhitida juda qimmatli hisoblanadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar fazilatlari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Treating others cruelly or violently.
words.example1: His behavior was abusive.
words.example1Situation: Siz xatti-harakat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We have zero tolerance for abusive language.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki qoida haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Creating a workplace free from abusive behavior is essential for maintaining employee mental health and productivity.
words.example3Translation: Ish joyini haqoratli xatti-harakatlardan xoli saqlash xodimlarning ruhiy salomatligi va samaradorligini saqlash uchun juda muhimdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish muhiti haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Caring only about oneself and putting one's own interests before others.
words.example1: He is very egoistic.
words.example1Situation: Siz kimningdir xudbinligini tanqid qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She made an egoistic decision.
words.example2Situation: Siz biror odamning faqat o'z manfaati uchun qaror qabul qilganini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: His egoistic behavior made it difficult for others to work with him, as he never considered his team members' opinions or needs.
words.example3Translation: Uning xudbin xatti-harakati boshqalar bilan ishlashni qiyinlashtirdi, chunki u hech qachon jamoa a'zolarining fikri yoki ehtiyojlarini hisobga olmasdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz odamning xarakteri yoki xatti-harakatini muhokama qilayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: A person who judges or expresses their opinion about something, especially pointing out its faults.
words.example1: He is a harsh critic.
words.example1Situation: Siz kimdir juda qattiq tanqid qilishini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The film received mixed reviews from critics.
words.example2Situation: Siz filmlar, kitoblar yoki san'at asarlari haqidagi sharhlarni gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: As a critic, she always points out both the strengths and weaknesses of new policies before giving her final opinion.
words.example3Translation: Tanqidchi sifatida u har doim yangi siyosatlarning kuchli va zaif tomonlarini ko'rsatib, keyin yakuniy fikrini bildiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz professional tanqidchilar yoki odamning fikr bildirish uslubi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Having a strong desire to achieve something and not giving up easily.
words.example1: She is very determined to succeed in her career.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning kuchli motivatsiyasini tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Despite many failures, he remained determined to learn English fluently.
words.example2Situation: Siz qiyinchiliklarga qaramay maqsad sari intilish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: A determined attitude is one of the most important keys to success.
words.example3Translation: Qat'iyatlilik muvaffaqiyatning eng muhim kalitlaridan biridir.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat sirlari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Having a powerful personal charm that attracts and influences people.
words.example1: The new leader is incredibly charismatic.
words.example1Situation: Siz rahbar yoki mashhur shaxs haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She has a charismatic personality that makes everyone listen to her.
words.example2Situation: Siz odamning kuchli ta'sirini tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Many successful politicians are highly charismatic.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab muvaffaqiyatli siyosatchilar juda charizmaga ega.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik sifatlari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Feeling or showing sympathy and concern for others who are suffering.
words.example1: He is a compassionate person who always helps others.
words.example1Situation: Siz yaxshi insoniy fazilatlarni ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: A good doctor should be both skilled and compassionate.
words.example2Situation: Siz kasbiy fazilatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She showed a compassionate attitude towards the victims of the accident.
words.example3Translation: U avtohalokat qurbonlariga nisbatan rahmdil munosabatda bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz insonparvarlik yoki yordam haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To be discovered to be something.
words.example1: It turned out to be a great idea.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan natija haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The project turned out to be very successful.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The new marketing strategy turned out to be much more effective than we initially expected.
words.example3Translation: Yangi marketing strategiyasi dastlab kutganimizdan ancha samarali bo'lib chiqdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz natijalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To cause something to happen.
words.example1: The change will bring about positive results.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zgarish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: New technology can bring about major improvements.
words.example2Situation: Siz innovatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The leadership's decision to invest in employee training helped bring about a significant increase in productivity.
words.example3Translation: Rahbariyatning xodimlarni o'qitishga sarmoya kiritish qarori samaradorlikning sezilarli oshishiga yordam berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'zgarish va natija haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To cause or lead to something.
words.example1: This situation may give rise to problems.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavf haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The new policy gave rise to many discussions.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangilik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Rapid technological advancement can give rise to both great opportunities and serious ethical questions.
words.example3Translation: Tez texnologik taraqqiyot katta imkoniyatlar bilan birga jiddiy axloqiy savollarni ham keltirib chiqarishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz texnologiya va jamiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To gradually stop using or producing something over time.
words.example1: They are phasing out old models.
words.example1Situation: Siz eski mahsulotlar yoki texnologiyalarni bosqichma-bosqich to'xtatish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The company will phase out plastic packaging.
words.example2Situation: Siz ekologik o'zgarishlar yoki yangi siyosat haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The government decided to phase out coal power plants over the next decade to reduce carbon emissions.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat uglerod chiqindilarini kamaytirish uchun keyingi o'n yil ichida ko'mir elektr stansiyalarini bosqichma-bosqich yopishga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes yoki davlat siyosati haqida professional suhbatda gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To not take advantage of a chance or opportunity.
words.example1: Don't pass up this opportunity.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stingizga yaxshi imkoniyatni qo'ldan boy bermaslikni maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He passed up the chance to study abroad.
words.example2Situation: Siz kimdir muhim imkoniyatdan foydalanmaganini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She passed up a high-paying job offer because she wanted to start her own business.
words.example3Translation: U yuqori maoshli ish taklifini rad etdi, chunki o'z biznesini boshlamoqchi edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muhim qarorlar va imkoniyatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To become popular or fashionable.
words.example1: This trend is catching on quickly.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi moda yoki tendensiya ommalashayotganini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: His new song is really catching on.
words.example2Situation: Siz musiqa, video yoki kontent mashhurlashayotganini gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The new app caught on very fast among young people because of its simple and fun design.
words.example3Translation: Yangi ilova oddiy va qiziqarli dizayni tufayli yoshlar orasida juda tez ommalashib ketdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz texnologiya, biznes yoki ijtimoiy trendlar haqida suhbatlashayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To suddenly become very successful or popular.
words.example1: Her career took off after that movie.
words.example1Situation: Siz kimningdir muvaffaqiyati keskin oshganini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The business really took off last year.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya yoki loyiha muvaffaqiyatli rivojlanayotganini gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The startup took off after they received investment from a big venture capital firm.
words.example3Translation: Startap katta venchur kapital firmasidan investitsiya olgandan keyin tez muvaffaqiyatga erishdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes va startaplar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To notice or understand something that is not directly stated.
words.example1: She quickly picked up on the tension in the room.
words.example1Situation: Siz suhbatdagi yashirin signallarni sezish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Good listeners can pick up on small changes in someone's tone of voice.
words.example2Situation: Siz tinglash ko'nikmalari haqida maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: He didn't say it directly, but I picked up on his disappointment.
words.example3Translation: U to'g'ridan-to'g'ri aytmadi, lekin men uning ko'ngli qolganini sezdim.
words.example3Situation: Siz nozik his-tuyg'ularni tushunish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To understand the real meaning that is not explicitly stated.
words.example1: If you read between the lines, you'll understand what he really meant.
words.example1Situation: Siz yashirin ma'noni tushuntirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: When reading emails from clients, it's important to read between the lines.
words.example2Situation: Siz biznes muloqoti haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She said she was "fine", but reading between the lines, she was actually upset.
words.example3Translation: U "yaxshiman" dedi, lekin satrlar orasini o'qisangiz, aslida xafa bo'lganini tushunasiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz tinglash va tushunish chuqurligi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To mention or discuss something briefly.
words.example1: The speaker only touched on the main issues.
words.example1Situation: Siz taqdimot yoki suhbatda qisqacha muhokama haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: In the meeting, we touched on several important topics.
words.example2Situation: Siz yig'ilish yoki muhokama haqida xulosa chiqarayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The professor touched on the topic of artificial intelligence but didn't go into detail.
words.example3Translation: Professor sun'iy intellekt mavzusiga yengil teginib o'tdi, lekin chuqur kirmadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz dars yoki nutq haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To suppose something is true without enough evidence.
words.example1: Don't make assumptions about people.
words.example1Situation: Siz xulosa chiqarish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We should not make assumptions without data.
words.example2Situation: Siz tahlil haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Making assumptions about customer needs without proper research often leads to failed marketing campaigns.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlar ehtiyojlari haqida to'g'ri tadqiqot o'tkazmasdan taxmin qilish ko'pincha muvaffaqiyatsiz marketing kampaniyalariga olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor tadqiqoti haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To accept a difficult or unpleasant situation.
words.example1: She finally came to terms with the situation.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin haqiqatni qabul qilish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need to come to terms with the new reality.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'zgarishlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After several months, the team came to terms with the fact that major changes were necessary for the company's survival.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha oydan keyin jamoa kompaniya omon qolishi uchun katta o'zgarishlar zarurligini qabul qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qiyin qarorlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To express worries or doubts about something.
words.example1: He raised concerns about the plan.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammo haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Several employees raised concerns.
words.example2Situation: Siz ichki aloqa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During the meeting, the safety officer raised concerns about the new equipment and suggested additional training.
words.example3Translation: Yig'ilishda xavfsizlik mutaxassisi yangi jihozlar haqida tashvish bildirib, qo'shimcha o'qitishni taklif qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavfsizlik va mas'uliyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To start working on a project.
words.example1: We decided to undertake this project.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi ish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The team is ready to undertake the challenge.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our company is proud to undertake a project that aims to improve education quality in rural areas.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyamiz qishloq joylarda ta'lim sifatini yaxshilashga qaratilgan loyihani amalga oshirishdan faxrlanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy loyihalar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To not make enough progress or be late with something.
words.example1: We are falling behind on the schedule.
words.example1Situation: Siz loyiha muddati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Don't fall behind on your payments.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy majburiyatlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: If we fall behind on technological development, we risk losing our competitive position in the market.
words.example3Translation: Agar texnologik rivojlanishda orqada qolsak, bozordagi raqobatbardosh pozitsiyamizni yo'qotish xavfi bor.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqobat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To face a problem or difficulty that delays or reverses progress.
words.example1: We experienced a setback.
words.example1Situation: Siz loyiha yoki ishda muammo yuz berganini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The team experienced a major setback.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa yoki kompaniya qiyinchilikka duch kelganini gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Although the startup experienced a serious setback when their main investor withdrew, they managed to recover within six months.
words.example3Translation: Garchi startap asosiy investori chiqib ketgani uchun jiddiy muammoga duch kelgan bo'lsa ham, olti oy ichida tiklanishga muvaffaq bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes, loyiha yoki shaxsiy rivojlanishdagi qiyinchiliklar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To create or represent a potential danger to someone or something.
words.example1: This poses a threat.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavf haqida qisqa gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Climate change poses a serious threat.
words.example2Situation: Siz global muammolar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The rise of cyber attacks poses a significant threat to national security and private companies alike.
words.example3Translation: Kiberhujumlarning ko'payishi milliy xavfsizlik va xususiy kompaniyalar uchun jiddiy xavf tug'dirmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz xavfsizlik, biznes yoki jamiyatdagi xavflar haqida professional suhbatda gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.translation: Muammoning ildizini / eng asosiy sababini topmoq
words.definition: To discover the main or original reason behind a problem.
words.example1: We need to find the root cause.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammoni hal qilish uchun sababini izlayotganingizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: They finally found the root cause.
words.example2Situation: Siz muammoning asl sababi topilganini gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: After weeks of investigation, the engineers found the root cause of the system failure and implemented a permanent fix.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha haftalik tergovdan so'ng muhandislar tizim nosozligining asosiy sababini topib, doimiy yechimni amalga oshirdilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammolarni tahlil qilish va yechish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To start using a particular plan or method to achieve a goal.
words.example1: We adopted a new strategy.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi yondashuv tanlaganingizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The company adopted an aggressive strategy.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya kuchli strategiya qo'llayotganini gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: To increase market share, the business decided to adopt a customer-centric strategy focused on personalization and excellent service.
words.example3Translation: Bozordagi ulushni oshirish uchun kompaniya mijozlarga yo'naltirilgan, shaxsiylashtirish va ajoyib xizmatga asoslangan strategiyani qo'llashga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biznes, marketing yoki rivojlanish rejalari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.translation: Kirish yoki foydalanish imkoniga ega bo'lmoq
words.definition: To be able to use or reach something.
words.example1: I have access to the files.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror narsadan foydalana olishingizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Students have access to the library.
words.example2Situation: Siz imkoniyatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Thanks to the new membership, all users now have access to premium content and exclusive training materials.
words.example3Translation: Yangi a'zolik tufayli barcha foydalanuvchilar premium kontent va eksklyuziv o'quv materiallaridan foydalanish imkoniyatiga ega bo'ldilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz huquqlar, imkoniyatlar yoki resurslar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: The action of supervising someone or something.
words.example1: The project requires close supervision.
words.example1Situation: Siz loyiha boshqaruvi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: New employees work under supervision.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'qitish jarayoni haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Proper supervision during the training period helps new employees adapt faster and make fewer mistakes.
words.example3Translation: O'quv davrida to'g'ri nazorat yangi xodimlarning tezroq moslashishiga va kamroq xato qilishiga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar o'qitishi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The ability to take action without being told.
words.example1: We encourage initiative.
words.example1Situation: Siz xodimlar fazilati haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: She showed great initiative.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Employees who show initiative and solve problems independently are highly valued in our company.
words.example3Translation: Tashabbus ko'rsatib, muammolarni mustaqil hal qiladigan xodimlar kompaniyamizda juda qadrlanadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar bahosi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Another possible option.
words.example1: We need an alternative solution.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammo hal qilish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Is there any alternative?
words.example2Situation: Siz tanlov haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: If the main plan fails, we already have a strong alternative strategy prepared.
words.example3Translation: Agar asosiy reja muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'lsa, bizda allaqachon kuchli muqobil strategiya tayyor.
words.example3Situation: Siz rejalashtirish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Something that is more important than others.
words.example1: Customer satisfaction is our top priority.
words.example1Situation: Siz kompaniya qadriyatlari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Time management is a high priority.
words.example2Situation: Siz shaxsiy rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In today's competitive market, innovation has become a top priority for most successful companies.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi raqobatbardosh bozorda innovatsiya ko'pchilik muvaffaqiyatli kompaniyalar uchun eng muhim ustuvorlikka aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A fact or situation that can be observed, especially something unusual or interesting.
words.example1: This is a strange phenomenon.
words.example1Situation: Siz noodatiy bir voqea yoki hodisa haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The Northern Lights are a natural phenomenon.
words.example2Situation: Siz tabiatdagi ajoyib hodisalar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Social media addiction has become a widespread phenomenon among teenagers in the last decade.
words.example3Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlarga qaramlik so'nggi o'n yil ichida o'smirlar orasida keng tarqalgan hodisaga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy, psixologik yoki madaniy hodisalar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: A limitation or restriction that affects what you can do.
words.example1: We have time constraints.
words.example1Situation: Siz vaqt cheklovlari borligini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Budget constraints prevented the project.
words.example2Situation: Siz byudjet cheklovi tufayli biror ish amalga oshmaganini gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Despite financial and logistical constraints, the team successfully launched the product on time.
words.example3Translation: Moliyaviy va logistika cheklovlariga qaramay, jamoa mahsulotni o'z vaqtida ishga tushirishga muvaffaq bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz loyihalar, biznes yoki qaror qabul qilishdagi cheklovlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: A negative consequence or effect that happens as a result of an action or event.
words.example1: There will be repercussions.
words.example1Situation: Siz salbiy oqibatlar bo'lishini ogohlantirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: His decision had serious repercussions.
words.example2Situation: Siz biror qarorning yomon natijalari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The scandal had major repercussions for the company, resulting in loss of trust and a significant drop in sales.
words.example3Translation: Janjal kompaniya uchun katta oqibatlarga olib keldi, natijada ishonch yo'qoldi va savdo keskin tushib ketdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qarorlar, xatolar yoki voqealarning uzoq muddatli salbiy ta'siri haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To notice or understand something that is not directly stated.
words.example1: She quickly picked up on the tension in the room.
words.example1Situation: Siz suhbatdagi yashirin signallarni sezish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Good listeners can pick up on small changes in someone's tone of voice.
words.example2Situation: Siz tinglash ko'nikmalari haqida maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: He didn't say it directly, but I picked up on his disappointment.
words.example3Translation: U to'g'ridan-to'g'ri aytmadi, lekin men uning ko'ngli qolganini sezdim.
words.example3Situation: Siz nozik his-tuyg'ularni tushunish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To understand the real meaning that is not explicitly stated.
words.example1: If you read between the lines, you'll understand what he really meant.
words.example1Situation: Siz yashirin ma'noni tushuntirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: When reading emails from clients, it's important to read between the lines.
words.example2Situation: Siz biznes muloqoti haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She said she was "fine", but reading between the lines, she was actually upset.
words.example3Translation: U "yaxshiman" dedi, lekin satrlar orasini o'qisangiz, aslida xafa bo'lganini tushunasiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz tinglash va tushunish chuqurligi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To mention or discuss something briefly.
words.example1: The speaker only touched on the main issues.
words.example1Situation: Siz taqdimot yoki suhbatda qisqacha muhokama haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: In the meeting, we touched on several important topics.
words.example2Situation: Siz yig'ilish yoki muhokama haqida xulosa chiqarayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The professor touched on the topic of artificial intelligence but didn't go into detail.
words.example3Translation: Professor sun'iy intellekt mavzusiga yengil teginib o'tdi, lekin chuqur kirmadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz dars yoki nutq haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: A feeling of calm and no worries.
words.example1: This insurance gives me peace of mind.
words.example1Situation: Siz xavfsizlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: I need some peace of mind.
words.example2Situation: Siz dam olish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Having a clear backup plan gives employees peace of mind during uncertain economic times.
