words.example3Translation: Aniq zaxira rejasi noaniq iqtisodiy davrlarda xodimlarga xotirjamlik beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Good practical judgment.
words.example1: Use your common sense.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This decision lacks common sense.
words.example2Situation: Siz tanqid haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In complex situations, combining technical knowledge with good common sense leads to the best decisions.
words.example3Translation: Murakkab vaziyatlarda texnik bilimni yaxshi oddiy aql bilan birlashtirish eng to'g'ri qarorlarga olib keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qaror qabul qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Enjoying fun and enjoyment.
words.example1: She is very fun-loving.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxs haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our team is fun-loving.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa madaniyati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A fun-loving work environment helps reduce stress and increases creativity among team members.
words.example3Translation: Xushchaqchaq ish muhiti stressni kamaytiradi va jamoa a'zolari ijodkorligini oshiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish muhiti haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A person who learns new things quickly and easily.
words.example1: She is a quick learner.
words.example1Situation: Siz kimdir yangi narsalarni tez o'rganishini ijobiy baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He's a very quick learner.
words.example2Situation: Siz ish yoki o'qishda tez o'rganadigan odam haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Although she had no previous experience in coding, she proved to be a quick learner and mastered the basics within just two weeks.
words.example3Translation: Garchi oldin kod yozish tajribasi bo'lmagan bo'lsa ham, u tez o'rganadigan odam ekanligini isbotladi va ikki hafta ichida asoslarni o'zlashtirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ishga qabul qilish, o'qitish yoki shaxsiy qobiliyatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Extremely kind, generous, and good-natured person.
words.example1: She is golden-hearted.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning mehribonligini ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He has a golden-hearted personality.
words.example2Situation: Siz kimningdir xarakterini ijobiy baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Even after becoming very successful, she remained golden-hearted and continued helping those in need without expecting anything in return.
words.example3Translation: Juda muvaffaqiyatli bo'lib qolgan bo'lsa ham, u hamon juda mehribon bo'lib qoldi va hech narsa kutmasdan muhtojlarga yordam berishda davom etdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz odamning xarakteri va mehribonligi haqida chuqurroq gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Willing to listen to and consider new or different ideas.
words.example1: She is very open-minded and always respects different opinions.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning ijobiy fazilatini ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: An open-minded approach helps in solving complex problems.
words.example2Situation: Siz muammo yechimi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Traveling makes people more open-minded.
words.example3Translation: Sayohat qilish odamlarni yanada ochiq fikrli qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaxsiy rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Putting a lot of effort into work or studies.
words.example1: He is one of the most hard-working people I know.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovni maqtayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Hard-working students usually achieve better results.
words.example2Situation: Siz ta'lim va muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Success comes to those who are talented and hard-working.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyat iste'dodli va mehnatkash odamlarga keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat formulasi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Calm and sensible, especially in difficult situations.
words.example1: You need to stay level-headed in difficult situations.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Her level-headed reaction helped solve the crisis quickly.
words.example2Situation: Siz inqiroz yoki muammo haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: A good leader should be level-headed and decisive.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi rahbar sovuqqon va qat'iyatli bo'lishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik sifatlari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Able to work hard without needing external encouragement.
words.example1: Self-motivated people don't need constant supervision.
words.example1Situation: Siz mustaqil ishlaydigan odamlarni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Companies prefer hiring self-motivated employees.
words.example2Situation: Siz ishga qabul haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Being self-motivated is essential for successful remote work.
words.example3Translation: O'zini o'zi rag'batlantirish masofaviy ishda muvaffaqiyat uchun zarur.
words.example3Situation: Siz zamonaviy ish uslublari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Practical, realistic, and not thinking you are better than others.
words.example1: Despite his success, he remains very down-to-earth.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyatli odamning kamtarinligini ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: I like her because she is friendly and down-to-earth.
words.example2Situation: Siz odamning yoqimli xususiyatlarini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The best teachers are often down-to-earth and easy to talk to.
words.example3Translation: Eng yaxshi o'qituvchilar odatda oddiy va suhbatlashish oson bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijobiy fazilatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To visit someone informally.
words.example1: Can you drop by my house today?
words.example1Situation: Siz taklif qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: I'll drop by the office later.
words.example2Situation: Siz ofis haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Feel free to drop by my office anytime if you need help with the project.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha bo'yicha yordam kerak bo'lsa, istalgan vaqtda ofisimga kirib o'ting.
words.example3Situation: Siz hamkorlik va yordam haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To disappoint someone.
words.example1: Please don't let me down.
words.example1Situation: Siz va'da berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: I don't want to let the team down.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: We worked very hard on this project and we don't want to let our clients down.
words.example3Translation: Biz bu loyiha ustida juda ko'p mehnat qildik va mijozlarimizni ko'nglini qoldirmoqchi emasmiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz mas'uliyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To understand or solve something.
words.example1: I can't figure out this problem.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammo haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We finally figured out the issue.
words.example2Situation: Siz yechim topganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: After several hours of analysis, the team managed to figure out why the system was crashing.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha soatlik tahlildan so'ng, jamoa tizim nima uchun to'xtab qolayotganini tushunib yetdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muammo hal qilish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To make a mistake or do something badly.
words.example1: I messed up.
words.example1Situation: Siz xato qilganingizni tan olishda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Don't mess up this time.
words.example2Situation: Siz kimdirga muhim ishni buzmaslikni ogohlantirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She messed up the presentation by forgetting all her main points and speaking too fast.
words.example3Translation: U taqdimotni bosh nuqtalarni unutib va juda tez gapirib buzib qo'ydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish yoki topshiriqda xato qilish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To make a serious mistake or completely ruin something (more informal and stronger than "mess up").
words.example1: I really screwed up.
words.example1Situation: Siz katta xato qilganingizni aytilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He screwed up the project.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha yoki ishni buzib qo'yish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The new employee screwed up the client's order, which caused a big delay and damaged the company's reputation.
words.example3Translation: Yangi xodim mijozning buyurtmasini buzib qo'ydi, bu katta kechikishga va kompaniya obro'siga putur yetkazishiga olib keldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jiddiy xatolar va ularning oqibatlari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To introduce a topic into a conversation.
words.example1: She brought up an interesting point during the meeting.
words.example1Situation: Siz muhokamada yangi mavzu ochayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Please don't bring up politics at dinner.
words.example2Situation: Siz noqulay mavzuni oldini olish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: He brought up the issue of salary during the interview.
words.example3Translation: U intervyuda maosh masalasini ko‘tardi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish suhbati haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To find something by chance or to seem a certain way.
words.example1: I came across an old photo while cleaning my room.
words.example1Situation: Siz tasodifan biror narsani topganingizda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He comes across as very confident.
words.example2Situation: Siz birovning birinchi taassurotini tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: While reading the book, I came across several useful phrases.
words.example3Translation: Kitobni o‘qiyotganimda bir necha foydali iboralarga duch keldim.
words.example3Situation: Siz o‘qish yoki o‘rganish jarayonida ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To have a good relationship with someone.
words.example1: I get along with my colleagues very well.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish yoki o‘qish joyidagi munosabatlarni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She doesn't get along with her sister.
words.example2Situation: Siz oila ichidagi munosabatlarni gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: It's important to get along with people from different cultures.
words.example3Translation: Turli madaniyatlardan odamlar bilan til topishish muhim.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijtimoiy ko‘nikmalar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To feel excited and pleased about something that is going to happen.
words.example1: I'm really looking forward to the summer holiday.
words.example1Situation: Siz kelajakdagi voqeani kutayotganingizda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: We look forward to hearing from you soon.
words.example2Situation: Siz rasmiy yoki biznes yozishmalarida ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She is looking forward to starting her new job.
words.example3Translation: U yangi ishiga boshlashni intizorlik bilan kutmoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz yangi bosqich haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To reject an offer, invitation, or request.
words.example1: She turned down the job offer because of the low salary.
words.example1Situation: Siz taklifni rad etish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He turned down the invitation to the party.
words.example2Situation: Siz taklifni qabul qilmaslikni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Never turn down a good opportunity to learn something new.
words.example3Translation: Yangi narsani o‘rganish uchun yaxshi imkoniyatni hech qachon rad etmang.
words.example3Situation: Siz motivatsion maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to say that even after trying very hard, the result was not successful.
words.example1: Despite all my effort, I couldn't pass the exam.
words.example1Situation: Siz qattiq harakat qilganingizga qaramay natija bo‘lmaganini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Despite all her effort, the project was not approved.
words.example2Situation: Siz natija umidsiz bo‘lgan holatni bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Despite all their efforts, the team failed to qualify for the final.
words.example3Translation: Hamma harakatlariga qaramay, jamoa finalga chiqa olmadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sport yoki raqobat haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.word: To live up to my expectation
words.definition: To be as good as someone hoped or expected.
words.example1: Unfortunately, it didn't live up to my expectation.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror narsa kutganingizdek bo‘lmaganini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The movie really lived up to my expectations.
words.example2Situation: Siz ijobiy baho berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The new restaurant failed to live up to our expectations.
words.example3Translation: Yangi restoran bizning kutganimizga javob bermadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xizmat yoki mahsulot haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to talk about what someone really feels or believes, even if they don't show it.
words.example1: Deep down, I know she loves me.
words.example1Situation: Siz haqiqiy his-tuyg‘ular haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Deep down, he is a very kind person.
words.example2Situation: Siz kimningdir asl tabiatini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Deep down, she knew that leaving was the right decision.
words.example3Translation: Ich-ichidan u ketish to‘g‘ri qaror ekanligini bilardi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ichki his va qarorlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Despite very difficult circumstances or low chances of success.
words.example1: Against all odds, she managed to win the championship.
words.example1Situation: Siz kutilmagan muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: They built a successful company against all odds.
words.example2Situation: Siz qiyin sharoitda muvaffaqiyat haqida aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Against all odds, the small team reached the finals.
words.example3Translation: Barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay, kichik jamoa finalga chiqdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilhomlantiruvchi hikoyalar aytayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to say that something caused you a lot of disappointment.
words.example1: Much to my disappointment, the concert was canceled.
words.example1Situation: Siz katta umidsizlik haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Much to her disappointment, she didn't get the promotion.
words.example2Situation: Siz boshqa odamning umidsizligini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Much to my disappointment, the flight was delayed for six hours.
words.example3Translation: Mening qattiq umidsizlikka tushganim, parvoz olti soatga kechiktirildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sayohat yoki reja buzilganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to emphasize that you are telling the truth.
words.example1: In all honesty, I didn't like the movie at all.
words.example1Situation: Siz ochiq tanqid bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: In all honesty, I think you can do better.
words.example2Situation: Siz samimiy maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: In all honesty, this is the best decision I've ever made.
words.example3Translation: Ochig‘ini aytganda, bu mening qilgan eng yaxshi qarorim.
words.example3Situation: Siz o‘z his-tuyg‘ularingizni ochiq aytayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: After thinking about something carefully.
words.example1: On reflection, I think I made the wrong choice.
words.example1Situation: Siz o‘tgan qarorni qayta ko‘rib chiqayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: On reflection, the trip was more tiring than enjoyable.
words.example2Situation: Siz tajribani keyin baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: On reflection, moving to a new city was the best thing I ever did.
words.example3Translation: O‘ylab ko‘rgach, yangi shaharga ko‘chib o‘tish mening qilgan eng yaxshi ishim edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hayotiy o‘zgarishlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.word: When it comes down to it
words.definition: When you consider the most basic or important facts.
words.example1: When it comes down to it, health is more important than money.
words.example1Situation: Siz asl muhim narsalarni ta’kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: When it comes down to it, he’s a very reliable friend.
words.example2Situation: Siz kimningdir haqiqiy fazilatini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: When it comes down to it, the quality of the product matters most.
words.example3Translation: Oxir-oqibat, mahsulot sifati eng muhimi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qiyos va ustuvorlik haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used when you are about to say something very direct and possibly harsh.
words.example1: To be brutally honest, your presentation needs a lot of improvement.
words.example1Situation: Siz qattiq tanqid bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: To be brutally honest, I don't think this relationship is working.
words.example2Situation: Siz ochiq gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: To be brutally honest, this is one of the best books I've read this year.
words.example3Translation: Ochig‘ini juda qattiq aytganda, bu yil o‘qigan eng yaxshi kitoblarimdan biri.
words.example3Situation: Siz kuchli ijobiy fikrni ochiq aytayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to say what someone is really like, deep inside.
words.example1: He's a good person at heart.
words.example1Situation: Siz kimningdir asl tabiatini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Deep down she's still a child at heart.
words.example2Situation: Siz yosh ruh haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Although he looks serious, he's very kind at heart.
words.example3Translation: Tashqi ko‘rinishidan jiddiy bo‘lsa ham, yurakdan juda mehribon.
words.example3Situation: Siz tashqi ko‘rinish va ichki dunyo farqini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To formally hand in a letter or document stating that you are leaving your job.
words.example1: She decided to submit a resignation after ten years with the company.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish o'zgarishi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our HR department requires all employees to submit a resignation at least one month before their last working day.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi xodimga kompaniyaning chiqish jarayoni haqida tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Deciding to submit a resignation is a significant professional step that should be handled respectfully and with adequate notice to protect your reputation.
words.example3Translation: Ishdan ketish arizasini topshirish obro'ingizni himoya qilish uchun hurmat bilan va etarli ogohlantirish bilan hal qilinishi kerak bo'lgan muhim kasbiy qadamdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz kasbiy munosabatlar va ish o'zgarishi bo'yicha karyera rivojlanish seminarida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A job that offers a high or satisfactory salary.
words.example1: She was lucky to find a well-paid job straight after university.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish topish tajribasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company offers a well-paid job with additional benefits including health insurance and performance bonuses.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning ish taklifini potensial nomzodlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A well-paid job is important, but research consistently shows that autonomy, purpose, and good management matter just as much for long-term job satisfaction.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi oylik to'lanadigan ish muhim, lekin tadqiqotlar izchil ravishda mustaqillik, maqsad va yaxshi boshqaruv ham uzoq muddatli ishdan qoniqish uchun muhim ekanligini ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish motivatsiyasi va xodimlarni ushlab turish bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A market where many companies or individuals compete strongly for the same customers or opportunities.
words.example1: Getting a job in the tech industry is tough in a highly competitive market.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish qidirish qiyinchiliklari haqida hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company has maintained steady growth despite operating in a highly competitive market by focusing on quality and customer service.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning raqobat ustunliklarini investorlarga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In a highly competitive market, businesses that fail to innovate and adapt quickly risk losing their customer base to more agile competitors.
words.example3Translation: Juda raqobatli bozorda innovatsiya qilish va tez moslashishga muvaffaq bo'lmagan korxonalar o'z mijozlar bazasini chaqqonroq raqobatchilarga yo'qotish xavfiga duch keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz bozor strategiyasi va raqobat tahlili bo'yicha biznes konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Because of a large number of people wanting or needing something.
words.example1: Due to high demand, the tickets sold out within hours.
words.example1Situation: Siz mashhur tadbir yoki mahsulot haqida hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Due to high demand for our services, we are currently expanding our team and hiring additional staff.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning o'sishi va yollash rejalarini e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Due to high demand from international clients, our company has decided to open a new regional office to improve service delivery and response times.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro mijozlardan juda yuqori talab sababli kompaniyamiz xizmat ko'rsatish va javob berish vaqtlarini yaxshilash uchun yangi mintaqaviy ofis ochishga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kengayish strategiyasi va yangi bozorga kirish bo'yicha rahbariyatga taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A job that is boring and repetitive because it involves doing the same tasks over and over.
words.example1: He quit because he found the work too monotonous.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish qoldirish sabablari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company tries to reduce the risk of a monotonous job by rotating tasks and encouraging cross-departmental projects.
words.example2Situation: Siz xodimlarni jalb qilish va ushlab turish strategiyasini HR jamoasiga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A monotonous job can seriously affect employee well-being and creativity over time, which is why smart organisations invest in job enrichment and variety.
words.example3Translation: Bir xil ish vaqt o'tishi bilan xodimlar farovonligi va ijodkorligiga jiddiy ta'sir ko'rsatishi mumkin, shuning uchun aqlli tashkilotlar ish boyitish va xilma-xillikka sarmoya kiritadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish joyi dizayni va xodimlar motivatsiyasi bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A work schedule that allows employees to choose when they start and finish work within agreed limits.
words.example1: Flexible working hours help parents manage childcare more easily.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish va oilaviy hayotni muvozanatlash haqida hamkasbingizga maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company introduced flexible working hours last year, which has led to a noticeable improvement in staff productivity and morale.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi ish siyosatining natijalarini rahbariyatga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Offering flexible working hours has become an essential tool for attracting and retaining talent in industries where skilled professionals have many options.
words.example3Translation: Moslashuvchan ish vaqtini taklif qilish malakali mutaxassislar ko'p imkoniyatlarga ega bo'lgan sohalarda iste'dodni jalb qilish va ushlab turish uchun muhim vositaga aylandi.
words.example3Situation: Siz zamonaviy ish joyi siyosati va iste'dod boshqaruvi bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A task that requires a lot of effort, skill, or concentration to complete successfully.
words.example1: Writing a research paper is a demanding task that takes weeks of preparation.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyin loyiha yoki vazifa haqida hamkasbingizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our project managers are skilled at breaking down a demanding task into manageable steps to keep the team focused and on track.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha boshqaruvi metodologiyasini jamoangizga tushuntirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Leading a large cross-functional team through a major transformation is a demanding task that requires both technical expertise and strong emotional intelligence.
words.example3Translation: Katta funksiyalararo jamoani muhim transformatsiya orqali boshqarish texnik tajriba va kuchli hissiy intellektni talab qiluvchi juda ko'p kuch talab qiladigan vazifadir.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik rivojlanishi va tashkiliy o'zgarish bo'yicha konferensiyada taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The balance between time and energy spent on work and on personal life.
words.example1: Many employees nowadays value work-life balance above salary.
words.example1Situation: Siz zamonaviy ish prioritetlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company introduced remote work options specifically to help employees achieve a healthier work-life balance.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniyangizning yangi siyosatini xodimlarga e'lon qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Achieving a genuine work-life balance requires both individual boundaries and organisational cultures that actively discourage overwork and respect personal time.
words.example3Translation: Haqiqiy ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatiga erishish individual chegaralar va ortiqcha ishni faol ravishda oldini oladigan va shaxsiy vaqtni hurmat qiladigan tashkiliy madaniyatlarni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi va korporativ madaniyat bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Progress in a person's career, often through promotion, new skills, or increased responsibility.
words.example1: She joined the company because of the strong opportunities for career advancement.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish tanlash motivlari haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our mentorship programme is designed to support career advancement for junior staff by connecting them with experienced senior colleagues.
words.example2Situation: Siz iste'dod rivojlanish dasturini rahbariyatga taqdim etayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Organisations that invest in employee career advancement tend to have lower turnover rates and higher levels of engagement across all departments.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlar karyera o'sishiga sarmoya kiritadigan tashkilotlar barcha bo'limlarda pastroq kadrlar almashinuvi va yuqoriroq ishtirok darajalariga ega bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz iste'dod boshqaruvi va xodimlarni ushlab turish bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The level of contentment and fulfillment a person feels about their job.
words.example1: Job satisfaction is more important than a high salary for many people.
words.example1Situation: Siz ish motivatsiyasi haqida hamkasbingiz bilan gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company conducts annual surveys to measure employee job satisfaction and identify areas for improvement.
words.example2Situation: Siz HR jarayonlari va xodimlar fikr-mulohazasi haqida rahbariyatga hisobot berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: High job satisfaction is linked to better performance, lower absenteeism, and stronger loyalty, making it a key indicator of organisational health.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori ishdan qoniqish yaxshiroq ishlash, kamroq ishga kelmaslik va kuchliroq sadoqat bilan bog'liq bo'lib, uni tashkilot salomatligi'ning asosiy ko'rsatkichiga aylantiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xodimlar farovonligi va tashkiliy samaradorlik bo'yicha HR konferensiyasida taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: What I mean by that is
words.definition: Used to clarify or explain something.
words.example1: What I mean by that is we need more time.
words.example1Situation: Siz tushuntirish berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: What I mean by that is the quality must improve.
words.example2Situation: Siz fikrni aniqlashtirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: What I mean by that is we should focus more on customer experience rather than just increasing sales.
words.example3Translation: Bu bilan aytmoqchimanki, biz faqat savdoni oshirish o'rniga mijozlar tajribasiga ko'proq e'tibor qaratishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to rephrase or explain further.
words.example1: That is to say, we need to act now.
words.example1Situation: Siz izoh berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: That is to say, the project is delayed.
words.example2Situation: Siz holat haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: We need to improve efficiency, that is to say, we must reduce unnecessary meetings and paperwork.
words.example3Translation: Biz samaradorlikni oshirishimiz kerak, ya'ni keraksiz yig'ilishlar va qog'oz ishlarini kamaytirishimiz lozim.
words.example3Situation: Siz taklif bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: In addition to what has been said.
words.example1: The salary is good. On top of that, we get bonuses.
words.example1Situation: Siz afzalliklar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: It's expensive. On top of that, it's unreliable.
words.example2Situation: Siz tanqid haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The job offers great salary and flexible hours. On top of that, there are excellent training opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Ish yaxshi maosh va moslashuvchan ish vaqtini taklif qiladi. Bundan tashqari, ajoyib o'quv imkoniyatlari mavjud.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish taklifi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to give your personal opinion.
words.example1: If you ask me, it's too expensive.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxsiy fikringizni bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: If you ask me, we should accept the offer.
words.example2Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda yoki o'z fikringizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: If you ask me, the best solution is to invest more in employee training rather than buying new equipment.
words.example3Translation: Mening fikrimcha, eng yaxshi yechim — yangi uskunalar sotib olish o'rniga xodimlarni o'qitishga ko'proq mablag' sarflashdir.
words.example3Situation: Siz muhokamada o'z shaxsiy fikringizni ochiq bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.word: Moving on to the next reason
words.definition: Used to transition to the next point or reason in a discussion.
words.example1: Moving on to the next reason...
words.example1Situation: Siz nutq yoki tushuntirishda keyingi nuqtaga o'tayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Moving on to the next reason, we need more time.
words.example2Situation: Siz sabablarni sanab o'tayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Moving on to the next reason, implementing this change will not only increase efficiency but also improve team morale significantly.
words.example3Translation: Keyingi sababiga kelsak, bu o'zgarishni amalga oshirish samaradorlikni oshirish bilan birga jamoa ruhiyatini ham sezilarli darajada yaxshilaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz taqdimot yoki muhokamada mantiqiy o'tish qilayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to say that something is true for the majority of situations.
words.example1: In most cases, it works well.
words.example1Situation: Siz umumiy holatni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: In most cases, people prefer this option.
words.example2Situation: Siz odamlarning odatdagi tanlovini bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: In most cases, companies that invest heavily in research and development stay ahead of their competitors.
words.example3Translation: Ko'pgina hollarda, tadqiqot va rivojlanishga ko'p mablag' sarflaydigan kompaniyalar raqobatchilardan oldinda bo'lib qolishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz umumiy qoida yoki tendensiyani ifodalayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to introduce a contrasting or balancing point after making a statement.
words.example1: It's expensive. Having said that, it's worth it.
words.example1Situation: Siz bir fikr aytib, keyin qarama-qarshi fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He is young. Having said that, he is very talented.
words.example2Situation: Siz tan olish va cheklovni birga aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The plan looks perfect on paper. Having said that, we still need to consider possible risks in real-world implementation.
words.example3Translation: Reja qog'ozda mukammal ko'rinadi. Lekin, real hayotda amalga oshirishdagi mumkin bo'lgan xavflarni ham hisobga olishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz muhokamada muvozanatli fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.word: I would put it down to something
words.definition: Used to say what you think is the main reason or cause of something.
words.example1: I would put it down to lack of experience.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammoning sababini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: I'd put it down to poor planning.
words.example2Situation: Siz biror natijaga sabab ko'rsatayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The team's recent failure? I would put it down to insufficient communication between departments.
words.example3Translation: Jamoaning so'nggi muvaffaqiyatsizligi? Men buni bo'limlar o'rtasidagi yetarli bo'lmagan aloqa bilan izohlayman.
words.example3Situation: Siz sabab va tahlil haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.word: If I were to give an example, I'd say
words.pronunciation: /ɪf aɪ wɜː tə ɡɪv ən ɪɡˈzɑːm.pəl aɪd seɪ/
words.definition: Used to introduce an example to support your point.
words.example1: If I were to give an example, I'd say Apple.
words.example1Situation: Siz misol keltirishni boshlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: If I were to give an example, I'd say this movie.
words.example2Situation: Siz fikringizni misol bilan mustahkamlashda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: If I were to give an example, I'd say Elon Musk, who constantly takes big risks and learns from both success and failure.
words.example3Translation: Misol keltiradigan bo'lsam, aytgan bo'lardimki, Elon Musk — u doimiy ravishda katta risklarni qabul qiladi va muvaffaqiyat hamda muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan o'rganadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz fikringizni yorqin misollar bilan ochib berayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to explain the same idea in a different or clearer way.
words.example1: It's quite expensive. To put it another way, we can't afford it.
words.example1Situation: Siz fikringizni boshqacha ifodalab tushuntirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He's not very motivated. To put it another way, he lacks enthusiasm.
words.example2Situation: Siz tanqidiy fikrni yumshatib aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The task is challenging. To put it another way, it will test your skills.
words.example3Translation: Vazifa qiyin. Boshqacha qilib aytganda, u sizning qobiliyatingizni sinaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz murakkab g'oyani soddalashtirib tushuntirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To give a reason or explanation to show that something is right or reasonable.
words.example1: You don't need to justify your decision.
words.example1Situation: Siz qaroringizni himoya qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: How can you justify such a high price?
words.example2Situation: Siz tanqid qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The company tried to justify the layoffs due to economic difficulties.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya ishdan bo'shatishlarni iqtisodiy qiyinchiliklar bilan asoslashga harakat qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rasmiy yoki biznes kontekstida ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To say or show that something is wrong or not true.
words.example1: His actions contradict his words.
words.example1Situation: Siz harakat va so'z o'rtasidagi farqni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The new evidence contradicts the previous report.
words.example2Situation: Siz ilmiy yoki rasmiy bahsda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Her statements often contradict each other.
words.example3Translation: Uning bayonotlari ko'pincha bir-biriga zid keladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz inson xatti-harakati haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To suggest something without saying it directly.
words.example1: His tone implied that he was unhappy.
words.example1Situation: Siz ohang orqali ma'noni tushuntirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She didn't say it directly, but she implied that I was wrong.
words.example2Situation: Siz bilvosita ma'noni bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The results imply that more research is needed.
words.example3Translation: Natijalar ko'proq tadqiqot zarurligini anglatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilmiy yoki akademik matnda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To make something weaker or less effective, often gradually.
words.example1: Lack of sleep can undermine your performance at work.
words.example1Situation: Siz salbiy ta'sir haqida ogohlantirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Constant criticism can undermine a person's confidence.
words.example2Situation: Siz psixologik ta'sir haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: These rumors are intended to undermine his authority.
words.example3Translation: Bu mish-mishlar uning obro'sini tushirish uchun qilingan.
words.example3Situation: Siz siyosiy yoki ijtimoiy kontekstda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To publicly support or recommend a particular idea or plan.
words.example1: Many doctors advocate for a healthy diet.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat yoki tavsiya berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She strongly advocates for women's rights.
words.example2Situation: Siz ijtimoiy mavzuda gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Environmentalists advocate reducing plastic waste.
words.example3Translation: Atrof-muhit faollari plastik chiqindilarni kamaytirishni targ'ib qilishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz faollik va jamiyat mavzusida ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Including everything or nearly everything that is connected with a particular subject.
words.example1: This is a comprehensive speaking course.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'quv materialini tavsiflayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The report provides a comprehensive analysis of the problem.
words.example2Situation: Siz hisobot yoki tadqiqot haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: We need a more comprehensive approach to solve this issue.
words.example3Translation: Bu muammoni hal qilish uchun yanada to'liq yondashuv kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz strategiya haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Not based on reason or clear thinking.
words.example1: It's irrational to worry about things that are out of your control.
words.example1Situation: Siz mantiqsiz xatti-harakat haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: His fear of flying is completely irrational.
words.example2Situation: Siz qo'rquv yoki his-tuyg'ular haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Making decisions based on irrational beliefs can lead to failure.
words.example3Translation: Mantiqsiz e'tiqodlarga asoslanib qaror qabul qilish muvaffaqiyatsizlikka olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3Situation: Siz psixologiya yoki qaror qabul qilish mavzusida ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Important, large, or serious enough to be noticed or have an effect.
words.example1: There has been a significant improvement in her English.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zgarish yoki natijani baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: This is a significant step towards solving the problem.
words.example2Situation: Siz muhim qadam haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The discovery had a significant impact on science.
words.example3Translation: Bu kashfiyot ilm-fanga katta ta'sir ko'rsatdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ilmiy yoki akademik kontekstda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: As a result of something that has just been mentioned.
words.example1: He didn't study hard. Consequently, he failed the exam.
words.example1Situation: Siz sabab-natija munosabatini bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The demand increased. Consequently, prices went up.
words.example2Situation: Siz iqtisodiy yoki biznes holatini tushuntirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She was late for the interview. Consequently, she didn't get the job.
words.example3Translation: U suhbatga kechikdi. Natijada ishga qabul qilinmadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz voqea rivojini tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To judge or calculate the quality, importance, or value of something.
words.example1: We need to evaluate the success of the project.
words.example1Situation: Siz natijani tahlil qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Teachers regularly evaluate students' progress.
words.example2Situation: Siz ta'lim jarayonida ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The committee will evaluate all applications carefully.
words.example3Translation: Qo'mita barcha arizalarni diqqat bilan baholaydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rasmiy qaror qabul qilish jarayonida ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to ask someone to speak directly.
words.example1: Get to the point!
words.example1Situation: Siz suhbatni qisqartirishni so'raganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Please get to the point.
words.example2Situation: Siz yig'ilishda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: During long meetings, it is useful to politely say "Let's get to the point" to save time.
words.example3Translation: Uzoq yig'ilishlarda vaqtni tejash uchun "Maqsadga o'taylik" deb muloyimlik bilan aytish foydalidir.
words.example3Situation: Siz samarali muloqot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Used to summarize a long story.
words.example1: Long story short, we won the contract.
words.example1Situation: Siz voqeani qisqacha aytayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Long story short, the project failed.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyatsizlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Long story short, after many challenges we managed to launch the product on time.
words.example3Translation: Gapni qisqasi, ko'p qiyinchiliklardan keyin mahsulotni muddatida ishga tushirdik.
words.example3Situation: Siz natija haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.word: That's a bit of a stretch
words.definition: Used when you think someone is exaggerating or their claim is not very believable.
words.example1: That's a bit of a stretch.
words.example1Situation: Siz kimdir haqiqatni biroz bo'rtirib ko'rsatayotganini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Don't you think that's a bit of a stretch?
words.example2Situation: Siz shubhangizni muloyim tarzda bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Saying that you'll become a millionaire in one year just by posting on Instagram — that's a bit of a stretch, don't you think?
words.example3Translation: Faqat Instagramda post qo'yish orqali bir yilda millioner bo'laman desangiz — bu biroz bo'rtirib yuborish bo'ladi, shunday emasmi?
words.example3Situation: Siz realistik bo'lmagan da'volar yoki va'dalarni tanqid qilayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To be extremely busy with work or overwhelmed with tasks.
words.example1: I'm up to my neck in work.
words.example1Situation: Siz hozir juda band ekanligingizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She's up to her neck with deadlines.
words.example2Situation: Siz boshqa odamning juda ko'p ish bilan bandligini gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: I'm up to my neck with meetings and reports this week, so I don't think I can take on any new projects right now.
words.example3Translation: Bu hafta yig'ilishlar va hisobotlar bilan bo'ynimgacha botganman, shuning uchun hozircha yangi loyihalarni olishim qiyin.
words.example3Situation: Siz ish yuklamasi yuqori bo'lganda va yangi vazifalardan voz kechayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Asking someone to regularly inform you about the progress or latest developments.
words.example1: Keep me updated.
words.example1Situation: Siz voqea rivojini kuzatib turishni xohlayotganingizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Please keep me updated on the project.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha holati haqida doimiy ma'lumot olishni so'rayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: I'm really interested in how the negotiations go, so please keep me updated every few days.
words.example3Translation: Muzokaralar qanday kechayotgani meni juda qiziqtiradi, shuning uchun har bir necha kunda meni xabardor qilib turing.
words.example3Situation: Siz muhim jarayon yoki loyihani masofadan kuzatayotganingizda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to tell someone to stop unnecessary talk and get straight to the main point.
words.example1: Cut to the chase — do you want the job or not?
words.example1Situation: Siz to'g'ridan-to'g'ri javob talab qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Let's cut to the chase and talk about the budget.
words.example2Situation: Siz muhim mavzuga tez o'tayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Cut to the chase, what's the real reason you called?
words.example3Translation: Gapni qisqartir, aslida nima uchun qo'ng'iroq qilding?
words.example3Situation: Siz suhbatni ochiq va tezlashtirishni xohlaganingizda ishlatasiz.

words.word: Hit the nail on the head
words.definition: To describe or identify something exactly correctly.
words.example1: You hit the nail on the head — that's exactly the problem.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning fikri juda aniq ekanligini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She hit the nail on the head when she said we need better planning.
words.example2Situation: Siz to'g'ri tahlilni maqtayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: His comment really hit the nail on the head.
words.example3Translation: Uning izohi haqiqatan ham to'g'ri edi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muhokamada ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to show that you are listening very attentively.
words.example1: Tell me what happened — I'm all ears.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiziqib tinglayotganingizni bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: I'm all ears if you have any suggestions.
words.example2Situation: Siz maslahat kutayotganingizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Go ahead with your idea, I'm all ears.
words.example3Translation: Fikringni ayt, butunlay tinglayapman.
words.example3Situation: Siz suhbatni ochayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used when something is not surprising.
words.example1: No wonder you're tired — you worked all night.
words.example1Situation: Siz sababni tushuntirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: No wonder the team won, they trained very hard.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat sababini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: No wonder prices are so high in this area.
words.example3Translation: Bu hududda narxlar qimmatligi ajablanarli emas.
words.example3Situation: Siz holatni izohlayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.translation: Yana bir bor ayt, to'g'ri aytasan
words.definition: Used to strongly agree with what someone has said.
words.example1: This weather is terrible! — You can say that again!
words.example1Situation: Siz kuchli rozilik bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The food here is amazing. — You can say that again!
words.example2Situation: Siz biror narsani maqtayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Working from home has its challenges. — You can say that again.
words.example3Translation: Uyda ishlash o'z qiyinchiliklariga ega. — Yana bir bor aytasan!
words.example3Situation: Siz suhbatda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: The general characteristics and feelings of human beings.
words.example1: Jealousy is part of human nature.
words.example1Situation: Siz insoniy xususiyatlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Competition is in human nature.
words.example2Situation: Siz motivatsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Understanding human nature helps leaders motivate their teams more effectively.
words.example3Translation: Inson tabiatini tushunish rahbarlarga jamoalarini samaraliroq rag'batlantirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz rahbarlik va psixologiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be essentially about or depend on something.
words.example1: It all comes down to money.
words.example1Situation: Siz sabab haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Success comes down to hard work.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In the end, business success often comes down to how well you understand your customers.
words.example3Translation: Oxir-oqibat, biznesdagi muvaffaqiyat ko'pincha mijozlaringizni qanchalik yaxshi tushunishingizga bog'liq bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat sabablari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To be logical or reasonable.
words.example1: It doesn't make sense to spend so much.
words.example1Situation: Siz mantiq haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This decision makes sense to me.
words.example2Situation: Siz rozilik bildirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: It makes sense to invest in employee training because it improves long-term productivity.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlarni o'qitishga sarmoya kiritish mantiqan to'g'ri keladi, chunki bu uzoq muddatli samaradorlikni oshiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz investitsiya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To make good use of an opportunity.
words.example1: You should take advantage of this opportunity.
words.example1Situation: Siz maslahat berayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We took advantage of the market growth.
words.example2Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Smart companies always take advantage of new technologies to stay ahead of their competitors.
words.example3Translation: Aqlli kompaniyalar raqobatchilardan oldinda qolish uchun yangi texnologiyalardan doim foydalanadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqobatbardoshlik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To use something in the best possible way or take full advantage of it.
words.example1: Try to make the most of this opportunity!
words.example1Situation: Siz kimdirga yaxshi imkoniyatdan maksimal foydalanishni maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: We should make the most of our time.
words.example2Situation: Siz vaqtdan unumli foydalanish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: You only live abroad for a short period, so make the most of it by traveling, learning the language, and meeting new people.
words.example3Translation: Siz chet elda faqat qisqa muddat yashaysiz, shuning uchun sayohat qilib, tilni o'rganib va yangi odamlar bilan tanishib, undan maksimal darajada foydalaning.
words.example3Situation: Siz imkoniyatlar, sayohat yoki yangi tajribalardan unumli foydalanish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: In order to help, improve, or achieve something.
words.example1: For the sake of your health, please stop smoking!
words.example1Situation: Siz sog'liq yoki farovonlik uchun biror narsani tavsiya qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: They stayed together for the sake of the children.
words.example2Situation: Siz bolalar yoki boshqa odamlar uchun qurbonlik qilish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She decided to move to a quieter city for the sake of her mental peace and wellbeing.
words.example3Translation: U ruhiy tinchligi va farovonligi uchun tinchroq shaharga ko'chib o'tishga qaror qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz biror narsani yaxshilash maqsadida qaror qabul qilish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Without being affected or influenced by something.
words.example1: Regardless of any difficulties, you should keep going.
words.example1Situation: Siz qiyinchiliklarga qaramay davom etishni rag'batlantirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: We will proceed regardless of the weather.
words.example2Situation: Siz ob-havo yoki tashqi omillarga qaramasdan ishni davom ettirish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She continued pursuing her dream regardless of the criticism and obstacles she faced along the way.
words.example3Translation: U yo'lida duch kelgan tanqid va to'siqlarga qaramay o'z orzusiga intilishda davom etdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qat'iyatlilik va maqsad sari harakat haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to say that something is already perfect or as good as it can possibly be.
words.example1: The hotel service was amazing, the food was delicious — it couldn't be better!
words.example1Situation: Siz biror narsani juda yuqori baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Everything is going well. It couldn't be better.
words.example2Situation: Siz hozirgi holatdan mamnun ekanligingizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: My new job is perfect — great salary, friendly colleagues, and interesting projects. It couldn't be better.
words.example3Translation: Mening yangi ishim juda zo'r — yaxshi maosh, do'stona hamkasblar va qiziqarli loyihalar. Bundan yaxshiroq bo'lishi mumkin emas.
words.example3Situation: Siz hozirgi holatingiz yoki tajribangizdan mamnunligingizni ifodalayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.word: At the end of the day
words.definition: Used to say what is most important or true after everything is considered.
words.example1: At the end of the day, family is more important than money.
words.example1Situation: Siz haqiqiy ustuvorliklarni ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: At the end of the day, it's your decision.
words.example2Situation: Siz mas'uliyatni boshqaga yuklayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: At the end of the day, hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
words.example3Translation: Oxir-oqibat, qattiq mehnat iste'dodni yengadi, agar iste'dod qattiq ishlamasa.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida umumiy xulosa chiqarayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.translation: Haqiqiy sinov vaqti kelganda, og'ir paytda
words.definition: Used when a situation becomes serious or difficult and action is needed.
words.example1: When push comes to shove, he always supports his friends.
words.example1Situation: Siz birovning haqiqiy xarakterini tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: When push comes to shove, I'll choose my family over work.
words.example2Situation: Siz muhim qaror haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She talks a lot, but when push comes to shove, she delivers results.
words.example3Translation: U ko'p gapiradi, lekin haqiqiy sinov vaqti kelganda natija ko'rsatadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz odamning amaliyotini baholayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Occasionally.
words.example1: I read books from time to time.
words.example1Situation: Siz odatlaringiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We meet from time to time.
words.example2Situation: Siz uchrashuvlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: From time to time, even the best companies need to review and update their strategies.
words.example3Translation: Vaqti-vaqti bilan hatto eng yaxshi kompaniyalar ham strategiyalarini ko'rib chiqib, yangilashlari kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Repeatedly.
words.example1: He makes the same mistake time after time.
words.example1Situation: Siz takroriy xato haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Time after time, we see the same problem.
words.example2Situation: Siz muammo haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Time after time, great leaders prove that persistence and patience lead to success.
words.example3Translation: Qayta-qayta buyuk rahbarlar qat'iyat va sabr muvaffaqiyatga olib kelishini isbotlaydilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat sabablari haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Intermittently, not continuously.
words.example1: I exercise on and off.
words.example1Situation: Siz odatlaringiz haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The project has been on and off for months.
words.example2Situation: Siz loyiha holati haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Learning a language on and off is much less effective than studying consistently every day.
words.example3Translation: Tilni vaqti-vaqti bilan o'rganish har kuni izchil o'rganishdan ancha kam samarali.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'qitish va odatlar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Usually, in most cases, more frequently than the opposite.
words.example1: More often than not, I pay the bills when my friends and I go to a restaurant.
words.example1Situation: Siz odat tusiga kirgan holatni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: More often than not, he arrives late.
words.example2Situation: Siz kimningdir odatiy xatti-harakatini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: More often than not, people regret the opportunities they didn't take rather than the mistakes they made.
words.example3Translation: Ko'pincha odamlar qilgan xatolaridan ko'ra foydalanmagan imkoniyatlaridan afsuslanishadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz umumiy hayotiy kuzatuv yoki tajribani ifodalayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Almost never, very rarely.
words.example1: I hardly ever eat fast food.
words.example1Situation: Siz kamdan-kam qiladigan ishni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She hardly ever complains.
words.example2Situation: Siz kimdir deyarli hech qachon shikoyat qilmasligini ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: He hardly ever takes a day off, even when he's feeling unwell, because he's extremely dedicated to his work.
words.example3Translation: U kasal bo'lsa ham deyarli hech qachon dam olmaydi, chunki u o'z ishiga juda sodiq.
words.example3Situation: Siz odamning odatlari yoki turmush tarzi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Occasionally, but not regularly.
words.example1: Every now and then I like to visit my hometown.
words.example1Situation: Siz vaqti-vaqti bilan qilinadigan ish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Every now and then, she sends me a message.
words.example2Situation: Siz kamdan-kam aloqa haqida suhbatlashayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: I still go jogging every now and then.
words.example3Translation: Men hali ham vaqt-vaqt bilan yugurishga chiqaman.
words.example3Situation: Siz odatlaringiz haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: At some point in the future, even if it takes time.
words.example1: Sooner or later, you will have to face the problem.
words.example1Situation: Siz muqarrar holatni ogohlantirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Sooner or later, technology will change this industry completely.
words.example2Situation: Siz kelajak haqida bashorat qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Sooner or later, she will realize her mistake.
words.example3Translation: Ertaroq yoki keyinroq u o'z xatosini tushunadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz voqea rivojini taxmin qilayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Over a long period of time; eventually.
words.example1: In the long run, studying hard will benefit you.
words.example1Situation: Siz uzoq muddatli foyda haqida maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: In the long run, this investment will be profitable.
words.example2Situation: Siz moliyaviy qarorlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Exercising regularly pays off in the long run.
words.example3Translation: Muntazam sport bilan shug'ullanish uzoq muddatda o'z samarasini beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sog'liq va odatlar haqida suhbatlashayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Very rarely; almost never.
words.example1: I eat fast food once in a blue moon.
words.example1Situation: Siz juda kam qilinadigan ish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She visits her grandparents once in a blue moon.
words.example2Situation: Siz oilaviy aloqalar haqida suhbatlashayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Such opportunities come once in a blue moon.
words.example3Translation: Bunday imkoniyatlar juda kamdan-kam uchraydi.
words.example3Situation: Siz noyob holatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Gradually as time passes.
words.example1: Over time, your English will improve significantly.
words.example1Situation: Siz rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Over time, he became more confident.
words.example2Situation: Siz shaxsiy o'sish haqida suhbatlashayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Tastes change over time.
words.example3Translation: Vaqt o'tishi bilan didlar o'zgaradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz o'zgarishlar haqida umumiy fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Affordable, not expensive.
words.example1: This hotel is very pocket-friendly.
words.example1Situation: Siz narx haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We offer pocket-friendly solutions.
words.example2Situation: Siz mahsulot haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Our company focuses on providing high-quality yet pocket-friendly services to small businesses.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyamiz kichik bizneslar uchun yuqori sifatli, ammo hamyonbop xizmatlarni taqdim etishga e'tibor qaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz brend strategiyasi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Ikkala tomon uchun ham foydali holat
words.definition: A situation where both sides benefit.
words.example1: This is a win-win situation.
words.example1Situation: Siz hamkorlik haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The partnership created a win-win situation.
words.example2Situation: Siz biznes hamkorligi haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: A good negotiation should always aim for a win-win situation where both parties feel satisfied.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi muzokara har doim ikkala tomon ham mamnun bo'ladigan win-win holatini maqsad qilishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz muzokaralar haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Reasonably priced; not too expensive.
words.example1: This phone is very affordable.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror narsaning narxi qulay ekanligini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: We need affordable housing.
words.example2Situation: Siz uy-joy yoki xizmatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The hotel offers high-quality service at affordable prices, making it popular among middle-class travelers.
words.example3Translation: Mehmonxona o'rtacha daromadli sayyohlar orasida mashhur bo'lgan yuqori sifatli xizmatni qulay narxlarda taklif qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mahsulot yoki xizmatlarning narxi va sifati haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Cheap or reasonably priced, suitable for people with limited budgets.
words.example1: It's a budget-friendly option.
words.example1Situation: Siz arzonroq variant haqida maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: We chose a budget-friendly restaurant.
words.example2Situation: Siz pulni tejashni o'ylab joy tanlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: This travel app provides many budget-friendly destinations with great deals on flights and accommodation.
words.example3Translation: Ushbu sayohat ilovasi parvoz va turar joy bo'yicha yaxshi chegirmalar bilan ko'plab qulay narxdagi manzillarni taklif qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz sayohat, xarid yoki byudjetga mos variantlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To have just enough money to cover expenses until the next salary, with nothing left over.
words.example1: I'm living paycheck to paycheck.
words.example1Situation: Siz o'zingizning moliyaviy ahvolingizni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Many families live paycheck to paycheck.
words.example2Situation: Siz odamlarning moliyaviy qiyinchiliklarini gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Even though he has a good job, he still lives paycheck to paycheck because of high rent and loan payments.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi ish joyi bo'lsa ham, yuqori ijara va qarz to'lovlari tufayli u hali ham maoshdan maoshgacha yashamoqda.
words.example3Situation: Siz moliyaviy holat va byudjet boshqaruvi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.word: Feel like a fish out of water
words.pronunciation: /fiːl laɪk ə fɪʃ aʊt əv ˈwɔː.tər/
words.definition: To feel uncomfortable or awkward because you are in an unfamiliar situation or environment.
words.example1: I felt like a fish out of water.
words.example1Situation: Siz yangi muhitda o'zingizni noqulay his qilganingizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She felt like a fish out of water at the party.
words.example2Situation: Siz boshqa odamning noqulay ahvolini tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: When I first moved to a big city from a small village, I felt like a fish out of water for the first few months.
words.example3Translation: Kichik qishloqdan katta shaharga ko'chib kelganimda, dastlabki bir necha oy o'zimni juda noqulay his qildim.
words.example3Situation: Siz yangi joy, yangi ish yoki notanish muhitdagi his-tuyg'ular haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: The amount of money needed to pay for basic expenses such as housing, food, and transportation.
words.example1: The cost of living in big cities is much higher than in small towns.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaharlar va hayot xarajatlari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Many people are moving because of the rising cost of living.
words.example2Situation: Siz odamlarning qarorlari haqida suhbatlashayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: We need to consider the cost of living before accepting the job offer.
words.example3Translation: Ish taklifini qabul qilishdan oldin yashash narxini hisobga olishimiz kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz amaliy maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: The money left after paying taxes and basic living expenses.
words.example1: Young people with high disposable income often spend on travel.
words.example1Situation: Siz yoshlarning xarajat odatlari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: I have very little disposable income this month.
words.example2Situation: Siz o‘zingizning moliyaviy holatingizni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Rising inflation reduces people's disposable income.
words.example3Translation: Inflyatsiyaning o‘sishi odamlarning erkin daromadini kamaytiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz iqtisodiy vaziyat haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: A heavy financial responsibility or source of stress.
words.example1: Paying for university became a big financial burden for his family.
words.example1Situation: Siz oilaviy moliyaviy qiyinchiliklar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Medical bills can be a serious financial burden.
words.example2Situation: Siz kutilmagan xarajatlar haqida suhbatlashayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: He took a second job to ease the financial burden on his family.
words.example3Translation: U oilasiga moliyaviy yukni yengillashtirish uchun ikkinchi ishga kirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mas’uliyat va yechim haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Money saved for unexpected emergencies or difficult times.
words.example1: It’s wise to have a rainy day fund in case of emergencies.
words.example1Situation: Siz moliyaviy maslahat berayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She used her rainy day fund when she lost her job.
words.example2Situation: Siz qiyin paytda jamg‘armaning foydasi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: I try to put aside some money every month for my rainy day fund.
words.example3Translation: Men har oy qora kun uchun jamg‘armaga bir oz pul ajratishga harakat qilaman.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaxsiy moliyaviy strategiyangiz haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Willing to consider new ideas.
words.example1: She is very open-minded.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxs haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: We need open-minded team members.
words.example2Situation: Siz jamoa haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Open-minded leaders create better innovation because they listen to different perspectives.
words.example3Translation: Keng fikrlaydigan rahbarlar turli nuqtai nazarlarni tinglagani uchun yaxshiroq innovatsiya yaratadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Having strong desire to succeed.
words.example1: He is very ambitious.
words.example1Situation: Siz shaxs haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Our company is ambitious.
words.example2Situation: Siz kompaniya haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Ambitious people who work hard and stay focused usually achieve their long-term goals.
words.example3Translation: Qattiq mehnat qilib, diqqatni jamlagan ambitsiyali odamlar odatda uzoq muddatli maqsadlariga erishadilar.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.translation: Yaxshi tomonni o'ylaydigan, yaxshi narsani umid qiladigan
words.definition: Having a positive attitude and expecting good things to happen.
words.example1: She is very optimistic.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning ijobiy fikrliligini ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He remains optimistic about the future.
words.example2Situation: Siz kelajakka nisbatan umidvorlik haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Even after several failures, she stayed optimistic and believed that success was just around the corner.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan keyin ham u umidvor bo'lib qoldi va muvaffaqiyat yaqinlashayotganiga ishondi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qiyin paytlarda ham ijobiy bo'lish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.translation: Moslashuvchan, har xil vaziyatlarga moslashib keta oladigan
words.definition: Able to adjust easily to new conditions or changes.
words.example1: He is very adaptable.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning tez moslashishini ijobiy baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She is adaptable to any environment.
words.example2Situation: Siz yangi sharoitlarga moslashish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Being adaptable helped her succeed in different countries and cultures throughout her career.
words.example3Translation: Moslashuvchanligi unga turli mamlakatlar va madaniyatlarda muvaffaqiyat qozonishga yordam berdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz kar'yera va o'zgarishlarga moslashish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Having an exaggerated sense of one's own importance or abilities.
words.example1: He is arrogant.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning kibrini tanqid qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She has an arrogant attitude.
words.example2Situation: Siz birovning o'zini yuqori tutishini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: His arrogant behavior made it difficult for colleagues to work with him.
words.example3Translation: Uning kekkaygan xatti-harakati hamkasblar bilan ishlashni qiyinlashtirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz salbiy xarakter xususiyatlari haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Not afraid of anything; brave and courageous.
words.example1: She is fearless.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning jasurligini ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He made a fearless decision.
words.example2Situation: Siz qo'rqmasdan qaror qabul qilish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The fearless explorer ventured into the unknown jungle despite all the dangers.
words.example3Translation: Qo'rqmas tadqiqotchi barcha xavflarga qaramay noma'lum o'rmonga yo'l oldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz jasurlik va xavf-xatar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.translation: Qo'pol, tajovuzkor, tez urishib ketishga moyil
words.definition: Behaving in an angry, forceful, or attacking way.
words.example1: He is too aggressive.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning tajovuzkorligini tanqid qilayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She has an aggressive style.
words.example2Situation: Siz muloqot uslubini tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: His aggressive tone during the meeting made everyone feel uncomfortable.
words.example3Translation: Uning yig'ilishdagi tajovuzkor ohangi hammani noqulay his qildirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz salbiy xulq-atvor haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Friendly and sociable; enjoying meeting and talking to people.
words.example1: She is very outgoing.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning ochiqligini ijobiy baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He is outgoing and energetic.
words.example2Situation: Siz ijtimoiy odamni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Her outgoing personality helps her make new friends quickly in any environment.
words.example3Translation: Uning chiqishuvchan xarakteri har qanday muhitda tez do'st orttirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shaxsiy xususiyatlar va ijtimoiylik haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Feeling or showing no hope; without expectation of success.
words.example1: I feel hopeless.
words.example1Situation: Siz umidsizlikni ifodalayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The situation seems hopeless.
words.example2Situation: Siz holatni umidsiz deb hisoblayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: After many rejections, he started to feel hopeless about finding a good job.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p rad javoblaridan keyin u yaxshi ish topishga umidini yo'qotay boshladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz qiyin paytlardagi his-tuyg'ular haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Honest and genuine; showing true feelings.
words.example1: He is sincere.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning samimiyligini ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Her apology was sincere.
words.example2Situation: Siz chin dildan kechirim so'rash haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: People trust him because he is always sincere in his words and actions.
words.example3Translation: Odamlar unga ishonishadi, chunki u har doim so'zlari va harakatlarida samimiy bo'ladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ishonch va halollik haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Having moods that change quickly and often, especially becoming sad or angry.
words.example1: She is moody.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning kayfiyati tez o'zgarishini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He is often moody in the morning.
words.example2Situation: Siz odatdagi holatni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Working with a moody boss can be stressful because you never know what mood he will be in.
words.example3Translation: Kayfiyati tez o'zgaradigan rahbar bilan ishlash qiyin, chunki uning qanday kayfiyatda bo'lishini hech qachon bilmaysiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz xarakterdagi salbiy tomonlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Willing to accept or respect opinions, beliefs, or behavior that differ from your own.
words.example1: She is very tolerant.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning chidamli ekanligini ijobiy baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: We need to be more tolerant.
words.example2Situation: Siz boshqalarga hurmat haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Living in a multicultural city requires people to be tolerant of different traditions and lifestyles.
words.example3Translation: Turli madaniyatli shaharda yashash odamlardan turli an'ana va turmush tarzlariga chidamli bo'lishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hurmat va qabul qilish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Relaxed, calm, and not easily worried or upset.
words.example1: He is easy-going.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning tinch va sodda xarakterini ijobiy baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She has an easy-going personality.
words.example2Situation: Siz xarakterni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: His easy-going nature makes him popular among friends and colleagues.
words.example3Translation: Uning oson chiqishadigan tabiati uni do'stlar va hamkasblar orasida mashhur qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijobiy shaxsiy fazilatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.translation: Boshqalarga ta'sir o'tkaza oladigan, boshqalarning e'tiborini tortib maftun qila oladigan
words.definition: Having a strong personal charm that attracts and influences others.
words.example1: He is very charismatic.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning jozibasini ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She has a charismatic personality.
words.example2Situation: Siz kuchli jozibaga ega odam haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The charismatic leader inspired thousands of people with his powerful speeches.
words.example3Translation: Maftunkor rahbar kuchli nutqlari bilan minglab odamlarni ilhomlantirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yetakchilik va ta'sirchanlik haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.translation: Hazilni tushina oladigan va hazilni qadrlaydigan
words.definition: The ability to understand and enjoy jokes and funny situations.
words.example1: He has a great sense of humor.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning hazil tuyg'usini ijobiy baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She doesn't have a sense of humor.
words.example2Situation: Siz hazilni tushunmaslikni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Having a sense of humor helps reduce stress and makes difficult situations easier to handle.
