words.example3Translation: Hazil tuyg'usi stressni kamaytirishga va qiyin vaziyatlarni osonroq yengishga yordam beradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hazilning foydasi haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Very pleasant and attractive in a way that makes people like you.
words.example1: She is charming.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning jozibasini ijobiy baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He has a charming smile.
words.example2Situation: Siz tabassum yoki xulqni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: His charming personality made everyone feel welcome at the party.
words.example3Translation: Uning maftunkor xarakteri ziyofatdagi har bir odamni xush kelibsiz his qildirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz ijobiy taassurot qoldiradigan odamlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Very cute, lovable, and attractive.
words.example1: The baby is adorable.
words.example1Situation: Siz bolalar yoki hayvonlarni yoqimli deb aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She looked adorable in that dress.
words.example2Situation: Siz tashqi ko'rinishni ijobiy baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The little puppy with big eyes was so adorable that everyone wanted to play with it.
words.example3Translation: Katta ko'zlari bor kichkina kuchukcha shu qadar yoqimtoy ediki, hamma u bilan o'ynashmoqchi bo'ldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz yoqimli va shirin narsalar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Not willing to share information or keep things private.
words.example1: He is very secretive.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning sir saqlashini aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She is secretive about her plans.
words.example2Situation: Siz rejalarni yashirish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: His secretive behavior made his friends suspicious about what he was hiding.
words.example3Translation: Uning sir saqlaydigan xatti-harakati do'stlarida u nimani yashirayotgani haqida shubha uyg'otdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shubhali yoki yashirin xatti-harakatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Highly motivated and determined to succeed.
words.example1: She is very driven.
words.example1Situation: Siz odamning maqsadga intilishini ijobiy baholayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He is a driven person.
words.example2Situation: Siz shijoatli odamni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Driven by his ambition, he worked hard every day to achieve his dream of starting his own company.
words.example3Translation: Ambitiyasi undagan holda u har kuni o'z kompaniyasini ochish orzusiga erishish uchun qattiq mehnat qildi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyat va shaxsiy rivojlanish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To some extent.
words.example1: It's, in a way, my biggest mistake.
words.example1Situation: Siz tan olish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: In a way, the failure helped us learn.
words.example2Situation: Siz saboq haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: In a way, losing that client was a blessing because it pushed us to improve our service.
words.example3Translation: Qaysidir ma'noda, o'sha mijozni yo'qotish baraka bo'ldi, chunki u xizmatimizni yaxshilashga undadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan o'rganish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To some degree.
words.example1: Learning a language can, in some way, broaden your horizons.
words.example1Situation: Siz ta'lim haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: This experience changed me in some way.
words.example2Situation: Siz shaxsiy o'sish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Traveling in some way changes how you see the world and understand different cultures.
words.example3Translation: Sayohat qandaydir tarzda dunyoga qarashingizni va turli madaniyatlarni tushunishingizni o'zgartiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz tajriba va o'sish haqida gapirayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: At a specific moment or stage in time.
words.example1: I failed the exam; at that point, I was extremely disappointed.
words.example1Situation: Siz biror voqea sodir bo'lgan paytdagi his-tuyg'ularingizni tasvirlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: At that point, I decided to quit.
words.example2Situation: Siz muhim qaror qabul qilingan lahzani aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: She had been struggling for months; at that point, she realized she needed to ask for help.
words.example3Translation: U bir necha oy qiynalgan edi; o'sha vaqtda u yordam so'rash kerakligini tushundi.
words.example3Situation: Siz hikoya yoki voqealar rivojini aytib berayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used when you don't know or can't explain why something happens.
words.example1: For some reason, the computer keeps crashing.
words.example1Situation: Siz tushunarsiz muammo haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: For some reason, I feel nervous.
words.example2Situation: Siz o'zingizni tushunarsiz his qilayotganingizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: For some reason, the lights go off every time it rains, even though we've checked the wiring multiple times.
words.example3Translation: Nima uchundir, har yomg'ir yog'ganda chiroqlar o'chib qoladi, garchi simlarni bir necha marta tekshirgan bo'lsak ham.
words.example3Situation: Siz tushunib bo'lmaydigan holatlar haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: The entire distance from one place to another.
words.example1: I came on foot all the way down here.
words.example1Situation: Siz uzoq masofani bosib o'tganingizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: She drove all the way down from the north.
words.example2Situation: Siz bir joydan ikkinchi joygacha butun yo'lni bosib o'tish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: He traveled all the way down from Moscow to Tashkent just to attend his best friend's wedding.
words.example3Translation: U eng yaqin do'stining to'yida qatnashish uchun Moskvadan Toshkentgacha butun yo'lni bosib keldi.
words.example3Situation: Siz uzoq masofaga sayohat qilish haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.translation: Suhbatlashmoq, eng so'ngi yangiliklardan xabardor bo'lmoq
words.definition: To get the latest information about something or someone after a period of time.
words.example1: We usually catch up on the latest news.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stlaringiz bilan yangiliklar haqida suhbatlashayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: Let's catch up on what happened.
words.example2Situation: Siz biror voqeani orqadan yetkazib olishni xohlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Every Sunday we meet at a cafe to catch up on each other's lives and share what happened during the week.
words.example3Translation: Har yakshanba kuni biz kafeda uchrashib, bir-birimizning hayotimizdagi voqealardan xabardor bo'lamiz va hafta davomida nima bo'lganini baham ko'ramiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz do'stlar bilan uzoq vaqtdan keyin uchrashganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: To have known someone for a very long time.
words.example1: John and I go back a long way.
words.example1Situation: Siz eski do'stligingizni ta'kidlayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: We go back a long way.
words.example2Situation: Siz uzoq muddatli tanishlik haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: Sarah and I go back a long way — we've been best friends since kindergarten and shared many important moments together.
words.example3Translation: Sara bilan men anchadan beri tanishmiz — biz bolalar bog'chasidan beri eng yaqin do'stmiz va birga ko'p muhim lahzalarni baham ko'rganmiz.
words.example3Situation: Siz uzoq yillik do'stlik haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: By any method possible; somehow.
words.example1: I'll find a solution one way or another.
words.example1Situation: Siz muammoni hal qilishga qat'iy qaror qilganingizni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: We'll finish this project one way or another.
words.example2Situation: Siz maqsadni amalga oshirishni aytayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: One way or another, I'm going to move to another country and start a new life there.
words.example3Translation: Qanday qilib bo'lsa ham, men boshqa mamlakatga ko'chib o'tib, u yerda yangi hayot boshlayman.
words.example3Situation: Siz qat'iyat va maqsad sari harakat haqida gapirayotganda ishlatasiz.

words.definition: Used to move the conversation to a more positive or less serious topic.
words.example1: We've talked about the problems long enough. On a lighter note, how was your trip?
words.example1Situation: Siz og'ir suhbatdan keyin mavzuni yengillashtirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: On a lighter note, did you hear about the new restaurant that opened?
words.example2Situation: Siz suhbatni ijobiy tomonga burayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The meeting was tough. On a lighter note, congratulations on your promotion!
words.example3Translation: Yig'ilish qiyin o'tdi. Yengilroq mavzuga o'tadigan bo'lsak, lavozim oshirilishi bilan tabriklayman!
words.example3Situation: Siz rasmiy suhbatda ishlatasiz.

words.translation: Shuni hisobga olgan holda / Ammo shunga qaramay
words.definition: Used to introduce a contrasting or limiting point after making a statement.
words.example1: The course is expensive. That being said, it's worth every penny.
words.example1Situation: Siz muvozanatli fikr bildirayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example2: He is very talented. That being said, he still needs more experience.
words.example2Situation: Siz ijobiy fikrdan keyin tanqidiy nuqtani qo'shayotganda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: The hotel has excellent service. That being said, the location is not very convenient.
words.example3Translation: Mehmonxona xizmati ajoyib. Ammo shunga qaramay, joylashuvi unchalik qulay emas.
words.example3Situation: Siz solishtirish yoki muvozanatli baho berayotganda ishlatasiz.
